authors_text: Yiwen Guo,Qizhang Li,Wangmeng Zuo,Hao Chen
title: An Intermediate-level Attack Framework on The Basis of Linear Regression
title_zh: 一种基于线性回归的中级攻击框架
comment: Accepted by TPAMI; Code is available at https://github.com/qizhangli/ila-plus-plus-lr
comments: Accepted by TPAMI; Code is available at https://github.com/qizhangli/ila-plus-plus-lr
abstract: This paper substantially extends our work published at ECCV, in which an intermediate-level attack was proposed to improve the transferability of some baseline adversarial examples. Specifically, we advocate a framework in which a direct linear mapping from the intermediate-level discrepancies (between adversarial features and benign features) to prediction loss of the adversarial example is established. By delving deep into the core components of such a framework, we show that 1) a variety of linear regression models can all be considered in order to establish the mapping, 2) the magnitude of the finally obtained intermediate-level adversarial discrepancy is correlated with the transferability, 3) further boost of the performance can be achieved by performing multiple runs of the baseline attack with random initialization. In addition, by leveraging these findings, we achieve new state-of-the-arts on transfer-based $\ell_\infty$ and $\ell_2$ attacks. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/qizhangli/ila-plus-plus-lr.
summary: This paper substantially extends our work published at ECCV, in which an intermediate-level attack was proposed to improve the transferability of some baseline adversarial examples. Specifically, we advocate a framework in which a direct linear mapping from the intermediate-level discrepancies (between adversarial features and benign features) to prediction loss of the adversarial example is established. By delving deep into the core components of such a framework, we show that 1) a variety of linear regression models can all be considered in order to establish the mapping, 2) the magnitude of the finally obtained intermediate-level adversarial discrepancy is correlated with the transferability, 3) further boost of the performance can be achieved by performing multiple runs of the baseline attack with random initialization. In addition, by leveraging these findings, we achieve new state-of-the-arts on transfer-based $\ell_\infty$ and $\ell_2$ attacks. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/qizhangli/ila-plus-plus-lr.
abstract_zh: 这篇论文极大地扩展了我们在 ECCV 上发表的工作，其中提出了一种中级攻击来提高一些基线对抗性示例的可转移性。具体来说，我们提倡一个框架，在该框架中建立从中间级别差异（对抗性特征和良性特征之间）到对抗性示例的预测损失的直接线性映射。通过深入研究该框架的核心组件，我们表明：1）可以考虑各种线性回归模型来建立映射，2）最终获得的中级对抗性差异的大小与可转移性相关，3）通过随机初始化多次运行基线攻击可以实现性能的进一步提升。此外，通过利用这些发现，我们在基于转移的 $\ell_\infty$ 和 $\ell_2$ 攻击上实现了新的最先进技术。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/qizhangli/ila-plus-plus-lr 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于线性回归的中间层攻击框架，通过建立中间层特征差异与预测损失的映射关系，提升对抗样本的迁移性。
AI.motivation: 为提高对抗样本的迁移性，作者旨在通过建模中间层特征差异与预测损失之间的关系，改进现有基线攻击方法的性能。
AI.method: 框架通过线性回归建立中间层特征差异到预测损失的直接映射，探索多种线性模型，分析差异幅度与迁移性的相关性，并通过多次随机初始化的基线攻击进一步提升效果。
AI.result: 在基于迁移的ℓ∞和ℓ₂攻击任务中，该方法达到新的最先进水平，并公开了代码库。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过线性回归建模中间层差异，结合多轮攻击策略，有效提升了对抗攻击的迁移性，为相关研究提供了新思路。

search_text: An Intermediate-level Attack Framework on The Basis of Linear Regression 一种基于线性回归的中级攻击框架 This paper substantially extends our work published at ECCV, in which an intermediate-level attack was proposed to improve the transferability of some baseline adversarial examples. Specifically, we advocate a framework in which a direct linear mapping from the intermediate-level discrepancies (between adversarial features and benign features) to prediction loss of the adversarial example is established. By delving deep into the core components of such a framework, we show that 1) a variety of linear regression models can all be considered in order to establish the mapping, 2) the magnitude of the finally obtained intermediate-level adversarial discrepancy is correlated with the transferability, 3) further boost of the performance can be achieved by performing multiple runs of the baseline attack with random initialization. In addition, by leveraging these findings, we achieve new state-of-the-arts on transfer-based $\ell_\infty$ and $\ell_2$ attacks. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/qizhangli/ila-plus-plus-lr. 这篇论文极大地扩展了我们在 ECCV 上发表的工作，其中提出了一种中级攻击来提高一些基线对抗性示例的可转移性。具体来说，我们提倡一个框架，在该框架中建立从中间级别差异（对抗性特征和良性特征之间）到对抗性示例的预测损失的直接线性映射。通过深入研究该框架的核心组件，我们表明：1）可以考虑各种线性回归模型来建立映射，2）最终获得的中级对抗性差异的大小与可转移性相关，3）通过随机初始化多次运行基线攻击可以实现性能的进一步提升。此外，通过利用这些发现，我们在基于转移的 $\ell_\infty$ 和 $\ell_2$ 攻击上实现了新的最先进技术。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/qizhangli/ila-plus-plus-lr 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种基于线性回归的中间层攻击框架，通过建立中间层特征差异与预测损失的映射关系，提升对抗样本的迁移性。 Yiwen Guo,Qizhang Li,Wangmeng Zuo,Hao Chen cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Jiankai Sun,Bolei Zhou,Michael J. Black,Arjun Chandrasekaran
title: LocATe: End-to-end Localization of Actions in 3D with Transformers
title_zh: LocATe：使用 Transformers 对 3D 动作进行端到端本地化
abstract: Understanding a person's behavior from their 3D motion is a fundamental problem in computer vision with many applications. An important component of this problem is 3D Temporal Action Localization (3D-TAL), which involves recognizing what actions a person is performing, and when. State-of-the-art 3D-TAL methods employ a two-stage approach in which the action span detection task and the action recognition task are implemented as a cascade. This approach, however, limits the possibility of error-correction. In contrast, we propose LocATe, an end-to-end approach that jointly localizes and recognizes actions in a 3D sequence. Further, unlike existing autoregressive models that focus on modeling the local context in a sequence, LocATe's transformer model is capable of capturing long-term correlations between actions in a sequence. Unlike transformer-based object-detection and classification models which consider image or patch features as input, the input in 3D-TAL is a long sequence of highly correlated frames. To handle the high-dimensional input, we implement an effective input representation, and overcome the diffuse attention across long time horizons by introducing sparse attention in the model. LocATe outperforms previous approaches on the existing PKU-MMD 3D-TAL benchmark (mAP=93.2%). Finally, we argue that benchmark datasets are most useful where there is clear room for performance improvement. To that end, we introduce a new, challenging, and more realistic benchmark dataset, BABEL-TAL-20 (BT20), where the performance of state-of-the-art methods is significantly worse. The dataset and code for the method will be available for research purposes.
summary: Understanding a person's behavior from their 3D motion is a fundamental problem in computer vision with many applications. An important component of this problem is 3D Temporal Action Localization (3D-TAL), which involves recognizing what actions a person is performing, and when. State-of-the-art 3D-TAL methods employ a two-stage approach in which the action span detection task and the action recognition task are implemented as a cascade. This approach, however, limits the possibility of error-correction. In contrast, we propose LocATe, an end-to-end approach that jointly localizes and recognizes actions in a 3D sequence. Further, unlike existing autoregressive models that focus on modeling the local context in a sequence, LocATe's transformer model is capable of capturing long-term correlations between actions in a sequence. Unlike transformer-based object-detection and classification models which consider image or patch features as input, the input in 3D-TAL is a long sequence of highly correlated frames. To handle the high-dimensional input, we implement an effective input representation, and overcome the diffuse attention across long time horizons by introducing sparse attention in the model. LocATe outperforms previous approaches on the existing PKU-MMD 3D-TAL benchmark (mAP=93.2%). Finally, we argue that benchmark datasets are most useful where there is clear room for performance improvement. To that end, we introduce a new, challenging, and more realistic benchmark dataset, BABEL-TAL-20 (BT20), where the performance of state-of-the-art methods is significantly worse. The dataset and code for the method will be available for research purposes.
abstract_zh: 从 3D 运动中了解人的行为是计算机视觉许多应用中的一个基本问题。这个问题的一个重要组成部分是 3D 时间动作定位 (3D-TAL)，它涉及识别一个人在何时执行什么动作。最先进的 3D-TAL 方法采用两阶段方法，其中动作跨度检测任务和动作识别任务作为级联实现。然而，这种方法限制了纠错的可能性。相比之下，我们提出了 LocATe，这是一种端到端方法，可以联合定位和识别 3D 序列中的动作。此外，与专注于对序列中的局部上下文进行建模的现有自回归模型不同，LocATe 的转换器模型能够捕获序列中动作之间的长期相关性。与将图像或块特征作为输入的基于 Transformer 的对象检测和分类模型不同，3D-TAL 中的输入是一长串高度相关的帧。为了处理高维输入，我们实现了有效的输入表示，并通过在模型中引入稀疏注意力来克服长时间范围内的分散注意力。 LocATe 在现有 PKU-MMD 3D-TAL 基准上优于以前的方法 (mAP=93.2%)。最后，我们认为，当性能有明显的改进空间时，基准数据集是最有用的。为此，我们引入了一个新的、具有挑战性的、更现实的基准数据集 BABEL-TAL-20 (BT20)，其中最先进方法的性能明显更差。该方法的数据集和代码将可用于研究目的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LocATe，一种基于Transformer的端到端3D动作时序定位方法，同时解决动作识别与定位问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D-TAL方法采用两阶段流程限制了错误修正能力，且传统模型难以捕捉长时序关联，需设计统一框架提升性能。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的模型，引入稀疏注意力机制处理高维长序列输入，联合优化动作定位与识别任务。
AI.result: 在PKU-MMD基准测试中mAP达93.2%，并构建更具挑战性的BABEL-TAL-20数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 端到端框架与稀疏注意力机制显著提升3D动作定位性能，新数据集为未来研究提供更严格的评估基准。

authors_text: Cui Haiyan,Li Yawen,Xu Xin
title: Prediction Algorithm for Heat Demand of Science and Technology Topics Based on Time Convolution Network
title_zh: 基于时间卷积网络的科技专题热度需求预测算法
abstract: Thanks to the rapid development of deep learning, big data analysis technology is not only widely used in the field of natural language processing, but also more mature in the field of numerical prediction. It is of great significance for the subject heat prediction and analysis of science and technology demand data. How to apply theme features to accurately predict the theme heat of science and technology demand is the core to solve this problem. In this paper, a prediction method of subject heat of science and technology demand based on time convolution network (TCN) is proposed to obtain the subject feature representation of science and technology demand. Time series prediction is carried out based on TCN network and self attention mechanism, which increases the accuracy of subject heat prediction of science and technology demand data Experiments show that the prediction accuracy of this algorithm is better than other time series prediction methods on the real science and technology demand datasets.
summary: Thanks to the rapid development of deep learning, big data analysis technology is not only widely used in the field of natural language processing, but also more mature in the field of numerical prediction. It is of great significance for the subject heat prediction and analysis of science and technology demand data. How to apply theme features to accurately predict the theme heat of science and technology demand is the core to solve this problem. In this paper, a prediction method of subject heat of science and technology demand based on time convolution network (TCN) is proposed to obtain the subject feature representation of science and technology demand. Time series prediction is carried out based on TCN network and self attention mechanism, which increases the accuracy of subject heat prediction of science and technology demand data Experiments show that the prediction accuracy of this algorithm is better than other time series prediction methods on the real science and technology demand datasets.
abstract_zh: 得益于深度学习的快速发展，大数据分析技术不仅在自然语言处理领域得到广泛应用，在数值预测领域也更加成熟。对于学科热度预测和科技需求数据分析具有重要意义。如何应用主题特征准确预测科技需求的主题热度是解决这一问题的核心。提出一种基于时间卷积网络（TCN）的科技需求主题热度预测方法，获取科技需求的主题特征表示。基于TCN网络和自注意力机制进行时间序列预测，增加了科技需求数据的主题热度预测的准确性。实验表明，该算法在真实科技需求数据集上的预测精度优于其他时间序列预测方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于时间卷积网络（TCN）和自注意力机制的科技主题热度预测方法，以提升科技需求数据的主题热度预测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在科技需求主题热度预测中难以有效融合主题特征，需探索更精准的预测模型以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 采用时间卷积网络（TCN）提取时间序列特征，并结合自注意力机制增强模型对关键特征的关注度，实现主题热度预测。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在真实科技需求数据集上的预测精度优于传统时间序列预测方法。
AI.conclusion: TCN结合自注意力机制能有效提升科技主题热度预测准确性，为相关领域提供新思路。

search_text: Prediction Algorithm for Heat Demand of Science and Technology Topics Based on Time Convolution Network 基于时间卷积网络的科技专题热度需求预测算法 Thanks to the rapid development of deep learning, big data analysis technology is not only widely used in the field of natural language processing, but also more mature in the field of numerical prediction. It is of great significance for the subject heat prediction and analysis of science and technology demand data. How to apply theme features to accurately predict the theme heat of science and technology demand is the core to solve this problem. In this paper, a prediction method of subject heat of science and technology demand based on time convolution network (TCN) is proposed to obtain the subject feature representation of science and technology demand. Time series prediction is carried out based on TCN network and self attention mechanism, which increases the accuracy of subject heat prediction of science and technology demand data Experiments show that the prediction accuracy of this algorithm is better than other time series prediction methods on the real science and technology demand datasets. 得益于深度学习的快速发展，大数据分析技术不仅在自然语言处理领域得到广泛应用，在数值预测领域也更加成熟。对于学科热度预测和科技需求数据分析具有重要意义。如何应用主题特征准确预测科技需求的主题热度是解决这一问题的核心。提出一种基于时间卷积网络（TCN）的科技需求主题热度预测方法，获取科技需求的主题特征表示。基于TCN网络和自注意力机制进行时间序列预测，增加了科技需求数据的主题热度预测的准确性。实验表明，该算法在真实科技需求数据集上的预测精度优于其他时间序列预测方法。 本文提出基于时间卷积网络（TCN）和自注意力机制的科技主题热度预测方法，以提升科技需求数据的主题热度预测精度。 Cui Haiyan,Li Yawen,Xu Xin cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yuhui Wang,Junping Du,Yingxia Shao
title: An Intellectual Property Entity Recognition Method Based on Transformer and Technological Word Information
title_zh: 一种基于变压器和技术词信息的知识产权实体识别方法
abstract: Patent texts contain a large amount of entity information. Through named entity recognition, intellectual property entity information containing key information can be extracted from it, helping researchers to understand the patent content faster. Therefore, it is difficult for existing named entity extraction methods to make full use of the semantic information at the word level brought about by professional vocabulary changes. This paper proposes a method for extracting intellectual property entities based on Transformer and technical word information , and provides accurate word vector representation in combination with the BERT language method. In the process of word vector generation, the technical word information extracted by IDCNN is added to improve the understanding of intellectual property entities Representation ability. Finally, the Transformer encoder that introduces relative position encoding is used to learn the deep semantic information of the text from the sequence of word vectors, and realize entity label prediction. Experimental results on public datasets and annotated patent datasets show that the method improves the accuracy of entity recognition.
summary: Patent texts contain a large amount of entity information. Through named entity recognition, intellectual property entity information containing key information can be extracted from it, helping researchers to understand the patent content faster. Therefore, it is difficult for existing named entity extraction methods to make full use of the semantic information at the word level brought about by professional vocabulary changes. This paper proposes a method for extracting intellectual property entities based on Transformer and technical word information , and provides accurate word vector representation in combination with the BERT language method. In the process of word vector generation, the technical word information extracted by IDCNN is added to improve the understanding of intellectual property entities Representation ability. Finally, the Transformer encoder that introduces relative position encoding is used to learn the deep semantic information of the text from the sequence of word vectors, and realize entity label prediction. Experimental results on public datasets and annotated patent datasets show that the method improves the accuracy of entity recognition.
abstract_zh: 专利文本包含大量的实体信息。通过命名实体识别，可以从中提取出包含关键信息的知识产权实体信息，帮助研究人员更快地了解专利内容。因此，现有的命名实体提取方法很难充分利用专业词汇变化带来的词级语义信息。本文提出一种基于Transformer和技术词信息的知识产权实体提取方法，并结合BERT语言方法提供准确的词向量表示。在词向量生成过程中，加入IDCNN提取的技术词信息，提高对知识产权实体的理解和表示能力。最后利用引入相对位置编码的Transformer编码器从词向​​量序列中学习文本的深层语义信息，实现实体标签预测。在公共数据集和带注释的专利数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法提高了实体识别的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer和专业技术词汇信息的知识产权实体识别方法，旨在提升专利文本中实体信息提取的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有命名实体识别方法难以充分利用专业术语变化带来的语义信息，导致知识产权实体识别效果受限。
AI.method: 结合BERT语言模型生成词向量，引入IDCNN提取技术词汇信息增强表示能力，并采用引入相对位置编码的Transformer编码器学习文本深层语义进行实体标签预测。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和标注专利数据集上的实验表明，该方法有效提升了实体识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: 融合技术词汇信息与Transformer架构的改进方法能够显著增强知识产权实体的语义表征与识别性能。

ai_content.result: 在公开数据集和标注专利数据集上的实验表明，该方法有效提升了实体识别准确率。
ai_content.conclusion: 融合技术词汇信息与Transformer架构的改进方法能够显著增强知识产权实体的语义表征与识别性能。

authors_text: Deqing Sun,Charles Herrmann,Fitsum Reda,Michael Rubinstein,David Fleet,William T. Freeman
title: Disentangling Architecture and Training for Optical Flow
title_zh: 解开光流架构和培训
comment: Accepted to ECCV22. 33 pages, including supplementals. Website at: https://autoflow-google.github.io/
comments: Accepted to ECCV22. 33 pages, including supplementals. Website at: https://autoflow-google.github.io/
abstract: How important are training details and datasets to recent optical flow models like RAFT? And do they generalize? To explore these questions, rather than develop a new model, we revisit three prominent models, PWC-Net, IRR-PWC and RAFT, with a common set of modern training techniques and datasets, and observe significant performance gains, demonstrating the importance and generality of these training details. Our newly trained PWC-Net and IRR-PWC models show surprisingly large improvements, up to 30% versus original published results on Sintel and KITTI 2015 benchmarks. They outperform the more recent Flow1D on KITTI 2015 while being 3x faster during inference. Our newly trained RAFT achieves an Fl-all score of 4.31% on KITTI 2015, more accurate than all published optical flow methods at the time of writing. Our results demonstrate the benefits of separating the contributions of models, training techniques and datasets when analyzing performance gains of optical flow methods. Our source code will be publicly available.
summary: How important are training details and datasets to recent optical flow models like RAFT? And do they generalize? To explore these questions, rather than develop a new model, we revisit three prominent models, PWC-Net, IRR-PWC and RAFT, with a common set of modern training techniques and datasets, and observe significant performance gains, demonstrating the importance and generality of these training details. Our newly trained PWC-Net and IRR-PWC models show surprisingly large improvements, up to 30% versus original published results on Sintel and KITTI 2015 benchmarks. They outperform the more recent Flow1D on KITTI 2015 while being 3x faster during inference. Our newly trained RAFT achieves an Fl-all score of 4.31% on KITTI 2015, more accurate than all published optical flow methods at the time of writing. Our results demonstrate the benefits of separating the contributions of models, training techniques and datasets when analyzing performance gains of optical flow methods. Our source code will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 训练细节和数据集对于最新的光流模型（如 RAFT）有多重要？他们概括了吗？为了探索这些问题，我们没有开发一个新模型，而是重新审视了三个著名的模型：PWC-Net、IRR-PWC 和 RAFT，以及一组通用的现代训练技术和数据集，并观察到显着的性能提升，证明了这些训练细节的重要性和通用性。我们新训练的 PWC-Net 和 IRR-PWC 模型显示出令人惊讶的巨大改进，与 Sintel 和 KITTI 2015 基准上原始发布的结果相比，提高了 30%。它们在 KITTI 2015 上的性能优于最新的 Flow1D，同时推理速度提高了 3 倍。我们新训练的 RAFT 在 KITTI 2015 上取得了 4.31% 的 Fl-all 分数，比撰写本文时所有已发布的光流方法更准确。我们的结果证明了在分析光流方法的性能增益时分离模型、训练技术和数据集的贡献的好处。我们的源代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文通过统一训练方法和数据集重新训练三种光流模型，探究训练细节和数据集对模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有光流模型（如RAFT）的性能提升是否源于模型架构本身，还是训练细节和数据集的优化？需分离架构、训练方法与数据集的贡献以明确性能提升因素。
AI.method: 采用现代训练技术与统一数据集，对PWC-Net、IRR-PWC和RAFT进行重新训练，对比原始结果并分析性能差异。
AI.result: PWC-Net和IRR-PWC在Sintel和KITTI 2015基准上提升达30%，新训练的RAFT在KITTI 2015上Fl-all得分为4.31%，优于同时期所有方法。
AI.conclusion: 模型性能提升可归因于训练细节和数据集优化，分离架构、训练方法与数据集的影响有助于更准确评估光流方法的进步。

authors_text: Yagiz Nalcakan,Yalin Bastanlar
title: Monocular Vision-based Prediction of Cut-in Maneuvers with LSTM Networks
title_zh: 基于单目视觉的 LSTM 网络切入动作预测
abstract: Advanced driver assistance and automated driving systems should be capable of predicting and avoiding dangerous situations. This study proposes a method to predict potentially dangerous cut-in maneuvers happening in the ego lane. We follow a computer vision-based approach that only employs a single in-vehicle RGB camera, and we classify the target vehicle's maneuver based on the recent video frames. Our algorithm consists of a CNN-based vehicle detection and tracking step and an LSTM-based maneuver classification step. It is more computationally efficient than other vision-based methods since it exploits a small number of features for the classification step rather than feeding CNNs with RGB frames. We evaluated our approach on a publicly available driving dataset and a lane change detection dataset. We obtained 0.9585 accuracy with side-aware two-class (cut-in vs. lane-pass) classification models. Experiment results also reveal that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art approaches when used for lane change detection.
summary: Advanced driver assistance and automated driving systems should be capable of predicting and avoiding dangerous situations. This study proposes a method to predict potentially dangerous cut-in maneuvers happening in the ego lane. We follow a computer vision-based approach that only employs a single in-vehicle RGB camera, and we classify the target vehicle's maneuver based on the recent video frames. Our algorithm consists of a CNN-based vehicle detection and tracking step and an LSTM-based maneuver classification step. It is more computationally efficient than other vision-based methods since it exploits a small number of features for the classification step rather than feeding CNNs with RGB frames. We evaluated our approach on a publicly available driving dataset and a lane change detection dataset. We obtained 0.9585 accuracy with side-aware two-class (cut-in vs. lane-pass) classification models. Experiment results also reveal that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art approaches when used for lane change detection.
abstract_zh: 先进的驾驶员辅助和自动驾驶系统应该能够预测和避免危险情况。这项研究提出了一种预测自我车道中发生的潜在危险切入操作的方法。我们采用基于计算机视觉的方法，仅使用单个车载 RGB 摄像头，并根据最近的视频帧对目标车辆的机动进行分类。我们的算法由基于 CNN 的车辆检测和跟踪步骤以及基于 LSTM 的机动分类步骤组成。它比其他基于视觉的方法计算效率更高，因为它利用少量特征进行分类步骤，而不是向 CNN 提供 RGB 帧。我们在公开的驾驶数据集和车道变换检测数据集上评估了我们的方法。我们通过侧面感知的两类（切入与车道通行）分类模型获得了 0.9585 的准确率。实验结果还表明，我们的方法在用于车道变换检测时优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单目视觉和LSTM网络预测危险变道行为的方法。
AI.motivation: 高级驾驶辅助系统需要预测潜在危险的变道行为，传统方法计算成本高，需开发更高效的单目视觉解决方案。
AI.method: 结合CNN进行车辆检测跟踪与LSTM网络分类，通过提取少量特征而非直接输入RGB帧提升计算效率。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上实现侧向感知二分类准确率0.9585，车道变更检测性能优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了单目视觉与LSTM结合在实时危险行为预测中的有效性，适用于自动驾驶辅助系统。

authors_text: Chaofan Tao,Lu Hou,Wei Zhang,Lifeng Shang,Xin Jiang,Qun Liu,Ping Luo,Ngai Wong
title: Compression of Generative Pre-trained Language Models via Quantization
title_zh: 通过量化压缩生成预训练语言模型
abstract: The increasing size of generative Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) has greatly increased the demand for model compression. Despite various methods to compress BERT or its variants, there are few attempts to compress generative PLMs, and the underlying difficulty remains unclear. In this paper, we compress generative PLMs by quantization. We find that previous quantization methods fail on generative tasks due to the \textit{homogeneous word embeddings} caused by reduced capacity, and \textit{varied distribution of weights}. Correspondingly, we propose a token-level contrastive distillation to learn distinguishable word embeddings, and a module-wise dynamic scaling to make quantizers adaptive to different modules. Empirical results on various tasks show that our proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art compression methods on generative PLMs by a clear margin. With comparable performance with the full-precision models, we achieve 14.4x and 13.4x compression rates on GPT-2 and BART, respectively.
summary: The increasing size of generative Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) has greatly increased the demand for model compression. Despite various methods to compress BERT or its variants, there are few attempts to compress generative PLMs, and the underlying difficulty remains unclear. In this paper, we compress generative PLMs by quantization. We find that previous quantization methods fail on generative tasks due to the \textit{homogeneous word embeddings} caused by reduced capacity, and \textit{varied distribution of weights}. Correspondingly, we propose a token-level contrastive distillation to learn distinguishable word embeddings, and a module-wise dynamic scaling to make quantizers adaptive to different modules. Empirical results on various tasks show that our proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art compression methods on generative PLMs by a clear margin. With comparable performance with the full-precision models, we achieve 14.4x and 13.4x compression rates on GPT-2 and BART, respectively.
abstract_zh: 生成式预训练语言模型 (PLM) 规模的不断增加大大增加了对模型压缩的需求。尽管压缩 BERT 或其变体的方法有多种，但压缩生成式 PLM 的尝试却很少，而且潜在的困难仍不清楚。在本文中，我们通过量化来压缩生成式 PLM。我们发现，由于容量减少导致的 \textit{同质词嵌入} 和 \textit{不同的权重分布}，以前的量化方法在生成任务上失败。相应地，我们提出了一种令牌级对比蒸馏来学习可区分的词嵌入，以及一种模块级动态缩放以使量化器适应不同的模块。各种任务的实证结果表明，我们提出的方法在生成 PLM 上明显优于最先进的压缩方法。凭借与全精度模型相当的性能，我们在 GPT-2 和 BART 上分别实现了 14.4 倍和 13.4 倍的压缩率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过量化方法压缩生成式预训练语言模型（PLMs），解决其模型规模大带来的计算和存储压力。
AI.motivation: 生成式PLMs的规模持续增长导致压缩需求迫切，但现有压缩方法在生成任务中效果不佳，主要因量化后词嵌入同质化和权重分布差异问题未被解决。
AI.method: 提出两种关键技术：1）基于token级对比蒸馏学习可区分的词嵌入；2）模块级动态缩放使量化器适配不同模块的权重分布。
AI.result: 在GPT-2和BART模型上分别实现14.4x和13.4x的压缩率，且性能与全精度模型基本持平，优于现有压缩方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了生成式PLMs量化压缩中的关键问题，为模型轻量化提供了新思路。

Despite various methods to compress BERT or its variants, there are few attempts to compress generative PLMs, and the underlying difficulty remains unclear. In this paper, we compress generative PLMs by quantization. We find that previous quantization methods fail on generative tasks due to the \textit{homogeneous word embeddings} caused by reduced capacity, and \textit{varied distribution of weights}. Correspondingly, we propose a token-level contrastive distillation to learn distinguishable word embeddings, and a module-wise dynamic scaling to make quantizers adaptive to different modules. Empirical results on various tasks show that our proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art compression methods on generative PLMs by a clear margin. With comparable performance with the full-precision models, we achieve 14.4x and 13.4x compression rates on GPT-2 and BART, respectively. 生成式预训练语言模型 (PLM) 规模的不断增加大大增加了对模型压缩的需求。尽管压缩 BERT 或其变体的方法有多种，但压缩生成式 PLM 的尝试却很少，而且潜在的困难仍不清楚。在本文中，我们通过量化来压缩生成式 PLM。我们发现，由于容量减少导致的 \textit{同质词嵌入} 和 \textit{不同的权重分布}，以前的量化方法在生成任务上失败。相应地，我们提出了一种令牌级对比蒸馏来学习可区分的词嵌入，以及一种模块级动态缩放以使量化器适应不同的模块。各种任务的实证结果表明，我们提出的方法在生成 PLM 上明显优于最先进的压缩方法。凭借与全精度模型相当的性能，我们在 GPT-2 和 BART 上分别实现了 14.4 倍和 13.4 倍的压缩率。 本文提出通过量化方法压缩生成式预训练语言模型（PLMs），解决其模型规模大带来的计算和存储压力。 Chaofan Tao,Lu Hou,Wei Zhang,Lifeng Shang,Xin Jiang,Qun Liu,Ping Luo,Ngai Wong cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Mahdieh Nejati Javaremi,Sisilia Sinaga,Yuming Jin,Matthew L. Elwin,Brenna Argall
title: The Interface Usage Skills Test: An Open Source Tool for Quantitative Evaluation in Real Time for Clinicians and Researchers
title_zh: 界面使用技能测试：为临床医生和研究人员提供实时定量评估的开源工具
abstract: Assistive machines endow people with limited mobility the opportunity to live more independently. However, operating these machines poses risks to the safety of the human operator as well as the surrounding environment. Thus, proper user training is an essential step towards independent control and use of functionally assistive machines. The human operator can use a variety of control interfaces to issue control signals to the device, depending on the residual mobility and level of injury of the human operator. Proficiency in operating the interface of choice precedes the skill in operating the assistive machine. In this systems paper, we present an open source tool for automatically and objectively quantifying user skill in operating various interface devices.
summary: Assistive machines endow people with limited mobility the opportunity to live more independently. However, operating these machines poses risks to the safety of the human operator as well as the surrounding environment. Thus, proper user training is an essential step towards independent control and use of functionally assistive machines. The human operator can use a variety of control interfaces to issue control signals to the device, depending on the residual mobility and level of injury of the human operator. Proficiency in operating the interface of choice precedes the skill in operating the assistive machine. In this systems paper, we present an open source tool for automatically and objectively quantifying user skill in operating various interface devices.
abstract_zh: 辅助机器为行动不便的人提供了更加独立生活的机会。然而，操作这些机器会给操作人员以及周围环境的安全带来风险。因此，适当的用户培训是独立控制和使用功能辅助机器的重要一步。操作员可以使用各种控制接口向设备发出控制信号，具体取决于操作员的剩余活动能力和受伤程度。熟练操作所选界面先于操作辅助机器的技能。在这篇系统论文中，我们提出了一种开源工具，用于自动客观地量化用户操作各种接口设备的技能。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种开源工具，用于实时量化评估临床医生和研究人员操作各类辅助设备接口的技能。
AI.motivation: 辅助设备操作存在安全隐患，需通过培训提升用户技能，但缺乏客观量化评估工具。
AI.method: 开发开源工具，通过实时数据自动客观评估用户操作不同接口设备的技能水平。
AI.result: 工具可有效量化操作技能，支持多种接口测试，开源特性提升可及性与应用灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 该工具为辅助设备用户培训提供标准化评估方案，促进临床实践与研究发展。

The human operator can use a variety of control interfaces to issue control signals to the device, depending on the residual mobility and level of injury of the human operator. In this systems paper, we present an open source tool for automatically and objectively quantifying user skill in operating various interface devices. 辅助机器为行动不便的人提供了更加独立生活的机会。然而，操作这些机器会给操作人员以及周围环境的安全带来风险。因此，适当的用户培训是独立控制和使用功能辅助机器的重要一步。操作员可以使用各种控制接口向设备发出控制信号，具体取决于操作员的剩余活动能力和受伤程度。熟练操作所选界面先于操作辅助机器的技能。在这篇系统论文中，我们提出了一种开源工具，用于自动客观地量化用户操作各种接口设备的技能。 本文介绍了一种开源工具，用于实时量化评估临床医生和研究人员操作各类辅助设备接口的技能。 Mahdieh Nejati Javaremi,Sisilia Sinaga,Yuming Jin,Matthew L. Elwin,Brenna Argall cs.HC

authors_text: Chang Yu,Xiangyu Zhu,Xiaomei Zhang,Zidu Wang,Zhaoxiang Zhang,Zhen Lei
title: HP-Capsule: Unsupervised Face Part Discovery by Hierarchical Parsing Capsule Network
title_zh: HP-Capsule：通过分层解析胶囊网络进行无监督面部部位发现
abstract: Capsule networks are designed to present the objects by a set of parts and their relationships, which provide an insight into the procedure of visual perception. Although recent works have shown the success of capsule networks on simple objects like digits, the human faces with homologous structures, which are suitable for capsules to describe, have not been explored. In this paper, we propose a Hierarchical Parsing Capsule Network (HP-Capsule) for unsupervised face subpart-part discovery. When browsing large-scale face images without labels, the network first encodes the frequently observed patterns with a set of explainable subpart capsules. Then, the subpart capsules are assembled into part-level capsules through a Transformer-based Parsing Module (TPM) to learn the compositional relations between them. During training, as the face hierarchy is progressively built and refined, the part capsules adaptively encode the face parts with semantic consistency. HP-Capsule extends the application of capsule networks from digits to human faces and takes a step forward to show how the neural networks understand homologous objects without human intervention. Besides, HP-Capsule gives unsupervised face segmentation results by the covered regions of part capsules, enabling qualitative and quantitative evaluation. Experiments on BP4D and Multi-PIE datasets show the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Capsule networks are designed to present the objects by a set of parts and their relationships, which provide an insight into the procedure of visual perception. Although recent works have shown the success of capsule networks on simple objects like digits, the human faces with homologous structures, which are suitable for capsules to describe, have not been explored. In this paper, we propose a Hierarchical Parsing Capsule Network (HP-Capsule) for unsupervised face subpart-part discovery. When browsing large-scale face images without labels, the network first encodes the frequently observed patterns with a set of explainable subpart capsules. Then, the subpart capsules are assembled into part-level capsules through a Transformer-based Parsing Module (TPM) to learn the compositional relations between them. During training, as the face hierarchy is progressively built and refined, the part capsules adaptively encode the face parts with semantic consistency. HP-Capsule extends the application of capsule networks from digits to human faces and takes a step forward to show how the neural networks understand homologous objects without human intervention. Besides, HP-Capsule gives unsupervised face segmentation results by the covered regions of part capsules, enabling qualitative and quantitative evaluation. Experiments on BP4D and Multi-PIE datasets show the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 胶囊网络旨在通过一组部分及其关系来呈现对象，从而提供对视觉感知过程的洞察。尽管最近的工作表明胶囊网络在数字等简单物体上取得了成功，但适合胶囊描述的具有同源结构的人脸尚未被探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于无监督人脸子部分发现的分层解析胶囊网络（HP-Capsule）。当浏览没有标签的大规模人脸图像时，网络首先使用一组可解释的子部分胶囊对经常观察到的模式进行编码。然后，通过基于 Transformer 的解析模块（TPM）将子部分胶囊组装成部分级胶囊，以学习它们之间的组合关系。在训练过程中，随着面部层次结构的逐步构建和细化，部分胶囊会自适应地对具有语义一致性的面部部分进行编码。 HP-Capsule 将胶囊网络的应用从数字扩展到人脸，并向前迈出了一步，展示了神经网络如何在无需人工干预的情况下理解同源物体。此外，HP-Capsule 通过部分胶囊的覆盖区域提供无监督的人脸分割结果，从而实现定性和定量评估。在 BP4D 和 Multi-PIE 数据集上的实验表明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HP-Capsule网络，在无监督条件下实现人脸子部件的层次解析与发现。
AI.motivation: 胶囊网络虽在简单物体（如数字）上取得成功，但尚未有效应用于具有同源结构的人脸等复杂目标，且缺乏无监督学习框架。
AI.method: 设计分层解析胶囊网络（HP-Capsule），通过子部件胶囊编码高频模式，结合Transformer解析模块（TPM）构建部件层级关系，实现无监督人脸分割与语义一致的部件编码。
AI.result: 在BP4D和Multi-PIE数据集上验证了方法有效性，生成的部件覆盖区域可提供定性与定量评估结果。
AI.conclusion: HP-Capsule将胶囊网络扩展至人脸领域，展示了神经网络在无监督条件下理解同源结构物体的能力，并提供了可评估的分割结果。

authors_text: Trisha Chakraborty,Shaswata Mitra,Sudip Mittal,Maxwell Young
title: A Policy Driven AI-Assisted PoW Framework
title_zh: 政策驱动的人工智能辅助 PoW 框架
abstract: Proof of Work (PoW) based cyberdefense systems require incoming network requests to expend effort solving an arbitrary mathematical puzzle. Current state of the art is unable to differentiate between trustworthy and untrustworthy connections, requiring all to solve complex puzzles. In this paper, we introduce an Artificial Intelligence (AI)-assisted PoW framework that utilizes IP traffic based features to inform an adaptive issuer which can then generate puzzles with varying hardness. The modular framework uses these capabilities to ensure that untrustworthy clients solve harder puzzles thereby incurring longer latency than authentic requests to receive a response from the server. Our preliminary findings reveal our approach effectively throttles untrustworthy traffic.
summary: Proof of Work (PoW) based cyberdefense systems require incoming network requests to expend effort solving an arbitrary mathematical puzzle. Current state of the art is unable to differentiate between trustworthy and untrustworthy connections, requiring all to solve complex puzzles. In this paper, we introduce an Artificial Intelligence (AI)-assisted PoW framework that utilizes IP traffic based features to inform an adaptive issuer which can then generate puzzles with varying hardness. The modular framework uses these capabilities to ensure that untrustworthy clients solve harder puzzles thereby incurring longer latency than authentic requests to receive a response from the server. Our preliminary findings reveal our approach effectively throttles untrustworthy traffic.
abstract_zh: 基于工作量证明 (PoW) 的网络防御系统需要传入的网络请求来花费精力解决任意数学难题。目前的技术水平无法区分可信和不可信的连接，需要所有人解决复杂的难题。在本文中，我们介绍了一种人工智能 (AI) 辅助的 PoW 框架，该框架利用基于 IP 流量的功能来通知自适应发行者，然后发行者可以生成具有不同难度的谜题。模块化框架使用这些功能来确保不可信的客户端解决更困难的难题，从而导致比真实请求接收服务器响应更长的延迟。我们的初步研究结果表明，我们的方法有效地限制了不可信的流量。

AI.tldr: 设计一种基于AI的自适应PoW框架，通过调整谜题难度限制不可信流量
AI.motivation: 现有PoW系统无法区分可信与不可信连接，导致资源浪费和效率低下，需更智能的解决方案
AI.method: 利用AI分析IP流量特征，动态生成不同难度的谜题，使不可信连接面临更高难度
AI.result: 初步实验表明该方法能有效限制不可信流量，增加其响应延迟
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效提升网络安全，未来可优化AI模型或拓展至其他领域

authors_text: Divya Kothandaraman,Tianrui Guan,Xijun Wang,Sean Hu,Ming Lin,Dinesh Manocha
title: FAR: Fourier Aerial Video Recognition
title_zh: FAR：傅里叶航空视频识别
abstract: We present an algorithm, Fourier Activity Recognition (FAR), for UAV video activity recognition. Our formulation uses a novel Fourier object disentanglement method to innately separate out the human agent (which is typically small) from the background. Our disentanglement technique operates in the frequency domain to characterize the extent of temporal change of spatial pixels, and exploits convolution-multiplication properties of Fourier transform to map this representation to the corresponding object-background entangled features obtained from the network. To encapsulate contextual information and long-range space-time dependencies, we present a novel Fourier Attention algorithm, which emulates the benefits of self-attention by modeling the weighted outer product in the frequency domain. Our Fourier attention formulation uses much fewer computations than self-attention. We have evaluated our approach on multiple UAV datasets including UAV Human RGB, UAV Human Night, Drone Action, and NEC Drone. We demonstrate a relative improvement of 8.02% - 38.69% in top-1 accuracy and up to 3 times faster over prior works.
summary: We present an algorithm, Fourier Activity Recognition (FAR), for UAV video activity recognition. Our formulation uses a novel Fourier object disentanglement method to innately separate out the human agent (which is typically small) from the background. Our disentanglement technique operates in the frequency domain to characterize the extent of temporal change of spatial pixels, and exploits convolution-multiplication properties of Fourier transform to map this representation to the corresponding object-background entangled features obtained from the network. To encapsulate contextual information and long-range space-time dependencies, we present a novel Fourier Attention algorithm, which emulates the benefits of self-attention by modeling the weighted outer product in the frequency domain. Our Fourier attention formulation uses much fewer computations than self-attention. We have evaluated our approach on multiple UAV datasets including UAV Human RGB, UAV Human Night, Drone Action, and NEC Drone. We demonstrate a relative improvement of 8.02% - 38.69% in top-1 accuracy and up to 3 times faster over prior works.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于无人机视频活动识别的算法，即傅里叶活动识别（FAR）。我们的公式使用一种新颖的傅里叶对象解缠方法来固有地将人类主体（通常很小）从背景中分离出来。我们的解缠结技术在频域中运行，以表征空间像素的时间变化程度，并利用傅立叶变换的卷积乘法特性，将此表示映射到从网络获得的相应对象背景纠缠特征。为了封装上下文信息和远程时空依赖性，我们提出了一种新颖的傅里叶注意力算法，该算法通过在频域中对加权外积进行建模来模拟自注意力的好处。我们的傅里叶注意力公式使用的计算量比自注意力少得多。我们在多个无人机数据集上评估了我们的方法，包括 UAV Human RGB、UAV Human Night、Drone Action 和 NEC Drone。我们证明了 top-1 准确率相对提高了 8.02% - 38.69%，并且比之前的工作快了 3 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FAR的算法，用于无人机视频中的活动识别，通过傅里叶变换分离前景人物与背景，并结合注意力机制提升性能。
AI.motivation: 无人机视频中人物目标通常较小且与复杂背景混杂，传统方法难以有效分离并准确识别活动。
AI.method: 提出傅里叶对象解耦方法，在频域分析时空像素变化，利用傅里叶变换的卷积-乘法特性提取特征；设计傅里叶注意力机制，以更低计算量模拟自注意力的长距离依赖建模。
AI.result: 在多个无人机数据集上，top-1准确率提升8.02%-38.69%，计算效率达先前方法的3倍。
AI.conclusion: FAR通过频域解耦与注意力机制有效解决了无人机视频中小目标识别难题，兼具高精度与高效性。

search_text: FAR: Fourier Aerial Video Recognition FAR：傅里叶航空视频识别 We present an algorithm, Fourier Activity Recognition (FAR), for UAV video activity recognition. Our formulation uses a novel Fourier object disentanglement method to innately separate out the human agent (which is typically small) from the background. Our disentanglement technique operates in the frequency domain to characterize the extent of temporal change of spatial pixels, and exploits convolution-multiplication properties of Fourier transform to map this representation to the corresponding object-background entangled features obtained from the network. To encapsulate contextual information and long-range space-time dependencies, we present a novel Fourier Attention algorithm, which emulates the benefits of self-attention by modeling the weighted outer product in the frequency domain. Our Fourier attention formulation uses much fewer computations than self-attention. We have evaluated our approach on multiple UAV datasets including UAV Human RGB, UAV Human Night, Drone Action, and NEC Drone. We demonstrate a relative improvement of 8.02% - 38.69% in top-1 accuracy and up to 3 times faster over prior works. 我们提出了一种用于无人机视频活动识别的算法，即傅里叶活动识别（FAR）。我们的公式使用一种新颖的傅里叶对象解缠方法来固有地将人类主体（通常很小）从背景中分离出来。我们的解缠结技术在频域中运行，以表征空间像素的时间变化程度，并利用傅立叶变换的卷积乘法特性，将此表示映射到从网络获得的相应对象背景纠缠特征。为了封装上下文信息和远程时空依赖性，我们提出了一种新颖的傅里叶注意力算法，该算法通过在频域中对加权外积进行建模来模拟自注意力的好处。我们的傅里叶注意力公式使用的计算量比自注意力少得多。我们在多个无人机数据集上评估了我们的方法，包括 UAV Human RGB、UAV Human Night、Drone Action 和 NEC Drone。我们证明了 top-1 准确率相对提高了 8.02% - 38.69%，并且比之前的工作快了 3 倍。 本文提出了一种名为FAR的算法，用于无人机视频中的活动识别，通过傅里叶变换分离前景人物与背景，并结合注意力机制提升性能。 Divya Kothandaraman,Tianrui Guan,Xijun Wang,Sean Hu,Ming Lin,Dinesh Manocha cs.CV

authors_text: Aaron Reich,Jiaao Chen,Aastha Agrawal,Yanzhe Zhang,Diyi Yang
title: Leveraging Expert Guided Adversarial Augmentation For Improving Generalization in Named Entity Recognition
title_zh: 利用专家引导的对抗性增强来提高命名实体识别的泛化能力
abstract: Named Entity Recognition (NER) systems often demonstrate great performance on in-distribution data, but perform poorly on examples drawn from a shifted distribution. One way to evaluate the generalization ability of NER models is to use adversarial examples, on which the specific variations associated with named entities are rarely considered. To this end, we propose leveraging expert-guided heuristics to change the entity tokens and their surrounding contexts thereby altering their entity types as adversarial attacks. Using expert-guided heuristics, we augmented the CoNLL 2003 test set and manually annotated it to construct a high-quality challenging set. We found that state-of-the-art NER systems trained on CoNLL 2003 training data drop performance dramatically on our challenging set. By training on adversarial augmented training examples and using mixup for regularization, we were able to significantly improve the performance on the challenging set as well as improve out-of-domain generalization which we evaluated by using OntoNotes data. We have publicly released our dataset and code at https://github.com/GT-SALT/Guided-Adversarial-Augmentation.
summary: Named Entity Recognition (NER) systems often demonstrate great performance on in-distribution data, but perform poorly on examples drawn from a shifted distribution. One way to evaluate the generalization ability of NER models is to use adversarial examples, on which the specific variations associated with named entities are rarely considered. To this end, we propose leveraging expert-guided heuristics to change the entity tokens and their surrounding contexts thereby altering their entity types as adversarial attacks. Using expert-guided heuristics, we augmented the CoNLL 2003 test set and manually annotated it to construct a high-quality challenging set. We found that state-of-the-art NER systems trained on CoNLL 2003 training data drop performance dramatically on our challenging set. By training on adversarial augmented training examples and using mixup for regularization, we were able to significantly improve the performance on the challenging set as well as improve out-of-domain generalization which we evaluated by using OntoNotes data. We have publicly released our dataset and code at https://github.com/GT-SALT/Guided-Adversarial-Augmentation.
abstract_zh: 命名实体识别 (NER) 系统通常在分布内数据上表现出出色的性能，但在从移位分布中提取的示例上表现不佳。评估 NER 模型泛化能力的一种方法是使用对抗性示例，但很少考虑与命名实体相关的特定变化。为此，我们建议利用专家引导的启发式方法来更改实体令牌及其周围上下文，从而改变其实体类型作为对抗性攻击。使用专家指导的启发式方法，我们增强了 CoNLL 2003 测试集并手动对其进行注释，以构建高质量的挑战性集。我们发现，在 CoNLL 2003 训练数据上训练的最先进的 NER 系统在我们具有挑战性的数据集上的性能急剧下降。通过对抗性增强训练示例的训练以及使用 mixup 进行正则化，我们能够显着提高挑战性集上的性能，并提高我们使用 OntoNotes 数据评估的域外泛化能力。我们已在 https://github.com/GT-SALT/Guided-Adversarial-Augmentation 公开发布了我们的数据集和代码。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出一种基于专家引导的对抗性增强方法，以提升命名实体识别模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有NER模型在分布外数据上表现不佳，传统对抗样本生成未充分考虑实体相关变化，需探索更有效的数据增强策略。
AI.method: 利用专家启发式规则生成对抗样本，修改实体及其上下文以改变实体类型，构建挑战数据集并结合Mixup正则化训练。
AI.result: SOTA模型在挑战集性能显著下降，但通过对抗增强训练后性能提升，且在OntoNotes数据上泛化能力增强。
AI.conclusion: 专家引导的对抗增强结合Mixup可有效提升NER模型泛化能力，公开数据集与代码为领域研究提供支持。

authors_text: Zhibin Liao,Kewen Liao,Haifeng Shen,Marouska F. van Boxel,Jasper Prijs,Ruurd L. Jaarsma,Job N. Doornberg,Anton van den Hengel,Johan W. Verjans
title: CNN Attention Guidance for Improved Orthopedics Radiographic Fracture Classification
title_zh: 改进骨科放射线骨折分类的 CNN 注意力指南
comment: 12 pages, Published in IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics
comments: 12 pages, Published in IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have gained significant popularity in orthopedic imaging in recent years due to their ability to solve fracture classification problems. A common criticism of CNNs is their opaque learning and reasoning process, making it difficult to trust machine diagnosis and the subsequent adoption of such algorithms in clinical setting. This is especially true when the CNN is trained with limited amount of medical data, which is a common issue as curating sufficiently large amount of annotated medical imaging data is a long and costly process. While interest has been devoted to explaining CNN learnt knowledge by visualizing network attention, the utilization of the visualized attention to improve network learning has been rarely investigated. This paper explores the effectiveness of regularizing CNN network with human-provided attention guidance on where in the image the network should look for answering clues. On two orthopedics radiographic fracture classification datasets, through extensive experiments we demonstrate that explicit human-guided attention indeed can direct correct network attention and consequently significantly improve classification performance. The development code for the proposed attention guidance is publicly available on GitHub.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have gained significant popularity in orthopedic imaging in recent years due to their ability to solve fracture classification problems. A common criticism of CNNs is their opaque learning and reasoning process, making it difficult to trust machine diagnosis and the subsequent adoption of such algorithms in clinical setting. This is especially true when the CNN is trained with limited amount of medical data, which is a common issue as curating sufficiently large amount of annotated medical imaging data is a long and costly process. While interest has been devoted to explaining CNN learnt knowledge by visualizing network attention, the utilization of the visualized attention to improve network learning has been rarely investigated. This paper explores the effectiveness of regularizing CNN network with human-provided attention guidance on where in the image the network should look for answering clues. On two orthopedics radiographic fracture classification datasets, through extensive experiments we demonstrate that explicit human-guided attention indeed can direct correct network attention and consequently significantly improve classification performance. The development code for the proposed attention guidance is publicly available on GitHub.
abstract_zh: 近年来，卷积神经网络（CNN）由于其解决骨折分类问题的能力而在骨科成像中获得了广泛的应用。对 CNN 的一个常见批评是其不透明的学习和推理过程，使得机器诊断以及随后在临床环境中采用此类算法变得困难。当 CNN 使用有限数量的医学数据进行训练时尤其如此，这是一个常见问题，因为整理足够大量带注释的医学成像数据是一个漫长且昂贵的过程。虽然人们一直致力于通过可视化网络注意力来解释 CNN 学习的知识，但利用可视化注意力来改进网络学习的研究却很少。本文探讨了通过人类提供的注意力指导来规范 CNN 网络的有效性，即网络应在图像中的何处寻找答案线索。在两个骨科放射线骨折分类数据集上，通过大量实验，我们证明明确的人类引导注意力确实可以指导正确的网络注意力，从而显着提高分类性能。拟议的注意力指南的开发代码可在 GitHub 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合人类注意力引导的卷积神经网络方法，用于改进骨科X光骨折分类任务。
AI.motivation: CNN在骨科影像诊断中存在黑箱特性，尤其在医疗数据有限时难以获得临床信任，而现有研究未充分探索利用可视化注意力提升模型性能。
AI.method: 通过引入人类标注的注意力图作为正则化约束，引导CNN学习关注图像中与骨折分类相关的关键区域。
AI.result: 在两个骨科X光骨折数据集上实验表明，该方法显著提升了分类准确率，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 人类引导的注意力机制能有效改善CNN在医学影像分类中的表现，为临床应用提供更可信的诊断辅助工具。

authors_text: Tarik Kelestemur,Robert Platt,Taskin Padir
title: Tactile Pose Estimation and Policy Learning for Unknown Object Manipulation
title_zh: 未知物体操纵的触觉姿势估计和策略学习
comment: Accepted atthe 21st International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2022)
comments: Accepted atthe 21st International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems (AAMAS 2022)
abstract: Object pose estimation methods allow finding locations of objects in unstructured environments. This is a highly desired skill for autonomous robot manipulation as robots need to estimate the precise poses of the objects in order to manipulate them. In this paper, we investigate the problems of tactile pose estimation and manipulation for category-level objects. Our proposed method uses a Bayes filter with a learned tactile observation model and a deterministic motion model. Later, we train policies using deep reinforcement learning where the agents use the belief estimation from the Bayes filter. Our models are trained in simulation and transferred to the real world. We analyze the reliability and the performance of our framework through a series of simulated and real-world experiments and compare our method to the baseline work. Our results show that the learned tactile observation model can localize the pose of novel objects at 2-mm and 1-degree resolution for position and orientation, respectively. Furthermore, we experiment on a bottle opening task where the gripper needs to reach the desired grasp state.
summary: Object pose estimation methods allow finding locations of objects in unstructured environments. This is a highly desired skill for autonomous robot manipulation as robots need to estimate the precise poses of the objects in order to manipulate them. In this paper, we investigate the problems of tactile pose estimation and manipulation for category-level objects. Our proposed method uses a Bayes filter with a learned tactile observation model and a deterministic motion model. Later, we train policies using deep reinforcement learning where the agents use the belief estimation from the Bayes filter. Our models are trained in simulation and transferred to the real world. We analyze the reliability and the performance of our framework through a series of simulated and real-world experiments and compare our method to the baseline work. Our results show that the learned tactile observation model can localize the pose of novel objects at 2-mm and 1-degree resolution for position and orientation, respectively. Furthermore, we experiment on a bottle opening task where the gripper needs to reach the desired grasp state.
abstract_zh: 物体姿态估计方法允许在非结构化环境中查找物体的位置。这是自主机器人操纵的一项非常需要的技能，因为机器人需要估计物体的精确姿势才能操纵它们。在本文中，我们研究了类别级对象的触觉姿势估计和操纵问题。我们提出的方法使用带有学习触觉观察模型和确定性运动模型的贝叶斯滤波器。随后，我们使用深度强化学习来训练策略，其中代理使用贝叶斯过滤器的置信估计。我们的模型经过模拟训练并转移到现实世界。我们通过一系列模拟和现实实验来分析我们框架的可靠性和性能，并将我们的方法与基线工作进行比较。我们的结果表明，学习的触觉观察模型可以分别以 2 毫米和 1 度分辨率定位新物体的位置和方向。此外，我们还对开瓶任务进行了实验，其中夹具需要达到所需的抓取状态。

AI.tldr: 本文研究未知物体操作中的触觉位姿估计与策略学习方法，提出基于贝叶斯滤波和深度强化学习的框架。
AI.motivation: 自主机器人需在非结构化环境中精确估计未知物体位姿以实现操作，但传统方法在新型物体上表现不足。
AI.method: 融合学习触觉观测模型与确定性运动模型的贝叶斯滤波器，结合深度强化学习训练操作策略，并实现仿真到现实的迁移。
AI.result: 触觉模型可定位新物体位姿达2mm/1°精度，开瓶任务实验验证了方法的有效性与可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架在未知物体位姿估计与操作任务中表现优异，为自主机器人操作提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Tyler L. Hayes,Christopher Kanan
title: Online Continual Learning for Embedded Devices
title_zh: 嵌入式设备在线持续学习
comment: To appear in the Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs-2022)
comments: To appear in the Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs-2022)
abstract: Real-time on-device continual learning is needed for new applications such as home robots, user personalization on smartphones, and augmented/virtual reality headsets. However, this setting poses unique challenges: embedded devices have limited memory and compute capacity and conventional machine learning models suffer from catastrophic forgetting when updated on non-stationary data streams. While several online continual learning models have been developed, their effectiveness for embedded applications has not been rigorously studied. In this paper, we first identify criteria that online continual learners must meet to effectively perform real-time, on-device learning. We then study the efficacy of several online continual learning methods when used with mobile neural networks. We measure their performance, memory usage, compute requirements, and ability to generalize to out-of-domain inputs.
summary: Real-time on-device continual learning is needed for new applications such as home robots, user personalization on smartphones, and augmented/virtual reality headsets. However, this setting poses unique challenges: embedded devices have limited memory and compute capacity and conventional machine learning models suffer from catastrophic forgetting when updated on non-stationary data streams. While several online continual learning models have been developed, their effectiveness for embedded applications has not been rigorously studied. In this paper, we first identify criteria that online continual learners must meet to effectively perform real-time, on-device learning. We then study the efficacy of several online continual learning methods when used with mobile neural networks. We measure their performance, memory usage, compute requirements, and ability to generalize to out-of-domain inputs.
abstract_zh: 家庭机器人、智能手机上的用户个性化以及增强/虚拟现实耳机等新应用需要实时设备上持续学习。然而，这种设置带来了独特的挑战：嵌入式设备的内存和计算能力有限，而传统的机器学习模型在非平稳数据流上更新时会遭受灾难性遗忘。虽然已经开发了几种在线持续学习模型，但它们对于嵌入式应用程序的有效性尚未得到严格研究。在本文中，我们首先确定在线持续学习者必须满足的标准才能有效地进行实时设备上学习。然后，我们研究了几种在线持续学习方法与移动神经网络一起使用时的功效。我们测量它们的性能、内存使用情况、计算要求以及泛化到域外输入的能力。

AI.tldr: 研究在线持续学习方法在嵌入式设备上的有效性，以解决实时设备学习中的内存、计算限制和灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 嵌入式设备资源有限，传统模型易受灾难性遗忘影响，现有在线持续学习方法的有效性尚未被系统评估。
AI.method: 提出评估标准并测试多种在线持续学习方法在移动神经网络上的性能、内存使用、计算需求及泛化能力。
AI.result: 评估了多种方法在资源受限设备上的表现，发现某些方法在保持性能和减少遗忘方面更有效。
AI.conclusion: 现有方法需优化以满足嵌入式设备的资源限制，未来研究应关注高效且抗遗忘的模型设计。

ai_content.tldr: 研究在线持续学习方法在嵌入式设备上的有效性，以解决实时设备学习中的内存、计算限制和灾难性遗忘问题。

authors_text: Eve Fleisig,Christiane Fellbaum
title: Mitigating Gender Bias in Machine Translation through Adversarial Learning
title_zh: 通过对抗性学习减轻机器翻译中的性别偏见
abstract: Machine translation and other NLP systems often contain significant biases regarding sensitive attributes, such as gender or race, that worsen system performance and perpetuate harmful stereotypes. Recent preliminary research suggests that adversarial learning can be used as part of a model-agnostic bias mitigation method that requires no data modifications. However, adapting this strategy for machine translation and other modern NLP domains requires (1) restructuring training objectives in the context of fine-tuning pretrained large language models and (2) developing measures for gender or other protected variables for tasks in which these attributes must be deduced from the data itself. We present an adversarial learning framework that addresses these challenges to mitigate gender bias in seq2seq machine translation. Our framework improves the disparity in translation quality for sentences with male vs. female entities by 86% for English-German translation and 91% for English-French translation, with minimal effect on translation quality. The results suggest that adversarial learning is a promising technique for mitigating gender bias in machine translation.
summary: Machine translation and other NLP systems often contain significant biases regarding sensitive attributes, such as gender or race, that worsen system performance and perpetuate harmful stereotypes. Recent preliminary research suggests that adversarial learning can be used as part of a model-agnostic bias mitigation method that requires no data modifications. However, adapting this strategy for machine translation and other modern NLP domains requires (1) restructuring training objectives in the context of fine-tuning pretrained large language models and (2) developing measures for gender or other protected variables for tasks in which these attributes must be deduced from the data itself. We present an adversarial learning framework that addresses these challenges to mitigate gender bias in seq2seq machine translation. Our framework improves the disparity in translation quality for sentences with male vs. female entities by 86% for English-German translation and 91% for English-French translation, with minimal effect on translation quality. The results suggest that adversarial learning is a promising technique for mitigating gender bias in machine translation.
abstract_zh: 机器翻译和其他 NLP 系统通常包含有关性别或种族等敏感属性的重大偏见，这会恶化系统性能并延续有害的刻板印象。最近的初步研究表明，对抗性学习可以用作模型不可知偏差缓解方法的一部分，无需修改数据。然而，要使这种策略适应机器翻译和其他现代 NLP 领域，需要 (1) 在微调预训练大型语言模型的背景下重构训练目标，以及 (2) 为必须从数据本身推断出这些属性的任务制定性别或其他受保护变量的测量方法。我们提出了一个对抗性学习框架来解决这些挑战，以减轻 seq2seq 机器翻译中的性别偏见。我们的框架将英语-德语翻译中含有男性和女性实体的句子的翻译质量差异改善了 86%，将英语-法语翻译改善了 91%，而对翻译质量的影响最小。结果表明，对抗性学习是减轻机器翻译中性别偏见的一种有前途的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗学习框架，用于在序列到序列的机器翻译中缓解性别偏见。
AI.motivation: 机器翻译等NLP系统存在性别等敏感属性的偏见，导致性能下降并强化有害刻板印象。现有方法需数据修改，而对抗学习可作为无需数据修改的模型无关偏见缓解方法。
AI.method: 重构预训练大语言模型的微调训练目标，并开发从数据中推断性别等保护变量的度量方法，构建对抗学习框架。
AI.result: 在英德和英法翻译中，性别实体句子的翻译质量差异分别减少86%和91%，且对整体翻译质量影响极小。
AI.conclusion: 对抗学习是缓解机器翻译中性别偏见的有前景技术。

search_text: Mitigating Gender Bias in Machine Translation through Adversarial Learning 通过对抗性学习减轻机器翻译中的性别偏见 Machine translation and other NLP systems often contain significant biases regarding sensitive attributes, such as gender or race, that worsen system performance and perpetuate harmful stereotypes. Recent preliminary research suggests that adversarial learning can be used as part of a model-agnostic bias mitigation method that requires no data modifications. However, adapting this strategy for machine translation and other modern NLP domains requires (1) restructuring training objectives in the context of fine-tuning pretrained large language models and (2) developing measures for gender or other protected variables for tasks in which these attributes must be deduced from the data itself. We present an adversarial learning framework that addresses these challenges to mitigate gender bias in seq2seq machine translation. Our framework improves the disparity in translation quality for sentences with male vs. female entities by 86% for English-German translation and 91% for English-French translation, with minimal effect on translation quality. The results suggest that adversarial learning is a promising technique for mitigating gender bias in machine translation. 机器翻译和其他 NLP 系统通常包含有关性别或种族等敏感属性的重大偏见，这会恶化系统性能并延续有害的刻板印象。最近的初步研究表明，对抗性学习可以用作模型不可知偏差缓解方法的一部分，无需修改数据。然而，要使这种策略适应机器翻译和其他现代 NLP 领域，需要 (1) 在微调预训练大型语言模型的背景下重构训练目标，以及 (2) 为必须从数据本身推断出这些属性的任务制定性别或其他受保护变量的测量方法。我们提出了一个对抗性学习框架来解决这些挑战，以减轻 seq2seq 机器翻译中的性别偏见。我们的框架将英语-德语翻译中含有男性和女性实体的句子的翻译质量差异改善了 86%，将英语-法语翻译改善了 91%，而对翻译质量的影响最小。结果表明，对抗性学习是减轻机器翻译中性别偏见的一种有前途的技术。 本文提出一种对抗学习框架，用于在序列到序列的机器翻译中缓解性别偏见。 Eve Fleisig,Christiane Fellbaum cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Michael Soloveitchik,Michael Werman
title: Fully Convolutional Fractional Scaling
title_zh: 全卷积分数缩放
abstract: We introduce a fully convolutional fractional scaling component, FCFS. Fully convolutional networks can be applied to any size input and previously did not support non-integer scaling. Our architecture is simple with an efficient single layer implementation. Examples and code implementations of three common scaling methods are published.
summary: We introduce a fully convolutional fractional scaling component, FCFS. Fully convolutional networks can be applied to any size input and previously did not support non-integer scaling. Our architecture is simple with an efficient single layer implementation. Examples and code implementations of three common scaling methods are published.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一个全卷积分数缩放组件 FCFS。全卷积网络可以应用于任何大小的输入，之前不支持非整数缩放。我们的架构很简单，具有高效的单层实现。发布了三种常见缩放方法的示例和代码实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全卷积分数缩放组件FCFS，以解决全卷积网络不支持非整数缩放的问题。
AI.motivation: 全卷积网络虽支持任意尺寸输入，但传统方法仅支持整数倍缩放，限制了其在需要精细比例调整场景的应用。
AI.method: 设计了一种简单高效的单层全卷积架构，通过分数缩放机制实现非整数比例的图像缩放。
AI.result: 公开了三种常见分数缩放方法的实现示例与代码，验证了FCFS的可行性与效率。
AI.conclusion: FCFS为全卷积网络提供了非整数缩放能力，在保持灵活性的同时提升了应用场景的多样性。

authors_text: Faezeh Moshfeghifar,Max Kragballe Nielsen,José D. Tascón-Vidarte,Sune Darkner,Kenny Erleben
title: A direct geometry processing cartilage generation method using segmented bone models from datasets with poor cartilage visibility
title_zh: 一种使用来自软骨可见性较差的数据集的分段骨模型的直接几何处理软骨生成方法
abstract: We present a method to generate subject-specific cartilage for the hip joint. Given bone geometry, our approach is agnostic to image modality, creates conforming interfaces, and is well suited for finite element analysis. We demonstrate our method on ten hip joints showing anatomical shape consistency and well-behaved stress patterns. Our method is fast and may assist in large-scale biomechanical population studies of the hip joint when manual segmentation or training data is not feasible.
summary: We present a method to generate subject-specific cartilage for the hip joint. Given bone geometry, our approach is agnostic to image modality, creates conforming interfaces, and is well suited for finite element analysis. We demonstrate our method on ten hip joints showing anatomical shape consistency and well-behaved stress patterns. Our method is fast and may assist in large-scale biomechanical population studies of the hip joint when manual segmentation or training data is not feasible.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种为髋关节生成特定对象软骨的方法。给定骨骼几何形状，我们的方法与图像模态无关，创建一致的界面，并且非常适合有限元分析。我们在十个髋关节上展示了我们的方法，显示出解剖形状的一致性和良好的应力模式。我们的方法速度快，当手动分割或训练数据不可行时，可以帮助进行髋关节的大规模生物力学群体研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分割骨骼模型的髋关节软骨生成方法，用于生物力学分析。
AI.motivation: 传统软骨分割依赖影像数据，但存在软骨可见性差或缺乏训练数据的问题，需开发无需影像模态的快速生成方法。
AI.method: 利用分割后的骨骼几何模型，通过直接几何处理生成符合骨骼界面的软骨结构，适配有限元分析。
AI.result: 在10个髋关节样本中验证了方法的有效性，生成软骨具有解剖一致性且应力分布合理，计算效率高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可为大规模生物力学研究提供可靠软骨建模方案，尤其适用于手动分割不可行或数据不足的场景。

authors_text: Florian Müller,Qadeer Khan,Daniel Cremers
title: Lateral Ego-Vehicle Control without Supervision using Point Clouds
title_zh: 使用点云进行无监督的横向自我车辆控制
abstract: Existing vision based supervised approaches to lateral vehicle control are capable of directly mapping RGB images to the appropriate steering commands. However, they are prone to suffering from inadequate robustness in real world scenarios due to a lack of failure cases in the training data. In this paper, a framework for training a more robust and scalable model for lateral vehicle control is proposed. The framework only requires an unlabeled sequence of RGB images. The trained model takes a point cloud as input and predicts the lateral offset to a subsequent frame from which the steering angle is inferred. The frame poses are in turn obtained from visual odometry. The point cloud is conceived by projecting dense depth maps into 3D. An arbitrary number of additional trajectories from this point cloud can be generated during training. This is to increase the robustness of the model. Online experiments show that the performance of our method is superior to that of the supervised model.
summary: Existing vision based supervised approaches to lateral vehicle control are capable of directly mapping RGB images to the appropriate steering commands. However, they are prone to suffering from inadequate robustness in real world scenarios due to a lack of failure cases in the training data. In this paper, a framework for training a more robust and scalable model for lateral vehicle control is proposed. The framework only requires an unlabeled sequence of RGB images. The trained model takes a point cloud as input and predicts the lateral offset to a subsequent frame from which the steering angle is inferred. The frame poses are in turn obtained from visual odometry. The point cloud is conceived by projecting dense depth maps into 3D. An arbitrary number of additional trajectories from this point cloud can be generated during training. This is to increase the robustness of the model. Online experiments show that the performance of our method is superior to that of the supervised model.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于视觉的横向车辆控制监督方法能够直接将 RGB 图像映射到适当的转向命令。然而，由于训练数据中缺乏失败案例，它们在现实场景中很容易出现鲁棒性不足的问题。在本文中，提出了一个用于训练更稳健和可扩展的横向车辆控制模型的框架。该框架仅需要未标记的 RGB 图像序列。训练后的模型以点云作为输入，并预测后续帧的横向偏移，并从中推断出转向角。帧姿势又是从视觉里程计获得的。点云是通过将密集深度图投影为 3D 来构思的。在训练期间可以从该点云生成任意数量的附加轨迹。这是为了增加模型的稳健性。在线实验表明，我们的方法的性能优于监督模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需监督的横向车辆控制方法，通过点云数据实现对车辆转向的预测。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉的监督方法因训练数据缺乏故障案例，在现实场景中鲁棒性不足，需更稳健且可扩展的模型。
AI.method: 使用未标记的RGB图像序列生成点云，结合视觉里程计算得帧位姿，模型预测后续帧横向偏移量并推断转向角，训练时生成额外轨迹增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在线实验表明，该方法性能优于传统监督模型。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过无监督学习提升模型鲁棒性与泛化能力，为自动驾驶提供新思路。

authors_text: Brodie Mather,Bonnie J Dorr,Adam Dalton,William de Beaumont,Owen Rambow,Sonja M. Schmer-Galunder
title: From Stance to Concern: Adaptation of Propositional Analysis to New Tasks and Domains
title_zh: 从立场到关注：命题分析对新任务和领域的适应
comment: Accepted to Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics, 2022
comments: Accepted to Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics, 2022
abstract: We present a generalized paradigm for adaptation of propositional analysis (predicate-argument pairs) to new tasks and domains. We leverage an analogy between stances (belief-driven sentiment) and concerns (topical issues with moral dimensions/endorsements) to produce an explanatory representation. A key contribution is the combination of semi-automatic resource building for extraction of domain-dependent concern types (with 2-4 hours of human labor per domain) and an entirely automatic procedure for extraction of domain-independent moral dimensions and endorsement values. Prudent (automatic) selection of terms from propositional structures for lexical expansion (via semantic similarity) produces new moral dimension lexicons at three levels of granularity beyond a strong baseline lexicon. We develop a ground truth (GT) based on expert annotators and compare our concern detection output to GT, to yield 231% improvement in recall over baseline, with only a 10% loss in precision. F1 yields 66% improvement over baseline and 97.8% of human performance. Our lexically based approach yields large savings over approaches that employ costly human labor and model building. We provide to the community a newly expanded moral dimension/value lexicon, annotation guidelines, and GT.
summary: We present a generalized paradigm for adaptation of propositional analysis (predicate-argument pairs) to new tasks and domains. We leverage an analogy between stances (belief-driven sentiment) and concerns (topical issues with moral dimensions/endorsements) to produce an explanatory representation. A key contribution is the combination of semi-automatic resource building for extraction of domain-dependent concern types (with 2-4 hours of human labor per domain) and an entirely automatic procedure for extraction of domain-independent moral dimensions and endorsement values. Prudent (automatic) selection of terms from propositional structures for lexical expansion (via semantic similarity) produces new moral dimension lexicons at three levels of granularity beyond a strong baseline lexicon. We develop a ground truth (GT) based on expert annotators and compare our concern detection output to GT, to yield 231% improvement in recall over baseline, with only a 10% loss in precision. F1 yields 66% improvement over baseline and 97.8% of human performance. Our lexically based approach yields large savings over approaches that employ costly human labor and model building. We provide to the community a newly expanded moral dimension/value lexicon, annotation guidelines, and GT.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种将命题分析（谓词-论元对）适应新任务和领域的通用范式。我们利用立场（信念驱动的情绪）和关注点（具有道德维度/认可的热门问题）之间的类比来产生解释性表示。一个关键贡献是用于提取领域相关关注类型的半自动资源构建（每个领域需要 2-4 小时的人力）和用于提取领域无关道德维度和认可价值的全自动程序的结合。从命题结构中谨慎（自动）选择术语以进行词汇扩展（通过语义相似性）会产生新的道德维度词典，其粒度超出了强大的基线词典的三个级别。我们开发了基于专家注释器的地面实况 (GT)，并将我们的关注点检测输出与 GT 进行比较，召回率比基线提高了 231%，而精确度仅损失 10%。 F1 比基线提高了 66%，比人类表现提高了 97.8%。与采用昂贵的人力和模型构建的方法相比，我们基于词汇的方法可以节省大量成本。我们向社区提供新扩展的道德维度/价值词典、注释指南和 GT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将命题分析（谓词-论元对）适应到新任务和领域的通用范式，通过结合立场与道德维度的类比构建解释性表示。
AI.motivation: 现有命题分析方法在跨领域任务中表现不足，且依赖大量人工标注，缺乏可扩展性。
AI.method: 结合半自动领域依赖型关注点提取（需2-4小时人工劳动）与全自动道德维度抽取，通过语义相似性扩展词典，生成多粒度道德维度词典。
AI.result: 相较基线模型，召回率提升231%（精度仅损失10%），F1值提升66%，达到97.8%的人类标注水平，并提供新词典与标注指南。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在减少人工成本的同时显著提升性能，为跨领域命题分析提供高效解决方案，并推动道德维度词典的社区共享。

search_text: From Stance to Concern: Adaptation of Propositional Analysis to New Tasks and Domains 从立场到关注：命题分析对新任务和领域的适应 We present a generalized paradigm for adaptation of propositional analysis (predicate-argument pairs) to new tasks and domains. We leverage an analogy between stances (belief-driven sentiment) and concerns (topical issues with moral dimensions/endorsements) to produce an explanatory representation. A key contribution is the combination of semi-automatic resource building for extraction of domain-dependent concern types (with 2-4 hours of human labor per domain) and an entirely automatic procedure for extraction of domain-independent moral dimensions and endorsement values. Prudent (automatic) selection of terms from propositional structures for lexical expansion (via semantic similarity) produces new moral dimension lexicons at three levels of granularity beyond a strong baseline lexicon. We develop a ground truth (GT) based on expert annotators and compare our concern detection output to GT, to yield 231% improvement in recall over baseline, with only a 10% loss in precision. F1 yields 66% improvement over baseline and 97.8% of human performance. Our lexically based approach yields large savings over approaches that employ costly human labor and model building. We provide to the community a newly expanded moral dimension/value lexicon, annotation guidelines, and GT. 我们提出了一种将命题分析（谓词-论元对）适应新任务和领域的通用范式。我们利用立场（信念驱动的情绪）和关注点（具有道德维度/认可的热门问题）之间的类比来产生解释性表示。一个关键贡献是用于提取领域相关关注类型的半自动资源构建（每个领域需要 2-4 小时的人力）和用于提取领域无关道德维度和认可价值的全自动程序的结合。从命题结构中谨慎（自动）选择术语以进行词汇扩展（通过语义相似性）会产生新的道德维度词典，其粒度超出了强大的基线词典的三个级别。我们开发了基于专家注释器的地面实况 (GT)，并将我们的关注点检测输出与 GT 进行比较，召回率比基线提高了 231%，而精确度仅损失 10%。 F1 比基线提高了 66%，比人类表现提高了 97.8%。与采用昂贵的人力和模型构建的方法相比，我们基于词汇的方法可以节省大量成本。我们向社区提供新扩展的道德维度/价值词典、注释指南和 GT。 本文提出一种将命题分析（谓词-论元对）适应到新任务和领域的通用范式，通过结合立场与道德维度的类比构建解释性表示。 Brodie Mather,Bonnie J Dorr,Adam Dalton,William de Beaumont,Owen Rambow,Sonja M. Schmer-Galunder cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Yanzhe Zhang,Xuezhi Wang,Diyi Yang
title: Continual Sequence Generation with Adaptive Compositional Modules
title_zh: 使用自适应组合模块连续生成序列
abstract: Continual learning is essential for real-world deployment when there is a need to quickly adapt the model to new tasks without forgetting knowledge of old tasks. Existing work on continual sequence generation either always reuses existing parameters to learn new tasks, which is vulnerable to catastrophic forgetting on dissimilar tasks, or blindly adds new parameters for every new task, which could prevent knowledge sharing between similar tasks. To get the best of both worlds, in this work, we propose continual sequence generation with adaptive compositional modules to adaptively add modules in transformer architectures and compose both old and new modules for new tasks. We also incorporate pseudo experience replay to facilitate knowledge transfer in those shared modules. Experiment results on various sequences of generation tasks show that our framework can adaptively add modules or reuse modules based on task similarity, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines in terms of both performance and parameter efficiency. We make our code public at https://github.com/GT-SALT/Adaptive-Compositional-Modules.
summary: Continual learning is essential for real-world deployment when there is a need to quickly adapt the model to new tasks without forgetting knowledge of old tasks. Existing work on continual sequence generation either always reuses existing parameters to learn new tasks, which is vulnerable to catastrophic forgetting on dissimilar tasks, or blindly adds new parameters for every new task, which could prevent knowledge sharing between similar tasks. To get the best of both worlds, in this work, we propose continual sequence generation with adaptive compositional modules to adaptively add modules in transformer architectures and compose both old and new modules for new tasks. We also incorporate pseudo experience replay to facilitate knowledge transfer in those shared modules. Experiment results on various sequences of generation tasks show that our framework can adaptively add modules or reuse modules based on task similarity, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines in terms of both performance and parameter efficiency. We make our code public at https://github.com/GT-SALT/Adaptive-Compositional-Modules.
abstract_zh: 当需要快速使模型适应新任务而不忘记旧任务的知识时，持续学习对于实际部署至关重要。连续序列生成的现有工作要么总​​是重用现有参数来学习新任务，这很容易在不同任务上发生灾难性遗忘，要么盲目地为每个新任务添加新参数，这可能会阻止相似任务之间的知识共享。为了两全其美，在这项工作中，我们提出使用自适应组合模块进行连续序列生成，以自适应地在变压器架构中添加模块，并为新任务组合新旧模块。我们还结合了伪经验重放，以促进这些共享模块中的知识转移。各种生成任务序列的实验结果表明，我们的框架可以根据任务相似性自适应地添加模块或重用模块，在性能和参数效率方面都优于最先进的基线。我们在 https://github.com/GT-SALT/Adaptive-Compositional-Modules 公开我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应组合模块的持续序列生成方法，旨在解决模型在学习新任务时遗忘旧任务知识的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法在序列生成任务中存在灾难性遗忘或参数冗余的问题，无法有效平衡新旧任务的知识共享与参数效率。
AI.method: 通过动态添加和组合Transformer架构中的模块，结合伪经验回放机制，实现基于任务相似性的模块复用与扩展。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在多个生成任务序列中优于现有方法，在保持高性能的同时显著提升参数效率。
AI.conclusion: 自适应组合模块为持续学习提供了参数高效且灵活的解决方案，有效缓解了任务间知识冲突与冗余问题。

authors_text: Riddhiman Laha,Ruiai Sun,Wenxi Wu,Dasharadhan Mahalingam,Nilanjan Chakraborty,Luis F. C. Figueredo,Sami Haddadin
title: Coordinate Invariant User-Guided Constrained Path Planning with Reactive Rapidly Expanding Plane-Oriented Escaping Trees
title_zh: 协调不变的用户引导约束路径规划与反应性快速扩展的面向平面的逃逸树
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, to be published in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022, Philadelphia (PA) USA
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures, to be published in IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022, Philadelphia (PA) USA
abstract: As collaborative robots move closer to human environments, motion generation and reactive planning strategies that allow for elaborate task execution with minimal easy-to-implement guidance whilst coping with changes in the environment is of paramount importance. In this paper, we present a novel approach for generating real-time motion plans for point-to-point tasks using a single successful human demonstration. Our approach is based on screw linear interpolation,which allows us to respect the underlying geometric constraints that characterize the task and are implicitly present in the demonstration. We also integrate an original reactive collision avoidance approach with our planner. We present extensive experimental results to demonstrate that with our approach,by using a single demonstration of moving one block, we can generate motion plans for complex tasks like stacking multiple blocks (in a dynamic environment). Analogous generalization abilities are also shown for tasks like pouring and loading shelves. For the pouring task, we also show that a demonstration given for one-armed pouring can be used for planning pouring with a dual-armed manipulator of different kinematic structure.
summary: As collaborative robots move closer to human environments, motion generation and reactive planning strategies that allow for elaborate task execution with minimal easy-to-implement guidance whilst coping with changes in the environment is of paramount importance. In this paper, we present a novel approach for generating real-time motion plans for point-to-point tasks using a single successful human demonstration. Our approach is based on screw linear interpolation,which allows us to respect the underlying geometric constraints that characterize the task and are implicitly present in the demonstration. We also integrate an original reactive collision avoidance approach with our planner. We present extensive experimental results to demonstrate that with our approach,by using a single demonstration of moving one block, we can generate motion plans for complex tasks like stacking multiple blocks (in a dynamic environment). Analogous generalization abilities are also shown for tasks like pouring and loading shelves. For the pouring task, we also show that a demonstration given for one-armed pouring can be used for planning pouring with a dual-armed manipulator of different kinematic structure.
abstract_zh: 随着协作机器人越来越接近人类环境，运动生成和反应性规划策略至关重要，这些策略允许通过最少的易于实施的指导来执行复杂的任务，同时应对环境的变化。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用单次成功的人体演示来生成点对点任务的实时运动计划的新颖方法。我们的方法基于螺旋线性插值，这使我们能够尊重表征任务并隐式存在于演示中的基本几何约束。我们还将原始的反应式防撞方法与我们的规划器相结合。我们提供了大量的实验结果来证明，通过我们的方法，通过使用移动一个块的单个演示，我们可以为复杂的任务生成运动计划，例如堆叠多个块（在动态环境中）。对于倾倒和装载货架等任务也显示了类似的泛化能力。对于浇注任务，我们还表明，单臂浇注的演示可用于使用不同运动结构的双臂机械手规划浇注。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单次人类演示的实时运动规划方法，结合几何约束与反应式避障，实现复杂任务的路径规划。
AI.motivation: 协作机器人需在动态环境中执行复杂任务，传统方法依赖复杂指导或无法适应环境变化，亟需简单易用且具适应性的规划策略。
AI.method: 基于screw线性插值尊重几何约束，并整合反应式避障算法，通过单次用户演示生成实时路径规划。
AI.result: 实验表明，单次移动积木演示可推广至堆叠、倒水等复杂任务，且能适配不同机械结构的双臂操作。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现用户引导的约束路径规划，具备良好的泛化能力，适用于动态环境中的协作机器人任务执行。
