ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，单次移动积木演示可推广至堆叠、倒水等复杂任务，且能适配不同机械结构的双臂操作。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法有效实现用户引导的约束路径规划，具备良好的泛化能力，适用于动态环境中的协作机器人任务执行。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于单次人类演示的实时运动规划方法，结合几何约束与反应式避障，实现复杂任务的路径规划。
motivation: 协作机器人需在动态环境中执行复杂任务，传统方法依赖复杂指导或无法适应环境变化，亟需简单易用且具适应性的规划策略。
method: 基于screw线性插值尊重几何约束，并整合反应式避障算法，通过单次用户演示生成实时路径规划。
result: 实验表明，单次移动积木演示可推广至堆叠、倒水等复杂任务，且能适配不同机械结构的双臂操作。
conclusion: 该方法有效实现用户引导的约束路径规划，具备良好的泛化能力，适用于动态环境中的协作机器人任务执行。
search_text: Coordinate Invariant User-Guided Constrained Path Planning with Reactive Rapidly Expanding Plane-Oriented Escaping Trees 协调不变的用户引导约束路径规划与反应性快速扩展的面向平面的逃逸树 As collaborative robots move closer to human environments, motion generation and reactive planning strategies that allow for elaborate task execution with minimal easy-to-implement guidance whilst coping with changes in the environment is of paramount importance. In this paper, we present a novel approach for generating real-time motion plans for point-to-point tasks using a single successful human demonstration. Our approach is based on screw linear interpolation,which allows us to respect the underlying geometric constraints that characterize the task and are implicitly present in the demonstration. We also integrate an original reactive collision avoidance approach with our planner. We present extensive experimental results to demonstrate that with our approach,by using a single demonstration of moving one block, we can generate motion plans for complex tasks like stacking multiple blocks (in a dynamic environment). Analogous generalization abilities are also shown for tasks like pouring and loading shelves. For the pouring task, we also show that a demonstration given for one-armed pouring can be used for planning pouring with a dual-armed manipulator of different kinematic structure. 随着协作机器人越来越接近人类环境，运动生成和反应性规划策略至关重要，这些策略允许通过最少的易于实施的指导来执行复杂的任务，同时应对环境的变化。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用单次成功的人体演示来生成点对点任务的实时运动计划的新颖方法。我们的方法基于螺旋线性插值，这使我们能够尊重表征任务并隐式存在于演示中的基本几何约束。我们还将原始的反应式防撞方法与我们的规划器相结合。我们提供了大量的实验结果来证明，通过我们的方法，通过使用移动一个块的单个演示，我们可以为复杂的任务生成运动计划，例如堆叠多个块（在动态环境中）。对于倾倒和装载货架等任务也显示了类似的泛化能力。对于浇注任务，我们还表明，单臂浇注的演示可用于使用不同运动结构的双臂机械手规划浇注。 本文提出一种基于单次人类演示的实时运动规划方法，结合几何约束与反应式避障，实现复杂任务的路径规划。 Riddhiman Laha,Ruiai Sun,Wenxi Wu,Dasharadhan Mahalingam,Nilanjan Chakraborty,Luis F. C. Figueredo,Sami Haddadin cs.RO

authors_text: Wei Xiong,Neil Yeung,Shubo Wang,Haofu Liao,Liyun Wang,Jiebo Luo
title: Breast Cancer Induced Bone Osteolysis Prediction Using Temporal Variational Auto-Encoders
title_zh: 使用时间变分自动编码器预测乳腺癌引起的骨溶解
abstract: Objective and Impact Statement. We adopt a deep learning model for bone osteolysis prediction on computed tomography (CT) images of murine breast cancer bone metastases. Given the bone CT scans at previous time steps, the model incorporates the bone-cancer interactions learned from the sequential images and generates future CT images. Its ability of predicting the development of bone lesions in cancer-invading bones can assist in assessing the risk of impending fractures and choosing proper treatments in breast cancer bone metastasis. Introduction. Breast cancer often metastasizes to bone, causes osteolytic lesions, and results in skeletal related events (SREs) including severe pain and even fatal fractures. Although current imaging techniques can detect macroscopic bone lesions, predicting the occurrence and progression of bone lesions remains a challenge. Methods. We adopt a temporal variational auto-encoder (T-VAE) model that utilizes a combination of variational auto-encoders and long short-term memory networks to predict bone lesion emergence on our micro-CT dataset containing sequential images of murine tibiae. Given the CT scans of murine tibiae at early weeks, our model can learn the distribution of their future states from data. Results. We test our model against other deep learning-based prediction models on the bone lesion progression prediction task. Our model produces much more accurate predictions than existing models under various evaluation metrics. Conclusion. We develop a deep learning framework that can accurately predict and visualize the progression of osteolytic bone lesions. It will assist in planning and evaluating treatment strategies to prevent SREs in breast cancer patients.
summary: Objective and Impact Statement. We adopt a deep learning model for bone osteolysis prediction on computed tomography (CT) images of murine breast cancer bone metastases. Given the bone CT scans at previous time steps, the model incorporates the bone-cancer interactions learned from the sequential images and generates future CT images. Its ability of predicting the development of bone lesions in cancer-invading bones can assist in assessing the risk of impending fractures and choosing proper treatments in breast cancer bone metastasis. Introduction. Breast cancer often metastasizes to bone, causes osteolytic lesions, and results in skeletal related events (SREs) including severe pain and even fatal fractures. Although current imaging techniques can detect macroscopic bone lesions, predicting the occurrence and progression of bone lesions remains a challenge. Methods. We adopt a temporal variational auto-encoder (T-VAE) model that utilizes a combination of variational auto-encoders and long short-term memory networks to predict bone lesion emergence on our micro-CT dataset containing sequential images of murine tibiae. Given the CT scans of murine tibiae at early weeks, our model can learn the distribution of their future states from data. Results. We test our model against other deep learning-based prediction models on the bone lesion progression prediction task. Our model produces much more accurate predictions than existing models under various evaluation metrics. Conclusion. We develop a deep learning framework that can accurately predict and visualize the progression of osteolytic bone lesions. It will assist in planning and evaluating treatment strategies to prevent SREs in breast cancer patients.
abstract_zh: 目标和影响声明。我们采用深度学习模型对小鼠乳腺癌骨转移的计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像进行骨溶解预测。考虑到之前时间步骤的骨 CT 扫描，该模型结合了从连续图像中学习到的骨癌相互作用，并生成未来的 CT 图像。它预测癌症侵袭骨中骨病变发展的能力可以帮助评估即将发生骨折的风险并选择乳腺癌骨转移的适当治疗方法。介绍。乳腺癌经常转移至骨骼，引起溶骨性病变，并导致骨骼相关事件（SRE），包括严重疼痛甚至致命的骨折。尽管目前的成像技术可以检测宏观骨病变，但预测骨病变的发生和进展仍然是一个挑战。方法。我们采用时间变分自动编码器 (T-VAE) 模型，该模型利用变分自动编码器和长短期记忆网络的组合来预测包含小鼠胫骨连续图像的微型 CT 数据集上骨病变的出现。鉴于小鼠胫骨在前几周的 CT 扫描，我们的模型可以从数据中了解其未来状态的分布。结果。我们在骨病变进展预测任务上将我们的模型与其他基于深度学习的预测模型进行测试。在各种评估指标下，我们的模型比现有模型产生更准确的预测。结论。我们开发了一个深度学习框架，可以准确预测和可视化溶骨性骨病变的进展。它将有助于规划和评估预防乳腺癌患者发生 SRE 的治疗策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时间变分自编码器（T-VAE）的深度学习框架，用于预测乳腺癌骨转移引起的骨溶解病变进展。
AI.motivation: 乳腺癌骨转移常导致骨溶解病变和骨骼相关事件（SREs），但现有影像技术难以准确预测病变的进展，亟需有效工具辅助治疗决策。
AI.method: 结合变分自编码器与长短期记忆网络（LSTM），构建T-VAE模型，利用小鼠胫骨的序列微CT数据学习病变演变规律并生成未来CT图像。
AI.result: 在多个评估指标下，该模型预测准确率显著优于其他深度学习模型，可有效预测骨病变发展轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 开发的深度学习框架能精准预测骨溶解病变进程，为乳腺癌患者预防SREs提供治疗方案规划与评估支持。

authors_text: Xuanyao Chen,Tianyuan Zhang,Yue Wang,Yilun Wang,Hang Zhao
title: FUTR3D: A Unified Sensor Fusion Framework for 3D Detection
title_zh: FUTR3D：用于 3D 检测的统一传感器融合框架
abstract: Sensor fusion is an essential topic in many perception systems, such as autonomous driving and robotics. Existing multi-modal 3D detection models usually involve customized designs depending on the sensor combinations or setups. In this work, we propose the first unified end-to-end sensor fusion framework for 3D detection, named FUTR3D, which can be used in (almost) any sensor configuration. FUTR3D employs a query-based Modality-Agnostic Feature Sampler (MAFS), together with a transformer decoder with a set-to-set loss for 3D detection, thus avoiding using late fusion heuristics and post-processing tricks. We validate the effectiveness of our framework on various combinations of cameras, low-resolution LiDARs, high-resolution LiDARs, and Radars. On NuScenes dataset, FUTR3D achieves better performance over specifically designed methods across different sensor combinations. Moreover, FUTR3D achieves great flexibility with different sensor configurations and enables low-cost autonomous driving. For example, only using a 4-beam LiDAR with cameras, FUTR3D (58.0 mAP) achieves on par performance with state-of-the-art 3D detection model CenterPoint (56.6 mAP) using a 32-beam LiDAR.
summary: Sensor fusion is an essential topic in many perception systems, such as autonomous driving and robotics. Existing multi-modal 3D detection models usually involve customized designs depending on the sensor combinations or setups. In this work, we propose the first unified end-to-end sensor fusion framework for 3D detection, named FUTR3D, which can be used in (almost) any sensor configuration. FUTR3D employs a query-based Modality-Agnostic Feature Sampler (MAFS), together with a transformer decoder with a set-to-set loss for 3D detection, thus avoiding using late fusion heuristics and post-processing tricks. We validate the effectiveness of our framework on various combinations of cameras, low-resolution LiDARs, high-resolution LiDARs, and Radars. On NuScenes dataset, FUTR3D achieves better performance over specifically designed methods across different sensor combinations. Moreover, FUTR3D achieves great flexibility with different sensor configurations and enables low-cost autonomous driving. For example, only using a 4-beam LiDAR with cameras, FUTR3D (58.0 mAP) achieves on par performance with state-of-the-art 3D detection model CenterPoint (56.6 mAP) using a 32-beam LiDAR.
abstract_zh: 传感器融合是许多感知系统中的一个重要主题，例如自动驾驶和机器人技术。现有的多模态 3D 检测模型通常涉及根据传感器组合或设置进行定制设计。在这项工作中，我们提出了第一个用于 3D 检测的统一端到端传感器融合框架，名为 FUTR3D，它可以用于（几乎）任何传感器配置。 FUTR3D 采用基于查询的模态无关特征采样器 (MAFS) 以及具有用于 3D 检测的组到组损失的转换器解码器，从而避免使用后期融合启发式方法和后处理技巧。我们验证了我们的框架在相机、低分辨率激光雷达、高分辨率激光雷达和雷达的各种组合上的有效性。在 NuScenes 数据集上，FUTR3D 在不同传感器组合上比专门设计的方法实现了更好的性能。此外，FUTR3D通过不同的传感器配置实现了极大的灵活性，并实现了低成本的自动驾驶。例如，仅使用带有摄像头的 4 光束 LiDAR，FUTR3D (58.0 mAP) 的性能与使用 32 光束 LiDAR 的最先进的 3D 检测模型 CenterPoint (56.6 mAP) 相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FUTR3D，一种适用于各种传感器配置的统一端到端多模态3D目标检测框架。
AI.motivation: 现有3D检测模型依赖特定传感器组合的定制化设计，缺乏通用性和灵活性，难以适应低成本或多样化传感器配置需求。
AI.method: 设计基于查询的模态无关特征采样器（MAFS）与集-集损失的Transformer解码器，实现跨模态特征融合，避免后期融合启发式方法和后处理技巧。
AI.result: 在NuScenes数据集上，FUTR3D在多种传感器组合（如低分辨率LiDAR、雷达等）下均优于专用方法，仅使用4束LiDAR+相机即可达到58.0 mAP，与32束LiDAR的CenterPoint（56.6 mAP）性能相当。
AI.conclusion: FUTR3D通过统一框架实现跨传感器配置的灵活部署，在保持高性能的同时降低硬件成本，为自动驾驶和机器人感知系统提供通用解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出FUTR3D，一种适用于各种传感器配置的统一端到端多模态3D目标检测框架。

tldr: 本文提出FUTR3D，一种适用于各种传感器配置的统一端到端多模态3D目标检测框架。
motivation: 现有3D检测模型依赖特定传感器组合的定制化设计，缺乏通用性和灵活性，难以适应低成本或多样化传感器配置需求。
method: 设计基于查询的模态无关特征采样器（MAFS）与集-集损失的Transformer解码器，实现跨模态特征融合，避免后期融合启发式方法和后处理技巧。
result: 在NuScenes数据集上，FUTR3D在多种传感器组合（如低分辨率LiDAR、雷达等）下均优于专用方法，仅使用4束LiDAR+相机即可达到58.0 mAP，与32束LiDAR的CenterPoint（56.6 mAP）性能相当。
conclusion: FUTR3D通过统一框架实现跨传感器配置的灵活部署，在保持高性能的同时降低硬件成本，为自动驾驶和机器人感知系统提供通用解决方案。
search_text: FUTR3D: A Unified Sensor Fusion Framework for 3D Detection FUTR3D：用于 3D 检测的统一传感器融合框架 Sensor fusion is an essential topic in many perception systems, such as autonomous driving and robotics. Existing multi-modal 3D detection models usually involve customized designs depending on the sensor combinations or setups. In this work, we propose the first unified end-to-end sensor fusion framework for 3D detection, named FUTR3D, which can be used in (almost) any sensor configuration. FUTR3D employs a query-based Modality-Agnostic Feature Sampler (MAFS), together with a transformer decoder with a set-to-set loss for 3D detection, thus avoiding using late fusion heuristics and post-processing tricks. We validate the effectiveness of our framework on various combinations of cameras, low-resolution LiDARs, high-resolution LiDARs, and Radars. On NuScenes dataset, FUTR3D achieves better performance over specifically designed methods across different sensor combinations. Moreover, FUTR3D achieves great flexibility with different sensor configurations and enables low-cost autonomous driving. For example, only using a 4-beam LiDAR with cameras, FUTR3D (58.0 mAP) achieves on par performance with state-of-the-art 3D detection model CenterPoint (56.6 mAP) using a 32-beam LiDAR. 传感器融合是许多感知系统中的一个重要主题，例如自动驾驶和机器人技术。现有的多模态 3D 检测模型通常涉及根据传感器组合或设置进行定制设计。在这项工作中，我们提出了第一个用于 3D 检测的统一端到端传感器融合框架，名为 FUTR3D，它可以用于（几乎）任何传感器配置。 FUTR3D 采用基于查询的模态无关特征采样器 (MAFS) 以及具有用于 3D 检测的组到组损失的转换器解码器，从而避免使用后期融合启发式方法和后处理技巧。我们验证了我们的框架在相机、低分辨率激光雷达、高分辨率激光雷达和雷达的各种组合上的有效性。在 NuScenes 数据集上，FUTR3D 在不同传感器组合上比专门设计的方法实现了更好的性能。此外，FUTR3D通过不同的传感器配置实现了极大的灵活性，并实现了低成本的自动驾驶。例如，仅使用带有摄像头的 4 光束 LiDAR，FUTR3D (58.0 mAP) 的性能与使用 32 光束 LiDAR 的最先进的 3D 检测模型 CenterPoint (56.6 mAP) 相当。 本文提出FUTR3D，一种适用于各种传感器配置的统一端到端多模态3D目标检测框架。 Xuanyao Chen,Tianyuan Zhang,Yue Wang,Yilun Wang,Hang Zhao cs.CV

authors_text: Ronan Fablet,Bertrand Chapron
title: Multimodal learning-based inversion models for the space-time reconstruction of satellite-derived geophysical fields
title_zh: 基于多模态学习的卫星地球物理场时空重建反演模型
abstract: For numerous earth observation applications, one may benefit from various satellite sensors to address the reconstruction of some process or information of interest. A variety of satellite sensors deliver observation data with different sampling patterns due satellite orbits and/or their sensitivity to atmospheric conditions (e.g., clour cover, heavy rains,...). Beyond the ability to account for irregularly-sampled observations, the definition of model-driven inversion methods is often limited to specific case-studies where one can explicitly derive a physical model to relate the different observation sources. Here, we investigate how end-to-end learning schemes provide new means to address multimodal inversion problems. The proposed scheme combines a variational formulation with trainable observation operators, {\em a priori} terms and solvers. Through an application to space oceanography, we show how this scheme can successfully extract relevant information from satellite-derived sea surface temperature images and enhance the reconstruction of sea surface currents issued from satellite altimetry data.
summary: For numerous earth observation applications, one may benefit from various satellite sensors to address the reconstruction of some process or information of interest. A variety of satellite sensors deliver observation data with different sampling patterns due satellite orbits and/or their sensitivity to atmospheric conditions (e.g., clour cover, heavy rains,...). Beyond the ability to account for irregularly-sampled observations, the definition of model-driven inversion methods is often limited to specific case-studies where one can explicitly derive a physical model to relate the different observation sources. Here, we investigate how end-to-end learning schemes provide new means to address multimodal inversion problems. The proposed scheme combines a variational formulation with trainable observation operators, {\em a priori} terms and solvers. Through an application to space oceanography, we show how this scheme can successfully extract relevant information from satellite-derived sea surface temperature images and enhance the reconstruction of sea surface currents issued from satellite altimetry data.
abstract_zh: 对于众多的地球观测应用，人们可能会受益于各种卫星传感器来解决某些感兴趣的过程或信息的重建问题。由于卫星轨道和/或其对大气条件（例如，云层覆盖、大雨等）的敏感性，各种卫星传感器以不同的采样模式提供观测数据。除了解释不规则采样观测的能力之外，模型驱动反演方法的定义通常仅限于特定的案例研究，在这些案例研究中，人们可以明确地导出物理模型来关联不同的观测源。在这里，我们研究端到端学习方案如何提供解决多模态反演问题的新方法。所提出的方案将变分公式与可训练的观测算子、先验项和求解器相结合。通过在空间海洋学中的应用，我们展示了该方案如何成功地从卫星海面温度图像中提取相关信息，并增强从卫星测高数据发出的海面流的重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于多模态学习的反演模型，用于卫星观测数据的时空重建，解决地球物理场（如海表温度、海流）的高精度重构问题。
AI.motivation: 传统模型驱动反演方法依赖特定物理模型且难以处理多传感器不规则采样数据，需开发通用性强的端到端学习框架以融合多源卫星观测信息。
AI.method: 结合变分框架与可训练观测算子，设计包含先验项和求解器的端到端学习方案，通过多模态数据联合优化实现时空重建。
AI.result: 在空间海洋学应用中，成功从海表温度图像中提取关键信息，显著提升卫星测高数据驱动的海流重建精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了多模态卫星数据融合与反演问题，为复杂地球物理场的时空重建提供了通用技术框架。

authors_text: Runsheng Xu,Hao Xiang,Zhengzhong Tu,Xin Xia,Ming-Hsuan Yang,Jiaqi Ma
title: V2X-ViT: Vehicle-to-Everything Cooperative Perception with Vision Transformer
title_zh: V2X-ViT：利用 Vision Transformer 进行车辆到万物的协同感知
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the application of Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication to improve the perception performance of autonomous vehicles. We present a robust cooperative perception framework with V2X communication using a novel vision Transformer. Specifically, we build a holistic attention model, namely V2X-ViT, to effectively fuse information across on-road agents (i.e., vehicles and infrastructure). V2X-ViT consists of alternating layers of heterogeneous multi-agent self-attention and multi-scale window self-attention, which captures inter-agent interaction and per-agent spatial relationships. These key modules are designed in a unified Transformer architecture to handle common V2X challenges, including asynchronous information sharing, pose errors, and heterogeneity of V2X components. To validate our approach, we create a large-scale V2X perception dataset using CARLA and OpenCDA. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that V2X-ViT sets new state-of-the-art performance for 3D object detection and achieves robust performance even under harsh, noisy environments. The code is available at https://github.com/DerrickXuNu/v2x-vit.
summary: In this paper, we investigate the application of Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication to improve the perception performance of autonomous vehicles. We present a robust cooperative perception framework with V2X communication using a novel vision Transformer. Specifically, we build a holistic attention model, namely V2X-ViT, to effectively fuse information across on-road agents (i.e., vehicles and infrastructure). V2X-ViT consists of alternating layers of heterogeneous multi-agent self-attention and multi-scale window self-attention, which captures inter-agent interaction and per-agent spatial relationships. These key modules are designed in a unified Transformer architecture to handle common V2X challenges, including asynchronous information sharing, pose errors, and heterogeneity of V2X components. To validate our approach, we create a large-scale V2X perception dataset using CARLA and OpenCDA. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that V2X-ViT sets new state-of-the-art performance for 3D object detection and achieves robust performance even under harsh, noisy environments. The code is available at https://github.com/DerrickXuNu/v2x-vit.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了车对万物（V2X）通信的应用，以提高自动驾驶汽车的感知性能。我们使用新颖的视觉 Transformer 提出了一个具有 V2X 通信的强大协作感知框架。具体来说，我们构建了一个整体注意力模型，即 V2X-ViT，以有效融合道路代理（即车辆和基础设施）之间的信息。 V2X-ViT 由异构多智能体自注意力和多尺度窗口自注意力的交替层组成，它捕获智能体间的交互和每个智能体的空间关系。这些关键模块采用统一的 Transformer 架构设计，可应对常见的 V2X 挑战，包括异步信息共享、姿态错误和 V2X 组件的异构性。为了验证我们的方法，我们使用 CARLA 和 OpenCDA 创建了一个大规模 V2X 感知数据集。大量实验结果表明，V2X-ViT 为 3D 物体检测设定了最先进的新性能，即使在恶劣、嘈杂的环境下也能实现稳健的性能。该代码可在 https://github.com/DerrickXuNu/v2x-vit 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于V2X通信和视觉Transformer的协同感知框架V2X-ViT，用于提升自动驾驶车辆的感知性能。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在复杂环境中面临感知局限，通过V2X通信整合多源信息可以提升感知性能，但现有方法在处理异步信息、姿态误差和组件异质性方面存在挑战。
AI.method: 本文提出V2X-ViT，结合异构多智能体自注意力和多尺度窗口自注意力模块，构建统一的Transformer架构，以有效融合车辆与基础设施之间的信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，V2X-ViT在3D目标检测任务中达到新的最先进水平，并在噪声环境下表现出鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: V2X-ViT为V2X协同感知提供了一种有效的方法，能够处理实际部署中的复杂挑战，具有广泛的应用前景。

search_text: V2X-ViT: Vehicle-to-Everything Cooperative Perception with Vision Transformer V2X-ViT：利用 Vision Transformer 进行车辆到万物的协同感知 In this paper, we investigate the application of Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication to improve the perception performance of autonomous vehicles. We present a robust cooperative perception framework with V2X communication using a novel vision Transformer. Specifically, we build a holistic attention model, namely V2X-ViT, to effectively fuse information across on-road agents (i.e., vehicles and infrastructure). V2X-ViT consists of alternating layers of heterogeneous multi-agent self-attention and multi-scale window self-attention, which captures inter-agent interaction and per-agent spatial relationships. These key modules are designed in a unified Transformer architecture to handle common V2X challenges, including asynchronous information sharing, pose errors, and heterogeneity of V2X components. To validate our approach, we create a large-scale V2X perception dataset using CARLA and OpenCDA. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that V2X-ViT sets new state-of-the-art performance for 3D object detection and achieves robust performance even under harsh, noisy environments. The code is available at https://github.com/DerrickXuNu/v2x-vit. 在本文中，我们研究了车对万物（V2X）通信的应用，以提高自动驾驶汽车的感知性能。我们使用新颖的视觉 Transformer 提出了一个具有 V2X 通信的强大协作感知框架。具体来说，我们构建了一个整体注意力模型，即 V2X-ViT，以有效融合道路代理（即车辆和基础设施）之间的信息。 V2X-ViT 由异构多智能体自注意力和多尺度窗口自注意力的交替层组成，它捕获智能体间的交互和每个智能体的空间关系。这些关键模块采用统一的 Transformer 架构设计，可应对常见的 V2X 挑战，包括异步信息共享、姿态错误和 V2X 组件的异构性。为了验证我们的方法，我们使用 CARLA 和 OpenCDA 创建了一个大规模 V2X 感知数据集。大量实验结果表明，V2X-ViT 为 3D 物体检测设定了最先进的新性能，即使在恶劣、嘈杂的环境下也能实现稳健的性能。该代码可在 https://github.com/DerrickXuNu/v2x-vit 获取。 本文提出了一种基于V2X通信和视觉Transformer的协同感知框架V2X-ViT，用于提升自动驾驶车辆的感知性能。 Runsheng Xu,Hao Xiang,Zhengzhong Tu,Xin Xia,Ming-Hsuan Yang,Jiaqi Ma cs.CV

authors_text: Tuomo Raitio,Petko Petkov,Jiangchuan Li,Muhammed Shifas,Andrea Davis,Yannis Stylianou
title: Vocal effort modeling in neural TTS for improving the intelligibility of synthetic speech in noise
title_zh: 神经 TTS 中的发声效果建模可提高噪声中合成语音的清晰度
comment: 5 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to Interspeech 2022, revision includes more data in results and improved text
comments: 5 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to Interspeech 2022, revision includes more data in results and improved text
abstract: We present a neural text-to-speech (TTS) method that models natural vocal effort variation to improve the intelligibility of synthetic speech in the presence of noise. The method consists of first measuring the spectral tilt of unlabeled conventional speech data, and then conditioning a neural TTS model with normalized spectral tilt among other prosodic factors. Changing the spectral tilt parameter and keeping other prosodic factors unchanged enables effective vocal effort control at synthesis time independent of other prosodic factors. By extrapolation of the spectral tilt values beyond what has been seen in the original data, we can generate speech with high vocal effort levels, thus improving the intelligibility of speech in the presence of masking noise. We evaluate the intelligibility and quality of normal speech and speech with increased vocal effort in the presence of various masking noise conditions, and compare these to well-known speech intelligibility-enhancing algorithms. The evaluations show that the proposed method can improve the intelligibility of synthetic speech with little loss in speech quality.
summary: We present a neural text-to-speech (TTS) method that models natural vocal effort variation to improve the intelligibility of synthetic speech in the presence of noise. The method consists of first measuring the spectral tilt of unlabeled conventional speech data, and then conditioning a neural TTS model with normalized spectral tilt among other prosodic factors. Changing the spectral tilt parameter and keeping other prosodic factors unchanged enables effective vocal effort control at synthesis time independent of other prosodic factors. By extrapolation of the spectral tilt values beyond what has been seen in the original data, we can generate speech with high vocal effort levels, thus improving the intelligibility of speech in the presence of masking noise. We evaluate the intelligibility and quality of normal speech and speech with increased vocal effort in the presence of various masking noise conditions, and compare these to well-known speech intelligibility-enhancing algorithms. The evaluations show that the proposed method can improve the intelligibility of synthetic speech with little loss in speech quality.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种神经文本转语音 (TTS) 方法，该方法可以模拟自然声音变化，以提高存在噪声时合成语音的清晰度。该方法首先测量未标记的传统语音数据的频谱倾斜，然后使用归一化的频谱倾斜以及其他韵律因素来调节神经 TTS 模型。改变频谱倾斜参数并保持其他韵律因素不变，可以在合成时独立于其他韵律因素进行有效的发声控制。通过推断原始数据之外的频谱倾斜值，我们可以生成具有高发声努力水平的语音，从而提高存在掩蔽噪声时语音的清晰度。我们评估了在各种掩蔽噪声条件下正常语音和增加发声力度的语音的清晰度和质量，并将其与众所周知的语音清晰度增强算法进行比较。评估结果表明，该方法能够提高合成语音的清晰度，且语音质量损失很小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种神经文本到语音（TTS）方法，通过建模自然语音努力变化，提高噪声环境下合成语音的可理解性。
AI.motivation: 在噪声环境下，合成语音的可理解性受到严重影响，因此需要一种方法来增强合成语音在噪声中的可理解性。
AI.method: 该方法首先测量未标记常规语音数据的频谱倾斜度，然后将标准化的频谱倾斜度与其他韵律因素一起作为条件，用于神经TTS模型。通过改变频谱倾斜度参数，可以在合成时独立控制语音努力程度。
AI.result: 评估表明，该方法在多种掩蔽噪声条件下能够有效提高合成语音的可理解性，而语音质量损失较小。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过建模语音努力变化，能够在噪声环境下有效提高合成语音的可理解性，具有良好的应用前景。

authors_text: Ardhendu Shekhar Tripathi,Martin Danelljan,Samarth Shukla,Radu Timofte,Luc Van Gool
title: Transform your Smartphone into a DSLR Camera: Learning the ISP in the Wild
title_zh: 将您的智能手机转变为 DSLR 相机：在野外学习 ISP
abstract: We propose a trainable Image Signal Processing (ISP) framework that produces DSLR quality images given RAW images captured by a smartphone. To address the color misalignments between training image pairs, we employ a color-conditional ISP network and optimize a novel parametric color mapping between each input RAW and reference DSLR image. During inference, we predict the target color image by designing a color prediction network with efficient Global Context Transformer modules. The latter effectively leverage global information to learn consistent color and tone mappings. We further propose a robust masked aligned loss to identify and discard regions with inaccurate motion estimation during training. Lastly, we introduce the ISP in the Wild (ISPW) dataset, consisting of weakly paired phone RAW and DSLR sRGB images. We extensively evaluate our method, setting a new state-of-the-art on two datasets.
summary: We propose a trainable Image Signal Processing (ISP) framework that produces DSLR quality images given RAW images captured by a smartphone. To address the color misalignments between training image pairs, we employ a color-conditional ISP network and optimize a novel parametric color mapping between each input RAW and reference DSLR image. During inference, we predict the target color image by designing a color prediction network with efficient Global Context Transformer modules. The latter effectively leverage global information to learn consistent color and tone mappings. We further propose a robust masked aligned loss to identify and discard regions with inaccurate motion estimation during training. Lastly, we introduce the ISP in the Wild (ISPW) dataset, consisting of weakly paired phone RAW and DSLR sRGB images. We extensively evaluate our method, setting a new state-of-the-art on two datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种可训练的图像信号处理 (ISP) 框架，该框架可以根据智能手机捕获的 RAW 图像生成 DSLR 质量的图像。为了解决训练图像对之间的颜色不一致问题，我们采用了颜色条件 ISP 网络，并优化了每个输入 RAW 和参考 DSLR 图像之间的新颖参数颜色映射。在推理过程中，我们通过设计具有高效全局上下文转换器模块的颜色预测网络来预测目标颜色图像。后者有效地利用全局信息来学习一致的颜色和色调映射。我们进一步提出了一种鲁棒的屏蔽对齐损失来识别和丢弃训练期间运动估计不准确的区域。最后，我们介绍 ISP in the Wild (ISPW) 数据集，由弱配对手机 RAW 和 DSLR sRGB 图像组成。我们广泛评估了我们的方法，在两个数据集上设置了新的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可训练的图像信号处理（ISP）框架，能够将智能手机拍摄的RAW图像转换为DSLR级别的高质量图像。
AI.motivation: 手机拍摄的RAW图像与DSLR图像在色彩对齐上存在偏差，现有方法难以有效解决这一问题，导致图像质量受限。
AI.method: 采用颜色条件化ISP网络与参数化颜色映射优化训练对齐；设计基于Global Context Transformer的颜色预测网络；引入鲁棒的掩码对齐损失函数；构建包含弱配对手机RAW与DSLR图像的ISPW数据集。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上实现新的最先进性能，显著提升手机图像到DSLR质量的转换效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过创新网络结构与损失函数有效解决了跨设备色彩映射问题，推动了手机摄影向专业级图像处理的突破。

authors_text: Nesrine Abbas
title: Red Domination in Perfect Elimination Bipartite Graphs
title_zh: 完美消除二部图中的红色支配
abstract: The $k$ red domination problem for a bipartite graph $G=(X,Y,E)$ is to find a subset $D \subseteq X$ of cardinality at most $k$ that dominates vertices of $Y$. The decision version of this problem is NP-complete for general bipartite graphs but solvable in polynomial time for chordal bipartite graphs. We strengthen that result by showing that it is NP-complete for perfect elimination bipartite graphs. We present a tight upper bound on the number of such sets in bipartite graphs, and show that we can calculate that number in linear time for convex bipartite graphs. We present a linear space linear delay enumeration algorithm that needs only linear preprocessing time.
summary: The $k$ red domination problem for a bipartite graph $G=(X,Y,E)$ is to find a subset $D \subseteq X$ of cardinality at most $k$ that dominates vertices of $Y$. The decision version of this problem is NP-complete for general bipartite graphs but solvable in polynomial time for chordal bipartite graphs. We strengthen that result by showing that it is NP-complete for perfect elimination bipartite graphs. We present a tight upper bound on the number of such sets in bipartite graphs, and show that we can calculate that number in linear time for convex bipartite graphs. We present a linear space linear delay enumeration algorithm that needs only linear preprocessing time.
abstract_zh: 二部图 $G=(X,Y,E)$ 的 $k$ 红色支配问题是找到一个最多 $k$ 的基数子集 $D \subseteq X$，它支配 $Y$ 的顶点。该问题的决策版本对于一般二分图来说是 NP 完全的，但对于弦二分图来说可以在多项式时间内求解。我们通过证明完美消除二部图的 NP 完全性来强化该结果。我们对二分图中此类集合的数量提出了严格的上限，并表明我们可以在凸二分图的线性时间内计算该数量。我们提出了一种仅需要线性预处理时间的线性空间线性延迟枚举算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究完美消除二分图中的红支配问题，证明其NP完全性并提出相关算法。
AI.motivation: 尽管红支配问题在弦状二分图中可多项式时间求解，但其在更特殊的完美消除二分图中的复杂性尚不明确，需进一步研究。
AI.method: 通过复杂性分析、上界证明、线性时间算法设计及线性延迟枚举算法开发进行研究。
AI.result: 证明红支配问题在完美消除二分图中仍为NP完全，给出紧上界，提出凸二分图线性时间计算方法及线性空间枚举算法。
AI.conclusion: 红支配问题在完美消除二分图中保持NP完全性，但特定子类存在高效求解算法。

search_text: Red Domination in Perfect Elimination Bipartite Graphs 完美消除二部图中的红色支配 The $k$ red domination problem for a bipartite graph $G=(X,Y,E)$ is to find a subset $D \subseteq X$ of cardinality at most $k$ that dominates vertices of $Y$. The decision version of this problem is NP-complete for general bipartite graphs but solvable in polynomial time for chordal bipartite graphs. We strengthen that result by showing that it is NP-complete for perfect elimination bipartite graphs. We present a tight upper bound on the number of such sets in bipartite graphs, and show that we can calculate that number in linear time for convex bipartite graphs. We present a linear space linear delay enumeration algorithm that needs only linear preprocessing time. 二部图 $G=(X,Y,E)$ 的 $k$ 红色支配问题是找到一个最多 $k$ 的基数子集 $D \subseteq X$，它支配 $Y$ 的顶点。该问题的决策版本对于一般二分图来说是 NP 完全的，但对于弦二分图来说可以在多项式时间内求解。我们通过证明完美消除二部图的 NP 完全性来强化该结果。我们对二分图中此类集合的数量提出了严格的上限，并表明我们可以在凸二分图的线性时间内计算该数量。我们提出了一种仅需要线性预处理时间的线性空间线性延迟枚举算法。 本文研究完美消除二分图中的红支配问题，证明其NP完全性并提出相关算法。 Nesrine Abbas cs.DS

authors_text: Petru Manescu,Priya Narayanan,Christopher Bendkowski,Muna Elmi,Remy Claveau,Vijay Pawar,Biobele J. Brown,Mike Shaw,Anupama Rao,Delmiro Fernandez-Reyes
title: Automated Detection of Acute Promyelocytic Leukemia in Blood Films and Bone Marrow Aspirates with Annotation-free Deep Learning
title_zh: 利用无注释深度学习自动检测血膜和骨髓抽吸物中的急性早幼粒细胞白血病
abstract: While optical microscopy inspection of blood films and bone marrow aspirates by a hematologist is a crucial step in establishing diagnosis of acute leukemia, especially in low-resource settings where other diagnostic modalities might not be available, the task remains time-consuming and prone to human inconsistencies. This has an impact especially in cases of Acute Promyelocytic Leukemia (APL) that require urgent treatment. Integration of automated computational hematopathology into clinical workflows can improve the throughput of these services and reduce cognitive human error. However, a major bottleneck in deploying such systems is a lack of sufficient cell morphological object-labels annotations to train deep learning models. We overcome this by leveraging patient diagnostic labels to train weakly-supervised models that detect different types of acute leukemia. We introduce a deep learning approach, Multiple Instance Learning for Leukocyte Identification (MILLIE), able to perform automated reliable analysis of blood films with minimal supervision. Without being trained to classify individual cells, MILLIE differentiates between acute lymphoblastic and myeloblastic leukemia in blood films. More importantly, MILLIE detects APL in blood films (AUC 0.94+/-0.04) and in bone marrow aspirates (AUC 0.99+/-0.01). MILLIE is a viable solution to augment the throughput of clinical pathways that require assessment of blood film microscopy.
summary: While optical microscopy inspection of blood films and bone marrow aspirates by a hematologist is a crucial step in establishing diagnosis of acute leukemia, especially in low-resource settings where other diagnostic modalities might not be available, the task remains time-consuming and prone to human inconsistencies. This has an impact especially in cases of Acute Promyelocytic Leukemia (APL) that require urgent treatment. Integration of automated computational hematopathology into clinical workflows can improve the throughput of these services and reduce cognitive human error. However, a major bottleneck in deploying such systems is a lack of sufficient cell morphological object-labels annotations to train deep learning models. We overcome this by leveraging patient diagnostic labels to train weakly-supervised models that detect different types of acute leukemia. We introduce a deep learning approach, Multiple Instance Learning for Leukocyte Identification (MILLIE), able to perform automated reliable analysis of blood films with minimal supervision. Without being trained to classify individual cells, MILLIE differentiates between acute lymphoblastic and myeloblastic leukemia in blood films. More importantly, MILLIE detects APL in blood films (AUC 0.94+/-0.04) and in bone marrow aspirates (AUC 0.99+/-0.01). MILLIE is a viable solution to augment the throughput of clinical pathways that require assessment of blood film microscopy.
abstract_zh: 虽然血液学家对血片和骨髓抽吸物进行光学显微镜检查是建立急性白血病诊断的关键步骤，特别是在可能无法使用其他诊断方式的资源匮乏的环境中，但这项任务仍然耗时且容易出现人为不一致的情况。这对于需要紧急治疗的急性早幼粒细胞白血病 (APL) 病例尤其有影响。将自动化计算血液病理学集成到临床工作流程中可以提高这些服务的吞吐量并减少认知人为错误。然而，部署此类系统的一个主要瓶颈是缺乏足够的细胞形态对象标签注释来训练深度学习模型。我们通过利用患者诊断标签来训练检测不同类型急性白血病的弱监督模型来克服这一问题。我们引入了一种深度学习方法，即白细胞识别多实例学习 (MILLIE)，能够在最少的监督下对血片进行自动可靠的分析。 MILLIE 在没有接受过对单个细胞进行分类的训练的情况下，可以在血涂片中区分急性淋巴细胞白血病和髓母细胞白血病。更重要的是，MILLIE 可检测血片 (AUC 0.94+/-0.04) 和骨髓抽吸物 (AUC 0.99+/-0.01) 中的 APL。 MILLIE 是一种可行的解决方案，可提高需要血膜显微镜评估的临床路径的吞吐量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标注的深度学习方法MILLIE，用于自动检测急性早幼粒细胞白血病（APL）在血液涂片和骨髓穿刺样本中的表现。
AI.motivation: 光学显微镜检查血液涂片和骨髓穿刺样本是诊断急性白血病的重要步骤，但在资源有限的地区，由于缺乏其他诊断手段，且人工检查耗时且容易出现不一致，因此需要自动化方法来提高诊断效率和准确性。
AI.method: 本文采用弱监督学习方法，利用患者诊断标签训练模型，无需对单个细胞进行标注。提出了一种名为MILLIE的深度学习方法，用于区分急性淋巴细胞白血病和急性髓细胞白血病，并检测APL。
AI.result: MILLIE在血液涂片中的APL检测AUC为0.94±0.04，在骨髓穿刺样本中的AUC为0.99±0.01，表明其具有较高的检测准确性。
AI.conclusion: MILLIE是一种可行的解决方案，可以提高需要血液涂片显微镜评估的临床路径的处理效率，为资源有限地区的诊断提供支持。

authors_text: Y. Logan,K. Kokilepersaud,G. Kwon,G. AlRegib,C. Wykoff,H. Yu
title: Multi-Modal Learning Using Physicians Diagnostics for Optical Coherence Tomography Classification
title_zh: 使用医生诊断进行光学相干断层扫描分类的多模态学习
abstract: In this paper, we propose a framework that incorporates experts diagnostics and insights into the analysis of Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) using multi-modal learning. To demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach, we create a medical diagnostic attribute dataset to improve disease classification using OCT. Although there have been successful attempts to deploy machine learning for disease classification in OCT, such methodologies lack the experts insights. We argue that injecting ophthalmological assessments as another supervision in a learning framework is of great importance for the machine learning process to perform accurate and interpretable classification. We demonstrate the proposed framework through comprehensive experiments that compare the effectiveness of combining diagnostic attribute features with latent visual representations and show that they surpass the state-of-the-art approach. Finally, we analyze the proposed dual-stream architecture and provide an insight that determine the components that contribute most to classification performance.
summary: In this paper, we propose a framework that incorporates experts diagnostics and insights into the analysis of Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) using multi-modal learning. To demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach, we create a medical diagnostic attribute dataset to improve disease classification using OCT. Although there have been successful attempts to deploy machine learning for disease classification in OCT, such methodologies lack the experts insights. We argue that injecting ophthalmological assessments as another supervision in a learning framework is of great importance for the machine learning process to perform accurate and interpretable classification. We demonstrate the proposed framework through comprehensive experiments that compare the effectiveness of combining diagnostic attribute features with latent visual representations and show that they surpass the state-of-the-art approach. Finally, we analyze the proposed dual-stream architecture and provide an insight that determine the components that contribute most to classification performance.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个框架，将专家的诊断和见解融入到使用多模态学习的光学相干断层扫描（OCT）分析中。为了证明这种方法的有效性，我们创建了一个医学诊断属性数据集，以使用 OCT 改进疾病分类。尽管已经成功尝试在 OCT 中部署机器学习进行疾病分类，但此类方法缺乏专家的见解。我们认为，将眼科评估作为学习框架中的另一种监督对于机器学习过程执行准确且可解释的分类非常重要。我们通过综合实验证明了所提出的框架，比较了将诊断属性特征与潜在视觉表示相结合的有效性，并表明它们超越了最先进的方法。最后，我们分析了所提出的双流架构，并提供了确定对分类性能贡献最大的组件的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合医生诊断的多模态学习框架，用于改进光学相干断层扫描（OCT）图像的疾病分类。
AI.motivation: 现有OCT疾病分类方法缺乏专家诊断的监督信号，导致分类准确性与可解释性不足，需引入医学评估提升模型性能。
AI.method: 构建医疗诊断属性数据集，设计多模态学习框架融合诊断属性特征与视觉表示，采用双流架构进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架优于现有技术，双流架构中诊断属性与视觉特征的结合显著提升分类效果。
AI.conclusion: 整合专家诊断信息可增强OCT分类的准确性与可解释性，双流架构有效验证了多模态特征的互补性。

conclusion: 整合专家诊断信息可增强OCT分类的准确性与可解释性，双流架构有效验证了多模态特征的互补性。
search_text: Multi-Modal Learning Using Physicians Diagnostics for Optical Coherence Tomography Classification 使用医生诊断进行光学相干断层扫描分类的多模态学习 In this paper, we propose a framework that incorporates experts diagnostics and insights into the analysis of Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) using multi-modal learning. To demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach, we create a medical diagnostic attribute dataset to improve disease classification using OCT. Although there have been successful attempts to deploy machine learning for disease classification in OCT, such methodologies lack the experts insights. We argue that injecting ophthalmological assessments as another supervision in a learning framework is of great importance for the machine learning process to perform accurate and interpretable classification. We demonstrate the proposed framework through comprehensive experiments that compare the effectiveness of combining diagnostic attribute features with latent visual representations and show that they surpass the state-of-the-art approach. Finally, we analyze the proposed dual-stream architecture and provide an insight that determine the components that contribute most to classification performance. 在本文中，我们提出了一个框架，将专家的诊断和见解融入到使用多模态学习的光学相干断层扫描（OCT）分析中。为了证明这种方法的有效性，我们创建了一个医学诊断属性数据集，以使用 OCT 改进疾病分类。尽管已经成功尝试在 OCT 中部署机器学习进行疾病分类，但此类方法缺乏专家的见解。我们认为，将眼科评估作为学习框架中的另一种监督对于机器学习过程执行准确且可解释的分类非常重要。我们通过综合实验证明了所提出的框架，比较了将诊断属性特征与潜在视觉表示相结合的有效性，并表明它们超越了最先进的方法。最后，我们分析了所提出的双流架构，并提供了确定对分类性能贡献最大的组件的见解。 本文提出一种结合医生诊断的多模态学习框架，用于改进光学相干断层扫描（OCT）图像的疾病分类。 Y. Logan,K. Kokilepersaud,G. Kwon,G. AlRegib,C. Wykoff,H. Yu eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Wanshui Li,Yifan Bai,Jiaxuan Lu,Kexin Yi
title: Immersive Text Game and Personality Classification
title_zh: 沉浸式文字游戏和性格分类
abstract: We designed and built a game called \textit{Immersive Text Game}, which allows the player to choose a story and a character, and interact with other characters in the story in an immersive manner of dialogues. The game is based on several latest models, including text generation language model, information extraction model, commonsense reasoning model, and psychology evaluation model. In the past, similar text games usually let players choose from limited actions instead of answering on their own, and not every time what characters said are determined by the player. Through the combination of these models and elaborate game mechanics and modes, the player will find some novel experiences as driven through the storyline.
summary: We designed and built a game called \textit{Immersive Text Game}, which allows the player to choose a story and a character, and interact with other characters in the story in an immersive manner of dialogues. The game is based on several latest models, including text generation language model, information extraction model, commonsense reasoning model, and psychology evaluation model. In the past, similar text games usually let players choose from limited actions instead of answering on their own, and not every time what characters said are determined by the player. Through the combination of these models and elaborate game mechanics and modes, the player will find some novel experiences as driven through the storyline.
abstract_zh: 我们设计并制作了一款名为 \textit{沉浸式文字游戏} 的游戏，它允许玩家选择一个故事和一个角色，并以沉浸式对话的方式与故事中的其他角色进行互动。游戏基于多个最新模型，包括文本生成语言模型、信息提取模型、常识推理模型、心理评价模型。过去，类似的文字游戏通常会让玩家从有限的动作中进行选择，而不是自己回答，而且并不是每次角色说的话都由玩家决定。通过这些模型和精心设计的游戏机制和模式的结合，玩家会在故事情节的推动下找到一些新奇的体验。

AI.tldr: 开发结合多种AI模型的沉浸式文本游戏，提升玩家互动体验。
AI.motivation: 传统文本游戏限制较多，玩家选择有限且无法自主决定角色对话，旨在通过AI技术提供更自由的沉浸式体验。
AI.method: 整合文本生成、信息抽取、常识推理及心理学评估模型，设计动态对话与角色互动机制。
AI.result: 玩家能通过自主对话驱动剧情，获得新颖的沉浸式游戏体验。
AI.conclusion: 多模型融合与创新游戏机制有效提升了文本游戏的互动性与沉浸感，为未来AI游戏开发提供参考。

authors_text: Wanshui Li,Pasquale Minervini
title: Differentiable Reasoning over Long Stories -- Assessing Systematic Generalisation in Neural Models
title_zh: 长故事的可微推理——评估神经模型的系统泛化
abstract: Contemporary neural networks have achieved a series of developments and successes in many aspects; however, when exposed to data outside the training distribution, they may fail to predict correct answers. In this work, we were concerned about this generalisation issue and thus analysed a broad set of models systematically and robustly over long stories. Related experiments were conducted based on the CLUTRR, which is a diagnostic benchmark suite that can analyse generalisation of natural language understanding (NLU) systems by training over small story graphs and testing on larger ones. In order to handle the multi-relational story graph, we consider two classes of neural models: "E-GNN", the graph-based models that can process graph-structured data and consider the edge attributes simultaneously; and "L-Graph", the sequence-based models which can process linearized version of the graphs. We performed an extensive empirical evaluation, and we found that the modified recurrent neural network yield surprisingly accurate results across every systematic generalisation tasks which outperform the modified graph neural network, while the latter produced more robust models.
summary: Contemporary neural networks have achieved a series of developments and successes in many aspects; however, when exposed to data outside the training distribution, they may fail to predict correct answers. In this work, we were concerned about this generalisation issue and thus analysed a broad set of models systematically and robustly over long stories. Related experiments were conducted based on the CLUTRR, which is a diagnostic benchmark suite that can analyse generalisation of natural language understanding (NLU) systems by training over small story graphs and testing on larger ones. In order to handle the multi-relational story graph, we consider two classes of neural models: "E-GNN", the graph-based models that can process graph-structured data and consider the edge attributes simultaneously; and "L-Graph", the sequence-based models which can process linearized version of the graphs. We performed an extensive empirical evaluation, and we found that the modified recurrent neural network yield surprisingly accurate results across every systematic generalisation tasks which outperform the modified graph neural network, while the latter produced more robust models.
abstract_zh: 当代神经网络在许多方面取得了一系列的发展和成功；然而，当接触到训练分布之外的数据时，他们可能无法预测正确的答案。在这项工作中，我们关注这个泛化问题，因此在长篇故事中系统地、稳健地分析了一系列广泛的模型。相关实验是基于 CLUTRR 进行的，CLUTRR 是一个诊断基准套件，可以通过对小故事图进行训练并在较大故事图上进行测试来分析自然语言理解 (NLU) 系统的泛化。为了处理多关系故事图，我们考虑两类神经模型：“E-GNN”，基于图的模型，可以处理图结构数据并同时考虑边缘属性；和“L-Graph”，基于序列的模型，可以处理图的线性化版本。我们进行了广泛的实证评估，发现改进的循环神经网络在每个系统泛化任务中都产生了令人惊讶的准确结果，其性能优于改进的图神经网络，而后者产生了更稳健的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文通过CLUTRR基准测试评估神经网络模型在长故事上的系统泛化能力，比较了基于图和序列的模型表现。
AI.motivation: 现代神经网络在训练数据外的表现不佳，本文旨在系统研究模型在长故事任务中的泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用CLUTRR基准，对比两类模型：处理图结构数据的E-GNN和处理线性化图的L-Graph序列模型。
AI.result: 修改后的循环神经网络在系统泛化任务中表现优于图神经网络，但后者模型更稳健。
AI.conclusion: 序列模型在泛化任务中效果更优，但图模型具有更好的稳健性，需根据任务需求选择模型架构。

authors_text: Shangqun Yu,Sreehari Rammohan,Kaiyu Zheng,George Konidaris
title: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning of Locomotion Policies in Response to Approaching Objects: A Preliminary Study
title_zh: 响应接近物体的运动策略的分层强化学习：初步研究
abstract: Animals such as rabbits and birds can instantly generate locomotion behavior in reaction to a dynamic, approaching object, such as a person or a rock, despite having possibly never seen the object before and having limited perception of the object's properties. Recently, deep reinforcement learning has enabled complex kinematic systems such as humanoid robots to successfully move from point A to point B. Inspired by the observation of the innate reactive behavior of animals in nature, we hope to extend this progress in robot locomotion to settings where external, dynamic objects are involved whose properties are partially observable to the robot. As a first step toward this goal, we build a simulation environment in MuJoCo where a legged robot must avoid getting hit by a ball moving toward it. We explore whether prior locomotion experiences that animals typically possess benefit the learning of a reactive control policy under a proposed hierarchical reinforcement learning framework. Preliminary results support the claim that the learning becomes more efficient using this hierarchical reinforcement learning method, even when partial observability (radius-based object visibility) is taken into account.
summary: Animals such as rabbits and birds can instantly generate locomotion behavior in reaction to a dynamic, approaching object, such as a person or a rock, despite having possibly never seen the object before and having limited perception of the object's properties. Recently, deep reinforcement learning has enabled complex kinematic systems such as humanoid robots to successfully move from point A to point B. Inspired by the observation of the innate reactive behavior of animals in nature, we hope to extend this progress in robot locomotion to settings where external, dynamic objects are involved whose properties are partially observable to the robot. As a first step toward this goal, we build a simulation environment in MuJoCo where a legged robot must avoid getting hit by a ball moving toward it. We explore whether prior locomotion experiences that animals typically possess benefit the learning of a reactive control policy under a proposed hierarchical reinforcement learning framework. Preliminary results support the claim that the learning becomes more efficient using this hierarchical reinforcement learning method, even when partial observability (radius-based object visibility) is taken into account.
abstract_zh: 兔子和鸟类等动物可以立即对动态的、接近的物体（例如人或岩石）做出反应，产生运动行为，尽管它们以前可能从未见过该物体并且对该物体的属性的感知有限。最近，深度强化学习已经使复杂的运动系统（例如人形机器人）成功地从 A 点移动到 B 点。受到对自然界动物固有反应行为的观察的启发，我们希望将机器人运动的这一进展扩展到涉及外部动态物体的环境中，这些物体的属性可以被机器人部分观察到。作为实现这一目标的第一步，我们在 MuJoCo 中构建了一个模拟环境，其中有腿机器人必须避免被朝其移动的球击中。我们探讨了动物通常拥有的先前运动经验是否有利于在提出的分层强化学习框架下学习反应控制策略。初步结果支持这样的说法：即使考虑到部分可观察性（基于半径的对象可见性），使用这种分层强化学习方法学习也会变得更加有效。

AI.tldr: 本文在模拟环境中研究分层强化学习框架下，腿式机器人对动态接近物体（如球）的避障运动策略学习效率。
AI.motivation: 动物能快速反应动态物体威胁，而现有强化学习在静态环境表现良好，但面对部分可观测的动态物体时效率不足，需借鉴生物反应机制改进机器人控制策略。
AI.method: 构建MuJoCo模拟环境，设计分层强化学习框架，通过整合先验运动经验与实时感知信息，训练腿式机器人避开向其移动的球体。
AI.result: 实验表明，分层强化学习方法在部分可观测条件下（基于半径的物体可见性）显著提升了避障策略的学习效率。
AI.conclusion: 分层强化学习框架能有效模拟生物反应机制，提升动态障碍物场景下的运动策略学习效率，未来可扩展至更复杂环境与多模态感知任务。

ai_content.tldr: 本文在模拟环境中研究分层强化学习框架下，腿式机器人对动态接近物体（如球）的避障运动策略学习效率。

search_text: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning of Locomotion Policies in Response to Approaching Objects: A Preliminary Study 响应接近物体的运动策略的分层强化学习：初步研究 Animals such as rabbits and birds can instantly generate locomotion behavior in reaction to a dynamic, approaching object, such as a person or a rock, despite having possibly never seen the object before and having limited perception of the object's properties. Recently, deep reinforcement learning has enabled complex kinematic systems such as humanoid robots to successfully move from point A to point B. Inspired by the observation of the innate reactive behavior of animals in nature, we hope to extend this progress in robot locomotion to settings where external, dynamic objects are involved whose properties are partially observable to the robot. As a first step toward this goal, we build a simulation environment in MuJoCo where a legged robot must avoid getting hit by a ball moving toward it. We explore whether prior locomotion experiences that animals typically possess benefit the learning of a reactive control policy under a proposed hierarchical reinforcement learning framework. Preliminary results support the claim that the learning becomes more efficient using this hierarchical reinforcement learning method, even when partial observability (radius-based object visibility) is taken into account. 兔子和鸟类等动物可以立即对动态的、接近的物体（例如人或岩石）做出反应，产生运动行为，尽管它们以前可能从未见过该物体并且对该物体的属性的感知有限。最近，深度强化学习已经使复杂的运动系统（例如人形机器人）成功地从 A 点移动到 B 点。受到对自然界动物固有反应行为的观察的启发，我们希望将机器人运动的这一进展扩展到涉及外部动态物体的环境中，这些物体的属性可以被机器人部分观察到。作为实现这一目标的第一步，我们在 MuJoCo 中构建了一个模拟环境，其中有腿机器人必须避免被朝其移动的球击中。我们探讨了动物通常拥有的先前运动经验是否有利于在提出的分层强化学习框架下学习反应控制策略。初步结果支持这样的说法：即使考虑到部分可观察性（基于半径的对象可见性），使用这种分层强化学习方法学习也会变得更加有效。 本文在模拟环境中研究分层强化学习框架下，腿式机器人对动态接近物体（如球）的避障运动策略学习效率。 Shangqun Yu,Sreehari Rammohan,Kaiyu Zheng,George Konidaris cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Hieu H. Pham,Ngoc H. Nguyen,Thanh T. Tran,Tuan N. M. Nguyen,Ha Q. Nguyen
title: PediCXR: An open, large-scale chest radiograph dataset for interpretation of common thoracic diseases in children
title_zh: PediCXR：一个开放的、大规模的胸片数据集，用于解释儿童常见胸部疾病
comment: Accepted by Scientific Data (Nature). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2012.15029
comments: Accepted by Scientific Data (Nature). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2012.15029
abstract: The development of diagnostic models for detecting and diagnosing pediatric diseases in CXR scans is undertaken due to the lack of high-quality physician-annotated datasets. To overcome this challenge, we introduce and release PediCXR, a new pediatric CXR dataset of 9,125 studies retrospectively collected from a major pediatric hospital in Vietnam between 2020 and 2021. Each scan was manually annotated by a pediatric radiologist with more than ten years of experience. The dataset was labeled for the presence of 36 critical findings and 15 diseases. In particular, each abnormal finding was identified via a rectangle bounding box on the image. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first and largest pediatric CXR dataset containing lesion-level annotations and image-level labels for the detection of multiple findings and diseases. For algorithm development, the dataset was divided into a training set of 7,728 and a test set of 1,397. To encourage new advances in pediatric CXR interpretation using data-driven approaches, we provide a detailed description of the PediCXR data sample and make the dataset publicly available on https://physionet.org/content/pedicxr/1.0.0/
summary: The development of diagnostic models for detecting and diagnosing pediatric diseases in CXR scans is undertaken due to the lack of high-quality physician-annotated datasets. To overcome this challenge, we introduce and release PediCXR, a new pediatric CXR dataset of 9,125 studies retrospectively collected from a major pediatric hospital in Vietnam between 2020 and 2021. Each scan was manually annotated by a pediatric radiologist with more than ten years of experience. The dataset was labeled for the presence of 36 critical findings and 15 diseases. In particular, each abnormal finding was identified via a rectangle bounding box on the image. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first and largest pediatric CXR dataset containing lesion-level annotations and image-level labels for the detection of multiple findings and diseases. For algorithm development, the dataset was divided into a training set of 7,728 and a test set of 1,397. To encourage new advances in pediatric CXR interpretation using data-driven approaches, we provide a detailed description of the PediCXR data sample and make the dataset publicly available on https://physionet.org/content/pedicxr/1.0.0/
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏高质量的医生注释数据集，开发了用于在 CXR 扫描中检测和诊断儿科疾病的诊断模型。为了克服这一挑战，我们引入并发布了 PediCXR，这是一个新的儿科 CXR 数据集，包含 2020 年至 2021 年间从越南一家大型儿科医院回顾性收集的 9,125 项研究。每次扫描均由拥有十多年经验的儿科放射科医生手动注释。该数据集被标记为存在 36 项关键发现和 15 种疾病。特别是，每个异常发现都是通过图像上的矩形边界框来识别的。据我们所知，这是第一个也是最大的儿科 CXR 数据集，包含用于检测多种发现和疾病的病变级注释和图像级标签。为了进行算法开发，数据集被分为 7,728 个训练集和 1,397 个测试集。为了鼓励使用数据驱动方法在儿科 CXR 解释方面取得新进展，我们提供了 PediCXR 数据样本的详细描述，并将数据集公开在 https://physionet.org/content/pedicxr/1.0.0/ 上

AI.tldr: 本文提出并发布了一个名为PediCXR的儿科胸部X光影像数据集，用于检测和诊断儿童常见胸部疾病。
AI.motivation: 由于缺乏高质量的医生标注数据集，儿科胸部X光（CXR）诊断模型的开发面临挑战。本文旨在通过构建大规模标注数据集推动相关研究。
AI.method: 从越南一家大型儿科医院收集2020-2021年的9,125例CXR影像，由资深儿科放射科医生手动标注，包含36种关键病变和15种疾病的矩形框标注及图像级标签。数据集分为训练集（7,728例）和测试集（1,397例）。
AI.result: PediCXR是首个包含病变级标注和图像级标签的儿科CXR数据集，已公开发布于PhysioNet平台，可支持多病变和多疾病检测算法的开发。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集填补了儿科CXR领域高质量标注数据的空白，为基于数据驱动方法的儿科影像诊断研究提供了重要资源。

authors_text: Khiem H. Le,Tuan V. Tran,Hieu H. Pham,Hieu T. Nguyen,Tung T. Le,Ha Q. Nguyen
title: Learning from Multiple Expert Annotators for Enhancing Anomaly Detection in Medical Image Analysis
title_zh: 向多个专家注释者学习以增强医学图像分析中的异常检测
abstract: Building an accurate computer-aided diagnosis system based on data-driven approaches requires a large amount of high-quality labeled data. In medical imaging analysis, multiple expert annotators often produce subjective estimates about "ground truth labels" during the annotation process, depending on their expertise and experience. As a result, the labeled data may contain a variety of human biases with a high rate of disagreement among annotators, which significantly affect the performance of supervised machine learning algorithms. To tackle this challenge, we propose a simple yet effective approach to combine annotations from multiple radiology experts for training a deep learning-based detector that aims to detect abnormalities on medical scans. The proposed method first estimates the ground truth annotations and confidence scores of training examples. The estimated annotations and their scores are then used to train a deep learning detector with a re-weighted loss function to localize abnormal findings. We conduct an extensive experimental evaluation of the proposed approach on both simulated and real-world medical imaging datasets. The experimental results show that our approach significantly outperforms baseline approaches that do not consider the disagreements among annotators, including methods in which all of the noisy annotations are treated equally as ground truth and the ensemble of different models trained on different label sets provided separately by annotators.
summary: Building an accurate computer-aided diagnosis system based on data-driven approaches requires a large amount of high-quality labeled data. In medical imaging analysis, multiple expert annotators often produce subjective estimates about "ground truth labels" during the annotation process, depending on their expertise and experience. As a result, the labeled data may contain a variety of human biases with a high rate of disagreement among annotators, which significantly affect the performance of supervised machine learning algorithms. To tackle this challenge, we propose a simple yet effective approach to combine annotations from multiple radiology experts for training a deep learning-based detector that aims to detect abnormalities on medical scans. The proposed method first estimates the ground truth annotations and confidence scores of training examples. The estimated annotations and their scores are then used to train a deep learning detector with a re-weighted loss function to localize abnormal findings. We conduct an extensive experimental evaluation of the proposed approach on both simulated and real-world medical imaging datasets. The experimental results show that our approach significantly outperforms baseline approaches that do not consider the disagreements among annotators, including methods in which all of the noisy annotations are treated equally as ground truth and the ensemble of different models trained on different label sets provided separately by annotators.
abstract_zh: 构建基于数据驱动方法的精确计算机辅助诊断系统需要大量高质量的标记数据。在医学成像分析中，多个专家注释者通常会在注释过程中根据他们的专业知识和经验对“真实标签”进行主观估计。因此，标记数据可能包含各种人类偏见，注释者之间的分歧率很高，这会显着影响监督机器学习算法的性能。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，结合多个放射学专家的注释来训练基于深度学习的检测器，旨在检测医学扫描中的异常情况。所提出的方法首先估计训练示例的真实注释和置信度分数。然后使用估计的注释及其分数来训练具有重新加权损失函数的深度学习检测器，以定位异常发现。我们在模拟和现实世界的医学成像数据集上对所提出的方法进行了广泛的实验评估。实验结果表明，我们的方法显着优于不考虑注释者之间分歧的基线方法，包括将所有噪声注释平等地视为基本事实的方法，以及在注释者单独提供的不同标签集上训练的不同模型的集合。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合多位专家标注的方法，以提高医学影像中异常检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 医学影像标注中专家主观差异导致标签噪声和模型性能下降，传统方法未有效处理标注分歧问题。
AI.method: 估计标注真实性与置信度，通过加权损失函数训练深度学习检测器，融合多专家标注信息。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据集上显著优于基线方法，包括等权重处理噪声标注和模型集成方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解标注分歧影响，提升医学影像异常检测的鲁棒性与准确性。

The estimated annotations and their scores are then used to train a deep learning detector with a re-weighted loss function to localize abnormal findings. We conduct an extensive experimental evaluation of the proposed approach on both simulated and real-world medical imaging datasets. The experimental results show that our approach significantly outperforms baseline approaches that do not consider the disagreements among annotators, including methods in which all of the noisy annotations are treated equally as ground truth and the ensemble of different models trained on different label sets provided separately by annotators. 构建基于数据驱动方法的精确计算机辅助诊断系统需要大量高质量的标记数据。在医学成像分析中，多个专家注释者通常会在注释过程中根据他们的专业知识和经验对“真实标签”进行主观估计。因此，标记数据可能包含各种人类偏见，注释者之间的分歧率很高，这会显着影响监督机器学习算法的性能。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，结合多个放射学专家的注释来训练基于深度学习的检测器，旨在检测医学扫描中的异常情况。所提出的方法首先估计训练示例的真实注释和置信度分数。然后使用估计的注释及其分数来训练具有重新加权损失函数的深度学习检测器，以定位异常发现。我们在模拟和现实世界的医学成像数据集上对所提出的方法进行了广泛的实验评估。实验结果表明，我们的方法显着优于不考虑注释者之间分歧的基线方法，包括将所有噪声注释平等地视为基本事实的方法，以及在注释者单独提供的不同标签集上训练的不同模型的集合。 提出一种结合多位专家标注的方法，以提高医学影像中异常检测的准确性。 Khiem H. Le,Tuan V. Tran,Hieu H. Pham,Hieu T. Nguyen,Tung T. Le,Ha Q. Nguyen cs.CV

authors_text: Yi-Lin Tuan,Sajjad Beygi,Maryam Fazel-Zarandi,Qiaozi Gao,Alessandra Cervone,William Yang Wang
title: Towards Large-Scale Interpretable Knowledge Graph Reasoning for Dialogue Systems
title_zh: 面向对话系统的大规模可解释知识图推理
comment: accepted to the Findings of ACL 2022
comments: accepted to the Findings of ACL 2022
abstract: Users interacting with voice assistants today need to phrase their requests in a very specific manner to elicit an appropriate response. This limits the user experience, and is partly due to the lack of reasoning capabilities of dialogue platforms and the hand-crafted rules that require extensive labor. One possible way to improve user experience and relieve the manual efforts of designers is to build an end-to-end dialogue system that can do reasoning itself while perceiving user's utterances. In this work, we propose a novel method to incorporate the knowledge reasoning capability into dialogue systems in a more scalable and generalizable manner. Our proposed method allows a single transformer model to directly walk on a large-scale knowledge graph to generate responses. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to have transformer models generate responses by reasoning over differentiable knowledge graphs. We investigate the reasoning abilities of the proposed method on both task-oriented and domain-specific chit-chat dialogues. Empirical results show that this method can effectively and efficiently incorporate a knowledge graph into a dialogue system with fully-interpretable reasoning paths.
summary: Users interacting with voice assistants today need to phrase their requests in a very specific manner to elicit an appropriate response. This limits the user experience, and is partly due to the lack of reasoning capabilities of dialogue platforms and the hand-crafted rules that require extensive labor. One possible way to improve user experience and relieve the manual efforts of designers is to build an end-to-end dialogue system that can do reasoning itself while perceiving user's utterances. In this work, we propose a novel method to incorporate the knowledge reasoning capability into dialogue systems in a more scalable and generalizable manner. Our proposed method allows a single transformer model to directly walk on a large-scale knowledge graph to generate responses. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to have transformer models generate responses by reasoning over differentiable knowledge graphs. We investigate the reasoning abilities of the proposed method on both task-oriented and domain-specific chit-chat dialogues. Empirical results show that this method can effectively and efficiently incorporate a knowledge graph into a dialogue system with fully-interpretable reasoning paths.
abstract_zh: 如今，与语音助手交互的用户需要以非常具体的方式表达他们的请求，才能得到适当的响应。这限制了用户体验，部分原因是对话平台缺乏推理能力以及需要大量劳动力的手工制定规则。改善用户体验并减轻设计人员手动工作的一种可能方法是建立一个端到端的对话系统，该系统可以在感知用户话语的同时进行自我推理。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，以更具可扩展性和通用性的方式将知识推理能力融入对话系统中。我们提出的方法允许单个变压器模型直接在大规模知识图上行走以生成响应。据我们所知，这是第一个让 Transformer 模型通过对可微知识图进行推理来生成响应的工作。我们研究了所提出的方法在面向任务和特定领域的闲聊对话中的推理能力。实证结果表明，该方法可以有效且高效地将知识图谱融入到具有完全可解释推理路径的对话系统中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可扩展且通用的方法，将大规模知识图谱的可解释推理能力整合到对话系统中，通过单个Transformer模型直接在知识图谱上生成响应。
AI.motivation: 当前语音助手依赖用户精确输入且需大量人工规则，缺乏自主推理能力，限制了用户体验与系统可扩展性。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的模型直接在可微分知识图谱上进行推理，首次实现端到端对话系统与可解释知识图谱的结合。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在任务型对话和领域特定闲聊场景中均能有效整合知识图谱，生成具备完全可解释推理路径的响应。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为对话系统提供了自动化且可解释的知识推理框架，未来可进一步优化模型规模与跨领域适应性。

authors_text: Sam B. Tran,Huyen T. X. Nguyen,Chi Phan,Hieu H. Pham,Ha Q. Nguyen
title: A Novel Transparency Strategy-based Data Augmentation Approach for BI-RADS Classification of Mammograms
title_zh: 一种基于透明策略的新型乳房 X 光检查 BI-RADS 分类数据增强方法
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 22nd IEEE Statistical Signal Processing (SSP) workshop
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 22nd IEEE Statistical Signal Processing (SSP) workshop
abstract: Image augmentation techniques have been widely investigated to improve the performance of deep learning (DL) algorithms on mammography classification tasks. Recent methods have proved the efficiency of image augmentation on data deficiency or data imbalance issues. In this paper, we propose a novel transparency strategy to boost the Breast Imaging Reporting and Data System (BI-RADS) scores of mammogram classifiers. The proposed approach utilizes the Region of Interest (ROI) information to generate more high-risk training examples for breast cancer (BI-RADS 3, 4, 5) from original images. Our extensive experiments on three different datasets show that the proposed approach significantly improves the mammogram classification performance and surpasses a state-of-the-art data augmentation technique called CutMix. This study also highlights that our transparency method is more effective than other augmentation strategies for BI-RADS classification and can be widely applied to other computer vision tasks.
summary: Image augmentation techniques have been widely investigated to improve the performance of deep learning (DL) algorithms on mammography classification tasks. Recent methods have proved the efficiency of image augmentation on data deficiency or data imbalance issues. In this paper, we propose a novel transparency strategy to boost the Breast Imaging Reporting and Data System (BI-RADS) scores of mammogram classifiers. The proposed approach utilizes the Region of Interest (ROI) information to generate more high-risk training examples for breast cancer (BI-RADS 3, 4, 5) from original images. Our extensive experiments on three different datasets show that the proposed approach significantly improves the mammogram classification performance and surpasses a state-of-the-art data augmentation technique called CutMix. This study also highlights that our transparency method is more effective than other augmentation strategies for BI-RADS classification and can be widely applied to other computer vision tasks.
abstract_zh: 图像增强技术已被广泛研究，以提高深度学习 (DL) 算法在乳腺 X 线摄影分类任务中的性能。最近的方法已经证明了图像增强在数据缺乏或数据不平衡问题上的有效性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的透明度策略，以提高乳房 X 光检查分类器的乳房成像报告和数据系统（BI-RADS）分数。所提出的方法利用感兴趣区域 (ROI) 信息从原始图像生成更多针对乳腺癌的高风险训练示例 (BI-RADS 3、4、5)。我们对三个不同数据集的广泛实验表明，所提出的方法显着提高了乳房 X 光照片分类性能，并超越了最先进的数据增强技术 CutMix。这项研究还强调，我们的透明度方法比 BI-RADS 分类的其他增强策略更有效，并且可以广泛应用于其他计算机视觉任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于透明度策略的数据增强方法，用于改进乳腺X光片的BI-RADS分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强方法在处理乳腺X光分类任务中的数据不足和类别不平衡问题时效果有限，需更有效的策略提升高风险类别（BI-RADS 3-5）的分类准确率。
AI.method: 利用感兴趣区域（ROI）信息，通过透明度策略生成更多高风险训练样本，并在三个数据集上验证其有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著优于CutMix等现有技术，在BI-RADS分类任务中提升分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 透明度策略在BI-RADS分类中表现优异，且可推广至其他计算机视觉任务。

authors_text: Xihuai Wang,Zhicheng Zhang,Weinan Zhang
title: Model-based Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning: Recent Progress and Prospects
title_zh: 基于模型的多智能体强化学习：最新进展与展望
abstract: Significant advances have recently been achieved in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) which tackles sequential decision-making problems involving multiple participants. However, MARL requires a tremendous number of samples for effective training. On the other hand, model-based methods have been shown to achieve provable advantages of sample efficiency. However, the attempts of model-based methods to MARL have just started very recently. This paper presents a review of the existing research on model-based MARL, including theoretical analyses, algorithms, and applications, and analyzes the advantages and potential of model-based MARL. Specifically, we provide a detailed taxonomy of the algorithms and point out the pros and cons for each algorithm according to the challenges inherent to multi-agent scenarios. We also outline promising directions for future development of this field.
summary: Significant advances have recently been achieved in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) which tackles sequential decision-making problems involving multiple participants. However, MARL requires a tremendous number of samples for effective training. On the other hand, model-based methods have been shown to achieve provable advantages of sample efficiency. However, the attempts of model-based methods to MARL have just started very recently. This paper presents a review of the existing research on model-based MARL, including theoretical analyses, algorithms, and applications, and analyzes the advantages and potential of model-based MARL. Specifically, we provide a detailed taxonomy of the algorithms and point out the pros and cons for each algorithm according to the challenges inherent to multi-agent scenarios. We also outline promising directions for future development of this field.
abstract_zh: 多智能体强化学习（MARL）最近取得了重大进展，它解决了涉及多个参与者的顺序决策问题。然而，MARL 需要大量样本才能进行有效训练。另一方面，基于模型的方法已被证明可以实现可证明的样本效率优势。然而，基于模型的方法对 MARL 的尝试最近才刚刚开始。本文综述了基于模型的MARL的现有研究，包括理论分析、算法和应用，并分析了基于模型的MARL的优势和潜力。具体来说，我们提供了算法的详细分类，并根据多代理场景固有的挑战指出了每种算法的优缺点。我们还概述了该领域未来发展的有希望的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于模型的多智能体强化学习（MARL）的最新进展，分析其算法、优势及未来方向。
AI.motivation: MARL面临样本效率低的挑战，而基于模型的方法在样本效率上具有优势，但其在MARL中的研究尚处于起步阶段。
AI.method: 通过文献综述对现有基于模型的MARL方法进行分类，分析其理论、算法及应用，并总结优缺点。
AI.result: 提出了基于模型的MARL算法分类，指出了不同算法在多智能体场景中的优缺点，并明确了未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 基于模型的MARL具有提升样本效率的潜力，但需解决模型不确定性、分布式训练等挑战以推动实际应用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文综述了基于模型的多智能体强化学习（MARL）的最新进展，分析其算法、优势及未来方向。
ai_content.motivation: MARL面临样本效率低的挑战，而基于模型的方法在样本效率上具有优势，但其在MARL中的研究尚处于起步阶段。
ai_content.method: 通过文献综述对现有基于模型的MARL方法进行分类，分析其理论、算法及应用，并总结优缺点。
ai_content.result: 提出了基于模型的MARL算法分类，指出了不同算法在多智能体场景中的优缺点，并明确了未来研究方向。
ai_content.conclusion: 基于模型的MARL具有提升样本效率的潜力，但需解决模型不确定性、分布式训练等挑战以推动实际应用。

search_text: Model-based Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning: Recent Progress and Prospects 基于模型的多智能体强化学习：最新进展与展望 Significant advances have recently been achieved in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) which tackles sequential decision-making problems involving multiple participants. However, MARL requires a tremendous number of samples for effective training. On the other hand, model-based methods have been shown to achieve provable advantages of sample efficiency. However, the attempts of model-based methods to MARL have just started very recently. This paper presents a review of the existing research on model-based MARL, including theoretical analyses, algorithms, and applications, and analyzes the advantages and potential of model-based MARL. Specifically, we provide a detailed taxonomy of the algorithms and point out the pros and cons for each algorithm according to the challenges inherent to multi-agent scenarios. We also outline promising directions for future development of this field. 多智能体强化学习（MARL）最近取得了重大进展，它解决了涉及多个参与者的顺序决策问题。然而，MARL 需要大量样本才能进行有效训练。另一方面，基于模型的方法已被证明可以实现可证明的样本效率优势。然而，基于模型的方法对 MARL 的尝试最近才刚刚开始。本文综述了基于模型的MARL的现有研究，包括理论分析、算法和应用，并分析了基于模型的MARL的优势和潜力。具体来说，我们提供了算法的详细分类，并根据多代理场景固有的挑战指出了每种算法的优缺点。我们还概述了该领域未来发展的有希望的方向。 本文综述了基于模型的多智能体强化学习（MARL）的最新进展，分析其算法、优势及未来方向。 Xihuai Wang,Zhicheng Zhang,Weinan Zhang cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Pedro Resende
title: A physical approach to qualia and the emergence of conscious observers in qualia space
title_zh: 感受性的物理方法以及感受性空间中意识观察者的出现
comment: V2 is a thorough revision of V1
comments: V2 is a thorough revision of V1
abstract: I propose that qualia are physical because they are directly observable, and revisit the contentious link between consciousness and quantum measurements from a new perspective -- one that does not rely on observers or wave function collapse but instead treats physical measurements as fundamental in a sense resonant with Wheeler's it-from-bit. Building on a mathematical definition of measurement space in physics, I reinterpret it as a model of qualia, effectively equating the measurement problem of quantum mechanics with the hard problem of consciousness. The resulting framework falls within panpsychism, and offers potential solutions to the combination problem. Moreover, some of the mathematical structure of measurement spaces, taken for granted in physics, needs justification for qualia, suggesting that the apparent solidity of physical reality is deeply rooted in how humans process information.
summary: I propose that qualia are physical because they are directly observable, and revisit the contentious link between consciousness and quantum measurements from a new perspective -- one that does not rely on observers or wave function collapse but instead treats physical measurements as fundamental in a sense resonant with Wheeler's it-from-bit. Building on a mathematical definition of measurement space in physics, I reinterpret it as a model of qualia, effectively equating the measurement problem of quantum mechanics with the hard problem of consciousness. The resulting framework falls within panpsychism, and offers potential solutions to the combination problem. Moreover, some of the mathematical structure of measurement spaces, taken for granted in physics, needs justification for qualia, suggesting that the apparent solidity of physical reality is deeply rooted in how humans process information.
abstract_zh: 我认为感受性是物理的，因为它们是直接可观察的，并从一个新的角度重新审视意识和量子测量之间有争议的联系——一个不依赖观察者或波函数崩溃的观点，而是将物理测量视为基础，在某种意义上与惠勒的“来自比特”产生共鸣。基于物理学中测量空间的数学定义，我将其重新解释为感受性模型，有效地将量子力学的测量问题与意识的难题等同起来。由此产生的框架属于泛心论，并为组合问题提供了潜在的解决方案。此外，物理学中理所当然的一些测量空间的数学结构需要对感受性进行论证，这表明物理现实的表面坚固性深深植根于人类处理信息的方式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将主观体验（qualia）视为物理现象的理论框架，并通过重新诠释量子测量问题来探讨意识的产生机制。
AI.motivation: 解决意识研究中的‘困难问题’（硬问题）及泛心论中的组合问题，建立物理测量与主观体验之间的关联。
AI.method: 基于物理学中的测量空间数学定义，将其重新解释为qualia模型，将量子力学的测量问题与意识的硬问题等同化。
AI.result: 构建了一个泛心论框架，为意识的组合问题提供潜在解决方案，并指出物理现实的稳定性与人类信息处理方式密切相关。
AI.conclusion: 物理现实的坚固性源于信息处理机制，该理论为意识与量子测量的关联提供了新的解释路径。

authors_text: Daniel Kvak,Marian Bendik,Anna Chromcova
title: Towards Clinical Practice: Design and Implementation of Convolutional Neural Network-Based Assistive Diagnosis System for COVID-19 Case Detection from Chest X-Ray Images
title_zh: 迈向临床实践：基于卷积神经网络的辅助诊断系统的设计和实现，用于从胸部 X 射线图像检测 COVID-19 病例
comment: computer-aided detection, convolutional neural network, COVID-19, deep learning, image classification
comments: computer-aided detection, convolutional neural network, COVID-19, deep learning, image classification
abstract: One of the critical tools for early detection and subsequent evaluation of the incidence of lung diseases is chest radiography. This study presents a real-world implementation of a convolutional neural network (CNN) based Carebot Covid app to detect COVID-19 from chest X-ray (CXR) images. Our proposed model takes the form of a simple and intuitive application. Used CNN can be deployed as a STOW-RS prediction endpoint for direct implementation into DICOM viewers. The results of this study show that the deep learning model based on DenseNet and ResNet architecture can detect SARS-CoV-2 from CXR images with precision of 0.981, recall of 0.962 and AP of 0.993.
summary: One of the critical tools for early detection and subsequent evaluation of the incidence of lung diseases is chest radiography. This study presents a real-world implementation of a convolutional neural network (CNN) based Carebot Covid app to detect COVID-19 from chest X-ray (CXR) images. Our proposed model takes the form of a simple and intuitive application. Used CNN can be deployed as a STOW-RS prediction endpoint for direct implementation into DICOM viewers. The results of this study show that the deep learning model based on DenseNet and ResNet architecture can detect SARS-CoV-2 from CXR images with precision of 0.981, recall of 0.962 and AP of 0.993.
abstract_zh: 早期发现和随后评估肺部疾病发病率的关键工具之一是胸部X光检查。本研究提出了基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的 Carebot Covid 应用程序的实际实现，用于从胸部 X 光 (CXR) 图像中检测 COVID-19。我们提出的模型采用简单直观的应用程序的形式。使用的 CNN 可以部署为 STOW-RS 预测端点，以便直接实施到 DICOM 查看器中。本研究结果表明，基于 DenseNet 和 ResNet 架构的深度学习模型可以从 CXR 图像中检测 SARS-CoV-2，精度为 0.981，召回率为 0.962，AP 为 0.993。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一个基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的辅助诊断系统，用于从胸部X光图像中检测COVID-19病例。
AI.motivation: 胸部X光检查是早期发现肺部疾病的关键工具，但传统方法存在效率低、依赖医生经验等问题，亟需自动化辅助诊断系统。
AI.method: 采用DenseNet和ResNet架构构建深度学习模型，将其部署为DICOM查看器的STOW-RS预测端点，通过胸部X光图像直接进行COVID-19检测。
AI.result: 模型在检测中达到0.981的精确率、0.962的召回率和0.993的平均精度（AP），表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 该系统验证了基于深度学习的辅助诊断方法在临床实践中的可行性，可有效提升COVID-19筛查效率。

authors_text: Zongyang Ma,Guan Luo,Jin Gao,Liang Li,Yuxin Chen,Shaoru Wang,Congxuan Zhang,Weiming Hu
title: Open-Vocabulary One-Stage Detection with Hierarchical Visual-Language Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 具有分层视觉语言知识蒸馏的开放词汇一级检测
abstract: Open-vocabulary object detection aims to detect novel object categories beyond the training set. The advanced open-vocabulary two-stage detectors employ instance-level visual-to-visual knowledge distillation to align the visual space of the detector with the semantic space of the Pre-trained Visual-Language Model (PVLM). However, in the more efficient one-stage detector, the absence of class-agnostic object proposals hinders the knowledge distillation on unseen objects, leading to severe performance degradation. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical visual-language knowledge distillation method, i.e., HierKD, for open-vocabulary one-stage detection. Specifically, a global-level knowledge distillation is explored to transfer the knowledge of unseen categories from the PVLM to the detector. Moreover, we combine the proposed global-level knowledge distillation and the common instance-level knowledge distillation to learn the knowledge of seen and unseen categories simultaneously. Extensive experiments on MS-COCO show that our method significantly surpasses the previous best one-stage detector with 11.9\% and 6.7\% $AP_{50}$ gains under the zero-shot detection and generalized zero-shot detection settings, and reduces the $AP_{50}$ performance gap from 14\% to 7.3\% compared to the best two-stage detector.
summary: Open-vocabulary object detection aims to detect novel object categories beyond the training set. The advanced open-vocabulary two-stage detectors employ instance-level visual-to-visual knowledge distillation to align the visual space of the detector with the semantic space of the Pre-trained Visual-Language Model (PVLM). However, in the more efficient one-stage detector, the absence of class-agnostic object proposals hinders the knowledge distillation on unseen objects, leading to severe performance degradation. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical visual-language knowledge distillation method, i.e., HierKD, for open-vocabulary one-stage detection. Specifically, a global-level knowledge distillation is explored to transfer the knowledge of unseen categories from the PVLM to the detector. Moreover, we combine the proposed global-level knowledge distillation and the common instance-level knowledge distillation to learn the knowledge of seen and unseen categories simultaneously. Extensive experiments on MS-COCO show that our method significantly surpasses the previous best one-stage detector with 11.9\% and 6.7\% $AP_{50}$ gains under the zero-shot detection and generalized zero-shot detection settings, and reduces the $AP_{50}$ performance gap from 14\% to 7.3\% compared to the best two-stage detector.
abstract_zh: 开放词汇对象检测旨在检测训练集之外的新对象类别。先进的开放词汇两级检测器采用实例级视觉到视觉知识蒸馏来将检测器的视觉空间与预训练视觉语言模型（PVLM）的语义空间对齐。然而，在更高效的一级检测器中，缺乏与类无关的对象建议阻碍了对未见对象的知识蒸馏，导致严重的性能下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种分层视觉语言知识蒸馏方法，即 HierKD，用于开放词汇单阶段检测。具体来说，探索了全局级知识蒸馏，将未见类别的知识从 PVLM 转移到检测器。此外，我们将提出的全局级知识蒸馏和常见的实例级知识蒸馏结合起来，同时学习可见和不可见类别的知识。在 MS-COCO 上的大量实验表明，我们的方法显着超越了之前最好的单级检测器，在零样本检测和广义零样本检测设置下分别获得了 11.9\% 和 6.7\% $AP_{50}$ 增益，并且与最好的两级检测器相比，将 $AP_{50}$ 性能差距从 14\% 缩小到 7.3\%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种层次化视觉-语言知识蒸馏方法HierKD，用于解决开放词汇一阶段目标检测中未见类别检测性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有两阶段开放词汇检测器通过实例级知识蒸馏实现视觉空间与PVLM语义空间对齐，但一阶段检测器因缺乏类别无关候选框导致未见对象知识蒸馏效果差，性能显著下降。
AI.method: 设计全局级知识蒸馏机制将PVLM的未见类别知识迁移至检测器，并结合实例级蒸馏同步学习已见/未见类别知识，构建层次化知识传递框架。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO数据集上，零样本检测AP50提升11.9%，广义零样本检测提升6.7%，与最佳两阶段检测器的AP50性能差距从14%缩小至7.3%。
AI.conclusion: HierKD通过层次化知识蒸馏有效解决了开放词汇一阶段检测的未见类别识别难题，显著超越现有方法并缩小与两阶段检测器的性能差距。
