search_text: Open-Vocabulary One-Stage Detection with Hierarchical Visual-Language Knowledge Distillation 具有分层视觉语言知识蒸馏的开放词汇一级检测 Open-vocabulary object detection aims to detect novel object categories beyond the training set. The advanced open-vocabulary two-stage detectors employ instance-level visual-to-visual knowledge distillation to align the visual space of the detector with the semantic space of the Pre-trained Visual-Language Model (PVLM). However, in the more efficient one-stage detector, the absence of class-agnostic object proposals hinders the knowledge distillation on unseen objects, leading to severe performance degradation. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical visual-language knowledge distillation method, i.e., HierKD, for open-vocabulary one-stage detection. Specifically, a global-level knowledge distillation is explored to transfer the knowledge of unseen categories from the PVLM to the detector. Moreover, we combine the proposed global-level knowledge distillation and the common instance-level knowledge distillation to learn the knowledge of seen and unseen categories simultaneously. Extensive experiments on MS-COCO show that our method significantly surpasses the previous best one-stage detector with 11.9\% and 6.7\% $AP_{50}$ gains under the zero-shot detection and generalized zero-shot detection settings, and reduces the $AP_{50}$ performance gap from 14\% to 7.3\% compared to the best two-stage detector. 开放词汇对象检测旨在检测训练集之外的新对象类别。先进的开放词汇两级检测器采用实例级视觉到视觉知识蒸馏来将检测器的视觉空间与预训练视觉语言模型（PVLM）的语义空间对齐。然而，在更高效的一级检测器中，缺乏与类无关的对象建议阻碍了对未见对象的知识蒸馏，导致严重的性能下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种分层视觉语言知识蒸馏方法，即 HierKD，用于开放词汇单阶段检测。具体来说，探索了全局级知识蒸馏，将未见类别的知识从 PVLM 转移到检测器。此外，我们将提出的全局级知识蒸馏和常见的实例级知识蒸馏结合起来，同时学习可见和不可见类别的知识。在 MS-COCO 上的大量实验表明，我们的方法显着超越了之前最好的单级检测器，在零样本检测和广义零样本检测设置下分别获得了 11.9\% 和 6.7\% $AP_{50}$ 增益，并且与最好的两级检测器相比，将 $AP_{50}$ 性能差距从 14\% 缩小到 7.3\%。 本文提出一种层次化视觉-语言知识蒸馏方法HierKD，用于解决开放词汇一阶段目标检测中未见类别检测性能下降的问题。 Zongyang Ma,Guan Luo,Jin Gao,Liang Li,Yuxin Chen,Shaoru Wang,Congxuan Zhang,Weiming Hu cs.CV

authors_text: Shogo Hayakawa,Weiwei Wan,Keisuke Koyama,Kensuke Harada
title: A Dual-Arm Robot that Manipulates Heavy Plates Cooperatively with a Vacuum Lifter
title_zh: 与真空升降机配合操作厚板的双臂机器人
abstract: A vacuum lifter is widely used to hold and pick up large, heavy, and flat objects. Conventionally, when using a vacuum lifter, a human worker watches the state of a running vacuum lifter and adjusts the object's pose to maintain balance. In this work, we propose using a dual-arm robot to replace the human workers and develop planning and control methods for a dual-arm robot to raise a heavy plate with the help of a vacuum lifter. The methods help the robot determine its actions by considering the vacuum lifer's suction position and suction force limits. The essence of the methods is two-fold. First, we build a Manipulation State Graph (MSG) to store the weighted logical relations of various plate contact states and robot/vacuum lifter configurations, and search the graph to plan efficient and low-cost robot manipulation sequences. Second, we develop a velocity-based impedance controller to coordinate the robot and the vacuum lifter when lifting an object. With its help, a robot can follow the vacuum lifter's motion and realize compliant robot-vacuum lifter collaboration. The proposed planning and control methods are investigated using real-world experiments. The results show that a robot can effectively and flexibly work together with a vacuum lifter to manipulate large and heavy plate-like objects with the methods' support.
summary: A vacuum lifter is widely used to hold and pick up large, heavy, and flat objects. Conventionally, when using a vacuum lifter, a human worker watches the state of a running vacuum lifter and adjusts the object's pose to maintain balance. In this work, we propose using a dual-arm robot to replace the human workers and develop planning and control methods for a dual-arm robot to raise a heavy plate with the help of a vacuum lifter. The methods help the robot determine its actions by considering the vacuum lifer's suction position and suction force limits. The essence of the methods is two-fold. First, we build a Manipulation State Graph (MSG) to store the weighted logical relations of various plate contact states and robot/vacuum lifter configurations, and search the graph to plan efficient and low-cost robot manipulation sequences. Second, we develop a velocity-based impedance controller to coordinate the robot and the vacuum lifter when lifting an object. With its help, a robot can follow the vacuum lifter's motion and realize compliant robot-vacuum lifter collaboration. The proposed planning and control methods are investigated using real-world experiments. The results show that a robot can effectively and flexibly work together with a vacuum lifter to manipulate large and heavy plate-like objects with the methods' support.
abstract_zh: 真空升降机广泛用于夹持和拾取大型、重型和扁平的物体。传统上，当使用真空升降机时，工作人员观察运行中的真空升降机的状态并调整物体的姿态以保持平衡。在这项工作中，我们建议使用双臂机器人代替人类工人，并开发双臂机器人在真空升降机的帮助下举起厚板的规划和控制方法。这些方法通过考虑真空吸尘器的吸力位置和吸力限制来帮助机器人确定其动作。这些方法的本质有两个方面。首先，我们构建一个操纵状态图（MSG）来存储各种板接触状态和机器人/真空升降器配置的加权逻辑关系，并搜索该图以规划高效且低成本的机器人操纵序列。其次，我们开发了一种基于速度的阻抗控制器，以在提升物体时协调机器人和真空升降机。在它的帮助下，机器人可以跟随真空升降机的运动，实现机器人与真空升降机的兼容协作。所提出的规划和控制方法通过真实世界的实验进行了研究。结果表明，在该方法的支持下，机器人可以有效、灵活地与真空升降机配合，搬运大型、重型板状物体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双臂机器人与真空吸盘协同操作重型平板的方法，通过规划与控制算法实现自动化搬运。
AI.motivation: 传统真空吸盘搬运大型重物需人工实时调整姿态维持平衡，存在安全隐患且效率低下，需自动化解决方案替代人工操作。
AI.method: 构建包含吸盘吸附状态与机器人配置的加权逻辑关系图（MSG）进行路径规划，并设计基于速度的阻抗控制器实现机器人与吸盘的协同运动控制。
AI.result: 实验验证了机器人能有效跟随吸盘运动，稳定协作完成大型重物搬运任务，证明方法的可行性与灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法实现了双臂机器人与真空吸盘的高效协作，为自动化搬运重型平板提供了可靠的技术方案。

authors_text: Shentong Mo,Jingfei Xia,Xiaoqing Tan,Bhiksha Raj
title: Point3D: tracking actions as moving points with 3D CNNs
title_zh: Point3D：使用 3D CNN 将动作跟踪为移动点
comment: Accepted by the 32nd British Machine Vision Conference (BMVC 2021)
comments: Accepted by the 32nd British Machine Vision Conference (BMVC 2021)
abstract: Spatio-temporal action recognition has been a challenging task that involves detecting where and when actions occur. Current state-of-the-art action detectors are mostly anchor-based, requiring sensitive anchor designs and huge computations due to calculating large numbers of anchor boxes. Motivated by nascent anchor-free approaches, we propose Point3D, a flexible and computationally efficient network with high precision for spatio-temporal action recognition. Our Point3D consists of a Point Head for action localization and a 3D Head for action classification. Firstly, Point Head is used to track center points and knot key points of humans to localize the bounding box of an action. These location features are then piped into a time-wise attention to learn long-range dependencies across frames. The 3D Head is later deployed for the final action classification. Our Point3D achieves state-of-the-art performance on the JHMDB, UCF101-24, and AVA benchmarks in terms of frame-mAP and video-mAP. Comprehensive ablation studies also demonstrate the effectiveness of each module proposed in our Point3D.
summary: Spatio-temporal action recognition has been a challenging task that involves detecting where and when actions occur. Current state-of-the-art action detectors are mostly anchor-based, requiring sensitive anchor designs and huge computations due to calculating large numbers of anchor boxes. Motivated by nascent anchor-free approaches, we propose Point3D, a flexible and computationally efficient network with high precision for spatio-temporal action recognition. Our Point3D consists of a Point Head for action localization and a 3D Head for action classification. Firstly, Point Head is used to track center points and knot key points of humans to localize the bounding box of an action. These location features are then piped into a time-wise attention to learn long-range dependencies across frames. The 3D Head is later deployed for the final action classification. Our Point3D achieves state-of-the-art performance on the JHMDB, UCF101-24, and AVA benchmarks in terms of frame-mAP and video-mAP. Comprehensive ablation studies also demonstrate the effectiveness of each module proposed in our Point3D.
abstract_zh: 时空动作识别一直是一项具有挑战性的任务，涉及检测动作发生的地点和时间。目前最先进的动作检测器大多是基于锚点的，由于需要计算大量锚框，因此需要敏感的锚点设计和巨大的计算量。受新兴的无锚方法的推动，我们提出了 Point3D，这是一种灵活且计算高效的网络，具有高精度，用于时空动作识别。我们的 Point3D 由用于动作定位的 Point Head 和用于动作分类的 3D Head 组成。首先，Point Head用于跟踪人体的中心点和结点关键点，以定位动作的边界框。然后，这些位置特征被输送到时间上的注意力中，以学习跨帧的远程依赖性。随后部署 3D 头部以进行最终的动作分类。我们的 Point3D 在 JHMDB、UCF101-24 和 AVA 基准上的帧 mAP 和视频 mAP 方面实现了最先进的性能。全面的消融研究还证明了我们的 Point3D 中提出的每个模块的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Point3D网络，通过3D卷积实现高效的时空动作识别，解决传统锚框方法计算量大、设计敏感的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有动作检测方法依赖锚框设计，存在计算复杂度高和锚框敏感性问题，亟需更高效的无锚框解决方案。
AI.method: Point3D包含两个核心模块：Point Head通过追踪人体中心点和关键点实现动作定位，结合时间注意力机制建模跨帧依赖；3D Head负责动作分类，最终输出检测结果。
AI.result: 在JHMDB、UCF101-24和AVA数据集上，Point3D在frame-mAP和video-mAP指标均达到SOTA，消融实验验证了各模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: Point3D通过无锚框设计和时空特征融合，在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算复杂度，为时空动作识别提供新思路。

search_text: Point3D: tracking actions as moving points with 3D CNNs Point3D：使用 3D CNN 将动作跟踪为移动点 Spatio-temporal action recognition has been a challenging task that involves detecting where and when actions occur. Current state-of-the-art action detectors are mostly anchor-based, requiring sensitive anchor designs and huge computations due to calculating large numbers of anchor boxes. Motivated by nascent anchor-free approaches, we propose Point3D, a flexible and computationally efficient network with high precision for spatio-temporal action recognition. Our Point3D consists of a Point Head for action localization and a 3D Head for action classification. Firstly, Point Head is used to track center points and knot key points of humans to localize the bounding box of an action. These location features are then piped into a time-wise attention to learn long-range dependencies across frames. The 3D Head is later deployed for the final action classification. Our Point3D achieves state-of-the-art performance on the JHMDB, UCF101-24, and AVA benchmarks in terms of frame-mAP and video-mAP. Comprehensive ablation studies also demonstrate the effectiveness of each module proposed in our Point3D. 时空动作识别一直是一项具有挑战性的任务，涉及检测动作发生的地点和时间。目前最先进的动作检测器大多是基于锚点的，由于需要计算大量锚框，因此需要敏感的锚点设计和巨大的计算量。受新兴的无锚方法的推动，我们提出了 Point3D，这是一种灵活且计算高效的网络，具有高精度，用于时空动作识别。我们的 Point3D 由用于动作定位的 Point Head 和用于动作分类的 3D Head 组成。首先，Point Head用于跟踪人体的中心点和结点关键点，以定位动作的边界框。然后，这些位置特征被输送到时间上的注意力中，以学习跨帧的远程依赖性。随后部署 3D 头部以进行最终的动作分类。我们的 Point3D 在 JHMDB、UCF101-24 和 AVA 基准上的帧 mAP 和视频 mAP 方面实现了最先进的性能。全面的消融研究还证明了我们的 Point3D 中提出的每个模块的有效性。 本文提出Point3D网络，通过3D卷积实现高效的时空动作识别，解决传统锚框方法计算量大、设计敏感的问题。 Shentong Mo,Jingfei Xia,Xiaoqing Tan,Bhiksha Raj cs.CV

authors_text: Shrirang Abhyankar,Jan Drgona,Andrew August,Elliot Skomski,Aaron Tuor
title: Neuro-physical dynamic load modeling using differentiable parametric optimization
title_zh: 使用可微参数优化的神经物理动态负载建模
abstract: In this work, we investigate a data-driven approach for obtaining a reduced equivalent load model of distribution systems for electromechanical transient stability analysis. The proposed reduced equivalent is a neuro-physical model comprising of a traditional ZIP load model augmented with a neural network. This neuro-physical model is trained through differentiable programming. We discuss the formulation, modeling details, and training of the proposed model set up as a differential parametric program. The performance and accuracy of this neurophysical ZIP load model is presented on a medium-scale 350-bus transmission-distribution network.
summary: In this work, we investigate a data-driven approach for obtaining a reduced equivalent load model of distribution systems for electromechanical transient stability analysis. The proposed reduced equivalent is a neuro-physical model comprising of a traditional ZIP load model augmented with a neural network. This neuro-physical model is trained through differentiable programming. We discuss the formulation, modeling details, and training of the proposed model set up as a differential parametric program. The performance and accuracy of this neurophysical ZIP load model is presented on a medium-scale 350-bus transmission-distribution network.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了一种数据驱动方法，用于获得配电系统的简化等效负载模型，以进行机电暂态稳定性分析。所提出的简化等效模型是一个神经物理模型，由传统的 ZIP 负载模型和神经网络增强组成。该神经物理模型是通过可微分编程进行训练的。我们讨论了作为微分参数程序设置的拟议模型的公式、建模细节和训练。该神经物理 ZIP 负载模型的性能和准确性在中等规模的 350 总线输配电网络上展示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合传统ZIP负荷模型与神经网络的神经物理负荷模型，用于电力系统机电暂态稳定性分析。
AI.motivation: 传统负荷模型难以准确描述复杂系统的动态特性，需融合物理规律与数据驱动方法提升建模精度。
AI.method: 通过可微分编程框架，将神经网络嵌入ZIP模型参数优化过程，构建神经物理动态负荷模型并进行训练。
AI.result: 在350节点输配电网测试中，该模型展现出优于传统方法的性能与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 神经物理模型有效结合了物理可解释性与数据驱动优势，为电力系统暂态分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Àlex R. Atrio,Andrei Popescu-Belis
title: Small Batch Sizes Improve Training of Low-Resource Neural MT
title_zh: 小批量可改善低资源神经机器翻译的训练
comment: To be published in 18th International Conference on Natural Language Processing (ICON 2021)
comments: To be published in 18th International Conference on Natural Language Processing (ICON 2021)
abstract: We study the role of an essential hyper-parameter that governs the training of Transformers for neural machine translation in a low-resource setting: the batch size. Using theoretical insights and experimental evidence, we argue against the widespread belief that batch size should be set as large as allowed by the memory of the GPUs. We show that in a low-resource setting, a smaller batch size leads to higher scores in a shorter training time, and argue that this is due to better regularization of the gradients during training.
summary: We study the role of an essential hyper-parameter that governs the training of Transformers for neural machine translation in a low-resource setting: the batch size. Using theoretical insights and experimental evidence, we argue against the widespread belief that batch size should be set as large as allowed by the memory of the GPUs. We show that in a low-resource setting, a smaller batch size leads to higher scores in a shorter training time, and argue that this is due to better regularization of the gradients during training.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了一个重要的超参数的作用：批量大小，该超参数在资源匮乏的情况下控制神经机器翻译 Transformer 的训练。利用理论见解和实验证据，我们反对普遍认为批量大小应设置为 GPU 内存允许的尽可能大的观点。我们表明，在资源匮乏的情况下，较小的批量大小会在较短的训练时间内获得较高的分数，并认为这是由于训练期间梯度的更好正则化所致。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在低资源环境下，小批量大小对神经机器翻译模型训练效果的影响。
AI.motivation: 挑战传统观点认为批量大小应尽可能大的认知，探索小批量大小在低资源场景下的潜在优势。
AI.method: 结合理论分析与实验验证，对比不同批量大小对模型训练效果的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，小批量大小能在更短训练时间内提升模型得分，且归因于梯度正则化的优化。
AI.conclusion: 在低资源神经机器翻译任务中，较小的批量大小通过增强梯度正则化效果，可有效提升训练效率和模型性能。

authors_text: Yiqing Wu,Ruobing Xie,Yongchun Zhu,Xiang Ao,Xin Chen,Xu Zhang,Fuzhen Zhuang,Leyu Lin,Qing He
title: Multi-view Multi-behavior Contrastive Learning in Recommendation
title_zh: 推荐中的多视图多行为对比学习
abstract: Multi-behavior recommendation (MBR) aims to jointly consider multiple behaviors to improve the target behavior's performance. We argue that MBR models should: (1) model the coarse-grained commonalities between different behaviors of a user, (2) consider both individual sequence view and global graph view in multi-behavior modeling, and (3) capture the fine-grained differences between multiple behaviors of a user. In this work, we propose a novel Multi-behavior Multi-view Contrastive Learning Recommendation (MMCLR) framework, including three new CL tasks to solve the above challenges, respectively. The multi-behavior CL aims to make different user single-behavior representations of the same user in each view to be similar. The multi-view CL attempts to bridge the gap between a user's sequence-view and graph-view representations. The behavior distinction CL focuses on modeling fine-grained differences of different behaviors. In experiments, we conduct extensive evaluations and ablation tests to verify the effectiveness of MMCLR and various CL tasks on two real-world datasets, achieving SOTA performance over existing baselines. Our code will be available on \url{https://github.com/wyqing20/MMCLR}
summary: Multi-behavior recommendation (MBR) aims to jointly consider multiple behaviors to improve the target behavior's performance. We argue that MBR models should: (1) model the coarse-grained commonalities between different behaviors of a user, (2) consider both individual sequence view and global graph view in multi-behavior modeling, and (3) capture the fine-grained differences between multiple behaviors of a user. In this work, we propose a novel Multi-behavior Multi-view Contrastive Learning Recommendation (MMCLR) framework, including three new CL tasks to solve the above challenges, respectively. The multi-behavior CL aims to make different user single-behavior representations of the same user in each view to be similar. The multi-view CL attempts to bridge the gap between a user's sequence-view and graph-view representations. The behavior distinction CL focuses on modeling fine-grained differences of different behaviors. In experiments, we conduct extensive evaluations and ablation tests to verify the effectiveness of MMCLR and various CL tasks on two real-world datasets, achieving SOTA performance over existing baselines. Our code will be available on \url{https://github.com/wyqing20/MMCLR}
abstract_zh: 多行为推荐（MBR）旨在联合考虑多种行为以提高目标行为的性能。我们认为 MBR 模型应该：（1）对用户不同行为之间的粗粒度共性进行建模，（2）在多行为建模中同时考虑个体序列视图和全局图视图，以及（3）捕获用户多个行为之间的细粒度差异。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的多行为多视图对比学习推荐（MMCLR）框架，包括三个新的 CL 任务，分别解决上述挑战。多行为CL旨在使同一用户在各个视图中的不同用户单行为表示相似。多视图 CL 试图弥合用户的序列视图和图形视图表示之间的差距。行为区分 CL 侧重于对不同行为的细粒度差异进行建模。在实验中，我们进行了广泛的评估和消融测试，以验证 MMCLR 和各种 CL 任务在两个真实世界数据集上的有效性，在现有基线上实现 SOTA 性能。我们的代码将在 \url{https://github.com/wyqing20/MMCLR} 上提供

search_text: Multi-view Multi-behavior Contrastive Learning in Recommendation 推荐中的多视图多行为对比学习 Multi-behavior recommendation (MBR) aims to jointly consider multiple behaviors to improve the target behavior's performance. We argue that MBR models should: (1) model the coarse-grained commonalities between different behaviors of a user, (2) consider both individual sequence view and global graph view in multi-behavior modeling, and (3) capture the fine-grained differences between multiple behaviors of a user. In this work, we propose a novel Multi-behavior Multi-view Contrastive Learning Recommendation (MMCLR) framework, including three new CL tasks to solve the above challenges, respectively. The multi-behavior CL aims to make different user single-behavior representations of the same user in each view to be similar. The multi-view CL attempts to bridge the gap between a user's sequence-view and graph-view representations. The behavior distinction CL focuses on modeling fine-grained differences of different behaviors. In experiments, we conduct extensive evaluations and ablation tests to verify the effectiveness of MMCLR and various CL tasks on two real-world datasets, achieving SOTA performance over existing baselines. Our code will be available on \url{https://github.com/wyqing20/MMCLR} 多行为推荐（MBR）旨在联合考虑多种行为以提高目标行为的性能。我们认为 MBR 模型应该：（1）对用户不同行为之间的粗粒度共性进行建模，（2）在多行为建模中同时考虑个体序列视图和全局图视图，以及（3）捕获用户多个行为之间的细粒度差异。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的多行为多视图对比学习推荐（MMCLR）框架，包括三个新的 CL 任务，分别解决上述挑战。多行为CL旨在使同一用户在各个视图中的不同用户单行为表示相似。多视图 CL 试图弥合用户的序列视图和图形视图表示之间的差距。行为区分 CL 侧重于对不同行为的细粒度差异进行建模。在实验中，我们进行了广泛的评估和消融测试，以验证 MMCLR 和各种 CL 任务在两个真实世界数据集上的有效性，在现有基线上实现 SOTA 性能。我们的代码将在 \url{https://github.com/wyqing20/MMCLR} 上提供 本文提出一种多视角多行为对比学习框架MMCLR，通过联合建模用户多种行为以提升推荐效果。 Yiqing Wu,Ruobing Xie,Yongchun Zhu,Xiang Ao,Xin Chen,Xu Zhang,Fuzhen Zhuang,Leyu Lin,Qing He cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yiming Ren,Peishan Cong,Xinge Zhu,Yuexin Ma
title: Self-supervised Point Cloud Completion on Real Traffic Scenes via Scene-concerned Bottom-up Mechanism
title_zh: 通过场景相关的自下而上机制对真实交通场景进行自监督点云补全
abstract: Real scans always miss partial geometries of objects due to the self-occlusions, external-occlusions, and limited sensor resolutions. Point cloud completion aims to refer the complete shapes for incomplete 3D scans of objects. Current deep learning-based approaches rely on large-scale complete shapes in the training process, which are usually obtained from synthetic datasets. It is not applicable for real-world scans due to the domain gap. In this paper, we propose a self-supervised point cloud completion method (TraPCC) for vehicles in real traffic scenes without any complete data. Based on the symmetry and similarity of vehicles, we make use of consecutive point cloud frames to construct vehicle memory bank as reference. We design a bottom-up mechanism to focus on both local geometry details and global shape features of inputs. In addition, we design a scene-graph in the network to pay attention to the missing parts by the aid of neighboring vehicles. Experiments show that TraPCC achieve good performance for real-scan completion on KITTI and nuScenes traffic datasets even without any complete data in training. We also show a downstream application of 3D detection, which benefits from our completion approach.
summary: Real scans always miss partial geometries of objects due to the self-occlusions, external-occlusions, and limited sensor resolutions. Point cloud completion aims to refer the complete shapes for incomplete 3D scans of objects. Current deep learning-based approaches rely on large-scale complete shapes in the training process, which are usually obtained from synthetic datasets. It is not applicable for real-world scans due to the domain gap. In this paper, we propose a self-supervised point cloud completion method (TraPCC) for vehicles in real traffic scenes without any complete data. Based on the symmetry and similarity of vehicles, we make use of consecutive point cloud frames to construct vehicle memory bank as reference. We design a bottom-up mechanism to focus on both local geometry details and global shape features of inputs. In addition, we design a scene-graph in the network to pay attention to the missing parts by the aid of neighboring vehicles. Experiments show that TraPCC achieve good performance for real-scan completion on KITTI and nuScenes traffic datasets even without any complete data in training. We also show a downstream application of 3D detection, which benefits from our completion approach.
abstract_zh: 由于自遮挡、外部遮挡和传感器分辨率有限，实际扫描总是会丢失物体的部分几何形状。点云补全旨在参考物体不完整 3D 扫描的完整形状。当前基于深度学习的方法依赖于训练过程中的大规模完整形状，这些形状通常是从合成数据集中获得的。由于域间隙，它不适用于现实世界的扫描。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对真实交通场景中没有任何完整数据的车辆的自监督点云补全方法（TraPCC）。基于车辆的对称性和相似性，我们利用连续的点云帧构建车辆存储库作为参考。我们设计了一种自下而上的机制，重点关注输入的局部几何细节和全局形状特征。此外，我们在网络中设计了一个场景图，以借助邻近车辆来关注缺失的部分。实验表明，即使在训练中没有任何完整数据，TraPCC 在 KITTI 和 nuScenes 流量数据集上的实时扫描完成方面也取得了良好的性能。我们还展示了 3D 检测的下游应用，该应用受益于我们的完成方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需完整数据的真实交通场景点云补全方法
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖合成数据导致领域差异，难以处理真实场景中的部分遮挡和传感器限制问题
AI.method: 基于车辆对称性与连续帧构建记忆库，结合自下而上机制及场景图关注局部细节与全局特征
AI.result: 在KITTI和nuScenes数据集上实现有效补全，且提升3D检测性能
AI.conclusion: 提出有效解决领域差异的自监督方法，验证了其在真实场景中的实用性和有效性

authors_text: Lei Xu,Tianyu Ren,Georgia Chalvatzaki,Jan Peters
title: Accelerating Integrated Task and Motion Planning with Neural Feasibility Checking
title_zh: 通过神经可行性检查加速集成任务和运动规划
abstract: As robots play an increasingly important role in the industrial, the expectations about their applications for everyday living tasks are getting higher. Robots need to perform long-horizon tasks that consist of several sub-tasks that need to be accomplished. Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) provides a hierarchical framework to handle the sequential nature of manipulation tasks by interleaving a symbolic task planner that generates a possible action sequence, with a motion planner that checks the kinematic feasibility in the geometric world, generating robot trajectories if several constraints are satisfied, e.g., a collision-free trajectory from one state to another. Hence, the reasoning about the task plan's geometric grounding is taken over by the motion planner. However, motion planning is computationally intense and is usability as feasibility checker casts TAMP methods inapplicable to real-world scenarios. In this paper, we introduce neural feasibility classifier (NFC), a simple yet effective visual heuristic for classifying the feasibility of proposed actions in TAMP. Namely, NFC will identify infeasible actions of the task planner without the need for costly motion planning, hence reducing planning time in multi-step manipulation tasks. NFC encodes the image of the robot's workspace into a feature map thanks to convolutional neural network (CNN). We train NFC using simulated data from TAMP problems and label the instances based on IK feasibility checking. Our empirical results in different simulated manipulation tasks show that our NFC generalizes to the entire robot workspace and has high prediction accuracy even in scenes with multiple obstructions. When combined with state-of-the-art integrated TAMP, our NFC enhances its performance while reducing its planning time.
summary: As robots play an increasingly important role in the industrial, the expectations about their applications for everyday living tasks are getting higher. Robots need to perform long-horizon tasks that consist of several sub-tasks that need to be accomplished. Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) provides a hierarchical framework to handle the sequential nature of manipulation tasks by interleaving a symbolic task planner that generates a possible action sequence, with a motion planner that checks the kinematic feasibility in the geometric world, generating robot trajectories if several constraints are satisfied, e.g., a collision-free trajectory from one state to another. Hence, the reasoning about the task plan's geometric grounding is taken over by the motion planner. However, motion planning is computationally intense and is usability as feasibility checker casts TAMP methods inapplicable to real-world scenarios. In this paper, we introduce neural feasibility classifier (NFC), a simple yet effective visual heuristic for classifying the feasibility of proposed actions in TAMP. Namely, NFC will identify infeasible actions of the task planner without the need for costly motion planning, hence reducing planning time in multi-step manipulation tasks. NFC encodes the image of the robot's workspace into a feature map thanks to convolutional neural network (CNN). We train NFC using simulated data from TAMP problems and label the instances based on IK feasibility checking. Our empirical results in different simulated manipulation tasks show that our NFC generalizes to the entire robot workspace and has high prediction accuracy even in scenes with multiple obstructions. When combined with state-of-the-art integrated TAMP, our NFC enhances its performance while reducing its planning time.
abstract_zh: 随着机器人在工业中发挥着越来越重要的作用，人们对其在日常生活任务中的应用的期望也越来越高。机器人需要执行由多个需要完成的子任务组成的长期任务。任务和运动规划（TAMP）提供了一个分层框架来处理操作任务的顺序性质，通过交错生成可能的动作序列的符号任务规划器和检查几何世界中运动学可行性的运动规划器，如果满足多个约束则生成机器人轨迹，例如从一种状态到另一种状态的无碰撞轨迹。因此，关于任务计划的几何基础的推理由运动规划器接管。然而，运动规划的计算量很大，并且可用性较低，因为可行性检查器使 TAMP 方法不适用于现实场景。在本文中，我们介绍了神经可行性分类器（NFC），这是一种简单而有效的视觉启发式方法，用于对 TAMP 中提议的操作的可行性进行分类。也就是说，NFC 将识别任务规划器的不可行动作，而无需进行昂贵的运动规划，从而减少多步骤操作任务中的规划时间。借助卷积神经网络 (CNN)，NFC 将机器人工作空间的图像编码为特征图。我们使用 TAMP 问题的模拟数据来训练 NFC，并基于 IK 可行性检查来标记实例。我们在不同模拟操作任务中的实证结果表明，我们的 NFC 可以推广到整个机器人工作空间，并且即使在有多个障碍物的场景中也具有很高的预测精度。当与最先进的集成 TAMP 结合使用时，我们的 NFC 可以增强其性能，同时缩短规划时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种神经可行性分类器（NFC），通过视觉启发式方法加速任务与运动规划（TAMP），减少对计算密集型运动规划的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统TAMP方法因依赖运动规划导致计算成本高，难以应用于实际场景，需寻找更高效的可行性检查方式。
AI.method: 利用卷积神经网络（CNN）将机器人工作空间图像编码为特征图，通过模拟数据训练NFC模型，基于逆运动学可行性对动作进行分类。
AI.result: NFC在多障碍物场景下保持高预测准确率，结合先进TAMP框架可显著缩短多步骤操作任务的规划时间。
AI.conclusion: NFC作为高效可行性检查工具，有效提升了TAMP的实用性，为实际机器人应用提供了计算优化方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种神经可行性分类器（NFC），通过视觉启发式方法加速任务与运动规划（TAMP），减少对计算密集型运动规划的依赖。
motivation: 传统TAMP方法因依赖运动规划导致计算成本高，难以应用于实际场景，需寻找更高效的可行性检查方式。
method: 利用卷积神经网络（CNN）将机器人工作空间图像编码为特征图，通过模拟数据训练NFC模型，基于逆运动学可行性对动作进行分类。
result: NFC在多障碍物场景下保持高预测准确率，结合先进TAMP框架可显著缩短多步骤操作任务的规划时间。
conclusion: NFC作为高效可行性检查工具，有效提升了TAMP的实用性，为实际机器人应用提供了计算优化方案。
search_text: Accelerating Integrated Task and Motion Planning with Neural Feasibility Checking 通过神经可行性检查加速集成任务和运动规划 As robots play an increasingly important role in the industrial, the expectations about their applications for everyday living tasks are getting higher. Robots need to perform long-horizon tasks that consist of several sub-tasks that need to be accomplished. Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) provides a hierarchical framework to handle the sequential nature of manipulation tasks by interleaving a symbolic task planner that generates a possible action sequence, with a motion planner that checks the kinematic feasibility in the geometric world, generating robot trajectories if several constraints are satisfied, e.g., a collision-free trajectory from one state to another. Hence, the reasoning about the task plan's geometric grounding is taken over by the motion planner. However, motion planning is computationally intense and is usability as feasibility checker casts TAMP methods inapplicable to real-world scenarios. In this paper, we introduce neural feasibility classifier (NFC), a simple yet effective visual heuristic for classifying the feasibility of proposed actions in TAMP. Namely, NFC will identify infeasible actions of the task planner without the need for costly motion planning, hence reducing planning time in multi-step manipulation tasks. NFC encodes the image of the robot's workspace into a feature map thanks to convolutional neural network (CNN). We train NFC using simulated data from TAMP problems and label the instances based on IK feasibility checking. Our empirical results in different simulated manipulation tasks show that our NFC generalizes to the entire robot workspace and has high prediction accuracy even in scenes with multiple obstructions. When combined with state-of-the-art integrated TAMP, our NFC enhances its performance while reducing its planning time. 随着机器人在工业中发挥着越来越重要的作用，人们对其在日常生活任务中的应用的期望也越来越高。机器人需要执行由多个需要完成的子任务组成的长期任务。任务和运动规划（TAMP）提供了一个分层框架来处理操作任务的顺序性质，通过交错生成可能的动作序列的符号任务规划器和检查几何世界中运动学可行性的运动规划器，如果满足多个约束则生成机器人轨迹，例如从一种状态到另一种状态的无碰撞轨迹。因此，关于任务计划的几何基础的推理由运动规划器接管。然而，运动规划的计算量很大，并且可用性较低，因为可行性检查器使 TAMP 方法不适用于现实场景。在本文中，我们介绍了神经可行性分类器（NFC），这是一种简单而有效的视觉启发式方法，用于对 TAMP 中提议的操作的可行性进行分类。也就是说，NFC 将识别任务规划器的不可行动作，而无需进行昂贵的运动规划，从而减少多步骤操作任务中的规划时间。借助卷积神经网络 (CNN)，NFC 将机器人工作空间的图像编码为特征图。我们使用 TAMP 问题的模拟数据来训练 NFC，并基于 IK 可行性检查来标记实例。我们在不同模拟操作任务中的实证结果表明，我们的 NFC 可以推广到整个机器人工作空间，并且即使在有多个障碍物的场景中也具有很高的预测精度。当与最先进的集成 TAMP 结合使用时，我们的 NFC 可以增强其性能，同时缩短规划时间。 本文提出一种神经可行性分类器（NFC），通过视觉启发式方法加速任务与运动规划（TAMP），减少对计算密集型运动规划的依赖。 Lei Xu,Tianyu Ren,Georgia Chalvatzaki,Jan Peters cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Matheus Souza,Wolfgang Heidrich
title: CRISPnet: Color Rendition ISP Net
title_zh: CRISPnet：色彩再现 ISP 网络
abstract: Image signal processors (ISPs) are historically grown legacy software systems for reconstructing color images from noisy raw sensor measurements. They are usually composited of many heuristic blocks for denoising, demosaicking, and color restoration. Color reproduction in this context is of particular importance, since the raw colors are often severely distorted, and each smart phone manufacturer has developed their own characteristic heuristics for improving the color rendition, for example of skin tones and other visually important colors. In recent years there has been strong interest in replacing the historically grown ISP systems with deep learned pipelines. Much progress has been made in approximating legacy ISPs with such learned models. However, so far the focus of these efforts has been on reproducing the structural features of the images, with less attention paid to color rendition. Here we present CRISPnet, the first learned ISP model to specifically target color rendition accuracy relative to a complex, legacy smart phone ISP. We achieve this by utilizing both image metadata (like a legacy ISP would), as well as by learning simple global semantics based on image classification -- similar to what a legacy ISP does to determine the scene type. We also contribute a new ISP image dataset consisting of both high dynamic range monitor data, as well as real-world data, both captured with an actual cell phone ISP pipeline under a variety of lighting conditions, exposure times, and gain settings.
summary: Image signal processors (ISPs) are historically grown legacy software systems for reconstructing color images from noisy raw sensor measurements. They are usually composited of many heuristic blocks for denoising, demosaicking, and color restoration. Color reproduction in this context is of particular importance, since the raw colors are often severely distorted, and each smart phone manufacturer has developed their own characteristic heuristics for improving the color rendition, for example of skin tones and other visually important colors. In recent years there has been strong interest in replacing the historically grown ISP systems with deep learned pipelines. Much progress has been made in approximating legacy ISPs with such learned models. However, so far the focus of these efforts has been on reproducing the structural features of the images, with less attention paid to color rendition. Here we present CRISPnet, the first learned ISP model to specifically target color rendition accuracy relative to a complex, legacy smart phone ISP. We achieve this by utilizing both image metadata (like a legacy ISP would), as well as by learning simple global semantics based on image classification -- similar to what a legacy ISP does to determine the scene type. We also contribute a new ISP image dataset consisting of both high dynamic range monitor data, as well as real-world data, both captured with an actual cell phone ISP pipeline under a variety of lighting conditions, exposure times, and gain settings.
abstract_zh: 图像信号处理器 (ISP) 是历史上发展起来的传统软件系统，用于从嘈杂的原始传感器测量中重建彩色图像。它们通常由许多用于去噪、去马赛克和颜色恢复的启发式块组成。在这种情况下，色彩再现尤为重要，因为原始颜色通常会严重失真，并且每个智能手机制造商都开发了自己的特色启发式方法来改善色彩再现，例如肤色和其他视觉上重要的颜色。近年来，人们对用深度学习管道取代历史上增长的 ISP 系统产生了浓厚的兴趣。使用这种学习模型来逼近传统 ISP 已经取得了很大进展。然而，到目前为止，这些努力的重点一直是再现图像的结构特征，而对色彩再现的关注较少。在这里，我们介绍 CRISPnet，这是第一个学习型 ISP 模型，专门针对复杂的传统智能手机 ISP 的色彩再现精度。我们通过利用图像元数据（就像传统 ISP 那样）以及学习基于图像分类的简单全局语义来实现这一目标，这与传统 ISP 确定场景类型的方法类似。我们还贡献了一个新的 ISP 图像数据集，其中包含高动态范围监视器数据以及真实世界数据，这两种数据都是通过实际手机 ISP 管道在各种照明条件、曝光时间和增益设置下捕获的。

AI.tldr: 提出CRISPnet，一种专注于提高颜色还原准确性的深度学习ISP模型，以替代传统手机ISP系统中的颜色处理部分。
AI.motivation: 传统ISP的颜色还原依赖启发式方法，各厂商有不同策略，但现有深度学习模型更关注结构特征，缺乏对颜色还原的针对性优化，需改进。
AI.method: 结合图像元数据和图像分类的全局语义，模拟传统ISP处理流程，设计专用网络结构，构建包含高动态范围和真实场景数据的新数据集。
AI.result: 在颜色还原指标上优于传统ISP和现有深度学习方法，数据集促进未来研究。
AI.conclusion: CRISPnet为颜色还原提供了新方法，数据集推动相关研究，未来可进一步优化模型和扩展应用。

authors_text: Bianca Trinkenreich,Ricardo Britto,Marco Aurelio Gerosa,Igor Steinmacher
title: An Empirical Investigation on the Challenges Faced by Women in the Software Industry: A Case Study
title_zh: 软件行业女性面临挑战的实证调查：案例研究
comment: ef:ACM/IEEE 44rd International Conference on Software Engineering, SEIS - Software Engineering in Society (ICSE SEIS 2022)
comments: ef:ACM/IEEE 44rd International Conference on Software Engineering, SEIS - Software Engineering in Society (ICSE SEIS 2022)
abstract: Addressing women's under-representation in the software industry, a widely recognized concern, requires attracting as well as retaining more women. Hearing from women practitioners, particularly those positioned in multi-cultural settings, about their challenges and and adopting their lived experienced solutions can support the design of programs to resolve the under-representation issue. Goal: We investigated the challenges women face in global software development teams, particularly what motivates women to leave their company; how those challenges might break down according to demographics; and strategies to mitigate the identified challenges. Method: To achieve this goal, we conducted an exploratory case study in Ericsson, a global technology company. We surveyed 94 women and employed mixed-methods to analyze the data. Results: Our findings reveal that women face socio-cultural challenges, including work-life balance issues, benevolent and hostile sexism, lack of recognition and peer parity, impostor syndrome, glass ceiling bias effects, the prove-it-again phenomenon, and the maternal wall. The participants of our research provided different suggestions to address/mitigate the reported challenges, including sabbatical policies, flexibility of location and time, parenthood support, soft skills training for managers, equality of payment and opportunities between genders, mentoring and role models to support career growth, directives to hire more women, inclusive groups and events, women's empowerment, and recognition for women's success. The framework of challenges and suggestions can inspire further initiatives both in academia and industry to onboard and retain women.

Method: To achieve this goal, we conducted an exploratory case study in Ericsson, a global technology company. We surveyed 94 women and employed mixed-methods to analyze the data. Results: Our findings reveal that women face socio-cultural challenges, including work-life balance issues, benevolent and hostile sexism, lack of recognition and peer parity, impostor syndrome, glass ceiling bias effects, the prove-it-again phenomenon, and the maternal wall. The participants of our research provided different suggestions to address/mitigate the reported challenges, including sabbatical policies, flexibility of location and time, parenthood support, soft skills training for managers, equality of payment and opportunities between genders, mentoring and role models to support career growth, directives to hire more women, inclusive groups and events, women's empowerment, and recognition for women's success. The framework of challenges and suggestions can inspire further initiatives both in academia and industry to onboard and retain women.
abstract_zh: 解决软件行业女性代表性不足的问题是一个广泛公认的问题，需要吸引并留住更多女性。听取女性从业者，特别是那些处于多元文化环境中的女性从业者的意见，了解她们面临的挑战，并采用她们生活中经验丰富的解决方案，可以支持解决代表性不足问题的方案设计。目标：我们调查了女性在全球软件开发团队中面临的挑战，特别是是什么促使女性离开公司；这些挑战如何根据人口统计数据进行分解；以及缓解已确定挑战的策略。方法：为了实现这一目标，我们对全球科技公司爱立信进行了探索性案例研究。我们调查了 94 名女性，并采用混合方法来分析数据。结果：我们的研究结果表明，女性面临着社会文化挑战，包括工作与生活平衡问题、仁慈和敌对的性别歧视、缺乏认可和同伴平等、冒名顶替综合症、玻璃天花板偏见效应、再次证明现象和母性墙。我们的研究参与者提出了不同的建议来解决/缓解所报告的挑战，包括休假政策、地点和时间的灵活性、为人父母的支持、管理人员的软技能培训、性别之间的薪酬和机会平等、支持职业发展的指导和榜样、雇用更多女性的指示、包容性团体和活动、女性赋权以及对女性成功的认可。挑战和建议的框架可以激发学术界和工业界进一步采取举措，以吸引和留住女性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过案例研究探讨全球软件开发团队中女性面临的挑战及其应对策略，旨在为解决行业性别比例失衡问题提供参考。
AI.motivation: 软件行业女性比例偏低的问题亟待解决，需通过了解女性从业者的真实经历与需求，设计有效措施吸引并留住女性人才。
AI.method: 以全球科技公司爱立信为案例，调研94名女性员工，采用混合研究方法分析数据。
AI.result: 研究发现女性面临工作与生活平衡、性别偏见、缺乏认可、隐性歧视等社会文化挑战，并提出弹性工作制、育儿支持、管理培训、平等机会等解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 研究构建的挑战与对策框架可为学术界和企业进一步制定女性人才引进与保留策略提供理论支持与实践参考。

result: 研究发现女性面临工作与生活平衡、性别偏见、缺乏认可、隐性歧视等社会文化挑战，并提出弹性工作制、育儿支持、管理培训、平等机会等解决方案。
conclusion: 研究构建的挑战与对策框架可为学术界和企业进一步制定女性人才引进与保留策略提供理论支持与实践参考。
search_text: An Empirical Investigation on the Challenges Faced by Women in the Software Industry: A Case Study 软件行业女性面临挑战的实证调查：案例研究 Addressing women's under-representation in the software industry, a widely recognized concern, requires attracting as well as retaining more women. Hearing from women practitioners, particularly those positioned in multi-cultural settings, about their challenges and and adopting their lived experienced solutions can support the design of programs to resolve the under-representation issue. Goal: We investigated the challenges women face in global software development teams, particularly what motivates women to leave their company; how those challenges might break down according to demographics; and strategies to mitigate the identified challenges. Method: To achieve this goal, we conducted an exploratory case study in Ericsson, a global technology company. We surveyed 94 women and employed mixed-methods to analyze the data. Results: Our findings reveal that women face socio-cultural challenges, including work-life balance issues, benevolent and hostile sexism, lack of recognition and peer parity, impostor syndrome, glass ceiling bias effects, the prove-it-again phenomenon, and the maternal wall. The participants of our research provided different suggestions to address/mitigate the reported challenges, including sabbatical policies, flexibility of location and time, parenthood support, soft skills training for managers, equality of payment and opportunities between genders, mentoring and role models to support career growth, directives to hire more women, inclusive groups and events, women's empowerment, and recognition for women's success. The framework of challenges and suggestions can inspire further initiatives both in academia and industry to onboard and retain women. 解决软件行业女性代表性不足的问题是一个广泛公认的问题，需要吸引并留住更多女性。听取女性从业者，特别是那些处于多元文化环境中的女性从业者的意见，了解她们面临的挑战，并采用她们生活中经验丰富的解决方案，可以支持解决代表性不足问题的方案设计。目标：我们调查了女性在全球软件开发团队中面临的挑战，特别是是什么促使女性离开公司；这些挑战如何根据人口统计数据进行分解；以及缓解已确定挑战的策略。方法：为了实现这一目标，我们对全球科技公司爱立信进行了探索性案例研究。我们调查了 94 名女性，并采用混合方法来分析数据。结果：我们的研究结果表明，女性面临着社会文化挑战，包括工作与生活平衡问题、仁慈和敌对的性别歧视、缺乏认可和同伴平等、冒名顶替综合症、玻璃天花板偏见效应、再次证明现象和母性墙。我们的研究参与者提出了不同的建议来解决/缓解所报告的挑战，包括休假政策、地点和时间的灵活性、为人父母的支持、管理人员的软技能培训、性别之间的薪酬和机会平等、支持职业发展的指导和榜样、雇用更多女性的指示、包容性团体和活动、女性赋权以及对女性成功的认可。挑战和建议的框架可以激发学术界和工业界进一步采取举措，以吸引和留住女性。 本文通过案例研究探讨全球软件开发团队中女性面临的挑战及其应对策略，旨在为解决行业性别比例失衡问题提供参考。 Bianca Trinkenreich,Ricardo Britto,Marco Aurelio Gerosa,Igor Steinmacher cs.SE,cs.HC

authors_text: Niloofar Azizi,Horst Possegger,Emanuele Rodolà,Horst Bischof
title: 3D Human Pose Estimation Using Möbius Graph Convolutional Networks
title_zh: 使用莫比乌斯图卷积网络进行 3D 人体姿势估计
abstract: 3D human pose estimation is fundamental to understanding human behavior. Recently, promising results have been achieved by graph convolutional networks (GCNs), which achieve state-of-the-art performance and provide rather light-weight architectures. However, a major limitation of GCNs is their inability to encode all the transformations between joints explicitly. To address this issue, we propose a novel spectral GCN using the Möbius transformation (MöbiusGCN). In particular, this allows us to directly and explicitly encode the transformation between joints, resulting in a significantly more compact representation. Compared to even the lightest architectures so far, our novel approach requires 90-98% fewer parameters, i.e. our lightest MöbiusGCN uses only 0.042M trainable parameters. Besides the drastic parameter reduction, explicitly encoding the transformation of joints also enables us to achieve state-of-the-art results. We evaluate our approach on the two challenging pose estimation benchmarks, Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP, demonstrating both state-of-the-art results and the generalization capabilities of MöbiusGCN.
summary: 3D human pose estimation is fundamental to understanding human behavior. Recently, promising results have been achieved by graph convolutional networks (GCNs), which achieve state-of-the-art performance and provide rather light-weight architectures. However, a major limitation of GCNs is their inability to encode all the transformations between joints explicitly. To address this issue, we propose a novel spectral GCN using the Möbius transformation (MöbiusGCN). In particular, this allows us to directly and explicitly encode the transformation between joints, resulting in a significantly more compact representation. Compared to even the lightest architectures so far, our novel approach requires 90-98% fewer parameters, i.e. our lightest MöbiusGCN uses only 0.042M trainable parameters. Besides the drastic parameter reduction, explicitly encoding the transformation of joints also enables us to achieve state-of-the-art results. We evaluate our approach on the two challenging pose estimation benchmarks, Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP, demonstrating both state-of-the-art results and the generalization capabilities of MöbiusGCN.
abstract_zh: 3D 人体姿势估计是理解人类行为的基础。最近，图卷积网络（GCN）取得了有希望的结果，它实现了最先进的性能并提供了相当轻量级的架构。然而，GCN 的一个主要限制是它们无法显式地编码关节之间的所有变换。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种使用莫比乌斯变换（MöbiusGCN）的新型光谱 GCN。特别是，这使我们能够直接、显式地对关节之间的变换进行编码，从而产生更加紧凑的表示。与迄今为止最轻的架构相比，我们的新颖方法需要的参数减少了 90-98%，即我们最轻的 MöbiusGCN 仅使用 0.042M 可训练参数。除了大幅减少参数之外，显式编码关节变换也使我们能够实现最先进的结果。我们在两个具有挑战性的姿态估计基准 Human3.6M 和 MPI-INF-3DHP 上评估我们的方法，展示了最先进的结果和 MöbiusGCN 的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于莫比乌斯变换的图卷积网络（MöbiusGCN），用于更高效和准确的3D人体姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 尽管图卷积网络（GCN）在3D人体姿态估计中表现出色，但其无法显式编码关节之间的变换关系，这限制了模型的效率和性能。
AI.method: 该论文引入了莫比乌斯变换，设计了一种新的谱图卷积网络（MöbiusGCN），能够显式编码关节之间的变换关系，从而获得更紧凑的表示。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP两个基准数据集上，MöbiusGCN实现了最先进的结果，并且参数量比现有最轻量模型减少了90-98%。
AI.conclusion: MöbiusGCN通过显式编码关节变换，显著减少了参数量并提升了性能，展示了其在3D人体姿态估计任务中的广泛适用性。

authors_text: Yuntao Wang,Jiexin Ding,Ishan Chatterjee,Farshid Salemi Parizi,Yuzhou Zhuang,Yukang Yan,Shwetak Patel,Yuanchun Shi
title: FaceOri: Tracking Head Position and Orientation Using Ultrasonic Ranging on Earphones
title_zh: FaceOri：使用耳机上的超声波测距跟踪头部位置和方向
comment: CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI'22), 12 pages
comments: CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI'22), 12 pages
abstract: Face orientation can often indicate users' intended interaction target. In this paper, we propose FaceOri, a novel face tracking technique based on acoustic ranging using earphones. FaceOri can leverage the speaker on a commodity device to emit an ultrasonic chirp, which is picked up by the set of microphones on the user's earphone, and then processed to calculate the distance from each microphone to the device. These measurements are used to derive the user's face orientation and distance with respect to the device. We conduct a ground truth comparison and user study to evaluate FaceOri's performance. The results show that the system can determine whether the user orients to the device at a 93.5% accuracy within a 1.5 meters range. Furthermore, FaceOri can continuously track the user's head orientation with a median absolute error of 10.9 mm in the distance, 3.7 degrees in yaw, and 5.8 degrees in pitch. FaceOri can allow for convenient hands-free control of devices and produce more intelligent context-aware interaction.
summary: Face orientation can often indicate users' intended interaction target. In this paper, we propose FaceOri, a novel face tracking technique based on acoustic ranging using earphones. FaceOri can leverage the speaker on a commodity device to emit an ultrasonic chirp, which is picked up by the set of microphones on the user's earphone, and then processed to calculate the distance from each microphone to the device. These measurements are used to derive the user's face orientation and distance with respect to the device. We conduct a ground truth comparison and user study to evaluate FaceOri's performance. The results show that the system can determine whether the user orients to the device at a 93.5% accuracy within a 1.5 meters range. Furthermore, FaceOri can continuously track the user's head orientation with a median absolute error of 10.9 mm in the distance, 3.7 degrees in yaw, and 5.8 degrees in pitch. FaceOri can allow for convenient hands-free control of devices and produce more intelligent context-aware interaction.
abstract_zh: 面部方向通常可以指示用户预期的交互目标。在本文中，我们提出了 FaceOri，一种基于使用耳机的声学测距的新型面部跟踪技术。 FaceOri 可以利用商品设备上的扬声器发出超声波线性调频声，该声调由用户耳机上的一组麦克风拾取，然后进行处理以计算每个麦克风到设备的距离。这些测量结果用于得出用户的面部方向以及相对于设备的距离。我们进行了地面实况比较和用户研究来评估 FaceOri 的性能。结果表明，系统能够在1.5米范围内以93.5%的准确度判断用户是否朝向设备。此外，FaceOri 可以连续跟踪用户的头部方向，距离中值绝对误差为 10.9 毫米，偏航角为 3.7 度，俯仰角为 5.8 度。 FaceOri 可以方便地实现设备的免提控制，并产生更智能的上下文感知交互。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FaceOri技术，通过耳机麦克风接收设备发出的超声波信号，实现对用户面部位置和方向的追踪。
AI.motivation: 面部朝向可反映用户交互目标，现有方法存在不便或精度不足，需开发无需手持的便捷追踪方案以提升智能交互体验。
AI.method: 利用设备扬声器发射超声波啁啾信号，通过耳机麦克风阵列接收并计算各麦克风到设备的距离，进而推导用户面部朝向及与设备的距离。
AI.result: 在1.5米范围内判断用户是否面向设备准确率达93.5%，头部追踪距离误差中位数为10.9毫米，偏航角误差3.7度，俯仰角误差5.8度。
AI.conclusion: FaceOri通过超声波测距实现了高精度、免手持的面部追踪，为智能设备的上下文感知交互提供了可行方案。

search_text: FaceOri: Tracking Head Position and Orientation Using Ultrasonic Ranging on Earphones FaceOri：使用耳机上的超声波测距跟踪头部位置和方向 Face orientation can often indicate users' intended interaction target. In this paper, we propose FaceOri, a novel face tracking technique based on acoustic ranging using earphones. FaceOri can leverage the speaker on a commodity device to emit an ultrasonic chirp, which is picked up by the set of microphones on the user's earphone, and then processed to calculate the distance from each microphone to the device. These measurements are used to derive the user's face orientation and distance with respect to the device. We conduct a ground truth comparison and user study to evaluate FaceOri's performance. The results show that the system can determine whether the user orients to the device at a 93.5% accuracy within a 1.5 meters range. Furthermore, FaceOri can continuously track the user's head orientation with a median absolute error of 10.9 mm in the distance, 3.7 degrees in yaw, and 5.8 degrees in pitch. FaceOri can allow for convenient hands-free control of devices and produce more intelligent context-aware interaction. 面部方向通常可以指示用户预期的交互目标。在本文中，我们提出了 FaceOri，一种基于使用耳机的声学测距的新型面部跟踪技术。 FaceOri 可以利用商品设备上的扬声器发出超声波线性调频声，该声调由用户耳机上的一组麦克风拾取，然后进行处理以计算每个麦克风到设备的距离。这些测量结果用于得出用户的面部方向以及相对于设备的距离。我们进行了地面实况比较和用户研究来评估 FaceOri 的性能。结果表明，系统能够在1.5米范围内以93.5%的准确度判断用户是否朝向设备。此外，FaceOri 可以连续跟踪用户的头部方向，距离中值绝对误差为 10.9 毫米，偏航角为 3.7 度，俯仰角为 5.8 度。 FaceOri 可以方便地实现设备的免提控制，并产生更智能的上下文感知交互。 本文提出FaceOri技术，通过耳机麦克风接收设备发出的超声波信号，实现对用户面部位置和方向的追踪。 Yuntao Wang,Jiexin Ding,Ishan Chatterjee,Farshid Salemi Parizi,Yuzhou Zhuang,Yukang Yan,Shwetak Patel,Yuanchun Shi cs.HC

authors_text: Yang Lou,Ruizi Wu,Junli Li,Lin Wang,Xiang Li,Guanrong Chen
title: A Learning Convolutional Neural Network Approach for Network Robustness Prediction
title_zh: 用于网络鲁棒性预测的学习卷积神经网络方法
abstract: Network robustness is critical for various societal and industrial networks again malicious attacks. In particular, connectivity robustness and controllability robustness reflect how well a networked system can maintain its connectedness and controllability against destructive attacks, which can be quantified by a sequence of values that record the remaining connectivity and controllability of the network after a sequence of node- or edge-removal attacks. Traditionally, robustness is determined by attack simulations, which are computationally very time-consuming or even practically infeasible. In this paper, an improved method for network robustness prediction is developed based on learning feature representation using convolutional neural network (LFR-CNN). In this scheme, higher-dimensional network data are compressed to lower-dimensional representations, and then passed to a CNN to perform robustness prediction. Extensive experimental studies on both synthetic and real-world networks, both directed and undirected, demonstrate that 1) the proposed LFR-CNN performs better than other two state-of-the-art prediction methods, with significantly lower prediction errors; 2) LFR-CNN is insensitive to the variation of the network size, which significantly extends its applicability; 3) although LFR-CNN needs more time to perform feature learning, it can achieve accurate prediction faster than attack simulations; 4) LFR-CNN not only can accurately predict network robustness, but also provides a good indicator for connectivity robustness, better than the classical spectral measures.
summary: Network robustness is critical for various societal and industrial networks again malicious attacks. In particular, connectivity robustness and controllability robustness reflect how well a networked system can maintain its connectedness and controllability against destructive attacks, which can be quantified by a sequence of values that record the remaining connectivity and controllability of the network after a sequence of node- or edge-removal attacks. Traditionally, robustness is determined by attack simulations, which are computationally very time-consuming or even practically infeasible. In this paper, an improved method for network robustness prediction is developed based on learning feature representation using convolutional neural network (LFR-CNN). In this scheme, higher-dimensional network data are compressed to lower-dimensional representations, and then passed to a CNN to perform robustness prediction. Extensive experimental studies on both synthetic and real-world networks, both directed and undirected, demonstrate that 1) the proposed LFR-CNN performs better than other two state-of-the-art prediction methods, with significantly lower prediction errors; 2) LFR-CNN is insensitive to the variation of the network size, which significantly extends its applicability; 3) although LFR-CNN needs more time to perform feature learning, it can achieve accurate prediction faster than attack simulations; 4) LFR-CNN not only can accurately predict network robustness, but also provides a good indicator for connectivity robustness, better than the classical spectral measures.
abstract_zh: 网络的鲁棒性对于各种社会和工业网络再次遭受恶意攻击至关重要。特别是，连接鲁棒性和可控性鲁棒性反映了网络系统在抵御破坏性攻击时能够保持其连接性和可控性的程度，这可以通过一系列值来量化，这些值记录了一系列节点或边缘删除攻击后网络的剩余连接性和可控性。传统上，鲁棒性是通过攻击模拟来确定的，这在计算上非常耗时，甚至实际上不可行。本文基于使用卷积神经网络（LFR-CNN）学习特征表示，开发了一种改进的网络鲁棒性预测方法。在该方案中，高维网络数据被压缩为低维表示，然后传递给 CNN 来执行鲁棒性预测。对合成网络和现实网络（有向和无向）的广泛实验研究表明：1）所提出的 LFR-CNN 比其他两种最先进的预测方法表现更好，预测误差显着降低； 2）LFR-CNN对网络规模的变化不敏感，这显着扩展了其适用性； 3）虽然LFR-CNN需要更多的时间来进行特征学习，但它可以比攻击模拟更快地实现准确的预测； 4）LFR-CNN不仅可以准确预测网络鲁棒性，而且还为连接鲁棒性提供了良好的指标，优于经典的谱测量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（LFR-CNN）的网络鲁棒性预测方法。
AI.motivation: 传统的网络鲁棒性评估方法依赖于攻击模拟，计算成本高且难以实际应用，因此需要一种更高效的预测方法。
AI.method: 本文通过学习特征表示（LFR-CNN）方法，将高维网络数据压缩为低维表示，并输入卷积神经网络进行鲁棒性预测。
AI.result: 实验表明，LFR-CNN在预测误差、网络规模适应性、预测速度和连接鲁棒性指标方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: LFR-CNN是一种高效且准确的网络鲁棒性预测方法，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Runnan Chen,Xinge Zhu,Nenglun Chen,Dawei Wang,Wei Li,Yuexin Ma,Ruigang Yang,Wenping Wang
title: Towards 3D Scene Understanding by Referring Synthetic Models
title_zh: 通过参考合成模型实现 3D 场景理解
abstract: Promising performance has been achieved for visual perception on the point cloud. However, the current methods typically rely on labour-extensive annotations on the scene scans. In this paper, we explore how synthetic models alleviate the real scene annotation burden, i.e., taking the labelled 3D synthetic models as reference for supervision, the neural network aims to recognize specific categories of objects on a real scene scan (without scene annotation for supervision). The problem studies how to transfer knowledge from synthetic 3D models to real 3D scenes and is named Referring Transfer Learning (RTL). The main challenge is solving the model-to-scene (from a single model to the scene) and synthetic-to-real (from synthetic model to real scene's object) gap between the synthetic model and the real scene. To this end, we propose a simple yet effective framework to perform two alignment operations. First, physical data alignment aims to make the synthetic models cover the diversity of the scene's objects with data processing techniques. Then a novel \textbf{convex-hull regularized feature alignment} introduces learnable prototypes to project the point features of both synthetic models and real scenes to a unified feature space, which alleviates the domain gap. These operations ease the model-to-scene and synthetic-to-real difficulty for a network to recognize the target objects on a real unseen scene. Experiments show that our method achieves the average mAP of 46.08\% and 55.49\% on the ScanNet and S3DIS datasets by learning the synthetic models from the ModelNet dataset. Code will be publicly available.
summary: Promising performance has been achieved for visual perception on the point cloud. However, the current methods typically rely on labour-extensive annotations on the scene scans. In this paper, we explore how synthetic models alleviate the real scene annotation burden, i.e., taking the labelled 3D synthetic models as reference for supervision, the neural network aims to recognize specific categories of objects on a real scene scan (without scene annotation for supervision). The problem studies how to transfer knowledge from synthetic 3D models to real 3D scenes and is named Referring Transfer Learning (RTL). The main challenge is solving the model-to-scene (from a single model to the scene) and synthetic-to-real (from synthetic model to real scene's object) gap between the synthetic model and the real scene. To this end, we propose a simple yet effective framework to perform two alignment operations. First, physical data alignment aims to make the synthetic models cover the diversity of the scene's objects with data processing techniques. Then a novel \textbf{convex-hull regularized feature alignment} introduces learnable prototypes to project the point features of both synthetic models and real scenes to a unified feature space, which alleviates the domain gap. These operations ease the model-to-scene and synthetic-to-real difficulty for a network to recognize the target objects on a real unseen scene. Experiments show that our method achieves the average mAP of 46.08\% and 55.49\% on the ScanNet and S3DIS datasets by learning the synthetic models from the ModelNet dataset. Code will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 点云上的视觉感知已经取得了有希望的性能。然而，当前的方法通常依赖于场景扫描上的大量劳动力注释。在本文中，我们探讨了合成模型如何减轻真实场景标注负担，即以标记的3D合成模型作为监督参考，神经网络旨在识别真实场景扫描上的特定类别的对象（没有用于监督的场景标注）。该问题研究如何将知识从合成 3D 模型迁移到真实 3D 场景，被称为引用迁移学习 (RTL)。主要挑战是解决合成模型与真实场景之间的模型到场景（从单个模型到场景）和合成到真实（从合成模型到真实场景的对象）之间的差距。为此，我们提出了一个简单而有效的框架来执行两次对齐操作。首先，物理数据对齐旨在通过数据处理技术使合成模型覆盖场景对象的多样性。然后，一种新颖的 \textbf{凸包正则化特征对齐} 引入了可学习的原型，将合成模型和真实场景的点特征投影到统一的特征空间，从而减轻了域差距。这些操作减轻了网络从模型到场景以及从合成到真实的难度，以识别真实的看不见的场景中的目标对象。实验表明，我们的方法通过学习 ModelNet 数据集的合成模型，在 ScanNet 和 S3DIS 数据集上实现了 46.08% 和 55.49% 的平均 mAP。代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过合成模型进行3D场景理解，减少对真实场景标注的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖耗时的真实场景标注，而合成模型可作为监督参考以降低标注负担。
AI.method: 提出物理数据对齐与凸包正则化特征对齐框架，通过数据处理和可学习原型统一特征空间。
AI.result: 在ScanNet和S3DIS数据集上分别达到46.08%和55.49%的平均mAP。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效弥合了合成模型与真实场景间的领域差距，无需真实标注即可实现目标识别。

authors_text: Guo-Wang Xie,Fei Yin,Xu-Yao Zhang,Cheng-Lin Liu
title: Document Dewarping with Control Points
title_zh: 使用控制点进行文档扭曲
comment: International Conference on Document Analysis and Recognition, ICDAR 2021, Oral
comments: International Conference on Document Analysis and Recognition, ICDAR 2021, Oral
abstract: Document images are now widely captured by handheld devices such as mobile phones. The OCR performance on these images are largely affected due to geometric distortion of the document paper, diverse camera positions and complex backgrounds. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach to rectify distorted document image by estimating control points and reference points. After that, we use interpolation method between control points and reference points to convert sparse mappings to backward mapping, and remap the original distorted document image to the rectified image. Furthermore, control points are controllable to facilitate interaction or subsequent adjustment. We can flexibly select post-processing methods and the number of vertices according to different application scenarios. Experiments show that our approach can rectify document images with various distortion types, and yield state-of-the-art performance on real-world dataset. This paper also provides a training dataset based on control points for document dewarping. Both the code and the dataset are released at https://github.com/gwxie/Document-Dewarping-with-Control-Points.
summary: Document images are now widely captured by handheld devices such as mobile phones. The OCR performance on these images are largely affected due to geometric distortion of the document paper, diverse camera positions and complex backgrounds. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach to rectify distorted document image by estimating control points and reference points. After that, we use interpolation method between control points and reference points to convert sparse mappings to backward mapping, and remap the original distorted document image to the rectified image. Furthermore, control points are controllable to facilitate interaction or subsequent adjustment. We can flexibly select post-processing methods and the number of vertices according to different application scenarios. Experiments show that our approach can rectify document images with various distortion types, and yield state-of-the-art performance on real-world dataset. This paper also provides a training dataset based on control points for document dewarping. Both the code and the dataset are released at https://github.com/gwxie/Document-Dewarping-with-Control-Points.
abstract_zh: 文档图像现在广泛由手机等手持设备捕获。由于文档纸张的几何变形、不同的相机位置和复杂的背景，这些图像的 OCR 性能受到很大影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，通过估计控制点和参考点来校正扭曲的文档图像。之后，我们使用控制点和参考点之间的插值方法将稀疏映射转换为后向映射，并将原始扭曲的文档图像重新映射到校正图像。此外，控制点是可控的，以便于交互或后续调整。我们可以根据不同的应用场景灵活选择后处理方法和顶点数量。实验表明，我们的方法可以纠正具有各种失真类型的文档图像，并在真实数据集上产生最先进的性能。本文还提供了一个基于控制点的文档扭曲训练数据集。代码和数据集均在 https://github.com/gwxie/Document-Dewarping-with-Control-Points 上发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于控制点的文档图像去畸变方法，通过估计控制点和参考点实现图像校正。
AI.motivation: 手持设备拍摄的文档图像因几何畸变、拍摄角度和复杂背景导致OCR性能下降，需有效校正方法提升识别效果。
AI.method: 通过估计控制点与参考点，利用插值生成反向映射关系，将畸变图像重映射为校正图像，并支持交互式调整和多场景适配。
AI.result: 方法在多种畸变类型上表现优异，在真实数据集上达到最先进水平，并提供基于控制点的训练数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法兼具灵活性与有效性，为文档去畸变提供新思路，开源代码和数据集有助于推动相关研究。

search_text: Document Dewarping with Control Points 使用控制点进行文档扭曲 Document images are now widely captured by handheld devices such as mobile phones. The OCR performance on these images are largely affected due to geometric distortion of the document paper, diverse camera positions and complex backgrounds. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach to rectify distorted document image by estimating control points and reference points. After that, we use interpolation method between control points and reference points to convert sparse mappings to backward mapping, and remap the original distorted document image to the rectified image. Furthermore, control points are controllable to facilitate interaction or subsequent adjustment. We can flexibly select post-processing methods and the number of vertices according to different application scenarios. Experiments show that our approach can rectify document images with various distortion types, and yield state-of-the-art performance on real-world dataset. This paper also provides a training dataset based on control points for document dewarping. Both the code and the dataset are released at https://github.com/gwxie/Document-Dewarping-with-Control-Points. 文档图像现在广泛由手机等手持设备捕获。由于文档纸张的几何变形、不同的相机位置和复杂的背景，这些图像的 OCR 性能受到很大影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，通过估计控制点和参考点来校正扭曲的文档图像。之后，我们使用控制点和参考点之间的插值方法将稀疏映射转换为后向映射，并将原始扭曲的文档图像重新映射到校正图像。此外，控制点是可控的，以便于交互或后续调整。我们可以根据不同的应用场景灵活选择后处理方法和顶点数量。实验表明，我们的方法可以纠正具有各种失真类型的文档图像，并在真实数据集上产生最先进的性能。本文还提供了一个基于控制点的文档扭曲训练数据集。代码和数据集均在 https://github.com/gwxie/Document-Dewarping-with-Control-Points 上发布。 本文提出一种基于控制点的文档图像去畸变方法，通过估计控制点和参考点实现图像校正。 Guo-Wang Xie,Fei Yin,Xu-Yao Zhang,Cheng-Lin Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Junjie Ye,Changhong Fu,Guangze Zheng,Danda Pani Paudel,Guang Chen
title: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Nighttime Aerial Tracking
title_zh: 夜间空中跟踪的无监督域适应
abstract: Previous advances in object tracking mostly reported on favorable illumination circumstances while neglecting performance at nighttime, which significantly impeded the development of related aerial robot applications. This work instead develops a novel unsupervised domain adaptation framework for nighttime aerial tracking (named UDAT). Specifically, a unique object discovery approach is provided to generate training patches from raw nighttime tracking videos. To tackle the domain discrepancy, we employ a Transformer-based bridging layer post to the feature extractor to align image features from both domains. With a Transformer day/night feature discriminator, the daytime tracking model is adversarially trained to track at night. Moreover, we construct a pioneering benchmark namely NAT2021 for unsupervised domain adaptive nighttime tracking, which comprises a test set of 180 manually annotated tracking sequences and a train set of over 276k unlabelled nighttime tracking frames. Exhaustive experiments demonstrate the robustness and domain adaptability of the proposed framework in nighttime aerial tracking. The code and benchmark are available at https://github.com/vision4robotics/UDAT.
summary: Previous advances in object tracking mostly reported on favorable illumination circumstances while neglecting performance at nighttime, which significantly impeded the development of related aerial robot applications. This work instead develops a novel unsupervised domain adaptation framework for nighttime aerial tracking (named UDAT). Specifically, a unique object discovery approach is provided to generate training patches from raw nighttime tracking videos. To tackle the domain discrepancy, we employ a Transformer-based bridging layer post to the feature extractor to align image features from both domains. With a Transformer day/night feature discriminator, the daytime tracking model is adversarially trained to track at night. Moreover, we construct a pioneering benchmark namely NAT2021 for unsupervised domain adaptive nighttime tracking, which comprises a test set of 180 manually annotated tracking sequences and a train set of over 276k unlabelled nighttime tracking frames. Exhaustive experiments demonstrate the robustness and domain adaptability of the proposed framework in nighttime aerial tracking. The code and benchmark are available at https://github.com/vision4robotics/UDAT.
abstract_zh: 以往物体跟踪的进展大多报告在有利的光照条件下，而忽略了夜间的性能，这极大地阻碍了相关空中机器人应用的发展。相反，这项工作开发了一种用于夜间空中跟踪的新型无监督域适应框架（名为 UDAT）。具体来说，提供了一种独特的对象发现方法，用于从原始夜间跟踪视频生成训练补丁。为了解决域差异，我们在特征提取器后使用基于 Transformer 的桥接层来对齐两个域的图像特征。通过 Transformer 日/夜特征鉴别器，白天跟踪模型经过对抗性训练以进行夜间跟踪。此外，我们构建了一个用于无监督域自适应夜间跟踪的开创性基准，即 NAT2021，其中包括 180 个手动注释的跟踪序列的测试集和超过 276k 个未标记的夜间跟踪帧的训练集。详尽的实验证明了所提出的框架在夜间空中跟踪中的鲁棒性和领域适应性。代码和基准可在 https://github.com/vision4robotics/UDAT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督领域自适应框架UDAT，用于解决夜间空中跟踪中因光照不足导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪算法在夜间光照条件下表现不佳，严重制约了空中机器人等应用场景的发展，亟需提升夜间跟踪的领域适应能力。
AI.method: 通过物体发现方法生成夜间训练样本，设计Transformer桥接层对齐昼夜特征，并采用对抗训练策略结合日/夜特征鉴别器，构建包含180个标注序列和27.6万无标签帧的NAT2021基准数据集。
AI.result: 实验验证了UDAT框架在夜间空中跟踪任务中的鲁棒性和跨领域适应性，代码与数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: UDAT框架有效解决了夜间跟踪的领域差异问题，为无监督领域自适应研究提供了新基准和实用方案。

authors_text: David Vainshtein,Kiril Solovey,Oren Salzman
title: Multi-Agent Terraforming: Efficient Multi-Agent Path Finding via Environment Manipulation
title_zh: 多智能体地形改造：通过环境操纵进行高效的多智能体路径查找
abstract: Multi-agent pathfinding (MAPF) is concerned with planning collision-free paths for a team of agents from their start to goal locations in an environment cluttered with obstacles. Typical approaches for MAPF consider the locations of obstacles as being fixed, which limits their effectiveness in automated warehouses, where obstacles (representing pods or shelves) can be moved out of the way by agents (representing robots) to relieve bottlenecks and introduce shorter routes. In this work we initiate the study of MAPF with movable obstacles. In particular, we introduce a new extension of MAPF, which we call Terraforming MAPF (tMAPF), where some agents are responsible for moving obstacles to clear the way for other agents. Solving tMAPF is extremely challenging as it requires reasoning not only about collisions between agents, but also where and when obstacles should be moved. We present extensions of two state-of-the-art algorithms, CBS and PBS, in order to tackle tMAPF, and demonstrate that they can consistently outperform the best solution possible under a static-obstacle setting.
summary: Multi-agent pathfinding (MAPF) is concerned with planning collision-free paths for a team of agents from their start to goal locations in an environment cluttered with obstacles. Typical approaches for MAPF consider the locations of obstacles as being fixed, which limits their effectiveness in automated warehouses, where obstacles (representing pods or shelves) can be moved out of the way by agents (representing robots) to relieve bottlenecks and introduce shorter routes. In this work we initiate the study of MAPF with movable obstacles. In particular, we introduce a new extension of MAPF, which we call Terraforming MAPF (tMAPF), where some agents are responsible for moving obstacles to clear the way for other agents. Solving tMAPF is extremely challenging as it requires reasoning not only about collisions between agents, but also where and when obstacles should be moved. We present extensions of two state-of-the-art algorithms, CBS and PBS, in order to tackle tMAPF, and demonstrate that they can consistently outperform the best solution possible under a static-obstacle setting.
abstract_zh: 多智能体寻路 (MAPF) 涉及在充满障碍物的环境中为一组智能体规划从起点到目标位置的无碰撞路径。 MAPF 的典型方法认为障碍物的位置是固定的，这限制了它们在自动化仓库中的有效性，其中障碍物（代表吊舱或货架）可以由代理（代表机器人）移开，以缓解瓶颈并引入更短的路线。在这项工作中，我们开始研究具有可移动障碍物的 MAPF。特别是，我们引入了 MAPF 的新扩展，我们称之为 Terraforming MAPF (tMAPF)，其中一些代理负责移动障碍物，为其他代理扫清道路。解决 tMAPF 极具挑战性，因为它不仅需要推理智能体之间的碰撞，还需要推理障碍物应在何时何地移动。我们提出了两种最先进算法 CBS 和 PBS 的扩展，以解决 tMAPF 问题，并证明它们可以在静态障碍设置下始终优于最佳解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多智能体路径规划问题（tMAPF），允许智能体通过移动环境中的障碍物来优化路径规划，并扩展了两种主流算法以解决该问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多智能体路径规划假设障碍物固定，无法适应自动化仓库中动态调整障碍物（如移动货架）的实际需求，导致路径效率低下。
AI.method: 扩展冲突基于搜索（CBS）和优先级基于搜索（PBS）算法，使其能够同时规划智能体路径与障碍物移动时机，解决动态环境下的碰撞问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，改进后的算法在动态障碍物场景中显著优于静态障碍物设置下的最优解，有效缓解了路径瓶颈并缩短了整体行程。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入环境改造机制，本文为复杂动态场景下的多智能体协作规划提供了新思路，拓展了传统路径规划问题的适用范围。

ai_content_json.method: 扩展冲突基于搜索（CBS）和优先级基于搜索（PBS）算法，使其能够同时规划智能体路径与障碍物移动时机，解决动态环境下的碰撞问题。
ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，改进后的算法在动态障碍物场景中显著优于静态障碍物设置下的最优解，有效缓解了路径瓶颈并缩短了整体行程。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过引入环境改造机制，本文为复杂动态场景下的多智能体协作规划提供了新思路，拓展了传统路径规划问题的适用范围。

tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多智能体路径规划问题（tMAPF），允许智能体通过移动环境中的障碍物来优化路径规划，并扩展了两种主流算法以解决该问题。
motivation: 传统多智能体路径规划假设障碍物固定，无法适应自动化仓库中动态调整障碍物（如移动货架）的实际需求，导致路径效率低下。
method: 扩展冲突基于搜索（CBS）和优先级基于搜索（PBS）算法，使其能够同时规划智能体路径与障碍物移动时机，解决动态环境下的碰撞问题。
result: 实验表明，改进后的算法在动态障碍物场景中显著优于静态障碍物设置下的最优解，有效缓解了路径瓶颈并缩短了整体行程。
conclusion: 通过引入环境改造机制，本文为复杂动态场景下的多智能体协作规划提供了新思路，拓展了传统路径规划问题的适用范围。
search_text: Multi-Agent Terraforming: Efficient Multi-Agent Path Finding via Environment Manipulation 多智能体地形改造：通过环境操纵进行高效的多智能体路径查找 Multi-agent pathfinding (MAPF) is concerned with planning collision-free paths for a team of agents from their start to goal locations in an environment cluttered with obstacles. Typical approaches for MAPF consider the locations of obstacles as being fixed, which limits their effectiveness in automated warehouses, where obstacles (representing pods or shelves) can be moved out of the way by agents (representing robots) to relieve bottlenecks and introduce shorter routes. In this work we initiate the study of MAPF with movable obstacles. In particular, we introduce a new extension of MAPF, which we call Terraforming MAPF (tMAPF), where some agents are responsible for moving obstacles to clear the way for other agents. Solving tMAPF is extremely challenging as it requires reasoning not only about collisions between agents, but also where and when obstacles should be moved. We present extensions of two state-of-the-art algorithms, CBS and PBS, in order to tackle tMAPF, and demonstrate that they can consistently outperform the best solution possible under a static-obstacle setting. 多智能体寻路 (MAPF) 涉及在充满障碍物的环境中为一组智能体规划从起点到目标位置的无碰撞路径。 MAPF 的典型方法认为障碍物的位置是固定的，这限制了它们在自动化仓库中的有效性，其中障碍物（代表吊舱或货架）可以由代理（代表机器人）移开，以缓解瓶颈并引入更短的路线。在这项工作中，我们开始研究具有可移动障碍物的 MAPF。特别是，我们引入了 MAPF 的新扩展，我们称之为 Terraforming MAPF (tMAPF)，其中一些代理负责移动障碍物，为其他代理扫清道路。解决 tMAPF 极具挑战性，因为它不仅需要推理智能体之间的碰撞，还需要推理障碍物应在何时何地移动。我们提出了两种最先进算法 CBS 和 PBS 的扩展，以解决 tMAPF 问题，并证明它们可以在静态障碍设置下始终优于最佳解决方案。 本文提出了一种新的多智能体路径规划问题（tMAPF），允许智能体通过移动环境中的障碍物来优化路径规划，并扩展了两种主流算法以解决该问题。 David Vainshtein,Kiril Solovey,Oren Salzman cs.AI

authors_text: Weijia Wu,Yuanqiang Cai,Chunhua Shen,Debing Zhang,Ying Fu,Hong Zhou,Ping Luo
title: End-to-End Video Text Spotting with Transformer
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 进行端到端视频文本识别
abstract: Recent video text spotting methods usually require the three-staged pipeline, i.e., detecting text in individual images, recognizing localized text, tracking text streams with post-processing to generate final results. These methods typically follow the tracking-by-match paradigm and develop sophisticated pipelines. In this paper, rooted in Transformer sequence modeling, we propose a simple, but effective end-to-end video text DEtection, Tracking, and Recognition framework (TransDETR). TransDETR mainly includes two advantages: 1) Different from the explicit match paradigm in the adjacent frame, TransDETR tracks and recognizes each text implicitly by the different query termed text query over long-range temporal sequence (more than 7 frames). 2) TransDETR is the first end-to-end trainable video text spotting framework, which simultaneously addresses the three sub-tasks (e.g., text detection, tracking, recognition). Extensive experiments in four video text datasets (i.e.,ICDAR2013 Video, ICDAR2015 Video, Minetto, and YouTube Video Text) are conducted to demonstrate that TransDETR achieves state-of-the-art performance with up to around 8.0% improvements on video text spotting tasks. The code of TransDETR can be found at https://github.com/weijiawu/TransDETR.
summary: Recent video text spotting methods usually require the three-staged pipeline, i.e., detecting text in individual images, recognizing localized text, tracking text streams with post-processing to generate final results. These methods typically follow the tracking-by-match paradigm and develop sophisticated pipelines. In this paper, rooted in Transformer sequence modeling, we propose a simple, but effective end-to-end video text DEtection, Tracking, and Recognition framework (TransDETR). TransDETR mainly includes two advantages: 1) Different from the explicit match paradigm in the adjacent frame, TransDETR tracks and recognizes each text implicitly by the different query termed text query over long-range temporal sequence (more than 7 frames). 2) TransDETR is the first end-to-end trainable video text spotting framework, which simultaneously addresses the three sub-tasks (e.g., text detection, tracking, recognition). Extensive experiments in four video text datasets (i.e.,ICDAR2013 Video, ICDAR2015 Video, Minetto, and YouTube Video Text) are conducted to demonstrate that TransDETR achieves state-of-the-art performance with up to around 8.0% improvements on video text spotting tasks. The code of TransDETR can be found at https://github.com/weijiawu/TransDETR.
abstract_zh: 最近的视频文本识别方法通常需要三阶段流程，即检测单个图像中的文本、识别本地化文本、通过后处理跟踪文本流以生成最终结果。这些方法通常遵循匹配跟踪范例并开发复杂的管道。在本文中，基于 Transformer 序列建模，我们提出了一种简单但有效的端到端视频文本检测、跟踪和识别框架（TransDETR）。 TransDETR主要包括两个优点：1）与相邻帧中的显式匹配范式不同，TransDETR通过长范围时间序列（超过7帧）上的不同查询（称为文本查询）隐式跟踪和识别每个文本。 2) TransDETR 是第一个端到端可训练视频文本识别框架，它同时解决三个子任务（例如文本检测、跟踪、识别）。在四个视频文本数据集（即 ICDAR2013 视频、ICDAR2015 视频、Minetto 和 YouTube 视频文本）中进行了大量实验，证明 TransDETR 实现了最先进的性能，在视频文本识别任务上提高了约 8.0%。 TransDETR的代码可以在https://github.com/weijiawu/TransDETR找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的端到端视频文本检测、跟踪与识别框架TransDETR，解决传统多阶段流水线方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频文本检测方法依赖复杂三阶段流水线（检测-识别-跟踪），且采用显式匹配范式，难以处理长时序依赖和动态文本变化。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的TransDETR框架，通过长时序文本查询（超过7帧）隐式实现文本跟踪与识别，首次实现检测/跟踪/识别三任务联合端到端训练。
AI.result: 在ICDAR2013/2015、Minetto和YouTube四个数据集上达到SOTA性能，视频文本检测任务提升最高达8.0%。
AI.conclusion: TransDETR通过Transformer序列建模能力有效解决了视频文本的长时序依赖问题，为端到端视频文本识别提供了新范式。

authors_text: Danyang Tu,Xiongkuo Min,Huiyu Duan,Guodong Guo,Guangtao Zhai,Wei Shen
title: Iwin: Human-Object Interaction Detection via Transformer with Irregular Windows
title_zh: Iwin：通过带有不规则窗口的 Transformer 进行人机交互检测
abstract: This paper presents a new vision Transformer, named Iwin Transformer, which is specifically designed for human-object interaction (HOI) detection, a detailed scene understanding task involving a sequential process of human/object detection and interaction recognition. Iwin Transformer is a hierarchical Transformer which progressively performs token representation learning and token agglomeration within irregular windows. The irregular windows, achieved by augmenting regular grid locations with learned offsets, 1) eliminate redundancy in token representation learning, which leads to efficient human/object detection, and 2) enable the agglomerated tokens to align with humans/objects with different shapes, which facilitates the acquisition of highly-abstracted visual semantics for interaction recognition. The effectiveness and efficiency of Iwin Transformer are verified on the two standard HOI detection benchmark datasets, HICO-DET and V-COCO. Results show our method outperforms existing Transformers-based methods by large margins (3.7 mAP gain on HICO-DET and 2.0 mAP gain on V-COCO) with fewer training epochs ($0.5 \times$).
summary: This paper presents a new vision Transformer, named Iwin Transformer, which is specifically designed for human-object interaction (HOI) detection, a detailed scene understanding task involving a sequential process of human/object detection and interaction recognition. Iwin Transformer is a hierarchical Transformer which progressively performs token representation learning and token agglomeration within irregular windows. The irregular windows, achieved by augmenting regular grid locations with learned offsets, 1) eliminate redundancy in token representation learning, which leads to efficient human/object detection, and 2) enable the agglomerated tokens to align with humans/objects with different shapes, which facilitates the acquisition of highly-abstracted visual semantics for interaction recognition. The effectiveness and efficiency of Iwin Transformer are verified on the two standard HOI detection benchmark datasets, HICO-DET and V-COCO. Results show our method outperforms existing Transformers-based methods by large margins (3.7 mAP gain on HICO-DET and 2.0 mAP gain on V-COCO) with fewer training epochs ($0.5 \times$).
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的视觉 Transformer，名为 Iwin Transformer，它是专门为人与物体交互（HOI）检测而设计的，这是一项详细的场景理解任务，涉及人/物体检测和交互识别的顺序过程。 Iwin Transformer 是一个分层 Transformer，它在不规则窗口内逐步执行令牌表示学习和令牌聚集。通过使用学习的偏移量增强规则网格位置来实现不规则窗口，1）消除令牌表示学习中的冗余，从而实现高效的人类/物体检测，2）使聚集的令牌能够与不同形状的人类/物体对齐，这有助于获取用于交互识别的高度抽象的视觉语义。 Iwin Transformer 的有效性和效率在两个标准 HOI 检测基准数据集 HICO-DET 和 V-COCO 上得到验证。结果表明，我们的方法在训练次数较少的情况下（HICO-DET 上的 mAP 增益为 3.7，V-COCO 上的 mAP 增益为 2.0）大幅优于现有的基于 Transformers 的方法（$0.5 \times$）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Iwin的Transformer模型，专门用于人体-物体交互检测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在token表示学习中存在冗余，且难以处理不同形状的人体/物体，导致交互识别效率低下。
AI.method: 设计分层Transformer结构，通过规则网格添加学习偏移生成不规则窗口，消除冗余并聚合多尺度token以获取抽象语义。
AI.result: 在HICO-DET和V-COCO数据集上分别以3.7和2.0的mAP提升超越现有方法，训练轮数仅为对手的0.5倍。
AI.conclusion: 不规则窗口机制有效提升了HOI检测的效率和性能，验证了该方法的优越性。
