The irregular windows, achieved by augmenting regular grid locations with learned offsets, 1) eliminate redundancy in token representation learning, which leads to efficient human/object detection, and 2) enable the agglomerated tokens to align with humans/objects with different shapes, which facilitates the acquisition of highly-abstracted visual semantics for interaction recognition. The effectiveness and efficiency of Iwin Transformer are verified on the two standard HOI detection benchmark datasets, HICO-DET and V-COCO. Results show our method outperforms existing Transformers-based methods by large margins (3.7 mAP gain on HICO-DET and 2.0 mAP gain on V-COCO) with fewer training epochs ($0.5 \times$). 本文提出了一种新的视觉 Transformer，名为 Iwin Transformer，它是专门为人与物体交互（HOI）检测而设计的，这是一项详细的场景理解任务，涉及人/物体检测和交互识别的顺序过程。 Iwin Transformer 是一个分层 Transformer，它在不规则窗口内逐步执行令牌表示学习和令牌聚集。通过使用学习的偏移量增强规则网格位置来实现不规则窗口，1）消除令牌表示学习中的冗余，从而实现高效的人类/物体检测，2）使聚集的令牌能够与不同形状的人类/物体对齐，这有助于获取用于交互识别的高度抽象的视觉语义。 Iwin Transformer 的有效性和效率在两个标准 HOI 检测基准数据集 HICO-DET 和 V-COCO 上得到验证。结果表明，我们的方法在训练次数较少的情况下（HICO-DET 上的 mAP 增益为 3.7，V-COCO 上的 mAP 增益为 2.0）大幅优于现有的基于 Transformers 的方法（$0.5 \times$）。 本文提出一种名为Iwin的Transformer模型，专门用于人体-物体交互检测任务。 Danyang Tu,Xiongkuo Min,Huiyu Duan,Guodong Guo,Guangtao Zhai,Wei Shen cs.CV

authors_text: Fok-Chi-Seng Fok Kow,Anoop Kumar Sinha,Zhang Jin Ming,Bao Songyu,Jake Tan Jun Kang,Hong Yan Jack Jeffrey,Galina Mihaleva,Nadia Magnenat Thalmann,Yiyu Cai
title: MIDAS: Multi-sensorial Immersive Dynamic Autonomous System Improves Motivation of Stroke Affected Patients for Hand Rehabilitation
title_zh: MIDAS：多感官沉浸式动态自主系统提高中风患者手部康复的积极性
abstract: Majority of stroke survivors are left with poorly functioning paretic hands. Current rehabilitation devices have failed to motivate the patients enough to continue rehabilitation exercises. The objective of this project, MIDAS (Multi-sensorial Immersive Dynamic Autonomous System) is a proof of concept by using an immersive system to improve motivation of stroke patients for hand rehabilitation. MIDAS is intended for stroke patients who suffer from light to mild stroke. MIDAS is lightweight and portable. It consists of a hand exoskeleton subsystem, a Virtual Reality (VR) subsystem, and an olfactory subsystem. Altogether, MIDAS engages four out of five senses during rehabilitation. To evaluate the efficacy of MIDAS a pilot study consisting of three sessions is carried out on five stroke affected patients. Subsystems of MIDAS are added progressively in each session. The game environment, sonic effects, and scent released is carefully chosen to enhance the immersive experience. 60% of the scores of user experience are above 40 (out of 56). 96% Self Rehabilitation Motivation Scale (SRMS) rating shows that the participants are motivated to use MIDAS and 87% rating shows that MIDAS is exciting for rehabilitation. Participants experienced elevated motivation to continue stroke rehabilitation using MIDAS and no undesired side effects were reported.
summary: Majority of stroke survivors are left with poorly functioning paretic hands. Current rehabilitation devices have failed to motivate the patients enough to continue rehabilitation exercises. The objective of this project, MIDAS (Multi-sensorial Immersive Dynamic Autonomous System) is a proof of concept by using an immersive system to improve motivation of stroke patients for hand rehabilitation. MIDAS is intended for stroke patients who suffer from light to mild stroke. MIDAS is lightweight and portable. It consists of a hand exoskeleton subsystem, a Virtual Reality (VR) subsystem, and an olfactory subsystem. Altogether, MIDAS engages four out of five senses during rehabilitation. To evaluate the efficacy of MIDAS a pilot study consisting of three sessions is carried out on five stroke affected patients. Subsystems of MIDAS are added progressively in each session. The game environment, sonic effects, and scent released is carefully chosen to enhance the immersive experience. 60% of the scores of user experience are above 40 (out of 56). 96% Self Rehabilitation Motivation Scale (SRMS) rating shows that the participants are motivated to use MIDAS and 87% rating shows that MIDAS is exciting for rehabilitation. Participants experienced elevated motivation to continue stroke rehabilitation using MIDAS and no undesired side effects were reported.
abstract_zh: 大多数中风幸存者的手部功能不佳，瘫痪。目前的康复设备未能充分激励患者继续进行康复锻炼。该项目的目标是，MIDAS（多传感器沉浸式动态自主系统）是一个概念验证，通过使用沉浸式系统来提高中风患者手部康复的积极性。 MIDAS 适用于患有轻度至轻度中风的中风患者。 MIDAS 重量轻、便于携带。它由手部外骨骼子系统、虚拟现实（VR）子系统和嗅觉子系统组成。总的来说，MIDAS 在康复期间会调动五分之四的感官。为了评估 MIDAS 的功效，对五名中风患者进行了由三个疗程组成的试点研究。 MIDAS 的子系统在每个会话中逐步添加。游戏环境、音效和释放的气味都经过精心挑选，以增强身临其境的体验。 60% 的用户体验分数在 40 分以上（满分 56 分）。 96% 的自我康复动机量表 (SRMS) 评分表明参与者有使用 MIDAS 的积极性，87% 的评分表明 MIDAS 对康复而言令人兴奋。参与者使用 MIDAS 继续中风康复的动力增强，并且没有报告不良副作用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MIDAS系统，通过多感官沉浸式技术提升中风患者手部康复训练的动机。
AI.motivation: 现有康复设备无法充分激励患者持续训练，需开发更有效的多感官沉浸系统以提高康复依从性。
AI.method: 设计包含外骨骼、VR和嗅觉子系统的MIDAS，通过渐进式添加模块进行三阶段试点测试，结合游戏环境、声音和气味增强沉浸感。
AI.result: 用户体验评分60%超40分（满分56），96%患者认为MIDAS提升自我康复动机，87%认为其具有康复吸引力，且无不良反应。
AI.conclusion: MIDAS通过多感官沉浸显著提升中风患者康复动机，为轻中度患者提供安全有效的新型康复方案。

authors_text: Adil Kaan Akan,Sadra Safadoust,Fatma Güney
title: Stochastic Video Prediction with Structure and Motion
title_zh: 具有结构和运动的随机视频预测
abstract: While stochastic video prediction models enable future prediction under uncertainty, they mostly fail to model the complex dynamics of real-world scenes. For example, they cannot provide reliable predictions for scenes with a moving camera and independently moving foreground objects in driving scenarios. The existing methods fail to fully capture the dynamics of the structured world by only focusing on changes in pixels. In this paper, we assume that there is an underlying process creating observations in a video and propose to factorize it into static and dynamic components. We model the static part based on the scene structure and the ego-motion of the vehicle, and the dynamic part based on the remaining motion of the dynamic objects. By learning separate distributions of changes in foreground and background, we can decompose the scene into static and dynamic parts and separately model the change in each. Our experiments demonstrate that disentangling structure and motion helps stochastic video prediction, leading to better future predictions in complex driving scenarios on two real-world driving datasets, KITTI and Cityscapes.
summary: While stochastic video prediction models enable future prediction under uncertainty, they mostly fail to model the complex dynamics of real-world scenes. For example, they cannot provide reliable predictions for scenes with a moving camera and independently moving foreground objects in driving scenarios. The existing methods fail to fully capture the dynamics of the structured world by only focusing on changes in pixels. In this paper, we assume that there is an underlying process creating observations in a video and propose to factorize it into static and dynamic components. We model the static part based on the scene structure and the ego-motion of the vehicle, and the dynamic part based on the remaining motion of the dynamic objects. By learning separate distributions of changes in foreground and background, we can decompose the scene into static and dynamic parts and separately model the change in each. Our experiments demonstrate that disentangling structure and motion helps stochastic video prediction, leading to better future predictions in complex driving scenarios on two real-world driving datasets, KITTI and Cityscapes.
abstract_zh: 虽然随机视频预测模型可以在不确定的情况下进行未来预测，但它们大多无法对现实世界场景的复杂动态进行建模。例如，它们无法为驾驶场景中具有移动摄像机和独立移动前景物体的场景提供可靠的预测。现有方法仅关注像素的变化，无法完全捕捉结构化世界的动态。在本文中，我们假设存在一个在视频中创建观察结果的基本过程，并建议将其分解为静态和动态组件。我们根据场景结构和车辆的自我运动对静态部分进行建模，并根据动态对象的剩余运动对动态部分进行建模。通过学习前景和背景变化的单独分布，我们可以将场景分解为静态和动态部分，并分别对每个部分的变化进行建模。我们的实验表明，解开结构和运动有助于随机视频预测，从而在两个现实世界驾驶数据集 KITTI 和 Cityscapes 上的复杂驾驶场景中做出更好的未来预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将视频预测分解为静态结构和动态运动的方法，以提升复杂场景下的视频预测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有随机视频预测模型难以处理现实场景中复杂的动态变化，例如驾驶场景中的移动相机和独立运动的前景物体，主要原因是仅关注像素变化而未建模底层结构与运动的分离。
AI.method: 假设视频存在静态结构和动态运动的潜在过程，将场景分解为基于场景结构和车辆自运动的静态部分，以及动态物体剩余运动的动态部分，并分别建模前景与背景的变化分布。
AI.result: 在KITTI和Cityscapes两个真实驾驶数据集上，该方法在复杂驾驶场景中的未来预测表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 分离结构与运动的建模方式有助于提升随机视频预测的准确性，尤其在复杂动态场景中效果显著。

authors_text: Matija Franklin,Hal Ashton,Rebecca Gorman,Stuart Armstrong
title: Recognising the importance of preference change: A call for a coordinated multidisciplinary research effort in the age of AI
title_zh: 认识到偏好改变的重要性：呼吁人工智能时代协调多学科研究工作
comment: Accepted at the AAAI-22 Workshop on AI For Behavior Change held at the Thirty-Sixth AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI-22), 7 pages, 1 figure
comments: Accepted at the AAAI-22 Workshop on AI For Behavior Change held at the Thirty-Sixth AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI-22), 7 pages, 1 figure
abstract: As artificial intelligence becomes more powerful and a ubiquitous presence in daily life, it is imperative to understand and manage the impact of AI systems on our lives and decisions. Modern ML systems often change user behavior (e.g. personalized recommender systems learn user preferences to deliver recommendations that change online behavior). An externality of behavior change is preference change. This article argues for the establishment of a multidisciplinary endeavor focused on understanding how AI systems change preference: Preference Science. We operationalize preference to incorporate concepts from various disciplines, outlining the importance of meta-preferences and preference-change preferences, and proposing a preliminary framework for how preferences change. We draw a distinction between preference change, permissible preference change, and outright preference manipulation. A diversity of disciplines contribute unique insights to this framework.
summary: As artificial intelligence becomes more powerful and a ubiquitous presence in daily life, it is imperative to understand and manage the impact of AI systems on our lives and decisions. Modern ML systems often change user behavior (e.g. personalized recommender systems learn user preferences to deliver recommendations that change online behavior). An externality of behavior change is preference change. This article argues for the establishment of a multidisciplinary endeavor focused on understanding how AI systems change preference: Preference Science. We operationalize preference to incorporate concepts from various disciplines, outlining the importance of meta-preferences and preference-change preferences, and proposing a preliminary framework for how preferences change. We draw a distinction between preference change, permissible preference change, and outright preference manipulation. A diversity of disciplines contribute unique insights to this framework.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能变得越来越强大并在日常生活中无处不在，必须了解和管理人工智能系统对我们的生活和决策的影响。现代机器学习系统经常改变用户行为（例如个性化推荐系统了解用户偏好以提供改变在线行为的推荐）。行为改变的外部性是偏好改变。本文主张建立一个多学科的努力，重点关注人工智能系统如何改变偏好：偏好科学。我们运用偏好来整合来自不同学科的概念，概述了元偏好和偏好变化偏好的重要性，并提出了偏好如何变化的初步框架。我们对偏好改变、允许的偏好改变和彻底的偏好操纵进行了区分。多种学科为该框架贡献了独特的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出建立跨学科的‘偏好科学’框架，以系统研究AI系统如何改变用户偏好。
AI.motivation: AI系统通过行为改变影响用户偏好，但当前缺乏对偏好变化机制的系统性理解和管理方法，需多学科协作应对。
AI.method: 整合多学科概念，定义元偏好与偏好变化偏好，构建区分偏好变化类型（如可接受变化与操纵）的初步理论框架。
AI.result: 提出‘偏好科学’研究框架，明确偏好变化分类及多学科贡献，为后续研究提供理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁加强跨学科合作，深入研究AI引发的偏好变化机制，以确保技术应用的伦理性和可控性。

authors_text: Mikhail S. Tovarnov,Nikita V. Bykov
title: Reinforcement learning reward function in unmanned aerial vehicle control tasks
title_zh: 无人机控制任务中的强化学习奖励函数
abstract: This paper presents a new reward function that can be used for deep reinforcement learning in unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) control and navigation problems. The reward function is based on the construction and estimation of the time of simplified trajectories to the target, which are third-order Bezier curves. This reward function can be applied unchanged to solve problems in both two-dimensional and three-dimensional virtual environments. The effectiveness of the reward function was tested in a newly developed virtual environment, namely, a simplified two-dimensional environment describing the dynamics of UAV control and flight, taking into account the forces of thrust, inertia, gravity, and aerodynamic drag. In this formulation, three tasks of UAV control and navigation were successfully solved: UAV flight to a given point in space, avoidance of interception by another UAV, and organization of interception of one UAV by another. The three most relevant modern deep reinforcement learning algorithms, Soft actor-critic, Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient, and Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient were used. All three algorithms performed well, indicating the effectiveness of the selected reward function.
summary: This paper presents a new reward function that can be used for deep reinforcement learning in unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) control and navigation problems. The reward function is based on the construction and estimation of the time of simplified trajectories to the target, which are third-order Bezier curves. This reward function can be applied unchanged to solve problems in both two-dimensional and three-dimensional virtual environments. The effectiveness of the reward function was tested in a newly developed virtual environment, namely, a simplified two-dimensional environment describing the dynamics of UAV control and flight, taking into account the forces of thrust, inertia, gravity, and aerodynamic drag. In this formulation, three tasks of UAV control and navigation were successfully solved: UAV flight to a given point in space, avoidance of interception by another UAV, and organization of interception of one UAV by another. The three most relevant modern deep reinforcement learning algorithms, Soft actor-critic, Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient, and Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient were used. All three algorithms performed well, indicating the effectiveness of the selected reward function.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的奖励函数，可用于无人机（UAV）控制和导航问题中的深度强化学习。奖励函数基于对到达目标的简化轨迹（三阶贝塞尔曲线）的时间的构造和估计。该奖励函数可以不变地应用来解决二维和三维虚拟环境中的问题。奖励函数的有效性在新开发的虚拟环境中进行了测试，即描述无人机控制和飞行动力学的简化二维环境，考虑了推力、惯性、重力和气动阻力。在该方案中，成功解决了无人机控制和导航的三个任务：无人机飞往空间中的给定点、避免另一架无人机的拦截以及组织一架无人机对另一架无人机的拦截。使用了三种最相关的现代深度强化学习算法：Soft actor-critic、深度确定性策略梯度和双延迟深度确定性策略梯度。所有三种算法都表现良好，表明所选奖励函数的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种基于简化轨迹时间估计的奖励函数，用于无人机控制任务的深度强化学习，并验证其在二维和三维环境中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统奖励函数难以适应无人机复杂动态环境需求，需设计更高效的轨迹规划与奖励机制以提升控制性能。
AI.method: 构建三阶贝塞尔曲线轨迹模型，通过时间估计设计奖励函数；在二维虚拟环境中结合推力、重力等动力学因素，采用三种深度强化学习算法进行验证。
AI.result: 三种算法均成功解决无人机定点飞行、规避拦截和拦截任务，证明奖励函数在二维及三维环境中的普适性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的奖励函数能有效支持多场景无人机控制任务，为强化学习在自主飞行领域的应用提供可行方案。

The reward function is based on the construction and estimation of the time of simplified trajectories to the target, which are third-order Bezier curves. This reward function can be applied unchanged to solve problems in both two-dimensional and three-dimensional virtual environments. The effectiveness of the reward function was tested in a newly developed virtual environment, namely, a simplified two-dimensional environment describing the dynamics of UAV control and flight, taking into account the forces of thrust, inertia, gravity, and aerodynamic drag. In this formulation, three tasks of UAV control and navigation were successfully solved: UAV flight to a given point in space, avoidance of interception by another UAV, and organization of interception of one UAV by another. The three most relevant modern deep reinforcement learning algorithms, Soft actor-critic, Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient, and Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient were used. All three algorithms performed well, indicating the effectiveness of the selected reward function. 本文提出了一种新的奖励函数，可用于无人机（UAV）控制和导航问题中的深度强化学习。奖励函数基于对到达目标的简化轨迹（三阶贝塞尔曲线）的时间的构造和估计。该奖励函数可以不变地应用来解决二维和三维虚拟环境中的问题。奖励函数的有效性在新开发的虚拟环境中进行了测试，即描述无人机控制和飞行动力学的简化二维环境，考虑了推力、惯性、重力和气动阻力。在该方案中，成功解决了无人机控制和导航的三个任务：无人机飞往空间中的给定点、避免另一架无人机的拦截以及组织一架无人机对另一架无人机的拦截。使用了三种最相关的现代深度强化学习算法：Soft actor-critic、深度确定性策略梯度和双延迟深度确定性策略梯度。所有三种算法都表现良好，表明所选奖励函数的有效性。 本文设计了一种基于简化轨迹时间估计的奖励函数，用于无人机控制任务的深度强化学习，并验证其在二维和三维环境中的有效性。 Mikhail S. Tovarnov,Nikita V. Bykov cs.RO,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Francesco Del Duchetto,Marc Hanheide
title: Learning on the Job: Long-Term Behavioural Adaptation in Human-Robot Interactions
title_zh: 在工作中学习：人机交互中的长期行为适应
abstract: In this work, we propose a framework for allowing autonomous robots deployed for extended periods of time in public spaces to adapt their own behaviour online from user interactions. The robot behaviour planning is embedded in a Reinforcement Learning (RL) framework, where the objective is maximising the level of overall user engagement during the interactions. We use the Upper-Confidence-Bound Value-Iteration (UCBVI) algorithm, which gives a helpful way of managing the exploration-exploitation trade-off for real-time interactions. An engagement model trained end-to-end generates the reward function in real-time during policy execution. We test this approach in a public museum in Lincoln (UK), where the robot is deployed as a tour guide for the visitors. Results show that after a couple of months of exploration, the robot policy learned to maintain the engagement of users for longer, with an increase of 22.8% over the initial static policy in the number of items visited during the tour and a 30% increase in the probability of completing the tour. This work is a promising step toward behavioural adaptation in long-term scenarios for robotics applications in social settings.
summary: In this work, we propose a framework for allowing autonomous robots deployed for extended periods of time in public spaces to adapt their own behaviour online from user interactions. The robot behaviour planning is embedded in a Reinforcement Learning (RL) framework, where the objective is maximising the level of overall user engagement during the interactions. We use the Upper-Confidence-Bound Value-Iteration (UCBVI) algorithm, which gives a helpful way of managing the exploration-exploitation trade-off for real-time interactions. An engagement model trained end-to-end generates the reward function in real-time during policy execution. We test this approach in a public museum in Lincoln (UK), where the robot is deployed as a tour guide for the visitors. Results show that after a couple of months of exploration, the robot policy learned to maintain the engagement of users for longer, with an increase of 22.8% over the initial static policy in the number of items visited during the tour and a 30% increase in the probability of completing the tour. This work is a promising step toward behavioural adaptation in long-term scenarios for robotics applications in social settings.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一个框架，允许在公共场所长时间部署的自主机器人通过用户交互来在线调整自己的行为。机器人行为规划嵌入在强化学习 (RL) 框架中，其目标是在交互过程中最大限度地提高总体用户参与度。我们使用置信上限值迭代（UCBVI）算法，它提供了一种管理实时交互的探索-利用权衡的有用方法。经过端到端训练的参与模型在政策执行过程中实时生成奖励函数。我们在林肯（英国）的一个公共博物馆测试了这种方法，机器人被部署为游客的导游。结果显示，经过几个月的探索，机器人策略学会了更长时间地维持用户的参与度，游览期间访问的项目数量比初始静态策略增加了 22.8%，完成游览的概率增加了 30%。这项工作是在社会环境中机器人应用的长期场景中朝着行为适应迈出的有希望的一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种框架，使长期部署在公共空间的机器人能够通过在线学习用户互动数据，动态调整自身行为以提升用户参与度。
AI.motivation: 传统静态机器人行为策略难以适应长期人机交互中的动态变化，需通过实时学习优化用户参与度以提升社会场景中的机器人应用效果。
AI.method: 基于强化学习框架，采用UCBVI算法平衡探索与利用，结合端到端训练的实时参与模型生成奖励函数，通过博物馆实地测试验证效果。
AI.result: 部署两个月后，机器人策略使单次游览参观项目数提升22.8%，游览完成率提高30%，显著优于初始静态策略。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了长期场景下机器人行为自适应的有效性，为社会交互型机器人应用提供了可行的技术路径。

tldr: 本文提出一种框架，使长期部署在公共空间的机器人能够通过在线学习用户互动数据，动态调整自身行为以提升用户参与度。
motivation: 传统静态机器人行为策略难以适应长期人机交互中的动态变化，需通过实时学习优化用户参与度以提升社会场景中的机器人应用效果。
method: 基于强化学习框架，采用UCBVI算法平衡探索与利用，结合端到端训练的实时参与模型生成奖励函数，通过博物馆实地测试验证效果。
result: 部署两个月后，机器人策略使单次游览参观项目数提升22.8%，游览完成率提高30%，显著优于初始静态策略。
conclusion: 该方法验证了长期场景下机器人行为自适应的有效性，为社会交互型机器人应用提供了可行的技术路径。
search_text: Learning on the Job: Long-Term Behavioural Adaptation in Human-Robot Interactions 在工作中学习：人机交互中的长期行为适应 In this work, we propose a framework for allowing autonomous robots deployed for extended periods of time in public spaces to adapt their own behaviour online from user interactions. The robot behaviour planning is embedded in a Reinforcement Learning (RL) framework, where the objective is maximising the level of overall user engagement during the interactions. We use the Upper-Confidence-Bound Value-Iteration (UCBVI) algorithm, which gives a helpful way of managing the exploration-exploitation trade-off for real-time interactions. An engagement model trained end-to-end generates the reward function in real-time during policy execution. We test this approach in a public museum in Lincoln (UK), where the robot is deployed as a tour guide for the visitors. Results show that after a couple of months of exploration, the robot policy learned to maintain the engagement of users for longer, with an increase of 22.8% over the initial static policy in the number of items visited during the tour and a 30% increase in the probability of completing the tour. This work is a promising step toward behavioural adaptation in long-term scenarios for robotics applications in social settings. 在这项工作中，我们提出了一个框架，允许在公共场所长时间部署的自主机器人通过用户交互来在线调整自己的行为。机器人行为规划嵌入在强化学习 (RL) 框架中，其目标是在交互过程中最大限度地提高总体用户参与度。我们使用置信上限值迭代（UCBVI）算法，它提供了一种管理实时交互的探索-利用权衡的有用方法。经过端到端训练的参与模型在政策执行过程中实时生成奖励函数。我们在林肯（英国）的一个公共博物馆测试了这种方法，机器人被部署为游客的导游。结果显示，经过几个月的探索，机器人策略学会了更长时间地维持用户的参与度，游览期间访问的项目数量比初始静态策略增加了 22.8%，完成游览的概率增加了 30%。这项工作是在社会环境中机器人应用的长期场景中朝着行为适应迈出的有希望的一步。 本文提出一种框架，使长期部署在公共空间的机器人能够通过在线学习用户互动数据，动态调整自身行为以提升用户参与度。 Francesco Del Duchetto,Marc Hanheide cs.RO,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Fanwei Kong,Shawn Shadden
title: Learning Whole Heart Mesh Generation From Patient Images For Computational Simulations
title_zh: 从患者图像中学习整个心脏网格生成以进行计算模拟
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging, vol. 42, no. 2, pp. 533-545, Feb. 2023
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging, vol. 42, no. 2, pp. 533-545, Feb. 2023
abstract: Patient-specific cardiac modeling combines geometries of the heart derived from medical images and biophysical simulations to predict various aspects of cardiac function. However, generating simulation-suitable models of the heart from patient image data often requires complicated procedures and significant human effort. We present a fast and automated deep-learning method to construct simulation-suitable models of the heart from medical images. The approach constructs meshes from 3D patient images by learning to deform a small set of deformation handles on a whole heart template. For both 3D CT and MR data, this method achieves promising accuracy for whole heart reconstruction, consistently outperforming prior methods in constructing simulation-suitable meshes of the heart. When evaluated on time-series CT data, this method produced more anatomically and temporally consistent geometries than prior methods, and was able to produce geometries that better satisfy modeling requirements for cardiac flow simulations. Our source code and pretrained networks are available at https://github.com/fkong7/HeartDeformNets.
summary: Patient-specific cardiac modeling combines geometries of the heart derived from medical images and biophysical simulations to predict various aspects of cardiac function. However, generating simulation-suitable models of the heart from patient image data often requires complicated procedures and significant human effort. We present a fast and automated deep-learning method to construct simulation-suitable models of the heart from medical images. The approach constructs meshes from 3D patient images by learning to deform a small set of deformation handles on a whole heart template. For both 3D CT and MR data, this method achieves promising accuracy for whole heart reconstruction, consistently outperforming prior methods in constructing simulation-suitable meshes of the heart. When evaluated on time-series CT data, this method produced more anatomically and temporally consistent geometries than prior methods, and was able to produce geometries that better satisfy modeling requirements for cardiac flow simulations. Our source code and pretrained networks are available at https://github.com/fkong7/HeartDeformNets.
abstract_zh: 患者特定的心脏建模结合了从医学图像和生物物理模拟中得出的心脏几何形状，以预测心脏功能的各个方面。然而，从患者图像数据生成适合模拟的心脏模型通常需要复杂的程序和大量的人力。我们提出了一种快速、自动化的深度学习方法，可以根据医学图像构建适合模拟的心脏模型。该方法通过学习使整个心脏模板上的一小组变形手柄变形，从 3D 患者图像构建网格。对于 3D CT 和 MR 数据，该方法在整个心脏重建方面实现了有希望的准确性，在构建适合模拟的心脏网格方面始终优于先前的方法。当对时间序列 CT 数据进行评估时，该方法比以前的方法产生了在解剖学和时间上更加一致的几何形状，并且能够产生更好地满足心流模拟的建模要求的几何形状。我们的源代码和预训练网络可在 https://github.com/fkong7/HeartDeformNets 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的自动化方法，从患者医学影像中生成适用于计算模拟的全心网格模型。
AI.motivation: 传统方法生成心脏模拟模型需要复杂流程和大量人工干预，难以满足临床需求。
AI.method: 通过学习变形少量控制点的全心模板网格，利用深度学习从3D CT/MR图像生成符合模拟要求的网格结构。
AI.result: 在CT/MR数据集上优于现有方法，生成的几何形状在解剖学和时间序列上更一致，更符合心脏流体模拟需求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了高效自动化的心脏网格建模，为临床和科研提供更优的计算模拟工具。

authors_text: Pingping Dai,Licong Dong,Ruihan Zhang,Haiming Zhu,Jie Wu,Kehong Yuan
title: Soft-CP: A Credible and Effective Data Augmentation for Semantic Segmentation of Medical Lesions
title_zh: Soft-CP：用于医学病变语义分割的可靠且有效的数据增强
abstract: The medical datasets are usually faced with the problem of scarcity and data imbalance. Moreover, annotating large datasets for semantic segmentation of medical lesions is domain-knowledge and time-consuming. In this paper, we propose a new object-blend method(short in soft-CP) that combines the Copy-Paste augmentation method for semantic segmentation of medical lesions offline, ensuring the correct edge information around the lession to solve the issue above-mentioned. We proved the method's validity with several datasets in different imaging modalities. In our experiments on the KiTS19[2] dataset, Soft-CP outperforms existing medical lesions synthesis approaches. The Soft-CP augementation provides gains of +26.5% DSC in the low data regime(10% of data) and +10.2% DSC in the high data regime(all of data), In offline training data, the ratio of real images to synthetic images is 3:1.
summary: The medical datasets are usually faced with the problem of scarcity and data imbalance. Moreover, annotating large datasets for semantic segmentation of medical lesions is domain-knowledge and time-consuming. In this paper, we propose a new object-blend method(short in soft-CP) that combines the Copy-Paste augmentation method for semantic segmentation of medical lesions offline, ensuring the correct edge information around the lession to solve the issue above-mentioned. We proved the method's validity with several datasets in different imaging modalities. In our experiments on the KiTS19[2] dataset, Soft-CP outperforms existing medical lesions synthesis approaches. The Soft-CP augementation provides gains of +26.5% DSC in the low data regime(10% of data) and +10.2% DSC in the high data regime(all of data), In offline training data, the ratio of real images to synthetic images is 3:1.
abstract_zh: 医疗数据集通常面临稀缺和数据不平衡的问题。此外，注释用于医学病变语义分割的大型数据集是领域知识且耗时的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的对象混合方法（简称soft-CP），结合复制粘贴增强方法对医学病灶进行离线语义分割，确保病灶周围的边缘信息正确，以解决上述问题。我们用不同成像方式的多个数据集证明了该方法的有效性。在我们对 KiTS19[2] 数据集的实验中，Soft-CP 优于现有的医学病变合成方法。 Soft-CP 增强在低数据范围（10% 的数据）中提供 +26.5% DSC 的增益，在高数据范围（所有数据）中提供 +10.2% DSC 的增益。在离线训练数据中，真实图像与合成图像的比率为 3:1。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Soft-CP的数据增强方法，用于解决医学病灶语义分割中的数据稀缺和不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 医学数据集通常存在数据稀缺、类别不平衡以及标注成本高昂的问题，传统方法难以有效生成高质量合成数据。
AI.method: 通过改进Copy-Paste方法，结合病灶区域边缘信息保护机制，实现离线医学图像的可信合成数据生成。
AI.result: 在KiTS19数据集实验中，Soft-CP在低数据量（10%）时提升26.5% DSC，在全数据量时提升10.2% DSC，且真实图像与合成图像比例为3:1。
AI.conclusion: Soft-CP方法有效缓解医学数据不足问题，为病灶分割任务提供高质量合成数据支持。

authors_text: Artan Salihu,Stefan Schwarz,Markus Rupp
title: Attention Aided CSI Wireless Localization
title_zh: 注意力辅助 CSI 无线定位
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have become a popular approach for wireless localization based on channel state information (CSI). A common practice is to use the raw CSI in the input and allow the network to learn relevant channel representations for mapping to location information. However, various works show that raw CSI can be very sensitive to system impairments and small changes in the environment. On the contrary, hand-designing features may hinder the limits of channel representation learning of the DNN. In this work, we propose attention-based CSI for robust feature learning. We evaluate the performance of attended features in centralized and distributed massive MIMO systems for ray-tracing channels in two non-stationary railway track environments. By comparison to a base DNN, our approach provides exceptional performance.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have become a popular approach for wireless localization based on channel state information (CSI). A common practice is to use the raw CSI in the input and allow the network to learn relevant channel representations for mapping to location information. However, various works show that raw CSI can be very sensitive to system impairments and small changes in the environment. On the contrary, hand-designing features may hinder the limits of channel representation learning of the DNN. In this work, we propose attention-based CSI for robust feature learning. We evaluate the performance of attended features in centralized and distributed massive MIMO systems for ray-tracing channels in two non-stationary railway track environments. By comparison to a base DNN, our approach provides exceptional performance.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 已成为基于信道状态信息 (CSI) 的无线定位的流行方法。常见的做法是在输入中使用原始 CSI，并允许网络学习相关的通道表示以映射到位置信息。然而，各种研究表明，原始 CSI 对系统损伤和环境的微小变化非常敏感。相反，手工设计的特征可能会阻碍 DNN 通道表示学习的局限性。在这项工作中，我们提出了基于注意力的 CSI 来进行稳健的特征学习。我们评估了两个非固定铁路轨道环境中光线追踪通道的集中式和分布式大规模 MIMO 系统中有人值守功能的性能。与基础 DNN 相比，我们的方法提供了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于注意力机制的CSI无线定位方法，以提升系统鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 原始CSI对环境变化敏感，手工设计特征限制DNN表示学习能力，需探索更鲁棒的特征提取方式。
AI.method: 设计注意力机制处理CSI数据，在集中式和分布式MIMO系统中进行射线追踪信道实验验证。
AI.result: 所提方法在非平稳铁路环境中显著优于基准DNN模型的定位性能。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制有效增强CSI特征鲁棒性，为复杂场景无线定位提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出基于注意力机制的CSI无线定位方法，以提升系统鲁棒性。

search_text: Attention Aided CSI Wireless Localization 注意力辅助 CSI 无线定位 Deep neural networks (DNNs) have become a popular approach for wireless localization based on channel state information (CSI). A common practice is to use the raw CSI in the input and allow the network to learn relevant channel representations for mapping to location information. However, various works show that raw CSI can be very sensitive to system impairments and small changes in the environment. On the contrary, hand-designing features may hinder the limits of channel representation learning of the DNN. In this work, we propose attention-based CSI for robust feature learning. We evaluate the performance of attended features in centralized and distributed massive MIMO systems for ray-tracing channels in two non-stationary railway track environments. By comparison to a base DNN, our approach provides exceptional performance. 深度神经网络 (DNN) 已成为基于信道状态信息 (CSI) 的无线定位的流行方法。常见的做法是在输入中使用原始 CSI，并允许网络学习相关的通道表示以映射到位置信息。然而，各种研究表明，原始 CSI 对系统损伤和环境的微小变化非常敏感。相反，手工设计的特征可能会阻碍 DNN 通道表示学习的局限性。在这项工作中，我们提出了基于注意力的 CSI 来进行稳健的特征学习。我们评估了两个非固定铁路轨道环境中光线追踪通道的集中式和分布式大规模 MIMO 系统中有人值守功能的性能。与基础 DNN 相比，我们的方法提供了卓越的性能。 本文提出基于注意力机制的CSI无线定位方法，以提升系统鲁棒性。 Artan Salihu,Stefan Schwarz,Markus Rupp eess.SP,cs.AI

authors_text: Mark Robson,Mohan Sridharan
title: Generating Task-specific Robotic Grasps
title_zh: 生成特定任务的机器人抓取
abstract: This paper describes a method for generating robot grasps by jointly considering stability and other task and object-specific constraints. We introduce a three-level representation that is acquired for each object class from a small number of exemplars of objects, tasks, and relevant grasps. The representation encodes task-specific knowledge for each object class as a relationship between a keypoint skeleton and suitable grasp points that is preserved despite intra-class variations in scale and orientation. The learned models are queried at run time by a simple sampling-based method to guide the generation of grasps that balance task and stability constraints. We ground and evaluate our method in the context of a Franka Emika Panda robot assisting a human in picking tabletop objects for which the robot does not have prior CAD models. Experimental results demonstrate that in comparison with a baseline method that only focuses on stability, our method is able to provide suitable grasps for different tasks.
summary: This paper describes a method for generating robot grasps by jointly considering stability and other task and object-specific constraints. We introduce a three-level representation that is acquired for each object class from a small number of exemplars of objects, tasks, and relevant grasps. The representation encodes task-specific knowledge for each object class as a relationship between a keypoint skeleton and suitable grasp points that is preserved despite intra-class variations in scale and orientation. The learned models are queried at run time by a simple sampling-based method to guide the generation of grasps that balance task and stability constraints. We ground and evaluate our method in the context of a Franka Emika Panda robot assisting a human in picking tabletop objects for which the robot does not have prior CAD models. Experimental results demonstrate that in comparison with a baseline method that only focuses on stability, our method is able to provide suitable grasps for different tasks.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了一种通过联合考虑稳定性以及其他任务和特定对象约束来生成机器人抓取的方法。我们引入了一个三级表示，该表示是从少量对象、任务和相关掌握的示例中为每个对象类获取的。该表示将每个对象类的特定于任务的知识编码为关键点骨架和合适的掌握点之间的关系，尽管类内的尺度和方向存在变化，但该关系仍被保留。在运行时通过简单的基于采样的方法查询学习的模型，以指导平衡任务和稳定性约束的掌握的生成。我们在 Franka Emika Panda 机器人协助人类拾取桌面物体（机器人之前没有 CAD 模型）的背景下对我们的方法进行了基础和评估。实验结果表明，与仅注重稳定性的基线方法相比，我们的方法能够为不同的任务提供合适的把握。

AI.tldr: 提出一种生成任务特定机器人抓取的方法，结合稳定性及任务和物体特定约束。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注抓取稳定性，忽略任务需求，导致抓取不适用于特定任务。
AI.method: 引入三级表示，从少量样本中学习物体类别的任务特定知识，通过关键点骨架与抓取点关系建模，并在运行时采用采样方法生成抓取。
AI.result: 实验表明，相比仅关注稳定性的基线方法，该方法能生成适用于不同任务的有效抓取。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效结合任务与稳定性约束，提升机器人抓取在实际任务中的适用性。

authors_text: Beijia Chen,Yuefan Shen,Hongbo Fu,Xiang Chen,Kun Zhou,Youyi Zheng
title: NeuralReshaper: Single-image Human-body Retouching with Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: NeuralReshaper：使用深度神经网络进行单图像人体修饰
abstract: In this paper, we present NeuralReshaper, a novel method for semantic reshaping of human bodies in single images using deep generative networks. To achieve globally coherent reshaping effects, our approach follows a fit-then-reshape pipeline, which first fits a parametric 3D human model to a source human image and then reshapes the fitted 3D model with respect to user-specified semantic attributes. Previous methods rely on image warping to transfer 3D reshaping effects to the entire image domain and thus often cause distortions in both foreground and background. In contrast, we resort to generative adversarial nets conditioned on the source image and a 2D warping field induced by the reshaped 3D model, to achieve more realistic reshaping results. Specifically, we separately encode the foreground and background information in the source image using a two-headed UNet-like generator, and guide the information flow from the foreground branch to the background branch via feature space warping. Furthermore, to deal with the lack-of-data problem that no paired data exist (i.e., the same human bodies in varying shapes), we introduce a novel self-supervised strategy to train our network. Unlike previous methods that often require manual efforts to correct undesirable artifacts caused by incorrect body-to-image fitting, our method is fully automatic. Extensive experiments on both indoor and outdoor datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method over previous approaches.
summary: In this paper, we present NeuralReshaper, a novel method for semantic reshaping of human bodies in single images using deep generative networks. To achieve globally coherent reshaping effects, our approach follows a fit-then-reshape pipeline, which first fits a parametric 3D human model to a source human image and then reshapes the fitted 3D model with respect to user-specified semantic attributes. Previous methods rely on image warping to transfer 3D reshaping effects to the entire image domain and thus often cause distortions in both foreground and background. In contrast, we resort to generative adversarial nets conditioned on the source image and a 2D warping field induced by the reshaped 3D model, to achieve more realistic reshaping results. Specifically, we separately encode the foreground and background information in the source image using a two-headed UNet-like generator, and guide the information flow from the foreground branch to the background branch via feature space warping. Furthermore, to deal with the lack-of-data problem that no paired data exist (i.e., the same human bodies in varying shapes), we introduce a novel self-supervised strategy to train our network. Unlike previous methods that often require manual efforts to correct undesirable artifacts caused by incorrect body-to-image fitting, our method is fully automatic. Extensive experiments on both indoor and outdoor datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method over previous approaches.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 NeuralReshaper，这是一种使用深度生成网络对单个图像中的人体进行语义重塑的新方法。为了实现全局一致的重塑效果，我们的方法遵循拟合然后重塑管道，首先将参数化 3D 人体模型拟合到源人类图像，然后根据用户指定的语义属性重塑拟合的 3D 模型。以前的方法依靠图像扭曲将 3D 重塑效果转移到整个图像域，因此经常会导致前景和背景失真。相比之下，我们采用以源图像为条件的生成对抗网络以及由重塑的 3D 模型引起的 2D 扭曲场，以实现更真实的重塑结果。具体来说，我们使用双头类 UNet 生成器分别对源图像中的前景和背景信息进行编码，并通过特征空间扭曲引导信息从前景分支到背景分支。此外，为了解决不存在配对数据（即不同形状的相同人体）的数据缺乏问题，我们引入了一种新颖的自我监督策略来训练我们的网络。以前的方法通常需要手动来纠正由于不正确的身体与图像拟合而导致的不良伪影，而我们的方法是全自动的。对室内和室外数据集的广泛实验证明了我们的方法相对于以前的方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeuralReshaper方法，利用深度神经网络实现单张图像中人体的语义重塑。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过图像扭曲传递3D重塑效果，导致前后景失真；且缺乏配对数据训练，需人工修正错误。
AI.method: 采用fit-then-reshape流程，先拟合3D人体模型，再通过条件GAN生成图像。使用双分支UNet编码前后景信息，并引入自监督策略解决数据不足问题。
AI.result: 在室内外数据集上实验表明，该方法在重塑效果和真实性上优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: NeuralReshaper实现了全自动、高保真的人体图像编辑，推动了单图像语义重塑的发展。

authors_text: Yuhua Xu,Xiaoli Yang,Yushan Yu,Wei Jia,Zhaobi Chu,Yulan Guo
title: Depth Estimation by Combining Binocular Stereo and Monocular Structured-Light
title_zh: 结合双目立体和单目结构光的深度估计
abstract: It is well known that the passive stereo system cannot adapt well to weak texture objects, e.g., white walls. However, these weak texture targets are very common in indoor environments. In this paper, we present a novel stereo system, which consists of two cameras (an RGB camera and an IR camera) and an IR speckle projector. The RGB camera is used both for depth estimation and texture acquisition. The IR camera and the speckle projector can form a monocular structured-light (MSL) subsystem, while the two cameras can form a binocular stereo subsystem. The depth map generated by the MSL subsystem can provide external guidance for the stereo matching networks, which can improve the matching accuracy significantly. In order to verify the effectiveness of the proposed system, we build a prototype and collect a test dataset in indoor scenes. The evaluation results show that the Bad 2.0 error of the proposed system is 28.2% of the passive stereo system when the network RAFT is used. The dataset and trained models are available at https://github.com/YuhuaXu/MonoStereoFusion.
summary: It is well known that the passive stereo system cannot adapt well to weak texture objects, e.g., white walls. However, these weak texture targets are very common in indoor environments. In this paper, we present a novel stereo system, which consists of two cameras (an RGB camera and an IR camera) and an IR speckle projector. The RGB camera is used both for depth estimation and texture acquisition. The IR camera and the speckle projector can form a monocular structured-light (MSL) subsystem, while the two cameras can form a binocular stereo subsystem. The depth map generated by the MSL subsystem can provide external guidance for the stereo matching networks, which can improve the matching accuracy significantly. In order to verify the effectiveness of the proposed system, we build a prototype and collect a test dataset in indoor scenes. The evaluation results show that the Bad 2.0 error of the proposed system is 28.2% of the passive stereo system when the network RAFT is used. The dataset and trained models are available at https://github.com/YuhuaXu/MonoStereoFusion.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，被动立体声系统不能很好地适应弱纹理物体，例如白墙。然而，这些弱纹理目标在室内环境中非常常见。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的立体系统，它由两个摄像头（一个 RGB 摄像头和一个红外摄像头）和一个红外散斑投影仪组成。 RGB 相机用于深度估计和纹理采集。红外相机和散斑投影仪可以形成单目结构光（MSL）子系统，而两个相机可以形成双目立体子系统。 MSL子系统生成的深度图可以为立体匹配网络提供外部指导，从而可以显着提高匹配精度。为了验证所提出系统的有效性，我们构建了一个原型并收集了室内场景的测试数据集。评估结果表明，当使用网络RAFT时，该系统的Bad 2.0误差是无源立体声系统的28.2%。数据集和训练模型可在 https://github.com/YuhuaXu/MonoStereoFusion 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合双目立体视觉和单目结构光的新系统，以提高弱纹理物体的深度估计性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的被动立体视觉系统在弱纹理物体（如白色墙壁）上表现不佳，而这类物体在室内环境中非常常见，因此需要一种更有效的深度估计方法。
AI.method: 该系统由RGB相机、红外相机和红外斑点投影仪组成。RGB相机用于深度估计和纹理获取，红外相机与斑点投影仪形成单目结构光子系统，而两个相机形成双目立体子系统。单目结构光子系统生成的深度图可为立体匹配网络提供外部指导，从而提高匹配精度。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用RAFT网络时，该系统的Bad 2.0误差仅为被动立体视觉系统的28.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过结合双目立体视觉和单目结构光，显著提升了弱纹理物体的深度估计性能，具有较高的实际应用价值。

search_text: Depth Estimation by Combining Binocular Stereo and Monocular Structured-Light 结合双目立体和单目结构光的深度估计 It is well known that the passive stereo system cannot adapt well to weak texture objects, e.g., white walls. However, these weak texture targets are very common in indoor environments. In this paper, we present a novel stereo system, which consists of two cameras (an RGB camera and an IR camera) and an IR speckle projector. The RGB camera is used both for depth estimation and texture acquisition. The IR camera and the speckle projector can form a monocular structured-light (MSL) subsystem, while the two cameras can form a binocular stereo subsystem. The depth map generated by the MSL subsystem can provide external guidance for the stereo matching networks, which can improve the matching accuracy significantly. In order to verify the effectiveness of the proposed system, we build a prototype and collect a test dataset in indoor scenes. The evaluation results show that the Bad 2.0 error of the proposed system is 28.2% of the passive stereo system when the network RAFT is used. The dataset and trained models are available at https://github.com/YuhuaXu/MonoStereoFusion. 众所周知，被动立体声系统不能很好地适应弱纹理物体，例如白墙。然而，这些弱纹理目标在室内环境中非常常见。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的立体系统，它由两个摄像头（一个 RGB 摄像头和一个红外摄像头）和一个红外散斑投影仪组成。 RGB 相机用于深度估计和纹理采集。红外相机和散斑投影仪可以形成单目结构光（MSL）子系统，而两个相机可以形成双目立体子系统。 MSL子系统生成的深度图可以为立体匹配网络提供外部指导，从而可以显着提高匹配精度。为了验证所提出系统的有效性，我们构建了一个原型并收集了室内场景的测试数据集。评估结果表明，当使用网络RAFT时，该系统的Bad 2.0误差是无源立体声系统的28.2%。数据集和训练模型可在 https://github.com/YuhuaXu/MonoStereoFusion 获取。 本文提出了一种结合双目立体视觉和单目结构光的新系统，以提高弱纹理物体的深度估计性能。 Yuhua Xu,Xiaoli Yang,Yushan Yu,Wei Jia,Zhaobi Chu,Yulan Guo cs.CV

authors_text: Canjie Luo,Lianwen Jin,Jingdong Chen
title: SimAN: Exploring Self-Supervised Representation Learning of Scene Text via Similarity-Aware Normalization
title_zh: SimAN：通过相似性感知归一化探索场景文本的自监督表示学习
abstract: Recently self-supervised representation learning has drawn considerable attention from the scene text recognition community. Different from previous studies using contrastive learning, we tackle the issue from an alternative perspective, i.e., by formulating the representation learning scheme in a generative manner. Typically, the neighboring image patches among one text line tend to have similar styles, including the strokes, textures, colors, etc. Motivated by this common sense, we augment one image patch and use its neighboring patch as guidance to recover itself. Specifically, we propose a Similarity-Aware Normalization (SimAN) module to identify the different patterns and align the corresponding styles from the guiding patch. In this way, the network gains representation capability for distinguishing complex patterns such as messy strokes and cluttered backgrounds. Experiments show that the proposed SimAN significantly improves the representation quality and achieves promising performance. Moreover, we surprisingly find that our self-supervised generative network has impressive potential for data synthesis, text image editing, and font interpolation, which suggests that the proposed SimAN has a wide range of practical applications.
summary: Recently self-supervised representation learning has drawn considerable attention from the scene text recognition community. Different from previous studies using contrastive learning, we tackle the issue from an alternative perspective, i.e., by formulating the representation learning scheme in a generative manner. Typically, the neighboring image patches among one text line tend to have similar styles, including the strokes, textures, colors, etc. Motivated by this common sense, we augment one image patch and use its neighboring patch as guidance to recover itself. Specifically, we propose a Similarity-Aware Normalization (SimAN) module to identify the different patterns and align the corresponding styles from the guiding patch. In this way, the network gains representation capability for distinguishing complex patterns such as messy strokes and cluttered backgrounds. Experiments show that the proposed SimAN significantly improves the representation quality and achieves promising performance. Moreover, we surprisingly find that our self-supervised generative network has impressive potential for data synthesis, text image editing, and font interpolation, which suggests that the proposed SimAN has a wide range of practical applications.
abstract_zh: 最近，自监督表示学习引起了场景文本识别社区的广泛关注。与之前使用对比学习的研究不同，我们从另一个角度解决这个问题，即通过以生成方式制定表示学习方案。通常，一个文本行中的相邻图像块往往具有相似的样式，包括笔画、纹理、颜色等。受这一常识的启发，我们增强一个图像块并使用其相邻块作为恢复自身的指导。具体来说，我们提出了一个相似性感知标准化（SimAN）模块来识别不同的模式并从引导补丁中对齐相应的样式。通过这种方式，网络获得了区分复杂模式（例如凌乱的笔画和杂乱的背景）的表示能力。实验表明，所提出的 SimAN 显着提高了表示质量并取得了良好的性能。此外，我们惊讶地发现我们的自监督生成网络在数据合成、文本图像编辑和字体插值方面具有令人印象深刻的潜力，这表明所提出的 SimAN 具有广泛的实际应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SimAN模块，通过相似性感知归一化方法，探索场景文本的自监督表征学习。
AI.motivation: 场景文本中相邻图像块通常具有相似的笔画、纹理和颜色等风格特征，利用这一特性可提升表征学习效果。
AI.method: 设计自监督生成式学习框架，通过增强图像块并利用相邻块作为引导进行恢复，提出相似性感知归一化（SimAN）模块实现风格对齐。
AI.result: SimAN显著提升表征质量，在文本识别任务中表现优异，并展现出数据合成、文本编辑和字体插值等应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: SimAN通过生成式自监督学习有效捕捉场景文本特征，为文本识别及图像生成任务提供了新的解决方案。

Different from previous studies using contrastive learning, we tackle the issue from an alternative perspective, i.e., by formulating the representation learning scheme in a generative manner. Experiments show that the proposed SimAN significantly improves the representation quality and achieves promising performance. authors_text: Jierun Chen,Tianlang He,Weipeng Zhuo,Li Ma,Sangtae Ha,S. -H. Gary Chan
title: TVConv: Efficient Translation Variant Convolution for Layout-aware Visual Processing
title_zh: TVConv：用于布局感知视觉处理的高效平移变体卷积
abstract: As convolution has empowered many smart applications, dynamic convolution further equips it with the ability to adapt to diverse inputs. However, the static and dynamic convolutions are either layout-agnostic or computation-heavy, making it inappropriate for layout-specific applications, e.g., face recognition and medical image segmentation. We observe that these applications naturally exhibit the characteristics of large intra-image (spatial) variance and small cross-image variance. This observation motivates our efficient translation variant convolution (TVConv) for layout-aware visual processing. Technically, TVConv is composed of affinity maps and a weight-generating block. While affinity maps depict pixel-paired relationships gracefully, the weight-generating block can be explicitly overparameterized for better training while maintaining efficient inference. Although conceptually simple, TVConv significantly improves the efficiency of the convolution and can be readily plugged into various network architectures. Extensive experiments on face recognition show that TVConv reduces the computational cost by up to 3.1x and improves the corresponding throughput by 2.3x while maintaining a high accuracy compared to the depthwise convolution. Moreover, for the same computation cost, we boost the mean accuracy by up to 4.21%. We also conduct experiments on the optic disc/cup segmentation task and obtain better generalization performance, which helps mitigate the critical data scarcity issue. Code is available at https://github.com/JierunChen/TVConv.
summary: As convolution has empowered many smart applications, dynamic convolution further equips it with the ability to adapt to diverse inputs. However, the static and dynamic convolutions are either layout-agnostic or computation-heavy, making it inappropriate for layout-specific applications, e.g., face recognition and medical image segmentation. We observe that these applications naturally exhibit the characteristics of large intra-image (spatial) variance and small cross-image variance. This observation motivates our efficient translation variant convolution (TVConv) for layout-aware visual processing. Technically, TVConv is composed of affinity maps and a weight-generating block. While affinity maps depict pixel-paired relationships gracefully, the weight-generating block can be explicitly overparameterized for better training while maintaining efficient inference. Although conceptually simple, TVConv significantly improves the efficiency of the convolution and can be readily plugged into various network architectures. Extensive experiments on face recognition show that TVConv reduces the computational cost by up to 3.1x and improves the corresponding throughput by 2.3x while maintaining a high accuracy compared to the depthwise convolution. Moreover, for the same computation cost, we boost the mean accuracy by up to 4.21%. We also conduct experiments on the optic disc/cup segmentation task and obtain better generalization performance, which helps mitigate the critical data scarcity issue. Code is available at https://github.com/JierunChen/TVConv.
abstract_zh: 正如卷积赋能了许多智能应用一样，动态卷积进一步使其具备了适应多样化输入的能力。然而，静态和动态卷积要么与布局无关，要么计算量大，这使得它不适合特定于布局的应用，例如人脸识别和医学图像分割。我们观察到这些应用自然地表现出图像内（空间）方差大和图像间方差小的特征。这一观察结果激发了我们使用高效的平移变体卷积（TVConv）来进行布局感知的视觉处理。从技术上讲，TVConv 由亲和力图和权重生成块组成。虽然亲和力图优雅地描绘了像素配对关系，但可以显式地过度参数化权重生成块，以实现更好的训练，同时保持高效的推理。尽管概念上很简单，TVConv 显着提高了卷积的效率，并且可以轻松插入到各种网络架构中。大量的人脸识别实验表明，与深度卷积相比，TVConv 在保持高精度的同时，计算成本降低了 3.1 倍，相应的吞吐量提高了 2.3 倍。此外，在相同的计算成本下，我们将平均准确率提高了 4.21%。我们还对视盘/视杯分割任务进行了实验，并获得了更好的泛化性能，这有助于缓解关键的数据稀缺问题。代码可在 https://github.com/JierunChen/TVConv 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效的翻译变体卷积（TVConv），用于布局感知的视觉处理，以解决传统卷积在计算效率和适应性上的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统静态和动态卷积无法有效处理布局敏感任务（如人脸识别和医学图像分割），这些任务具有大范围的图像内方差和小范围的图像间方差。
AI.method: TVConv由亲和力图和权重生成块组成，亲和力图捕捉像素间关系，权重生成块通过显式过参数化提升训练效率，同时保持推理轻量化。
AI.result: 在人脸识别任务中计算成本降低3.1倍，吞吐量提升2.3倍，准确率提升4.21%；在医学图像分割中显著提升泛化性能，缓解数据稀缺问题。
AI.conclusion: TVConv在保持高精度的同时显著提升计算效率，适用于多种网络架构，代码开源便于实际应用。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种高效的翻译变体卷积（TVConv），用于布局感知的视觉处理，以解决传统卷积在计算效率和适应性上的不足。

ai_content.conclusion: TVConv在保持高精度的同时显著提升计算效率，适用于多种网络架构，代码开源便于实际应用。

search_text: TVConv: Efficient Translation Variant Convolution for Layout-aware Visual Processing TVConv：用于布局感知视觉处理的高效平移变体卷积 As convolution has empowered many smart applications, dynamic convolution further equips it with the ability to adapt to diverse inputs. However, the static and dynamic convolutions are either layout-agnostic or computation-heavy, making it inappropriate for layout-specific applications, e.g., face recognition and medical image segmentation. We observe that these applications naturally exhibit the characteristics of large intra-image (spatial) variance and small cross-image variance. This observation motivates our efficient translation variant convolution (TVConv) for layout-aware visual processing. Technically, TVConv is composed of affinity maps and a weight-generating block. While affinity maps depict pixel-paired relationships gracefully, the weight-generating block can be explicitly overparameterized for better training while maintaining efficient inference. Although conceptually simple, TVConv significantly improves the efficiency of the convolution and can be readily plugged into various network architectures. Extensive experiments on face recognition show that TVConv reduces the computational cost by up to 3.1x and improves the corresponding throughput by 2.3x while maintaining a high accuracy compared to the depthwise convolution. Moreover, for the same computation cost, we boost the mean accuracy by up to 4.21%. We also conduct experiments on the optic disc/cup segmentation task and obtain better generalization performance, which helps mitigate the critical data scarcity issue. Code is available at https://github.com/JierunChen/TVConv. 正如卷积赋能了许多智能应用一样，动态卷积进一步使其具备了适应多样化输入的能力。然而，静态和动态卷积要么与布局无关，要么计算量大，这使得它不适合特定于布局的应用，例如人脸识别和医学图像分割。我们观察到这些应用自然地表现出图像内（空间）方差大和图像间方差小的特征。这一观察结果激发了我们使用高效的平移变体卷积（TVConv）来进行布局感知的视觉处理。从技术上讲，TVConv 由亲和力图和权重生成块组成。虽然亲和力图优雅地描绘了像素配对关系，但可以显式地过度参数化权重生成块，以实现更好的训练，同时保持高效的推理。尽管概念上很简单，TVConv 显着提高了卷积的效率，并且可以轻松插入到各种网络架构中。大量的人脸识别实验表明，与深度卷积相比，TVConv 在保持高精度的同时，计算成本降低了 3.1 倍，相应的吞吐量提高了 2.3 倍。此外，在相同的计算成本下，我们将平均准确率提高了 4.21%。我们还对视盘/视杯分割任务进行了实验，并获得了更好的泛化性能，这有助于缓解关键的数据稀缺问题。代码可在 https://github.com/JierunChen/TVConv 获取。 提出一种高效的翻译变体卷积（TVConv），用于布局感知的视觉处理，以解决传统卷积在计算效率和适应性上的不足。 Jierun Chen,Tianlang He,Weipeng Zhuo,Li Ma,Sangtae Ha,S. -H. Gary Chan cs.CV

authors_text: Eric Heiden,Ziang Liu,Vibhav Vineet,Erwin Coumans,Gaurav S. Sukhatme
title: Inferring Articulated Rigid Body Dynamics from RGBD Video
title_zh: 从 RGBD 视频推断铰接式刚体动力学
abstract: Being able to reproduce physical phenomena ranging from light interaction to contact mechanics, simulators are becoming increasingly useful in more and more application domains where real-world interaction or labeled data are difficult to obtain. Despite recent progress, significant human effort is needed to configure simulators to accurately reproduce real-world behavior. We introduce a pipeline that combines inverse rendering with differentiable simulation to create digital twins of real-world articulated mechanisms from depth or RGB videos. Our approach automatically discovers joint types and estimates their kinematic parameters, while the dynamic properties of the overall mechanism are tuned to attain physically accurate simulations. Control policies optimized in our derived simulation transfer successfully back to the original system, as we demonstrate on a simulated system. Further, our approach accurately reconstructs the kinematic tree of an articulated mechanism being manipulated by a robot, and highly nonlinear dynamics of a real-world coupled pendulum mechanism. Website: https://eric-heiden.github.io/video2sim
summary: Being able to reproduce physical phenomena ranging from light interaction to contact mechanics, simulators are becoming increasingly useful in more and more application domains where real-world interaction or labeled data are difficult to obtain. Despite recent progress, significant human effort is needed to configure simulators to accurately reproduce real-world behavior. We introduce a pipeline that combines inverse rendering with differentiable simulation to create digital twins of real-world articulated mechanisms from depth or RGB videos. Our approach automatically discovers joint types and estimates their kinematic parameters, while the dynamic properties of the overall mechanism are tuned to attain physically accurate simulations. Control policies optimized in our derived simulation transfer successfully back to the original system, as we demonstrate on a simulated system. Further, our approach accurately reconstructs the kinematic tree of an articulated mechanism being manipulated by a robot, and highly nonlinear dynamics of a real-world coupled pendulum mechanism. Website: https://eric-heiden.github.io/video2sim
abstract_zh: 由于能够再现从光交互到接触力学的物理现象，模拟器在越来越多难以获得现实世界交互或标记数据的应用领域中变得越来越有用。尽管最近取得了进展，但仍需要大量的人力来配置模拟器以准确地再现现实世界的行为。我们引入了一种将逆向渲染与可微分模拟相结合的管道，以根据深度或 RGB 视频创建现实世界铰接机构的数字孪生。我们的方法自动发现关节类型并估计其运动学参数，同时调整整个机构的动态属性以获得物理上精确的模拟。正如我们在模拟系统上演示的那样，在我们的派生模拟中优化的控制策略成功地传输回原始系统。此外，我们的方法准确地重建了机器人操纵的铰接机构的运动树，以及现实世界耦合摆机构的高度非线性动力学。网站：https://eric-heiden.github.io/video2sim

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合逆向渲染与可微分模拟的管道，通过RGBD视频推断现实世界中关节机械结构的动力学参数，生成数字孪生模型。
AI.motivation: 现有模拟器需大量人工配置才能准确复现现实物理行为，且难以自动推断复杂机械系统的动力学特性。
AI.method: 融合逆向渲染与可微分模拟技术，自动识别关节类型并估计运动学参数，通过优化动态属性实现物理精确的仿真。
AI.result: 成功将优化的控制策略迁移至真实系统，在机器人操控的关节机构及真实耦合摆系统中实现了高精度的运动学树重建与非线性动力学模拟。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了从视频数据自动构建物理精确的数字孪生系统，为缺乏标注数据的场景提供了高效的仿真解决方案。

authors_text: Ben Perach,Ronny Ronen,Benny Kimelfeld,Shahar Kvatinsky
title: Understanding Bulk-Bitwise Processing In-Memory Through Database Analytics
title_zh: 通过数据库分析了解内存中的批量按位处理
comment: published in IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computing
comments: published in IEEE Transactions on Emerging Topics in Computing
abstract: Bulk-bitwise processing-in-memory (PIM), where large bitwise operations are performed in parallel by the memory array itself, is an emerging form of computation with the potential to mitigate the memory wall problem. This paper examines the capabilities of bulk-bitwise PIM by constructing PIMDB, a fully-digital system based on memristive stateful logic, utilizing and focusing on in-memory bulk-bitwise operations, designed to accelerate a real-life workload: analytical processing of relational databases. We introduce a host processor programming model to support bulk-bitwise PIM in virtual memory, develop techniques to efficiently perform in-memory filtering and aggregation operations, and adapt the application data set into the memory. To understand bulk-bitwise PIM, we compare it to an equivalent in-memory database on the same host system. We show that bulk-bitwise PIM substantially lowers the number of required memory read operations, thus accelerating TPC-H filter operations by 1.6$\times$--18$\times$ and full queries by 56$\times$--608$\times$, while reducing the energy consumption by 1.7$\times$--18.6$\times$ and 0.81$\times$--12$\times$ for these benchmarks, respectively. Our extensive evaluation uses the gem5 full-system simulation environment. The simulations also evaluate cell endurance, showing that the required endurance is within the range of existing endurance of RRAM devices.
summary: Bulk-bitwise processing-in-memory (PIM), where large bitwise operations are performed in parallel by the memory array itself, is an emerging form of computation with the potential to mitigate the memory wall problem. This paper examines the capabilities of bulk-bitwise PIM by constructing PIMDB, a fully-digital system based on memristive stateful logic, utilizing and focusing on in-memory bulk-bitwise operations, designed to accelerate a real-life workload: analytical processing of relational databases. We introduce a host processor programming model to support bulk-bitwise PIM in virtual memory, develop techniques to efficiently perform in-memory filtering and aggregation operations, and adapt the application data set into the memory. To understand bulk-bitwise PIM, we compare it to an equivalent in-memory database on the same host system. We show that bulk-bitwise PIM substantially lowers the number of required memory read operations, thus accelerating TPC-H filter operations by 1.6$\times$--18$\times$ and full queries by 56$\times$--608$\times$, while reducing the energy consumption by 1.7$\times$--18.6$\times$ and 0.81$\times$--12$\times$ for these benchmarks, respectively. Our extensive evaluation uses the gem5 full-system simulation environment. The simulations also evaluate cell endurance, showing that the required endurance is within the range of existing endurance of RRAM devices.
abstract_zh: 内存中的批量按位处理 (PIM) 是一种新兴的计算形式，具有缓解内存墙问题的潜力，其中大量按位运算由内存阵列本身并行执行。本文通过构建 PIMDB（一个基于忆阻状态逻辑的全数字系统）来研究批量按位 PIM 的功能，利用并重点关注内存中批量按位操作，旨在加速现实生活中的工作负载：关系数据库的分析处理。我们引入了一种主机处理器编程模型来支持虚拟内存中的批量按位 PIM，开发有效执行内存中过滤和聚合操作的技术，并将应用程序数据集调整到内存中。为了理解批量按位 PIM，我们将其与同一主机系统上的等效内存数据库进行比较。我们表明，批量按位 PIM 大大降低了所需的内存读取操作数量，从而将 TPC-H 过滤操作加速 1.6$\times$--18$\times$，将完整查询加速 56$\times$--608$\times$，同时将能耗降低 1.7$\times$--18.6$\times$ 和 0.81$\times$--12$\times$分别是这些基准。我们的广泛评估使用gem5全系统模拟环境。模拟还评估了单元的耐用性，表明所需的耐用性在 RRAM 器件现有耐用性的范围内。

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建基于忆阻器状态逻辑的PIMDB系统，研究批量位操作内存计算在数据库分析中的性能与能效表现。
AI.motivation: 传统内存墙问题限制了计算性能，而批量位操作内存计算（PIM）可能通过在内存阵列中并行执行位运算来突破这一限制。
AI.method: 设计支持虚拟内存的主机编程模型，开发内存内过滤与聚合技术，将数据库工作负载适配至内存，并通过gem5模拟器对比传统内存数据库性能。
AI.result: TPC-H过滤操作加速1.6-18倍，完整查询加速56-608倍，能耗降低1.7-18.6倍，且忆阻器耐久性满足现有设备标准。
AI.conclusion: 批量位操作PIM能显著提升数据库处理性能与能效，且技术可行性已通过现有RRAM器件验证。

conclusion: 批量位操作PIM能显著提升数据库处理性能与能效，且技术可行性已通过现有RRAM器件验证。
search_text: Understanding Bulk-Bitwise Processing In-Memory Through Database Analytics 通过数据库分析了解内存中的批量按位处理 Bulk-bitwise processing-in-memory (PIM), where large bitwise operations are performed in parallel by the memory array itself, is an emerging form of computation with the potential to mitigate the memory wall problem. This paper examines the capabilities of bulk-bitwise PIM by constructing PIMDB, a fully-digital system based on memristive stateful logic, utilizing and focusing on in-memory bulk-bitwise operations, designed to accelerate a real-life workload: analytical processing of relational databases. We introduce a host processor programming model to support bulk-bitwise PIM in virtual memory, develop techniques to efficiently perform in-memory filtering and aggregation operations, and adapt the application data set into the memory. To understand bulk-bitwise PIM, we compare it to an equivalent in-memory database on the same host system. We show that bulk-bitwise PIM substantially lowers the number of required memory read operations, thus accelerating TPC-H filter operations by 1.6$\times$--18$\times$ and full queries by 56$\times$--608$\times$, while reducing the energy consumption by 1.7$\times$--18.6$\times$ and 0.81$\times$--12$\times$ for these benchmarks, respectively. Our extensive evaluation uses the gem5 full-system simulation environment. The simulations also evaluate cell endurance, showing that the required endurance is within the range of existing endurance of RRAM devices. 内存中的批量按位处理 (PIM) 是一种新兴的计算形式，具有缓解内存墙问题的潜力，其中大量按位运算由内存阵列本身并行执行。本文通过构建 PIMDB（一个基于忆阻状态逻辑的全数字系统）来研究批量按位 PIM 的功能，利用并重点关注内存中批量按位操作，旨在加速现实生活中的工作负载：关系数据库的分析处理。我们引入了一种主机处理器编程模型来支持虚拟内存中的批量按位 PIM，开发有效执行内存中过滤和聚合操作的技术，并将应用程序数据集调整到内存中。为了理解批量按位 PIM，我们将其与同一主机系统上的等效内存数据库进行比较。我们表明，批量按位 PIM 大大降低了所需的内存读取操作数量，从而将 TPC-H 过滤操作加速 1.6$\times$--18$\times$，将完整查询加速 56$\times$--608$\times$，同时将能耗降低 1.7$\times$--18.6$\times$ 和 0.81$\times$--12$\times$分别是这些基准。我们的广泛评估使用gem5全系统模拟环境。模拟还评估了单元的耐用性，表明所需的耐用性在 RRAM 器件现有耐用性的范围内。 本文通过构建基于忆阻器状态逻辑的PIMDB系统，研究批量位操作内存计算在数据库分析中的性能与能效表现。 Ben Perach,Ronny Ronen,Benny Kimelfeld,Shahar Kvatinsky cs.AR,cs.ET

authors_text: Shaoxiong Feng,Xuancheng Ren,Kan Li,Xu Sun
title: Hierarchical Inductive Transfer for Continual Dialogue Learning
title_zh: 用于持续对话学习的分层归纳迁移
abstract: Pre-trained models have achieved excellent performance on the dialogue task. However, for the continual increase of online chit-chat scenarios, directly fine-tuning these models for each of the new tasks not only explodes the capacity of the dialogue system on the embedded devices but also causes knowledge forgetting on pre-trained models and knowledge interference among diverse dialogue tasks. In this work, we propose a hierarchical inductive transfer framework to learn and deploy the dialogue skills continually and efficiently. First, we introduce the adapter module into pre-trained models for learning new dialogue tasks. As the only trainable module, it is beneficial for the dialogue system on the embedded devices to acquire new dialogue skills with negligible additional parameters. Then, for alleviating knowledge interference between tasks yet benefiting the regularization between them, we further design hierarchical inductive transfer that enables new tasks to use general knowledge in the base adapter without being misled by diverse knowledge in task-specific adapters. Empirical evaluation and analysis indicate that our framework obtains comparable performance under deployment-friendly model capacity.
summary: Pre-trained models have achieved excellent performance on the dialogue task. However, for the continual increase of online chit-chat scenarios, directly fine-tuning these models for each of the new tasks not only explodes the capacity of the dialogue system on the embedded devices but also causes knowledge forgetting on pre-trained models and knowledge interference among diverse dialogue tasks. In this work, we propose a hierarchical inductive transfer framework to learn and deploy the dialogue skills continually and efficiently. First, we introduce the adapter module into pre-trained models for learning new dialogue tasks. As the only trainable module, it is beneficial for the dialogue system on the embedded devices to acquire new dialogue skills with negligible additional parameters. Then, for alleviating knowledge interference between tasks yet benefiting the regularization between them, we further design hierarchical inductive transfer that enables new tasks to use general knowledge in the base adapter without being misled by diverse knowledge in task-specific adapters. Empirical evaluation and analysis indicate that our framework obtains comparable performance under deployment-friendly model capacity.
abstract_zh: 预训练模型在对话任务上取得了优异的表现。然而，随着在线聊天场景的不断增加，直接针对每个新任务对这些模型进行微调不仅会爆炸嵌入式设备上对话系统的容量，还会导致预训练模型的知识遗忘以及不同对话任务之间的知识干扰。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个分层归纳迁移框架来持续有效地学习和部署对话技能。首先，我们将适配器模块引入到预训练模型中，以学习新的对话任务。作为唯一可训练的模块，有利于嵌入式设备上的对话系统以可忽略的附加参数获得新的对话技能。然后，为了减轻任务之间的知识干扰，同时有利于它们之间的正则化，我们进一步设计了分层归纳迁移，使新任务能够使用基础适配器中的通用知识，而不会被特定于任务的适配器中的不同知识所误导。实证评估和分析表明，我们的框架在部署友好的模型容量下获得了可比的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层归纳迁移框架，用于在连续对话学习中高效且持续地学习和部署对话技能。
AI.motivation: 预训练模型在对话任务中表现优异，但直接微调会导致嵌入式设备模型容量爆炸，并引发知识遗忘和任务间干扰问题。
AI.method: 引入适配器模块作为唯一可训练组件以学习新任务，设计分层归纳迁移机制使新任务利用基础适配器的通用知识而不受任务特定适配器干扰。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在保持模型容量友好的同时实现了与现有方法相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 分层归纳迁移框架有效平衡了持续学习中的模型效率与知识迁移能力，为嵌入式对话系统提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Akshay Malhotra,Dhananjay Singh,Tushar Dadlani,Luis Yoichi Morales
title: Optimizing Camera Placements for Overlapped Coverage with 3D Camera Projections
title_zh: 优化相机放置以实现 3D 相机投影的重叠覆盖
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, 2022 International Conference on Robotics and Automation
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures, 2022 International Conference on Robotics and Automation
abstract: This paper proposes a method to compute camera 6Dof poses to achieve a user defined coverage. The camera placement problem is modeled as a combinatorial optimization where given the maximum number of cameras, a camera set is selected from a larger pool of possible camera poses. We propose to minimize the squared error between the desired and the achieved coverage, and formulate the non-linear cost function as a mixed integer linear programming problem. A camera lens model is utilized to project the cameras view on a 3D voxel map to compute a coverage score which makes the optimization problem in real environments tractable. Experimental results in two real retail store environments demonstrate the better performance of the proposed formulation in terms of coverage and overlap for triangulation compared to existing methods.
summary: This paper proposes a method to compute camera 6Dof poses to achieve a user defined coverage. The camera placement problem is modeled as a combinatorial optimization where given the maximum number of cameras, a camera set is selected from a larger pool of possible camera poses. We propose to minimize the squared error between the desired and the achieved coverage, and formulate the non-linear cost function as a mixed integer linear programming problem. A camera lens model is utilized to project the cameras view on a 3D voxel map to compute a coverage score which makes the optimization problem in real environments tractable. Experimental results in two real retail store environments demonstrate the better performance of the proposed formulation in terms of coverage and overlap for triangulation compared to existing methods.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种计算相机 6Dof 位姿以实现用户定义的覆盖范围的方法。相机放置问题被建模为组合优化，其中给定相机的最大数量，从更大的可能相机姿势池中选择相机组。我们建议最小化期望覆盖率和实现覆盖率之间的平方误差，并将非线性成本函数公式化为混合整数线性规划问题。利用相机镜头模型将相机视图投影到 3D 体素图上，以计算覆盖分数，从而使实际环境中的优化问题变得易于处理。两个真实零售店环境中的实验结果表明，与现有方法相比，所提出的公式在三角测量的覆盖范围和重叠方面具有更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D相机投影的相机6自由度姿态优化方法，以实现用户定义的覆盖范围。
AI.motivation: 现有相机部署方法在覆盖范围和重叠区域优化方面存在不足，需解决实际场景中复杂覆盖需求与计算可行性之间的矛盾。
AI.method: 将相机放置建模为组合优化问题，通过混合整数线性规划最小化期望覆盖与实际覆盖的平方误差，并利用3D体素地图计算覆盖分数。
AI.result: 在两个真实零售场景测试中，该方法在覆盖完整性与重叠区域优化方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的优化框架能有效平衡覆盖质量与计算复杂度，适用于需要精确覆盖控制的实际部署场景。

authors_text: Dazhen Deng,Weiwei Cui,Xiyu Meng,Mengye Xu,Yu Liao,Haidong Zhang,Yingcai Wu
title: Revisiting the Design Patterns of Composite Visualizations
title_zh: 重新审视复合可视化的设计模式
abstract: Composite visualization is a popular design strategy that represents complex datasets by integrating multiple visualizations in a meaningful and aesthetic layout, such as juxtaposition, overlay, and nesting. With this strategy, numerous novel designs have been proposed in visualization publications to accomplish various visual analytic tasks. These well-crafted composite visualizations have formed a valuable collection for designers and researchers to address real-world problems and inspire new research topics and designs. However, there is a lack of understanding of design patterns of composite visualization, thus failing to provide holistic design space and concrete examples for practical use. In this paper, we opted to revisit the composite visualizations in VIS publications and answered what and how visualizations of different types are composed together. To achieve this, we first constructed a corpus of composite visualizations from IEEE VIS publications and decomposed them into a series of basic visualization types (e.g., bar chart, map, and matrix). With this corpus, we studied the spatial (e.g., separated or overlaying) and semantic relationships (e.g., with same types or shared axis) between visualizations and proposed a taxonomy consisting of eight different design patterns (e.g., repeated, stacked, accompanied, and nested). Furthermore, we analyzed and discussed common practices of composite visualizations, such as the distribution of different patterns and correlations between visualization types. From the analysis and examples, we obtained insights into different design patterns on the utilities, advantages, and disadvantages. Finally, we developed an interactive system to help visualization developers and researchers conveniently explore collected examples and design patterns.
summary: Composite visualization is a popular design strategy that represents complex datasets by integrating multiple visualizations in a meaningful and aesthetic layout, such as juxtaposition, overlay, and nesting. With this strategy, numerous novel designs have been proposed in visualization publications to accomplish various visual analytic tasks. These well-crafted composite visualizations have formed a valuable collection for designers and researchers to address real-world problems and inspire new research topics and designs. However, there is a lack of understanding of design patterns of composite visualization, thus failing to provide holistic design space and concrete examples for practical use. In this paper, we opted to revisit the composite visualizations in VIS publications and answered what and how visualizations of different types are composed together. To achieve this, we first constructed a corpus of composite visualizations from IEEE VIS publications and decomposed them into a series of basic visualization types (e.g., bar chart, map, and matrix). With this corpus, we studied the spatial (e.g., separated or overlaying) and semantic relationships (e.g., with same types or shared axis) between visualizations and proposed a taxonomy consisting of eight different design patterns (e.g., repeated, stacked, accompanied, and nested). Furthermore, we analyzed and discussed common practices of composite visualizations, such as the distribution of different patterns and correlations between visualization types. From the analysis and examples, we obtained insights into different design patterns on the utilities, advantages, and disadvantages. Finally, we developed an interactive system to help visualization developers and researchers conveniently explore collected examples and design patterns.
abstract_zh: 复合可视化是一种流行的设计策略，它通过将多个可视化集成到有意义且美观的布局中来表示复杂的数据集，例如并置、叠加和嵌套。通过这种策略，可视化出版物中提出了许多新颖的设计来完成各种视觉分析任务。这些精心制作的复合可视化为设计师和研究人员提供了有价值的集合，以解决现实世界的问题并激发新的研究主题和设计。然而，缺乏对复合可视化设计模式的理解，无法提供整体的设计空间和实际使用的具体示例。在本文中，我们选择重新审视 VIS 出版物中的复合可视化，并回答不同类型的可视化是如何组合在一起的以及如何组合在一起。为了实现这一目标，我们首先从 IEEE VIS 出版物构建了一个复合可视化语料库，并将它们分解为一系列基本可视化类型（例如条形图、地图和矩阵）。通过这个语料库，我们研究了可视化之间的空间关系（例如，分离或重叠）和语义关系（例如，具有相同类型或共享轴），并提出了由八种不同设计模式（例如，重复、堆叠、伴随和嵌套）组成的分类法。此外，我们分析和讨论了复合可视化的常见做法，例如不同模式的分布以及可视化类型之间的相关性。通过分析和示例，我们深入了解了不同设计模式的实用性、优点和缺点。最后，我们开发了一个交互式系统，帮助可视化开发人员和研究人员方便地探索收集的示例和设计模式。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在分析复合可视化的设计模式，构建语料库，提出分类法，并开发交互系统以支持设计探索。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对复合可视化设计模式的系统理解，无法提供全面的设计空间和实际应用案例，需通过分析总结模式以指导实践。
AI.method: 通过构建IEEE VIS出版物的复合可视化语料库，分解为基本可视化类型，分析其空间与语义关系，提出八种设计模式，并开发交互系统。
AI.result: 提出八种设计模式，分析常见实践及可视化类型关联，总结各模式的优缺点，并开发交互系统支持探索。
AI.conclusion: 本研究填补了复合可视化设计模式理解的空白，为实际应用和未来研究提供了系统框架与工具支持。

search_text: Revisiting the Design Patterns of Composite Visualizations 重新审视复合可视化的设计模式 Composite visualization is a popular design strategy that represents complex datasets by integrating multiple visualizations in a meaningful and aesthetic layout, such as juxtaposition, overlay, and nesting. With this strategy, numerous novel designs have been proposed in visualization publications to accomplish various visual analytic tasks. These well-crafted composite visualizations have formed a valuable collection for designers and researchers to address real-world problems and inspire new research topics and designs. However, there is a lack of understanding of design patterns of composite visualization, thus failing to provide holistic design space and concrete examples for practical use. In this paper, we opted to revisit the composite visualizations in VIS publications and answered what and how visualizations of different types are composed together. To achieve this, we first constructed a corpus of composite visualizations from IEEE VIS publications and decomposed them into a series of basic visualization types (e.g., bar chart, map, and matrix). With this corpus, we studied the spatial (e.g., separated or overlaying) and semantic relationships (e.g., with same types or shared axis) between visualizations and proposed a taxonomy consisting of eight different design patterns (e.g., repeated, stacked, accompanied, and nested). Furthermore, we analyzed and discussed common practices of composite visualizations, such as the distribution of different patterns and correlations between visualization types. From the analysis and examples, we obtained insights into different design patterns on the utilities, advantages, and disadvantages. Finally, we developed an interactive system to help visualization developers and researchers conveniently explore collected examples and design patterns. 复合可视化是一种流行的设计策略，它通过将多个可视化集成到有意义且美观的布局中来表示复杂的数据集，例如并置、叠加和嵌套。通过这种策略，可视化出版物中提出了许多新颖的设计来完成各种视觉分析任务。这些精心制作的复合可视化为设计师和研究人员提供了有价值的集合，以解决现实世界的问题并激发新的研究主题和设计。然而，缺乏对复合可视化设计模式的理解，无法提供整体的设计空间和实际使用的具体示例。在本文中，我们选择重新审视 VIS 出版物中的复合可视化，并回答不同类型的可视化是如何组合在一起的以及如何组合在一起。为了实现这一目标，我们首先从 IEEE VIS 出版物构建了一个复合可视化语料库，并将它们分解为一系列基本可视化类型（例如条形图、地图和矩阵）。通过这个语料库，我们研究了可视化之间的空间关系（例如，分离或重叠）和语义关系（例如，具有相同类型或共享轴），并提出了由八种不同设计模式（例如，重复、堆叠、伴随和嵌套）组成的分类法。此外，我们分析和讨论了复合可视化的常见做法，例如不同模式的分布以及可视化类型之间的相关性。通过分析和示例，我们深入了解了不同设计模式的实用性、优点和缺点。最后，我们开发了一个交互式系统，帮助可视化开发人员和研究人员方便地探索收集的示例和设计模式。 本文旨在分析复合可视化的设计模式，构建语料库，提出分类法，并开发交互系统以支持设计探索。 Dazhen Deng,Weiwei Cui,Xiyu Meng,Mengye Xu,Yu Liao,Haidong Zhang,Yingcai Wu cs.HC

authors_text: Junfeng Lyu,Zhibo Wang,Feng Xu
title: Portrait Eyeglasses and Shadow Removal by Leveraging 3D Synthetic Data
title_zh: 利用 3D 合成数据进行人像眼镜和阴影去除
abstract: In portraits, eyeglasses may occlude facial regions and generate cast shadows on faces, which degrades the performance of many techniques like face verification and expression recognition. Portrait eyeglasses removal is critical in handling these problems. However, completely removing the eyeglasses is challenging because the lighting effects (e.g., cast shadows) caused by them are often complex. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to remove eyeglasses as well as their cast shadows from face images. The method works in a detect-then-remove manner, in which eyeglasses and cast shadows are both detected and then removed from images. Due to the lack of paired data for supervised training, we present a new synthetic portrait dataset with both intermediate and final supervisions for both the detection and removal tasks. Furthermore, we apply a cross-domain technique to fill the gap between the synthetic and real data. To the best of our knowledge, the proposed technique is the first to remove eyeglasses and their cast shadows simultaneously. The code and synthetic dataset are available at https://github.com/StoryMY/take-off-eyeglasses.
summary: In portraits, eyeglasses may occlude facial regions and generate cast shadows on faces, which degrades the performance of many techniques like face verification and expression recognition. Portrait eyeglasses removal is critical in handling these problems. However, completely removing the eyeglasses is challenging because the lighting effects (e.g., cast shadows) caused by them are often complex. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to remove eyeglasses as well as their cast shadows from face images. The method works in a detect-then-remove manner, in which eyeglasses and cast shadows are both detected and then removed from images. Due to the lack of paired data for supervised training, we present a new synthetic portrait dataset with both intermediate and final supervisions for both the detection and removal tasks. Furthermore, we apply a cross-domain technique to fill the gap between the synthetic and real data. To the best of our knowledge, the proposed technique is the first to remove eyeglasses and their cast shadows simultaneously. The code and synthetic dataset are available at https://github.com/StoryMY/take-off-eyeglasses.
abstract_zh: 在肖像中，眼镜可能会遮挡面部区域并在面部产生投射阴影，这会降低面部验证和表情识别等许多技术的性能。摘除肖像眼镜对于解决这些问题至关重要。然而，完全摘除眼镜具有挑战性，因为它们引起的照明效果（例如投射阴影）通常很复杂。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架来去除眼镜及其从面部图像中投射的阴影。该方法以“检测然后删除”的方式工作，即检测眼镜和投射阴影，然后从图像中删除。由于缺乏用于监督训练的配对数据，我们提出了一个新的合成肖像数据集，其中包含用于检测和删除任务的中间和最终监督。此外，我们应用跨域技术来填补合成数据和真实数据之间的差距。据我们所知，所提出的技术是第一个同时去除眼镜及其投射阴影的技术。代码和合成数据集可在 https://github.com/StoryMY/take-off-eyeglasses 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D合成数据的框架，用于同时移除人像中的眼镜及其投射阴影。
AI.motivation: 眼镜遮挡面部及产生的阴影会干扰人脸识别等任务，但现有方法难以完整移除复杂阴影且缺乏配对训练数据。
AI.method: 采用检测-移除两阶段框架，构建包含中间监督和最终监督的合成数据集，并应用跨域技术弥合合成数据与真实数据的差异。
AI.result: 首次实现眼镜与阴影的同步移除，代码和合成数据集已开源，有效提升人像处理效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过合成数据与跨域优化解决了数据不足问题，为眼镜阴影移除任务提供了新思路和实用工具。
