authors_text: Jinlong Xue,Yayue Deng,Yichen Han,Ya Li,Jianqing Sun,Jiaen Liang
title: ECAPA-TDNN for Multi-speaker Text-to-speech Synthesis
title_zh: 用于多说话人文本转语音合成的 ECAPA-TDNN
abstract: In recent years, neural network based methods for multi-speaker text-to-speech synthesis (TTS) have made significant progress. However, the current speaker encoder models used in these methods still cannot capture enough speaker information. In this paper, we focus on accurate speaker encoder modeling and propose an end-to-end method that can generate high-quality speech and better similarity for both seen and unseen speakers. The proposed architecture consists of three separately trained components: a speaker encoder based on the state-of-the-art ECAPA-TDNN model which is derived from speaker verification task, a FastSpeech2 based synthesizer, and a HiFi-GAN vocoder. The comparison among different speaker encoder models shows our proposed method can achieve better naturalness and similarity. To efficiently evaluate our synthesized speech, we are the first to adopt deep learning based automatic MOS evaluation methods to assess our results, and these methods show great potential in automatic speech quality assessment.
summary: In recent years, neural network based methods for multi-speaker text-to-speech synthesis (TTS) have made significant progress. However, the current speaker encoder models used in these methods still cannot capture enough speaker information. In this paper, we focus on accurate speaker encoder modeling and propose an end-to-end method that can generate high-quality speech and better similarity for both seen and unseen speakers. The proposed architecture consists of three separately trained components: a speaker encoder based on the state-of-the-art ECAPA-TDNN model which is derived from speaker verification task, a FastSpeech2 based synthesizer, and a HiFi-GAN vocoder. The comparison among different speaker encoder models shows our proposed method can achieve better naturalness and similarity. To efficiently evaluate our synthesized speech, we are the first to adopt deep learning based automatic MOS evaluation methods to assess our results, and these methods show great potential in automatic speech quality assessment.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于神经网络的多说话人文本到语音合成（TTS）方法取得了重大进展。然而，这些方法中使用的当前说话人编码器模型仍然无法捕获足够的说话人信息。在本文中，我们专注于准确的说话人编码器建模，并提出了一种端到端方法，可以为见过和看不见的说话人生成高质量的语音和更好的相似性。所提出的架构由三个单独训练的组件组成：基于最先进的 ECAPA-TDNN 模型（源自说话人验证任务）的说话人编码器、基于 FastSpeech2 的合成器和 HiFi-GAN 声码器。不同说话人编码器模型之间的比较表明我们提出的方法可以实现更好的自然度和相似度。为了有效地评估我们的合成语音，我们率先采用基于深度学习的自动MOS评估方法来评估我们的结果，这些方法在自动语音质量评估方面显示出巨大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于ECAPA-TDNN的多说话人文本到语音合成方法，旨在提升说话人信息编码的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有说话人编码模型无法充分捕捉多说话人语音特征，导致合成语音的质量和相似度不足。
AI.method: 采用ECAPA-TDNN作为说话人编码器，结合FastSpeech2合成器和HiFi-GAN声码器，构建端到端系统，并引入深度学习自动MOS评估方法。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在自然度和说话人相似度上优于现有模型，自动评估方法展现出良好的语音质量评估潜力。
AI.conclusion: ECAPA-TDNN编码器有效提升了多说话人TTS性能，自动MOS评估方法为语音质量分析提供了新方向。

ai_content_json.conclusion: ECAPA-TDNN编码器有效提升了多说话人TTS性能，自动MOS评估方法为语音质量分析提供了新方向。

search_text: ECAPA-TDNN for Multi-speaker Text-to-speech Synthesis 用于多说话人文本转语音合成的 ECAPA-TDNN In recent years, neural network based methods for multi-speaker text-to-speech synthesis (TTS) have made significant progress. However, the current speaker encoder models used in these methods still cannot capture enough speaker information. In this paper, we focus on accurate speaker encoder modeling and propose an end-to-end method that can generate high-quality speech and better similarity for both seen and unseen speakers. The proposed architecture consists of three separately trained components: a speaker encoder based on the state-of-the-art ECAPA-TDNN model which is derived from speaker verification task, a FastSpeech2 based synthesizer, and a HiFi-GAN vocoder. The comparison among different speaker encoder models shows our proposed method can achieve better naturalness and similarity. To efficiently evaluate our synthesized speech, we are the first to adopt deep learning based automatic MOS evaluation methods to assess our results, and these methods show great potential in automatic speech quality assessment. 近年来，基于神经网络的多说话人文本到语音合成（TTS）方法取得了重大进展。然而，这些方法中使用的当前说话人编码器模型仍然无法捕获足够的说话人信息。在本文中，我们专注于准确的说话人编码器建模，并提出了一种端到端方法，可以为见过和看不见的说话人生成高质量的语音和更好的相似性。所提出的架构由三个单独训练的组件组成：基于最先进的 ECAPA-TDNN 模型（源自说话人验证任务）的说话人编码器、基于 FastSpeech2 的合成器和 HiFi-GAN 声码器。不同说话人编码器模型之间的比较表明我们提出的方法可以实现更好的自然度和相似度。为了有效地评估我们的合成语音，我们率先采用基于深度学习的自动MOS评估方法来评估我们的结果，这些方法在自动语音质量评估方面显示出巨大的潜力。 本文提出一种基于ECAPA-TDNN的多说话人文本到语音合成方法，旨在提升说话人信息编码的准确性。 Jinlong Xue,Yayue Deng,Yichen Han,Ya Li,Jianqing Sun,Jiaen Liang cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Francesc Wilhelmi,Jernej Hribar,Selim F. Yilmaz,Emre Ozfatura,Kerem Ozfatura,Ozlem Yildiz,Deniz Gündüz,Hao Chen,Xiaoying Ye,Lizhao You,Yulin Shao,Paolo Dini,Boris Bellalta
title: Federated Spatial Reuse Optimization in Next-Generation Decentralized IEEE 802.11 WLANs
title_zh: 下一代分散式 IEEE 802.11 WLAN 中的联合空间重用优化
abstract: As wireless standards evolve, more complex functionalities are introduced to address the increasing requirements in terms of throughput, latency, security, and efficiency. To unleash the potential of such new features, artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) are currently being exploited for deriving models and protocols from data, rather than by hand-programming. In this paper, we explore the feasibility of applying ML in next-generation wireless local area networks (WLANs). More specifically, we focus on the IEEE 802.11ax spatial reuse (SR) problem and predict its performance through federated learning (FL) models. The set of FL solutions overviewed in this work is part of the 2021 International Telecommunication Union (ITU) AI for 5G Challenge.
summary: As wireless standards evolve, more complex functionalities are introduced to address the increasing requirements in terms of throughput, latency, security, and efficiency. To unleash the potential of such new features, artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) are currently being exploited for deriving models and protocols from data, rather than by hand-programming. In this paper, we explore the feasibility of applying ML in next-generation wireless local area networks (WLANs). More specifically, we focus on the IEEE 802.11ax spatial reuse (SR) problem and predict its performance through federated learning (FL) models. The set of FL solutions overviewed in this work is part of the 2021 International Telecommunication Union (ITU) AI for 5G Challenge.
abstract_zh: 随着无线标准的发展，引入了更复杂的功能来满足吞吐量、延迟、安全性和效率方面日益增长的要求。为了释放这些新功能的潜力，目前正在利用人工智能 (AI) 和机器学习 (ML) 从数据中导出模型和协议，而不是通过手动编程。在本文中，我们探讨了在下一代无线局域网（WLAN）中应用机器学习的可行性。更具体地说，我们关注 IEEE 802.11ax 空间重用 (SR) 问题，并通过联邦学习 (FL) 模型预测其性能。本文概述的 FL 解决方案集是 2021 年国际电信联盟 (ITU) 5G 人工智能挑战赛的一部分。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨在下一代去中心化IEEE 802.11 WLAN中应用联邦学习（FL）优化空间复用（SR）的可行性，并通过FL模型预测其性能。
AI.motivation: 随着无线标准复杂度提升，传统手动编程难以满足高吞吐量、低延迟等需求，需借助AI/ML从数据中自动推导模型，FL作为分布式学习方法适合去中心化网络场景。
AI.method: 基于联邦学习框架构建空间复用优化模型，利用分布式数据训练预测性能，方案参与ITU AI for 5G挑战赛。
AI.result: 验证了FL在解决IEEE 802.11ax空间复用问题中的有效性，为去中心化WLAN提供了可行的AI优化方案。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习能够有效支持下一代无线网络的空间复用优化，推动AI在分布式通信协议设计中的应用。

authors_text: Han Gyel Sun,Hyunjae Ahn,HyunGyu Lee,Injung Kim
title: Unidirectional Thin Adapter for Efficient Adaptation of Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 用于高效适应深度神经网络的单向薄适配器
abstract: In this paper, we propose a new adapter network for adapting a pre-trained deep neural network to a target domain with minimal computation. The proposed model, unidirectional thin adapter (UDTA), helps the classifier adapt to new data by providing auxiliary features that complement the backbone network. UDTA takes outputs from multiple layers of the backbone as input features but does not transmit any feature to the backbone. As a result, UDTA can learn without computing the gradient of the backbone, which saves computation for training significantly. In addition, since UDTA learns the target task without modifying the backbone, a single backbone can adapt to multiple tasks by learning only UDTAs separately. In experiments on five fine-grained classification datasets consisting of a small number of samples, UDTA significantly reduced computation and training time required for backpropagation while showing comparable or even improved accuracy compared with conventional adapter models.
summary: In this paper, we propose a new adapter network for adapting a pre-trained deep neural network to a target domain with minimal computation. The proposed model, unidirectional thin adapter (UDTA), helps the classifier adapt to new data by providing auxiliary features that complement the backbone network. UDTA takes outputs from multiple layers of the backbone as input features but does not transmit any feature to the backbone. As a result, UDTA can learn without computing the gradient of the backbone, which saves computation for training significantly. In addition, since UDTA learns the target task without modifying the backbone, a single backbone can adapt to multiple tasks by learning only UDTAs separately. In experiments on five fine-grained classification datasets consisting of a small number of samples, UDTA significantly reduced computation and training time required for backpropagation while showing comparable or even improved accuracy compared with conventional adapter models.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新的适配器网络，用于以最少的计算将预训练的深度神经网络适应目标域。所提出的模型，单向瘦适配器（UDTA），通过提供补充骨干网络的辅助功能来帮助分类器适应新数据。 UDTA 将骨干网多层的输出作为输入特征，但不向骨干网传输任何特征。因此，UDTA 可以在不计算主干梯度的情况下进行学习，从而显着节省了训练计算量。此外，由于UDTA在不修改backbone的情况下学习目标任务，因此单个backbone可以通过单独学习UDTA来适应多个任务。在由少量样本组成的五个细粒度分类数据集上进行的实验中，UDTA 显着减少了反向传播所需的计算和训练时间，同时显示出与传统适配器模型相当甚至更高的精度。

AI.tldr: 提出一种单向薄适配器（UDTA），以最小计算量高效适配预训练深度神经网络到目标领域。
AI.motivation: 传统适配方法需修改骨干网络或计算其梯度，导致计算量大，而UDTA无需修改骨干且不计算其梯度，节省计算资源并支持多任务适配。
AI.method: UDTA从骨干网络多层提取特征作为输入，不向骨干传递特征，训练时无需计算骨干梯度，仅训练适配器。
AI.result: 在五个细粒度分类数据集（样本少）上，UDTA显著减少反向传播计算和训练时间，准确率与传统模型相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: UDTA通过单向特征提取和无需计算骨干梯度，实现高效模型适配，在计算受限场景下表现优异。

authors_text: Zhigang Tu,Hongyan Li,Wei Xie,Yuanzhong Liu,Shifu Zhang,Baoxin Li,Junsong Yuan
title: Optical Flow for Video Super-Resolution: A Survey
title_zh: 视频超分辨率光流：调查
abstract: Video super-resolution is currently one of the most active research topics in computer vision as it plays an important role in many visual applications. Generally, video super-resolution contains a significant component, i.e., motion compensation, which is used to estimate the displacement between successive video frames for temporal alignment. Optical flow, which can supply dense and sub-pixel motion between consecutive frames, is among the most common ways for this task. To obtain a good understanding of the effect that optical flow acts in video super-resolution, in this work, we conduct a comprehensive review on this subject for the first time. This investigation covers the following major topics: the function of super-resolution (i.e., why we require super-resolution); the concept of video super-resolution (i.e., what is video super-resolution); the description of evaluation metrics (i.e., how (video) superresolution performs); the introduction of optical flow based video super-resolution; the investigation of using optical flow to capture temporal dependency for video super-resolution. Prominently, we give an in-depth study of the deep learning based video super-resolution method, where some representative algorithms are analyzed and compared. Additionally, we highlight some promising research directions and open issues that should be further addressed.
summary: Video super-resolution is currently one of the most active research topics in computer vision as it plays an important role in many visual applications. Generally, video super-resolution contains a significant component, i.e., motion compensation, which is used to estimate the displacement between successive video frames for temporal alignment. Optical flow, which can supply dense and sub-pixel motion between consecutive frames, is among the most common ways for this task. To obtain a good understanding of the effect that optical flow acts in video super-resolution, in this work, we conduct a comprehensive review on this subject for the first time. This investigation covers the following major topics: the function of super-resolution (i.e., why we require super-resolution); the concept of video super-resolution (i.e., what is video super-resolution); the description of evaluation metrics (i.e., how (video) superresolution performs); the introduction of optical flow based video super-resolution; the investigation of using optical flow to capture temporal dependency for video super-resolution. Prominently, we give an in-depth study of the deep learning based video super-resolution method, where some representative algorithms are analyzed and compared. Additionally, we highlight some promising research directions and open issues that should be further addressed.
abstract_zh: 视频超分辨率是目前计算机视觉领域最活跃的研究课题之一，因为它在许多视觉应用中发挥着重要作用。一般来说，视频超分辨率包含一个重要的组成部分，即运动补偿，它用于估计连续视频帧之间的位移以进行时间对齐。光流可以在连续帧之间提供密集的亚像素运动，是完成此任务的最常见方法之一。为了更好地理解光流在视频超分辨率中的作用，在这项工作中，我们首次对这个主题进行了全面的回顾。本研究涵盖以下主要主题：超分辨率的功能（即为什么我们需要超分辨率）；视频超分辨率的概念（即什么是视频超分辨率）；评估指标的描述（即（视频）超分辨率如何执行）；引入基于光流的视频超分辨率；使用光流捕获视频超分辨率的时间依赖性的研究。值得注意的是，我们对基于深度学习的视频超分辨率方法进行了深入研究，并对一些代表性算法进行了分析和比较。此外，我们强调了一些有前途的研究方向和应进一步解决的开放问题。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了光流在视频超分辨率中的应用，系统分析了其技术原理、方法演进及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 视频超分辨率是计算机视觉的重要研究方向，而光流作为运动补偿的核心技术，其作用需系统梳理以推动领域发展。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，分类总结视频超分辨率的技术框架，重点分析基于光流的时序依赖建模方法及深度学习算法。
AI.result: 全面梳理了光流在视频超分辨率中的功能定位、评价指标及技术路线，对比了典型算法并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 光流技术对提升视频超分辨率效果具有重要意义，但其与深度学习的深度融合及动态场景适应性仍需进一步探索。

search_text: Optical Flow for Video Super-Resolution: A Survey 视频超分辨率光流：调查 Video super-resolution is currently one of the most active research topics in computer vision as it plays an important role in many visual applications. Generally, video super-resolution contains a significant component, i.e., motion compensation, which is used to estimate the displacement between successive video frames for temporal alignment. Optical flow, which can supply dense and sub-pixel motion between consecutive frames, is among the most common ways for this task. To obtain a good understanding of the effect that optical flow acts in video super-resolution, in this work, we conduct a comprehensive review on this subject for the first time. This investigation covers the following major topics: the function of super-resolution (i.e., why we require super-resolution); the concept of video super-resolution (i.e., what is video super-resolution); the description of evaluation metrics (i.e., how (video) superresolution performs); the introduction of optical flow based video super-resolution; the investigation of using optical flow to capture temporal dependency for video super-resolution. Prominently, we give an in-depth study of the deep learning based video super-resolution method, where some representative algorithms are analyzed and compared. Additionally, we highlight some promising research directions and open issues that should be further addressed. 视频超分辨率是目前计算机视觉领域最活跃的研究课题之一，因为它在许多视觉应用中发挥着重要作用。一般来说，视频超分辨率包含一个重要的组成部分，即运动补偿，它用于估计连续视频帧之间的位移以进行时间对齐。光流可以在连续帧之间提供密集的亚像素运动，是完成此任务的最常见方法之一。为了更好地理解光流在视频超分辨率中的作用，在这项工作中，我们首次对这个主题进行了全面的回顾。本研究涵盖以下主要主题：超分辨率的功能（即为什么我们需要超分辨率）；视频超分辨率的概念（即什么是视频超分辨率）；评估指标的描述（即（视频）超分辨率如何执行）；引入基于光流的视频超分辨率；使用光流捕获视频超分辨率的时间依赖性的研究。值得注意的是，我们对基于深度学习的视频超分辨率方法进行了深入研究，并对一些代表性算法进行了分析和比较。此外，我们强调了一些有前途的研究方向和应进一步解决的开放问题。 本文综述了光流在视频超分辨率中的应用，系统分析了其技术原理、方法演进及未来方向。 Zhigang Tu,Hongyan Li,Wei Xie,Yuanzhong Liu,Shifu Zhang,Baoxin Li,Junsong Yuan cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaoke Shen,Ioannis Stamos
title: simCrossTrans: A Simple Cross-Modality Transfer Learning for Object Detection with ConvNets or Vision Transformers
title_zh: simCrossTrans：使用 ConvNet 或视觉 Transformer 进行目标检测的简单跨模态迁移学习
abstract: Transfer learning is widely used in computer vision (CV), natural language processing (NLP) and achieves great success. Most transfer learning systems are based on the same modality (e.g. RGB image in CV and text in NLP). However, the cross-modality transfer learning (CMTL) systems are scarce. In this work, we study CMTL from 2D to 3D sensor to explore the upper bound performance of 3D sensor only systems, which play critical roles in robotic navigation and perform well in low light scenarios. While most CMTL pipelines from 2D to 3D vision are complicated and based on Convolutional Neural Networks (ConvNets), ours is easy to implement, expand and based on both ConvNets and Vision transformers(ViTs): 1) By converting point clouds to pseudo-images, we can use an almost identical network from pre-trained models based on 2D images. This makes our system easy to implement and expand. 2) Recently ViTs have been showing good performance and robustness to occlusions, one of the key reasons for poor performance of 3D vision systems. We explored both ViT and ConvNet with similar model sizes to investigate the performance difference. We name our approach simCrossTrans: simple cross-modality transfer learning with ConvNets or ViTs. Experiments on SUN RGB-D dataset show: with simCrossTrans we achieve $13.2\%$ and $16.1\%$ absolute performance gain based on ConvNets and ViTs separately. We also observed the ViTs based performs $9.7\%$ better than the ConvNets one, showing the power of simCrossTrans with ViT. simCrossTrans with ViTs surpasses the previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) by a large margin of $+15.4\%$ mAP50. Compared with the previous 2D detection SOTA based RGB images, our depth image only system only has a $1\%$ gap. The code, training/inference logs and models are publicly available at https://github.com/liketheflower/simCrossTrans
summary: Transfer learning is widely used in computer vision (CV), natural language processing (NLP) and achieves great success. Most transfer learning systems are based on the same modality (e.g. RGB image in CV and text in NLP). However, the cross-modality transfer learning (CMTL) systems are scarce. In this work, we study CMTL from 2D to 3D sensor to explore the upper bound performance of 3D sensor only systems, which play critical roles in robotic navigation and perform well in low light scenarios. While most CMTL pipelines from 2D to 3D vision are complicated and based on Convolutional Neural Networks (ConvNets), ours is easy to implement, expand and based on both ConvNets and Vision transformers(ViTs): 1) By converting point clouds to pseudo-images, we can use an almost identical network from pre-trained models based on 2D images. This makes our system easy to implement and expand. 2) Recently ViTs have been showing good performance and robustness to occlusions, one of the key reasons for poor performance of 3D vision systems. We explored both ViT and ConvNet with similar model sizes to investigate the performance difference. We name our approach simCrossTrans: simple cross-modality transfer learning with ConvNets or ViTs. Experiments on SUN RGB-D dataset show: with simCrossTrans we achieve $13.2\%$ and $16.1\%$ absolute performance gain based on ConvNets and ViTs separately. We also observed the ViTs based performs $9.7\%$ better than the ConvNets one, showing the power of simCrossTrans with ViT. simCrossTrans with ViTs surpasses the previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) by a large margin of $+15.4\%$ mAP50. Compared with the previous 2D detection SOTA based RGB images, our depth image only system only has a $1\%$ gap. The code, training/inference logs and models are publicly available at https://github.com/liketheflower/simCrossTrans
abstract_zh: 迁移学习广泛应用于计算机视觉（CV）、自然语言处理（NLP）领域并取得巨大成功。大多数迁移学习系统都基于相同的模式（例如 CV 中的 RGB 图像和 NLP 中的文本）。然而，跨模态迁移学习（CMTL）系统却很少。在这项工作中，我们研究从 2D 到 3D 传感器的 CMTL，以探索仅 3D 传感器系统的上限性能，该系统在机器人导航中发挥着关键作用，并在弱光场景下表现良好。虽然大多数从 2D 到 3D 视觉的 CMTL 管道都很复杂并且基于卷积神经网络 (ConvNet)，但我们的管道很容易实现、扩展并基于 ConvNet 和视觉转换器 (ViT)：1) 通过将点云转换为伪图像，我们可以使用基于 2D 图像的预训练模型几乎相同的网络。这使得我们的系统易于实施和扩展。 2) 最近，ViT 表现出了良好的性能和对遮挡的鲁棒性，这是 3D 视觉系统性能不佳的关键原因之一。我们探索了具有相似模型大小的 ViT 和 ConvNet，以研究性能差异。我们将我们的方法命名为 simCrossTrans：使用 ConvNet 或 ViT 进行简单的跨模态迁移学习。在 SUN RGB-D 数据集上的实验表明：通过 simCrossTrans，我们分别基于 ConvNet 和 ViT 实现了 $13.2\%$ 和 $16.1\%$ 绝对性能增益。我们还观察到基于 ViT 的性能比 ConvNet 的性能好 9.7%$，这显示了 simCrossTrans 与 ViT 的强大功能。带有 ViTs 的 simCrossTrans 大大超过了之前的最先进技术 (SOTA) $+15.4\%$ mAP50。与之前基于 RGB 图像的 2D 检测 SOTA 相比，我们的仅深度图像系统仅存在 $1\%$ 差距。代码、训练/推理日志和模型可在 https://github.com/liketheflower/simCrossTrans 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种简单跨模态迁移学习方法simCrossTrans，用于在卷积神经网络（ConvNets）或视觉Transformer（ViTs）框架下实现从2D到3D传感器的物体检测。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态迁移学习（CMTL）系统稀缺，而3D传感器在机器人导航和低光场景中具有重要作用，需探索其性能上限并简化实现方式。
AI.method: 通过将点云转换为伪图像，复用预训练2D模型网络结构；同时对比ConvNets与ViTs在相似模型规模下的性能差异，提出简单可扩展的simCrossTrans方法。
AI.result: 在SUN RGB-D数据集上，基于ConvNets和ViTs分别实现13.2%和16.1%的绝对性能提升，ViT比ConvNet高9.7%；深度图像仅系统较RGB图像SOTA仅低1%。
AI.conclusion: simCrossTrans方法有效且易于扩展，ViT在3D视觉中展现更强鲁棒性，为跨模态迁移学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Hiroki Tsuda,Kazuhiro Hotta
title: Adversarial Mutual Leakage Network for Cell Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于细胞图像分割的对抗性互漏网络
abstract: We propose three segmentation methods using GAN and information leakage between generator and discriminator. First, we propose an Adversarial Training Attention Module (ATA-Module) that uses an attention mechanism from the discriminator to the generator to enhance and leak important information in the discriminator. ATA-Module transmits important information to the generator from the discriminator. Second, we propose a Top-Down Pixel-wise Difficulty Attention Module (Top-Down PDA-Module) that leaks an attention map based on pixel-wise difficulty in the generator to the discriminator. The generator trains to focus on pixel-wise difficulty, and the discriminator uses the difficulty information leaked from the generator for classification. Finally, we propose an Adversarial Mutual Leakage Network (AML-Net) that mutually leaks the information each other between the generator and the discriminator. By using the information of the other network, it is able to train more efficiently than ordinary segmentation models. Three proposed methods have been evaluated on two datasets for cell image segmentation. The experimental results show that the segmentation accuracy of AML-Net was much improved in comparison with conventional methods.
summary: We propose three segmentation methods using GAN and information leakage between generator and discriminator. First, we propose an Adversarial Training Attention Module (ATA-Module) that uses an attention mechanism from the discriminator to the generator to enhance and leak important information in the discriminator. ATA-Module transmits important information to the generator from the discriminator. Second, we propose a Top-Down Pixel-wise Difficulty Attention Module (Top-Down PDA-Module) that leaks an attention map based on pixel-wise difficulty in the generator to the discriminator. The generator trains to focus on pixel-wise difficulty, and the discriminator uses the difficulty information leaked from the generator for classification. Finally, we propose an Adversarial Mutual Leakage Network (AML-Net) that mutually leaks the information each other between the generator and the discriminator. By using the information of the other network, it is able to train more efficiently than ordinary segmentation models. Three proposed methods have been evaluated on two datasets for cell image segmentation. The experimental results show that the segmentation accuracy of AML-Net was much improved in comparison with conventional methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了三种使用 GAN 以及生成器和鉴别器之间的信息泄漏的分割方法。首先，我们提出了一种对抗性训练注意力模块（ATA-Module），它使用从鉴别器到生成器的注意力机制来增强和泄漏鉴别器中的重要信息。 ATA 模块将重要信息从鉴别器传输到生成器。其次，我们提出了一种自上而下的像素难度注意力模块（自上而下的 PDA 模块），该模块将基于生成器中像素难度的注意力图泄漏给鉴别器。生成器训练专注于像素级难度，鉴别器使用从生成器泄漏的难度信息进行分类。最后，我们提出了一种对抗性相互泄漏网络（AML-Net），它在生成器和鉴别器之间相互泄漏信息。通过使用其他网络的信息，它能够比普通分割模型更有效地进行训练。已在两个细胞图像分割数据集上评估了三种提出的方​​法。实验结果表明，AML-Net的分割精度较传统方法有很大提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗网络和信息泄露机制的细胞图像分割方法，通过增强生成器与判别器间的互信息传递提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 传统分割模型存在信息传递效率低、难以捕捉复杂特征的问题，需通过对抗训练和信息泄露机制优化模型性能。
AI.method: 设计三种模块：1) ATA-Module（判别器向生成器传递关键信息）；2) Top-Down PDA-Module（生成器向判别器传递像素级难度图）；3) AML-Net（双向信息泄露网络），实现生成器与判别器的协同训练。
AI.result: 在两个细胞图像数据集上实验表明，AML-Net相比传统方法分割准确率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 对抗性信息泄露机制能有效提升分割模型性能，证明了生成器与判别器间互惠信息传递的价值。

First, we propose an Adversarial Training Attention Module (ATA-Module) that uses an attention mechanism from the discriminator to the generator to enhance and leak important information in the discriminator. ATA-Module transmits important information to the generator from the discriminator. Second, we propose a Top-Down Pixel-wise Difficulty Attention Module (Top-Down PDA-Module) that leaks an attention map based on pixel-wise difficulty in the generator to the discriminator. By using the information of the other network, it is able to train more efficiently than ordinary segmentation models. authors_text: Hyunsub Lee,Heeyoul Choi
title: Partitioning Image Representation in Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 对比学习中的图像表示划分
abstract: In contrastive learning in the image domain, the anchor and positive samples are forced to have as close representations as possible. However, forcing the two samples to have the same representation could be misleading because the data augmentation techniques make the two samples different. In this paper, we introduce a new representation, partitioned representation, which can learn both common and unique features of the anchor and positive samples in contrastive learning. The partitioned representation consists of two parts: the content part and the style part. The content part represents common features of the class, and the style part represents the own features of each sample, which can lead to the representation of the data augmentation method. We can achieve the partitioned representation simply by decomposing a loss function of contrastive learning into two terms on the two separate representations, respectively. To evaluate our representation with two parts, we take two framework models: Variational AutoEncoder (VAE) and BootstrapYour Own Latent(BYOL) to show the separability of content and style, and to confirm the generalization ability in classification, respectively. Based on the experiments, we show that our approach can separate two types of information in the VAE framework and outperforms the conventional BYOL in linear separability and a few-shot learning task as downstream tasks.
summary: In contrastive learning in the image domain, the anchor and positive samples are forced to have as close representations as possible. However, forcing the two samples to have the same representation could be misleading because the data augmentation techniques make the two samples different. In this paper, we introduce a new representation, partitioned representation, which can learn both common and unique features of the anchor and positive samples in contrastive learning. The partitioned representation consists of two parts: the content part and the style part. The content part represents common features of the class, and the style part represents the own features of each sample, which can lead to the representation of the data augmentation method. We can achieve the partitioned representation simply by decomposing a loss function of contrastive learning into two terms on the two separate representations, respectively. To evaluate our representation with two parts, we take two framework models: Variational AutoEncoder (VAE) and BootstrapYour Own Latent(BYOL) to show the separability of content and style, and to confirm the generalization ability in classification, respectively. Based on the experiments, we show that our approach can separate two types of information in the VAE framework and outperforms the conventional BYOL in linear separability and a few-shot learning task as downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 在图像域的对比学习中，锚样本和正样本被迫具有尽可能接近的表示。然而，强制两个样本具有相同的表示可能会产生误导，因为数据增强技术使两个样本不同。在本文中，我们引入了一种新的表示形式——分区表示，它可以在对比学习中学习锚点和正样本的共同特征和独特特征。分区表示由两部分组成：内容部分和样式部分。内容部分代表类的共同特征，风格部分代表每个样本自身的特征，这可以引出数据增强方法的表示。我们可以简单地通过将对比学习的损失函数分别分解为两个单独表示的两项来实现分区表示。为了评估我们的两部分表示，我们采用两个框架模型：变分自动编码器（VAE）和BootstrapYour Own Latent（BYOL）来分别显示内容和风格的可分离性，并确认分类的泛化能力。基于实验，我们表明我们的方法可以在 VAE 框架中分离两种类型的信息，并且在线性可分离性和作为下游任务的几次学习任务方面优于传统的 BYOL。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对比学习中的图像表示分割方法，将表示分为内容和风格两部分，以解决数据增强导致的表示混淆问题。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习强制锚点和正样本具有相同表示，但数据增强会使样本差异显著，导致表示学习出现偏差。
AI.method: 通过分解对比学习损失函数为内容表示和风格表示两部分，利用VAE和BYOL框架验证内容-风格分离能力及分类任务的泛化性。
AI.result: 在VAE框架中成功分离内容与风格信息，在线性可分性和少样本学习任务中优于传统BYOL方法。
AI.conclusion: 分割表示方法能有效区分样本共性与个体特征，在下游任务中展现更优性能。

authors_text: Adnan Darwiche,Chunxi Ji
title: On the Computation of Necessary and Sufficient Explanations
title_zh: 论必要解释和充分解释的计算
comment: To appear in the proceedings of AAAI 2022
comments: To appear in the proceedings of AAAI 2022
abstract: The complete reason behind a decision is a Boolean formula that characterizes why the decision was made. This recently introduced notion has a number of applications, which include generating explanations, detecting decision bias and evaluating counterfactual queries. Prime implicants of the complete reason are known as sufficient reasons for the decision and they correspond to what is known as PI explanations and abductive explanations. In this paper, we refer to the prime implicates of a complete reason as necessary reasons for the decision. We justify this terminology semantically and show that necessary reasons correspond to what is known as contrastive explanations. We also study the computation of complete reasons for multi-class decision trees and graphs with nominal and numeric features for which we derive efficient, closed-form complete reasons. We further investigate the computation of shortest necessary and sufficient reasons for a broad class of complete reasons, which include the derived closed forms and the complete reasons for Sentential Decision Diagrams (SDDs). We provide an algorithm which can enumerate their shortest necessary reasons in output polynomial time. Enumerating shortest sufficient reasons for this class of complete reasons is hard even for a single reason. For this problem, we provide an algorithm that appears to be quite efficient as we show empirically.
summary: The complete reason behind a decision is a Boolean formula that characterizes why the decision was made. This recently introduced notion has a number of applications, which include generating explanations, detecting decision bias and evaluating counterfactual queries. Prime implicants of the complete reason are known as sufficient reasons for the decision and they correspond to what is known as PI explanations and abductive explanations. In this paper, we refer to the prime implicates of a complete reason as necessary reasons for the decision. We justify this terminology semantically and show that necessary reasons correspond to what is known as contrastive explanations. We also study the computation of complete reasons for multi-class decision trees and graphs with nominal and numeric features for which we derive efficient, closed-form complete reasons. We further investigate the computation of shortest necessary and sufficient reasons for a broad class of complete reasons, which include the derived closed forms and the complete reasons for Sentential Decision Diagrams (SDDs). We provide an algorithm which can enumerate their shortest necessary reasons in output polynomial time. Enumerating shortest sufficient reasons for this class of complete reasons is hard even for a single reason. For this problem, we provide an algorithm that appears to be quite efficient as we show empirically.
abstract_zh: 决策背后的完整原因是一个布尔公式，它描述了做出决策的原因。这个最近引入的概念有很多应用，包括生成解释、检测决策偏差和评估反事实查询。完整原因的主要蕴涵被称为决策的充分理由，它们对应于所谓的 PI 解释和溯因解释。在本文中，我们将完整原因的主要含义称为决策的必要原因。我们在语义上证明了这个术语的合理性，并表明必要的理由对应于所谓的对比解释。我们还研究了具有名义和数值特征的多类决策树和图的完整原因的计算，为此我们推导出有效的、封闭形式的完整原因。我们进一步研究了广泛的完整原因的最短必要和充分原因的计算，其中包括派生的封闭形式和句子决策图（SDD）的完整原因。我们提供了一种算法，可以在输出多项式时间内枚举它们的最短必要原因。即使对于单一原因，列举此类完整原因的最短充分理由也是困难的。对于这个问题，我们提供了一种算法，根据我们的经验证明，该算法似乎非常有效。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何计算决策的必要和充分解释，通过布尔公式表示决策的完整原因，并探讨其在多类决策树和图中的应用。
AI.motivation: 决策解释在生成解释、检测偏见和评估反事实查询中具有重要作用，但现有方法难以高效计算必要解释。
AI.method: 提出将完整原因的素蕴含式定义为必要原因，推导多类决策树和图的闭合形式完整原因，并设计算法枚举最短必要和充分原因。
AI.result: 为多类决策模型和SDDs提供了高效计算完整原因的方法，且能以输出多项式时间枚举最短必要原因，充分原因枚举则计算复杂度较高。
AI.conclusion: 必要和充分解释能有效支持决策分析，所提算法在实际应用中表现出较高的效率，为解释性AI提供了理论基础和工具支持。

search_text: On the Computation of Necessary and Sufficient Explanations 论必要解释和充分解释的计算 The complete reason behind a decision is a Boolean formula that characterizes why the decision was made. This recently introduced notion has a number of applications, which include generating explanations, detecting decision bias and evaluating counterfactual queries. Prime implicants of the complete reason are known as sufficient reasons for the decision and they correspond to what is known as PI explanations and abductive explanations. In this paper, we refer to the prime implicates of a complete reason as necessary reasons for the decision. We justify this terminology semantically and show that necessary reasons correspond to what is known as contrastive explanations. We also study the computation of complete reasons for multi-class decision trees and graphs with nominal and numeric features for which we derive efficient, closed-form complete reasons. We further investigate the computation of shortest necessary and sufficient reasons for a broad class of complete reasons, which include the derived closed forms and the complete reasons for Sentential Decision Diagrams (SDDs). We provide an algorithm which can enumerate their shortest necessary reasons in output polynomial time. Enumerating shortest sufficient reasons for this class of complete reasons is hard even for a single reason. For this problem, we provide an algorithm that appears to be quite efficient as we show empirically. 决策背后的完整原因是一个布尔公式，它描述了做出决策的原因。这个最近引入的概念有很多应用，包括生成解释、检测决策偏差和评估反事实查询。完整原因的主要蕴涵被称为决策的充分理由，它们对应于所谓的 PI 解释和溯因解释。在本文中，我们将完整原因的主要含义称为决策的必要原因。我们在语义上证明了这个术语的合理性，并表明必要的理由对应于所谓的对比解释。我们还研究了具有名义和数值特征的多类决策树和图的完整原因的计算，为此我们推导出有效的、封闭形式的完整原因。我们进一步研究了广泛的完整原因的最短必要和充分原因的计算，其中包括派生的封闭形式和句子决策图（SDD）的完整原因。我们提供了一种算法，可以在输出多项式时间内枚举它们的最短必要原因。即使对于单一原因，列举此类完整原因的最短充分理由也是困难的。对于这个问题，我们提供了一种算法，根据我们的经验证明，该算法似乎非常有效。 本文研究如何计算决策的必要和充分解释，通过布尔公式表示决策的完整原因，并探讨其在多类决策树和图中的应用。 Adnan Darwiche,Chunxi Ji cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.LO

authors_text: Wenjia Xu,Yongqin Xian,Jiuniu Wang,Bernt Schiele,Zeynep Akata
title: VGSE: Visually-Grounded Semantic Embeddings for Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: VGSE：用于零样本学习的视觉基础语义嵌入
abstract: Human-annotated attributes serve as powerful semantic embeddings in zero-shot learning. However, their annotation process is labor-intensive and needs expert supervision. Current unsupervised semantic embeddings, i.e., word embeddings, enable knowledge transfer between classes. However, word embeddings do not always reflect visual similarities and result in inferior zero-shot performance. We propose to discover semantic embeddings containing discriminative visual properties for zero-shot learning, without requiring any human annotation. Our model visually divides a set of images from seen classes into clusters of local image regions according to their visual similarity, and further imposes their class discrimination and semantic relatedness. To associate these clusters with previously unseen classes, we use external knowledge, e.g., word embeddings and propose a novel class relation discovery module. Through quantitative and qualitative evaluation, we demonstrate that our model discovers semantic embeddings that model the visual properties of both seen and unseen classes. Furthermore, we demonstrate on three benchmarks that our visually-grounded semantic embeddings further improve performance over word embeddings across various ZSL models by a large margin.
summary: Human-annotated attributes serve as powerful semantic embeddings in zero-shot learning. However, their annotation process is labor-intensive and needs expert supervision. Current unsupervised semantic embeddings, i.e., word embeddings, enable knowledge transfer between classes. However, word embeddings do not always reflect visual similarities and result in inferior zero-shot performance. We propose to discover semantic embeddings containing discriminative visual properties for zero-shot learning, without requiring any human annotation. Our model visually divides a set of images from seen classes into clusters of local image regions according to their visual similarity, and further imposes their class discrimination and semantic relatedness. To associate these clusters with previously unseen classes, we use external knowledge, e.g., word embeddings and propose a novel class relation discovery module. Through quantitative and qualitative evaluation, we demonstrate that our model discovers semantic embeddings that model the visual properties of both seen and unseen classes. Furthermore, we demonstrate on three benchmarks that our visually-grounded semantic embeddings further improve performance over word embeddings across various ZSL models by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 人工注释的属性在零样本学习中充当强大的语义嵌入。然而，他们的注释过程是劳动密集型的，需要专家的监督。当前的无监督语义嵌入（即词嵌入）可以实现类之间的知识转移。然而，词嵌入并不总是反映视觉相似性，并导致零样本性能较差。我们建议发现包含用于零样本学习的判别性视觉属性的语义嵌入，而不需要任何人工注释。我们的模型根据视觉相似性将一组来自所见类别的图像直观地划分为局部图像区域的簇，并进一步施加它们的类别辨别和语义相关性。为了将这些集群与以前未见过的类相关联，我们使用外部知识，例如词嵌入，并提出了一种新颖的类关系发现模块。通过定量和定性评估，我们证明我们的模型发现了对可见类和不可见类的视觉属性进行建模的语义嵌入。此外，我们在三个基准测试中证明，我们的基于视觉的语义嵌入比各种 ZSL 模型的词嵌入进一步大幅提高了性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工标注的视觉基础语义嵌入方法（VGSE），通过结合视觉相似性与语义关系提升零样本学习性能。
AI.motivation: 传统零样本学习依赖人工标注的属性或词嵌入，但前者耗时且需专家监督，后者缺乏视觉相似性导致性能不足。
AI.method: 模型通过视觉相似性聚类图像局部区域，结合类别区分性与语义相关性，并引入外部知识（如词嵌入）和类关系发现模块关联未见类别。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试中，VGSE显著优于词嵌入，在多种零样本学习模型上提升性能。
AI.conclusion: VGSE有效捕捉视觉与语义属性，为零样本学习提供了更优的语义嵌入方案。

authors_text: Won Joon Yun,Yunseok Kwak,Jae Pyoung Kim,Hyunhee Cho,Soyi Jung,Jihong Park,Joongheon Kim
title: Quantum Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning via Variational Quantum Circuit Design
title_zh: 通过变分量子电路设计的量子多智能体强化学习
abstract: In recent years, quantum computing (QC) has been getting a lot of attention from industry and academia. Especially, among various QC research topics, variational quantum circuit (VQC) enables quantum deep reinforcement learning (QRL). Many studies of QRL have shown that the QRL is superior to the classical reinforcement learning (RL) methods under the constraints of the number of training parameters. This paper extends and demonstrates the QRL to quantum multi-agent RL (QMARL). However, the extension of QRL to QMARL is not straightforward due to the challenge of the noise intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) and the non-stationary properties in classical multi-agent RL (MARL). Therefore, this paper proposes the centralized training and decentralized execution (CTDE) QMARL framework by designing novel VQCs for the framework to cope with these issues. To corroborate the QMARL framework, this paper conducts the QMARL demonstration in a single-hop environment where edge agents offload packets to clouds. The extensive demonstration shows that the proposed QMARL framework enhances 57.7% of total reward than classical frameworks.
summary: In recent years, quantum computing (QC) has been getting a lot of attention from industry and academia. Especially, among various QC research topics, variational quantum circuit (VQC) enables quantum deep reinforcement learning (QRL). Many studies of QRL have shown that the QRL is superior to the classical reinforcement learning (RL) methods under the constraints of the number of training parameters. This paper extends and demonstrates the QRL to quantum multi-agent RL (QMARL). However, the extension of QRL to QMARL is not straightforward due to the challenge of the noise intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) and the non-stationary properties in classical multi-agent RL (MARL). Therefore, this paper proposes the centralized training and decentralized execution (CTDE) QMARL framework by designing novel VQCs for the framework to cope with these issues. To corroborate the QMARL framework, this paper conducts the QMARL demonstration in a single-hop environment where edge agents offload packets to clouds. The extensive demonstration shows that the proposed QMARL framework enhances 57.7% of total reward than classical frameworks.
abstract_zh: 近年来，量子计算（QC）受到工业界和学术界的广泛关注。特别是，在各种QC研究主题中，变分量子电路（VQC）使量子深度强化学习（QRL）成为可能。 QRL的许多研究表明，在训练参数数量的限制下，QRL优于经典的强化学习（RL）方法。本文将 QRL 扩展并演示为量子多智能体 RL (QMARL)。然而，由于噪声中尺度量子（NISQ）和经典多智能体强化学习（MARL）中的非平稳特性的挑战，将 QRL 扩展到 QMARL 并不简单。因此，本文提出了集中训练和分散执行（CTDE）QMARL框架，通过为该框架设计新颖的VQC来应对这些问题。为了证实 QMARL 框架，本文在边缘代理将数据包卸载到云的单跳环境中进行了 QMARL 演示。广泛的论证表明，所提出的 QMARL 框架比经典框架提高了 57.7% 的总奖励。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分量子电路设计的量子多智能体强化学习框架，以解决噪声量子设备和非平稳环境下的挑战。
AI.motivation: 量子强化学习在参数受限场景下优于经典方法，但扩展到多智能体时面临NISQ设备噪声和非平稳性的技术难题。
AI.method: 设计集中训练分散执行（CTDE）框架，结合新型变分量子电路以应对量子噪声和多智能体非平稳特性。
AI.result: 在单跳网络环境中，该框架总奖励较经典方法提升57.7%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的量子多智能体框架验证了量子计算在复杂分布式决策场景中的潜力。

Therefore, this paper proposes the centralized training and decentralized execution (CTDE) QMARL framework by designing novel VQCs for the framework to cope with these issues. To corroborate the QMARL framework, this paper conducts the QMARL demonstration in a single-hop environment where edge agents offload packets to clouds. The extensive demonstration shows that the proposed QMARL framework enhances 57.7% of total reward than classical frameworks. 近年来，量子计算（QC）受到工业界和学术界的广泛关注。特别是，在各种QC研究主题中，变分量子电路（VQC）使量子深度强化学习（QRL）成为可能。 QRL的许多研究表明，在训练参数数量的限制下，QRL优于经典的强化学习（RL）方法。本文将 QRL 扩展并演示为量子多智能体 RL (QMARL)。然而，由于噪声中尺度量子（NISQ）和经典多智能体强化学习（MARL）中的非平稳特性的挑战，将 QRL 扩展到 QMARL 并不简单。因此，本文提出了集中训练和分散执行（CTDE）QMARL框架，通过为该框架设计新颖的VQC来应对这些问题。为了证实 QMARL 框架，本文在边缘代理将数据包卸载到云的单跳环境中进行了 QMARL 演示。广泛的论证表明，所提出的 QMARL 框架比经典框架提高了 57.7% 的总奖励。 本文提出一种基于变分量子电路设计的量子多智能体强化学习框架，以解决噪声量子设备和非平稳环境下的挑战。 Won Joon Yun,Yunseok Kwak,Jae Pyoung Kim,Hyunhee Cho,Soyi Jung,Jihong Park,Joongheon Kim quant-ph,cs.ET,cs.LG

authors_text: Haichao Zhang,Kuangrong Hao,Witold Pedrycz,Lei Gao,Xuesong Tang,Bing Wei
title: Vision Transformer with Convolutions Architecture Search
title_zh: 具有卷积架构的视觉转换器
abstract: Transformers exhibit great advantages in handling computer vision tasks. They model image classification tasks by utilizing a multi-head attention mechanism to process a series of patches consisting of split images. However, for complex tasks, Transformer in computer vision not only requires inheriting a bit of dynamic attention and global context, but also needs to introduce features concerning noise reduction, shifting, and scaling invariance of objects. Therefore, here we take a step forward to study the structural characteristics of Transformer and convolution and propose an architecture search method-Vision Transformer with Convolutions Architecture Search (VTCAS). The high-performance backbone network searched by VTCAS introduces the desirable features of convolutional neural networks into the Transformer architecture while maintaining the benefits of the multi-head attention mechanism. The searched block-based backbone network can extract feature maps at different scales. These features are compatible with a wider range of visual tasks, such as image classification (32 M parameters, 82.0% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K) and object detection (50.4% mAP on COCO2017). The proposed topology based on the multi-head attention mechanism and CNN adaptively associates relational features of pixels with multi-scale features of objects. It enhances the robustness of the neural network for object recognition, especially in the low illumination indoor scene.
summary: Transformers exhibit great advantages in handling computer vision tasks. They model image classification tasks by utilizing a multi-head attention mechanism to process a series of patches consisting of split images. However, for complex tasks, Transformer in computer vision not only requires inheriting a bit of dynamic attention and global context, but also needs to introduce features concerning noise reduction, shifting, and scaling invariance of objects. Therefore, here we take a step forward to study the structural characteristics of Transformer and convolution and propose an architecture search method-Vision Transformer with Convolutions Architecture Search (VTCAS). The high-performance backbone network searched by VTCAS introduces the desirable features of convolutional neural networks into the Transformer architecture while maintaining the benefits of the multi-head attention mechanism. The searched block-based backbone network can extract feature maps at different scales. These features are compatible with a wider range of visual tasks, such as image classification (32 M parameters, 82.0% Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K) and object detection (50.4% mAP on COCO2017). The proposed topology based on the multi-head attention mechanism and CNN adaptively associates relational features of pixels with multi-scale features of objects. It enhances the robustness of the neural network for object recognition, especially in the low illumination indoor scene.
abstract_zh: Transformer 在处理计算机视觉任务方面表现出巨大的优势。他们利用多头注意力机制来处理一系列由分割图像组成的补丁，从而对图像分类任务进行建模。然而，对于复杂的任务，计算机视觉中的 Transformer 不仅需要继承一点动态注意力和全局上下文，还需要引入有关对象的降噪、平移和缩放不变性的特征。因此，这里我们更进一步研究Transformer和卷积的结构特性，并提出一种架构搜索方法——Vision Transformer with Convolutions Architecture Search（VTCAS）。 VTCAS 搜索的高性能骨干网络将卷积神经网络的理想特征引入到 Transformer 架构中，同时保持多头注意力机制的优点。搜索到的基于块的主干网络可以提取不同尺度的特征图。这些功能与更广泛的视觉任务兼容，例如图像分类（32 M 参数，ImageNet-1K 上的 82.0% Top-1 准确率）和对象检测（COCO2017 上的 50.4% mAP）。所提出的基于多头注意力机制和CNN的拓扑自适应地将像素的关系特征与对象的多尺度特征相关联。它增强了神经网络对物体识别的鲁棒性，特别是在低照度室内场景中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合Transformer与卷积神经网络（CNN）的架构搜索方法VTCAS，以提升视觉任务的性能。
AI.motivation: Transformer在视觉任务中虽具优势，但需引入CNN的降噪、平移/缩放不变性等特性以应对复杂任务需求。
AI.method: 设计VTCAS架构搜索方法，通过融合多头注意力机制与CNN特征提取模块，构建多尺度特征提取的块状骨干网络。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K上达到82.0% Top-1准确率（32M参数），COCO2017目标检测达50.4% mAP，且在低照度场景下识别鲁棒性增强。
AI.conclusion: VTCAS通过混合架构设计有效结合了Transformer的全局建模能力与CNN的局部特征提取优势，提升了视觉任务的适应性与性能。

Therefore, here we take a step forward to study the structural characteristics of Transformer and convolution and propose an architecture search method-Vision Transformer with Convolutions Architecture Search (VTCAS). authors_text: Danyang Tu,Xiongkuo Min,Huiyu Duan,Guodong Guo,Guangtao Zhai,Wei Shen
title: End-to-End Human-Gaze-Target Detection with Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 进行端到端人类注视目标检测
abstract: In this paper, we propose an effective and efficient method for Human-Gaze-Target (HGT) detection, i.e., gaze following. Current approaches decouple the HGT detection task into separate branches of salient object detection and human gaze prediction, employing a two-stage framework where human head locations must first be detected and then be fed into the next gaze target prediction sub-network. In contrast, we redefine the HGT detection task as detecting human head locations and their gaze targets, simultaneously. By this way, our method, named Human-Gaze-Target detection TRansformer or HGTTR, streamlines the HGT detection pipeline by eliminating all other additional components. HGTTR reasons about the relations of salient objects and human gaze from the global image context. Moreover, unlike existing two-stage methods that require human head locations as input and can predict only one human's gaze target at a time, HGTTR can directly predict the locations of all people and their gaze targets at one time in an end-to-end manner. The effectiveness and robustness of our proposed method are verified with extensive experiments on the two standard benchmark datasets, GazeFollowing and VideoAttentionTarget. Without bells and whistles, HGTTR outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods by large margins (6.4 mAP gain on GazeFollowing and 10.3 mAP gain on VideoAttentionTarget) with a much simpler architecture.
summary: In this paper, we propose an effective and efficient method for Human-Gaze-Target (HGT) detection, i.e., gaze following. Current approaches decouple the HGT detection task into separate branches of salient object detection and human gaze prediction, employing a two-stage framework where human head locations must first be detected and then be fed into the next gaze target prediction sub-network. In contrast, we redefine the HGT detection task as detecting human head locations and their gaze targets, simultaneously. By this way, our method, named Human-Gaze-Target detection TRansformer or HGTTR, streamlines the HGT detection pipeline by eliminating all other additional components. HGTTR reasons about the relations of salient objects and human gaze from the global image context. Moreover, unlike existing two-stage methods that require human head locations as input and can predict only one human's gaze target at a time, HGTTR can directly predict the locations of all people and their gaze targets at one time in an end-to-end manner. The effectiveness and robustness of our proposed method are verified with extensive experiments on the two standard benchmark datasets, GazeFollowing and VideoAttentionTarget. Without bells and whistles, HGTTR outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods by large margins (6.4 mAP gain on GazeFollowing and 10.3 mAP gain on VideoAttentionTarget) with a much simpler architecture.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种有效且高效的人体注视目标（HGT）检测方法，即注视跟踪。当前的方法将 HGT 检测任务解耦为显着对象检测和人体凝视预测的单独分支，采用两阶段框架，其中必须首先检测人体头部位置，然后将其输入下一个凝视目标预测子网络。相比之下，我们将 HGT 检测任务重新定义为同时检测人体头部位置及其注视目标。通过这种方式，我们的方法（称为 Human-Gaze-Target 检测 TRansformer 或 HGTTR）通过消除所有其他附加组件来简化 HGT 检测管道。 HGTTR 从全球图像背景中推理显着物体和人类凝视的关系。此外，与现有的需要人类头部位置作为输入并且一次只能预测一个人的注视目标的两阶段方法不同，HGTTR 可以以端到端的方式直接一次性预测所有人及其注视目标的位置。我们提出的方法的有效性和鲁棒性通过对两个标准基准数据集 GazeFollowing 和 VideoAttentionTarget 的大量实验得到验证。没有花里胡哨的东西，HGTTR 凭借更简单的架构大幅优于现有最先进的方法（GazeFollowing 上的 mAP 增益为 6.4，VideoAttentionTarget 上的 mAP 增益为 10.3）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的端到端人体注视目标检测方法HGTTR，同时检测人脸位置和注视目标。
AI.motivation: 现有方法采用两阶段框架分别检测人脸和预测注视目标，流程复杂且效率低下，无法同时处理多人注视目标。
AI.method: 将HGT检测任务重新定义为联合检测人脸和注视目标，设计Transformer架构直接建模全局图像上下文关系，实现单次推理预测所有人及其注视目标。
AI.result: 在GazeFollowing和VideoAttentionTarget数据集上分别取得6.4和10.3 mAP的显著提升，且架构更简洁。
AI.conclusion: HGTTR通过端到端联合建模显著优于现有两阶段方法，在精度和效率上均取得突破性进展。

authors_text: Tiasa Singha Roy,Priyam Basu,Aman Priyanshu,Rakshit Naidu
title: Interpretability of Fine-grained Classification of Sadness and Depression
title_zh: 悲伤和抑郁的细粒度分类的可解释性
abstract: While sadness is a human emotion that people experience at certain times throughout their lives, inflicting them with emotional disappointment and pain, depression is a longer term mental illness which impairs social, occupational, and other vital regions of functioning making it a much more serious issue and needs to be catered to at the earliest. NLP techniques can be utilized for the detection and subsequent diagnosis of these emotions. Most of the open sourced data on the web deal with sadness as a part of depression, as an emotion even though the difference in severity of both is huge. Thus, we create our own novel dataset illustrating the difference between the two. In this paper, we aim to highlight the difference between the two and highlight how interpretable our models are to distinctly label sadness and depression. Due to the sensitive nature of such information, privacy measures need to be taken for handling and training of such data. Hence, we also explore the effect of Federated Learning (FL) on contextualised language models.
summary: While sadness is a human emotion that people experience at certain times throughout their lives, inflicting them with emotional disappointment and pain, depression is a longer term mental illness which impairs social, occupational, and other vital regions of functioning making it a much more serious issue and needs to be catered to at the earliest. NLP techniques can be utilized for the detection and subsequent diagnosis of these emotions. Most of the open sourced data on the web deal with sadness as a part of depression, as an emotion even though the difference in severity of both is huge. Thus, we create our own novel dataset illustrating the difference between the two. In this paper, we aim to highlight the difference between the two and highlight how interpretable our models are to distinctly label sadness and depression. Due to the sensitive nature of such information, privacy measures need to be taken for handling and training of such data. Hence, we also explore the effect of Federated Learning (FL) on contextualised language models.
abstract_zh: 虽然悲伤是一种人类情感，人们在一生中的某些时候会经历，给他们带来情感上的失望和痛苦，但抑郁症是一种长期的精神疾病，它会损害社交、职业和其他重要功能领域，使其成为一个更加严重的问题，需要尽早解决。 NLP 技术可用于检测和随后诊断这些情绪。网络上的大多数开源数据都将悲伤视为抑郁症的一部分，作为一种情绪，尽管两者的严重程度差异巨大。因此，我们创建了自己的新颖数据集来说明两者之间的差异。在本文中，我们的目标是强调两者之间的差异，并强调我们的模型如何可解释以明确标记悲伤和抑郁。由于此类信息的敏感性，需要采取隐私措施来处理和培训此类数据。因此，我们还探讨了联邦学习（FL）对情境化语言模型的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过构建新型数据集和可解释模型，区分悲伤与抑郁的细粒度分类，并探索联邦学习在处理敏感数据中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有数据常将悲伤视为抑郁的组成部分，忽视二者严重程度差异，且缺乏针对敏感心理健康数据的隐私保护方法。
AI.method: 创建区分悲伤与抑郁的新型数据集，采用可解释的NLP模型进行分类，并引入联邦学习框架以保障数据隐私。
AI.result: 模型成功实现悲伤与抑郁的细粒度区分，联邦学习有效降低了数据泄露风险。
AI.conclusion: 细粒度情感分类需结合可解释模型与联邦学习，以提升心理健康检测的准确性与隐私安全性。

search_text: Interpretability of Fine-grained Classification of Sadness and Depression 悲伤和抑郁的细粒度分类的可解释性 While sadness is a human emotion that people experience at certain times throughout their lives, inflicting them with emotional disappointment and pain, depression is a longer term mental illness which impairs social, occupational, and other vital regions of functioning making it a much more serious issue and needs to be catered to at the earliest. NLP techniques can be utilized for the detection and subsequent diagnosis of these emotions. Most of the open sourced data on the web deal with sadness as a part of depression, as an emotion even though the difference in severity of both is huge. Thus, we create our own novel dataset illustrating the difference between the two. In this paper, we aim to highlight the difference between the two and highlight how interpretable our models are to distinctly label sadness and depression. Due to the sensitive nature of such information, privacy measures need to be taken for handling and training of such data. Hence, we also explore the effect of Federated Learning (FL) on contextualised language models. 虽然悲伤是一种人类情感，人们在一生中的某些时候会经历，给他们带来情感上的失望和痛苦，但抑郁症是一种长期的精神疾病，它会损害社交、职业和其他重要功能领域，使其成为一个更加严重的问题，需要尽早解决。 NLP 技术可用于检测和随后诊断这些情绪。网络上的大多数开源数据都将悲伤视为抑郁症的一部分，作为一种情绪，尽管两者的严重程度差异巨大。因此，我们创建了自己的新颖数据集来说明两者之间的差异。在本文中，我们的目标是强调两者之间的差异，并强调我们的模型如何可解释以明确标记悲伤和抑郁。由于此类信息的敏感性，需要采取隐私措施来处理和培训此类数据。因此，我们还探讨了联邦学习（FL）对情境化语言模型的影响。 本文旨在通过构建新型数据集和可解释模型，区分悲伤与抑郁的细粒度分类，并探索联邦学习在处理敏感数据中的应用。 Tiasa Singha Roy,Priyam Basu,Aman Priyanshu,Rakshit Naidu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Yi-Chang Chen,Yu-Chuan Chang,Yen-Cheng Chang,Yi-Ren Yeh
title: g2pW: A Conditional Weighted Softmax BERT for Polyphone Disambiguation in Mandarin
title_zh: g2pW：用于普通话多音素消歧的条件加权 Softmax BERT
abstract: Polyphone disambiguation is the most crucial task in Mandarin grapheme-to-phoneme (g2p) conversion. Previous studies have approached this problem using pre-trained language models, restricted output, and extra information from Part-Of-Speech (POS) tagging. Inspired by these strategies, we propose a novel approach, called g2pW, which adapts learnable softmax-weights to condition the outputs of BERT with the polyphonic character of interest and its POS tagging. Rather than using the hard mask as in previous works, our experiments show that learning a soft-weighting function for the candidate phonemes benefits performance. In addition, our proposed g2pW does not require extra pre-trained POS tagging models while using POS tags as auxiliary features since we train the POS tagging model simultaneously with the unified encoder. Experimental results show that our g2pW outperforms existing methods on the public CPP dataset. All codes, model weights, and a user-friendly package are publicly available.
summary: Polyphone disambiguation is the most crucial task in Mandarin grapheme-to-phoneme (g2p) conversion. Previous studies have approached this problem using pre-trained language models, restricted output, and extra information from Part-Of-Speech (POS) tagging. Inspired by these strategies, we propose a novel approach, called g2pW, which adapts learnable softmax-weights to condition the outputs of BERT with the polyphonic character of interest and its POS tagging. Rather than using the hard mask as in previous works, our experiments show that learning a soft-weighting function for the candidate phonemes benefits performance. In addition, our proposed g2pW does not require extra pre-trained POS tagging models while using POS tags as auxiliary features since we train the POS tagging model simultaneously with the unified encoder. Experimental results show that our g2pW outperforms existing methods on the public CPP dataset. All codes, model weights, and a user-friendly package are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 多音素消歧是普通话字素到音素（g2p）转换中最关键的任务。之前的研究已经使用预先训练的语言模型、受限输出和来自词性 (POS) 标记的额外信息来解决这个问题。受这些策略的启发，我们提出了一种称为 g2pW 的新颖方法，它采用可学习的 softmax 权重来通过感兴趣的复调字符及其 POS 标记来调节 BERT 的输出。我们的实验表明，学习候选音素的软加权函数可以提高性能，而不是像以前的作品那样使用硬掩模。此外，我们提出的 g2pW 在使用 POS 标签作为辅助特征时不需要额外的预训练 POS 标签模型，因为我们与统一编码器同时训练 POS 标签模型。实验结果表明，我们的 g2pW 在公共 CPP 数据集上优于现有方法。所有代码、模型权重和用户友好的软件包都是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件加权Softmax的BERT模型g2pW，用于解决汉语多音字消歧问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖硬掩码和额外的预训练POS模型，限制了性能。本文旨在通过软加权机制和联合训练优化多音字消歧效果。
AI.method: 提出g2pW模型，利用可学习的Softmax权重结合多音字及其POS标签，通过联合训练统一编码器和POS标签模型，替代硬掩码实现更优的候选音素加权。
AI.result: 实验表明，g2pW在公开的CPP数据集上优于现有方法，且提供了代码、模型权重和用户友好工具包。
AI.conclusion: g2pW通过软加权机制和联合训练有效提升了多音字消歧性能，无需依赖额外的预训练POS模型，具有实用价值。

Previous studies have approached this problem using pre-trained language models, restricted output, and extra information from Part-Of-Speech (POS) tagging. Inspired by these strategies, we propose a novel approach, called g2pW, which adapts learnable softmax-weights to condition the outputs of BERT with the polyphonic character of interest and its POS tagging. authors_text: Cheng Wan,Youjie Li,Cameron R. Wolfe,Anastasios Kyrillidis,Nam Sung Kim,Yingyan Lin
title: PipeGCN: Efficient Full-Graph Training of Graph Convolutional Networks with Pipelined Feature Communication
title_zh: PipeGCN：具有流水线特征通信的图卷积网络的高效全图训练
abstract: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) is the state-of-the-art method for learning graph-structured data, and training large-scale GCNs requires distributed training across multiple accelerators such that each accelerator is able to hold a partitioned subgraph. However, distributed GCN training incurs prohibitive overhead of communicating node features and feature gradients among partitions for every GCN layer during each training iteration, limiting the achievable training efficiency and model scalability. To this end, we propose PipeGCN, a simple yet effective scheme that hides the communication overhead by pipelining inter-partition communication with intra-partition computation. It is non-trivial to pipeline for efficient GCN training, as communicated node features/gradients will become stale and thus can harm the convergence, negating the pipeline benefit. Notably, little is known regarding the convergence rate of GCN training with both stale features and stale feature gradients. This work not only provides a theoretical convergence analysis but also finds the convergence rate of PipeGCN to be close to that of the vanilla distributed GCN training without any staleness. Furthermore, we develop a smoothing method to further improve PipeGCN's convergence. Extensive experiments show that PipeGCN can largely boost the training throughput (1.7x~28.5x) while achieving the same accuracy as its vanilla counterpart and existing full-graph training methods. The code is available at https://github.com/RICE-EIC/PipeGCN.
summary: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) is the state-of-the-art method for learning graph-structured data, and training large-scale GCNs requires distributed training across multiple accelerators such that each accelerator is able to hold a partitioned subgraph. However, distributed GCN training incurs prohibitive overhead of communicating node features and feature gradients among partitions for every GCN layer during each training iteration, limiting the achievable training efficiency and model scalability. To this end, we propose PipeGCN, a simple yet effective scheme that hides the communication overhead by pipelining inter-partition communication with intra-partition computation. It is non-trivial to pipeline for efficient GCN training, as communicated node features/gradients will become stale and thus can harm the convergence, negating the pipeline benefit. Notably, little is known regarding the convergence rate of GCN training with both stale features and stale feature gradients. This work not only provides a theoretical convergence analysis but also finds the convergence rate of PipeGCN to be close to that of the vanilla distributed GCN training without any staleness. Furthermore, we develop a smoothing method to further improve PipeGCN's convergence. Extensive experiments show that PipeGCN can largely boost the training throughput (1.7x~28.5x) while achieving the same accuracy as its vanilla counterpart and existing full-graph training methods. The code is available at https://github.com/RICE-EIC/PipeGCN.
abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）是学习图结构数据的最先进方法，训练大规模 GCN 需要跨多个加速器进行分布式训练，以便每个加速器能够保存分区子图。然而，分布式 GCN 训练在每次训练迭代期间在每个 GCN 层的分区之间通信节点特征和特征梯度时会产生过高的开销，从而限制了可实现的训练效率和模型可扩展性。为此，我们提出了 PipeGCN，这是一种简单而有效的方案，通过管道化分区间通信和分区内计算来隐藏通信开销。为了高效的 GCN 训练而进行管道化并非易事，因为通信的节点特征/梯度将变得陈旧，从而可能损害收敛性，从而抵消管道的优势。值得注意的是，关于使用过时特征和过时特征梯度进行 GCN 训练的收敛速度知之甚少。这项工作不仅提供了理论上的收敛分析，而且还发现 PipeGCN 的收敛速度接近普通分布式 GCN 训练的收敛速度，没有任何陈旧性。此外，我们开发了一种平滑方法来进一步提高 PipeGCN 的收敛性。大量实验表明，PipeGCN 可以极大地提高训练吞吐量（1.7 倍~28.5 倍），同时达到与普通模型和现有全图训练方法相同的精度。代码可在 https://github.com/RICE-EIC/PipeGCN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PipeGCN，通过流水线化特征通信与计算，提升图卷积网络（GCN）的分布式训练效率。
AI.motivation: 大规模GCN训练需跨加速器分布式执行，但频繁的节点特征与梯度通信导致效率低下且限制模型扩展性，而现有方法难以在保持收敛性的同时降低通信开销。
AI.method: 设计流水线机制将分区间的通信与分区内的计算重叠，结合平滑方法缓解陈旧特征/梯度对收敛的影响，理论分析证明其收敛率接近无陈旧性的基线方法。
AI.result: 实验表明PipeGCN在保持相同精度的前提下，训练吞吐量提升1.7x至28.5x，优于现有全图训练方法。
AI.conclusion: PipeGCN通过通信计算流水线化有效提升GCN训练效率，理论分析与实验验证了其收敛性与实用性，为大规模图学习提供新方案。

motivation: 大规模GCN训练需跨加速器分布式执行，但频繁的节点特征与梯度通信导致效率低下且限制模型扩展性，而现有方法难以在保持收敛性的同时降低通信开销。
method: 设计流水线机制将分区间的通信与分区内的计算重叠，结合平滑方法缓解陈旧特征/梯度对收敛的影响，理论分析证明其收敛率接近无陈旧性的基线方法。

search_text: PipeGCN: Efficient Full-Graph Training of Graph Convolutional Networks with Pipelined Feature Communication PipeGCN：具有流水线特征通信的图卷积网络的高效全图训练 Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) is the state-of-the-art method for learning graph-structured data, and training large-scale GCNs requires distributed training across multiple accelerators such that each accelerator is able to hold a partitioned subgraph. However, distributed GCN training incurs prohibitive overhead of communicating node features and feature gradients among partitions for every GCN layer during each training iteration, limiting the achievable training efficiency and model scalability. To this end, we propose PipeGCN, a simple yet effective scheme that hides the communication overhead by pipelining inter-partition communication with intra-partition computation. It is non-trivial to pipeline for efficient GCN training, as communicated node features/gradients will become stale and thus can harm the convergence, negating the pipeline benefit. Notably, little is known regarding the convergence rate of GCN training with both stale features and stale feature gradients. This work not only provides a theoretical convergence analysis but also finds the convergence rate of PipeGCN to be close to that of the vanilla distributed GCN training without any staleness. Furthermore, we develop a smoothing method to further improve PipeGCN's convergence. Extensive experiments show that PipeGCN can largely boost the training throughput (1.7x~28.5x) while achieving the same accuracy as its vanilla counterpart and existing full-graph training methods. The code is available at https://github.com/RICE-EIC/PipeGCN. 图卷积网络（GCN）是学习图结构数据的最先进方法，训练大规模 GCN 需要跨多个加速器进行分布式训练，以便每个加速器能够保存分区子图。然而，分布式 GCN 训练在每次训练迭代期间在每个 GCN 层的分区之间通信节点特征和特征梯度时会产生过高的开销，从而限制了可实现的训练效率和模型可扩展性。为此，我们提出了 PipeGCN，这是一种简单而有效的方案，通过管道化分区间通信和分区内计算来隐藏通信开销。为了高效的 GCN 训练而进行管道化并非易事，因为通信的节点特征/梯度将变得陈旧，从而可能损害收敛性，从而抵消管道的优势。值得注意的是，关于使用过时特征和过时特征梯度进行 GCN 训练的收敛速度知之甚少。这项工作不仅提供了理论上的收敛分析，而且还发现 PipeGCN 的收敛速度接近普通分布式 GCN 训练的收敛速度，没有任何陈旧性。此外，我们开发了一种平滑方法来进一步提高 PipeGCN 的收敛性。大量实验表明，PipeGCN 可以极大地提高训练吞吐量（1.7 倍~28.5 倍），同时达到与普通模型和现有全图训练方法相同的精度。代码可在 https://github.com/RICE-EIC/PipeGCN 获取。 本文提出PipeGCN，通过流水线化特征通信与计算，提升图卷积网络（GCN）的分布式训练效率。 Cheng Wan,Youjie Li,Cameron R. Wolfe,Anastasios Kyrillidis,Nam Sung Kim,Yingyan Lin cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Qingkai Fang,Rong Ye,Lei Li,Yang Feng,Mingxuan Wang
title: STEMM: Self-learning with Speech-text Manifold Mixup for Speech Translation
title_zh: STEMM：通过语音文本流形混合进行语音翻译的自学习
abstract: How to learn a better speech representation for end-to-end speech-to-text translation (ST) with limited labeled data? Existing techniques often attempt to transfer powerful machine translation (MT) capabilities to ST, but neglect the representation discrepancy across modalities. In this paper, we propose the Speech-TExt Manifold Mixup (STEMM) method to calibrate such discrepancy. Specifically, we mix up the representation sequences of different modalities, and take both unimodal speech sequences and multimodal mixed sequences as input to the translation model in parallel, and regularize their output predictions with a self-learning framework. Experiments on MuST-C speech translation benchmark and further analysis show that our method effectively alleviates the cross-modal representation discrepancy, and achieves significant improvements over a strong baseline on eight translation directions.
summary: How to learn a better speech representation for end-to-end speech-to-text translation (ST) with limited labeled data? Existing techniques often attempt to transfer powerful machine translation (MT) capabilities to ST, but neglect the representation discrepancy across modalities. In this paper, we propose the Speech-TExt Manifold Mixup (STEMM) method to calibrate such discrepancy. Specifically, we mix up the representation sequences of different modalities, and take both unimodal speech sequences and multimodal mixed sequences as input to the translation model in parallel, and regularize their output predictions with a self-learning framework. Experiments on MuST-C speech translation benchmark and further analysis show that our method effectively alleviates the cross-modal representation discrepancy, and achieves significant improvements over a strong baseline on eight translation directions.
abstract_zh: 如何使用有限的标记数据学习更好的语音表示以进行端到端语音到文本翻译（ST）？现有技术通常试图将强大的机器翻译（MT）功能转移到 ST，但忽略了跨模态的表示差异。在本文中，我们提出了语音文本流形混合（STEMM）方法来校准这种差异。具体来说，我们混合不同模态的表示序列，并行地将单模态语音序列和多模态混合序列作为翻译模型的输入，并通过自学习框架规范它们的输出预测。 MuST-C 语音翻译基准上的实验和进一步分析表明，我们的方法有效地缓解了跨模态表示差异，并在八个翻译方向上比强基线取得了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决在有限标注数据下，如何学习更优的语音表示以提升端到端语音到文本翻译性能的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽视了语音与文本模态间的表示差异，导致跨模态对齐困难，影响翻译质量。
AI.method: 提出STEMM方法，通过跨模态表示序列混合，结合自学习框架正则化单模态与混合模态输入的输出预测。
AI.result: 在MuST-C基准测试中，该方法在八个翻译方向上显著优于强基线，有效缓解了跨模态表示差异问题。
AI.conclusion: STEMM方法有效缓解了跨模态表示差异，显著提升了语音翻译性能，为小样本场景下的语音翻译提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sangeeta Srivastava,Ho-Hsiang Wu,Joao Rulff,Magdalena Fuentes,Mark Cartwright,Claudio Silva,Anish Arora,Juan Pablo Bello
title: A Study on Robustness to Perturbations for Representations of Environmental Sound
title_zh: 环境声表示的扰动鲁棒性研究
abstract: Audio applications involving environmental sound analysis increasingly use general-purpose audio representations, also known as embeddings, for transfer learning. Recently, Holistic Evaluation of Audio Representations (HEAR) evaluated twenty-nine embedding models on nineteen diverse tasks. However, the evaluation's effectiveness depends on the variation already captured within a given dataset. Therefore, for a given data domain, it is unclear how the representations would be affected by the variations caused by myriad microphones' range and acoustic conditions -- commonly known as channel effects. We aim to extend HEAR to evaluate invariance to channel effects in this work. To accomplish this, we imitate channel effects by injecting perturbations to the audio signal and measure the shift in the new (perturbed) embeddings with three distance measures, making the evaluation domain-dependent but not task-dependent. Combined with the downstream performance, it helps us make a more informed prediction of how robust the embeddings are to the channel effects. We evaluate two embeddings -- YAMNet, and OpenL3 on monophonic (UrbanSound8K) and polyphonic (SONYC-UST) urban datasets. We show that one distance measure does not suffice in such task-independent evaluation. Although Fréchet Audio Distance (FAD) correlates with the trend of the performance drop in the downstream task most accurately, we show that we need to study FAD in conjunction with the other distances to get a clear understanding of the overall effect of the perturbation. In terms of the embedding performance, we find OpenL3 to be more robust than YAMNet, which aligns with the HEAR evaluation.
summary: Audio applications involving environmental sound analysis increasingly use general-purpose audio representations, also known as embeddings, for transfer learning. Recently, Holistic Evaluation of Audio Representations (HEAR) evaluated twenty-nine embedding models on nineteen diverse tasks. However, the evaluation's effectiveness depends on the variation already captured within a given dataset. Therefore, for a given data domain, it is unclear how the representations would be affected by the variations caused by myriad microphones' range and acoustic conditions -- commonly known as channel effects. We aim to extend HEAR to evaluate invariance to channel effects in this work. To accomplish this, we imitate channel effects by injecting perturbations to the audio signal and measure the shift in the new (perturbed) embeddings with three distance measures, making the evaluation domain-dependent but not task-dependent. Combined with the downstream performance, it helps us make a more informed prediction of how robust the embeddings are to the channel effects. We evaluate two embeddings -- YAMNet, and OpenL3 on monophonic (UrbanSound8K) and polyphonic (SONYC-UST) urban datasets. We show that one distance measure does not suffice in such task-independent evaluation. Although Fréchet Audio Distance (FAD) correlates with the trend of the performance drop in the downstream task most accurately, we show that we need to study FAD in conjunction with the other distances to get a clear understanding of the overall effect of the perturbation. In terms of the embedding performance, we find OpenL3 to be more robust than YAMNet, which aligns with the HEAR evaluation.
abstract_zh: 涉及环境声音分析的音频应用越来越多地使用通用音频表示（也称为嵌入）进行迁移学习。最近，音频表示的整体评估 (HEAR) 评估了 19 个不同任务的 29 个嵌入模型。然而，评估的有效性取决于给定数据集中已经捕获的变化。因此，对于给定的数据域，尚不清楚无数麦克风的范围和声学条件引起的变化（通常称为通道效应）将如何影响表示。我们的目标是在这项工作中扩展 HEAR 以评估通道效应的不变性。为了实现这一目标，我们通过向音频信号注入扰动来模拟通道效应，并使用三个距离度量来测量新（扰动）嵌入的变化，从而使评估依赖于域而不依赖于任务。与下游性能相结合，它可以帮助我们更明智地预测嵌入对通道效应的鲁棒性。我们在单音 (UrbanSound8K) 和复音 (SONYC-UST) 城市数据集上评估两种嵌入——YAMNet 和 OpenL3。我们表明，在这种与任务无关的评估中，一种距离测量是不够的。尽管 Fréchet 音频距离 (FAD) 与下游任务中性能下降的趋势相关性最准确，但我们表明，我们需要将 FAD 与其他距离结合起来研究，才能清楚地了解扰动的整体影响。就嵌入性能而言，我们发现 OpenL3 比 YAMNet 更稳健，这与 HEAR 评估一致。

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在评估环境声音表示（嵌入）对通道效应（如麦克风和声学条件变化）的鲁棒性，通过注入扰动并测量嵌入变化来扩展HEAR评估框架。
AI.motivation: 现有评估（如HEAR）依赖数据集内的变化，但无法明确表示在通道效应下的表现，需针对不同声学条件下的鲁棒性进行独立评估。
AI.method: 通过向音频信号注入扰动模拟通道效应，使用三种距离度量（包括FAD）测量嵌入变化，并结合下游任务性能分析嵌入的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 单一距离度量不足，FAD与性能下降趋势最相关，但需结合其他度量全面评估。OpenL3比YAMNet更鲁棒，与HEAR结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 通道效应下的嵌入鲁棒性需多维度评估，OpenL3在城市声学数据中表现更优，为实际应用提供参考。

We show that one distance measure does not suffice in such task-independent evaluation. Although Fréchet Audio Distance (FAD) correlates with the trend of the performance drop in the downstream task most accurately, we show that we need to study FAD in conjunction with the other distances to get a clear understanding of the overall effect of the perturbation. In terms of the embedding performance, we find OpenL3 to be more robust than YAMNet, which aligns with the HEAR evaluation. 涉及环境声音分析的音频应用越来越多地使用通用音频表示（也称为嵌入）进行迁移学习。最近，音频表示的整体评估 (HEAR) 评估了 19 个不同任务的 29 个嵌入模型。然而，评估的有效性取决于给定数据集中已经捕获的变化。因此，对于给定的数据域，尚不清楚无数麦克风的范围和声学条件引起的变化（通常称为通道效应）将如何影响表示。我们的目标是在这项工作中扩展 HEAR 以评估通道效应的不变性。为了实现这一目标，我们通过向音频信号注入扰动来模拟通道效应，并使用三个距离度量来测量新（扰动）嵌入的变化，从而使评估依赖于域而不依赖于任务。与下游性能相结合，它可以帮助我们更明智地预测嵌入对通道效应的鲁棒性。我们在单音 (UrbanSound8K) 和复音 (SONYC-UST) 城市数据集上评估两种嵌入——YAMNet 和 OpenL3。我们表明，在这种与任务无关的评估中，一种距离测量是不够的。尽管 Fréchet 音频距离 (FAD) 与下游任务中性能下降的趋势相关性最准确，但我们表明，我们需要将 FAD 与其他距离结合起来研究，才能清楚地了解扰动的整体影响。就嵌入性能而言，我们发现 OpenL3 比 YAMNet 更稳健，这与 HEAR 评估一致。 本研究旨在评估环境声音表示（嵌入）对通道效应（如麦克风和声学条件变化）的鲁棒性，通过注入扰动并测量嵌入变化来扩展HEAR评估框架。 Sangeeta Srivastava,Ho-Hsiang Wu,Joao Rulff,Magdalena Fuentes,Mark Cartwright,Claudio Silva,Anish Arora,Juan Pablo Bello cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Samir Yitzhak Gadre,Mitchell Wortsman,Gabriel Ilharco,Ludwig Schmidt,Shuran Song
title: CoWs on Pasture: Baselines and Benchmarks for Language-Driven Zero-Shot Object Navigation
title_zh: 牧场上的奶牛：语言驱动的零样本对象导航的基线和基准
abstract: For robots to be generally useful, they must be able to find arbitrary objects described by people (i.e., be language-driven) even without expensive navigation training on in-domain data (i.e., perform zero-shot inference). We explore these capabilities in a unified setting: language-driven zero-shot object navigation (L-ZSON). Inspired by the recent success of open-vocabulary models for image classification, we investigate a straightforward framework, CLIP on Wheels (CoW), to adapt open-vocabulary models to this task without fine-tuning. To better evaluate L-ZSON, we introduce the Pasture benchmark, which considers finding uncommon objects, objects described by spatial and appearance attributes, and hidden objects described relative to visible objects. We conduct an in-depth empirical study by directly deploying 21 CoW baselines across Habitat, RoboTHOR, and Pasture. In total, we evaluate over 90k navigation episodes and find that (1) CoW baselines often struggle to leverage language descriptions, but are proficient at finding uncommon objects. (2) A simple CoW, with CLIP-based object localization and classical exploration -- and no additional training -- matches the navigation efficiency of a state-of-the-art ZSON method trained for 500M steps on Habitat MP3D data. This same CoW provides a 15.6 percentage point improvement in success over a state-of-the-art RoboTHOR ZSON model.
summary: For robots to be generally useful, they must be able to find arbitrary objects described by people (i.e., be language-driven) even without expensive navigation training on in-domain data (i.e., perform zero-shot inference). We explore these capabilities in a unified setting: language-driven zero-shot object navigation (L-ZSON). Inspired by the recent success of open-vocabulary models for image classification, we investigate a straightforward framework, CLIP on Wheels (CoW), to adapt open-vocabulary models to this task without fine-tuning. To better evaluate L-ZSON, we introduce the Pasture benchmark, which considers finding uncommon objects, objects described by spatial and appearance attributes, and hidden objects described relative to visible objects. We conduct an in-depth empirical study by directly deploying 21 CoW baselines across Habitat, RoboTHOR, and Pasture. In total, we evaluate over 90k navigation episodes and find that (1) CoW baselines often struggle to leverage language descriptions, but are proficient at finding uncommon objects. (2) A simple CoW, with CLIP-based object localization and classical exploration -- and no additional training -- matches the navigation efficiency of a state-of-the-art ZSON method trained for 500M steps on Habitat MP3D data. This same CoW provides a 15.6 percentage point improvement in success over a state-of-the-art RoboTHOR ZSON model.
abstract_zh: 为了使机器人普遍有用，即使没有对域内数据进行昂贵的导航训练（即执行零样本推理），它们也必须能够找到人们描述的任意对象（即由语言驱动）。我们在统一的环境中探索这些功能：语言驱动的零样本对象导航（L-ZSON）。受到图像分类开放词汇模型最近成功的启发，我们研究了一个简单的框架，CLIP on Wheels (CoW)，使开放词汇模型无需微调即可适应此任务。为了更好地评估 L-ZSON，我们引入了 Pasture 基准，该基准考虑寻找不常见的对象、由空间和外观属性描述的对象以及相对于可见对象描述的隐藏对象。我们通过直接在 Habitat、RoboTHOR 和 Pasture 部署 21 个 CoW 基线来进行深入的实证研究。总的来说，我们评估了超过 90k 的导航片段，发现 (1) CoW 基线经常难以利用语言描述，但擅长查找不常见的对象。 (2) 一个简单的 CoW，具有基于 CLIP 的对象定位和经典探索，无需额外的训练，与在 Habitat MP3D 数据上训练 5 亿步的最先进的 ZSON 方法的导航效率相匹配。与最先进的 RoboTHOR ZSON 模型相比，该 CoW 的成功率提高了 15.6 个百分点。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了语言驱动的零样本物体导航任务，提出了一种基于CLIP的框架CoW，并引入了Pasture基准测试以评估其性能。
AI.motivation: 为使机器人具备通用性，需在无特定训练数据的情况下根据语言指令找到目标物体，传统方法依赖大量训练数据，而零样本方法可提升适应性。
AI.method: 采用CLIP on Wheels（CoW）框架，结合基于CLIP的物体定位与经典探索策略，无需额外训练即可适应零样本导航任务。
AI.result: 实验显示CoW在寻找不常见物体时表现优异，且在Habitat中与训练5亿步的SOTA方法效率相当，在RoboTHOR上成功率提升15.6个百分点。
AI.conclusion: CoW框架无需微调即可实现高效零样本导航，Pasture基准测试为未来研究提供了评估标准。
