authors_text: Mohamed Yousef,Marcel Ackermann,Unmesh Kurup,Tom Bishop
title: No Shifted Augmentations (NSA): compact distributions for robust self-supervised Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 无移位增强 (NSA)：用于稳健的自监督异常检测的紧凑分布
abstract: Unsupervised Anomaly detection (AD) requires building a notion of normalcy, distinguishing in-distribution (ID) and out-of-distribution (OOD) data, using only available ID samples. Recently, large gains were made on this task for the domain of natural images using self-supervised contrastive feature learning as a first step followed by kNN or traditional one-class classifiers for feature scoring. Learned representations that are non-uniformly distributed on the unit hypersphere have been shown to be beneficial for this task. We go a step further and investigate how the \emph {geometrical compactness} of the ID feature distribution makes isolating and detecting outliers easier, especially in the realistic situation when ID training data is polluted (i.e. ID data contains some OOD data that is used for learning the feature extractor parameters). We propose novel architectural modifications to the self-supervised feature learning step, that enable such compact distributions for ID data to be learned. We show that the proposed modifications can be effectively applied to most existing self-supervised objectives, with large gains in performance. Furthermore, this improved OOD performance is obtained without resorting to tricks such as using strongly augmented ID images (e.g. by 90 degree rotations) as proxies for the unseen OOD data, as these impose overly prescriptive assumptions about ID data and its invariances. We perform extensive studies on benchmark datasets for one-class OOD detection and show state-of-the-art performance in the presence of pollution in the ID data, and comparable performance otherwise. We also propose and extensively evaluate a novel feature scoring technique based on the angular Mahalanobis distance, and propose a simple and novel technique for feature ensembling during evaluation that enables a big boost in performance at nearly zero run-time cost.
summary: Unsupervised Anomaly detection (AD) requires building a notion of normalcy, distinguishing in-distribution (ID) and out-of-distribution (OOD) data, using only available ID samples. Recently, large gains were made on this task for the domain of natural images using self-supervised contrastive feature learning as a first step followed by kNN or traditional one-class classifiers for feature scoring. Learned representations that are non-uniformly distributed on the unit hypersphere have been shown to be beneficial for this task. We go a step further and investigate how the \emph {geometrical compactness} of the ID feature distribution makes isolating and detecting outliers easier, especially in the realistic situation when ID training data is polluted (i.e. ID data contains some OOD data that is used for learning the feature extractor parameters). We propose novel architectural modifications to the self-supervised feature learning step, that enable such compact distributions for ID data to be learned. We show that the proposed modifications can be effectively applied to most existing self-supervised objectives, with large gains in performance. Furthermore, this improved OOD performance is obtained without resorting to tricks such as using strongly augmented ID images (e.g. by 90 degree rotations) as proxies for the unseen OOD data, as these impose overly prescriptive assumptions about ID data and its invariances. We perform extensive studies on benchmark datasets for one-class OOD detection and show state-of-the-art performance in the presence of pollution in the ID data, and comparable performance otherwise. We also propose and extensively evaluate a novel feature scoring technique based on the angular Mahalanobis distance, and propose a simple and novel technique for feature ensembling during evaluation that enables a big boost in performance at nearly zero run-time cost.
abstract_zh: 无监督异常检测 (AD) 需要构建常态概念，仅使用可用的 ID 样本来区分分布内 (ID) 和分布外 (OOD) 数据。最近，使用自监督对比特征学习作为第一步，然后使用 kNN 或传统的一类分类器进行特征评分，在自然图像领域的这项任务上取得了巨大的成果。已证明，在单位超球面上非均匀分布的学习表示对此任务是有益的。我们更进一步研究 ID 特征分布的 emph {几何紧凑性}如何使隔离和检测异常值变得更容易，特别是在 ID 训练数据被污染的现实情况下（即 ID 数据包含一些用于学习特征提取器参数的 OOD 数据）。我们对自监督特征学习步骤提出了新颖的架构修改，使得能够学习如此紧凑的 ID 数据分布。我们表明，所提出的修改可以有效地应用于大多数现有的自我监督目标，并在性能方面取得巨大进步。此外，这种改进的 OOD 性能是在不诉诸技巧的情况下获得的，例如使用强烈增强的 ID 图像（例如通过 90 度旋转）作为看不见的 OOD 数据的代理，因为这些技巧对 ID 数据及其不变性强加了过度规定性的假设。我们对一类 OOD 检测的基准数据集进行了广泛的研究，并在 ID 数据存在污染的情况下展示了最先进的性能，以及其他方面的可比性能。我们还提出并广泛评估了一种基于角度马哈拉诺比斯距离的新颖特征评分技术，并提出了一种在评估过程中进行特征集成的简单而新颖的技术，该技术能够以几乎零运行时间成本大幅提升性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出No Shifted Augmentations (NSA)方法，通过构建几何紧致的正常数据特征分布，提升自监督异常检测在污染数据下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖强数据增强假设，但现实场景中训练数据可能被污染（含异常数据），传统方法因过度依赖数据不变性假设而失效。
AI.method: 设计新型自监督特征学习架构，强制学习紧致的单位超球面分布；提出基于角度马氏距离的特征评分技术及无代价的特征集成策略。
AI.result: 在污染数据基准测试中达到SOTA性能，常规场景下表现与现有方法相当，无需使用90度旋转等强增强策略。
AI.conclusion: NSA通过几何紧致性提升异常检测鲁棒性，验证了无需强数据假设即可实现高性能异常检测的可行性。

search_text: No Shifted Augmentations (NSA): compact distributions for robust self-supervised Anomaly Detection 无移位增强 (NSA)：用于稳健的自监督异常检测的紧凑分布 Unsupervised Anomaly detection (AD) requires building a notion of normalcy, distinguishing in-distribution (ID) and out-of-distribution (OOD) data, using only available ID samples. Recently, large gains were made on this task for the domain of natural images using self-supervised contrastive feature learning as a first step followed by kNN or traditional one-class classifiers for feature scoring. Learned representations that are non-uniformly distributed on the unit hypersphere have been shown to be beneficial for this task. We go a step further and investigate how the \emph {geometrical compactness} of the ID feature distribution makes isolating and detecting outliers easier, especially in the realistic situation when ID training data is polluted (i.e. ID data contains some OOD data that is used for learning the feature extractor parameters). We propose novel architectural modifications to the self-supervised feature learning step, that enable such compact distributions for ID data to be learned. We show that the proposed modifications can be effectively applied to most existing self-supervised objectives, with large gains in performance. Furthermore, this improved OOD performance is obtained without resorting to tricks such as using strongly augmented ID images (e.g. by 90 degree rotations) as proxies for the unseen OOD data, as these impose overly prescriptive assumptions about ID data and its invariances. We perform extensive studies on benchmark datasets for one-class OOD detection and show state-of-the-art performance in the presence of pollution in the ID data, and comparable performance otherwise. We also propose and extensively evaluate a novel feature scoring technique based on the angular Mahalanobis distance, and propose a simple and novel technique for feature ensembling during evaluation that enables a big boost in performance at nearly zero run-time cost. 无监督异常检测 (AD) 需要构建常态概念，仅使用可用的 ID 样本来区分分布内 (ID) 和分布外 (OOD) 数据。最近，使用自监督对比特征学习作为第一步，然后使用 kNN 或传统的一类分类器进行特征评分，在自然图像领域的这项任务上取得了巨大的成果。已证明，在单位超球面上非均匀分布的学习表示对此任务是有益的。我们更进一步研究 ID 特征分布的 emph {几何紧凑性}如何使隔离和检测异常值变得更容易，特别是在 ID 训练数据被污染的现实情况下（即 ID 数据包含一些用于学习特征提取器参数的 OOD 数据）。我们对自监督特征学习步骤提出了新颖的架构修改，使得能够学习如此紧凑的 ID 数据分布。我们表明，所提出的修改可以有效地应用于大多数现有的自我监督目标，并在性能方面取得巨大进步。此外，这种改进的 OOD 性能是在不诉诸技巧的情况下获得的，例如使用强烈增强的 ID 图像（例如通过 90 度旋转）作为看不见的 OOD 数据的代理，因为这些技巧对 ID 数据及其不变性强加了过度规定性的假设。我们对一类 OOD 检测的基准数据集进行了广泛的研究，并在 ID 数据存在污染的情况下展示了最先进的性能，以及其他方面的可比性能。我们还提出并广泛评估了一种基于角度马哈拉诺比斯距离的新颖特征评分技术，并提出了一种在评估过程中进行特征集成的简单而新颖的技术，该技术能够以几乎零运行时间成本大幅提升性能。 本文提出No Shifted Augmentations (NSA)方法，通过构建几何紧致的正常数据特征分布，提升自监督异常检测在污染数据下的鲁棒性。 Mohamed Yousef,Marcel Ackermann,Unmesh Kurup,Tom Bishop cs.CV

authors_text: Ganesh Jawahar,Muhammad Abdul-Mageed,Laks V. S. Lakshmanan
title: Automatic Detection of Entity-Manipulated Text using Factual Knowledge
title_zh: 使用事实知识自动检测实体操作的文本
abstract: In this work, we focus on the problem of distinguishing a human written news article from a news article that is created by manipulating entities in a human written news article (e.g., replacing entities with factually incorrect entities). Such manipulated articles can mislead the reader by posing as a human written news article. We propose a neural network based detector that detects manipulated news articles by reasoning about the facts mentioned in the article. Our proposed detector exploits factual knowledge via graph convolutional neural network along with the textual information in the news article. We also create challenging datasets for this task by considering various strategies to generate the new replacement entity (e.g., entity generation from GPT-2). In all the settings, our proposed model either matches or outperforms the state-of-the-art detector in terms of accuracy. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/UBC-NLP/manipulated_entity_detection.
summary: In this work, we focus on the problem of distinguishing a human written news article from a news article that is created by manipulating entities in a human written news article (e.g., replacing entities with factually incorrect entities). Such manipulated articles can mislead the reader by posing as a human written news article. We propose a neural network based detector that detects manipulated news articles by reasoning about the facts mentioned in the article. Our proposed detector exploits factual knowledge via graph convolutional neural network along with the textual information in the news article. We also create challenging datasets for this task by considering various strategies to generate the new replacement entity (e.g., entity generation from GPT-2). In all the settings, our proposed model either matches or outperforms the state-of-the-art detector in terms of accuracy. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/UBC-NLP/manipulated_entity_detection.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们重点关注区分人类撰写的新闻文章和通过操纵人类撰写的新闻文章中的实体（例如，用事实不正确的实体替换实体）创建的新闻文章的问题。此类经过操纵的文章可能会冒充人工撰写的新闻文章来误导读者。我们提出了一种基于神经网络的检测器，通过推理文章中提到的事实来检测被操纵的新闻文章。我们提出的检测器通过图卷积神经网络利用事实知识以及新闻文章中的文本信息。我们还通过考虑各种策略来生成新的替换实体（例如，从 GPT-2 生成实体），为此任务创建具有挑战性的数据集。在所有设置中，我们提出的模型在准确性方面都匹配或优于最先进的检测器。我们的代码和数据可在 https://github.com/UBC-NLP/manipulated_entity_detection 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于事实知识的神经网络检测器，用于自动识别通过替换实体生成的虚假新闻文章。
AI.motivation: 实体被篡改的新闻文章可能误导读者，现有方法难以有效检测此类操纵行为，需开发新方法应对。
AI.method: 结合图卷积神经网络（GCN）和文本信息，利用事实知识进行推理，同时构建包含多种实体替换策略（如GPT-2生成）的挑战性数据集。
AI.result: 在多种设置下，所提模型在准确率上达到或超越现有最先进检测器的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过整合事实知识与文本分析有效检测实体操纵文本，代码和数据集已开源供进一步研究。

authors_text: Gu Wang,Fabian Manhardt,Xingyu Liu,Xiangyang Ji,Federico Tombari
title: Occlusion-Aware Self-Supervised Monocular 6D Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: 遮挡感知自监督单目 6D 物体姿态估计
comment: Accepted to TPAMI 2021, in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2004.06468
comments: Accepted to TPAMI 2021, in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2004.06468
abstract: 6D object pose estimation is a fundamental yet challenging problem in computer vision. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have recently proven to be capable of predicting reliable 6D pose estimates even under monocular settings. Nonetheless, CNNs are identified as being extremely data-driven, and acquiring adequate annotations is oftentimes very time-consuming and labor intensive. To overcome this limitation, we propose a novel monocular 6D pose estimation approach by means of self-supervised learning, removing the need for real annotations. After training our proposed network fully supervised with synthetic RGB data, we leverage current trends in noisy student training and differentiable rendering to further self-supervise the model on these unsupervised real RGB(-D) samples, seeking for a visually and geometrically optimal alignment. Moreover, employing both visible and amodal mask information, our self-supervision becomes very robust towards challenging scenarios such as occlusion. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our proposed self-supervision outperforms all other methods relying on synthetic data or employing elaborate techniques from the domain adaptation realm. Noteworthy, our self-supervised approach consistently improves over its synthetically trained baseline and often almost closes the gap towards its fully supervised counterpart. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/THU-DA-6D-Pose-Group/self6dpp.git.
summary: 6D object pose estimation is a fundamental yet challenging problem in computer vision. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have recently proven to be capable of predicting reliable 6D pose estimates even under monocular settings. Nonetheless, CNNs are identified as being extremely data-driven, and acquiring adequate annotations is oftentimes very time-consuming and labor intensive. To overcome this limitation, we propose a novel monocular 6D pose estimation approach by means of self-supervised learning, removing the need for real annotations. After training our proposed network fully supervised with synthetic RGB data, we leverage current trends in noisy student training and differentiable rendering to further self-supervise the model on these unsupervised real RGB(-D) samples, seeking for a visually and geometrically optimal alignment. Moreover, employing both visible and amodal mask information, our self-supervision becomes very robust towards challenging scenarios such as occlusion. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our proposed self-supervision outperforms all other methods relying on synthetic data or employing elaborate techniques from the domain adaptation realm. Noteworthy, our self-supervised approach consistently improves over its synthetically trained baseline and often almost closes the gap towards its fully supervised counterpart. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/THU-DA-6D-Pose-Group/self6dpp.git.
abstract_zh: 6D 物体姿态估计是计算机视觉中一个基本但具有挑战性的问题。最近证明，即使在单眼设置下，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 也能够预测可靠的 6D 姿态估计。尽管如此，CNN 被认为是极度数据驱动的，获取足够的注释通常非常耗时且费力。为了克服这个限制，我们通过自监督学习提出了一种新颖的单目 6D 姿态估计方法，消除了对真实注释的需要。在使用合成 RGB 数据完全监督训练我们提出的网络后，我们利用噪声学生训练和可微渲染的当前趋势，在这些无监督的真实 RGB(-D) 样本上进一步自我监督模型，寻求视觉和几何上的最佳对齐。此外，通过使用可见光和非模态掩模信息，我们的自我监督对于遮挡等具有挑战性的场景变得非常强大。广泛的评估表明，我们提出的自我监督优于依赖合成数据或采用领域适应领域的复杂技术的所有其他方法。值得注意的是，我们的自我监督方法不断改进其综合训练的基线，并且通常几乎缩小了与完全监督的方法的差距。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/THU-DA-6D-Pose-Group/self6dpp.git 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的单目6D目标位姿估计方法，特别关注遮挡场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN依赖大量标注数据，获取成本高。合成数据训练存在域间隙问题，而现有自监督方法对遮挡等复杂场景适应性不足。
AI.method: 先用合成RGB数据全监督预训练网络，再通过噪声学生训练和可微渲染在真实RGB(-D)数据上自监督优化，结合可见与非可见掩码提升遮挡鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中超越基于合成数据和其他域适应方法的性能，自监督模型较合成基线提升显著，接近全监督效果。
AI.conclusion: 该自监督框架有效缩小了合成与真实数据间的性能差距，尤其在遮挡场景下表现优异，代码已开源。

result: 在多个基准测试中超越基于合成数据和其他域适应方法的性能，自监督模型较合成基线提升显著，接近全监督效果。
conclusion: 该自监督框架有效缩小了合成与真实数据间的性能差距，尤其在遮挡场景下表现优异，代码已开源。
search_text: Occlusion-Aware Self-Supervised Monocular 6D Object Pose Estimation 遮挡感知自监督单目 6D 物体姿态估计 6D object pose estimation is a fundamental yet challenging problem in computer vision. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have recently proven to be capable of predicting reliable 6D pose estimates even under monocular settings. Nonetheless, CNNs are identified as being extremely data-driven, and acquiring adequate annotations is oftentimes very time-consuming and labor intensive. To overcome this limitation, we propose a novel monocular 6D pose estimation approach by means of self-supervised learning, removing the need for real annotations. After training our proposed network fully supervised with synthetic RGB data, we leverage current trends in noisy student training and differentiable rendering to further self-supervise the model on these unsupervised real RGB(-D) samples, seeking for a visually and geometrically optimal alignment. Moreover, employing both visible and amodal mask information, our self-supervision becomes very robust towards challenging scenarios such as occlusion. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our proposed self-supervision outperforms all other methods relying on synthetic data or employing elaborate techniques from the domain adaptation realm. Noteworthy, our self-supervised approach consistently improves over its synthetically trained baseline and often almost closes the gap towards its fully supervised counterpart. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/THU-DA-6D-Pose-Group/self6dpp.git. 6D 物体姿态估计是计算机视觉中一个基本但具有挑战性的问题。最近证明，即使在单眼设置下，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 也能够预测可靠的 6D 姿态估计。尽管如此，CNN 被认为是极度数据驱动的，获取足够的注释通常非常耗时且费力。为了克服这个限制，我们通过自监督学习提出了一种新颖的单目 6D 姿态估计方法，消除了对真实注释的需要。在使用合成 RGB 数据完全监督训练我们提出的网络后，我们利用噪声学生训练和可微渲染的当前趋势，在这些无监督的真实 RGB(-D) 样本上进一步自我监督模型，寻求视觉和几何上的最佳对齐。此外，通过使用可见光和非模态掩模信息，我们的自我监督对于遮挡等具有挑战性的场景变得非常强大。广泛的评估表明，我们提出的自我监督优于依赖合成数据或采用领域适应领域的复杂技术的所有其他方法。值得注意的是，我们的自我监督方法不断改进其综合训练的基线，并且通常几乎缩小了与完全监督的方法的差距。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/THU-DA-6D-Pose-Group/self6dpp.git 上公开获取。 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的单目6D目标位姿估计方法，特别关注遮挡场景下的鲁棒性。 Gu Wang,Fabian Manhardt,Xingyu Liu,Xiangyang Ji,Federico Tombari cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Ali Emre Varol,Veysel Kocaman,Hasham Ul Haq,David Talby
title: Understanding COVID-19 News Coverage using Medical NLP
title_zh: 使用医学 NLP 了解 COVID-19 新闻报道
comment: Proceedings of the Text2Story'22 Workshop, Stavanger (Norway), 10-April-2022
comments: Proceedings of the Text2Story'22 Workshop, Stavanger (Norway), 10-April-2022
abstract: Being a global pandemic, the COVID-19 outbreak received global media attention. In this study, we analyze news publications from CNN and The Guardian - two of the world's most influential media organizations. The dataset includes more than 36,000 articles, analyzed using the clinical and biomedical Natural Language Processing (NLP) models from the Spark NLP for Healthcare library, which enables a deeper analysis of medical concepts than previously achieved. The analysis covers key entities and phrases, observed biases, and change over time in news coverage by correlating mined medical symptoms, procedures, drugs, and guidance with commonly mentioned demographic and occupational groups. Another analysis is of extracted Adverse Drug Events about drug and vaccine manufacturers, which when reported by major news outlets has an impact on vaccine hesitancy.
summary: Being a global pandemic, the COVID-19 outbreak received global media attention. In this study, we analyze news publications from CNN and The Guardian - two of the world's most influential media organizations. The dataset includes more than 36,000 articles, analyzed using the clinical and biomedical Natural Language Processing (NLP) models from the Spark NLP for Healthcare library, which enables a deeper analysis of medical concepts than previously achieved. The analysis covers key entities and phrases, observed biases, and change over time in news coverage by correlating mined medical symptoms, procedures, drugs, and guidance with commonly mentioned demographic and occupational groups. Another analysis is of extracted Adverse Drug Events about drug and vaccine manufacturers, which when reported by major news outlets has an impact on vaccine hesitancy.
abstract_zh: 作为全球大流行病，COVID-19 的爆发受到了全球媒体的关注。在这项研究中，我们分析了 CNN 和卫报这两个世界上最具影响力的媒体组织的新闻出版物。该数据集包含超过 36,000 篇文章，使用 Spark NLP for Healthcare 库中的临床和生物医学自然语言处理 (NLP) 模型进行分析，这使得对医学概念的分析比以前更深入。通过将挖掘的医疗症状、程序、药物和指南与常见的人口和职业群体相关联，分析涵盖了关键实体和短语、观察到的偏见以及新闻报道随时间的变化。另一项分析是提取有关药品和疫苗制造商的药品不良事件，这些事件在主要新闻媒体报道时会对疫苗犹豫产生影响。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过医疗自然语言处理技术分析CNN和《卫报》的36000多篇新冠新闻，探讨媒体报道中的医学概念、偏见及随时间的变化。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情的媒体报道影响公众健康决策，需通过系统分析揭示新闻中的医学信息偏差及对疫苗犹豫的影响。
AI.method: 利用Spark NLP for Healthcare库的临床NLP模型，提取新闻中的医学实体、药物事件及人口统计信息，并进行时间关联分析。
AI.result: 识别出新闻中医疗症状、药物及指导的演变趋势，发现对药企的负面报道与疫苗犹豫存在关联，揭示媒体在报道中的潜在偏见。
AI.conclusion: 医疗NLP技术能深度解析新闻内容，为理解媒体如何塑造公共卫生叙事提供新视角，需关注报道偏差对公众健康行为的影响。

authors_text: Shian Du,Yihong Luo,Wei Chen,Jian Xu,Delu Zeng
title: TO-FLOW: Efficient Continuous Normalizing Flows with Temporal Optimization adjoint with Moving Speed
title_zh: TO-FLOW：具有时间优化伴随移动速度的高效连续归一化流
abstract: Continuous normalizing flows (CNFs) construct invertible mappings between an arbitrary complex distribution and an isotropic Gaussian distribution using Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (neural ODEs). It has not been tractable on large datasets due to the incremental complexity of the neural ODE training. Optimal Transport theory has been applied to regularize the dynamics of the ODE to speed up training in recent works. In this paper, a temporal optimization is proposed by optimizing the evolutionary time for forward propagation of the neural ODE training. In this appoach, we optimize the network weights of the CNF alternately with evolutionary time by coordinate descent. Further with temporal regularization, stability of the evolution is ensured. This approach can be used in conjunction with the original regularization approach. We have experimentally demonstrated that the proposed approach can significantly accelerate training without sacrifying performance over baseline models.
summary: Continuous normalizing flows (CNFs) construct invertible mappings between an arbitrary complex distribution and an isotropic Gaussian distribution using Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (neural ODEs). It has not been tractable on large datasets due to the incremental complexity of the neural ODE training. Optimal Transport theory has been applied to regularize the dynamics of the ODE to speed up training in recent works. In this paper, a temporal optimization is proposed by optimizing the evolutionary time for forward propagation of the neural ODE training. In this appoach, we optimize the network weights of the CNF alternately with evolutionary time by coordinate descent. Further with temporal regularization, stability of the evolution is ensured. This approach can be used in conjunction with the original regularization approach. We have experimentally demonstrated that the proposed approach can significantly accelerate training without sacrifying performance over baseline models.
abstract_zh: 连续归一化流 (CNF) 使用神经常微分方程（神经 ODE）在任意复数分布和各向同性高斯分布之间构建可逆映射。由于神经常微分方程训练的复杂性不断增加，它在大型数据集上并不容易处理。在最近的工作中，最优传输理论已被应用于规范 ODE 的动态，以加快训练速度。在本文中，通过优化神经 ODE 训练的前向传播的进化时间，提出了时间优化。在这个方法中，我们通过坐标下降随着进化时间交替优化 CNF 的网络权重。进一步通过时间正则化，确保了演化的稳定性。该方法可以与原始正则化方法结合使用。我们通过实验证明，所提出的方法可以显着加速训练，而不会牺牲基线模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TO-FLOW方法，通过时间优化加速连续归一化流（CNF）训练，同时保持模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CNF因神经ODE训练复杂度高难以处理大规模数据，现有最优传输正则化方法仍存在优化空间。
AI.method: 采用坐标下降法交替优化神经ODE的网络权重与进化时间，并引入时间正则化确保稳定性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著提升训练速度，在多个基准模型上未牺牲性能且可与原有正则化方法结合使用。
AI.conclusion: 时间优化策略有效解决了CNF训练效率问题，为大规模数据应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Cheng Bian,Chenglang Yuan,Kai Ma,Shuang Yu,Dong Wei,Yefeng Zheng
title: Domain Adaptation Meets Zero-Shot Learning: An Annotation-Efficient Approach to Multi-Modality Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 领域适应与零样本学习的结合：一种高效注释的多模态医学图像分割方法
abstract: Due to the lack of properly annotated medical data, exploring the generalization capability of the deep model is becoming a public concern. Zero-shot learning (ZSL) has emerged in recent years to equip the deep model with the ability to recognize unseen classes. However, existing studies mainly focus on natural images, which utilize linguistic models to extract auxiliary information for ZSL. It is impractical to apply the natural image ZSL solutions directly to medical images, since the medical terminology is very domain-specific, and it is not easy to acquire linguistic models for the medical terminology. In this work, we propose a new paradigm of ZSL specifically for medical images utilizing cross-modality information. We make three main contributions with the proposed paradigm. First, we extract the prior knowledge about the segmentation targets, called relation prototypes, from the prior model and then propose a cross-modality adaptation module to inherit the prototypes to the zero-shot model. Second, we propose a relation prototype awareness module to make the zero-shot model aware of information contained in the prototypes. Last but not least, we develop an inheritance attention module to recalibrate the relation prototypes to enhance the inheritance process. The proposed framework is evaluated on two public cross-modality datasets including a cardiac dataset and an abdominal dataset. Extensive experiments show that the proposed framework significantly outperforms the state of the arts.
summary: Due to the lack of properly annotated medical data, exploring the generalization capability of the deep model is becoming a public concern. Zero-shot learning (ZSL) has emerged in recent years to equip the deep model with the ability to recognize unseen classes. However, existing studies mainly focus on natural images, which utilize linguistic models to extract auxiliary information for ZSL. It is impractical to apply the natural image ZSL solutions directly to medical images, since the medical terminology is very domain-specific, and it is not easy to acquire linguistic models for the medical terminology. In this work, we propose a new paradigm of ZSL specifically for medical images utilizing cross-modality information. We make three main contributions with the proposed paradigm. First, we extract the prior knowledge about the segmentation targets, called relation prototypes, from the prior model and then propose a cross-modality adaptation module to inherit the prototypes to the zero-shot model. Second, we propose a relation prototype awareness module to make the zero-shot model aware of information contained in the prototypes. Last but not least, we develop an inheritance attention module to recalibrate the relation prototypes to enhance the inheritance process. The proposed framework is evaluated on two public cross-modality datasets including a cardiac dataset and an abdominal dataset. Extensive experiments show that the proposed framework significantly outperforms the state of the arts.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏正确注释的医学数据，探索深度模型的泛化能力正在成为公众关注的问题。近年来出现的零样本学习（ZSL）为深度模型提供了识别未见过的类的能力。然而，现有的研究主要集中在自然图像上，利用语言模型来提取 ZSL 的辅助信息。将自然图像 ZSL 解决方案直接应用于医学图像是不切实际的，因为医学术语的领域特定性很强，并且获取医学术语的语言模型并不容易。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的 ZSL 范式，专门用于利用跨模态信息的医学图像。我们对所提出的范例做出了三个主要贡献。首先，我们从先验模型中提取有关分割目标的先验知识（称为关系原型），然后提出一个跨模态适应模块将原型继承到零样本模型。其次，我们提出了一个关系原型感知模块，使零样本模型感知原型中包含的信息。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，我们开发了一个继承注意模块来重新校准关系原型以增强继承过程。所提出的框架在两个公共跨模态数据集（包括心脏数据集和腹部数据集）上进行评估。大量的实验表明，所提出的框架明显优于现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合领域自适应与零样本学习的新方法，用于解决医学图像分割中标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像因领域术语特殊且缺乏语言模型支持，难以直接应用自然图像的零样本学习方法，需探索跨模态信息利用的新型解决方案。
AI.method: 提出三重贡献：1) 从先验模型提取分割目标的先验知识（关系原型）；2) 设计跨模态适配模块继承原型；3) 引入关系原型感知模块与继承注意力模块优化原型传递过程。
AI.result: 在心脏和腹部两个跨模态数据集上实验表明，该框架显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨模态知识继承机制，本文方法有效提升了医学图像分割的零样本学习能力，降低了标注依赖。

search_text: Domain Adaptation Meets Zero-Shot Learning: An Annotation-Efficient Approach to Multi-Modality Medical Image Segmentation 领域适应与零样本学习的结合：一种高效注释的多模态医学图像分割方法 Due to the lack of properly annotated medical data, exploring the generalization capability of the deep model is becoming a public concern. Zero-shot learning (ZSL) has emerged in recent years to equip the deep model with the ability to recognize unseen classes. However, existing studies mainly focus on natural images, which utilize linguistic models to extract auxiliary information for ZSL. It is impractical to apply the natural image ZSL solutions directly to medical images, since the medical terminology is very domain-specific, and it is not easy to acquire linguistic models for the medical terminology. In this work, we propose a new paradigm of ZSL specifically for medical images utilizing cross-modality information. We make three main contributions with the proposed paradigm. First, we extract the prior knowledge about the segmentation targets, called relation prototypes, from the prior model and then propose a cross-modality adaptation module to inherit the prototypes to the zero-shot model. Second, we propose a relation prototype awareness module to make the zero-shot model aware of information contained in the prototypes. Last but not least, we develop an inheritance attention module to recalibrate the relation prototypes to enhance the inheritance process. The proposed framework is evaluated on two public cross-modality datasets including a cardiac dataset and an abdominal dataset. Extensive experiments show that the proposed framework significantly outperforms the state of the arts. 由于缺乏正确注释的医学数据，探索深度模型的泛化能力正在成为公众关注的问题。近年来出现的零样本学习（ZSL）为深度模型提供了识别未见过的类的能力。然而，现有的研究主要集中在自然图像上，利用语言模型来提取 ZSL 的辅助信息。将自然图像 ZSL 解决方案直接应用于医学图像是不切实际的，因为医学术语的领域特定性很强，并且获取医学术语的语言模型并不容易。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的 ZSL 范式，专门用于利用跨模态信息的医学图像。我们对所提出的范例做出了三个主要贡献。首先，我们从先验模型中提取有关分割目标的先验知识（称为关系原型），然后提出一个跨模态适应模块将原型继承到零样本模型。其次，我们提出了一个关系原型感知模块，使零样本模型感知原型中包含的信息。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，我们开发了一个继承注意模块来重新校准关系原型以增强继承过程。所提出的框架在两个公共跨模态数据集（包括心脏数据集和腹部数据集）上进行评估。大量的实验表明，所提出的框架明显优于现有技术。 本文提出一种结合领域自适应与零样本学习的新方法，用于解决医学图像分割中标注数据不足的问题。 Cheng Bian,Chenglang Yuan,Kai Ma,Shuang Yu,Dong Wei,Yefeng Zheng cs.CV

authors_text: Chenhang He,Ruihuang Li,Shuai Li,Lei Zhang
title: Voxel Set Transformer: A Set-to-Set Approach to 3D Object Detection from Point Clouds
title_zh: Voxel Set Transformer：从点云进行 3D 对象检测的集合到集合方法
abstract: Transformer has demonstrated promising performance in many 2D vision tasks. However, it is cumbersome to compute the self-attention on large-scale point cloud data because point cloud is a long sequence and unevenly distributed in 3D space. To solve this issue, existing methods usually compute self-attention locally by grouping the points into clusters of the same size, or perform convolutional self-attention on a discretized representation. However, the former results in stochastic point dropout, while the latter typically has narrow attention fields. In this paper, we propose a novel voxel-based architecture, namely Voxel Set Transformer (VoxSeT), to detect 3D objects from point clouds by means of set-to-set translation. VoxSeT is built upon a voxel-based set attention (VSA) module, which reduces the self-attention in each voxel by two cross-attentions and models features in a hidden space induced by a group of latent codes. With the VSA module, VoxSeT can manage voxelized point clusters with arbitrary size in a wide range, and process them in parallel with linear complexity. The proposed VoxSeT integrates the high performance of transformer with the efficiency of voxel-based model, which can be used as a good alternative to the convolutional and point-based backbones. VoxSeT reports competitive results on the KITTI and Waymo detection benchmarks. The source codes can be found at \url{https://github.com/skyhehe123/VoxSeT}.
summary: Transformer has demonstrated promising performance in many 2D vision tasks. However, it is cumbersome to compute the self-attention on large-scale point cloud data because point cloud is a long sequence and unevenly distributed in 3D space. To solve this issue, existing methods usually compute self-attention locally by grouping the points into clusters of the same size, or perform convolutional self-attention on a discretized representation. However, the former results in stochastic point dropout, while the latter typically has narrow attention fields. In this paper, we propose a novel voxel-based architecture, namely Voxel Set Transformer (VoxSeT), to detect 3D objects from point clouds by means of set-to-set translation. VoxSeT is built upon a voxel-based set attention (VSA) module, which reduces the self-attention in each voxel by two cross-attentions and models features in a hidden space induced by a group of latent codes. With the VSA module, VoxSeT can manage voxelized point clusters with arbitrary size in a wide range, and process them in parallel with linear complexity. The proposed VoxSeT integrates the high performance of transformer with the efficiency of voxel-based model, which can be used as a good alternative to the convolutional and point-based backbones. VoxSeT reports competitive results on the KITTI and Waymo detection benchmarks. The source codes can be found at \url{https://github.com/skyhehe123/VoxSeT}.
abstract_zh: Transformer 在许多 2D 视觉任务中表现出了良好的性能。然而，由于点云是一个长序列并且在3D空间中分布不均匀，因此在大规模点云数据上计算自注意力是很麻烦的。为了解决这个问题，现有的方法通常通过将点分组为相同大小的簇来本地计算自注意力，或者对离散表示执行卷积自注意力。然而，前者会导致随机点丢失，而后者通常具有狭窄的注意力范围。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于体素的架构，即体素集变换器（VoxSeT），通过集合到集合的转换来检测点云中的 3D 对象。 VoxSeT 建立在基于体素的集合注意力（VSA）模块之上，该模块通过两个交叉注意力减少每个体素中的自注意力，并对一组潜在代码引起的隐藏空间中的特征进行建模。借助VSA模块，VoxSeT可以管理大范围内任意大小的体素化点簇，并以线性复杂度并行处理它们。所提出的 VoxSeT 将 Transformer 的高性能与基于体素的模型的效率相结合，可以作为卷积和基于点的主干网的良好替代方案。 VoxSeT 报告了 KITTI 和 Waymo 检测基准的竞争结果。源代码可以在 \url{https://github.com/skyhehe123/VoxSeT} 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于体素的Voxel Set Transformer（VoxSeT）方法，用于从点云数据中进行3D目标检测。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer在处理大规模点云数据时面临计算复杂度高和注意力范围受限的问题，现有方法存在随机点丢失或注意力视野狭窄等缺陷。
AI.method: 设计基于体素的集合注意力模块（VSA），通过双交叉注意力机制降低体素内自注意力计算复杂度，并利用隐空间中的潜在编码建模特征，实现对任意尺寸体素点集的并行线性复杂度处理。
AI.result: 在KITTI和Waymo检测基准测试中取得具有竞争力的性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: VoxSeT通过结合Transformer的高性能与体素化模型的效率，为点云目标检测提供了优于传统卷积和点云骨干网络的替代方案。

authors_text: Juliusz Ziomek,Katayoun Farrahi
title: Modelling nonlinear dependencies in the latent space of inverse scattering
title_zh: 逆散射潜在空间中的非线性依赖性建模
abstract: The problem of inverse scattering proposed by Angles and Mallat in 2018, concerns training a deep neural network to invert the scattering transform applied to an image. After such a network is trained, it can be used as a generative model given that we can sample from the distribution of principal components of scattering coefficients. For this purpose, Angles and Mallat simply use samples from independent Gaussians. However, as shown in this paper, the distribution of interest can actually be very far from normal and non-negligible dependencies might exist between different coefficients. This motivates using models for this distribution that allow for non-linear dependencies between variables. Within this paper, two such models are explored, namely a Variational AutoEncoder and a Generative Adversarial Network. We demonstrate the results obtained can be extremely realistic on some datasets and look better than those produced by Angles and Mallat. The conducted meta-analysis also shows a clear practical advantage of such constructed generative models in terms of the efficiency of their training process compared to existing generative models for images.
summary: The problem of inverse scattering proposed by Angles and Mallat in 2018, concerns training a deep neural network to invert the scattering transform applied to an image. After such a network is trained, it can be used as a generative model given that we can sample from the distribution of principal components of scattering coefficients. For this purpose, Angles and Mallat simply use samples from independent Gaussians. However, as shown in this paper, the distribution of interest can actually be very far from normal and non-negligible dependencies might exist between different coefficients. This motivates using models for this distribution that allow for non-linear dependencies between variables. Within this paper, two such models are explored, namely a Variational AutoEncoder and a Generative Adversarial Network. We demonstrate the results obtained can be extremely realistic on some datasets and look better than those produced by Angles and Mallat. The conducted meta-analysis also shows a clear practical advantage of such constructed generative models in terms of the efficiency of their training process compared to existing generative models for images.
abstract_zh: Angles 和 Mallat 在 2018 年提出的逆散射问题涉及训练深度神经网络以反转应用于图像的散射变换。这样的网络经过训练后，可以将其用作生成模型，因为我们可以从散射系数的主成分分布中进行采样。为此，Angles 和 Mallat 仅使用独立高斯分布的样本。然而，如本文所示，兴趣分布实际上可能与正态分布相差甚远，并且不同系数之间可能存在不可忽略的依赖性。这促使我们使用这种分布的模型，允许变量之间存在非线性相关性。本文探讨了两种这样的模型，即变分自动编码器和生成对抗网络。我们证明，在某些数据集上获得的结果非常真实，并且看起来比 Angles 和 Mallat 生成的结果更好。进行的荟萃分析还表明，与现有的图像生成模型相比，这种构建的生成模型在训练过程的效率方面具有明显的实际优势。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在逆散射问题中建模散射系数潜在空间中的非线性依赖关系，以提升生成模型的效果。
AI.motivation: Angles和Mallat的独立高斯采样方法无法准确反映散射系数的真实分布，实际分布可能存在显著的非线性依赖关系。
AI.method: 探索使用变分自编码器（VAE）和生成对抗网络（GAN）建模散射系数的非线性依赖关系。
AI.result: 生成结果在部分数据集上具有高度真实感，且训练效率优于现有图像生成模型。
AI.conclusion: 基于非线性依赖建模的生成模型在逆散射任务中具有更高的实用性和训练效率优势。

search_text: Modelling nonlinear dependencies in the latent space of inverse scattering 逆散射潜在空间中的非线性依赖性建模 The problem of inverse scattering proposed by Angles and Mallat in 2018, concerns training a deep neural network to invert the scattering transform applied to an image. After such a network is trained, it can be used as a generative model given that we can sample from the distribution of principal components of scattering coefficients. For this purpose, Angles and Mallat simply use samples from independent Gaussians. However, as shown in this paper, the distribution of interest can actually be very far from normal and non-negligible dependencies might exist between different coefficients. This motivates using models for this distribution that allow for non-linear dependencies between variables. Within this paper, two such models are explored, namely a Variational AutoEncoder and a Generative Adversarial Network. We demonstrate the results obtained can be extremely realistic on some datasets and look better than those produced by Angles and Mallat. The conducted meta-analysis also shows a clear practical advantage of such constructed generative models in terms of the efficiency of their training process compared to existing generative models for images. Angles 和 Mallat 在 2018 年提出的逆散射问题涉及训练深度神经网络以反转应用于图像的散射变换。这样的网络经过训练后，可以将其用作生成模型，因为我们可以从散射系数的主成分分布中进行采样。为此，Angles 和 Mallat 仅使用独立高斯分布的样本。然而，如本文所示，兴趣分布实际上可能与正态分布相差甚远，并且不同系数之间可能存在不可忽略的依赖性。这促使我们使用这种分布的模型，允许变量之间存在非线性相关性。本文探讨了两种这样的模型，即变分自动编码器和生成对抗网络。我们证明，在某些数据集上获得的结果非常真实，并且看起来比 Angles 和 Mallat 生成的结果更好。进行的荟萃分析还表明，与现有的图像生成模型相比，这种构建的生成模型在训练过程的效率方面具有明显的实际优势。 本文研究如何在逆散射问题中建模散射系数潜在空间中的非线性依赖关系，以提升生成模型的效果。 Juliusz Ziomek,Katayoun Farrahi cs.CV

authors_text: Qingkai Fang,Yang Feng
title: Neural Machine Translation with Phrase-Level Universal Visual Representations
title_zh: 具有短语级通用视觉表示的神经机器翻译
abstract: Multimodal machine translation (MMT) aims to improve neural machine translation (NMT) with additional visual information, but most existing MMT methods require paired input of source sentence and image, which makes them suffer from shortage of sentence-image pairs. In this paper, we propose a phrase-level retrieval-based method for MMT to get visual information for the source input from existing sentence-image data sets so that MMT can break the limitation of paired sentence-image input. Our method performs retrieval at the phrase level and hence learns visual information from pairs of source phrase and grounded region, which can mitigate data sparsity. Furthermore, our method employs the conditional variational auto-encoder to learn visual representations which can filter redundant visual information and only retain visual information related to the phrase. Experiments show that the proposed method significantly outperforms strong baselines on multiple MMT datasets, especially when the textual context is limited.
summary: Multimodal machine translation (MMT) aims to improve neural machine translation (NMT) with additional visual information, but most existing MMT methods require paired input of source sentence and image, which makes them suffer from shortage of sentence-image pairs. In this paper, we propose a phrase-level retrieval-based method for MMT to get visual information for the source input from existing sentence-image data sets so that MMT can break the limitation of paired sentence-image input. Our method performs retrieval at the phrase level and hence learns visual information from pairs of source phrase and grounded region, which can mitigate data sparsity. Furthermore, our method employs the conditional variational auto-encoder to learn visual representations which can filter redundant visual information and only retain visual information related to the phrase. Experiments show that the proposed method significantly outperforms strong baselines on multiple MMT datasets, especially when the textual context is limited.
abstract_zh: 多模态机器翻译（MMT）旨在通过附加视觉信息来改进神经机器翻译（NMT），但大多数现有的MMT方法需要源句子和图像的成对输入，这使得它们面临句子-图像对的短缺。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于短语级检索的 MMT 方法，从现有的句子-图像数据集中获取源输入的视觉信息，从而使 MMT 可以打破成对的句子-图像输入的限制。我们的方法在短语级别执行检索，因此从成对的源短语和接地区域中学习视觉信息，这可以减轻数据稀疏性。此外，我们的方法采用条件变分自动编码器来学习视觉表示，它可以过滤冗余视觉信息并仅保留与短语相关的视觉信息。实验表明，所提出的方法在多个 MMT 数据集上显着优于强基线，特别是当文本上下文有限时。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于短语级视觉表示的神经机器翻译方法，通过检索现有句子-图像数据集中的视觉信息，解决多模态机器翻译中配对数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MMT方法依赖源句与图像的配对输入，导致数据稀缺且限制模型应用。需开发无需配对输入、能有效利用已有数据集的方法。
AI.method: 采用短语级检索获取源句对应图像区域，结合条件变分自编码器学习去冗余的视觉表示，仅保留与短语相关的视觉信息。
AI.result: 在多个MMT数据集上显著优于现有方法，尤其在文本上下文有限时表现更优，验证了方法对数据稀缺场景的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过短语级视觉检索与表示学习有效缓解了MMT的数据稀缺问题，为低资源场景下的多模态翻译提供了新思路。

Furthermore, our method employs the conditional variational auto-encoder to learn visual representations which can filter redundant visual information and only retain visual information related to the phrase. authors_text: Yiting Li,Haiyue Zhu,Xijia Feng,Zilong Cheng,Jun Ma,Cheng Xiang,Prahlad Vadakkepat,Tong Heng Lee
title: Incremental Few-Shot Learning via Implanting and Compressing
title_zh: 通过植入和压缩进行增量少样本学习
abstract: This work focuses on tackling the challenging but realistic visual task of Incremental Few-Shot Learning (IFSL), which requires a model to continually learn novel classes from only a few examples while not forgetting the base classes on which it was pre-trained. Our study reveals that the challenges of IFSL lie in both inter-class separation and novel-class representation. Dur to intra-class variation, a novel class may implicitly leverage the knowledge from multiple base classes to construct its feature representation. Hence, simply reusing the pre-trained embedding space could lead to a scattered feature distribution and result in category confusion. To address such issues, we propose a two-step learning strategy referred to as \textbf{Im}planting and \textbf{Co}mpressing (\textbf{IMCO}), which optimizes both feature space partition and novel class reconstruction in a systematic manner. Specifically, in the \textbf{Implanting} step, we propose to mimic the data distribution of novel classes with the assistance of data-abundant base set, so that a model could learn semantically-rich features that are beneficial for discriminating between the base and other unseen classes. In the \textbf{Compressing} step, we adapt the feature extractor to precisely represent each novel class for enhancing intra-class compactness, together with a regularized parameter updating rule for preventing aggressive model updating. Finally, we demonstrate that IMCO outperforms competing baselines with a significant margin, both in image classification task and more challenging object detection task.
summary: This work focuses on tackling the challenging but realistic visual task of Incremental Few-Shot Learning (IFSL), which requires a model to continually learn novel classes from only a few examples while not forgetting the base classes on which it was pre-trained. Our study reveals that the challenges of IFSL lie in both inter-class separation and novel-class representation. Dur to intra-class variation, a novel class may implicitly leverage the knowledge from multiple base classes to construct its feature representation. Hence, simply reusing the pre-trained embedding space could lead to a scattered feature distribution and result in category confusion. To address such issues, we propose a two-step learning strategy referred to as \textbf{Im}planting and \textbf{Co}mpressing (\textbf{IMCO}), which optimizes both feature space partition and novel class reconstruction in a systematic manner. Specifically, in the \textbf{Implanting} step, we propose to mimic the data distribution of novel classes with the assistance of data-abundant base set, so that a model could learn semantically-rich features that are beneficial for discriminating between the base and other unseen classes. In the \textbf{Compressing} step, we adapt the feature extractor to precisely represent each novel class for enhancing intra-class compactness, together with a regularized parameter updating rule for preventing aggressive model updating. Finally, we demonstrate that IMCO outperforms competing baselines with a significant margin, both in image classification task and more challenging object detection task.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的重点是解决增量少样本学习（IFSL）中具有挑战性但现实的视觉任务，它需要一个模型不断地从几个例子中学习新的类，同时不要忘记它预先训练的基类。我们的研究表明，IFSL 的挑战在于阶级间的分离和新颖的阶级表征。对于类内变异，新类可以隐式地利用多个基类的知识来构建其特征表示。因此，简单地重复使用预先训练的嵌入空间可能会导致特征分布分散并导致类别混乱。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种两步学习策略，称为 \textbf{Im}planting 和 \textbf{Co}mpressing (\textbf{IMCO})，它以系统的方式优化特征空间划分和新类重建。具体来说，在 \textbf{Implanting} 步骤中，我们建议在数据丰富的基础集的帮助下模拟新类的数据分布，以便模型可以学习语义丰富的特征，这些特征有利于区分基础类和其他看不见的类。在压缩步骤中，我们采用特征提取器来精确表示每个新类，以增强类内紧凑性，并采用正则化参数更新规则来防止激进的模型更新。最后，我们证明 IMCO 在图像分类任务和更具挑战性的目标检测任务中都明显优于竞争基线。

AI.tldr: 本文研究增量少样本学习（IFSL）问题，旨在使模型在持续学习新类别时避免遗忘旧类别。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因复用预训练特征空间导致新类特征分布分散，引发类别混淆，需系统优化特征划分与新类表示。
AI.method: 提出IMCO两步策略：植入阶段利用基础类数据模拟新类分布以增强语义特征；压缩阶段调整特征提取器提升类内紧凑性并正则化参数更新。
AI.result: IMCO在图像分类和目标检测任务中显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: IMCO通过系统优化特征空间与新类表示，有效解决IFSL挑战，具有实际应用价值。

Specifically, in the \textbf{Implanting} step, we propose to mimic the data distribution of novel classes with the assistance of data-abundant base set, so that a model could learn semantically-rich features that are beneficial for discriminating between the base and other unseen classes. In the \textbf{Compressing} step, we adapt the feature extractor to precisely represent each novel class for enhancing intra-class compactness, together with a regularized parameter updating rule for preventing aggressive model updating. Finally, we demonstrate that IMCO outperforms competing baselines with a significant margin, both in image classification task and more challenging object detection task. 这项工作的重点是解决增量少样本学习（IFSL）中具有挑战性但现实的视觉任务，它需要一个模型不断地从几个例子中学习新的类，同时不要忘记它预先训练的基类。我们的研究表明，IFSL 的挑战在于阶级间的分离和新颖的阶级表征。对于类内变异，新类可以隐式地利用多个基类的知识来构建其特征表示。因此，简单地重复使用预先训练的嵌入空间可能会导致特征分布分散并导致类别混乱。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种两步学习策略，称为 \textbf{Im}planting 和 \textbf{Co}mpressing (\textbf{IMCO})，它以系统的方式优化特征空间划分和新类重建。具体来说，在 \textbf{Implanting} 步骤中，我们建议在数据丰富的基础集的帮助下模拟新类的数据分布，以便模型可以学习语义丰富的特征，这些特征有利于区分基础类和其他看不见的类。在压缩步骤中，我们采用特征提取器来精确表示每个新类，以增强类内紧凑性，并采用正则化参数更新规则来防止激进的模型更新。最后，我们证明 IMCO 在图像分类任务和更具挑战性的目标检测任务中都明显优于竞争基线。 本文研究增量少样本学习（IFSL）问题，旨在使模型在持续学习新类别时避免遗忘旧类别。 Yiting Li,Haiyue Zhu,Xijia Feng,Zilong Cheng,Jun Ma,Cheng Xiang,Prahlad Vadakkepat,Tong Heng Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Carlos Pedro Gonçalves
title: Quantum Neural Networks -- Computational Field Theory and Dynamics
title_zh: 量子神经网络——计算场论和动力学
abstract: To address Quantum Artificial Neural Networks as quantum dynamical computing systems, a formalization of quantum artificial neural networks as dynamical systems is developed, expanding the concept of unitary map to the neural computation setting and introducing a quantum computing field theory on the network. The formalism is illustrated in a simulation of a quantum recurrent neural network and the resulting field dynamics is researched upon, showing emergent neural waves with excitation and relaxation cycles at the level of the quantum neural activity field, as well as edge of chaos signatures, with the local neurons operating as far-from-equilibrium open quantum systems, exhibiting entropy fluctuations with complex dynamics including complex quasiperiodic patterns and power law signatures. The implications for quantum computer science, quantum complexity research, quantum technologies and neuroscience are also addressed.
summary: To address Quantum Artificial Neural Networks as quantum dynamical computing systems, a formalization of quantum artificial neural networks as dynamical systems is developed, expanding the concept of unitary map to the neural computation setting and introducing a quantum computing field theory on the network. The formalism is illustrated in a simulation of a quantum recurrent neural network and the resulting field dynamics is researched upon, showing emergent neural waves with excitation and relaxation cycles at the level of the quantum neural activity field, as well as edge of chaos signatures, with the local neurons operating as far-from-equilibrium open quantum systems, exhibiting entropy fluctuations with complex dynamics including complex quasiperiodic patterns and power law signatures. The implications for quantum computer science, quantum complexity research, quantum technologies and neuroscience are also addressed.
abstract_zh: 为了将量子人工神经网络解决为量子动态计算系统，开发了量子人工神经网络作为动态系统的形式化，将酉映射的概念扩展到神经计算设置，并在网络上引入量子计算场论。该形式通过量子递归神经网络的模拟进行说明，并对由此产生的场动力学进行研究，显示在量子神经活动场水平上具有激发和弛豫周期的新兴神经波，以及混沌特征的边缘，局部神经元作为远离平衡的开放量子系统运行，表现出具有复杂动力学的熵涨落，包括复杂的准周期模式和幂律特征。还讨论了对量子计算机科学、量子复杂性研究、量子技术和神经科学的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文将量子人工神经网络形式化为动力系统，引入量子计算场论并研究其动力学行为。
AI.motivation: 探索量子神经网络作为量子动力计算系统的新范式，揭示其与神经科学及量子计算的交叉潜力。
AI.method: 扩展幺正映射概念至神经计算场景，构建量子计算场论框架，并通过量子循环神经网络模拟验证。
AI.result: 发现量子神经活动场中存在神经波、兴奋-弛豫循环、边缘混沌特征及复杂动力学模式（如准周期与幂律行为）。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架为量子计算、复杂性研究及神经科学提供了新视角，揭示了量子神经网络的非平衡动力学特性。

authors_text: Kun Zhou,Wenbo Li,Xiaoguang Han,Jiangbo Lu
title: Exploring Motion Ambiguity and Alignment for High-Quality Video Frame Interpolation
title_zh: 探索高质量视频帧插值的运动模糊性和对齐
abstract: For video frame interpolation (VFI), existing deep-learning-based approaches strongly rely on the ground-truth (GT) intermediate frames, which sometimes ignore the non-unique nature of motion judging from the given adjacent frames. As a result, these methods tend to produce averaged solutions that are not clear enough. To alleviate this issue, we propose to relax the requirement of reconstructing an intermediate frame as close to the GT as possible. Towards this end, we develop a texture consistency loss (TCL) upon the assumption that the interpolated content should maintain similar structures with their counterparts in the given frames. Predictions satisfying this constraint are encouraged, though they may differ from the pre-defined GT. Without the bells and whistles, our plug-and-play TCL is capable of improving the performance of existing VFI frameworks. On the other hand, previous methods usually adopt the cost volume or correlation map to achieve more accurate image/feature warping. However, the O(N^2) ({N refers to the pixel count}) computational complexity makes it infeasible for high-resolution cases. In this work, we design a simple, efficient (O(N)) yet powerful cross-scale pyramid alignment (CSPA) module, where multi-scale information is highly exploited. Extensive experiments justify the efficiency and effectiveness of the proposed strategy.
summary: For video frame interpolation (VFI), existing deep-learning-based approaches strongly rely on the ground-truth (GT) intermediate frames, which sometimes ignore the non-unique nature of motion judging from the given adjacent frames. As a result, these methods tend to produce averaged solutions that are not clear enough. To alleviate this issue, we propose to relax the requirement of reconstructing an intermediate frame as close to the GT as possible. Towards this end, we develop a texture consistency loss (TCL) upon the assumption that the interpolated content should maintain similar structures with their counterparts in the given frames. Predictions satisfying this constraint are encouraged, though they may differ from the pre-defined GT. Without the bells and whistles, our plug-and-play TCL is capable of improving the performance of existing VFI frameworks. On the other hand, previous methods usually adopt the cost volume or correlation map to achieve more accurate image/feature warping. However, the O(N^2) ({N refers to the pixel count}) computational complexity makes it infeasible for high-resolution cases. In this work, we design a simple, efficient (O(N)) yet powerful cross-scale pyramid alignment (CSPA) module, where multi-scale information is highly exploited. Extensive experiments justify the efficiency and effectiveness of the proposed strategy.
abstract_zh: 对于视频帧插值（VFI），现有的基于深度学习的方法强烈依赖于真实（GT）中间帧，这有时会忽略从给定的相邻帧判断运动的非唯一性。因此，这些方法往往会产生不够清晰的平均解。为了缓解这个问题，我们建议放宽重建尽可能接近 GT 的中间帧的要求。为此，我们假设插值内容应与给定帧中的对应内容保持相似的结构，从而开发了纹理一致性损失（TCL）。鼓励满足此约束的预测，尽管它们可能与预定义的 GT 不同。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们的即插即用 TCL 能够提高现有 VFI 框架的性能。另一方面，以前的方法通常采用成本量或相关图来实现更准确的图像/特征变形。然而，O(N^2)（{N 指像素数}）的计算复杂度使得它在高分辨率情况下不可行。在这项工作中，我们设计了一个简单、高效（O(N)）但功能强大的跨尺度金字塔对齐（CSPA）模块，其中多尺度信息得到了高度利用。大量的实验证明了所提出策略的效率和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过探索运动模糊性和对齐策略，提升视频帧插值的质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度依赖真实中间帧，忽略运动的非唯一性，导致插值结果模糊且缺乏清晰度。
AI.method: 提出纹理一致性损失（TCL）以放松对中间帧与真实值接近度的要求，并设计跨尺度金字塔对齐（CSPA）模块降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明TCL和CSPA模块有效提升了插值质量，尤其在高分辨率场景下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 新方法通过解耦运动模糊性与对齐约束，为视频帧插值提供了更高效且高质量的解决方案。

authors_text: Junwen Pan,Pengfei Zhu,Kaihua Zhang,Bing Cao,Yu Wang,Dingwen Zhang,Junwei Han,Qinghua Hu
title: Learning Self-Supervised Low-Rank Network for Single-Stage Weakly and Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 学习用于单阶段弱监督和半监督语义分割的自监督低秩网络
abstract: Semantic segmentation with limited annotations, such as weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) and semi-supervised semantic segmentation (SSSS), is a challenging task that has attracted much attention recently. Most leading WSSS methods employ a sophisticated multi-stage training strategy to estimate pseudo-labels as precise as possible, but they suffer from high model complexity. In contrast, there exists another research line that trains a single network with image-level labels in one training cycle. However, such a single-stage strategy often performs poorly because of the compounding effect caused by inaccurate pseudo-label estimation. To address this issue, this paper presents a Self-supervised Low-Rank Network (SLRNet) for single-stage WSSS and SSSS. The SLRNet uses cross-view self-supervision, that is, it simultaneously predicts several complementary attentive LR representations from different views of an image to learn precise pseudo-labels. Specifically, we reformulate the LR representation learning as a collective matrix factorization problem and optimize it jointly with the network learning in an end-to-end manner. The resulting LR representation deprecates noisy information while capturing stable semantics across different views, making it robust to the input variations, thereby reducing overfitting to self-supervision errors. The SLRNet can provide a unified single-stage framework for various label-efficient semantic segmentation settings: 1) WSSS with image-level labeled data, 2) SSSS with a few pixel-level labeled data, and 3) SSSS with a few pixel-level labeled data and many image-level labeled data. Extensive experiments on the Pascal VOC 2012, COCO, and L2ID datasets demonstrate that our SLRNet outperforms both state-of-the-art WSSS and SSSS methods with a variety of different settings, proving its good generalizability and efficacy.
summary: Semantic segmentation with limited annotations, such as weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) and semi-supervised semantic segmentation (SSSS), is a challenging task that has attracted much attention recently. Most leading WSSS methods employ a sophisticated multi-stage training strategy to estimate pseudo-labels as precise as possible, but they suffer from high model complexity. In contrast, there exists another research line that trains a single network with image-level labels in one training cycle. However, such a single-stage strategy often performs poorly because of the compounding effect caused by inaccurate pseudo-label estimation. To address this issue, this paper presents a Self-supervised Low-Rank Network (SLRNet) for single-stage WSSS and SSSS. The SLRNet uses cross-view self-supervision, that is, it simultaneously predicts several complementary attentive LR representations from different views of an image to learn precise pseudo-labels. Specifically, we reformulate the LR representation learning as a collective matrix factorization problem and optimize it jointly with the network learning in an end-to-end manner. The resulting LR representation deprecates noisy information while capturing stable semantics across different views, making it robust to the input variations, thereby reducing overfitting to self-supervision errors. The SLRNet can provide a unified single-stage framework for various label-efficient semantic segmentation settings: 1) WSSS with image-level labeled data, 2) SSSS with a few pixel-level labeled data, and 3) SSSS with a few pixel-level labeled data and many image-level labeled data. Extensive experiments on the Pascal VOC 2012, COCO, and L2ID datasets demonstrate that our SLRNet outperforms both state-of-the-art WSSS and SSSS methods with a variety of different settings, proving its good generalizability and efficacy.
abstract_zh: 具有有限注释的语义分割，例如弱监督语义分割（WSSS）和半监督语义分割（SSSS），是一项具有挑战性的任务，最近引起了广泛的关注。大多数领先的 WSSS 方法都采用复杂的多阶段训练策略来尽可能精确地估计伪标签，但它们的模型复杂性很高。相比之下，还有另一条研究线在一个训练周期中训练具有图像级标签的单个网络。然而，由于不准确的伪标签估计导致的复合效应，这种单阶段策略通常表现不佳。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种用于单阶段 WSSS 和 SSSS 的自监督低秩网络（SLRNet）。 SLRNet 使用跨视图自监督，即它同时从图像的不同视图预测多个互补的注意力 LR 表示，以学习精确的伪标签。具体来说，我们将 LR 表示学习重新表述为集体矩阵分解问题，并以端到端的方式与网络学习联合优化。由此产生的 LR 表示会弃用噪声信息，同时捕获不同视图中的稳定语义，使其对输入变化具有鲁棒性，从而减少对自监督错误的过度拟合。 SLRNet 可以为各种标签有效的语义分割设置提供统一的单阶段框架：1）具有图像级标记数据的 WSSS，2）具有少量像素级标记数据的 SSSS，以及 3）具有少量像素级标记数据和许多图像级标记数据的 SSSS。在 Pascal VOC 2012、COCO 和 L2ID 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们的 SLRNet 在各种不同设置下均优于最先进的 WSSS 和 SSSS 方法，证明了其良好的通用性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种单阶段自监督低秩网络（SLRNet），用于弱监督和半监督语义分割，以解决标注数据有限下的分割问题。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督和半监督语义分割方法多采用多阶段训练策略，导致模型复杂度高；而单阶段方法因伪标签误差累积效果差，性能不足。本文旨在设计一种高效且鲁棒的单阶段框架以提升分割效果。
AI.method: SLRNet通过跨视角自监督学习，从图像不同视角生成互补的低秩注意力表示，并将其重构为联合矩阵分解问题，端到端优化网络学习，抑制噪声并增强语义稳定性。
AI.result: 在Pascal VOC 2012、COCO和L2ID数据集上，SLRNet在多种标注设置下均优于现有最先进的弱监督和半监督分割方法，验证了其泛化性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: SLRNet为标签高效语义分割提供了统一的单阶段框架，在减少模型复杂度的同时提升了分割精度，适用于多种标注场景。

search_text: Learning Self-Supervised Low-Rank Network for Single-Stage Weakly and Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation 学习用于单阶段弱监督和半监督语义分割的自监督低秩网络 Semantic segmentation with limited annotations, such as weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) and semi-supervised semantic segmentation (SSSS), is a challenging task that has attracted much attention recently. Most leading WSSS methods employ a sophisticated multi-stage training strategy to estimate pseudo-labels as precise as possible, but they suffer from high model complexity. In contrast, there exists another research line that trains a single network with image-level labels in one training cycle. However, such a single-stage strategy often performs poorly because of the compounding effect caused by inaccurate pseudo-label estimation. To address this issue, this paper presents a Self-supervised Low-Rank Network (SLRNet) for single-stage WSSS and SSSS. The SLRNet uses cross-view self-supervision, that is, it simultaneously predicts several complementary attentive LR representations from different views of an image to learn precise pseudo-labels. Specifically, we reformulate the LR representation learning as a collective matrix factorization problem and optimize it jointly with the network learning in an end-to-end manner. The resulting LR representation deprecates noisy information while capturing stable semantics across different views, making it robust to the input variations, thereby reducing overfitting to self-supervision errors. The SLRNet can provide a unified single-stage framework for various label-efficient semantic segmentation settings: 1) WSSS with image-level labeled data, 2) SSSS with a few pixel-level labeled data, and 3) SSSS with a few pixel-level labeled data and many image-level labeled data. Extensive experiments on the Pascal VOC 2012, COCO, and L2ID datasets demonstrate that our SLRNet outperforms both state-of-the-art WSSS and SSSS methods with a variety of different settings, proving its good generalizability and efficacy. 具有有限注释的语义分割，例如弱监督语义分割（WSSS）和半监督语义分割（SSSS），是一项具有挑战性的任务，最近引起了广泛的关注。大多数领先的 WSSS 方法都采用复杂的多阶段训练策略来尽可能精确地估计伪标签，但它们的模型复杂性很高。相比之下，还有另一条研究线在一个训练周期中训练具有图像级标签的单个网络。然而，由于不准确的伪标签估计导致的复合效应，这种单阶段策略通常表现不佳。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种用于单阶段 WSSS 和 SSSS 的自监督低秩网络（SLRNet）。 SLRNet 使用跨视图自监督，即它同时从图像的不同视图预测多个互补的注意力 LR 表示，以学习精确的伪标签。具体来说，我们将 LR 表示学习重新表述为集体矩阵分解问题，并以端到端的方式与网络学习联合优化。由此产生的 LR 表示会弃用噪声信息，同时捕获不同视图中的稳定语义，使其对输入变化具有鲁棒性，从而减少对自监督错误的过度拟合。 SLRNet 可以为各种标签有效的语义分割设置提供统一的单阶段框架：1）具有图像级标记数据的 WSSS，2）具有少量像素级标记数据的 SSSS，以及 3）具有少量像素级标记数据和许多图像级标记数据的 SSSS。在 Pascal VOC 2012、COCO 和 L2ID 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们的 SLRNet 在各种不同设置下均优于最先进的 WSSS 和 SSSS 方法，证明了其良好的通用性和有效性。 本文提出了一种单阶段自监督低秩网络（SLRNet），用于弱监督和半监督语义分割，以解决标注数据有限下的分割问题。 Junwen Pan,Pengfei Zhu,Kaihua Zhang,Bing Cao,Yu Wang,Dingwen Zhang,Junwei Han,Qinghua Hu cs.CV

authors_text: Shujie Hu,Shansong Liu,Xurong Xie,Mengzhe Geng,Tianzi Wang,Shoukang Hu,Mingyu Cui,Xunying Liu,Helen Meng
title: Exploiting Cross Domain Acoustic-to-articulatory Inverted Features For Disordered Speech Recognition
title_zh: 利用跨域声学到发音的倒置特征进行无序语音识别
abstract: Articulatory features are inherently invariant to acoustic signal distortion and have been successfully incorporated into automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems for normal speech. Their practical application to disordered speech recognition is often limited by the difficulty in collecting such specialist data from impaired speakers. This paper presents a cross-domain acoustic-to-articulatory (A2A) inversion approach that utilizes the parallel acoustic-articulatory data of the 15-hour TORGO corpus in model training before being cross-domain adapted to the 102.7-hour UASpeech corpus and to produce articulatory features. Mixture density networks based neural A2A inversion models were used. A cross-domain feature adaptation network was also used to reduce the acoustic mismatch between the TORGO and UASpeech data. On both tasks, incorporating the A2A generated articulatory features consistently outperformed the baseline hybrid DNN/TDNN, CTC and Conformer based end-to-end systems constructed using acoustic features only. The best multi-modal system incorporating video modality and the cross-domain articulatory features as well as data augmentation and learning hidden unit contributions (LHUC) speaker adaptation produced the lowest published word error rate (WER) of 24.82% on the 16 dysarthric speakers of the benchmark UASpeech task.
summary: Articulatory features are inherently invariant to acoustic signal distortion and have been successfully incorporated into automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems for normal speech. Their practical application to disordered speech recognition is often limited by the difficulty in collecting such specialist data from impaired speakers. This paper presents a cross-domain acoustic-to-articulatory (A2A) inversion approach that utilizes the parallel acoustic-articulatory data of the 15-hour TORGO corpus in model training before being cross-domain adapted to the 102.7-hour UASpeech corpus and to produce articulatory features. Mixture density networks based neural A2A inversion models were used. A cross-domain feature adaptation network was also used to reduce the acoustic mismatch between the TORGO and UASpeech data. On both tasks, incorporating the A2A generated articulatory features consistently outperformed the baseline hybrid DNN/TDNN, CTC and Conformer based end-to-end systems constructed using acoustic features only. The best multi-modal system incorporating video modality and the cross-domain articulatory features as well as data augmentation and learning hidden unit contributions (LHUC) speaker adaptation produced the lowest published word error rate (WER) of 24.82% on the 16 dysarthric speakers of the benchmark UASpeech task.
abstract_zh: 发音特征本质上不受声学信号失真的影响，并且已成功纳入正常语音的自动语音识别（ASR）系统中。它们在无序语音识别中的实际应用通常受到从受损说话者那里收集此类专业数据的困难的限制。本文提出了一种跨域声学到发音（A2A）反演方法，该方法在模型训练中利用 15 小时 TORGO 语料库的并行声学发音数据，然后跨域适应 102.7 小时 UASpeech 语料库并产生发音特征。使用基于混合密度网络的神经 A2A 反演模型。还使用跨域特征适应网络来减少 TORGO 和 UASpeech 数据之间的声学​​不匹配。在这两项任务中，结合 A2A 生成的发音特征始终优于仅使用声学特征构建的基线混合 DNN/TDNN、CTC 和基于 Conformer 的端到端系统。结合视频模态和跨域发音特征以及数据增强和学习隐藏单元贡献 (LHUC) 说话者适应的最佳多模态系统在基准 UASpeech 任务的 16 名构音障碍说话者中产生了 24.82% 的最低已发表单词错误率 (WER)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨领域声学到发音器逆转换方法，通过生成发音器特征提升失语症语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统发音器特征因数据获取困难难以应用于失语症语音识别，需探索跨领域数据迁移方案。
AI.method: 基于混合密度网络构建A2A逆转换模型，利用TORGO语料库训练后跨领域适配至UASpeech，并结合特征适应网络与多模态数据增强技术。
AI.result: 多模态系统在UASpeech基准测试中实现24.82%词错误率，优于纯声学特征的基线系统。
AI.conclusion: 跨领域发音器特征有效缓解数据稀缺问题，结合视频模态与自适应技术可显著提升失语症语音识别准确率。

authors_text: Cristina Manresa-Yee,Silvia Ramis
title: Assessing Gender Bias in Predictive Algorithms using eXplainable AI
title_zh: 使用 eXplainable AI 评估预测算法中的性别偏见
abstract: Predictive algorithms have a powerful potential to offer benefits in areas as varied as medicine or education. However, these algorithms and the data they use are built by humans, consequently, they can inherit the bias and prejudices present in humans. The outcomes can systematically repeat errors that create unfair results, which can even lead to situations of discrimination (e.g. gender, social or racial). In order to illustrate how important is to count with a diverse training dataset to avoid bias, we manipulate a well-known facial expression recognition dataset to explore gender bias and discuss its implications.
summary: Predictive algorithms have a powerful potential to offer benefits in areas as varied as medicine or education. However, these algorithms and the data they use are built by humans, consequently, they can inherit the bias and prejudices present in humans. The outcomes can systematically repeat errors that create unfair results, which can even lead to situations of discrimination (e.g. gender, social or racial). In order to illustrate how important is to count with a diverse training dataset to avoid bias, we manipulate a well-known facial expression recognition dataset to explore gender bias and discuss its implications.
abstract_zh: 预测算法具有强大的潜力，可以为医学或教育等各个领域带来好处。然而，这些算法及其使用的数据是由人类构建的，因此，它们可以继承人类存在的偏见和成见。结果可能会系统性地重复错误，从而产生不公平的结果，甚至可能导致歧视的情况（例如性别、社会或种族）。为了说明使用多样化的训练数据集来避免偏见的重要性，我们操纵一个著名的面部表情识别数据集来探索性别偏见并讨论其影响。

AI.tldr: 本文通过操纵面部表情识别数据集，评估预测算法中的性别偏见并探讨其影响。
AI.motivation: 预测算法可能继承人类偏见导致系统性歧视，需通过多样化数据集避免此类问题。
AI.method: 利用可解释AI技术，对经典面部表情数据集进行人为干预，分析性别偏见在算法中的表现。
AI.result: 实验揭示了训练数据中性别比例失衡会导致算法对特定性别的表情识别准确率显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 算法开发者必须确保训练数据多样性，结合可解释AI技术才能有效检测和缓解算法偏见。

search_text: Assessing Gender Bias in Predictive Algorithms using eXplainable AI 使用 eXplainable AI 评估预测算法中的性别偏见 Predictive algorithms have a powerful potential to offer benefits in areas as varied as medicine or education. However, these algorithms and the data they use are built by humans, consequently, they can inherit the bias and prejudices present in humans. The outcomes can systematically repeat errors that create unfair results, which can even lead to situations of discrimination (e.g. gender, social or racial). In order to illustrate how important is to count with a diverse training dataset to avoid bias, we manipulate a well-known facial expression recognition dataset to explore gender bias and discuss its implications. 预测算法具有强大的潜力，可以为医学或教育等各个领域带来好处。然而，这些算法及其使用的数据是由人类构建的，因此，它们可以继承人类存在的偏见和成见。结果可能会系统性地重复错误，从而产生不公平的结果，甚至可能导致歧视的情况（例如性别、社会或种族）。为了说明使用多样化的训练数据集来避免偏见的重要性，我们操纵一个著名的面部表情识别数据集来探索性别偏见并讨论其影响。 本文通过操纵面部表情识别数据集，评估预测算法中的性别偏见并探讨其影响。 Cristina Manresa-Yee,Silvia Ramis cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Eric Heiden,Miles Macklin,Yashraj Narang,Dieter Fox,Animesh Garg,Fabio Ramos
title: DiSECt: A Differentiable Simulator for Parameter Inference and Control in Robotic Cutting
title_zh: DiSSECt：机器人切割中参数推断和控制的可微仿真
comment: Extended version of our RSS 2021 paper arXiv:2105.12244
comments: Extended version of our RSS 2021 paper arXiv:2105.12244
abstract: Robotic cutting of soft materials is critical for applications such as food processing, household automation, and surgical manipulation. As in other areas of robotics, simulators can facilitate controller verification, policy learning, and dataset generation. Moreover, differentiable simulators can enable gradient-based optimization, which is invaluable for calibrating simulation parameters and optimizing controllers. In this work, we present DiSECt: the first differentiable simulator for cutting soft materials. The simulator augments the finite element method (FEM) with a continuous contact model based on signed distance fields (SDF), as well as a continuous damage model that inserts springs on opposite sides of the cutting plane and allows them to weaken until zero stiffness, enabling crack formation. Through various experiments, we evaluate the performance of the simulator. We first show that the simulator can be calibrated to match resultant forces and deformation fields from a state-of-the-art commercial solver and real-world cutting datasets, with generality across cutting velocities and object instances. We then show that Bayesian inference can be performed efficiently by leveraging the differentiability of the simulator, estimating posteriors over hundreds of parameters in a fraction of the time of derivative-free methods. Next, we illustrate that control parameters in the simulation can be optimized to minimize cutting forces via lateral slicing motions. Finally, we conduct experiments on a real robot arm equipped with a slicing knife to infer simulation parameters from force measurements. By optimizing the slicing motion of the knife, we show on fruit cutting scenarios that the average knife force can be reduced by more than 40% compared to a vertical cutting motion. We publish code and additional materials on our project website at https://diff-cutting-sim.github.io.
summary: Robotic cutting of soft materials is critical for applications such as food processing, household automation, and surgical manipulation. As in other areas of robotics, simulators can facilitate controller verification, policy learning, and dataset generation. Moreover, differentiable simulators can enable gradient-based optimization, which is invaluable for calibrating simulation parameters and optimizing controllers. In this work, we present DiSECt: the first differentiable simulator for cutting soft materials. The simulator augments the finite element method (FEM) with a continuous contact model based on signed distance fields (SDF), as well as a continuous damage model that inserts springs on opposite sides of the cutting plane and allows them to weaken until zero stiffness, enabling crack formation. Through various experiments, we evaluate the performance of the simulator. We first show that the simulator can be calibrated to match resultant forces and deformation fields from a state-of-the-art commercial solver and real-world cutting datasets, with generality across cutting velocities and object instances. We then show that Bayesian inference can be performed efficiently by leveraging the differentiability of the simulator, estimating posteriors over hundreds of parameters in a fraction of the time of derivative-free methods. Next, we illustrate that control parameters in the simulation can be optimized to minimize cutting forces via lateral slicing motions. Finally, we conduct experiments on a real robot arm equipped with a slicing knife to infer simulation parameters from force measurements. By optimizing the slicing motion of the knife, we show on fruit cutting scenarios that the average knife force can be reduced by more than 40% compared to a vertical cutting motion. We publish code and additional materials on our project website at https://diff-cutting-sim.github.io.
abstract_zh: 软材料的机器人切割对于食品加工、家庭自动化和外科手术等应用至关重要。与机器人技术的其他领域一样，模拟器可以促进控制器验证、策略学习和数据集生成。此外，可微仿真器可以实现基于梯度的优化，这对于校准仿真参数和优化控制器非常有价值。在这项工作中，我们推出了 DiSECt：第一个用于切割软材料的可微分模拟器。该模拟器通过基于有符号距离场 (SDF) 的连续接触模型以及连续损伤模型增强了有限元方法 (FEM)，该连续损伤模型在切割平面的相对两侧插入弹簧，并使弹簧减弱直至零刚度，从而形成裂纹。通过各种实验，我们评估模拟器的性能。我们首先表明，可以对模拟器进行校准，以匹配来自最先进的商业求解器和现实世界切削数据集的合力和变形场，并具有切削速度和对象实例的通用性。然后，我们表明，通过利用模拟器的可微性，可以有效地执行贝叶斯推理，在无导数方法的一小部分时间内估计数百个参数的后验。接下来，我们说明可以优化模拟中的控制参数，以通过横向切片运动最小化切削力。最后，我们在配备切片刀的真实机器人手臂上进行实验，以根据力测量推断模拟参数。通过优化刀具的切片运动，我们在水果切割场景中证明，与垂直切割运动相比，平均刀力可降低 40% 以上。我们在项目网站上发布代码和其他材料：https://diff-cutting-sim.github.io。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiSECt，首个用于软材料切割的可微分仿真器，实现参数推断与控制优化。
AI.motivation: 机器人切割软材料在食品加工、医疗等领域至关重要，但现有仿真器难以高效校准参数并优化控制策略。
AI.method: 结合有限元法（FEM）与基于符号距离场（SDF）的连续接触模型及损伤模型，通过可微分仿真实现梯度优化，并利用贝叶斯推断进行参数估计。
AI.result: 仿真器可匹配商业求解器与真实数据，参数推断速度比无导数方法快数百倍，实际机器人实验中切割力降低超40%。
AI.conclusion: DiSECt为机器人切割提供了高效参数校准与控制优化方案，显著提升切割效率与安全性。

authors_text: Soumya Sanyal,Harman Singh,Xiang Ren
title: FaiRR: Faithful and Robust Deductive Reasoning over Natural Language
title_zh: FaiRR：自然语言的忠实且稳健的演绎推理
abstract: Transformers have been shown to be able to perform deductive reasoning on a logical rulebase containing rules and statements written in natural language. Recent works show that such models can also produce the reasoning steps (i.e., the proof graph) that emulate the model's logical reasoning process. Currently, these black-box models generate both the proof graph and intermediate inferences within the same model and thus may be unfaithful. In this work, we frame the deductive logical reasoning task by defining three modular components: rule selection, fact selection, and knowledge composition. The rule and fact selection steps select the candidate rule and facts to be used and then the knowledge composition combines them to generate new inferences. This ensures model faithfulness by assured causal relation from the proof step to the inference reasoning. To test our framework, we propose FaiRR (Faithful and Robust Reasoner) where the above three components are independently modeled by transformers. We observe that FaiRR is robust to novel language perturbations, and is faster at inference than previous works on existing reasoning datasets. Additionally, in contrast to black-box generative models, the errors made by FaiRR are more interpretable due to the modular approach.
summary: Transformers have been shown to be able to perform deductive reasoning on a logical rulebase containing rules and statements written in natural language. Recent works show that such models can also produce the reasoning steps (i.e., the proof graph) that emulate the model's logical reasoning process. Currently, these black-box models generate both the proof graph and intermediate inferences within the same model and thus may be unfaithful. In this work, we frame the deductive logical reasoning task by defining three modular components: rule selection, fact selection, and knowledge composition. The rule and fact selection steps select the candidate rule and facts to be used and then the knowledge composition combines them to generate new inferences. This ensures model faithfulness by assured causal relation from the proof step to the inference reasoning. To test our framework, we propose FaiRR (Faithful and Robust Reasoner) where the above three components are independently modeled by transformers. We observe that FaiRR is robust to novel language perturbations, and is faster at inference than previous works on existing reasoning datasets. Additionally, in contrast to black-box generative models, the errors made by FaiRR are more interpretable due to the modular approach.
abstract_zh: Transformer 已被证明能够对包含用自然语言编写的规则和语句的逻辑规则库执行演绎推理。最近的工作表明，此类模型还可以产生模拟模型逻辑推理过程的推理步骤（即证明图）。目前，这些黑盒模型在同一模型内生成证明图和中间推论，因此可能不忠实。在这项工作中，我们通过定义三个模块化组件来构建演绎逻辑推理任务：规则选择、事实选择和知识组合。规则和事实选择步骤选择要使用的候选规则和事实，然后知识组合将它们组合起来生成新的推论。这通过确保从证明步骤到推理的因果关系来确保模型的可信度。为了测试我们的框架，我们提出了 FaiRR（Faithful and Robust Reasoner），其中上述三个组件由 Transformer 独立建模。我们观察到 FaiRR ​​对新的语言扰动具有鲁棒性，并且比之前在现有推理数据集上的工作推理速度更快。此外，与黑盒生成模型相比，由于采用模块化方法，FaiRR ​​所犯的错误更容易解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FaiRR框架，通过模块化组件实现自然语言上的忠实且鲁棒的演绎推理。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的演绎推理模型为黑箱结构，生成的推理步骤与中间推论不可分离，导致模型不忠实且错误不可解释。
AI.method: 将演绎推理任务分解为规则选择、事实选择和知识组合三个独立模块，分别由Transformer建模以确保因果关系可追溯。
AI.result: FaiRR在新型语言扰动下表现鲁棒，推理速度优于现有方法，且因模块化设计使错误更易解释。
AI.conclusion: 通过模块化架构，FaiRR实现了更忠实和鲁棒的自然语言演绎推理，为可解释AI提供了新思路。
