tldr: 本文提出FaiRR框架，通过模块化组件实现自然语言上的忠实且鲁棒的演绎推理。
motivation: 现有基于Transformer的演绎推理模型为黑箱结构，生成的推理步骤与中间推论不可分离，导致模型不忠实且错误不可解释。
method: 将演绎推理任务分解为规则选择、事实选择和知识组合三个独立模块，分别由Transformer建模以确保因果关系可追溯。
result: FaiRR在新型语言扰动下表现鲁棒，推理速度优于现有方法，且因模块化设计使错误更易解释。
conclusion: 通过模块化架构，FaiRR实现了更忠实和鲁棒的自然语言演绎推理，为可解释AI提供了新思路。
search_text: FaiRR: Faithful and Robust Deductive Reasoning over Natural Language FaiRR：自然语言的忠实且稳健的演绎推理 Transformers have been shown to be able to perform deductive reasoning on a logical rulebase containing rules and statements written in natural language. Recent works show that such models can also produce the reasoning steps (i.e., the proof graph) that emulate the model's logical reasoning process. Currently, these black-box models generate both the proof graph and intermediate inferences within the same model and thus may be unfaithful. In this work, we frame the deductive logical reasoning task by defining three modular components: rule selection, fact selection, and knowledge composition. The rule and fact selection steps select the candidate rule and facts to be used and then the knowledge composition combines them to generate new inferences. This ensures model faithfulness by assured causal relation from the proof step to the inference reasoning. To test our framework, we propose FaiRR (Faithful and Robust Reasoner) where the above three components are independently modeled by transformers. We observe that FaiRR is robust to novel language perturbations, and is faster at inference than previous works on existing reasoning datasets. Additionally, in contrast to black-box generative models, the errors made by FaiRR are more interpretable due to the modular approach. Transformer 已被证明能够对包含用自然语言编写的规则和语句的逻辑规则库执行演绎推理。最近的工作表明，此类模型还可以产生模拟模型逻辑推理过程的推理步骤（即证明图）。目前，这些黑盒模型在同一模型内生成证明图和中间推论，因此可能不忠实。在这项工作中，我们通过定义三个模块化组件来构建演绎逻辑推理任务：规则选择、事实选择和知识组合。规则和事实选择步骤选择要使用的候选规则和事实，然后知识组合将它们组合起来生成新的推论。这通过确保从证明步骤到推理的因果关系来确保模型的可信度。为了测试我们的框架，我们提出了 FaiRR（Faithful and Robust Reasoner），其中上述三个组件由 Transformer 独立建模。我们观察到 FaiRR ​​对新的语言扰动具有鲁棒性，并且比之前在现有推理数据集上的工作推理速度更快。此外，与黑盒生成模型相比，由于采用模块化方法，FaiRR ​​所犯的错误更容易解释。 本文提出FaiRR框架，通过模块化组件实现自然语言上的忠实且鲁棒的演绎推理。 Soumya Sanyal,Harman Singh,Xiang Ren cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xiaoyang Huang,Jiancheng Yang,Yanjun Wang,Ziyu Chen,Linguo Li,Teng Li,Bingbing Ni,Wenjun Zhang
title: Representation-Agnostic Shape Fields
title_zh: 与表示无关的形状字段
comment: The Tenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2022). Code is available at https://github.com/seanywang0408/RASF
comments: The Tenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2022). Code is available at https://github.com/seanywang0408/RASF
abstract: 3D shape analysis has been widely explored in the era of deep learning. Numerous models have been developed for various 3D data representation formats, e.g., MeshCNN for meshes, PointNet for point clouds and VoxNet for voxels. In this study, we present Representation-Agnostic Shape Fields (RASF), a generalizable and computation-efficient shape embedding module for 3D deep learning. RASF is implemented with a learnable 3D grid with multiple channels to store local geometry. Based on RASF, shape embeddings for various 3D shape representations (point clouds, meshes and voxels) are retrieved by coordinate indexing. While there are multiple ways to optimize the learnable parameters of RASF, we provide two effective schemes among all in this paper for RASF pre-training: shape reconstruction and normal estimation. Once trained, RASF becomes a plug-and-play performance booster with negligible cost. Extensive experiments on diverse 3D representation formats, networks and applications, validate the universal effectiveness of the proposed RASF. Code and pre-trained models are publicly available https://github.com/seanywang0408/RASF
summary: 3D shape analysis has been widely explored in the era of deep learning. Numerous models have been developed for various 3D data representation formats, e.g., MeshCNN for meshes, PointNet for point clouds and VoxNet for voxels. In this study, we present Representation-Agnostic Shape Fields (RASF), a generalizable and computation-efficient shape embedding module for 3D deep learning. RASF is implemented with a learnable 3D grid with multiple channels to store local geometry. Based on RASF, shape embeddings for various 3D shape representations (point clouds, meshes and voxels) are retrieved by coordinate indexing. While there are multiple ways to optimize the learnable parameters of RASF, we provide two effective schemes among all in this paper for RASF pre-training: shape reconstruction and normal estimation. Once trained, RASF becomes a plug-and-play performance booster with negligible cost. Extensive experiments on diverse 3D representation formats, networks and applications, validate the universal effectiveness of the proposed RASF. Code and pre-trained models are publicly available https://github.com/seanywang0408/RASF
abstract_zh: 3D形状分析在深度学习时代得到了广泛的探索。针对各种 3D 数据表示格式开发了许多模型，例如用于网格的 MeshCNN、用于点云的 PointNet 和用于体素的 VoxNet。在这项研究中，我们提出了与表示无关的形状场（RASF），这是一种用于 3D 深度学习的可泛化且计算高效的形状嵌入模块。 RASF 通过可学习的 3D 网格实现，该网格具有多个通道来存储局部几何图形。基于 RASF，通过坐标索引检索各种 3D 形状表示（点云、网格和体素）的形状嵌入。虽然优化 RASF 可学习参数的方法有多种，但本文为 RASF 预训练提供了两种有效的方案：形状重建和法线估计。经过培训后，RASF 就成为即插即用的性能增强器，且成本可以忽略不计。对不同 3D 表示格式、网络和应用程序的广泛实验验证了所提出的 RASF 的普遍有效性。代码和预训练模型已公开 https://github.com/seanywang0408/RASF

AI.tldr: 提出一种通用且计算高效的3D形状嵌入模块（RASF），适用于多种3D数据表示格式（点云、网格、体素）。
AI.motivation: 现有3D深度学习模型依赖特定数据表示（如MeshCNN、PointNet、VoxNet），缺乏统一的跨格式解决方案，限制了模型通用性与效率。
AI.method: 设计可学习的3D网格结构存储局部几何信息，通过坐标索引生成不同表示的形状嵌入；提供两种预训练方案（形状重建与法线估计）。
AI.result: 在多种3D格式、网络架构及应用任务中验证了RASF的广泛有效性，代码与预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: RASF通过统一的形状嵌入机制显著提升了跨格式3D任务的性能，证明了其通用性与计算效率优势。

authors_text: Kyuhong Shim,Wonyong Sung
title: Similarity and Content-based Phonetic Self Attention for Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于语音识别的相似性和基于内容的语音自注意力
abstract: Transformer-based speech recognition models have achieved great success due to the self-attention (SA) mechanism that utilizes every frame in the feature extraction process. Especially, SA heads in lower layers capture various phonetic characteristics by the query-key dot product, which is designed to compute the pairwise relationship between frames. In this paper, we propose a variant of SA to extract more representative phonetic features. The proposed phonetic self-attention (phSA) is composed of two different types of phonetic attention; one is similarity-based and the other is content-based. In short, similarity-based attention captures the correlation between frames while content-based attention only considers each frame without being affected by other frames. We identify which parts of the original dot product equation are related to two different attention patterns and improve each part with simple modifications. Our experiments on phoneme classification and speech recognition show that replacing SA with phSA for lower layers improves the recognition performance without increasing the latency and the parameter size.
summary: Transformer-based speech recognition models have achieved great success due to the self-attention (SA) mechanism that utilizes every frame in the feature extraction process. Especially, SA heads in lower layers capture various phonetic characteristics by the query-key dot product, which is designed to compute the pairwise relationship between frames. In this paper, we propose a variant of SA to extract more representative phonetic features. The proposed phonetic self-attention (phSA) is composed of two different types of phonetic attention; one is similarity-based and the other is content-based. In short, similarity-based attention captures the correlation between frames while content-based attention only considers each frame without being affected by other frames. We identify which parts of the original dot product equation are related to two different attention patterns and improve each part with simple modifications. Our experiments on phoneme classification and speech recognition show that replacing SA with phSA for lower layers improves the recognition performance without increasing the latency and the parameter size.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的语音识别模型由于在特征提取过程中利用每一帧的自注意力（SA）机制而取得了巨大的成功。特别是，较低层的 SA 头通过查询键点积捕获各种语音特征，该点积旨在计算帧之间的成对关系。在本文中，我们提出了 SA 的一种变体来提取更具代表性的语音特征。所提出的语音自注意力（phSA）由两种不同类型的语音注意力组成；一种是基于相似性，另一种是基于内容。简而言之，基于相似性的注意力捕获帧之间的相关性，而基于内容的注意力仅考虑每个帧而不受其他帧的影响。我们确定原始点积方程的哪些部分与两种不同的注意力模式相关，并通过简单的修改改进每个部分。我们在音素分类和语音识别方面的实验表明，将较低层的 SA 替换为 phSA 可以提高识别性能，而不会增加延迟和参数大小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的自注意力机制（phSA），通过结合相似度和内容两种注意力模式，提升语音识别模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统自注意力机制在语音识别中虽有效，但未充分区分帧间相似性与内容特征，导致特征表达不够精准。
AI.method: 设计两种注意力模式：相似度注意力计算帧间关系，内容注意力独立处理单帧信息，并对原公式进行针对性优化。
AI.result: 在音素分类和语音识别任务中，phSA替代传统SA后性能提升，且未增加计算延迟和参数量。
AI.conclusion: phSA通过区分帧间关联与独立内容特征，有效提升语音识别准确率，为模型设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Qing Cai,Yiming Qian,Jinxing Li,Jun Lv,Yee-Hong Yang,Feng Wu,David Zhang
title: HIPA: Hierarchical Patch Transformer for Single Image Super Resolution
title_zh: HIPA：用于单图像超分辨率的分层补丁转换器
abstract: Transformer-based architectures start to emerge in single image super resolution (SISR) and have achieved promising performance. Most existing Vision Transformers divide images into the same number of patches with a fixed size, which may not be optimal for restoring patches with different levels of texture richness. This paper presents HIPA, a novel Transformer architecture that progressively recovers the high resolution image using a hierarchical patch partition. Specifically, we build a cascaded model that processes an input image in multiple stages, where we start with tokens with small patch sizes and gradually merge to the full resolution. Such a hierarchical patch mechanism not only explicitly enables feature aggregation at multiple resolutions but also adaptively learns patch-aware features for different image regions, e.g., using a smaller patch for areas with fine details and a larger patch for textureless regions. Meanwhile, a new attention-based position encoding scheme for Transformer is proposed to let the network focus on which tokens should be paid more attention by assigning different weights to different tokens, which is the first time to our best knowledge. Furthermore, we also propose a new multi-reception field attention module to enlarge the convolution reception field from different branches. The experimental results on several public datasets demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed HIPA over previous methods quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: Transformer-based architectures start to emerge in single image super resolution (SISR) and have achieved promising performance. Most existing Vision Transformers divide images into the same number of patches with a fixed size, which may not be optimal for restoring patches with different levels of texture richness. This paper presents HIPA, a novel Transformer architecture that progressively recovers the high resolution image using a hierarchical patch partition. Specifically, we build a cascaded model that processes an input image in multiple stages, where we start with tokens with small patch sizes and gradually merge to the full resolution. Such a hierarchical patch mechanism not only explicitly enables feature aggregation at multiple resolutions but also adaptively learns patch-aware features for different image regions, e.g., using a smaller patch for areas with fine details and a larger patch for textureless regions. Meanwhile, a new attention-based position encoding scheme for Transformer is proposed to let the network focus on which tokens should be paid more attention by assigning different weights to different tokens, which is the first time to our best knowledge. Furthermore, we also propose a new multi-reception field attention module to enlarge the convolution reception field from different branches. The experimental results on several public datasets demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed HIPA over previous methods quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的架构开始在单图像超分辨率（SISR）领域出现，并取得了可喜的性能。大多数现有的 Vision Transformer 将图像划分为相同数量的固定大小的块，这对于恢复具有不同纹理丰富度级别的块可能不是最佳的。本文提出了 HIPA，一种新颖的 Transformer 架构，它使用分层补丁分区逐步恢复高分辨率图像。具体来说，我们构建了一个级联模型，该模型分多个阶段处理输入图像，其中我们从小块大小的标记开始，并逐渐合并到全分辨率。这种分层补丁机制不仅明确地支持多种分辨率下的特征聚合，而且还自适应地学习不同图像区域的补丁感知特征，例如，对具有精细细节的区域使用较小的补丁，对无纹理区域使用较大的补丁。同时，针对 Transformer 提出了一种新的基于注意力的位置编码方案，通过为不同的 token 分配不同的权重，让网络关注哪些 token 应该受到更多的关注，这在我们所知的情况下还是第一次。此外，我们还提出了一种新的多接收场注意模块来扩大不同分支的卷积接收场。多个公共数据集上的实验结果从数量和质量上证明了所提出的 HIPA 比以前的方法具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HIPA，一种基于分层补丁的Transformer架构，用于单图像超分辨率任务，通过自适应处理不同纹理区域的补丁大小提升重建效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉Transformer使用固定大小的补丁划分，无法适应图像中不同纹理丰富度区域的需求，导致细节恢复不足。
AI.method: 构建级联模型分阶段处理图像，从细粒度小补丁逐步合并至全分辨率；引入注意力机制的位置编码方案与多感受野注意力模块，增强特征聚合与区域自适应能力。
AI.result: 在多个公开数据集上定量与定性实验均优于现有方法，验证了HIPA在超分辨率任务中的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 分层补丁机制与自适应特征学习有效提升了图像超分辨率效果，为Transformer在SISR领域的应用提供了新思路。

Most existing Vision Transformers divide images into the same number of patches with a fixed size, which may not be optimal for restoring patches with different levels of texture richness. This paper presents HIPA, a novel Transformer architecture that progressively recovers the high resolution image using a hierarchical patch partition. Specifically, we build a cascaded model that processes an input image in multiple stages, where we start with tokens with small patch sizes and gradually merge to the full resolution. Such a hierarchical patch mechanism not only explicitly enables feature aggregation at multiple resolutions but also adaptively learns patch-aware features for different image regions, e.g., using a smaller patch for areas with fine details and a larger patch for textureless regions. Meanwhile, a new attention-based position encoding scheme for Transformer is proposed to let the network focus on which tokens should be paid more attention by assigning different weights to different tokens, which is the first time to our best knowledge. Furthermore, we also propose a new multi-reception field attention module to enlarge the convolution reception field from different branches. The experimental results on several public datasets demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed HIPA over previous methods quantitatively and qualitatively. 基于 Transformer 的架构开始在单图像超分辨率（SISR）领域出现，并取得了可喜的性能。大多数现有的 Vision Transformer 将图像划分为相同数量的固定大小的块，这对于恢复具有不同纹理丰富度级别的块可能不是最佳的。本文提出了 HIPA，一种新颖的 Transformer 架构，它使用分层补丁分区逐步恢复高分辨率图像。具体来说，我们构建了一个级联模型，该模型分多个阶段处理输入图像，其中我们从小块大小的标记开始，并逐渐合并到全分辨率。这种分层补丁机制不仅明确地支持多种分辨率下的特征聚合，而且还自适应地学习不同图像区域的补丁感知特征，例如，对具有精细细节的区域使用较小的补丁，对无纹理区域使用较大的补丁。同时，针对 Transformer 提出了一种新的基于注意力的位置编码方案，通过为不同的 token 分配不同的权重，让网络关注哪些 token 应该受到更多的关注，这在我们所知的情况下还是第一次。此外，我们还提出了一种新的多接收场注意模块来扩大不同分支的卷积接收场。多个公共数据集上的实验结果从数量和质量上证明了所提出的 HIPA 比以前的方法具有优越的性能。 本文提出HIPA，一种基于分层补丁的Transformer架构，用于单图像超分辨率任务，通过自适应处理不同纹理区域的补丁大小提升重建效果。 Qing Cai,Yiming Qian,Jinxing Li,Jun Lv,Yee-Hong Yang,Feng Wu,David Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Thanh-Dat Truong,Quoc-Huy Bui,Chi Nhan Duong,Han-Seok Seo,Son Lam Phung,Xin Li,Khoa Luu
title: DirecFormer: A Directed Attention in Transformer Approach to Robust Action Recognition
title_zh: DirecFormer：通过 Transformer 方法实现鲁棒动作识别的定向注意力
abstract: Human action recognition has recently become one of the popular research topics in the computer vision community. Various 3D-CNN based methods have been presented to tackle both the spatial and temporal dimensions in the task of video action recognition with competitive results. However, these methods have suffered some fundamental limitations such as lack of robustness and generalization, e.g., how does the temporal ordering of video frames affect the recognition results? This work presents a novel end-to-end Transformer-based Directed Attention (DirecFormer) framework for robust action recognition. The method takes a simple but novel perspective of Transformer-based approach to understand the right order of sequence actions. Therefore, the contributions of this work are three-fold. Firstly, we introduce the problem of ordered temporal learning issues to the action recognition problem. Secondly, a new Directed Attention mechanism is introduced to understand and provide attentions to human actions in the right order. Thirdly, we introduce the conditional dependency in action sequence modeling that includes orders and classes. The proposed approach consistently achieves the state-of-the-art (SOTA) results compared with the recent action recognition methods, on three standard large-scale benchmarks, i.e. Jester, Kinetics-400 and Something-Something-V2.
summary: Human action recognition has recently become one of the popular research topics in the computer vision community. Various 3D-CNN based methods have been presented to tackle both the spatial and temporal dimensions in the task of video action recognition with competitive results. However, these methods have suffered some fundamental limitations such as lack of robustness and generalization, e.g., how does the temporal ordering of video frames affect the recognition results? This work presents a novel end-to-end Transformer-based Directed Attention (DirecFormer) framework for robust action recognition. The method takes a simple but novel perspective of Transformer-based approach to understand the right order of sequence actions. Therefore, the contributions of this work are three-fold. Firstly, we introduce the problem of ordered temporal learning issues to the action recognition problem. Secondly, a new Directed Attention mechanism is introduced to understand and provide attentions to human actions in the right order. Thirdly, we introduce the conditional dependency in action sequence modeling that includes orders and classes. The proposed approach consistently achieves the state-of-the-art (SOTA) results compared with the recent action recognition methods, on three standard large-scale benchmarks, i.e. Jester, Kinetics-400 and Something-Something-V2.
abstract_zh: 人类动作识别最近已成为计算机视觉界的热门研究课题之一。人们已经提出了各种基于 3D-CNN 的方法来处理视频动作识别任务中的空间和时间维度，并取得了有竞争力的结果。然而，这些方法存在一些基本的局限性，例如缺乏鲁棒性和泛化性，例如视频帧的时间顺序如何影响识别结果？这项工作提出了一种新颖的基于 Transformer 的端到端定向注意力（DirecFormer）框架，用于稳健的动作识别。该方法采用基于 Transformer 的方法的简单但新颖的视角来理解序列操作的正确顺序。因此，这项工作的贡献是三方面的。首先，我们将有序时间学习问题引入到动作识别问题中。其次，引入了一种新的定向注意力机制，以按照正确的顺序理解和提供对人类行为的关注。第三，我们介绍了动作序列建模中的条件依赖，包括顺序和类。与最近的动作识别方法相比，所提出的方法在三个标准大规模基准（即 Jester、Kinetics-400 和 Something-Something-V2）上始终达到了最先进的（SOTA）结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的DirecFormer框架，通过引入定向注意力机制解决视频动作识别中的时序学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D-CNN方法在动作识别任务中存在鲁棒性和泛化能力不足的问题，尤其无法有效处理视频帧的时序依赖关系。
AI.method: 设计了包含定向注意力机制的Transformer框架，通过建模动作序列的条件依赖关系，捕捉正确的时序信息。
AI.result: 在Jester、Kinetics-400和Something-Something-V2三个基准数据集上均达到当时最优性能（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: DirecFormer通过显式建模时序依赖关系，有效提升了动作识别的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

ai_content.conclusion: DirecFormer通过显式建模时序依赖关系，有效提升了动作识别的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

authors_text: Ruihua Han,Shengduo Chen,Shuaijun Wang,Zeqing Zhang,Rui Gao,Qi Hao,Jia Pan
title: Reinforcement Learned Distributed Multi-Robot Navigation with Reciprocal Velocity Obstacle Shaped Rewards
title_zh: 具有倒数速度障碍形状奖励的强化学习分布式多机器人导航
abstract: The challenges to solving the collision avoidance problem lie in adaptively choosing optimal robot velocities in complex scenarios full of interactive obstacles. In this paper, we propose a distributed approach for multi-robot navigation which combines the concept of reciprocal velocity obstacle (RVO) and the scheme of deep reinforcement learning (DRL) to solve the reciprocal collision avoidance problem under limited information. The novelty of this work is threefold: (1) using a set of sequential VO and RVO vectors to represent the interactive environmental states of static and dynamic obstacles, respectively; (2) developing a bidirectional recurrent module based neural network, which maps the states of a varying number of surrounding obstacles to the actions directly; (3) developing a RVO area and expected collision time based reward function to encourage reciprocal collision avoidance behaviors and trade off between collision risk and travel time. The proposed policy is trained through simulated scenarios and updated by the actor-critic based DRL algorithm. We validate the policy in complex environments with various numbers of differential drive robots and obstacles. The experiment results demonstrate that our approach outperforms the state-of-art methods and other learning based approaches in terms of the success rate, travel time, and average speed. Source code of this approach is available at https://github.com/hanruihua/rl_rvo_nav.
summary: The challenges to solving the collision avoidance problem lie in adaptively choosing optimal robot velocities in complex scenarios full of interactive obstacles. In this paper, we propose a distributed approach for multi-robot navigation which combines the concept of reciprocal velocity obstacle (RVO) and the scheme of deep reinforcement learning (DRL) to solve the reciprocal collision avoidance problem under limited information. The novelty of this work is threefold: (1) using a set of sequential VO and RVO vectors to represent the interactive environmental states of static and dynamic obstacles, respectively; (2) developing a bidirectional recurrent module based neural network, which maps the states of a varying number of surrounding obstacles to the actions directly; (3) developing a RVO area and expected collision time based reward function to encourage reciprocal collision avoidance behaviors and trade off between collision risk and travel time. The proposed policy is trained through simulated scenarios and updated by the actor-critic based DRL algorithm. We validate the policy in complex environments with various numbers of differential drive robots and obstacles. The experiment results demonstrate that our approach outperforms the state-of-art methods and other learning based approaches in terms of the success rate, travel time, and average speed. Source code of this approach is available at https://github.com/hanruihua/rl_rvo_nav.
abstract_zh: 解决防撞问题的挑战在于在充满交互障碍的复杂场景中自适应地选择最佳机器人速度。在本文中，我们提出了一种分布式多机器人导航方法，结合了相互速度障碍（RVO）的概念和深度强化学习（DRL）的方案来解决有限信息下的相互碰撞避免问题。这项工作的新颖之处有三个：（1）使用一组连续的 VO 和 RVO 向量分别表示静态和动态障碍物的交互环境状态； （2）开发基于双向循环模块的神经网络，将不同数量的周围障碍物的状态直接映射到动作； (3) 开发基于 RVO 区域和预期碰撞时间的奖励函数，以鼓励相互避碰行为并在碰撞风险和行驶时间之间进行权衡。所提出的策略通过模拟场景进行训练，并通过基于行动者批评家的 DRL 算法进行更新。我们在具有不同数量的差速驱动机器人和障碍物的复杂环境中验证该策略。实验结果表明，我们的方法在成功率、行程时间和平均速度方面优于最先进的方法和其他基于学习的方法。该方法的源代码可在 https://github.com/hanruihua/rl_rvo_nav 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合双向递归神经网络和深度强化学习的分布式多机器人导航方法，解决复杂环境下有限信息条件下的碰撞避免问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动态障碍物密集且信息有限的场景中难以实现高效碰撞避免，需开发适应复杂交互环境的多机器人导航策略。
AI.method: 融合双向递归模块神经网络与深度强化学习，利用RVO矢量表征环境状态，设计基于RVO区域和预期碰撞时间的奖励函数，通过Actor-Critic算法训练导航策略。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在成功率、行驶时间和平均速度指标上优于现有最优方法和基于学习的其他方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了多机器人系统在复杂动态环境中的碰撞避免问题，为有限信息场景提供了新的导航解决方案。

search_text: Reinforcement Learned Distributed Multi-Robot Navigation with Reciprocal Velocity Obstacle Shaped Rewards 具有倒数速度障碍形状奖励的强化学习分布式多机器人导航 The challenges to solving the collision avoidance problem lie in adaptively choosing optimal robot velocities in complex scenarios full of interactive obstacles. In this paper, we propose a distributed approach for multi-robot navigation which combines the concept of reciprocal velocity obstacle (RVO) and the scheme of deep reinforcement learning (DRL) to solve the reciprocal collision avoidance problem under limited information. The novelty of this work is threefold: (1) using a set of sequential VO and RVO vectors to represent the interactive environmental states of static and dynamic obstacles, respectively; (2) developing a bidirectional recurrent module based neural network, which maps the states of a varying number of surrounding obstacles to the actions directly; (3) developing a RVO area and expected collision time based reward function to encourage reciprocal collision avoidance behaviors and trade off between collision risk and travel time. The proposed policy is trained through simulated scenarios and updated by the actor-critic based DRL algorithm. We validate the policy in complex environments with various numbers of differential drive robots and obstacles. The experiment results demonstrate that our approach outperforms the state-of-art methods and other learning based approaches in terms of the success rate, travel time, and average speed. Source code of this approach is available at https://github.com/hanruihua/rl_rvo_nav. 解决防撞问题的挑战在于在充满交互障碍的复杂场景中自适应地选择最佳机器人速度。在本文中，我们提出了一种分布式多机器人导航方法，结合了相互速度障碍（RVO）的概念和深度强化学习（DRL）的方案来解决有限信息下的相互碰撞避免问题。这项工作的新颖之处有三个：（1）使用一组连续的 VO 和 RVO 向量分别表示静态和动态障碍物的交互环境状态； （2）开发基于双向循环模块的神经网络，将不同数量的周围障碍物的状态直接映射到动作； (3) 开发基于 RVO 区域和预期碰撞时间的奖励函数，以鼓励相互避碰行为并在碰撞风险和行驶时间之间进行权衡。所提出的策略通过模拟场景进行训练，并通过基于行动者批评家的 DRL 算法进行更新。我们在具有不同数量的差速驱动机器人和障碍物的复杂环境中验证该策略。实验结果表明，我们的方法在成功率、行程时间和平均速度方面优于最先进的方法和其他基于学习的方法。该方法的源代码可在 https://github.com/hanruihua/rl_rvo_nav 获取。 本文提出一种结合双向递归神经网络和深度强化学习的分布式多机器人导航方法，解决复杂环境下有限信息条件下的碰撞避免问题。 Ruihua Han,Shengduo Chen,Shuaijun Wang,Zeqing Zhang,Rui Gao,Qi Hao,Jia Pan cs.RO

authors_text: Jinbo Hu,Yin Cao,Ming Wu,Qiuqiang Kong,Feiran Yang,Mark D. Plumbley,Jun Yang
title: A Track-Wise Ensemble Event Independent Network for Polyphonic Sound Event Localization and Detection
title_zh: 用于复调声音事件定位和检测的音轨合奏事件独立网络
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures, submitted to IEEE ICASSP 2022
comments: 6 pages, 2 figures, submitted to IEEE ICASSP 2022
abstract: Polyphonic sound event localization and detection (SELD) aims at detecting types of sound events with corresponding temporal activities and spatial locations. In this paper, a track-wise ensemble event independent network with a novel data augmentation method is proposed. The proposed model is based on our previous proposed Event-Independent Network V2 and is extended by conformer blocks and dense blocks. The track-wise ensemble model with track-wise output format is proposed to solve an ensemble model problem for track-wise output format that track permutation may occur among different models. The data augmentation approach contains several data augmentation chains, which are composed of random combinations of several data augmentation operations. The method also utilizes log-mel spectrograms, intensity vectors, and Spatial Cues-Augmented Log-Spectrogram (SALSA) for different models. We evaluate our proposed method in the Task of the L3DAS22 challenge and obtain the top ranking solution with a location-dependent F-score to be 0.699. Source code is released.
summary: Polyphonic sound event localization and detection (SELD) aims at detecting types of sound events with corresponding temporal activities and spatial locations. In this paper, a track-wise ensemble event independent network with a novel data augmentation method is proposed. The proposed model is based on our previous proposed Event-Independent Network V2 and is extended by conformer blocks and dense blocks. The track-wise ensemble model with track-wise output format is proposed to solve an ensemble model problem for track-wise output format that track permutation may occur among different models. The data augmentation approach contains several data augmentation chains, which are composed of random combinations of several data augmentation operations. The method also utilizes log-mel spectrograms, intensity vectors, and Spatial Cues-Augmented Log-Spectrogram (SALSA) for different models. We evaluate our proposed method in the Task of the L3DAS22 challenge and obtain the top ranking solution with a location-dependent F-score to be 0.699. Source code is released.
abstract_zh: 复调声音事件定位和检测（SELD）旨在检测具有相应时间活动和空间位置的声音事件类型。在本文中，提出了一种具有新颖数据增强方法的轨道式集成事件独立网络。所提出的模型基于我们之前提出的事件独立网络 V2，并通过一致性块和密集块进行了扩展。为了解决不同模型之间可能发生轨道排列的轨道输出格式的集成模型问题，提出了具有轨道输出格式的轨道集成模型。数据增强方法包含多个数据增强链，这些数据增强链由多个数据增强操作的随机组合组成。该方法还针对不同模型利用对数梅尔谱图、强度向量和空间线索增强对数谱图 (SALSA)。我们在 L3DAS22 挑战任务中评估了我们提出的方法，并获得了排名最高的解决方案，其位置相关的 F 分数为 0.699。源代码已发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多声源声音事件定位与检测（SELD）的Track-Wise集成事件独立网络，旨在检测复杂声学环境中声音事件的类型、时间活动和空间位置。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在处理多声源场景时存在轨迹排列问题，且需提升对复杂声学环境的鲁棒性。本文基于改进的Event-Independent Network V2，通过引入Conformer块和Dense块优化模型结构，并设计新的数据增强方法以提升性能。
AI.method: 提出Track-Wise集成模型解决轨迹排列问题，采用多链数据增强策略结合随机操作组合。利用log-mel频谱图、强度向量和SALSA空间线索增强特征，融合Conformer与Dense块构建深层网络架构。
AI.result: 在L3DAS22挑战赛中取得最佳成绩，位置依赖F值达0.699，开源了实现代码。
AI.conclusion: 通过Track-Wise集成策略、多模态特征融合及数据增强方法，本文有效解决了多声源SELD任务中的轨迹排列与定位精度问题，达到当前最优性能。

authors_text: Sachiko Matsumoto,Laurel D. Riek
title: Shared Control in Human Robot Teaming: Toward Context-Aware Communication
title_zh: 人类机器人团队中的共享控制：走向情境感知通信
comment: Appears in Proceedings of the AAAI SSS-22 Symposium "Closing the Assessment Loop: Communicating Proficiency and Intent in Human-Robot Teaming"
comments: Appears in Proceedings of the AAAI SSS-22 Symposium "Closing the Assessment Loop: Communicating Proficiency and Intent in Human-Robot Teaming"
abstract: In the field of Human-Robot Interaction (HRI), many researchers study shared control systems. Shared control is when a person and agent both contribute to the performance of a task in a collaborative way, often by providing control inputs for a robot. One of the most important things in shared control is the nature of the communication between the person and robot, which could help the human-robot team handle a variety of challenging situations. In this paper, we identify key challenges in shared control, in which better communication design could be useful, including when encountering novel situations and contexts, resolving tensions between preferences and performance, and alleviating cognitive burden and interruptions. Through the use of four exemplar shared control scenarios, we explore how well-designed human-robot communication strategies could help address each challenge. We hope this paper will draw attention to these challenges and assist researchers in advancing the development of shared control systems.
summary: In the field of Human-Robot Interaction (HRI), many researchers study shared control systems. Shared control is when a person and agent both contribute to the performance of a task in a collaborative way, often by providing control inputs for a robot. One of the most important things in shared control is the nature of the communication between the person and robot, which could help the human-robot team handle a variety of challenging situations. In this paper, we identify key challenges in shared control, in which better communication design could be useful, including when encountering novel situations and contexts, resolving tensions between preferences and performance, and alleviating cognitive burden and interruptions. Through the use of four exemplar shared control scenarios, we explore how well-designed human-robot communication strategies could help address each challenge. We hope this paper will draw attention to these challenges and assist researchers in advancing the development of shared control systems.
abstract_zh: 在人机交互（HRI）领域，许多研究人员研究共享控制系统。共享控制是指人和代理都以协作方式为任务的执行做出贡献，通常是通过为机器人提供控制输入。共享控制中最重要的事情之一是人与机器人之间通信的性质，这可以帮助人机团队处理各种具有挑战性的情况。在本文中，我们确定了共享控制中的关键挑战，其中更好的沟通设计可能会很有用，包括在遇到新的情况和背景时，解决偏好和表现之间的紧张关系，以及减轻认知负担和干扰。通过使用四个示例性共享控制场景，我们探索了精心设计的人机通信策略如何帮助应对每个挑战。我们希望本文能够引起人们对这些挑战的关注，并帮助研究人员推进共享控制系统的开发。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过情境感知通信解决共享控制中的人机协作挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有共享控制系统在处理新情境、偏好冲突及认知负担方面存在不足，需改进通信设计。
AI.method: 通过四个共享控制场景分析情境感知通信策略的有效性。
AI.result: 提出针对挑战的通信策略，并强调其在提升人机协作性能中的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 情境感知通信是推动共享控制系统发展的核心方向，需进一步研究以应对复杂任务需求。

method: 通过四个共享控制场景分析情境感知通信策略的有效性。
result: 提出针对挑战的通信策略，并强调其在提升人机协作性能中的关键作用。
conclusion: 情境感知通信是推动共享控制系统发展的核心方向，需进一步研究以应对复杂任务需求。
search_text: Shared Control in Human Robot Teaming: Toward Context-Aware Communication 人类机器人团队中的共享控制：走向情境感知通信 In the field of Human-Robot Interaction (HRI), many researchers study shared control systems. Shared control is when a person and agent both contribute to the performance of a task in a collaborative way, often by providing control inputs for a robot. One of the most important things in shared control is the nature of the communication between the person and robot, which could help the human-robot team handle a variety of challenging situations. In this paper, we identify key challenges in shared control, in which better communication design could be useful, including when encountering novel situations and contexts, resolving tensions between preferences and performance, and alleviating cognitive burden and interruptions. Through the use of four exemplar shared control scenarios, we explore how well-designed human-robot communication strategies could help address each challenge. We hope this paper will draw attention to these challenges and assist researchers in advancing the development of shared control systems. 在人机交互（HRI）领域，许多研究人员研究共享控制系统。共享控制是指人和代理都以协作方式为任务的执行做出贡献，通常是通过为机器人提供控制输入。共享控制中最重要的事情之一是人与机器人之间通信的性质，这可以帮助人机团队处理各种具有挑战性的情况。在本文中，我们确定了共享控制中的关键挑战，其中更好的沟通设计可能会很有用，包括在遇到新的情况和背景时，解决偏好和表现之间的紧张关系，以及减轻认知负担和干扰。通过使用四个示例性共享控制场景，我们探索了精心设计的人机通信策略如何帮助应对每个挑战。我们希望本文能够引起人们对这些挑战的关注，并帮助研究人员推进共享控制系统的开发。 本文旨在通过情境感知通信解决共享控制中的人机协作挑战。 Sachiko Matsumoto,Laurel D. Riek cs.RO

authors_text: Stefan Scherzinger,Jakob Weinland,Robert Wilbrandt,Pascal Becker,Arne Roennau,Rüdiger Dillmann
title: A Walking Space Robot for On-Orbit Satellite Servicing: The ReCoBot
title_zh: 用于在轨卫星服务的行走太空机器人：ReCoBot
comment: 7 pages, 9 figures, submitted to the 18th IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE)
comments: 7 pages, 9 figures, submitted to the 18th IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE)
abstract: A key factor in the economic efficiency of satellites is their availability in orbit. Replacing standardized building blocks, such as empty fuel tanks or outdated electronic modules, could greatly extend the satellites' lifetime. This, however, requires flexible robots that can locomote on the surface of these satellites for optimal accessibility and manipulation. This paper introduces ReCoBot, a 7-axis walking space manipulator for locomotion and manipulation. The robot can connect to compatible structures with its symmetric ends and provides interfaces for manual teleoperation and motion planning with a constantly changing base and tip. We build on open-source robotics software and easily available components to evaluate the overall concept with an early stage demonstrator. The proposed manipulator has a length of 1.20 m and a weight of 10.4 kg and successfully locomotes over a satellite mockup in our lab environment.
summary: A key factor in the economic efficiency of satellites is their availability in orbit. Replacing standardized building blocks, such as empty fuel tanks or outdated electronic modules, could greatly extend the satellites' lifetime. This, however, requires flexible robots that can locomote on the surface of these satellites for optimal accessibility and manipulation. This paper introduces ReCoBot, a 7-axis walking space manipulator for locomotion and manipulation. The robot can connect to compatible structures with its symmetric ends and provides interfaces for manual teleoperation and motion planning with a constantly changing base and tip. We build on open-source robotics software and easily available components to evaluate the overall concept with an early stage demonstrator. The proposed manipulator has a length of 1.20 m and a weight of 10.4 kg and successfully locomotes over a satellite mockup in our lab environment.
abstract_zh: 卫星经济效率的一个关键因素是它们在轨道上的可用性。更换标准化构件，例如空燃料箱或过时的电子模块，可以大大延长卫星的使用寿命。然而，这需要灵活的机器人能够在这些卫星表面上移动，以实现最佳的可达性和操纵性。本文介绍了 ReCoBot，一种用于运动和操纵的 7 轴行走空间机械臂。该机器人可以通过其对称端连接到兼容的结构，并通过不断变化的底座和尖端提供手动遥控操作和运动规划的接口。我们以开源机器人软件和易于使用的组件为基础，通过早期演示器评估整体概念。所提出的机械臂长 1.20 m，重 10.4 kg，并在我们的实验室环境中成功在卫星模型上移动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ReCoBot的7轴步行空间机械臂，用于在轨卫星维护任务，通过替换标准化模块延长卫星寿命。
AI.motivation: 卫星在轨可用性直接影响经济效率，而现有方案难以灵活更换卫星模块，亟需开发可移动、可操作的机器人系统。
AI.method: 设计对称末端连接结构，结合开源软件与通用部件构建1.2米长、10.4公斤重的原型机，通过实验室卫星模型验证移动与操作能力。
AI.result: ReCoBot成功在实验室环境中实现卫星模型表面的移动，并验证了动态基座与末端接口的运动规划可行性。
AI.conclusion: ReCoBot为在轨卫星维护提供了轻量化、模块化的解决方案，证明了步行机器人在复杂空间任务中的潜力。

authors_text: Stefan Zellmann,Giovanni Aguirre,Jürgen P. Schulze
title: Volkit: A Performance-Portable Computer Vision Library for 3D Volumetric Data
title_zh: Volkit：用于 3D 体积数据的高性能便携式计算机视觉库
abstract: We present volkit, an open source library with high performance implementations of image manipulation and computer vision algorithms that focus on 3D volumetric representations. Volkit implements a cross-platform, performance-portable API targeting both CPUs and GPUs that defers data and resource movement and hides them from the application developer using a managed API. We use volkit to process medical and simulation data that is rendered in VR and consequently integrated the library into the C++ virtual reality software CalVR. The paper presents case studies and performance results and by that demonstrates the library's effectiveness and the efficiency of this approach.
summary: We present volkit, an open source library with high performance implementations of image manipulation and computer vision algorithms that focus on 3D volumetric representations. Volkit implements a cross-platform, performance-portable API targeting both CPUs and GPUs that defers data and resource movement and hides them from the application developer using a managed API. We use volkit to process medical and simulation data that is rendered in VR and consequently integrated the library into the C++ virtual reality software CalVR. The paper presents case studies and performance results and by that demonstrates the library's effectiveness and the efficiency of this approach.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 volkit，这是一个开源库，具有高性能的图像处理和计算机视觉算法实现，专注于 3D 体积表示。 Volkit 实现了一个针对 CPU 和 GPU 的跨平台、性能可移植的 API，可以延迟数据和资源移动，并使用托管 API 对应用程序开发人员隐藏它们。我们使用 volkit 处理在 VR 中渲染的医疗和模拟数据，并将该库集成到 C++ 虚拟现实软件 CalVR 中。本文介绍了案例研究和绩效结果，并由此证明了图书馆的有效性和这种方法的效率。

AI.tldr: 开发一个跨平台、高性能的3D体积数据处理库，用于VR应用
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理3D体积数据时存在性能瓶颈，需跨平台解决方案以支持VR应用
AI.method: 设计跨平台API，通过延迟数据移动和资源管理，实现CPU/GPU性能可移植性
AI.result: 在医疗和模拟数据处理中验证了库的有效性，展示了高效性能
AI.conclusion: Volkit展示了高性能、跨平台处理3D体积数据的可行性，适用于VR等应用

authors_text: Haocheng Yuan,Chen Zhao,Shichao Fan,Jiaxi Jiang,Jiaqi Yang
title: Unsupervised Learning of 3D Semantic Keypoints with Mutual Reconstruction
title_zh: 具有相互重构功能的 3D 语义关键点的无监督学习
abstract: Semantic 3D keypoints are category-level semantic consistent points on 3D objects. Detecting 3D semantic keypoints is a foundation for a number of 3D vision tasks but remains challenging, due to the ambiguity of semantic information, especially when the objects are represented by unordered 3D point clouds. Existing unsupervised methods tend to generate category-level keypoints in implicit manners, making it difficult to extract high-level information, such as semantic labels and topology. From a novel mutual reconstruction perspective, we present an unsupervised method to generate consistent semantic keypoints from point clouds explicitly. To achieve this, the proposed model predicts keypoints that not only reconstruct the object itself but also reconstruct other instances in the same category. To the best of our knowledge, the proposed method is the first to mine 3D semantic consistent keypoints from a mutual reconstruction view. Experiments under various evaluation metrics as well as comparisons with the state-of-the-arts demonstrate the efficacy of our new solution to mining semantic consistent keypoints with mutual reconstruction.
summary: Semantic 3D keypoints are category-level semantic consistent points on 3D objects. Detecting 3D semantic keypoints is a foundation for a number of 3D vision tasks but remains challenging, due to the ambiguity of semantic information, especially when the objects are represented by unordered 3D point clouds. Existing unsupervised methods tend to generate category-level keypoints in implicit manners, making it difficult to extract high-level information, such as semantic labels and topology. From a novel mutual reconstruction perspective, we present an unsupervised method to generate consistent semantic keypoints from point clouds explicitly. To achieve this, the proposed model predicts keypoints that not only reconstruct the object itself but also reconstruct other instances in the same category. To the best of our knowledge, the proposed method is the first to mine 3D semantic consistent keypoints from a mutual reconstruction view. Experiments under various evaluation metrics as well as comparisons with the state-of-the-arts demonstrate the efficacy of our new solution to mining semantic consistent keypoints with mutual reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 语义 3D 关键点是 3D 对象上的类别级语义一致点。检测 3D 语义关键点是许多 3D 视觉任务的基础，但由于语义信息的模糊性，尤其是当对象由无序 3D 点云表示时，仍然具有挑战性。现有的无监督方法往往以隐式方式生成类别级关键点，从而难以提取高级信息，例如语义标签和拓扑。从新颖的相互重建的角度来看，我们提出了一种无监督的方法来显式地从点云生成一致的语义关键点。为了实现这一目标，所提出的模型预测的关键点不仅可以重建对象本身，还可以重建同一类别中的其他实例。据我们所知，所提出的方法是第一个从相互重建角度挖掘 3D 语义一致关键点的方法。各种评估指标下的实验以及与最先进技术的比较证明了我们的新解决方案通过相互重建挖掘语义一致关键点的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于相互重建的无监督学习方法，用于从3D点云中显式生成类别级别的语义一致关键点。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督方法生成的3D语义关键点缺乏显式表达，难以提取语义标签和拓扑结构等高层信息，且难以保证跨实例的语义一致性。
AI.method: 通过相互重建视角，模型预测的关键点需同时满足：1）重建目标物体自身；2）重建同类别其他实例，从而显式学习语义一致的关键点。
AI.result: 在多种评估指标下，该方法优于现有最先进方法，有效挖掘出具有语义一致性的3D关键点。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次从相互重建角度显式生成3D语义关键点，解决了无监督方法中语义信息模糊和跨实例一致性不足的问题。

motivation: 现有无监督方法生成的3D语义关键点缺乏显式表达，难以提取语义标签和拓扑结构等高层信息，且难以保证跨实例的语义一致性。
method: 通过相互重建视角，模型预测的关键点需同时满足：1）重建目标物体自身；2）重建同类别其他实例，从而显式学习语义一致的关键点。
result: 在多种评估指标下，该方法优于现有最先进方法，有效挖掘出具有语义一致性的3D关键点。
conclusion: 本文首次从相互重建角度显式生成3D语义关键点，解决了无监督方法中语义信息模糊和跨实例一致性不足的问题。
search_text: Unsupervised Learning of 3D Semantic Keypoints with Mutual Reconstruction 具有相互重构功能的 3D 语义关键点的无监督学习 Semantic 3D keypoints are category-level semantic consistent points on 3D objects. Detecting 3D semantic keypoints is a foundation for a number of 3D vision tasks but remains challenging, due to the ambiguity of semantic information, especially when the objects are represented by unordered 3D point clouds. Existing unsupervised methods tend to generate category-level keypoints in implicit manners, making it difficult to extract high-level information, such as semantic labels and topology. From a novel mutual reconstruction perspective, we present an unsupervised method to generate consistent semantic keypoints from point clouds explicitly. To achieve this, the proposed model predicts keypoints that not only reconstruct the object itself but also reconstruct other instances in the same category. To the best of our knowledge, the proposed method is the first to mine 3D semantic consistent keypoints from a mutual reconstruction view. Experiments under various evaluation metrics as well as comparisons with the state-of-the-arts demonstrate the efficacy of our new solution to mining semantic consistent keypoints with mutual reconstruction. 语义 3D 关键点是 3D 对象上的类别级语义一致点。检测 3D 语义关键点是许多 3D 视觉任务的基础，但由于语义信息的模糊性，尤其是当对象由无序 3D 点云表示时，仍然具有挑战性。现有的无监督方法往往以隐式方式生成类别级关键点，从而难以提取高级信息，例如语义标签和拓扑。从新颖的相互重建的角度来看，我们提出了一种无监督的方法来显式地从点云生成一致的语义关键点。为了实现这一目标，所提出的模型预测的关键点不仅可以重建对象本身，还可以重建同一类别中的其他实例。据我们所知，所提出的方法是第一个从相互重建角度挖掘 3D 语义一致关键点的方法。各种评估指标下的实验以及与最先进技术的比较证明了我们的新解决方案通过相互重建挖掘语义一致关键点的有效性。 本文提出一种基于相互重建的无监督学习方法，用于从3D点云中显式生成类别级别的语义一致关键点。 Haocheng Yuan,Chen Zhao,Shichao Fan,Jiaxi Jiang,Jiaqi Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Feng Han,Alborz Jelvani,Jingang Yi,Tao Liu
title: Coordinated Pose Control of Mobile Manipulation with an Unstable Bikebot Platform
title_zh: 使用不稳定的 Bikebot 平台进行移动操纵的协调姿势控制
abstract: Bikebot manipulation has advantages of the single-track robot mobility and manipulation dexterity. We present a coordinated pose control of mobile manipulation with the stationary bikebot. The challenges of the bikebot manipulation include the limited steering balance capability of the unstable bikebot and kinematic redundancy of the manipulator. We first present the steering balance model to analyze and explore the maximum steering capability to balance the stationary platform. A balancing equilibrium manifold is then proposed to describe the necessary condition to fulfill the simultaneous platform balance and posture control of the end-effector. A coordinated planning and control design is presented to determine the balance-prioritized posture control under kinematic and dynamic constraints. Extensive experiments are conducted to demonstrate the mechatronic design for autonomous plant inspection in agricultural applications. The results confirm the feasibility to use the bikebot manipulation for a plant inspection with end-effector position and orientation errors about 5 mm and 0.3 degs, respectively.
summary: Bikebot manipulation has advantages of the single-track robot mobility and manipulation dexterity. We present a coordinated pose control of mobile manipulation with the stationary bikebot. The challenges of the bikebot manipulation include the limited steering balance capability of the unstable bikebot and kinematic redundancy of the manipulator. We first present the steering balance model to analyze and explore the maximum steering capability to balance the stationary platform. A balancing equilibrium manifold is then proposed to describe the necessary condition to fulfill the simultaneous platform balance and posture control of the end-effector. A coordinated planning and control design is presented to determine the balance-prioritized posture control under kinematic and dynamic constraints. Extensive experiments are conducted to demonstrate the mechatronic design for autonomous plant inspection in agricultural applications. The results confirm the feasibility to use the bikebot manipulation for a plant inspection with end-effector position and orientation errors about 5 mm and 0.3 degs, respectively.
abstract_zh: 自行车机器人操纵具有单轨机器人机动性和操纵灵活性的优点。我们提出了使用固定自行车机器人进行移动操纵的协调姿势控制。自行车机器人操纵的挑战包括不稳定的自行车机器人的有限转向平衡能力和机械手的运动冗余。我们首先提出转向平衡模型来分析和探索平衡固定平台的最大转向能力。然后提出平衡流形来描述实现同时平台平衡和末端执行器姿态控制的必要条件。提出了协调规划和控制设计，以确定运动学和动态约束下的平衡优先姿态控制。进行了大量的实验来演示农业应用中自主植物检查的机电一体化设计。结果证实了使用自行车机器人操纵进行工厂检查的可行性，末端执行器位置和方向误差分别约为 5 毫米和 0.3 度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对不稳定Bikebot平台的移动机械臂协调位姿控制方法，解决其平衡能力不足与运动学冗余问题。
AI.motivation: Bikebot结合单轨机器人移动性与机械臂灵巧性，但其平衡能力有限且存在运动学冗余，需设计协调控制方法以实现稳定操作。
AI.method: 建立转向平衡模型分析最大转向能力，提出平衡流形描述平台平衡与末端姿态控制条件，并设计平衡优先的协调规划与控制框架。
AI.result: 实验验证了农业植物检测任务中末端位置误差约5mm、方向误差约0.3度，证明方法可行性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了不稳定Bikebot平台的协调控制问题，为农业自动化检测提供了可靠方案。

authors_text: Mingxin Huang,Yuliang Liu,Zhenghao Peng,Chongyu Liu,Dahua Lin,Shenggao Zhu,Nicholas Yuan,Kai Ding,Lianwen Jin
title: SwinTextSpotter: Scene Text Spotting via Better Synergy between Text Detection and Text Recognition
title_zh: SwinTextSpotter：通过文本检测和文本识别之间更好的协同作用进行场景文本识别
comment: Accepted to be appeared in CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted to be appeared in CVPR 2022
abstract: End-to-end scene text spotting has attracted great attention in recent years due to the success of excavating the intrinsic synergy of the scene text detection and recognition. However, recent state-of-the-art methods usually incorporate detection and recognition simply by sharing the backbone, which does not directly take advantage of the feature interaction between the two tasks. In this paper, we propose a new end-to-end scene text spotting framework termed SwinTextSpotter. Using a transformer encoder with dynamic head as the detector, we unify the two tasks with a novel Recognition Conversion mechanism to explicitly guide text localization through recognition loss. The straightforward design results in a concise framework that requires neither additional rectification module nor character-level annotation for the arbitrarily-shaped text. Qualitative and quantitative experiments on multi-oriented datasets RoIC13 and ICDAR 2015, arbitrarily-shaped datasets Total-Text and CTW1500, and multi-lingual datasets ReCTS (Chinese) and VinText (Vietnamese) demonstrate SwinTextSpotter significantly outperforms existing methods. Code is available at https://github.com/mxin262/SwinTextSpotter.
summary: End-to-end scene text spotting has attracted great attention in recent years due to the success of excavating the intrinsic synergy of the scene text detection and recognition. However, recent state-of-the-art methods usually incorporate detection and recognition simply by sharing the backbone, which does not directly take advantage of the feature interaction between the two tasks. In this paper, we propose a new end-to-end scene text spotting framework termed SwinTextSpotter. Using a transformer encoder with dynamic head as the detector, we unify the two tasks with a novel Recognition Conversion mechanism to explicitly guide text localization through recognition loss. The straightforward design results in a concise framework that requires neither additional rectification module nor character-level annotation for the arbitrarily-shaped text. Qualitative and quantitative experiments on multi-oriented datasets RoIC13 and ICDAR 2015, arbitrarily-shaped datasets Total-Text and CTW1500, and multi-lingual datasets ReCTS (Chinese) and VinText (Vietnamese) demonstrate SwinTextSpotter significantly outperforms existing methods. Code is available at https://github.com/mxin262/SwinTextSpotter.
abstract_zh: 由于成功挖掘了场景文本检测和识别的内在协同作用，端到端场景文本识别近年来引起了极大的关注。然而，最近最先进的方法通常只是通过共享主干来将检测和识别结合起来，这并没有直接利用两个任务之间的特征交互。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的端到端场景文本识别框架，称为 SwinTextSpotter。使用具有动态头的变压器编码器作为检测器，我们通过新颖的识别转换机制将这两个任务统一起来，以通过识别损失明确地指导文本定位。简单的设计产生了一个简洁的框架，既不需要额外的校正模块，也不需要对任意形状的文本进行字符级注释。在多方向数据集 RoIC13 和 ICDAR 2015、任意形状数据集 Total-Text 和 CTW1500 以及多语言数据集 ReCTS（中文）和 VinText（越南语）上进行的定性和定量实验表明，SwinTextSpotter 显着优于现有方法。代码可在 https://github.com/mxin262/SwinTextSpotter 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SwinTextSpotter的端到端场景文本检测与识别框架，通过增强检测与识别任务之间的协同作用来提升场景文本 spotting 的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常仅通过共享主干网络简单结合检测与识别任务，未能充分利用两者之间的特征交互，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 采用具有动态头的Transformer编码器作为检测器，并设计了识别转换机制，通过识别损失显式引导文本定位，无需额外校正模块或字符级标注。
AI.result: 在多个多方向（RoIC13、ICDAR 2015）、任意形状（Total-Text、CTW1500）及多语言（ReCTS、VinText）数据集上，SwinTextSpotter显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过显式特征交互机制有效统一检测与识别任务，在无需复杂设计的情况下实现了更优的场景文本 spotting 性能。

authors_text: Marcin Abram,Keith Burghardt,Greg Ver Steeg,Aram Galstyan,Remi Dingreville
title: Inferring topological transitions in pattern-forming processes with self-supervised learning
title_zh: 通过自我监督学习推断模式形成过程中的拓扑转变
comment: 17 pages, 6 figures, 8 pages of supplementary information
comments: 17 pages, 6 figures, 8 pages of supplementary information
abstract: The identification and classification of transitions in topological and microstructural regimes in pattern-forming processes are critical for understanding and fabricating microstructurally precise novel materials in many application domains. Unfortunately, relevant microstructure transitions may depend on process parameters in subtle and complex ways that are not captured by the classic theory of phase transition. While supervised machine learning methods may be useful for identifying transition regimes, they need labels which require prior knowledge of order parameters or relevant structures describing these transitions. Motivated by the universality principle for dynamical systems, we instead use a self-supervised approach to solve the inverse problem of predicting process parameters from observed microstructures using neural networks. This approach does not require predefined, labeled data about the different classes of microstructural patterns or about the target task of predicting microstructure transitions. We show that the difficulty of performing the inverse-problem prediction task is related to the goal of discovering microstructure regimes, because qualitative changes in microstructural patterns correspond to changes in uncertainty predictions for our self-supervised problem. We demonstrate the value of our approach by automatically discovering transitions in microstructural regimes in two distinct pattern-forming processes: the spinodal decomposition of a two-phase mixture and the formation of concentration modulations of binary alloys during physical vapor deposition of thin films. This approach opens a promising path forward for discovering and understanding unseen or hard-to-discern transition regimes, and ultimately for controlling complex pattern-forming processes.

This approach does not require predefined, labeled data about the different classes of microstructural patterns or about the target task of predicting microstructure transitions. We show that the difficulty of performing the inverse-problem prediction task is related to the goal of discovering microstructure regimes, because qualitative changes in microstructural patterns correspond to changes in uncertainty predictions for our self-supervised problem. We demonstrate the value of our approach by automatically discovering transitions in microstructural regimes in two distinct pattern-forming processes: the spinodal decomposition of a two-phase mixture and the formation of concentration modulations of binary alloys during physical vapor deposition of thin films. abstract_zh: 图案形成过程中拓扑和微观结构状态转变的识别和分类对于理解和制造许多应用领域中微观结构精确的新型材料至关重要。不幸的是，相关的微观结构转变可能以微妙而复杂的方式取决于工艺参数，而经典相变理论无法捕获这些参数。虽然监督机器学习方法可能有助于识别过渡状态，但它们需要标签，这些标签需要先了解顺序参数或描述这些过渡的相关结构。受动力系统普适性原理的启发，我们使用自监督方法来解决使用神经网络从观察到的微观结构预测过程参数的逆问题。这种方法不需要关于不同类别的微观结构模式或关于预测微观结构转变的目标任务的预定义的标记数据。我们表明，执行反问题预测任务的难度与发现微观结构状态的目标有关，因为微观结构模式的质变对应于我们自我监督问题的不确定性预测的变化。我们通过自动发现两种不同图案形成过程中微观结构状态的转变来证明我们方法的价值：两相混合物的旋节线分解和薄膜物理气相沉积过程中二元合金浓度调制的形成。这种方法为发现和理解看不见的或难以辨别的转变机制，并最终控制复杂的模式形成过程开辟了一条有希望的道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的方法，用于推断模式形成过程中微结构的拓扑转变，无需预定义标签即可预测工艺参数。
AI.motivation: 传统相变理论难以捕捉工艺参数对微结构转变的细微影响，而监督学习方法需要依赖标签数据，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 采用自监督学习框架，通过神经网络从观测到的微结构中逆向预测工艺参数，无需预先标注的类别信息或序参量知识。
AI.result: 在两种模式形成过程（两相混合物的分解和二元合金薄膜沉积）中成功自动识别出微结构转变区域。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为发现复杂模式形成过程中的隐藏转变提供了新途径，并为材料微结构的精确调控奠定基础。

authors_text: Suprosanna Shit,Rajat Koner,Bastian Wittmann,Johannes Paetzold,Ivan Ezhov,Hongwei Li,Jiazhen Pan,Sahand Sharifzadeh,Georgios Kaissis,Volker Tresp,Bjoern Menze
title: Relationformer: A Unified Framework for Image-to-Graph Generation
title_zh: Relationformer：图像到图形生成的统一框架
abstract: A comprehensive representation of an image requires understanding objects and their mutual relationship, especially in image-to-graph generation, e.g., road network extraction, blood-vessel network extraction, or scene graph generation. Traditionally, image-to-graph generation is addressed with a two-stage approach consisting of object detection followed by a separate relation prediction, which prevents simultaneous object-relation interaction. This work proposes a unified one-stage transformer-based framework, namely Relationformer, that jointly predicts objects and their relations. We leverage direct set-based object prediction and incorporate the interaction among the objects to learn an object-relation representation jointly. In addition to existing [obj]-tokens, we propose a novel learnable token, namely [rln]-token. Together with [obj]-tokens, [rln]-token exploits local and global semantic reasoning in an image through a series of mutual associations. In combination with the pair-wise [obj]-token, the [rln]-token contributes to a computationally efficient relation prediction. We achieve state-of-the-art performance on multiple, diverse and multi-domain datasets that demonstrate our approach's effectiveness and generalizability.
summary: A comprehensive representation of an image requires understanding objects and their mutual relationship, especially in image-to-graph generation, e.g., road network extraction, blood-vessel network extraction, or scene graph generation. Traditionally, image-to-graph generation is addressed with a two-stage approach consisting of object detection followed by a separate relation prediction, which prevents simultaneous object-relation interaction. This work proposes a unified one-stage transformer-based framework, namely Relationformer, that jointly predicts objects and their relations. We leverage direct set-based object prediction and incorporate the interaction among the objects to learn an object-relation representation jointly. In addition to existing [obj]-tokens, we propose a novel learnable token, namely [rln]-token. Together with [obj]-tokens, [rln]-token exploits local and global semantic reasoning in an image through a series of mutual associations. In combination with the pair-wise [obj]-token, the [rln]-token contributes to a computationally efficient relation prediction. We achieve state-of-the-art performance on multiple, diverse and multi-domain datasets that demonstrate our approach's effectiveness and generalizability.
abstract_zh: 图像的全面表示需要理解对象及其相互关系，特别是在图像到图的生成中，例如道路网络提取、血管网络提取或场景图生成。传统上，图像到图形的生成是通过两阶段方法来解决的，该方法包括对象检测和单独的关系预测，这可以防止同时进行对象关系交互。这项工作提出了一种统一的基于变压器的单级框架，即 Relationformer，它可以联合预测对象及其关系。我们利用直接基于集合的对象预测并结合对象之间的交互来共同学习对象关系表示。除了现有的 [obj]-token 之外，我们还提出了一种新颖的可学习令牌，即 [rln]-token。与 [obj]-token 一起，[rln]-token 通过一系列相互关联来利用图像中的局部和全局语义推理。与成对的 [obj]-token 结合，[rln]-token 有助于计算高效的关系预测。我们在多个、多样化和多领域的数据集上实现了最先进的性能，这证明了我们方法的有效性和通用性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种统一的基于Transformer的框架Relationformer，用于图像到图的生成，同时预测物体及其关系。
AI.motivation: 传统方法分两阶段处理，无法同时交互物体和关系，限制了性能，需统一框架。
AI.method: 使用直接集合物体预测和可学习的[rln]-token，通过互相关联进行语义推理，实现高效的物体-关系联合表示。
AI.result: 在多个多领域数据集上达到最先进性能，证明方法的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Relationformer通过统一框架有效解决了图像到图生成问题，优于传统两阶段方法。

authors_text: Stefan Pabst,Yunseong Nam
title: A Quantum Algorithm for Network Reliability
title_zh: 网络可靠性的量子算法
abstract: Building a network that is resilient to a component failure is vital. Our access to electricity and telecommunications or the internet of things all hinge on an uninterrupted service provided by a robust network. Calculating the network reliability $R$ is $\sharp$P-complete and intractable to calculate exactly for medium and large networks. Here, we present an explicit, circuit-level implementation of a quantum algorithm that computes $R$. Our algorithm requires $O(EV/ε)$ gate operations and $O(E)$ qubits, where $V$ and $E$ are the number of nodes and edges in the graph and $ε$ is the uncertainty in the reliability estimation. This constitutes a significant polynomial speedup over the best classical approaches currently known. We further provide quantum gate counts, relevant for both pre-fault-tolerant and fault-tolerant regimes, sufficient to compute $R$.
summary: Building a network that is resilient to a component failure is vital. Our access to electricity and telecommunications or the internet of things all hinge on an uninterrupted service provided by a robust network. Calculating the network reliability $R$ is $\sharp$P-complete and intractable to calculate exactly for medium and large networks. Here, we present an explicit, circuit-level implementation of a quantum algorithm that computes $R$. Our algorithm requires $O(EV/ε)$ gate operations and $O(E)$ qubits, where $V$ and $E$ are the number of nodes and edges in the graph and $ε$ is the uncertainty in the reliability estimation. This constitutes a significant polynomial speedup over the best classical approaches currently known. We further provide quantum gate counts, relevant for both pre-fault-tolerant and fault-tolerant regimes, sufficient to compute $R$.
abstract_zh: 建立一个能够抵御组件故障的网络至关重要。我们对电力、电信或物联网的访问都取决于强大网络提供的不间断服务。计算网络可靠性$R$是$\sharp$P-完整的并且难以精确计算中型和大型网络。在这里，我们提出了计算 $R$ 的量子算法的显式电路级实现。我们的算法需要 $O(EV/ε)$ 门操作和 $O(E)$ 量子位，其中 $V$ 和 $E$ 是图中的节点和边的数量，$ε$ 是可靠性估计的不确定性。与目前已知的最佳经典方法相比，这构成了显着的多项式加速。我们进一步提供与预容错和容错机制相关的量子门计数，足以计算 $R$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种量子算法用于计算网络可靠性，解决了经典方法在处理中大型网络时的计算难题。
AI.motivation: 网络可靠性计算对电力、通信等关键基础设施至关重要，但其#P完全性导致经典算法难以高效处理中大型网络。
AI.method: 设计了一种电路级量子算法，通过O(EV/ε)量子门操作和O(E)量子比特实现可靠性估计，适用于容错与非容错量子计算场景。
AI.result: 相比现有经典算法实现了显著的多项式加速，为网络可靠性计算提供了可行的量子解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该量子算法在理论层面突破了经典计算的复杂度限制，为未来量子计算机在实际工程网络中的应用奠定了基础。

search_text: A Quantum Algorithm for Network Reliability 网络可靠性的量子算法 Building a network that is resilient to a component failure is vital. Our access to electricity and telecommunications or the internet of things all hinge on an uninterrupted service provided by a robust network. Calculating the network reliability $R$ is $\sharp$P-complete and intractable to calculate exactly for medium and large networks. Here, we present an explicit, circuit-level implementation of a quantum algorithm that computes $R$. Our algorithm requires $O(EV/ε)$ gate operations and $O(E)$ qubits, where $V$ and $E$ are the number of nodes and edges in the graph and $ε$ is the uncertainty in the reliability estimation. This constitutes a significant polynomial speedup over the best classical approaches currently known. We further provide quantum gate counts, relevant for both pre-fault-tolerant and fault-tolerant regimes, sufficient to compute $R$. 建立一个能够抵御组件故障的网络至关重要。我们对电力、电信或物联网的访问都取决于强大网络提供的不间断服务。计算网络可靠性$R$是$\sharp$P-完整的并且难以精确计算中型和大型网络。在这里，我们提出了计算 $R$ 的量子算法的显式电路级实现。我们的算法需要 $O(EV/ε)$ 门操作和 $O(E)$ 量子位，其中 $V$ 和 $E$ 是图中的节点和边的数量，$ε$ 是可靠性估计的不确定性。与目前已知的最佳经典方法相比，这构成了显着的多项式加速。我们进一步提供与预容错和容错机制相关的量子门计数，足以计算 $R$。 本文提出了一种量子算法用于计算网络可靠性，解决了经典方法在处理中大型网络时的计算难题。 Stefan Pabst,Yunseong Nam quant-ph,cs.DS,cs.ET

authors_text: Mou-Cheng Xu,Yu-Kun Zhou,Chen Jin,Stefano B Blumberg,Frederick J Wilson,Marius deGroot,Daniel C. Alexander,Neil P. Oxtoby,Joseph Jacob
title: Learning Morphological Feature Perturbations for Calibrated Semi-Supervised Segmentation
title_zh: 学习形态特征扰动以校准半监督分割
comment: To appear at Conference on Medical Imaging with Deep Learning (MIDL) 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.12179
comments: To appear at Conference on Medical Imaging with Deep Learning (MIDL) 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2110.12179
abstract: We propose MisMatch, a novel consistency-driven semi-supervised segmentation framework which produces predictions that are invariant to learnt feature perturbations. MisMatch consists of an encoder and a two-head decoders. One decoder learns positive attention to the foreground regions of interest (RoI) on unlabelled images thereby generating dilated features. The other decoder learns negative attention to the foreground on the same unlabelled images thereby generating eroded features. We then apply a consistency regularisation on the paired predictions. MisMatch outperforms state-of-the-art semi-supervised methods on a CT-based pulmonary vessel segmentation task and a MRI-based brain tumour segmentation task. In addition, we show that the effectiveness of MisMatch comes from better model calibration than its supervised learning counterpart.
summary: We propose MisMatch, a novel consistency-driven semi-supervised segmentation framework which produces predictions that are invariant to learnt feature perturbations. MisMatch consists of an encoder and a two-head decoders. One decoder learns positive attention to the foreground regions of interest (RoI) on unlabelled images thereby generating dilated features. The other decoder learns negative attention to the foreground on the same unlabelled images thereby generating eroded features. We then apply a consistency regularisation on the paired predictions. MisMatch outperforms state-of-the-art semi-supervised methods on a CT-based pulmonary vessel segmentation task and a MRI-based brain tumour segmentation task. In addition, we show that the effectiveness of MisMatch comes from better model calibration than its supervised learning counterpart.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 MisMatch，一种新颖的一致性驱动的半监督分割框架，它产生的预测对于学习到的特征扰动是不变的。 MisMatch 由编码器和双头解码器组成。一种解码器学习对未标记图像上的前景感兴趣区域 (RoI) 的积极关注，从而生成扩张的特征。另一个解码器在相同的未标记图像上学习对前景的负面关注，从而生成被侵蚀的特征。然后，我们对配对预测应用一致性正则化。 MisMatch 在基于 CT 的肺血管分割任务和基于 MRI 的脑肿瘤分割任务上优于最先进的半监督方法。此外，我们还表明，MisMatch 的有效性来自于比监督学习更好的模型校准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于形态学特征扰动的半监督分割框架MisMatch，通过生成扩张和侵蚀特征并应用一致性正则化来提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督分割方法在未标记数据上的预测校准不足，导致模型性能受限，需通过形态学扰动增强特征鲁棒性并提升校准能力。
AI.method: MisMatch包含编码器和双头解码器，分别学习未标记图像的扩张（前景正关注）和侵蚀（前景负关注）特征，并对配对预测施加一致性正则化。
AI.result: 在CT肺血管分割和MRI脑肿瘤分割任务中，MisMatch优于现有半监督方法，且其性能优势源于比监督学习更好的模型校准。
AI.conclusion: 通过形态学特征扰动和一致性正则化，MisMatch有效提升了半监督分割的校准性与准确性，为相关任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Aryaman Singh Samyal,Akshatha K R,Soham Hans,Karunakar A K,Satish Shenoy B
title: Analysis and Adaptation of YOLOv4 for Object Detection in Aerial Images
title_zh: YOLOv4 用于航空图像目标检测的分析和适应
abstract: The recent and rapid growth in Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) deployment for various computer vision tasks has paved the path for numerous opportunities to make them more effective and valuable. Object detection in aerial images is challenging due to variations in appearance, pose, and scale. Autonomous aerial flight systems with their inherited limited memory and computational power demand accurate and computationally efficient detection algorithms for real-time applications. Our work shows the adaptation of the popular YOLOv4 framework for predicting the objects and their locations in aerial images with high accuracy and inference speed. We utilized transfer learning for faster convergence of the model on the VisDrone DET aerial object detection dataset. The trained model resulted in a mean average precision (mAP) of 45.64% with an inference speed reaching 8.7 FPS on the Tesla K80 GPU and was highly accurate in detecting truncated and occluded objects. We experimentally evaluated the impact of varying network resolution sizes and training epochs on the performance. A comparative study with several contemporary aerial object detectors proved that YOLOv4 performed better, implying a more suitable detection algorithm to incorporate on aerial platforms.
summary: The recent and rapid growth in Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) deployment for various computer vision tasks has paved the path for numerous opportunities to make them more effective and valuable. Object detection in aerial images is challenging due to variations in appearance, pose, and scale. Autonomous aerial flight systems with their inherited limited memory and computational power demand accurate and computationally efficient detection algorithms for real-time applications. Our work shows the adaptation of the popular YOLOv4 framework for predicting the objects and their locations in aerial images with high accuracy and inference speed. We utilized transfer learning for faster convergence of the model on the VisDrone DET aerial object detection dataset. The trained model resulted in a mean average precision (mAP) of 45.64% with an inference speed reaching 8.7 FPS on the Tesla K80 GPU and was highly accurate in detecting truncated and occluded objects. We experimentally evaluated the impact of varying network resolution sizes and training epochs on the performance. A comparative study with several contemporary aerial object detectors proved that YOLOv4 performed better, implying a more suitable detection algorithm to incorporate on aerial platforms.
abstract_zh: 最近，用于各种计算机视觉任务的无人机 (UAV) 部署的快速增长为无数机会使其变得更加有效和有价值铺平了道路。由于外观、姿态和尺度的变化，航空图像中的物体检测具有挑战性。自主空中飞行系统继承了有限的内存和计算能力，需要准确且计算高效的实时应用检测算法。我们的工作展示了流行的 YOLOv4 框架的改编，用于以高精度和推理速度预测航空图像中的对象及其位置。我们利用迁移学习在 VisDrone DET 航空物体检测数据集上更快地收敛模型。训练后的模型在 Tesla K80 GPU 上的平均精度 (mAP) 为 45.64%，推理速度达到 8.7 FPS，并且在检测截断和遮挡物体方面具有很高的准确度。我们通过实验评估了不同网络分辨率大小和训练周期对性能的影响。与几种当代空中物体检测器的比较研究证明，YOLOv4 表现更好，这意味着更适合在空中平台上使用的检测算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了YOLOv4框架在航拍图像目标检测中的适应性优化，旨在提升检测精度与实时性。
AI.motivation: 无人机在计算机视觉任务中应用广泛，但航拍图像存在目标外观、姿态和尺度变化大等挑战，需高效且精准的检测算法满足实时性需求。
AI.method: 基于迁移学习对YOLOv4进行微调，使用VisDrone DET数据集训练，并实验分析网络分辨率和训练轮数对性能的影响。
AI.result: 在Tesla K80 GPU上达到45.64%的mAP和8.7 FPS的推理速度，对截断和遮挡目标检测效果显著，优于其他当代航拍检测器。
AI.conclusion: YOLOv4在航拍图像目标检测中表现出色，是无人机平台的理想检测算法选择。

authors_text: Jianxiong Shen,Antonio Agudo,Francesc Moreno-Noguer,Adria Ruiz
title: Conditional-Flow NeRF: Accurate 3D Modelling with Reliable Uncertainty Quantification
title_zh: 条件流 NeRF：具有可靠的不确定性量化的精确 3D 建模
abstract: A critical limitation of current methods based on Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) is that they are unable to quantify the uncertainty associated with the learned appearance and geometry of the scene. This information is paramount in real applications such as medical diagnosis or autonomous driving where, to reduce potentially catastrophic failures, the confidence on the model outputs must be included into the decision-making process. In this context, we introduce Conditional-Flow NeRF (CF-NeRF), a novel probabilistic framework to incorporate uncertainty quantification into NeRF-based approaches. For this purpose, our method learns a distribution over all possible radiance fields modelling which is used to quantify the uncertainty associated with the modelled scene. In contrast to previous approaches enforcing strong constraints over the radiance field distribution, CF-NeRF learns it in a flexible and fully data-driven manner by coupling Latent Variable Modelling and Conditional Normalizing Flows. This strategy allows to obtain reliable uncertainty estimation while preserving model expressivity. Compared to previous state-of-the-art methods proposed for uncertainty quantification in NeRF, our experiments show that the proposed method achieves significantly lower prediction errors and more reliable uncertainty values for synthetic novel view and depth-map estimation.
summary: A critical limitation of current methods based on Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) is that they are unable to quantify the uncertainty associated with the learned appearance and geometry of the scene. This information is paramount in real applications such as medical diagnosis or autonomous driving where, to reduce potentially catastrophic failures, the confidence on the model outputs must be included into the decision-making process. In this context, we introduce Conditional-Flow NeRF (CF-NeRF), a novel probabilistic framework to incorporate uncertainty quantification into NeRF-based approaches. For this purpose, our method learns a distribution over all possible radiance fields modelling which is used to quantify the uncertainty associated with the modelled scene. In contrast to previous approaches enforcing strong constraints over the radiance field distribution, CF-NeRF learns it in a flexible and fully data-driven manner by coupling Latent Variable Modelling and Conditional Normalizing Flows. This strategy allows to obtain reliable uncertainty estimation while preserving model expressivity. Compared to previous state-of-the-art methods proposed for uncertainty quantification in NeRF, our experiments show that the proposed method achieves significantly lower prediction errors and more reliable uncertainty values for synthetic novel view and depth-map estimation.
abstract_zh: 当前基于神经辐射场（NeRF）的方法的一个关键限制是它们无法量化与所学习的场景外观和几何形状相关的不确定性。这些信息在医疗诊断或自动驾驶等实际应用中至关重要，为了减少潜在的灾难性故障，模型输出的置信度必须纳入决策过程。在这种背景下，我们引入了条件流 NeRF (CF-NeRF)，这是一种新颖的概率框架，可将不确定性量化纳入基于 NeRF 的方法中。为此，我们的方法学习所有可能的辐射场建模的分布，该分布用于量化与建模场景相关的不确定性。与之前对辐射场分布施加严格约束的方法相比，CF-NeRF 通过耦合潜变量建模和条件归一化流以灵活且完全数据驱动的方式学习辐射场分布。该策略允许获得可靠的不确定性估计，同时保留模型表达能力。与之前在 NeRF 中提出的用于不确定性量化的最先进方法相比，我们的实验表明，所提出的方法在合成新视图和深度图估计方面实现了显着更低的预测误差和更可靠的不确定性值。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的概率框架CF-NeRF，用于在NeRF基础上实现可靠的不确定性量化，提升3D建模的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有NeRF方法无法量化模型输出的不确定性，这在需要高可靠性的应用（如医疗诊断和自动驾驶）中可能导致灾难性失败，亟需可靠的方法进行不确定性量化。
AI.method: 结合潜在变量建模与条件归一化流，学习辐射场的概率分布，以灵活数据驱动的方式建模不确定性，保持模型表达能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，相比现有方法，CF-NeRF在合成新视角和深度图估计中预测误差更低，不确定性估计更可靠。
AI.conclusion: CF-NeRF通过概率框架有效量化不确定性，显著提升NeRF在关键应用中的可靠性和准确性。

authors_text: Jung-Woo Chang,Mojan Javaheripi,Seira Hidano,Farinaz Koushanfar
title: RoVISQ: Reduction of Video Service Quality via Adversarial Attacks on Deep Learning-based Video Compression
title_zh: RoVISQ：通过对基于深度学习的视频压缩的对抗性攻击降低视频服务质量
abstract: Video compression plays a crucial role in video streaming and classification systems by maximizing the end-user quality of experience (QoE) at a given bandwidth budget. In this paper, we conduct the first systematic study for adversarial attacks on deep learning-based video compression and downstream classification systems. Our attack framework, dubbed RoVISQ, manipulates the Rate-Distortion ($\textit{R}$-$\textit{D}$) relationship of a video compression model to achieve one or both of the following goals: (1) increasing the network bandwidth, (2) degrading the video quality for end-users. We further devise new objectives for targeted and untargeted attacks to a downstream video classification service. Finally, we design an input-invariant perturbation that universally disrupts video compression and classification systems in real time. Unlike previously proposed attacks on video classification, our adversarial perturbations are the first to withstand compression. We empirically show the resilience of RoVISQ attacks against various defenses, i.e., adversarial training, video denoising, and JPEG compression. Our extensive experimental results on various video datasets show RoVISQ attacks deteriorate peak signal-to-noise ratio by up to 5.6dB and the bit-rate by up to $\sim$ 2.4$\times$ while achieving over 90$\%$ attack success rate on a downstream classifier. Our user study further demonstrates the effect of RoVISQ attacks on users' QoE.
summary: Video compression plays a crucial role in video streaming and classification systems by maximizing the end-user quality of experience (QoE) at a given bandwidth budget. In this paper, we conduct the first systematic study for adversarial attacks on deep learning-based video compression and downstream classification systems. Our attack framework, dubbed RoVISQ, manipulates the Rate-Distortion ($\textit{R}$-$\textit{D}$) relationship of a video compression model to achieve one or both of the following goals: (1) increasing the network bandwidth, (2) degrading the video quality for end-users. We further devise new objectives for targeted and untargeted attacks to a downstream video classification service. Finally, we design an input-invariant perturbation that universally disrupts video compression and classification systems in real time. Unlike previously proposed attacks on video classification, our adversarial perturbations are the first to withstand compression. We empirically show the resilience of RoVISQ attacks against various defenses, i.e., adversarial training, video denoising, and JPEG compression. Our extensive experimental results on various video datasets show RoVISQ attacks deteriorate peak signal-to-noise ratio by up to 5.6dB and the bit-rate by up to $\sim$ 2.4$\times$ while achieving over 90$\%$ attack success rate on a downstream classifier. Our user study further demonstrates the effect of RoVISQ attacks on users' QoE.
abstract_zh: 视频压缩在给定带宽预算下最大限度地提高最终用户体验质量 (QoE)，从而在视频流和分类系统中发挥着至关重要的作用。在本文中，我们对基于深度学习的视频压缩和下游分类系统的对抗性攻击进行了首次系统研究。我们的攻击框架被称为 RoVISQ，它操纵视频压缩模型的速率失真 ($\textit{R}$-$\textit{D}$) 关系来实现以下一个或两个目标：(1) 增加网络带宽，(2) 降低最终用户的视频质量。我们进一步设计了针对下游视频分类服务的有针对性和无针对性攻击的新目标。最后，我们设计了一种输入不变的扰动，可以普遍实时扰乱视频压缩和分类系统。与之前提出的对视频分类的攻击不同，我们的对抗性扰动是第一个承受压缩的。我们凭经验展示了 RoVISQ 攻击针对各种防御措施（即对抗性训练、视频去噪和 JPEG 压缩）的弹性。我们对各种视频数据集的广泛实验结果表明，RoVISQ 攻击使峰值信噪比下降高达 5.6dB，比特率下降高达 $\sim$ 2.4$\times$，同时在下游分类器上实现超过 90$\%$ 的攻击成功率。我们的用户研究进一步证明了 RoVISQ 攻击对用户 QoE 的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RoVISQ的对抗攻击框架，通过操纵深度学习视频压缩模型的率失真关系，降低视频服务质量并影响下游分类系统。
AI.motivation: 视频压缩在优化用户服务质量中至关重要，但现有系统可能面临对抗攻击风险。本文旨在系统研究针对深度学习视频压缩及分类系统的对抗攻击方法。
AI.method: 设计了一种输入不变的扰动方法，通过修改率失真关系实现带宽增加或视频质量下降，并针对分类服务制定目标与非目标攻击目标。
AI.result: 实验表明，RoVISQ攻击使峰值信噪比下降最高5.6dB，比特率增加2.4倍，分类攻击成功率超90%，且对多种防御措施具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: RoVISQ证明了深度学习视频压缩系统的脆弱性，其扰动方法能有效破坏压缩与分类服务，为安全防护提供了新挑战。

authors_text: Joshua Springer,Marcel Kyas
title: Evaluation of Orientation Ambiguity and Detection Rate in April Tag and WhyCode
title_zh: 四月标签和 WhyCode 中方向模糊度和检测率的评估
abstract: Fiducial systems provide a computationally cheap way for mobile robots to estimate the pose of objects, or their own pose, using just a monocular camera. However, the orientation component of the pose of fiducial markers is unreliable, which can have destructive effects in autonomous drone landing on landing pads marked with fiducial markers. This paper evaluates the April Tag and WhyCode fiducial systems in terms of orientation ambiguity and detection rate on embedded hardware. We test 2 April Tag variants - 1 default and 1 custom - and 3 Whycode variants - 1 default and 2 custom. We determine that they are suitable for autonomous drone landing applications in terms of detection rate, but may generate erroneous control signals as a result of orientation ambiguity in the pose estimates.
summary: Fiducial systems provide a computationally cheap way for mobile robots to estimate the pose of objects, or their own pose, using just a monocular camera. However, the orientation component of the pose of fiducial markers is unreliable, which can have destructive effects in autonomous drone landing on landing pads marked with fiducial markers. This paper evaluates the April Tag and WhyCode fiducial systems in terms of orientation ambiguity and detection rate on embedded hardware. We test 2 April Tag variants - 1 default and 1 custom - and 3 Whycode variants - 1 default and 2 custom. We determine that they are suitable for autonomous drone landing applications in terms of detection rate, but may generate erroneous control signals as a result of orientation ambiguity in the pose estimates.
abstract_zh: 基准系统为移动机器人提供了一种计算成本低廉的方法，只需使用单目相机即可估计物体的姿势或它们自己的姿势。然而，基准标记位姿的方向分量是不可靠的，这可能会对自主无人机降落在标有基准标记的着陆垫上产生破坏性影响。本文从方向模糊性和嵌入式硬件检测率方面评估了 April Tag 和 WhyCode 基准系统。我们测试了 4 月 2 日的标签变体 - 1 个默认值和 1 个自定义值 - 以及 3 个 Whycode 变体 - 1 个默认值和 2 个自定义值。我们确定它们在检测率方面适合自主无人机着陆应用，但可能由于姿态估计中的方向模糊而产生错误的控制信号。

AI.tldr: 评估April Tag和WhyCode在方向模糊性和检测率上的表现，以确定其在无人机自主着陆中的适用性。
AI.motivation: 由于fiducial标记的方向信息不可靠可能影响无人机着陆安全，需评估不同系统的表现。
AI.method: 在嵌入式硬件上测试不同变体的April Tag和WhyCode系统，分析其方向模糊性和检测率。
AI.result: 检测率满足无人机着陆需求，但方向模糊性可能导致控制信号错误。
AI.conclusion: April Tag和WhyCode适合无人机着陆的检测率，但需解决方向模糊性以避免错误控制。
