search_text: Evaluation of Orientation Ambiguity and Detection Rate in April Tag and WhyCode 四月标签和 WhyCode 中方向模糊度和检测率的评估 Fiducial systems provide a computationally cheap way for mobile robots to estimate the pose of objects, or their own pose, using just a monocular camera. However, the orientation component of the pose of fiducial markers is unreliable, which can have destructive effects in autonomous drone landing on landing pads marked with fiducial markers. This paper evaluates the April Tag and WhyCode fiducial systems in terms of orientation ambiguity and detection rate on embedded hardware. We test 2 April Tag variants - 1 default and 1 custom - and 3 Whycode variants - 1 default and 2 custom. We determine that they are suitable for autonomous drone landing applications in terms of detection rate, but may generate erroneous control signals as a result of orientation ambiguity in the pose estimates. 基准系统为移动机器人提供了一种计算成本低廉的方法，只需使用单目相机即可估计物体的姿势或它们自己的姿势。然而，基准标记位姿的方向分量是不可靠的，这可能会对自主无人机降落在标有基准标记的着陆垫上产生破坏性影响。本文从方向模糊性和嵌入式硬件检测率方面评估了 April Tag 和 WhyCode 基准系统。我们测试了 4 月 2 日的标签变体 - 1 个默认值和 1 个自定义值 - 以及 3 个 Whycode 变体 - 1 个默认值和 2 个自定义值。我们确定它们在检测率方面适合自主无人机着陆应用，但可能由于姿态估计中的方向模糊而产生错误的控制信号。 评估April Tag和WhyCode在方向模糊性和检测率上的表现，以确定其在无人机自主着陆中的适用性。 Joshua Springer,Marcel Kyas cs.CV

authors_text: Keenan Burnett,Yuchen Wu,David J. Yoon,Angela P. Schoellig,Timothy D. Barfoot
title: Are We Ready for Radar to Replace Lidar in All-Weather Mapping and Localization?
title_zh: 我们准备好用雷达取代激光雷达来进行全天候测绘和定位了吗？
comment: Version 3: Accepted to RA-L, presented at IROS 2022. Localization results updated due to improved ground truth and calibration. Also switched Huber Loss for Cauchy Loss for the radar-based approaches
comments: Version 3: Accepted to RA-L, presented at IROS 2022. Localization results updated due to improved ground truth and calibration. Also switched Huber Loss for Cauchy Loss for the radar-based approaches
abstract: We present an extensive comparison between three topometric localization systems: radar-only, lidar-only, and a cross-modal radar-to-lidar system across varying seasonal and weather conditions using the Boreas dataset. Contrary to our expectations, our experiments showed that our lidar-only pipeline achieved the best localization accuracy even during a snowstorm. Our results seem to suggest that the sensitivity of lidar localization to moderate precipitation has been exaggerated in prior works. However, our radar-only pipeline was able to achieve competitive accuracy with a much smaller map. Furthermore, radar localization and radar sensors still have room to improve and may yet prove valuable in extreme weather or as a redundant backup system. Code for this project can be found at: https://github.com/utiasASRL/vtr3
summary: We present an extensive comparison between three topometric localization systems: radar-only, lidar-only, and a cross-modal radar-to-lidar system across varying seasonal and weather conditions using the Boreas dataset. Contrary to our expectations, our experiments showed that our lidar-only pipeline achieved the best localization accuracy even during a snowstorm. Our results seem to suggest that the sensitivity of lidar localization to moderate precipitation has been exaggerated in prior works. However, our radar-only pipeline was able to achieve competitive accuracy with a much smaller map. Furthermore, radar localization and radar sensors still have room to improve and may yet prove valuable in extreme weather or as a redundant backup system. Code for this project can be found at: https://github.com/utiasASRL/vtr3
abstract_zh: 我们使用 Boreas 数据集对三种地形定位系统进行了广泛的比较：仅雷达、仅激光雷达和跨模式雷达到激光雷达系统，跨越不同的季节和天气条件。与我们的预期相反，我们的实验表明，即使在暴风雪期间，我们的仅激光雷达管道也能实现最佳定位精度。我们的结果似乎表明，激光雷达定位对中等降水的敏感性在之前的工作中被夸大了。然而，我们的仅雷达管道能够利用更小的地图实现有竞争力的精度。此外，雷达定位和雷达传感器仍有改进的空间，并且可能在极端天气下或作为冗余备份系统发挥价值。该项目的代码可以在以下位置找到：https://github.com/utiasASRL/vtr3

AI.tldr: 本文通过对比雷达、激光雷达及跨模态雷达-激光雷达系统在不同天气条件下的定位性能，探讨雷达是否能完全替代激光雷达进行全天候地图构建与定位。
AI.motivation: 现有研究认为激光雷达在恶劣天气下性能下降，但实际效果尚需验证；同时需评估雷达在地图规模与定位精度上的潜力。
AI.method: 基于Boreas数据集，对比三种定位系统（纯雷达、纯激光雷达、雷达-激光雷达跨模态）在不同季节和天气条件下的表现。
AI.result: 激光雷达系统在暴雪中仍保持最高定位精度，推翻了其对中等降水敏感的既有结论；雷达系统以更小地图实现竞争力，但存在改进空间。
AI.conclusion: 当前激光雷达在常规天气下更优，但雷达在极端天气或作为冗余备份系统中仍具价值，需进一步优化技术。

authors_text: Katherine S. Riley,Subhadeep Koner,Juan C. Osorio,Yongchao Yu,Harith Morgan,Janav P. Udani,Stephen A. Sarles,Andres F. Arrieta
title: Neuromorphic metamaterials for mechanosensing and perceptual associative learning
title_zh: 用于机械传感和感知联想学习的神经形态超材料
comment: Manuscript: 13 pages, 4 figures, 1 table Supplementary Information: 11 pages, 17 figures, 2 tables
comments: Manuscript: 13 pages, 4 figures, 1 table Supplementary Information: 11 pages, 17 figures, 2 tables
abstract: Physical systems exhibiting neuromechanical functions promise to enable structures with directly encoded autonomy and intelligence. We report on a class of neuromorphic metamaterials embodying bioinspired mechanosensing, memory, and learning functionalities obtained by leveraging mechanical instabilities and flexible memristive materials. Our prototype system comprises a multistable metamaterial whose bistable units filter, amplify, and transduce external mechanical inputs over large areas into simple electrical signals using piezoresistivity. We record these mechanically transduced signals using non-volatile flexible memristors that remember sequences of mechanical inputs, providing a means to store spatially distributed mechanical signals in measurable material states. The accumulated memristance changes resulting from the sequential mechanical inputs allow us to physically encode a Hopfield network into our neuromorphic metamaterials. This physical network learns a series of external spatially distributed input patterns. Crucially, the learned patterns input into our neuromorphic metamaterials can be retrieved from the final accumulated state of our memristors. Therefore, our system exhibits the ability to learn without supervised training and retain spatially distributed inputs with minimal external overhead. Our system's embodied mechanosensing, memory, and learning capabilities establish an avenue for synthetic neuromorphic metamaterials enabling the learning of touch-like sensations covering large areas for robotics, autonomous systems, wearables, and morphing structures.
summary: Physical systems exhibiting neuromechanical functions promise to enable structures with directly encoded autonomy and intelligence. We report on a class of neuromorphic metamaterials embodying bioinspired mechanosensing, memory, and learning functionalities obtained by leveraging mechanical instabilities and flexible memristive materials. Our prototype system comprises a multistable metamaterial whose bistable units filter, amplify, and transduce external mechanical inputs over large areas into simple electrical signals using piezoresistivity. We record these mechanically transduced signals using non-volatile flexible memristors that remember sequences of mechanical inputs, providing a means to store spatially distributed mechanical signals in measurable material states. The accumulated memristance changes resulting from the sequential mechanical inputs allow us to physically encode a Hopfield network into our neuromorphic metamaterials. This physical network learns a series of external spatially distributed input patterns. Crucially, the learned patterns input into our neuromorphic metamaterials can be retrieved from the final accumulated state of our memristors. Therefore, our system exhibits the ability to learn without supervised training and retain spatially distributed inputs with minimal external overhead. Our system's embodied mechanosensing, memory, and learning capabilities establish an avenue for synthetic neuromorphic metamaterials enabling the learning of touch-like sensations covering large areas for robotics, autonomous systems, wearables, and morphing structures.
abstract_zh: 表现出神经力学功能的物理系统有望使结构具有直接编码的自主性和智能。我们报告了一类神经形态超材料，它体现了通过利用机械不稳定性和灵活的忆阻材料获得的生物启发机械传感、记忆和学习功能。我们的原型系统由多稳态超材料组成，其双稳态单元利用压阻效应对大面积的外部机械输入进行过滤、放大和转换为简单的电信号。我们使用非易失性柔性忆阻器来记录这些机械转换的信号，该忆阻器可以记住机械输入的序列，从而提供了一种以可测量的材料状态存储空间分布的机械信号的方法。由顺序机械输入产生的累积忆阻变化使我们能够将 Hopfield 网络物理编码到神经形态超材料中。该物理网络学习一系列外部空间分布的输入模式。至关重要的是，输入到神经形态超材料中的学习模式可以从忆阻器的最终累积状态中检索。因此，我们的系统表现出无需监督训练即可学习的能力，并以最小的外部开销保留空间分布的输入。我们的系统所体现的机械传感、记忆和学习能力为合成神经形态超材料建立了一条途径，能够学习覆盖机器人、自主系统、可穿戴设备和变形结构大面积的类触摸感觉。

AI.tldr: 开发具有机械感知、记忆和学习能力的神经形态超材料，用于大范围触觉感知。
AI.motivation: 传统系统在自主性和智能结构方面存在局限，需更高效的机械感知与学习材料。
AI.method: 结合机械不稳定性与柔性忆阻材料，设计多稳定超材料，利用压阻效应转导机械信号，并通过忆阻器存储序列输入，构建物理霍普菲尔德网络。
AI.result: 系统可无监督学习并存储空间分布的机械输入，通过忆阻器状态检索学习模式，实现低能耗触觉感知。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为合成神经形态超材料提供了新路径，推动机器人、可穿戴设备等领域的触觉感知技术发展。

result: 系统可无监督学习并存储空间分布的机械输入，通过忆阻器状态检索学习模式，实现低能耗触觉感知。
conclusion: 该成果为合成神经形态超材料提供了新路径，推动机器人、可穿戴设备等领域的触觉感知技术发展。
search_text: Neuromorphic metamaterials for mechanosensing and perceptual associative learning 用于机械传感和感知联想学习的神经形态超材料 Physical systems exhibiting neuromechanical functions promise to enable structures with directly encoded autonomy and intelligence. We report on a class of neuromorphic metamaterials embodying bioinspired mechanosensing, memory, and learning functionalities obtained by leveraging mechanical instabilities and flexible memristive materials. Our prototype system comprises a multistable metamaterial whose bistable units filter, amplify, and transduce external mechanical inputs over large areas into simple electrical signals using piezoresistivity. We record these mechanically transduced signals using non-volatile flexible memristors that remember sequences of mechanical inputs, providing a means to store spatially distributed mechanical signals in measurable material states. The accumulated memristance changes resulting from the sequential mechanical inputs allow us to physically encode a Hopfield network into our neuromorphic metamaterials. This physical network learns a series of external spatially distributed input patterns. Crucially, the learned patterns input into our neuromorphic metamaterials can be retrieved from the final accumulated state of our memristors. Therefore, our system exhibits the ability to learn without supervised training and retain spatially distributed inputs with minimal external overhead. Our system's embodied mechanosensing, memory, and learning capabilities establish an avenue for synthetic neuromorphic metamaterials enabling the learning of touch-like sensations covering large areas for robotics, autonomous systems, wearables, and morphing structures. 表现出神经力学功能的物理系统有望使结构具有直接编码的自主性和智能。我们报告了一类神经形态超材料，它体现了通过利用机械不稳定性和灵活的忆阻材料获得的生物启发机械传感、记忆和学习功能。我们的原型系统由多稳态超材料组成，其双稳态单元利用压阻效应对大面积的外部机械输入进行过滤、放大和转换为简单的电信号。我们使用非易失性柔性忆阻器来记录这些机械转换的信号，该忆阻器可以记住机械输入的序列，从而提供了一种以可测量的材料状态存储空间分布的机械信号的方法。由顺序机械输入产生的累积忆阻变化使我们能够将 Hopfield 网络物理编码到神经形态超材料中。该物理网络学习一系列外部空间分布的输入模式。至关重要的是，输入到神经形态超材料中的学习模式可以从忆阻器的最终累积状态中检索。因此，我们的系统表现出无需监督训练即可学习的能力，并以最小的外部开销保留空间分布的输入。我们的系统所体现的机械传感、记忆和学习能力为合成神经形态超材料建立了一条途径，能够学习覆盖机器人、自主系统、可穿戴设备和变形结构大面积的类触摸感觉。 开发具有机械感知、记忆和学习能力的神经形态超材料，用于大范围触觉感知。 Katherine S. Riley,Subhadeep Koner,Juan C. Osorio,Yongchao Yu,Harith Morgan,Janav P. Udani,Stephen A. Sarles,Andres F. Arrieta cs.ET,cond-mat.mtrl-sci

authors_text: Keenan Burnett,David J. Yoon,Yuchen Wu,Andrew Zou Li,Haowei Zhang,Shichen Lu,Jingxing Qian,Wei-Kang Tseng,Andrew Lambert,Keith Y. K. Leung,Angela P. Schoellig,Timothy D. Barfoot
title: Boreas: A Multi-Season Autonomous Driving Dataset
title_zh: Boreas：多季节自动驾驶数据集
comment: Accepted in IJRR as a data paper
comments: Accepted in IJRR as a data paper
abstract: The Boreas dataset was collected by driving a repeated route over the course of one year, resulting in stark seasonal variations and adverse weather conditions such as rain and falling snow. In total, the Boreas dataset includes over 350km of driving data featuring a 128-channel Velodyne Alpha Prime lidar, a 360$^\circ$ Navtech CIR304-H scanning radar, a 5MP FLIR Blackfly S camera, and centimetre-accurate post-processed ground truth poses. Our dataset will support live leaderboards for odometry, metric localization, and 3D object detection. The dataset and development kit are available at https://www.boreas.utias.utoronto.ca
summary: The Boreas dataset was collected by driving a repeated route over the course of one year, resulting in stark seasonal variations and adverse weather conditions such as rain and falling snow. In total, the Boreas dataset includes over 350km of driving data featuring a 128-channel Velodyne Alpha Prime lidar, a 360$^\circ$ Navtech CIR304-H scanning radar, a 5MP FLIR Blackfly S camera, and centimetre-accurate post-processed ground truth poses. Our dataset will support live leaderboards for odometry, metric localization, and 3D object detection. The dataset and development kit are available at https://www.boreas.utias.utoronto.ca
abstract_zh: Boreas 数据集是通过在一年内重复行驶路线收集的，导致了明显的季节性变化和恶劣的天气条件，例如下雨和降雪。 Boreas 数据集总共包含超过 350 公里的驾驶数据，包括 128 通道 Velodyne Alpha Prime 激光雷达、360$^\circ$ Navtech CIR304-H 扫描雷达、5MP FLIR Blackfly S 摄像头以及厘米级精度的后处理地面真实姿势。我们的数据集将支持里程计、度量本地化和 3D 对象检测的实时排行榜。数据集和开发套件可在 https://www.boreas.utias.utoronto.ca 获取

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Boreas的多季节自动驾驶数据集，通过一年内重复路线采集数据，包含极端天气和季节变化条件。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶数据集缺乏多季节和恶劣天气条件下的多样化场景，限制了算法鲁棒性验证。
AI.method: 在一年内重复驾驶固定路线，使用128通道激光雷达、360度雷达、5MP相机及厘米级精确地面真值位姿采集数据。
AI.result: 数据集包含350公里驾驶数据，支持里程计、度量定位和3D目标检测实时排行榜，提供开发工具包及在线访问。
AI.conclusion: Boreas数据集为自动驾驶算法在复杂环境下的性能评估提供了标准化基准，推动鲁棒性研究。

authors_text: Johannes Schneider,Giovanni Apruzzese
title: Concept-based Adversarial Attacks: Tricking Humans and Classifiers Alike
title_zh: 基于概念的对抗性攻击：欺骗人类和分类器
comment: Accepted at IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy (S&P) Workshop on Deep Learning and Security, 2022
comments: Accepted at IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy (S&P) Workshop on Deep Learning and Security, 2022
abstract: We propose to generate adversarial samples by modifying activations of upper layers encoding semantically meaningful concepts. The original sample is shifted towards a target sample, yielding an adversarial sample, by using the modified activations to reconstruct the original sample. A human might (and possibly should) notice differences between the original and the adversarial sample. Depending on the attacker-provided constraints, an adversarial sample can exhibit subtle differences or appear like a "forged" sample from another class. Our approach and goal are in stark contrast to common attacks involving perturbations of single pixels that are not recognizable by humans. Our approach is relevant in, e.g., multi-stage processing of inputs, where both humans and machines are involved in decision-making because invisible perturbations will not fool a human. Our evaluation focuses on deep neural networks. We also show the transferability of our adversarial examples among networks.
summary: We propose to generate adversarial samples by modifying activations of upper layers encoding semantically meaningful concepts. The original sample is shifted towards a target sample, yielding an adversarial sample, by using the modified activations to reconstruct the original sample. A human might (and possibly should) notice differences between the original and the adversarial sample. Depending on the attacker-provided constraints, an adversarial sample can exhibit subtle differences or appear like a "forged" sample from another class. Our approach and goal are in stark contrast to common attacks involving perturbations of single pixels that are not recognizable by humans. Our approach is relevant in, e.g., multi-stage processing of inputs, where both humans and machines are involved in decision-making because invisible perturbations will not fool a human. Our evaluation focuses on deep neural networks. We also show the transferability of our adversarial examples among networks.
abstract_zh: 我们建议通过修改编码语义上有意义的概念的上层的激活来生成对抗性样本。通过使用修改后的激活来重建原始样本，将原始样本移向目标样本，从而产生对抗性样本。人类可能（也可能应该）注意到原始样本和对抗样本之间的差异。根据攻击者提供的约束，对抗性样本可能会表现出细微的差异，或者看起来像是来自另一类的“伪造”样本。我们的方法和目标与涉及人类无法识别的单个像素扰动的常见攻击形成鲜明对比。我们的方法适用于输入的多阶段处理，其中人类和机器都参与决策，因为看不见的扰动不会欺骗人类。我们的评估重点是深度神经网络。我们还展示了我们的对抗样本在网络之间的可转移性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概念的对抗攻击方法，通过修改高层语义激活生成对抗样本，同时欺骗人类和分类器。
AI.motivation: 传统像素级扰动难以欺骗人类，而多阶段处理场景中需同时干扰人类与机器决策，需开发更有效的对抗方法。
AI.method: 通过修改编码语义概念的高层激活，利用重构网络生成向目标样本偏移的对抗样本，差异可细微或显著。
AI.result: 在深度神经网络上验证了方法有效性，并证明对抗样本具有跨网络的可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能同时欺骗人类与机器决策系统，适用于需多阶段处理的场景，揭示了现有模型在概念级攻击下的脆弱性。

authors_text: Arezoo Rajabi,Bhaskar Ramasubramanian,Abdullah Al Maruf,Radha Poovendran
title: Privacy-Preserving Reinforcement Learning Beyond Expectation
title_zh: 隐私保护强化学习超出预期
comment: Submitted to conference. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.00540
comments: Submitted to conference. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.00540
abstract: Cyber and cyber-physical systems equipped with machine learning algorithms such as autonomous cars share environments with humans. In such a setting, it is important to align system (or agent) behaviors with the preferences of one or more human users. We consider the case when an agent has to learn behaviors in an unknown environment. Our goal is to capture two defining characteristics of humans: i) a tendency to assess and quantify risk, and ii) a desire to keep decision making hidden from external parties. We incorporate cumulative prospect theory (CPT) into the objective of a reinforcement learning (RL) problem for the former. For the latter, we use differential privacy. We design an algorithm to enable an RL agent to learn policies to maximize a CPT-based objective in a privacy-preserving manner and establish guarantees on the privacy of value functions learned by the algorithm when rewards are sufficiently close. This is accomplished through adding a calibrated noise using a Gaussian process mechanism at each step. Through empirical evaluations, we highlight a privacy-utility tradeoff and demonstrate that the RL agent is able to learn behaviors that are aligned with that of a human user in the same environment in a privacy-preserving manner
summary: Cyber and cyber-physical systems equipped with machine learning algorithms such as autonomous cars share environments with humans. In such a setting, it is important to align system (or agent) behaviors with the preferences of one or more human users. We consider the case when an agent has to learn behaviors in an unknown environment. Our goal is to capture two defining characteristics of humans: i) a tendency to assess and quantify risk, and ii) a desire to keep decision making hidden from external parties. We incorporate cumulative prospect theory (CPT) into the objective of a reinforcement learning (RL) problem for the former. For the latter, we use differential privacy. We design an algorithm to enable an RL agent to learn policies to maximize a CPT-based objective in a privacy-preserving manner and establish guarantees on the privacy of value functions learned by the algorithm when rewards are sufficiently close. This is accomplished through adding a calibrated noise using a Gaussian process mechanism at each step. Through empirical evaluations, we highlight a privacy-utility tradeoff and demonstrate that the RL agent is able to learn behaviors that are aligned with that of a human user in the same environment in a privacy-preserving manner
abstract_zh: 配备机器学习算法的网络和网络物理系统（例如自动驾驶汽车）与人类共享环境。在这种设置中，将系统（或代理）行为与一个或多个人类用户的偏好保持一致非常重要。我们考虑代理必须在未知环境中学习行为的情况。我们的目标是捕捉人类的两个决定性特征：i）评估和量化风险的倾向，以及 ii）对外部各方隐藏决策的愿望。我们将累积前景理论（CPT）纳入前者的强化学习（RL）问题的目标中。对于后者，我们使用差分隐私。我们设计了一种算法，使 RL 代理能够学习策略，以保护隐私的方式最大化基于 CPT 的目标，并在奖励足够接近时为算法学习到的价值函数的隐私建立保证。这是通过在每一步使用高斯过程机制添加校准噪声来实现的。通过实证评估，我们强调了隐私与效用的权衡，并证明强化学习代理能够以保护隐私的方式学习与同一环境中的人类用户一致的行为

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种隐私保护的强化学习算法，结合累积前景理论和差分隐私机制，使智能体在未知环境中学习符合人类风险偏好且保护决策隐私的策略。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶等系统需与人类共享环境，需同时满足人类对风险评估的偏好和保护决策隐私的需求，现有方法难以兼顾隐私与行为对齐。
AI.method: 将累积前景理论纳入强化学习目标函数，采用差分隐私的高斯过程机制在每一步添加校准噪声，确保价值函数隐私性并保持策略学习效果。
AI.result: 实验验证了隐私保护与算法效用间的权衡关系，证明该方法能在隐私约束下使智能体学习出与人类用户行为一致的策略。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为隐私敏感场景下的强化学习提供了新思路，在保障决策隐私的同时实现了与人类风险偏好的有效对齐。

search_text: Privacy-Preserving Reinforcement Learning Beyond Expectation 隐私保护强化学习超出预期 Cyber and cyber-physical systems equipped with machine learning algorithms such as autonomous cars share environments with humans. In such a setting, it is important to align system (or agent) behaviors with the preferences of one or more human users. We consider the case when an agent has to learn behaviors in an unknown environment. Our goal is to capture two defining characteristics of humans: i) a tendency to assess and quantify risk, and ii) a desire to keep decision making hidden from external parties. We incorporate cumulative prospect theory (CPT) into the objective of a reinforcement learning (RL) problem for the former. For the latter, we use differential privacy. We design an algorithm to enable an RL agent to learn policies to maximize a CPT-based objective in a privacy-preserving manner and establish guarantees on the privacy of value functions learned by the algorithm when rewards are sufficiently close. This is accomplished through adding a calibrated noise using a Gaussian process mechanism at each step. Through empirical evaluations, we highlight a privacy-utility tradeoff and demonstrate that the RL agent is able to learn behaviors that are aligned with that of a human user in the same environment in a privacy-preserving manner 配备机器学习算法的网络和网络物理系统（例如自动驾驶汽车）与人类共享环境。在这种设置中，将系统（或代理）行为与一个或多个人类用户的偏好保持一致非常重要。我们考虑代理必须在未知环境中学习行为的情况。我们的目标是捕捉人类的两个决定性特征：i）评估和量化风险的倾向，以及 ii）对外部各方隐藏决策的愿望。我们将累积前景理论（CPT）纳入前者的强化学习（RL）问题的目标中。对于后者，我们使用差分隐私。我们设计了一种算法，使 RL 代理能够学习策略，以保护隐私的方式最大化基于 CPT 的目标，并在奖励足够接近时为算法学习到的价值函数的隐私建立保证。这是通过在每一步使用高斯过程机制添加校准噪声来实现的。通过实证评估，我们强调了隐私与效用的权衡，并证明强化学习代理能够以保护隐私的方式学习与同一环境中的人类用户一致的行为 本文设计了一种隐私保护的强化学习算法，结合累积前景理论和差分隐私机制，使智能体在未知环境中学习符合人类风险偏好且保护决策隐私的策略。 Arezoo Rajabi,Bhaskar Ramasubramanian,Abdullah Al Maruf,Radha Poovendran cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR,eess.SY

authors_text: Yen-Chang Hsu,James Smith,Yilin Shen,Zsolt Kira,Hongxia Jin
title: A Closer Look at Knowledge Distillation with Features, Logits, and Gradients
title_zh: 仔细研究具有特征、Logits 和梯度的知识蒸馏
abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) is a substantial strategy for transferring learned knowledge from one neural network model to another. A vast number of methods have been developed for this strategy. While most method designs a more efficient way to facilitate knowledge transfer, less attention has been put on comparing the effect of knowledge sources such as features, logits, and gradients. This work provides a new perspective to motivate a set of knowledge distillation strategies by approximating the classical KL-divergence criteria with different knowledge sources, making a systematic comparison possible in model compression and incremental learning. Our analysis indicates that logits are generally a more efficient knowledge source and suggests that having sufficient feature dimensions is crucial for the model design, providing a practical guideline for effective KD-based transfer learning.
summary: Knowledge distillation (KD) is a substantial strategy for transferring learned knowledge from one neural network model to another. A vast number of methods have been developed for this strategy. While most method designs a more efficient way to facilitate knowledge transfer, less attention has been put on comparing the effect of knowledge sources such as features, logits, and gradients. This work provides a new perspective to motivate a set of knowledge distillation strategies by approximating the classical KL-divergence criteria with different knowledge sources, making a systematic comparison possible in model compression and incremental learning. Our analysis indicates that logits are generally a more efficient knowledge source and suggests that having sufficient feature dimensions is crucial for the model design, providing a practical guideline for effective KD-based transfer learning.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）是将学习的知识从一个神经网络模型转移到另一个神经网络模型的重要策略。为此策略开发了大量方法。虽然大多数方法设计了一种更有效的方式来促进知识转移，但很少关注比较特征、逻辑和梯度等知识源的效果。这项工作提供了一个新的视角，通过用不同的知识源逼近经典的 KL 散度标准来激发一套知识蒸馏策略，使得模型压缩和增量学习中的系统比较成为可能。我们的分析表明，logits 通常是一种更有效的知识源，并表明拥有足够的特征维度对于模型设计至关重要，为有效的基于 KD 的迁移学习提供了实用指南。

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了知识蒸馏中特征、logits和梯度等不同知识源的效果，并提出基于KL散度准则的新型蒸馏策略。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法侧重于优化传输效率，但缺乏对不同知识源（特征、logits、梯度）效果的系统比较，阻碍了模型压缩和增量学习的优化。
AI.method: 通过将经典KL散度准则与不同知识源结合，设计多组知识蒸馏策略，并在模型压缩和增量学习场景下进行系统性对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明logits作为知识源效率最高，同时发现特征维度的充足性对模型设计具有关键影响。
AI.conclusion: 提出基于知识源差异的蒸馏策略框架，为知识蒸馏和迁移学习提供了特征维度设计与知识源选择的实践指导。

authors_text: Zhipeng Bao,Pavel Tokmakov,Allan Jabri,Yu-Xiong Wang,Adrien Gaidon,Martial Hebert
title: Discovering Objects that Can Move
title_zh: 发现可以移动的物体
abstract: This paper studies the problem of object discovery -- separating objects from the background without manual labels. Existing approaches utilize appearance cues, such as color, texture, and location, to group pixels into object-like regions. However, by relying on appearance alone, these methods fail to separate objects from the background in cluttered scenes. This is a fundamental limitation since the definition of an object is inherently ambiguous and context-dependent. To resolve this ambiguity, we choose to focus on dynamic objects -- entities that can move independently in the world. We then scale the recent auto-encoder based frameworks for unsupervised object discovery from toy synthetic images to complex real-world scenes. To this end, we simplify their architecture, and augment the resulting model with a weak learning signal from general motion segmentation algorithms. Our experiments demonstrate that, despite only capturing a small subset of the objects that move, this signal is enough to generalize to segment both moving and static instances of dynamic objects. We show that our model scales to a newly collected, photo-realistic synthetic dataset with street driving scenarios. Additionally, we leverage ground truth segmentation and flow annotations in this dataset for thorough ablation and evaluation. Finally, our experiments on the real-world KITTI benchmark demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms both heuristic- and learning-based methods by capitalizing on motion cues.
summary: This paper studies the problem of object discovery -- separating objects from the background without manual labels. Existing approaches utilize appearance cues, such as color, texture, and location, to group pixels into object-like regions. However, by relying on appearance alone, these methods fail to separate objects from the background in cluttered scenes. This is a fundamental limitation since the definition of an object is inherently ambiguous and context-dependent. To resolve this ambiguity, we choose to focus on dynamic objects -- entities that can move independently in the world. We then scale the recent auto-encoder based frameworks for unsupervised object discovery from toy synthetic images to complex real-world scenes. To this end, we simplify their architecture, and augment the resulting model with a weak learning signal from general motion segmentation algorithms. Our experiments demonstrate that, despite only capturing a small subset of the objects that move, this signal is enough to generalize to segment both moving and static instances of dynamic objects. We show that our model scales to a newly collected, photo-realistic synthetic dataset with street driving scenarios. Additionally, we leverage ground truth segmentation and flow annotations in this dataset for thorough ablation and evaluation. Finally, our experiments on the real-world KITTI benchmark demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms both heuristic- and learning-based methods by capitalizing on motion cues.
abstract_zh: 本文研究对象发现问题——无需手动标签将对象从背景中分离出来。现有方法利用外观线索（例如颜色、纹理和位置）将像素分组为类似对象的区域。然而，仅依靠外观，这些方法无法将杂乱场景中的对象与背景分开。这是一个基本限制，因为对象的定义本质上是不明确的并且依赖于上下文。为了解决这种模糊性，我们选择关注动态对象——可以在世界中独立移动的实体。然后，我们将最近基于自动编码器的框架扩展到无监督对象发现，从玩具合成图像到复杂的现实世界场景。为此，我们简化了它们的架构，并使用来自通用运动分割算法的弱学习信号来增强结果模型。我们的实验表明，尽管只捕获移动物体的一小部分，但该信号足以概括以分割动态物体的移动和静态实例。我们展示了我们的模型可以扩展到新收集的具有街道驾驶场景的逼真合成数据集。此外，我们利用该数据集中的地面实况分割和流注释来进行彻底的消融和评估。最后，我们对现实世界 KITTI 基准的实验表明，通过利用运动线索，所提出的方法优于启发式方法和基于学习的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在无标签情况下从背景中分离物体的问题，提出利用动态物体的运动线索进行无监督物体发现。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖颜色、纹理等外观线索，在复杂场景中难以区分物体与背景，而物体定义本身具有歧义性，需通过动态特性解决这一问题。
AI.method: 简化自编码框架架构，结合运动分割算法的弱学习信号，扩展至真实场景，并利用合成数据集进行消融实验。
AI.result: 模型在合成数据集和KITTI基准测试中均优于传统方法，能有效分割动态与静态物体实例。
AI.conclusion: 运动线索可作为关键信号提升无监督物体发现性能，即使仅捕捉部分动态物体也能实现有效泛化。

ai_content.result: 模型在合成数据集和KITTI基准测试中均优于传统方法，能有效分割动态与静态物体实例。

ai_content_json.method: 简化自编码框架架构，结合运动分割算法的弱学习信号，扩展至真实场景，并利用合成数据集进行消融实验。
ai_content_json.result: 模型在合成数据集和KITTI基准测试中均优于传统方法，能有效分割动态与静态物体实例。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 运动线索可作为关键信号提升无监督物体发现性能，即使仅捕捉部分动态物体也能实现有效泛化。

tldr: 本文研究在无标签情况下从背景中分离物体的问题，提出利用动态物体的运动线索进行无监督物体发现。

result: 模型在合成数据集和KITTI基准测试中均优于传统方法，能有效分割动态与静态物体实例。

search_text: Discovering Objects that Can Move 发现可以移动的物体 This paper studies the problem of object discovery -- separating objects from the background without manual labels. Existing approaches utilize appearance cues, such as color, texture, and location, to group pixels into object-like regions. However, by relying on appearance alone, these methods fail to separate objects from the background in cluttered scenes. This is a fundamental limitation since the definition of an object is inherently ambiguous and context-dependent. To resolve this ambiguity, we choose to focus on dynamic objects -- entities that can move independently in the world. We then scale the recent auto-encoder based frameworks for unsupervised object discovery from toy synthetic images to complex real-world scenes. To this end, we simplify their architecture, and augment the resulting model with a weak learning signal from general motion segmentation algorithms. Our experiments demonstrate that, despite only capturing a small subset of the objects that move, this signal is enough to generalize to segment both moving and static instances of dynamic objects. We show that our model scales to a newly collected, photo-realistic synthetic dataset with street driving scenarios. Additionally, we leverage ground truth segmentation and flow annotations in this dataset for thorough ablation and evaluation. Finally, our experiments on the real-world KITTI benchmark demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms both heuristic- and learning-based methods by capitalizing on motion cues. 本文研究对象发现问题——无需手动标签将对象从背景中分离出来。现有方法利用外观线索（例如颜色、纹理和位置）将像素分组为类似对象的区域。然而，仅依靠外观，这些方法无法将杂乱场景中的对象与背景分开。这是一个基本限制，因为对象的定义本质上是不明确的并且依赖于上下文。为了解决这种模糊性，我们选择关注动态对象——可以在世界中独立移动的实体。然后，我们将最近基于自动编码器的框架扩展到无监督对象发现，从玩具合成图像到复杂的现实世界场景。为此，我们简化了它们的架构，并使用来自通用运动分割算法的弱学习信号来增强结果模型。我们的实验表明，尽管只捕获移动物体的一小部分，但该信号足以概括以分割动态物体的移动和静态实例。我们展示了我们的模型可以扩展到新收集的具有街道驾驶场景的逼真合成数据集。此外，我们利用该数据集中的地面实况分割和流注释来进行彻底的消融和评估。最后，我们对现实世界 KITTI 基准的实验表明，通过利用运动线索，所提出的方法优于启发式方法和基于学习的方法。 本文研究在无标签情况下从背景中分离物体的问题，提出利用动态物体的运动线索进行无监督物体发现。 Zhipeng Bao,Pavel Tokmakov,Allan Jabri,Yu-Xiong Wang,Adrien Gaidon,Martial Hebert cs.CV

authors_text: Jonáš Kulhánek,Erik Derner,Torsten Sattler,Robert Babuška
title: ViewFormer: NeRF-free Neural Rendering from Few Images Using Transformers
title_zh: ViewFormer：使用 Transformer 从少量图像中进行无 NeRF 神经渲染
abstract: Novel view synthesis is a long-standing problem. In this work, we consider a variant of the problem where we are given only a few context views sparsely covering a scene or an object. The goal is to predict novel viewpoints in the scene, which requires learning priors. The current state of the art is based on Neural Radiance Field (NeRF), and while achieving impressive results, the methods suffer from long training times as they require evaluating millions of 3D point samples via a neural network for each image. We propose a 2D-only method that maps multiple context views and a query pose to a new image in a single pass of a neural network. Our model uses a two-stage architecture consisting of a codebook and a transformer model. The codebook is used to embed individual images into a smaller latent space, and the transformer solves the view synthesis task in this more compact space. To train our model efficiently, we introduce a novel branching attention mechanism that allows us to use the same model not only for neural rendering but also for camera pose estimation. Experimental results on real-world scenes show that our approach is competitive compared to NeRF-based methods while not reasoning explicitly in 3D, and it is faster to train.
summary: Novel view synthesis is a long-standing problem. In this work, we consider a variant of the problem where we are given only a few context views sparsely covering a scene or an object. The goal is to predict novel viewpoints in the scene, which requires learning priors. The current state of the art is based on Neural Radiance Field (NeRF), and while achieving impressive results, the methods suffer from long training times as they require evaluating millions of 3D point samples via a neural network for each image. We propose a 2D-only method that maps multiple context views and a query pose to a new image in a single pass of a neural network. Our model uses a two-stage architecture consisting of a codebook and a transformer model. The codebook is used to embed individual images into a smaller latent space, and the transformer solves the view synthesis task in this more compact space. To train our model efficiently, we introduce a novel branching attention mechanism that allows us to use the same model not only for neural rendering but also for camera pose estimation. Experimental results on real-world scenes show that our approach is competitive compared to NeRF-based methods while not reasoning explicitly in 3D, and it is faster to train.
abstract_zh: 新颖的视图合成是一个长期存在的问题。在这项工作中，我们考虑了问题的一个变体，其中我们只给出了一些稀疏地覆盖场景或对象的上下文视图。目标是预测场景中的新观点，这需要学习先验知识。当前最先进的技术基于神经辐射场 (NeRF)，虽然取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但这些方法的训练时间较长，因为它们需要通过神经网络为每个图像评估数百万个 3D 点样本。我们提出了一种纯 2D 方法，可以在神经网络的单次传递中将多个上下文视图和查询姿势映射到新图像。我们的模型使用由码本和变压器模型组成的两级架构。码本用于将单个图像嵌入到更小的潜在空间中，而转换器在这个更紧凑的空间中解决视图合成任务。为了有效地训练我们的模型，我们引入了一种新颖的分支注意机制，该机制使我们不仅可以使用相同的模型进行神经渲染，还可以进行相机姿态估计。现实场景的实验结果表明，我们的方法与基于 NeRF 的方法相比具有竞争力，同时无需在 3D 中进行显式推理，并且训练速度更快。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需NeRF的基于Transformer的神经渲染方法，仅通过少量图像生成新视角。
AI.motivation: 现有NeRF方法因需计算大量3D点样本导致训练耗时，而该方法旨在通过2D-only架构提升效率。
AI.method: 采用两阶段架构，首先用代码簿将图像嵌入压缩潜空间，再通过Transformer结合分支注意力机制完成视图合成与相机位姿估计。
AI.result: 在真实场景实验中，该方法在不显式处理3D信息的情况下，训练速度优于NeRF且效果具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: ViewFormer通过高效的2D Transformer架构，在少样本视角合成任务中实现了比NeRF更快的训练速度和可比的生成质量。

authors_text: Miu Lun Lau,Min Long,Jeff Terry
title: Automated Materials Spectroscopy Analysis using Genetic Algorithms
title_zh: 使用遗传算法进行自动化材料光谱分析
comment: 14 pages, 5 Figures, Accepted for publication in The 23rd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence (ICAI'21: July 26-29, 2021, USA), to be appear in SPRINGER NATURE - Research Book Series: Transactions on Computational Science & Computational Intelligence https://www.springer.com/series/11769"
comments: 14 pages, 5 Figures, Accepted for publication in The 23rd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence (ICAI'21: July 26-29, 2021, USA), to be appear in SPRINGER NATURE - Research Book Series: Transactions on Computational Science & Computational Intelligence https://www.springer.com/series/11769"
abstract: We introduce a Genetic Algorithm (GA) based, open-source project to solve multi-objective optimization problems of materials characterization data analysis including EXAFS, XPS and nanoindentation. The modular design and multiple crossover and mutation options make the software extensible for additional materials characterization applications too. This automation of the analysis is crucial in the era when instrumentation acquires data orders of magnitude more rapidly than it can be analyzed by hand. Our results demonstrated good fitness scores with minimal human intervention.
summary: We introduce a Genetic Algorithm (GA) based, open-source project to solve multi-objective optimization problems of materials characterization data analysis including EXAFS, XPS and nanoindentation. The modular design and multiple crossover and mutation options make the software extensible for additional materials characterization applications too. This automation of the analysis is crucial in the era when instrumentation acquires data orders of magnitude more rapidly than it can be analyzed by hand. Our results demonstrated good fitness scores with minimal human intervention.
abstract_zh: 我们引入基于遗传算法 (GA) 的开源项目来解决材料表征数据分析的多目标优化问题，包括 EXAFS、XPS 和纳米压痕。模块化设计以及多个交叉和突变选项使该软件也可扩展用于其他材料表征应用。在仪器获取数据的速度比手动分析快几个数量级的时代，这种分析自动化至关重要。我们的结果表明，在人为干预最少的情况下，健康得分良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于遗传算法的开源工具，用于自动化处理材料表征数据（如EXAFS、XPS和纳米压痕）的多目标优化分析。
AI.motivation: 现代仪器数据采集速度远超人工分析能力，亟需自动化工具提高材料表征数据处理效率并减少人工干预。
AI.method: 开发模块化遗传算法框架，支持多种交叉和变异策略，适配EXAFS、XPS等材料分析技术的多目标优化问题。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在无需人工干预的情况下实现了较高的适应度评分，验证了自动化分析的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 遗传算法驱动的自动化分析工具可有效应对高通量材料表征数据处理需求，且具备良好的可扩展性。

authors_text: Maryam Tavakoli-Zaniani,Mohammad Reza Gholamian,S. Alireza Hashemi Golpayegani
title: Improving Heuristic-based Process Discovery Methods by Detecting Optimal Dependency Graphs
title_zh: 通过检测最佳依赖图来改进基于启发式的流程发现方法
comment: Prepared to sumit to Fundamenta Informaticae journal
comments: Prepared to sumit to Fundamenta Informaticae journal
abstract: Heuristic-based methods are among the most popular methods in the process discovery area. This category of methods is composed of two main steps: 1) discovering a dependency graph 2) determining the split/join patterns of the dependency graph. The current dependency graph discovery techniques of heuristic-based methods select the initial set of graph arcs according to dependency measures and then modify the set regarding some criteria. This can lead to selecting the non-optimal set of arcs. Also, the modifications can result in modeling rare behaviors and, consequently, low precision and non-simple process models. Thus, constructing dependency graphs through selecting the optimal set of arcs has a high potential for improving graphs quality. Hence, this paper proposes a new integer linear programming model that determines the optimal set of graph arcs regarding dependency measures. Simultaneously, the proposed method can eliminate some other issues that the existing methods cannot handle completely; i.e., even in the presence of loops, it guarantees that all tasks are on a path from the initial to the final tasks. This approach also allows utilizing domain knowledge by introducing appropriate constraints, which can be a practical advantage in real-world problems. To assess the results, we modified two existing methods of evaluating process models to make them capable of measuring the quality of dependency graphs. According to assessments, the outputs of the proposed method are superior to the outputs of the most prominent dependency graph discovery methods in terms of fitness, precision, and especially simplicity.

To assess the results, we modified two existing methods of evaluating process models to make them capable of measuring the quality of dependency graphs. According to assessments, the outputs of the proposed method are superior to the outputs of the most prominent dependency graph discovery methods in terms of fitness, precision, and especially simplicity.
abstract_zh: 基于启发式的方法是流程发现领域最流行的方法之一。此类方法由两个主要步骤组成：1）发现依赖图2）确定依赖图的拆分/连接模式。当前基于启发式方法的依赖图发现技术根据依赖度量选择初始图弧集合，然后根据某些标准修改该集合。这可能导致选择非最佳的弧集。此外，这些修改可能会导致对罕见行为进行建模，从而导致精度低且不简单的过程模型。因此，通过选择最佳弧集构建依赖图具有提高图质量的巨大潜力。因此，本文提出了一种新的整数线性规划模型，用于确定有关依赖度量的最佳图弧集。同时，该方法还可以解决现有方法无法完全解决的一些其他问题；即，即使存在循环，它也保证所有任务都在从初始任务到最终任务的路径上。这种方法还允许通过引入适当的约束来利用领域知识，这可以成为解决现实问题的实际优势。为了评估结果，我们修改了两种评估流程模型的现有方法，使它们能够测量依赖图的质量。根据评估，该方法的输出在适应性、精度，尤其是简单性方面优于最著名的依赖图发现方法的输出。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于整数线性规划的新方法，通过检测最优依赖图来改进启发式过程发现方法。
AI.motivation: 现有启发式方法在依赖图构建中易选非最优边集，导致模型精度低、复杂度高，且无法完全处理循环结构问题。
AI.method: 设计整数线性规划模型，根据依赖度量确定最优边集，同时引入约束条件确保任务路径完整性并整合领域知识。
AI.result: 实验表明，新方法在拟合度、精度和简洁性上优于主流依赖图发现方法，且能有效处理循环结构。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过优化依赖图构建过程，显著提升了过程模型的质量，为实际应用提供了更可靠的解决方案。

search_text: Improving Heuristic-based Process Discovery Methods by Detecting Optimal Dependency Graphs 通过检测最佳依赖图来改进基于启发式的流程发现方法 Heuristic-based methods are among the most popular methods in the process discovery area. This category of methods is composed of two main steps: 1) discovering a dependency graph 2) determining the split/join patterns of the dependency graph. The current dependency graph discovery techniques of heuristic-based methods select the initial set of graph arcs according to dependency measures and then modify the set regarding some criteria. This can lead to selecting the non-optimal set of arcs. Also, the modifications can result in modeling rare behaviors and, consequently, low precision and non-simple process models. Thus, constructing dependency graphs through selecting the optimal set of arcs has a high potential for improving graphs quality. Hence, this paper proposes a new integer linear programming model that determines the optimal set of graph arcs regarding dependency measures. Simultaneously, the proposed method can eliminate some other issues that the existing methods cannot handle completely; i.e., even in the presence of loops, it guarantees that all tasks are on a path from the initial to the final tasks. This approach also allows utilizing domain knowledge by introducing appropriate constraints, which can be a practical advantage in real-world problems. To assess the results, we modified two existing methods of evaluating process models to make them capable of measuring the quality of dependency graphs. According to assessments, the outputs of the proposed method are superior to the outputs of the most prominent dependency graph discovery methods in terms of fitness, precision, and especially simplicity. 基于启发式的方法是流程发现领域最流行的方法之一。此类方法由两个主要步骤组成：1）发现依赖图2）确定依赖图的拆分/连接模式。当前基于启发式方法的依赖图发现技术根据依赖度量选择初始图弧集合，然后根据某些标准修改该集合。这可能导致选择非最佳的弧集。此外，这些修改可能会导致对罕见行为进行建模，从而导致精度低且不简单的过程模型。因此，通过选择最佳弧集构建依赖图具有提高图质量的巨大潜力。因此，本文提出了一种新的整数线性规划模型，用于确定有关依赖度量的最佳图弧集。同时，该方法还可以解决现有方法无法完全解决的一些其他问题；即，即使存在循环，它也保证所有任务都在从初始任务到最终任务的路径上。这种方法还允许通过引入适当的约束来利用领域知识，这可以成为解决现实问题的实际优势。为了评估结果，我们修改了两种评估流程模型的现有方法，使它们能够测量依赖图的质量。根据评估，该方法的输出在适应性、精度，尤其是简单性方面优于最著名的依赖图发现方法的输出。 本文提出一种基于整数线性规划的新方法，通过检测最优依赖图来改进启发式过程发现方法。 Maryam Tavakoli-Zaniani,Mohammad Reza Gholamian,S. Alireza Hashemi Golpayegani cs.AI

authors_text: An Xu,Wenqi Li,Pengfei Guo,Dong Yang,Holger Roth,Ali Hatamizadeh,Can Zhao,Daguang Xu,Heng Huang,Ziyue Xu
title: Closing the Generalization Gap of Cross-silo Federated Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 缩小跨孤岛联合医学图像分割的泛化差距
abstract: Cross-silo federated learning (FL) has attracted much attention in medical imaging analysis with deep learning in recent years as it can resolve the critical issues of insufficient data, data privacy, and training efficiency. However, there can be a generalization gap between the model trained from FL and the one from centralized training. This important issue comes from the non-iid data distribution of the local data in the participating clients and is well-known as client drift. In this work, we propose a novel training framework FedSM to avoid the client drift issue and successfully close the generalization gap compared with the centralized training for medical image segmentation tasks for the first time. We also propose a novel personalized FL objective formulation and a new method SoftPull to solve it in our proposed framework FedSM. We conduct rigorous theoretical analysis to guarantee its convergence for optimizing the non-convex smooth objective function. Real-world medical image segmentation experiments using deep FL validate the motivations and effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: Cross-silo federated learning (FL) has attracted much attention in medical imaging analysis with deep learning in recent years as it can resolve the critical issues of insufficient data, data privacy, and training efficiency. However, there can be a generalization gap between the model trained from FL and the one from centralized training. This important issue comes from the non-iid data distribution of the local data in the participating clients and is well-known as client drift. In this work, we propose a novel training framework FedSM to avoid the client drift issue and successfully close the generalization gap compared with the centralized training for medical image segmentation tasks for the first time. We also propose a novel personalized FL objective formulation and a new method SoftPull to solve it in our proposed framework FedSM. We conduct rigorous theoretical analysis to guarantee its convergence for optimizing the non-convex smooth objective function. Real-world medical image segmentation experiments using deep FL validate the motivations and effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 跨筒仓联邦学习（FL）近年来在深度学习医学影像分析领域备受关注，因为它可以解决数据不足、数据隐私和训练效率等关键问题。然而，FL 训练的模型与集中训练的模型之间可能存在泛化差距。这个重要问题来自参与客户端中本地数据的非独立同分布数据分布，被称为客户端漂移。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的训练框架 FedSM，以避免客户端漂移问题，并首次成功缩小了与医学图像分割任务的集中训练相比的泛化差距。我们还提出了一种新颖的个性化 FL 目标公式和一种新方法 SoftPull 来在我们提出的框架 FedSM 中解决它。我们进行了严格的理论分析，以保证其优化非凸平滑目标函数的收敛性。使用深度 FL 的真实医学图像分割实验验证了我们提出的方法的动机和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FedSM的新型训练框架，旨在解决跨机构联邦医疗图像分割中的客户端漂移问题，从而缩小联邦学习与集中训练之间的泛化差距。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在医疗影像分析中面临数据非独立同分布（non-IID）导致的客户端漂移问题，使得联邦训练模型与集中训练模型存在显著泛化差距，影响实际应用效果。
AI.method: 提出FedSM框架，包含个性化联邦学习目标函数和SoftPull优化方法，并通过理论分析保证非凸光滑目标函数的收敛性。
AI.result: 在真实医疗图像分割任务中验证了FedSM的有效性，成功缩小了联邦学习与集中训练的性能差距，证明了方法的动机和效果。
AI.conclusion: FedSM框架通过个性化目标设计和SoftPull方法有效缓解客户端漂移，首次在医疗图像分割任务中实现联邦学习与集中训练的性能对齐，为个性化联邦学习提供了理论支持和实践方案。

authors_text: Jingqi Li,Donggun Lee,Somayeh Sojoudi,Claire J. Tomlin
title: Infinite-Horizon Reach-Avoid Zero-Sum Games via Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习实现无限视野避免零和博弈
abstract: In this paper, we consider the infinite-horizon reach-avoid zero-sum game problem, where the goal is to find a set in the state space, referred to as the reach-avoid set, such that the system starting at a state therein could be controlled to reach a given target set without violating constraints under the worst-case disturbance. We address this problem by designing a new value function with a contracting Bellman backup, where the super-zero level set, i.e., the set of states where the value function is evaluated to be non-negative, recovers the reach-avoid set. Building upon this, we prove that the proposed method can be adapted to compute the viability kernel, or the set of states which could be controlled to satisfy given constraints, and the backward reachable set, or the set of states that could be driven towards a given target set. Finally, we propose to alleviate the curse of dimensionality issue in high-dimensional problems by extending Conservative Q-Learning, a deep reinforcement learning technique, to learn a value function such that the super-zero level set of the learned value function serves as a (conservative) approximation to the reach-avoid set. Our theoretical and empirical results suggest that the proposed method could learn reliably the reach-avoid set and the optimal control policy even with neural network approximation.
summary: In this paper, we consider the infinite-horizon reach-avoid zero-sum game problem, where the goal is to find a set in the state space, referred to as the reach-avoid set, such that the system starting at a state therein could be controlled to reach a given target set without violating constraints under the worst-case disturbance. We address this problem by designing a new value function with a contracting Bellman backup, where the super-zero level set, i.e., the set of states where the value function is evaluated to be non-negative, recovers the reach-avoid set. Building upon this, we prove that the proposed method can be adapted to compute the viability kernel, or the set of states which could be controlled to satisfy given constraints, and the backward reachable set, or the set of states that could be driven towards a given target set. Finally, we propose to alleviate the curse of dimensionality issue in high-dimensional problems by extending Conservative Q-Learning, a deep reinforcement learning technique, to learn a value function such that the super-zero level set of the learned value function serves as a (conservative) approximation to the reach-avoid set. Our theoretical and empirical results suggest that the proposed method could learn reliably the reach-avoid set and the optimal control policy even with neural network approximation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑无限范围的到达避免零和博弈问题，其目标是在状态空间中找到一个集合，称为到达避免集，使得从其中的状态开始的系统可以被控制达到给定的目标集，而不会在最坏情况的干扰下违反约束。我们通过设计一个具有收缩贝尔曼备份的新价值函数来解决这个问题，其中超零水平集（即价值函数被评估为非负的状态集）恢复了到达避免集。在此基础上，我们证明所提出的方法可以适用于计算可行性内核，或可以控制以满足给定约束的状态集，以及向后可达集，或可以驱动到给定目标集的状态集。最后，我们建议通过扩展保守 Q 学习（一种深度强化学习技术）来学习价值函数，从而使学习价值函数的超零水平集充当避免到达集的（保守）近似，从而减轻高维问题中的维度问题。我们的理论和实证结果表明，即使使用神经网络近似，所提出的方法也可以可靠地学习到达避免集和最优控制策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的方法，用于求解无限时间范围内的零和博弈问题中的reach-avoid集。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理高维问题或保证保守性方面存在不足，需要更有效的方法来计算reach-avoid集。
AI.method: 提出新的收缩Bellman备份价值函数，并结合扩展的保守Q学习算法，以高维问题的维度诅咒。
AI.result: 理论与实验表明，该方法能有效学习reach-avoid集及最优策略，即使使用神经网络近似。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解决高维无限时间零和博弈问题提供了可靠且保守的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的方法，用于求解无限时间范围内的零和博弈问题中的reach-avoid集。

search_text: Infinite-Horizon Reach-Avoid Zero-Sum Games via Deep Reinforcement Learning 通过深度强化学习实现无限视野避免零和博弈 In this paper, we consider the infinite-horizon reach-avoid zero-sum game problem, where the goal is to find a set in the state space, referred to as the reach-avoid set, such that the system starting at a state therein could be controlled to reach a given target set without violating constraints under the worst-case disturbance. We address this problem by designing a new value function with a contracting Bellman backup, where the super-zero level set, i.e., the set of states where the value function is evaluated to be non-negative, recovers the reach-avoid set. Building upon this, we prove that the proposed method can be adapted to compute the viability kernel, or the set of states which could be controlled to satisfy given constraints, and the backward reachable set, or the set of states that could be driven towards a given target set. Finally, we propose to alleviate the curse of dimensionality issue in high-dimensional problems by extending Conservative Q-Learning, a deep reinforcement learning technique, to learn a value function such that the super-zero level set of the learned value function serves as a (conservative) approximation to the reach-avoid set. Our theoretical and empirical results suggest that the proposed method could learn reliably the reach-avoid set and the optimal control policy even with neural network approximation. 在本文中，我们考虑无限范围的到达避免零和博弈问题，其目标是在状态空间中找到一个集合，称为到达避免集，使得从其中的状态开始的系统可以被控制达到给定的目标集，而不会在最坏情况的干扰下违反约束。我们通过设计一个具有收缩贝尔曼备份的新价值函数来解决这个问题，其中超零水平集（即价值函数被评估为非负的状态集）恢复了到达避免集。在此基础上，我们证明所提出的方法可以适用于计算可行性内核，或可以控制以满足给定约束的状态集，以及向后可达集，或可以驱动到给定目标集的状态集。最后，我们建议通过扩展保守 Q 学习（一种深度强化学习技术）来学习价值函数，从而使学习价值函数的超零水平集充当避免到达集的（保守）近似，从而减轻高维问题中的维度问题。我们的理论和实证结果表明，即使使用神经网络近似，所提出的方法也可以可靠地学习到达避免集和最优控制策略。 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的方法，用于求解无限时间范围内的零和博弈问题中的reach-avoid集。 Jingqi Li,Donggun Lee,Somayeh Sojoudi,Claire J. Tomlin eess.SY,cs.AI,cs.LG,math.OC

title: AI system for fetal ultrasound in low-resource settings
title_zh: 资源匮乏环境下的胎儿超声人工智能系统
abstract: Despite considerable progress in maternal healthcare, maternal and perinatal deaths remain high in low-to-middle income countries. Fetal ultrasound is an important component of antenatal care, but shortage of adequately trained healthcare workers has limited its adoption. We developed and validated an artificial intelligence (AI) system that uses novice-acquired "blind sweep" ultrasound videos to estimate gestational age (GA) and fetal malpresentation. We further addressed obstacles that may be encountered in low-resourced settings. Using a simplified sweep protocol with real-time AI feedback on sweep quality, we have demonstrated the generalization of model performance to minimally trained novice ultrasound operators using low cost ultrasound devices with on-device AI integration. The GA model was non-inferior to standard fetal biometry estimates with as few as two sweeps, and the fetal malpresentation model had high AUC-ROCs across operators and devices. Our AI models have the potential to assist in upleveling the capabilities of lightly trained ultrasound operators in low resource settings.
summary: Despite considerable progress in maternal healthcare, maternal and perinatal deaths remain high in low-to-middle income countries. Fetal ultrasound is an important component of antenatal care, but shortage of adequately trained healthcare workers has limited its adoption. We developed and validated an artificial intelligence (AI) system that uses novice-acquired "blind sweep" ultrasound videos to estimate gestational age (GA) and fetal malpresentation. We further addressed obstacles that may be encountered in low-resourced settings. Using a simplified sweep protocol with real-time AI feedback on sweep quality, we have demonstrated the generalization of model performance to minimally trained novice ultrasound operators using low cost ultrasound devices with on-device AI integration. The GA model was non-inferior to standard fetal biometry estimates with as few as two sweeps, and the fetal malpresentation model had high AUC-ROCs across operators and devices. Our AI models have the potential to assist in upleveling the capabilities of lightly trained ultrasound operators in low resource settings.
abstract_zh: 尽管孕产妇保健取得了相当大的进步，但中低收入国家的孕产妇和围产儿死亡率仍然很高。胎儿超声检查是产前护理的重要组成部分，但缺乏训练有素的医护人员限制了其采用。我们开发并验证了一种人工智能 (AI) 系统，该系统使用新手获得的“盲扫”超声视频来估计胎龄 (GA) 和胎儿先露异常。我们进一步解决了资源匮乏地区可能遇到的障碍。使用简化的扫描协议以及扫描质量的实时人工智能反馈，我们已经向使用具有设备上人工智能集成的低成本超声设备的经过最低限度训练的新手超声操作员展示了模型性能的泛化。 GA 模型只需两次扫描即可不劣于标准胎儿生物统计估计，并且胎儿先兆畸形模型在操作员和设备上具有较高的 AUC-ROC。我们的人工智能模型有潜力帮助在资源匮乏的环境中提升经过轻度培训的超声操作员的能力。

AI.tldr: 开发一种AI系统，利用低资源环境下非专业人员获取的胎儿超声视频来估计孕周和检测胎位异常。
AI.motivation: 低收入国家因缺乏训练有素的医疗人员，导致产科和围产期死亡率较高，需通过AI技术弥补超声诊断资源不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计简化超声扫描协议并集成实时AI反馈，使用低成本设备验证AI模型在非专业操作者中的泛化能力，通过AUC-ROC评估模型性能。
AI.result: 孕周估计模型在两次扫描下表现不劣于传统生物测量法，胎位异常模型在不同操作者和设备间均具有高AUC-ROC值。
AI.conclusion: 该AI系统可提升低资源地区初级培训人员的超声诊断能力，为产前护理提供有效支持。

authors_text: Niketan Pansare,Jay Katukuri,Aditya Arora,Frank Cipollone,Riyaaz Shaik,Noyan Tokgozoglu,Chandru Venkataraman
title: Learning Compressed Embeddings for On-Device Inference
title_zh: 学习用于设备上推理的压缩嵌入
abstract: In deep learning, embeddings are widely used to represent categorical entities such as words, apps, and movies. An embedding layer maps each entity to a unique vector, causing the layer's memory requirement to be proportional to the number of entities. In the recommendation domain, a given category can have hundreds of thousands of entities, and its embedding layer can take gigabytes of memory. The scale of these networks makes them difficult to deploy in resource constrained environments. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for reducing the size of an embedding table while still mapping each entity to its own unique embedding. Rather than maintaining the full embedding table, we construct each entity's embedding "on the fly" using two separate embedding tables. The first table employs hashing to force multiple entities to share an embedding. The second table contains one trainable weight per entity, allowing the model to distinguish between entities sharing the same embedding. Since these two tables are trained jointly, the network is able to learn a unique embedding per entity, helping it maintain a discriminative capability similar to a model with an uncompressed embedding table. We call this approach MEmCom (Multi-Embedding Compression). We compare with state-of-the-art model compression techniques for multiple problem classes including classification and ranking. On four popular recommender system datasets, MEmCom had a 4% relative loss in nDCG while compressing the input embedding sizes of our recommendation models by 16x, 4x, 12x, and 40x. MEmCom outperforms the state-of-the-art techniques, which achieved 16%, 6%, 10%, and 8% relative loss in nDCG at the respective compression ratios. Additionally, MEmCom is able to compress the RankNet ranking model by 32x on a dataset with millions of users' interactions with games while incurring only a 1% relative loss in nDCG.
summary: In deep learning, embeddings are widely used to represent categorical entities such as words, apps, and movies. An embedding layer maps each entity to a unique vector, causing the layer's memory requirement to be proportional to the number of entities. In the recommendation domain, a given category can have hundreds of thousands of entities, and its embedding layer can take gigabytes of memory. The scale of these networks makes them difficult to deploy in resource constrained environments. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for reducing the size of an embedding table while still mapping each entity to its own unique embedding. Rather than maintaining the full embedding table, we construct each entity's embedding "on the fly" using two separate embedding tables. The first table employs hashing to force multiple entities to share an embedding. The second table contains one trainable weight per entity, allowing the model to distinguish between entities sharing the same embedding. Since these two tables are trained jointly, the network is able to learn a unique embedding per entity, helping it maintain a discriminative capability similar to a model with an uncompressed embedding table. We call this approach MEmCom (Multi-Embedding Compression). We compare with state-of-the-art model compression techniques for multiple problem classes including classification and ranking. On four popular recommender system datasets, MEmCom had a 4% relative loss in nDCG while compressing the input embedding sizes of our recommendation models by 16x, 4x, 12x, and 40x. MEmCom outperforms the state-of-the-art techniques, which achieved 16%, 6%, 10%, and 8% relative loss in nDCG at the respective compression ratios. Additionally, MEmCom is able to compress the RankNet ranking model by 32x on a dataset with millions of users' interactions with games while incurring only a 1% relative loss in nDCG.
abstract_zh: 在深度学习中，嵌入被广泛用于表示分类实体，例如单词、应用程序和电影。嵌入层将每个实体映射到一个唯一的向量，从而导致该层的内存需求与实体的数量成正比。在推荐领域，给定的类别可以有数十万个实体，其嵌入层可以占用千兆字节的内存。这些网络的规模使其难以在资源有限的环境中部署。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，用于减小嵌入表的大小，同时仍将每个实体映射到其自己独特的嵌入。我们不是维护完整的嵌入表，而是使用两个单独的嵌入表“动态”构建每个实体的嵌入。第一个表使用散列来强制多个实体共享嵌入。第二个表包含每个实体一个可训练的权重，允许模型区分共享相同嵌入的实体。由于这两个表是联合训练的，因此网络能够学习每个实体的独特嵌入，帮助其保持类似于具有未压缩嵌入表的模型的判别能力。我们将这种方法称为 MEmCom（多重嵌入压缩）。我们针对多个问题类别（包括分类和排序）与最先进的模型压缩技术进行比较。在四个流行的推荐系统数据集上，MEmCom 在将推荐模型的输入嵌入大小压缩 16 倍、4 倍、12 倍和 40 倍的同时，nDCG 的相对损失为 4%。 MEmCom 的性能优于最先进的技术，在各自的压缩比下，nDCG 的相对损失分别为 16%、6%、10% 和 8%。此外，MEmCom 能够在包含数百万用户与游戏互动的数据集上将 RankNet 排名模型压缩 32 倍，而 nDCG 的相对损失仅为 1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MEmCom的方法，通过压缩嵌入表尺寸以降低深度学习模型在资源受限设备上的内存需求，同时保持每个实体的唯一嵌入表示。
AI.motivation: 在推荐系统等领域，嵌入层因实体数量庞大导致内存占用过高，难以部署于资源受限设备，亟需高效压缩方法。
AI.method: MEmCom采用两个嵌入表联合训练：第一表通过哈希强制多个实体共享嵌入，第二表为每个实体分配可训练权重以区分共享嵌入的实体。
AI.result: 在四个推荐数据集上，MEmCom以16x-40x不等的压缩比实现4%的nDCG相对损失，优于现有技术的16%-10%损失；在游戏交互数据集上压缩RankNet模型32x仅损失1%nDCG。
AI.conclusion: MEmCom在保持模型判别能力的前提下显著压缩嵌入表规模，为边缘设备部署推荐系统提供了高效解决方案。

ai_content_json.result: 在四个推荐数据集上，MEmCom以16x-40x不等的压缩比实现4%的nDCG相对损失，优于现有技术的16%-10%损失；在游戏交互数据集上压缩RankNet模型32x仅损失1%nDCG。
ai_content_json.conclusion: MEmCom在保持模型判别能力的前提下显著压缩嵌入表规模，为边缘设备部署推荐系统提供了高效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为MEmCom的方法，通过压缩嵌入表尺寸以降低深度学习模型在资源受限设备上的内存需求，同时保持每个实体的唯一嵌入表示。
motivation: 在推荐系统等领域，嵌入层因实体数量庞大导致内存占用过高，难以部署于资源受限设备，亟需高效压缩方法。
method: MEmCom采用两个嵌入表联合训练：第一表通过哈希强制多个实体共享嵌入，第二表为每个实体分配可训练权重以区分共享嵌入的实体。
result: 在四个推荐数据集上，MEmCom以16x-40x不等的压缩比实现4%的nDCG相对损失，优于现有技术的16%-10%损失；在游戏交互数据集上压缩RankNet模型32x仅损失1%nDCG。
conclusion: MEmCom在保持模型判别能力的前提下显著压缩嵌入表规模，为边缘设备部署推荐系统提供了高效解决方案。
search_text: Learning Compressed Embeddings for On-Device Inference 学习用于设备上推理的压缩嵌入 In deep learning, embeddings are widely used to represent categorical entities such as words, apps, and movies. An embedding layer maps each entity to a unique vector, causing the layer's memory requirement to be proportional to the number of entities. In the recommendation domain, a given category can have hundreds of thousands of entities, and its embedding layer can take gigabytes of memory. The scale of these networks makes them difficult to deploy in resource constrained environments. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for reducing the size of an embedding table while still mapping each entity to its own unique embedding. Rather than maintaining the full embedding table, we construct each entity's embedding "on the fly" using two separate embedding tables. The first table employs hashing to force multiple entities to share an embedding. The second table contains one trainable weight per entity, allowing the model to distinguish between entities sharing the same embedding. Since these two tables are trained jointly, the network is able to learn a unique embedding per entity, helping it maintain a discriminative capability similar to a model with an uncompressed embedding table. We call this approach MEmCom (Multi-Embedding Compression). We compare with state-of-the-art model compression techniques for multiple problem classes including classification and ranking. On four popular recommender system datasets, MEmCom had a 4% relative loss in nDCG while compressing the input embedding sizes of our recommendation models by 16x, 4x, 12x, and 40x. MEmCom outperforms the state-of-the-art techniques, which achieved 16%, 6%, 10%, and 8% relative loss in nDCG at the respective compression ratios. Additionally, MEmCom is able to compress the RankNet ranking model by 32x on a dataset with millions of users' interactions with games while incurring only a 1% relative loss in nDCG. 在深度学习中，嵌入被广泛用于表示分类实体，例如单词、应用程序和电影。嵌入层将每个实体映射到一个唯一的向量，从而导致该层的内存需求与实体的数量成正比。在推荐领域，给定的类别可以有数十万个实体，其嵌入层可以占用千兆字节的内存。这些网络的规模使其难以在资源有限的环境中部署。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，用于减小嵌入表的大小，同时仍将每个实体映射到其自己独特的嵌入。我们不是维护完整的嵌入表，而是使用两个单独的嵌入表“动态”构建每个实体的嵌入。第一个表使用散列来强制多个实体共享嵌入。第二个表包含每个实体一个可训练的权重，允许模型区分共享相同嵌入的实体。由于这两个表是联合训练的，因此网络能够学习每个实体的独特嵌入，帮助其保持类似于具有未压缩嵌入表的模型的判别能力。我们将这种方法称为 MEmCom（多重嵌入压缩）。我们针对多个问题类别（包括分类和排序）与最先进的模型压缩技术进行比较。在四个流行的推荐系统数据集上，MEmCom 在将推荐模型的输入嵌入大小压缩 16 倍、4 倍、12 倍和 40 倍的同时，nDCG 的相对损失为 4%。 MEmCom 的性能优于最先进的技术，在各自的压缩比下，nDCG 的相对损失分别为 16%、6%、10% 和 8%。此外，MEmCom 能够在包含数百万用户与游戏互动的数据集上将 RankNet 排名模型压缩 32 倍，而 nDCG 的相对损失仅为 1%。 本文提出一种名为MEmCom的方法，通过压缩嵌入表尺寸以降低深度学习模型在资源受限设备上的内存需求，同时保持每个实体的唯一嵌入表示。 Niketan Pansare,Jay Katukuri,Aditya Arora,Frank Cipollone,Riyaaz Shaik,Noyan Tokgozoglu,Chandru Venkataraman cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Peter West,Chris Quirk,Michel Galley,Yejin Choi
title: Probing Factually Grounded Content Transfer with Factual Ablation
title_zh: 通过事实消融探索基于事实的内容传输
abstract: Despite recent success, large neural models often generate factually incorrect text. Compounding this is the lack of a standard automatic evaluation for factuality--it cannot be meaningfully improved if it cannot be measured. Grounded generation promises a path to solving both of these problems: models draw on a reliable external document (grounding) for factual information, simplifying the challenge of factuality. Measuring factuality is also simplified--to factual consistency, testing whether the generation agrees with the grounding, rather than all facts. Yet, without a standard automatic metric for factual consistency, factually grounded generation remains an open problem. We study this problem for content transfer, in which generations extend a prompt, using information from factual grounding. Particularly, this domain allows us to introduce the notion of factual ablation for automatically measuring factual consistency: this captures the intuition that the model should be less likely to produce an output given a less relevant grounding document. In practice, we measure this by presenting a model with two grounding documents, and the model should prefer to use the more factually relevant one. We contribute two evaluation sets to measure this. Applying our new evaluation, we propose multiple novel methods improving over strong baselines.
summary: Despite recent success, large neural models often generate factually incorrect text. Compounding this is the lack of a standard automatic evaluation for factuality--it cannot be meaningfully improved if it cannot be measured. Grounded generation promises a path to solving both of these problems: models draw on a reliable external document (grounding) for factual information, simplifying the challenge of factuality. Measuring factuality is also simplified--to factual consistency, testing whether the generation agrees with the grounding, rather than all facts. Yet, without a standard automatic metric for factual consistency, factually grounded generation remains an open problem. We study this problem for content transfer, in which generations extend a prompt, using information from factual grounding. Particularly, this domain allows us to introduce the notion of factual ablation for automatically measuring factual consistency: this captures the intuition that the model should be less likely to produce an output given a less relevant grounding document. In practice, we measure this by presenting a model with two grounding documents, and the model should prefer to use the more factually relevant one. We contribute two evaluation sets to measure this. Applying our new evaluation, we propose multiple novel methods improving over strong baselines.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近取得了成功，但大型神经模型经常生成实际上不正确的文本。雪上加霜的是，缺乏对事实性的标准自动评估——如果无法衡量，就无法进行有意义的改进。扎根生成有望解决这两个问题：模型利用可靠的外部文档（扎根）来获取事实信息，从而简化了事实性的挑战。衡量事实性也被简化为事实一致性，测试这一代人是否同意基础，而不是所有事实。然而，如果没有一个标准的自动衡量事实一致性的标准，基于事实的生成仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。我们研究这个内容转移问题，其中几代人使用来自事实基础的信息来延伸提示。特别是，这个领域允许我们引入事实消融的概念来自动测量事实一致性：这捕捉到了这样的直觉：在给定不太相关的基础文档的情况下，模型应该不太可能产生输出。在实践中，我们通过提供一个包含两个基础文档的模型来衡量这一点，并且该模型应该更喜欢使用与事实更相关的文档。我们提供两个评估集来衡量这一点。应用我们的新评估，我们提出了多种改进强基线的新方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过事实性消融方法评估基于事实的内容转换生成效果，解决大模型生成文本事实错误及缺乏自动评估标准的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有大模型常生成事实错误且缺乏可衡量的事实性评估标准，导致事实性生成任务难以优化。
AI.method: 引入事实消融概念，通过对比模型在不同相关性事实文档下的生成偏好，构建两个评估集衡量事实一致性。
AI.result: 提出的新方法在评估集上显著优于现有基线模型，验证了事实消融的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 事实消融为事实性生成提供了可量化的评估路径，推动了基于外部事实文档的生成研究进展。

authors_text: Qiji Ze,Shuai Wu,Jize Dai,Sophie Leanza,Gentaro Ikeda,Phillip C. Yang,Gianluca Iaccarino,Ruike Renee Zhao
title: Spinning-enabled Wireless Amphibious Origami Millirobot
title_zh: 可旋转的无线两栖折纸 Millirobot
abstract: Wireless millimeter-scale origami robots that can locomote in narrow spaces and morph their shapes have recently been explored with great potential for biomedical applications. Existing millimeter-scale origami devices usually require separate geometrical components for locomotion and functions, which increases the complexity of the robotic systems and their operation upon limited locomotion modes. Additionally, none of them can achieve both on-ground and in-water locomotion. Here we report a magnetically actuated amphibious origami millirobot that integrates capabilities of spinning-enabled multimodal locomotion, controlled delivery of liquid medicine, and cargo transportation with wireless operation. This millirobot takes full advantage of the geometrical features and folding/unfolding capability of Kresling origami, a triangulated hollow cylinder, to fulfill multifunction: its geometrical features are exploited for generating omnidirectional locomotion in various working environments, including on unstructured ground, in liquids, and at air-liquid interfaces through rolling, flipping, and spinning-induced propulsion; the folding/unfolding is utilized as a pumping mechanism for integrated multifunctionality such as controlled delivery of liquid medicine; furthermore, the spinning motion provides a sucking mechanism for targeted solid cargo transportation. This origami millirobot breaks the conventional way of utilizing origami folding only for shape reconfiguration and integrates multiple functions in one simple body. We anticipate the reported magnetic amphibious origami millirobots have the potential to serve as minimally invasive devices for biomedical diagnoses and treatments.
summary: Wireless millimeter-scale origami robots that can locomote in narrow spaces and morph their shapes have recently been explored with great potential for biomedical applications. Existing millimeter-scale origami devices usually require separate geometrical components for locomotion and functions, which increases the complexity of the robotic systems and their operation upon limited locomotion modes. Additionally, none of them can achieve both on-ground and in-water locomotion. Here we report a magnetically actuated amphibious origami millirobot that integrates capabilities of spinning-enabled multimodal locomotion, controlled delivery of liquid medicine, and cargo transportation with wireless operation. This millirobot takes full advantage of the geometrical features and folding/unfolding capability of Kresling origami, a triangulated hollow cylinder, to fulfill multifunction: its geometrical features are exploited for generating omnidirectional locomotion in various working environments, including on unstructured ground, in liquids, and at air-liquid interfaces through rolling, flipping, and spinning-induced propulsion; the folding/unfolding is utilized as a pumping mechanism for integrated multifunctionality such as controlled delivery of liquid medicine; furthermore, the spinning motion provides a sucking mechanism for targeted solid cargo transportation. This origami millirobot breaks the conventional way of utilizing origami folding only for shape reconfiguration and integrates multiple functions in one simple body. We anticipate the reported magnetic amphibious origami millirobots have the potential to serve as minimally invasive devices for biomedical diagnoses and treatments.
abstract_zh: 无线毫米级折纸机器人可以在狭窄的空间中移动并改变其形状，最近得到了探索，在生物医学应用方面具有巨大的潜力。现有的毫米级折纸设备通常需要单独的几何组件来实现运动和功能，这增加了机器人系统及其在有限运动模式下操作的复杂性。此外，它们都无法同时实现地面和水中运动。在这里，我们报告了一种磁驱动的两栖折纸微型机器人，它集成了旋转多模式运动、液体药物的受控输送以及无线操作的货物运输等功能。这款微型机器人充分利用了Kresling折纸（一种三角空心圆柱体）的几何特征和折叠/展开能力来实现多功能：利用其几何特征在各种工作环境中产生全向运动，包括在非结构化地面、液体中以及在气液界面上通过滚动、翻转和旋转引起的推进力；折叠/展开用作泵送机构，用于集成多功能性，例如液体药物的控制输送；此外，旋转运动为有针对性的固体货物运输提供了吸取机制。这款折纸微型机器人打破了仅利用折纸折叠来重新配置形状的传统方式，并将多种功能集成在一个简单的机身中。我们预计所报道的磁性两栖折纸微型机器人有潜力作为生物医学诊断和治疗的微创设备。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无线两栖折纸微型机器人，实现多模态运动、液体药物控制输送及固体货物运输功能。
AI.motivation: 现有毫米级折纸机器人存在结构复杂、运动模式单一且无法同时实现陆地与水中移动的问题，亟需开发多功能一体化微型机器人。
AI.method: 基于Kresling折纸结构设计，通过几何特征实现多环境滚动/翻转/旋转推进，利用折叠/展开机制构建泵送系统，结合旋转运动实现药物输送与货物吸附。
AI.result: 机器人可实现陆地、液体及气液界面的全向运动，具备液体药物精准释放和固体货物定向运输能力，集成多种功能于单一结构。
AI.conclusion: 该两栖折纸微型机器人突破传统折纸仅用于形态重构的局限，为微创医疗诊断与治疗提供新型智能设备方案。

motivation: 现有毫米级折纸机器人存在结构复杂、运动模式单一且无法同时实现陆地与水中移动的问题，亟需开发多功能一体化微型机器人。
method: 基于Kresling折纸结构设计，通过几何特征实现多环境滚动/翻转/旋转推进，利用折叠/展开机制构建泵送系统，结合旋转运动实现药物输送与货物吸附。
result: 机器人可实现陆地、液体及气液界面的全向运动，具备液体药物精准释放和固体货物定向运输能力，集成多种功能于单一结构。
conclusion: 该两栖折纸微型机器人突破传统折纸仅用于形态重构的局限，为微创医疗诊断与治疗提供新型智能设备方案。
search_text: Spinning-enabled Wireless Amphibious Origami Millirobot 可旋转的无线两栖折纸 Millirobot Wireless millimeter-scale origami robots that can locomote in narrow spaces and morph their shapes have recently been explored with great potential for biomedical applications. Existing millimeter-scale origami devices usually require separate geometrical components for locomotion and functions, which increases the complexity of the robotic systems and their operation upon limited locomotion modes. Additionally, none of them can achieve both on-ground and in-water locomotion. Here we report a magnetically actuated amphibious origami millirobot that integrates capabilities of spinning-enabled multimodal locomotion, controlled delivery of liquid medicine, and cargo transportation with wireless operation. This millirobot takes full advantage of the geometrical features and folding/unfolding capability of Kresling origami, a triangulated hollow cylinder, to fulfill multifunction: its geometrical features are exploited for generating omnidirectional locomotion in various working environments, including on unstructured ground, in liquids, and at air-liquid interfaces through rolling, flipping, and spinning-induced propulsion; the folding/unfolding is utilized as a pumping mechanism for integrated multifunctionality such as controlled delivery of liquid medicine; furthermore, the spinning motion provides a sucking mechanism for targeted solid cargo transportation. This origami millirobot breaks the conventional way of utilizing origami folding only for shape reconfiguration and integrates multiple functions in one simple body. We anticipate the reported magnetic amphibious origami millirobots have the potential to serve as minimally invasive devices for biomedical diagnoses and treatments. 无线毫米级折纸机器人可以在狭窄的空间中移动并改变其形状，最近得到了探索，在生物医学应用方面具有巨大的潜力。现有的毫米级折纸设备通常需要单独的几何组件来实现运动和功能，这增加了机器人系统及其在有限运动模式下操作的复杂性。此外，它们都无法同时实现地面和水中运动。在这里，我们报告了一种磁驱动的两栖折纸微型机器人，它集成了旋转多模式运动、液体药物的受控输送以及无线操作的货物运输等功能。这款微型机器人充分利用了Kresling折纸（一种三角空心圆柱体）的几何特征和折叠/展开能力来实现多功能：利用其几何特征在各种工作环境中产生全向运动，包括在非结构化地面、液体中以及在气液界面上通过滚动、翻转和旋转引起的推进力；折叠/展开用作泵送机构，用于集成多功能性，例如液体药物的控制输送；此外，旋转运动为有针对性的固体货物运输提供了吸取机制。这款折纸微型机器人打破了仅利用折纸折叠来重新配置形状的传统方式，并将多种功能集成在一个简单的机身中。我们预计所报道的磁性两栖折纸微型机器人有潜力作为生物医学诊断和治疗的微创设备。 本文提出一种无线两栖折纸微型机器人，实现多模态运动、液体药物控制输送及固体货物运输功能。 Qiji Ze,Shuai Wu,Jize Dai,Sophie Leanza,Gentaro Ikeda,Phillip C. Yang,Gianluca Iaccarino,Ruike Renee Zhao cs.RO,physics.app-ph

authors_text: Zakaria Aldeneh,Masha Fedzechkina,Skyler Seto,Katherine Metcalf,Miguel Sarabia,Nicholas Apostoloff,Barry-John Theobald
title: On the role of Lip Articulation in Visual Speech Perception
title_zh: 论唇部发音在视觉言语感知中的作用
abstract: Generating realistic lip motion from audio to simulate speech production is critical for driving natural character animation. Previous research has shown that traditional metrics used to optimize and assess models for generating lip motion from speech are not a good indicator of subjective opinion of animation quality. Devising metrics that align with subjective opinion first requires understanding what impacts human perception of quality. In this work, we focus on the degree of articulation and run a series of experiments to study how articulation strength impacts human perception of lip motion accompanying speech. Specifically, we study how increasing under-articulated (dampened) and over-articulated (exaggerated) lip motion affects human perception of quality. We examine the impact of articulation strength on human perception when considering only lip motion, where viewers are presented with talking faces represented by landmarks, and in the context of embodied characters, where viewers are presented with photo-realistic videos. Our results show that viewers prefer over-articulated lip motion consistently more than under-articulated lip motion and that this preference generalizes across different speakers and embodiments.
summary: Generating realistic lip motion from audio to simulate speech production is critical for driving natural character animation. Previous research has shown that traditional metrics used to optimize and assess models for generating lip motion from speech are not a good indicator of subjective opinion of animation quality. Devising metrics that align with subjective opinion first requires understanding what impacts human perception of quality. In this work, we focus on the degree of articulation and run a series of experiments to study how articulation strength impacts human perception of lip motion accompanying speech. Specifically, we study how increasing under-articulated (dampened) and over-articulated (exaggerated) lip motion affects human perception of quality. We examine the impact of articulation strength on human perception when considering only lip motion, where viewers are presented with talking faces represented by landmarks, and in the context of embodied characters, where viewers are presented with photo-realistic videos. Our results show that viewers prefer over-articulated lip motion consistently more than under-articulated lip motion and that this preference generalizes across different speakers and embodiments.
abstract_zh: 从音频生成逼真的嘴唇运动来模拟语音生成对于驱动自然角色动画至关重要。先前的研究表明，用于优化和评估从语音生成嘴唇运动的模型的传统指标并不能很好地反映动画质量的主观意见。设计与主观意见相一致的指标首先需要了解影响人类质量感知的因素。在这项工作中，我们关注发音的程度，并进行了一系列实验来研究发音强度如何影响人类对伴随语音的嘴唇运动的感知。具体来说，我们研究增加关节不足（减弱）和过度关节（夸张）的嘴唇运动如何影响人类对质量的感知。我们研究了仅考虑嘴唇运动时发音强度对人类感知的影响，在这种情况下，观众会看到由地标代表的会说话的面孔，而在具体角色的背景下，观众会看到逼真的视频。我们的结果表明，观众始终比低清晰度的嘴唇运动更喜欢过度清晰度的嘴唇运动，并且这种偏好在不同的扬声器和实施例中普遍存在。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨嘴唇运动强度对人类视觉语音感知的影响，通过实验分析不足与过度嘴唇运动对动画质量感知的差异。
AI.motivation: 传统评估嘴唇运动生成模型的指标无法准确反映人类主观质量评价，需明确影响视觉语音感知的关键因素以改进模型优化方向。
AI.method: 设计对比实验，分别在仅展示嘴唇运动（关键点标记）和完整角色视频两种场景下，测试不同强度（不足/过度）嘴唇运动对观众感知的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明观众普遍更偏好过度嘴唇运动（夸张表现），且该偏好在不同说话者和角色呈现形式中保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 嘴唇运动强度显著影响视觉语音感知质量，过度表现优于不足表现，为生成模型评估指标优化提供了新方向。

authors_text: Menaka Naazare,Francisco Garcia Rosas,Dirk Schulz
title: Online Next-Best-View Planner for 3D-Exploration and Inspection With a Mobile Manipulator Robot
title_zh: 使用移动机械手机器人进行 3D 探索和检查的在线次最佳视图规划器
abstract: Robotic systems performing end-user oriented autonomous exploration can be deployed in different scenarios which not only require mapping but also simultaneous inspection of regions of interest for the end-user. In this work, we propose a novel Next-Best-View (NBV) planner which can perform full exploration and user-oriented exploration with inspection of the regions of interest using a mobile manipulator robot. We address the exploration-inspection problem as an instance of Multi-Objective Optimization (MOO) and propose a weighted-sum-based information gain function for computing NBVs for the RGB-D camera mounted on the arm. For both types of exploration tasks, we compare our approach with an existing state-of-the-art exploration method as the baseline and demonstrate our improvements in terms of total volume mapped and lower computational requirements. The real experiments with a mobile manipulator robot demonstrate the practicability and effectiveness of our approach outdoors.
summary: Robotic systems performing end-user oriented autonomous exploration can be deployed in different scenarios which not only require mapping but also simultaneous inspection of regions of interest for the end-user. In this work, we propose a novel Next-Best-View (NBV) planner which can perform full exploration and user-oriented exploration with inspection of the regions of interest using a mobile manipulator robot. We address the exploration-inspection problem as an instance of Multi-Objective Optimization (MOO) and propose a weighted-sum-based information gain function for computing NBVs for the RGB-D camera mounted on the arm. For both types of exploration tasks, we compare our approach with an existing state-of-the-art exploration method as the baseline and demonstrate our improvements in terms of total volume mapped and lower computational requirements. The real experiments with a mobile manipulator robot demonstrate the practicability and effectiveness of our approach outdoors.
abstract_zh: 执行面向最终用户的自主探索的机器人系统可以部署在不同的场景中，这不仅需要测绘，还需要同时检查最终用户感兴趣的区域。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的下一个最佳视图（NBV）规划器，它可以通过使用移动机械手机器人检查感兴趣区域来执行全面探索和面向用户的探索。我们将探索检查问题作为多目标优化 (MOO) 的一个实例，并提出一种基于加权和的信息增益函数，用于计算安装在手臂上的 RGB-D 相机的 NBV。对于这两种类型的探索任务，我们将我们的方法与现有最先进的探索方法作为基线进行比较，并展示我们在映射总体积和降低计算要求方面的改进。移动机械手机器人的真实实验证明了我们的方法在户外的实用性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线下一最佳视角（NBV）规划器，利用移动机械臂机器人实现三维探索与检查任务，通过多目标优化方法提升效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时满足自主探索与用户指定区域检查需求，且存在计算效率不足的问题。
AI.method: 将探索-检查问题建模为多目标优化问题，设计基于加权和的信息增益函数计算RGB-D相机的NBV，并与现有方法对比验证改进效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在映射体积、计算效率及户外实际场景中均优于基准方法，验证了可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的NBV规划器有效平衡了探索与检查任务需求，为移动机械臂在复杂环境中的应用提供了高效解决方案。
