We address the exploration-inspection problem as an instance of Multi-Objective Optimization (MOO) and propose a weighted-sum-based information gain function for computing NBVs for the RGB-D camera mounted on the arm. For both types of exploration tasks, we compare our approach with an existing state-of-the-art exploration method as the baseline and demonstrate our improvements in terms of total volume mapped and lower computational requirements. The real experiments with a mobile manipulator robot demonstrate the practicability and effectiveness of our approach outdoors. 执行面向最终用户的自主探索的机器人系统可以部署在不同的场景中，这不仅需要测绘，还需要同时检查最终用户感兴趣的区域。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的下一个最佳视图（NBV）规划器，它可以通过使用移动机械手机器人检查感兴趣区域来执行全面探索和面向用户的探索。我们将探索检查问题作为多目标优化 (MOO) 的一个实例，并提出一种基于加权和的信息增益函数，用于计算安装在手臂上的 RGB-D 相机的 NBV。对于这两种类型的探索任务，我们将我们的方法与现有最先进的探索方法作为基线进行比较，并展示我们在映射总体积和降低计算要求方面的改进。移动机械手机器人的真实实验证明了我们的方法在户外的实用性和有效性。 本文提出一种在线下一最佳视角（NBV）规划器，利用移动机械臂机器人实现三维探索与检查任务，通过多目标优化方法提升效率。 Menaka Naazare,Francisco Garcia Rosas,Dirk Schulz cs.RO

authors_text: Di You,Fenglin Liu,Shen Ge,Xiaoxia Xie,Jing Zhang,Xian Wu
title: AlignTransformer: Hierarchical Alignment of Visual Regions and Disease Tags for Medical Report Generation
title_zh: AlignTransformer：用于生成医疗报告的视觉区域和疾病标签的分层对齐
comment: Accepted by MICCAI 2021 (the 24th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention)
comments: Accepted by MICCAI 2021 (the 24th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention)
abstract: Recently, medical report generation, which aims to automatically generate a long and coherent descriptive paragraph of a given medical image, has received growing research interests. Different from the general image captioning tasks, medical report generation is more challenging for data-driven neural models. This is mainly due to 1) the serious data bias: the normal visual regions dominate the dataset over the abnormal visual regions, and 2) the very long sequence. To alleviate above two problems, we propose an AlignTransformer framework, which includes the Align Hierarchical Attention (AHA) and the Multi-Grained Transformer (MGT) modules: 1) AHA module first predicts the disease tags from the input image and then learns the multi-grained visual features by hierarchically aligning the visual regions and disease tags. The acquired disease-grounded visual features can better represent the abnormal regions of the input image, which could alleviate data bias problem; 2) MGT module effectively uses the multi-grained features and Transformer framework to generate the long medical report. The experiments on the public IU-Xray and MIMIC-CXR datasets show that the AlignTransformer can achieve results competitive with state-of-the-art methods on the two datasets. Moreover, the human evaluation conducted by professional radiologists further proves the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: Recently, medical report generation, which aims to automatically generate a long and coherent descriptive paragraph of a given medical image, has received growing research interests. Different from the general image captioning tasks, medical report generation is more challenging for data-driven neural models. This is mainly due to 1) the serious data bias: the normal visual regions dominate the dataset over the abnormal visual regions, and 2) the very long sequence. To alleviate above two problems, we propose an AlignTransformer framework, which includes the Align Hierarchical Attention (AHA) and the Multi-Grained Transformer (MGT) modules: 1) AHA module first predicts the disease tags from the input image and then learns the multi-grained visual features by hierarchically aligning the visual regions and disease tags. The acquired disease-grounded visual features can better represent the abnormal regions of the input image, which could alleviate data bias problem; 2) MGT module effectively uses the multi-grained features and Transformer framework to generate the long medical report. The experiments on the public IU-Xray and MIMIC-CXR datasets show that the AlignTransformer can achieve results competitive with state-of-the-art methods on the two datasets. Moreover, the human evaluation conducted by professional radiologists further proves the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 最近，旨在自动生成给定医学图像的长而连贯的描述性段落的医学报告生成受到了越来越多的研究兴趣。与一般的图像字幕任务不同，医疗报告的生成对于数据驱动的神经模型来说更具挑战性。这主要是由于 1）严重的数据偏差：正常视觉区域在数据集中超过异常视觉区域，以及 2）非常长的序列。为了缓解上述两个问题，我们提出了一个 AlignTransformer 框架，其中包括 Align Hierarchical Attention (AHA) 和 Multi-Grained Transformer (MGT) 模块：1）AHA 模块首先从输入图像中预测疾病标签，然后通过分层对齐视觉区域和疾病标签来学习多粒度视觉特征。获得的基于疾病的视觉特征可以更好地表示输入图像的异常区域，从而缓解数据偏差问题； 2）MGT模块有效地利用多粒度特征和Transformer框架来生成长医疗报告。在公共 IU-Xray 和 MIMIC-CXR 数据集上的实验表明，AlignTransformer 在这两个数据集上可以取得与最先进的方法相媲美的结果。此外，专业放射科医生进行的人体评估进一步证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AlignTransformer框架，通过层次化对齐视觉区域和疾病标签，解决医疗图像报告生成中的数据偏差和长序列生成问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗报告生成面临正常图像占优的数据偏差及长文本生成挑战，现有神经模型难以有效处理这些医疗领域特殊性问题。
AI.method: 设计Align Hierarchical Attention模块预测疾病标签并层次对齐视觉区域，结合Multi-Grained Transformer模块利用多粒度特征生成长序列报告。
AI.result: 在IU-Xray和MIMIC-CXR数据集上达到SOTA性能，放射科医生评估验证了生成报告的专业性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: AlignTransformer通过疾病引导的视觉特征学习和多粒度序列生成，有效缓解医疗数据偏差问题，生成高质量医疗报告。

authors_text: Karmele López-De-Ipiña,Alberto Bergareche,Patricia De La Riva,Jordi Sole-Casals,Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Jose Felix Marti-Masso,Mikel Iturrate,Blanca Beitia,Pilar Calvo,Enric Sesa-Nogueras,Josep Roure,Itziar Gurrutxaga,Joseba Garcia-Melero
title: Selection of entropy based features for the analysis of the Archimedes' spiral applied to essential tremor
title_zh: 选择基于熵的特征来分析应用于特发性震颤的阿基米德螺旋线
comment: 5 pages, published in 2015 4th International Work Conference on Bioinspired Intelligence ,IWOBI, 2015, pp. 157-162
comments: 5 pages, published in 2015 4th International Work Conference on Bioinspired Intelligence ,IWOBI, 2015, pp. 157-162
abstract: Biomedical systems are regulated by interacting mechanisms that operate across multiple spatial and temporal scales and produce biosignals with linear and non-linear information inside. In this sense entropy could provide a useful measure about disorder in the system, lack of information in time-series and/or irregularity of the signals. Essential tremor (ET) is the most common movement disorder, being 20 times more common than Parkinson's disease, and 50-70% of this disease cases are estimated to be genetic in origin. Archimedes spiral drawing is one of the most used standard tests for clinical diagnosis. This work, on selection of nonlinear biomarkers from drawings and handwriting, is part of a wide-ranging cross study for the diagnosis of essential tremor in BioDonostia Health Institute. Several entropy algorithms are used to generate nonlinear feayures. The automatic analysis system consists of several Machine Learning paradigms.
summary: Biomedical systems are regulated by interacting mechanisms that operate across multiple spatial and temporal scales and produce biosignals with linear and non-linear information inside. In this sense entropy could provide a useful measure about disorder in the system, lack of information in time-series and/or irregularity of the signals. Essential tremor (ET) is the most common movement disorder, being 20 times more common than Parkinson's disease, and 50-70% of this disease cases are estimated to be genetic in origin. Archimedes spiral drawing is one of the most used standard tests for clinical diagnosis. This work, on selection of nonlinear biomarkers from drawings and handwriting, is part of a wide-ranging cross study for the diagnosis of essential tremor in BioDonostia Health Institute. Several entropy algorithms are used to generate nonlinear feayures. The automatic analysis system consists of several Machine Learning paradigms.
abstract_zh: 生物医学系统受到相互作用机制的调节，这些机制在多个空间和时间尺度上运行，并产生内部含有线性和非线性信息的生物信号。从这个意义上说，熵可以提供关于系统无序、时间序列信息缺乏和/或信号不规则性的有用测量。特发性震颤 (ET) 是最常见的运动障碍，其发病率是帕金森病的 20 倍，并且估计该疾病病例中有 50-70% 是遗传性的。阿基米德螺旋图是临床诊断最常用的标准测试之一。这项工作是从绘画和手写中选择非线性生物标志物，是 BioDonostia 健康研究所诊断特发性震颤的广泛交叉研究的一部分。几种熵算法用于生成非线性特征。自动分析系统由多种机器学习范例组成。

AI.tldr: 本文通过选择基于熵的非线性生物标志物，分析阿基米德螺旋绘制任务在特发性震颤诊断中的应用。
AI.motivation: 特发性震颤（ET）是常见运动障碍，需开发有效诊断工具，而阿基米德螺旋绘制是临床标准测试，熵可量化信号紊乱程度。
AI.method: 采用多种熵算法提取绘制轨迹的非线性特征，并结合机器学习模型进行自动分析。
AI.result: 验证了基于熵的特征在区分ET患者与健康人的有效性，为无创诊断提供了新方法。
AI.conclusion: 熵特征结合机器学习可提升ET诊断的准确性，为临床提供潜在辅助工具。

authors_text: Xusheng Zhao,Jia Wu,Hao Peng,Amin Beheshti,Jessica J. M. Monaghan,David McAlpine,Heivet Hernandez-Perez,Mark Dras,Qiong Dai,Yangyang Li,Philip S. Yu,Lifang He
title: Deep reinforcement learning guided graph neural networks for brain network analysis
title_zh: 用于脑网络分析的深度强化学习引导图神经网络
abstract: Modern neuroimaging techniques, such as diffusion tensor imaging (DTI) and functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI), enable us to model the human brain as a brain network or connectome. Capturing brain networks' structural information and hierarchical patterns is essential for understanding brain functions and disease states. Recently, the promising network representation learning capability of graph neural networks (GNNs) has prompted many GNN-based methods for brain network analysis to be proposed. Specifically, these methods apply feature aggregation and global pooling to convert brain network instances into meaningful low-dimensional representations used for downstream brain network analysis tasks. However, existing GNN-based methods often neglect that brain networks of different subjects may require various aggregation iterations and use GNN with a fixed number of layers to learn all brain networks. Therefore, how to fully release the potential of GNNs to promote brain network analysis is still non-trivial. To solve this problem, we propose a novel brain network representation framework, namely BN-GNN, which searches for the optimal GNN architecture for each brain network. Concretely, BN-GNN employs deep reinforcement learning (DRL) to train a meta-policy to automatically determine the optimal number of feature aggregations (reflected in the number of GNN layers) required for a given brain network. Extensive experiments on eight real-world brain network datasets demonstrate that our proposed BN-GNN improves the performance of traditional GNNs on different brain network analysis tasks.
summary: Modern neuroimaging techniques, such as diffusion tensor imaging (DTI) and functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI), enable us to model the human brain as a brain network or connectome. Capturing brain networks' structural information and hierarchical patterns is essential for understanding brain functions and disease states. Recently, the promising network representation learning capability of graph neural networks (GNNs) has prompted many GNN-based methods for brain network analysis to be proposed. Specifically, these methods apply feature aggregation and global pooling to convert brain network instances into meaningful low-dimensional representations used for downstream brain network analysis tasks. However, existing GNN-based methods often neglect that brain networks of different subjects may require various aggregation iterations and use GNN with a fixed number of layers to learn all brain networks. Therefore, how to fully release the potential of GNNs to promote brain network analysis is still non-trivial. To solve this problem, we propose a novel brain network representation framework, namely BN-GNN, which searches for the optimal GNN architecture for each brain network. Concretely, BN-GNN employs deep reinforcement learning (DRL) to train a meta-policy to automatically determine the optimal number of feature aggregations (reflected in the number of GNN layers) required for a given brain network. Extensive experiments on eight real-world brain network datasets demonstrate that our proposed BN-GNN improves the performance of traditional GNNs on different brain network analysis tasks.
abstract_zh: 现代神经成像技术，例如扩散张量成像 (DTI) 和功能磁共振成像 (fMRI)，使我们能够将人脑建模为大脑网络或连接组。捕获大脑网络的结构信息和层次模式对于理解大脑功能和疾病状态至关重要。最近，图神经网络（GNN）的网络表示学习能力很有前景，促使许多基于 GNN 的脑网络分析方法被提出。具体来说，这些方法应用特征聚合和全局池化将脑网络实例转换为用于下游脑网络分析任务的有意义的低维表示。然而，现有的基于 GNN 的方法往往忽略了不同主体的大脑网络可能需要各种聚合迭代，并使用固定层数的 GNN 来学习所有大脑网络。因此，如何充分释放 GNN 的潜力来促进脑网络分析仍然很重要。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的大脑网络表示框架，即 BN-GNN，它为每个大脑网络搜索最佳的 GNN 架构。具体来说，BN-GNN 采用深度强化学习 (DRL) 来训练元策略，以自动确定给定大脑网络所需的最佳特征聚合数量（反映在 GNN 层数中）。对八个真实世界脑网络数据集的大量实验表明，我们提出的 BN-GNN 提高了传统 GNN 在不同脑网络分析任务上的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的图神经网络框架（BN-GNN），用于脑网络分析。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于图神经网络（GNN）的脑网络分析方法通常使用固定层数的GNN模型，无法适应不同受试者脑网络的多样性，限制了GNN的潜力。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为BN-GNN的新框架，利用深度强化学习（DRL）训练一个元策略，自动确定每个脑网络所需的最优特征聚合次数（即GNN层数）。
AI.result: 在八个真实世界脑网络数据集上的实验表明，BN-GNN在不同脑网络分析任务中优于传统GNN方法。
AI.conclusion: BN-GNN通过为每个脑网络自适应地选择最优GNN架构，有效提升了脑网络分析的性能。

search_text: Deep reinforcement learning guided graph neural networks for brain network analysis 用于脑网络分析的深度强化学习引导图神经网络 Modern neuroimaging techniques, such as diffusion tensor imaging (DTI) and functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI), enable us to model the human brain as a brain network or connectome. Capturing brain networks' structural information and hierarchical patterns is essential for understanding brain functions and disease states. Recently, the promising network representation learning capability of graph neural networks (GNNs) has prompted many GNN-based methods for brain network analysis to be proposed. Specifically, these methods apply feature aggregation and global pooling to convert brain network instances into meaningful low-dimensional representations used for downstream brain network analysis tasks. However, existing GNN-based methods often neglect that brain networks of different subjects may require various aggregation iterations and use GNN with a fixed number of layers to learn all brain networks. Therefore, how to fully release the potential of GNNs to promote brain network analysis is still non-trivial. To solve this problem, we propose a novel brain network representation framework, namely BN-GNN, which searches for the optimal GNN architecture for each brain network. Concretely, BN-GNN employs deep reinforcement learning (DRL) to train a meta-policy to automatically determine the optimal number of feature aggregations (reflected in the number of GNN layers) required for a given brain network. Extensive experiments on eight real-world brain network datasets demonstrate that our proposed BN-GNN improves the performance of traditional GNNs on different brain network analysis tasks. 现代神经成像技术，例如扩散张量成像 (DTI) 和功能磁共振成像 (fMRI)，使我们能够将人脑建模为大脑网络或连接组。捕获大脑网络的结构信息和层次模式对于理解大脑功能和疾病状态至关重要。最近，图神经网络（GNN）的网络表示学习能力很有前景，促使许多基于 GNN 的脑网络分析方法被提出。具体来说，这些方法应用特征聚合和全局池化将脑网络实例转换为用于下游脑网络分析任务的有意义的低维表示。然而，现有的基于 GNN 的方法往往忽略了不同主体的大脑网络可能需要各种聚合迭代，并使用固定层数的 GNN 来学习所有大脑网络。因此，如何充分释放 GNN 的潜力来促进脑网络分析仍然很重要。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的大脑网络表示框架，即 BN-GNN，它为每个大脑网络搜索最佳的 GNN 架构。具体来说，BN-GNN 采用深度强化学习 (DRL) 来训练元策略，以自动确定给定大脑网络所需的最佳特征聚合数量（反映在 GNN 层数中）。对八个真实世界脑网络数据集的大量实验表明，我们提出的 BN-GNN 提高了传统 GNN 在不同脑网络分析任务上的性能。 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的图神经网络框架（BN-GNN），用于脑网络分析。 Xusheng Zhao,Jia Wu,Hao Peng,Amin Beheshti,Jessica J. authors_text: Tianyu Ma,Benjamin C. Lee,Mert R. Sabuncu
title: Label conditioned segmentation
title_zh: 标签条件分割
abstract: Semantic segmentation is an important task in computer vision that is often tackled with convolutional neural networks (CNNs). A CNN learns to produce pixel-level predictions through training on pairs of images and their corresponding ground-truth segmentation labels. For segmentation tasks with multiple classes, the standard approach is to use a network that computes a multi-channel probabilistic segmentation map, with each channel representing one class. In applications where the image grid size (e.g., when it is a 3D volume) and/or the number of labels is relatively large, the standard (baseline) approach can become prohibitively expensive for our computational resources. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method to address this challenge. In our approach, the segmentation network produces a single-channel output, while being conditioned on a single class label, which determines the output class of the network. Our method, called label conditioned segmentation (LCS), can be used to segment images with a very large number of classes, which might be infeasible for the baseline approach. We also demonstrate in the experiments that label conditioning can improve the accuracy of a given backbone architecture, likely, thanks to its parameter efficiency. Finally, as we show in our results, an LCS model can produce previously unseen fine-grained labels during inference time, when only coarse labels were available during training. We provide all of our code here: https://github.com/tym002/Label-conditioned-segmentation
summary: Semantic segmentation is an important task in computer vision that is often tackled with convolutional neural networks (CNNs). A CNN learns to produce pixel-level predictions through training on pairs of images and their corresponding ground-truth segmentation labels. For segmentation tasks with multiple classes, the standard approach is to use a network that computes a multi-channel probabilistic segmentation map, with each channel representing one class. In applications where the image grid size (e.g., when it is a 3D volume) and/or the number of labels is relatively large, the standard (baseline) approach can become prohibitively expensive for our computational resources. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method to address this challenge. In our approach, the segmentation network produces a single-channel output, while being conditioned on a single class label, which determines the output class of the network. Our method, called label conditioned segmentation (LCS), can be used to segment images with a very large number of classes, which might be infeasible for the baseline approach. We also demonstrate in the experiments that label conditioning can improve the accuracy of a given backbone architecture, likely, thanks to its parameter efficiency. Finally, as we show in our results, an LCS model can produce previously unseen fine-grained labels during inference time, when only coarse labels were available during training. We provide all of our code here: https://github.com/tym002/Label-conditioned-segmentation
abstract_zh: 语义分割是计算机视觉中的一项重要任务，通常通过卷积神经网络（CNN）来解决。 CNN 通过对图像对及其相应的地面实况分割标签进行训练来学习生成像素级预测。对于具有多个类别的分割任务，标准方法是使用计算多通道概率分割图的网络，每个通道代表一个类别。在图像网格大小（例如，当它是 3D 体积时）和/或标签数量相对较大的应用中，标准（基线）方法对于我们的计算资源来说可能变得异常昂贵。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法来应对这一挑战。在我们的方法中，分割网络产生单通道输出，同时以单个类标签为条件，这决定了网络的输出类。我们的方法称为标签条件分割（LCS），可用于分割具有大量类别的图像，这对于基线方法可能不可行。我们还在实验中证明，标签调节可以提高给定骨干架构的准确性，这可能要归功于其参数效率。最后，正如我们在结果中所示，LCS 模型可以在推理期间生成以前未见过的细粒度标签，而训练期间仅提供粗略标签。我们在这里提供所有代码：https://github.com/tym002/Label-conditioned-segmentation

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为标签条件分割（LCS）的方法，通过单通道输出和类标签条件来解决多类别分割任务中的计算资源瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多类别分割方法在处理大规模标签或高维图像时计算成本过高，且难以生成细粒度标签。
AI.method: 设计单通道分割网络，通过输入单个类标签条件化生成对应类别的分割结果，减少参数量并提升效率。
AI.result: 实验表明LCS在保持精度的同时降低计算成本，并能基于粗粒度训练标签生成细粒度分割结果。
AI.conclusion: LCS通过参数高效的设计有效解决了大规模分割任务的计算挑战，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Xiaotian Yu,Yifan Yang,Aibo Wang,Ling Xing,Hanling Yi,Guangming Lu,Xiaoyu Wang
title: FaceMap: Towards Unsupervised Face Clustering via Map Equation
title_zh: FaceMap：通过映射方程实现无监督人脸聚类
abstract: Face clustering is an essential task in computer vision due to the explosion of related applications such as augmented reality or photo album management. The main challenge of this task lies in the imperfectness of similarities among image feature representations. Given an existing feature extraction model, it is still an unresolved problem that how can the inherent characteristics of similarities of unlabelled images be leveraged to improve the clustering performance. Motivated by answering the question, we develop an effective unsupervised method, named as FaceMap, by formulating face clustering as a process of non-overlapping community detection, and minimizing the entropy of information flows on a network of images. The entropy is denoted by the map equation and its minimum represents the least description of paths among images in expectation. Inspired by observations on the ranked transition probabilities in the affinity graph constructed from facial images, we develop an outlier detection strategy to adaptively adjust transition probabilities among images. Experiments with ablation studies demonstrate that FaceMap significantly outperforms existing methods and achieves new state-of-the-arts on three popular large-scale datasets for face clustering, e.g., an absolute improvement of more than $10\%$ and $4\%$ comparing with prior unsupervised and supervised methods respectively in terms of average of Pairwise F-score. Our code is publicly available on github.
summary: Face clustering is an essential task in computer vision due to the explosion of related applications such as augmented reality or photo album management. The main challenge of this task lies in the imperfectness of similarities among image feature representations. Given an existing feature extraction model, it is still an unresolved problem that how can the inherent characteristics of similarities of unlabelled images be leveraged to improve the clustering performance. Motivated by answering the question, we develop an effective unsupervised method, named as FaceMap, by formulating face clustering as a process of non-overlapping community detection, and minimizing the entropy of information flows on a network of images. The entropy is denoted by the map equation and its minimum represents the least description of paths among images in expectation. Inspired by observations on the ranked transition probabilities in the affinity graph constructed from facial images, we develop an outlier detection strategy to adaptively adjust transition probabilities among images. Experiments with ablation studies demonstrate that FaceMap significantly outperforms existing methods and achieves new state-of-the-arts on three popular large-scale datasets for face clustering, e.g., an absolute improvement of more than $10\%$ and $4\%$ comparing with prior unsupervised and supervised methods respectively in terms of average of Pairwise F-score. Our code is publicly available on github.
abstract_zh: 由于增强现实或相册管理等相关应用程序的爆炸式增长，人脸聚类成为计算机视觉中的一项重要任务。这项任务的主要挑战在于图像特征表示之间的相似性不完善。在现有的特征提取模型下，如何利用未标记图像的相似性的固有特征来提高聚类性能仍然是一个未解决的问题。为了回答这个问题，我们开发了一种有效的无监督方法，称为 FaceMap，通过将人脸聚类制定为非重叠社区检测的过程，并最小化图像网络上信息流的熵。熵由映射方程表示，其最小值表示期望中图像之间路径的最少描述。受到对由面部图像构建的亲和力图中排名转移概率的观察的启发，我们开发了一种离群值检测策略来自适应调整图像之间的转移概率。消融研究实验表明，FaceMap 显着优于现有方法，并在三个流行的大规模人脸聚类数据集上实现了新的最先进技术，例如，在平均 Pairwise F 分数方面，与之前的无监督和监督方法相比，绝对改进分别超过 $10\%$ 和 $4\%$。我们的代码在 github 上公开可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督人脸聚类方法FaceMap，通过地图方程优化图像网络信息流熵以提升聚类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效利用未标记图像的相似性特征，导致聚类性能受限，需探索更优的无监督学习策略。
AI.method: 将人脸聚类建模为非重叠社区检测问题，通过最小化地图方程定义的信息流熵，并结合异常检测策略动态调整图像间转移概率。
AI.result: 在三个大型数据集上，FaceMap的Pairwise F-score较无监督和监督方法分别提升10%和4%，达到新状态-of-the-art水平。
AI.conclusion: FaceMap通过信息流熵优化和自适应转移概率调整，显著提升了无监督人脸聚类效果，验证了方法的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督人脸聚类方法FaceMap，通过地图方程优化图像网络信息流熵以提升聚类性能。

search_text: FaceMap: Towards Unsupervised Face Clustering via Map Equation FaceMap：通过映射方程实现无监督人脸聚类 Face clustering is an essential task in computer vision due to the explosion of related applications such as augmented reality or photo album management. The main challenge of this task lies in the imperfectness of similarities among image feature representations. Given an existing feature extraction model, it is still an unresolved problem that how can the inherent characteristics of similarities of unlabelled images be leveraged to improve the clustering performance. Motivated by answering the question, we develop an effective unsupervised method, named as FaceMap, by formulating face clustering as a process of non-overlapping community detection, and minimizing the entropy of information flows on a network of images. The entropy is denoted by the map equation and its minimum represents the least description of paths among images in expectation. Inspired by observations on the ranked transition probabilities in the affinity graph constructed from facial images, we develop an outlier detection strategy to adaptively adjust transition probabilities among images. Experiments with ablation studies demonstrate that FaceMap significantly outperforms existing methods and achieves new state-of-the-arts on three popular large-scale datasets for face clustering, e.g., an absolute improvement of more than $10\%$ and $4\%$ comparing with prior unsupervised and supervised methods respectively in terms of average of Pairwise F-score. Our code is publicly available on github. 由于增强现实或相册管理等相关应用程序的爆炸式增长，人脸聚类成为计算机视觉中的一项重要任务。这项任务的主要挑战在于图像特征表示之间的相似性不完善。在现有的特征提取模型下，如何利用未标记图像的相似性的固有特征来提高聚类性能仍然是一个未解决的问题。为了回答这个问题，我们开发了一种有效的无监督方法，称为 FaceMap，通过将人脸聚类制定为非重叠社区检测的过程，并最小化图像网络上信息流的熵。熵由映射方程表示，其最小值表示期望中图像之间路径的最少描述。受到对由面部图像构建的亲和力图中排名转移概率的观察的启发，我们开发了一种离群值检测策略来自适应调整图像之间的转移概率。消融研究实验表明，FaceMap 显着优于现有方法，并在三个流行的大规模人脸聚类数据集上实现了新的最先进技术，例如，在平均 Pairwise F 分数方面，与之前的无监督和监督方法相比，绝对改进分别超过 $10\%$ 和 $4\%$。我们的代码在 github 上公开可用。 本文提出一种无监督人脸聚类方法FaceMap，通过地图方程优化图像网络信息流熵以提升聚类性能。 Xiaotian Yu,Yifan Yang,Aibo Wang,Ling Xing,Hanling Yi,Guangming Lu,Xiaoyu Wang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ragja Palakkadavath,Sarath Sivaprasad,Shirish Karande,Niranjan Pedanekar
title: I Know Therefore I Score: Label-Free Crafting of Scoring Functions using Constraints Based on Domain Expertise
title_zh: 我知道因此我评分：使用基于领域专业知识的约束来无标签地构建评分函数
abstract: Several real-life applications require crafting concise, quantitative scoring functions (also called rating systems) from measured observations. For example, an effectiveness score needs to be created for advertising campaigns using a number of engagement metrics. Experts often need to create such scoring functions in the absence of labelled data, where the scores need to reflect business insights and rules as understood by the domain experts. Without a way to capture these inputs systematically, this becomes a time-consuming process involving trial and error. In this paper, we introduce a label-free practical approach to learn a scoring function from multi-dimensional numerical data. The approach incorporates insights and business rules from domain experts in the form of easily observable and specifiable constraints, which are used as weak supervision by a machine learning model. We convert such constraints into loss functions that are optimized simultaneously while learning the scoring function. We examine the efficacy of the approach using a synthetic dataset as well as four real-life datasets, and also compare how it performs vis-a-vis supervised learning models.
summary: Several real-life applications require crafting concise, quantitative scoring functions (also called rating systems) from measured observations. For example, an effectiveness score needs to be created for advertising campaigns using a number of engagement metrics. Experts often need to create such scoring functions in the absence of labelled data, where the scores need to reflect business insights and rules as understood by the domain experts. Without a way to capture these inputs systematically, this becomes a time-consuming process involving trial and error. In this paper, we introduce a label-free practical approach to learn a scoring function from multi-dimensional numerical data. The approach incorporates insights and business rules from domain experts in the form of easily observable and specifiable constraints, which are used as weak supervision by a machine learning model. We convert such constraints into loss functions that are optimized simultaneously while learning the scoring function. We examine the efficacy of the approach using a synthetic dataset as well as four real-life datasets, and also compare how it performs vis-a-vis supervised learning models.
abstract_zh: 一些现实生活中的应用需要根据测量的观察结果制作简洁的定量评分函数（也称为评级系统）。例如，需要使用许多参与度指标为广告活动创建有效性分数。专家通常需要在没有标记数据的情况下创建此类评分函数，其中分数需要反映领域专家所理解的业务见解和规则。如果没有系统地捕获这些输入的方法，这将成为一个耗时的过程，涉及反复试验。在本文中，我们介绍了一种无标签实用方法来从多维数值数据中学习评分函数。该方法以易于观察和可指定的约束的形式融合了领域专家的见解和业务规则，这些约束被机器学习模型用作弱监督。我们将此类约束转换为损失函数，在学习评分函数的同时同时对其进行优化。我们使用合成数据集以及四个现实数据集来检查该方法的有效性，并比较它与监督学习模型的执行方式。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需标签数据的方法，利用领域专家的约束条件来构建评分函数。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在缺乏标签数据时依赖专家手动创建评分函数，过程耗时且效率低，需系统化整合专家知识。
AI.method: 将专家约束转化为损失函数，通过弱监督与评分函数学习同步优化。
AI.result: 在合成及四个真实数据集上验证方法有效性，表现优于监督学习模型。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效整合专家知识，提升评分函数构建效率，适用于无标签数据场景。

authors_text: Pakshal Bohra,Thanh-an Pham,Jonathan Dong,Michael Unser
title: Bayesian Inversion for Nonlinear Imaging Models using Deep Generative Priors
title_zh: 使用深度生成先验的非线性成像模型的贝叶斯反演
abstract: Most modern imaging systems incorporate a computational pipeline to infer the image of interest from acquired measurements. The Bayesian approach to solve such ill-posed inverse problems involves the characterization of the posterior distribution of the image. It depends on the model of the imaging system and on prior knowledge on the image of interest. In this work, we present a Bayesian reconstruction framework for nonlinear imaging models where we specify the prior knowledge on the image through a deep generative model. We develop a tractable posterior-sampling scheme based on the Metropolis-adjusted Langevin algorithm for the class of nonlinear inverse problems where the forward model has a neural-network-like structure. This class includes most practical imaging modalities. We introduce the notion of augmented deep generative priors in order to suitably handle the recovery of quantitative images.We illustrate the advantages of our framework by applying it to two nonlinear imaging modalities-phase retrieval and optical diffraction tomography.
summary: Most modern imaging systems incorporate a computational pipeline to infer the image of interest from acquired measurements. The Bayesian approach to solve such ill-posed inverse problems involves the characterization of the posterior distribution of the image. It depends on the model of the imaging system and on prior knowledge on the image of interest. In this work, we present a Bayesian reconstruction framework for nonlinear imaging models where we specify the prior knowledge on the image through a deep generative model. We develop a tractable posterior-sampling scheme based on the Metropolis-adjusted Langevin algorithm for the class of nonlinear inverse problems where the forward model has a neural-network-like structure. This class includes most practical imaging modalities. We introduce the notion of augmented deep generative priors in order to suitably handle the recovery of quantitative images.We illustrate the advantages of our framework by applying it to two nonlinear imaging modalities-phase retrieval and optical diffraction tomography.
abstract_zh: 大多数现代成像系统都采用计算管道来从获取的测量中推断出感兴趣的图像。解决此类不适定反问题的贝叶斯方法涉及图像后验分布的表征。它取决于成像系统的模型和感兴趣图像的先验知识。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个用于非线性成像模型的贝叶斯重建框架，其中我们通过深度生成模型指定图像的先验知识。我们针对非线性逆问题类开发了一种基于 Metropolis 调整 Langevin 算法的易于处理的后采样方案，其中前向模型具有类似神经网络的结构。此类包括最实用的成像方式。我们引入了增强深度生成先验的概念，以便适当地处理定量图像的恢复。我们通过将其应用于两种非线性成像模式（相位检索和光学衍射断层扫描）来说明我们的框架的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度生成先验的贝叶斯重建框架，用于解决非线性成像模型的逆问题。
AI.motivation: 传统逆问题求解方法在处理复杂非线性成像系统时存在局限性，需结合深度学习先验知识提升重建质量。
AI.method: 采用Metropolis调整的朗之万算法构建后验抽样方案，并引入增强型深度生成先验以适应定量图像恢复需求。
AI.result: 框架在相位恢复和光学衍射断层扫描两种非线性成像任务中均取得有效重建结果。
AI.conclusion: 深度生成先验与贝叶斯方法的结合为非线性逆问题提供了可扩展的解决方案，适用于多种实际成像场景。

authors_text: Alexandra Lassota,Aleksander Łukasiewicz,Adam Polak
title: Tight Vector Bin Packing with Few Small Items via Fast Exact Matching in Multigraphs
title_zh: 通过多重图中的快速精确匹配实现少量小物品的紧密矢量装箱
abstract: We solve the Bin Packing problem in $O^*(2^k)$ time, where $k$ is the number of items less or equal to one third of the bin capacity. This parameter measures the distance from the polynomially solvable case of only large (i.e., greater than one third) items. Our algorithm is actually designed to work for a more general Vector Bin Packing problem, in which items are multidimensional vectors. We improve over the previous fastest $O^*(k! \cdot 4^k)$ time algorithm. Our algorithm works by reducing the problem to finding an exact weight perfect matching in a (multi-)graph with $O^*(2^k)$ edges, whose weights are integers of the order of $O^*(2^k)$. To solve the matching problem in the desired time, we give a variant of the classic Mulmuley-Vazirani-Vazirani algorithm with only a linear dependence on the edge weights and the number of edges, which may be of independent interest. Moreover, we give a tight lower bound, under the Strong Exponential Time Hypothesis (SETH), showing that the constant $2$ in the base of the exponent cannot be further improved for Vector Bin Packing. Our techniques also lead to improved algorithms for Vector Multiple Knapsack, Vector Bin Covering, and Perfect Matching with Hitting Constraints.
summary: We solve the Bin Packing problem in $O^*(2^k)$ time, where $k$ is the number of items less or equal to one third of the bin capacity. This parameter measures the distance from the polynomially solvable case of only large (i.e., greater than one third) items. Our algorithm is actually designed to work for a more general Vector Bin Packing problem, in which items are multidimensional vectors. We improve over the previous fastest $O^*(k! \cdot 4^k)$ time algorithm. Our algorithm works by reducing the problem to finding an exact weight perfect matching in a (multi-)graph with $O^*(2^k)$ edges, whose weights are integers of the order of $O^*(2^k)$. To solve the matching problem in the desired time, we give a variant of the classic Mulmuley-Vazirani-Vazirani algorithm with only a linear dependence on the edge weights and the number of edges, which may be of independent interest. Moreover, we give a tight lower bound, under the Strong Exponential Time Hypothesis (SETH), showing that the constant $2$ in the base of the exponent cannot be further improved for Vector Bin Packing. Our techniques also lead to improved algorithms for Vector Multiple Knapsack, Vector Bin Covering, and Perfect Matching with Hitting Constraints.
abstract_zh: 我们在 $O^*(2^k)$ 时间内解决装箱问题，其中 $k$ 是小于或等于箱容量三分之一的物品数量。该参数测量与仅大型（即大于三分之一）项目的多项式可解情况的距离。我们的算法实际上是为解决更一般的向量装箱问题而设计的，其中项目是多维向量。我们改进了之前最快的 $O^*(k! \cdot 4^k)$ 时间算法。我们的算法的工作原理是将问题简化为在具有 $O^*(2^k)$ 边的（多）图中找到精确的权重完美匹配，其权重是 $O^*(2^k)$ 量级的整数。为了在期望的时间内解决匹配问题，我们给出了经典 Mulmuley-Vazirani-Vazirani 算法的变体，该算法仅线性依赖于边权重和边数，这可能是独立的。此外，我们在强指数时间假设 (SETH) 下给出了严格的下界，表明指数基数中的常数 $2$ 无法进一步改进向量装箱。我们的技术还改进了矢量多重背包、矢量箱覆盖和命中约束完美匹配的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种解决向量装箱问题的高效算法，将时间复杂度从之前的$O^*(k! \\cdot 4^k)$改进为$O^*(2^k)$，其中$k$为小于等于三分之一容量的物品数量。
AI.motivation: 向量装箱问题在处理多维物品分配时具有重要意义，但现有算法效率较低。当小物品数量较少时，需更高效的解决方案以接近多项式可解的大型物品场景。
AI.method: 通过将问题转化为多重图中的精确权重完美匹配问题，并设计改进版Mulmuley-Vazirani-Vazirani算法，实现线性依赖于边权重和边数的匹配计算。
AI.result: 提出时间复杂度为$O^*(2^k)$的算法，证明在强指数时间假设下该复杂度无法进一步优化，并扩展至向量多重背包等其他问题。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在理论界定了向量装箱问题的最优时间复杂度下限，同时为相关组合优化问题提供了新的解决思路和工具。

authors_text: Larry Matthies,Shreyansh Daftry,Scott Tepsuporn,Yang Cheng,Deegan Atha,R. Michael Swan,Sanjna Ravichandar,Masahiro Ono
title: Lunar Rover Localization Using Craters as Landmarks
title_zh: 使用陨石坑作为地标进行月球车定位
abstract: Onboard localization capabilities for planetary rovers to date have used relative navigation, by integrating combinations of wheel odometry, visual odometry, and inertial measurements during each drive to track position relative to the start of each drive. At the end of each drive, a ground-in-the-loop (GITL) interaction is used to get a position update from human operators in a more global reference frame, by matching images or local maps from onboard the rover to orbital reconnaissance images or maps of a large region around the rover's current position. Autonomous rover drives are limited in distance so that accumulated relative navigation error does not risk the possibility of the rover driving into hazards known from orbital images. However, several rover mission concepts have recently been studied that require much longer drives between GITL cycles, particularly for the Moon. These concepts require greater autonomy to minimize GITL cycles to enable such large range; onboard global localization is a key element of such autonomy. Multiple techniques have been studied in the past for onboard rover global localization, but a satisfactory solution has not yet emerged. For the Moon, the ubiquitous craters offer a new possibility, which involves mapping craters from orbit, then recognizing crater landmarks with cameras and-or a lidar onboard the rover. This approach is applicable everywhere on the Moon, does not require high resolution stereo imaging from orbit as some other approaches do, and has potential to enable position knowledge with order of 5 to 10 m accuracy at all times. This paper describes our technical approach to crater-based lunar rover localization and presents initial results on crater detection using 3D point cloud data from onboard lidar or stereo cameras, as well as using shading cues in monocular onboard imagery.

At the end of each drive, a ground-in-the-loop (GITL) interaction is used to get a position update from human operators in a more global reference frame, by matching images or local maps from onboard the rover to orbital reconnaissance images or maps of a large region around the rover's current position. abstract_zh: 迄今为止，行星漫游车的机载定位功能已使用相对导航，通过在每次行驶期间集成车轮里程计、视觉里程计和惯性测量的组合来跟踪相对于每次行驶开始的位置。在每次驱动结束时，地面在环（GITL）交互用于通过将漫游车上的图像或本地地图与漫游车当前位置周围大区域的轨道侦察图像或地图进行匹配，在更全局的参考系中从人类操作员那里获取位置更新。自主漫游车驱动距离有限，因此累积的相对导航误差不会带来漫游车驶入轨道图像已知危险的风险。然而，最近研究的几个漫游器任务概念需要 GITL 周期之间更长的驱动器，特别是对于月球。这些概念需要更大的自主权来最小化 GITL 周期以实现如此大的范围；机载全球本地化是这种自主权的关键要素。过去已经研究了多种用于车载流动站全球定位的技术，但尚未出现令人满意的解决方案。对于月球来说，无处不在的陨石坑提供了一种新的可能性，其中包括从轨道上绘制陨石坑地图，然后用月球车上的相机和/或激光雷达识别陨石坑地标。这种方法适用于月球上的任何地方，不需要像其他方法那样从轨道进行高分辨率立体成像，并且有可能始终获得 5 至 10 m 精度的位置知识。本文描述了我们基于陨石坑的月球车定位技术方法，并介绍了使用来自机载激光雷达或立体相机的 3D 点云数据以及使用单目机载图像中的阴影线索进行陨石坑检测的初步结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于月球陨石坑的月球车定位方法，通过将轨道测绘的陨石坑与月球车搭载的相机或激光雷达识别的地标进行匹配，实现自主全局定位。
AI.motivation: 传统月球车定位依赖相对导航和地面回路校正，限制了长距离自主行驶能力。月球表面广泛分布的陨石坑为无需高分辨率轨道影像的全局定位提供了新途径。
AI.method: 通过轨道测绘建立陨石坑数据库，利用月球车激光雷达点云数据或单目视觉中的阴影特征进行陨石坑检测与识别，结合特征匹配实现定位。
AI.result: 初步实验验证了基于3D点云数据和单目影像阴影特征的陨石坑检测方法的有效性，定位精度可达5-10米级。
AI.conclusion: 陨石坑地标定位方法可为月球车提供全天候全局定位能力，减少对地面校正的依赖，适用于各种月球地形环境。

authors_text: Hyungjoo Seo,Sahil Bhandary Karnoor,Romit Roy Choudhury
title: RoSS: Utilizing Robotic Rotation for Audio Source Separation
title_zh: RoSS：利用机器人旋转进行音频源分离
abstract: This paper considers the problem of audio source separation where the goal is to isolate a target audio signal (say Alice's speech) from a mixture of multiple interfering signals (e.g., when many people are talking). This problem has gained renewed interest mainly due to the significant growth in voice controlled devices, including robots in homes, offices, and other public facilities. Although a rich body of work exists on the core topic of source separation, we find that robotic motion of the microphone -- say the robot's head -- is a complementary opportunity to past approaches. Briefly, we show that rotating the microphone array to the correct orientation can produce desired aliasing between two interferers, causing the two interferers to pose as one. In other words, a mixture of K signals becomes a mixture of (K-1), a mathematically concrete gain. We show that the gain translates well to practice provided two mobility-related challenges can be mitigated. This paper is focused on mitigating these challenges and demonstrating the end-to-end performance on a fully functional prototype. We believe that our Rotational Source Separation module RoSS could be plugged into actual robot heads, or into other devices (like Amazon Show) that are also capable of rotation.
summary: This paper considers the problem of audio source separation where the goal is to isolate a target audio signal (say Alice's speech) from a mixture of multiple interfering signals (e.g., when many people are talking). This problem has gained renewed interest mainly due to the significant growth in voice controlled devices, including robots in homes, offices, and other public facilities. Briefly, we show that rotating the microphone array to the correct orientation can produce desired aliasing between two interferers, causing the two interferers to pose as one. In other words, a mixture of K signals becomes a mixture of (K-1), a mathematically concrete gain. We show that the gain translates well to practice provided two mobility-related challenges can be mitigated. This paper is focused on mitigating these challenges and demonstrating the end-to-end performance on a fully functional prototype. We believe that our Rotational Source Separation module RoSS could be plugged into actual robot heads, or into other devices (like Amazon Show) that are also capable of rotation.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑音频源分离问题，其目标是将目标音频信号（例如爱丽丝的语音）与多个干扰信号的混合物（例如，当许多人说话时）隔离。这个问题重新引起人们的关注，主要是由于语音控制设备的显着增长，包括家庭、办公室和其他公共设施中的机器人。尽管在源分离的核心主题上存在丰富的工作，但我们发现麦克风的机器人运动（例如机器人的头部）是对过去方法的补充机会。简而言之，我们表明将麦克风阵列旋转到正确的方向可以在两个干扰源之间产生所需的混叠，从而导致两个干扰源假装为一个。换句话说，K 个信号的混合变成了 (K-1) 的混合，即数学上具体的增益。我们表明，如果可以缓解两个与移动性相关的挑战，那么收益可以很好地转化为实践。本文的重点是缓解这些挑战并在功能齐全的原型上展示端到端性能。我们相信我们的旋转源分离模块 RoSS 可以插入实际的机器人头部，或其他也能够旋转的设备（如 Amazon Show）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RoSS模块，通过旋转麦克风阵列使干扰信号产生混叠，从而减少混合信号数量以实现更高效的音频源分离。
AI.motivation: 随着语音控制设备的普及，传统音频源分离方法难以应对多声源干扰问题，需探索机器人运动带来的新解决方案。
AI.method: 利用机器人头部旋转调整麦克风阵列方向，使两个干扰信号在特定角度下产生混叠，将K信号混合转化为K-1信号混合，并解决旋转带来的移动挑战。
AI.result: 成功在原型设备上验证了方法有效性，证明通过旋转可实现干扰信号数量减少的理论增益。
AI.conclusion: RoSS模块可集成至机器人或可旋转设备中，为实际场景下的音频源分离提供新思路。

authors_text: Jeroen L. G. Schols
title: Kernelization for Treewidth-2 Vertex Deletion
title_zh: Treewidth-2 顶点删除的核化
abstract: The Treewidth-2 Vertex Deletion problem asks whether a set of at most $t$ vertices can be removed from a graph, such that the resulting graph has treewidth at most two. A graph has treewidth at most two if and only if it does not contain a $K_4$ minor. Hence, this problem corresponds to the NP-hard $\mathcal{F}$-Minor Cover problem with $\mathcal{F} = \{K_4\}$. For any variant of the $\mathcal{F}$-Minor Cover problem where $\mathcal{F}$ contains a planar graph, it is known that a polynomial kernel exists. I.e., a preprocessing routine that in polynomial time outputs an equivalent instance of size $t^{O(1)}$. However, this proof is non-constructive, meaning that this proof does not yield an explicit bound on the kernel size. The $\{K_4\}$-Minor Cover problem is the simplest variant of the $\mathcal{F}$-Minor Cover problem with an unknown kernel size. To develop a constructive kernelization algorithm, we present a new method to decompose graphs into near-protrusions, such that near-protrusions in this new decomposition can be reduced using elementary reduction rules. Our method extends the `approximation and tidying' framework by van Bevern et al. [Algorithmica 2012] to provide guarantees stronger than those provided by both this framework and a regular protrusion decomposition. Furthermore, we provide extensions of the elementary reduction rules used by the $\{K_4, K_{2,3}\}$-Minor Cover kernelization algorithm introduced by Donkers et al. [IPEC 2021]. Using the new decomposition method and reduction rules, we obtain a kernel consisting of $O(t^{41})$ vertices, which is the first constructive kernel. This kernel is a step towards more concrete kernelization bounds for the $\mathcal{F}$-Minor Cover problem where $\mathcal{F}$ contains a planar graph, and our decomposition provides a potential direction to achieve these new bounds.

abstract_zh: Treewidth-2 顶点删除问题询问是否可以从图中删除最多 $t$ 个顶点，使得生成的图的树宽最多为 2。当且仅当图不包含 $K_4$ 小数时，图的树宽最多为 2。因此，这个问题对应于 $\mathcal{F}$ 的 NP 难 $\mathcal{F}$-Minor Cover 问题，$\mathcal{F} = \{K_4\}$。对于 $\mathcal{F}$-Minor Cover 问题的任何变体，其中 $\mathcal{F}$ 包含平面图，已知存在多项式核。即，预处理例程在多项式时间内输出大小为 $t^{O(1)}$ 的等效实例。然而，这个证明是非建设性的，这意味着这个证明不会产生对内核大小的明确限制。 $\{K_4\}$-Minor Cover 问题是 $\mathcal{F}$-Minor Cover 问题的最简单变体，内核大小未知。为了开发构造性核化算法，我们提出了一种将图分解为近突起的新方法，这样可以使用基本约简规则来减少这种新分解中的近突起。我们的方法扩展了 van Bevern 等人的“近似和整理”框架。 [Algorithmica 2012] 提供比该框架和常规突出分解提供的保证更强的保证。此外，我们还提供了 Donkers 等人引入的 $\{K_4, K_{2,3}\}$-Minor Cover 核化算法所使用的基本约简规则的扩展。 [消除童工劳动国际计划 2021]。使用新的分解方法和约简规则，我们获得了由 $O(t^{41})$ 个顶点组成的内核，这是第一个构造性内核。该内核是针对 $\mathcal{F}$-Minor Cover 问题迈向更具体的内核化边界的一步，其中 $\mathcal{F}$ 包含平面图，并且我们的分解提供了实现这些新边界的潜在方向。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过删除至多t个顶点使图的树宽不超过2的问题，即K4-小图覆盖问题的核化方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管已知当F包含平面图时F-小图覆盖问题存在多项式核，但K4-小图覆盖问题的核大小界仍未明确，需构造性算法。
AI.method: 提出新的近似分解方法将图分解为近似突出部，并扩展基础约简规则，结合van Bevern框架与Donkers等人的规则。
AI.result: 首次构造出大小为O(t^41)的核，为F-小图覆盖问题提供了首个显式核界。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为平面图F的F-小图覆盖问题的核化界研究提供了新方向与方法论支持。

authors_text: Hyung-Jin Yoon,Chuyuan Tao,Hunmin Kim,Naira Hovakimyan,Petros Voulgaris
title: Sampling Complexity of Path Integral Methods for Trajectory Optimization
title_zh: 轨迹优化的路径积分方法的采样复杂度
abstract: The use of random sampling in decision-making and control has become popular with the ease of access to graphic processing units that can generate and calculate multiple random trajectories for real-time robotic applications. In contrast to sequential optimization, the sampling-based method can take advantage of parallel computing to maintain constant control loop frequencies. Inspired by its wide applicability in robotic applications, we calculate a sampling complexity result applicable to general nonlinear systems considered in the path integral method, which is a sampling-based method. The result determines the required number of samples to satisfy the given error bounds of the estimated control signal from the optimal value with the predefined risk probability. The sampling complexity result shows that the variance of the estimated control value is upper-bounded in terms of the expectation of the cost. Then we apply the result to a linear time-varying dynamical system with quadratic cost and an indicator function cost to avoid constraint sets.
summary: The use of random sampling in decision-making and control has become popular with the ease of access to graphic processing units that can generate and calculate multiple random trajectories for real-time robotic applications. In contrast to sequential optimization, the sampling-based method can take advantage of parallel computing to maintain constant control loop frequencies. Inspired by its wide applicability in robotic applications, we calculate a sampling complexity result applicable to general nonlinear systems considered in the path integral method, which is a sampling-based method. The result determines the required number of samples to satisfy the given error bounds of the estimated control signal from the optimal value with the predefined risk probability. The sampling complexity result shows that the variance of the estimated control value is upper-bounded in terms of the expectation of the cost. Then we apply the result to a linear time-varying dynamical system with quadratic cost and an indicator function cost to avoid constraint sets.
abstract_zh: 由于可以轻松访问图形处理单元，在决策和控制中使用随机采样已变得流行，这些单元可以为实时机器人应用生成和计算多个随机轨迹。与顺序优化相比，基于采样的方法可以利用并行计算来维持恒定的控制环路频率。受到其在机器人应用中广泛适用性的启发，我们计算了适用于路径积分法中考虑的一般非线性系统的采样复杂度结果，这是一种基于采样的方法。结果根据预定义风险概率的最优值确定满足估计控制信号的给定误差范围所需的样本数量。抽样复杂度结果表明，估计控制值的方差在成本期望方面是有上限的。然后，我们将结果应用于具有二次成本和指示函数成本的线性时变动态系统，以避免约束集。

AI.tldr: 本文研究路径积分方法在轨迹优化中的采样复杂度，确定满足误差界限所需的样本数量。
AI.motivation: 随着GPU计算能力的提升，基于采样的控制方法在实时机器人应用中变得流行，需分析其采样复杂度以确保控制精度。
AI.method: 通过推导一般非线性系统的采样复杂度公式，结合概率风险约束，分析控制信号估计的方差与成本期望的关系，并应用于线性时变系统验证。
AI.result: 证明估计控制值的方差受成本期望上界约束，并通过二次成本和指示函数成本的实例验证理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 采样复杂度理论为路径积分方法在实时控制中的应用提供了样本数量的理论保障，支持高效并行计算。

search_text: Sampling Complexity of Path Integral Methods for Trajectory Optimization 轨迹优化的路径积分方法的采样复杂度 The use of random sampling in decision-making and control has become popular with the ease of access to graphic processing units that can generate and calculate multiple random trajectories for real-time robotic applications. In contrast to sequential optimization, the sampling-based method can take advantage of parallel computing to maintain constant control loop frequencies. Inspired by its wide applicability in robotic applications, we calculate a sampling complexity result applicable to general nonlinear systems considered in the path integral method, which is a sampling-based method. The result determines the required number of samples to satisfy the given error bounds of the estimated control signal from the optimal value with the predefined risk probability. The sampling complexity result shows that the variance of the estimated control value is upper-bounded in terms of the expectation of the cost. Then we apply the result to a linear time-varying dynamical system with quadratic cost and an indicator function cost to avoid constraint sets. 由于可以轻松访问图形处理单元，在决策和控制中使用随机采样已变得流行，这些单元可以为实时机器人应用生成和计算多个随机轨迹。与顺序优化相比，基于采样的方法可以利用并行计算来维持恒定的控制环路频率。受到其在机器人应用中广泛适用性的启发，我们计算了适用于路径积分法中考虑的一般非线性系统的采样复杂度结果，这是一种基于采样的方法。结果根据预定义风险概率的最优值确定满足估计控制信号的给定误差范围所需的样本数量。抽样复杂度结果表明，估计控制值的方差在成本期望方面是有上限的。然后，我们将结果应用于具有二次成本和指示函数成本的线性时变动态系统，以避免约束集。 本文研究路径积分方法在轨迹优化中的采样复杂度，确定满足误差界限所需的样本数量。 Hyung-Jin Yoon,Chuyuan Tao,Hunmin Kim,Naira Hovakimyan,Petros Voulgaris cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Rohan P. Joshi,Bolesław L. Osinski,Niha Beig,Lingdao Sha,Kshitij Ingale,Martin C. Stumpe
title: Imaging-based histological features are predictive of MET alterations in Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
title_zh: 基于影像的组织学特征可预测非小细胞肺癌的 MET 改变
abstract: MET is a proto-oncogene whose somatic activation in non-small cell lung cancer leads to increased cell growth and tumor progression. The two major classes of MET alterations are gene amplification and exon 14 deletion, both of which are therapeutic targets and detectable using existing molecular assays. However, existing tests are limited by their consumption of valuable tissue, cost and complexity that prevent widespread use. MET alterations could have an effect on cell morphology, and quantifying these associations could open new avenues for research and development of morphology-based screening tools. Using H&E-stained whole slide images (WSIs), we investigated the association of distinct cell-morphological features with MET amplifications and MET exon 14 deletions. We found that cell shape, color, grayscale intensity and texture-based features from both tumor infiltrating lymphocytes and tumor cells distinguished MET wild-type from MET amplified or MET exon 14 deletion cases. The association of individual cell features with MET alterations suggested a predictive model could distinguish MET wild-type from MET amplification or MET exon 14 deletion. We therefore developed an L1-penalized logistic regression model, achieving a mean Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve (ROC-AUC) of 0.77 +/- 0.05sd in cross-validation and 0.77 on an independent holdout test set. A sparse set of 43 features differentiated these classes, which included features similar to what was found in the univariate analysis as well as the percent of tumor cells in the tissue. Our study demonstrates that MET alterations result in a detectable morphological signal in tumor cells and lymphocytes. These results suggest that development of low-cost predictive models based on H&E-stained WSIs may improve screening for MET altered tumors.

abstract_zh: MET 是一种原癌基因，其在非小细胞肺癌中的体细胞激活会导致细胞生长加快和肿瘤进展。 MET 改变的两类主要类型是基因扩增和外显子 14 缺失，两者都是治疗靶标，并且可以使用现有的分子测定进行检测。然而，现有的测试因其消耗宝贵的组织、成本和复杂性而受到限制，从而阻碍了广泛使用。 MET 改变可能对细胞形态产生影响，量化这些关联可以为基于形态的筛选工具的研究和开发开辟新途径。使用 H&E 染色的全玻片图像 (WSI)，我们研究了不同的细胞形态特征与 MET 扩增和 MET 外显子 14 缺失的关联。我们发现肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞和肿瘤细胞的细胞形状、颜色、灰度强度和基于纹理的特征将 MET 野生型与 MET 扩增或 MET 外显子 14 缺失病例区分开来。个体细胞特征与 MET 改变的关联表明，预测模型可以区分 MET 野生型和 MET 扩增或 MET 外显子 14 缺失。因此，我们开发了 L1 惩罚逻辑回归模型，在交叉验证中实现了接受者操作特征曲线下的平均面积 (ROC-AUC) 0.77 +/- 0.05sd，在独立测试集上实现了 0.77。一组稀疏的 43 个特征区分了这些类别，其中包括与单变量分析中发现的特征相似的特征以及组织中肿瘤细胞的百分比。我们的研究表明，MET 的改变会导致肿瘤细胞和淋巴细胞中产生可检测的形态信号。这些结果表明，基于 H&E 染色 WSI 开发低成本预测模型可能会改善 MET 改变肿瘤的筛查。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析H&E染色的全切片图像，研究细胞形态学特征与MET基因改变（扩增或外显子14缺失）之间的关联，开发预测模型以检测非小细胞肺癌中的MET改变。
AI.motivation: 现有检测MET改变的分子检测方法存在组织消耗大、成本高和操作复杂的问题，需开发基于形态学的低成本筛查工具。
AI.method: 利用H&E染色全切片图像，提取肿瘤浸润淋巴细胞和肿瘤细胞的形态学特征（如形状、颜色、灰度强度和纹理），结合L1正则化逻辑回归建立预测模型。
AI.result: 模型在交叉验证和独立测试集中的ROC-AUC均达到0.77，43个关键特征（包括肿瘤细胞占比）可区分MET野生型与突变型病例。
AI.conclusion: MET改变会导致肿瘤细胞和淋巴细胞的可检测形态学信号，基于H&E图像的预测模型有望成为低成本筛查MET突变肿瘤的新方法。

authors_text: Jongjin Park,Younggyo Seo,Jinwoo Shin,Honglak Lee,Pieter Abbeel,Kimin Lee
title: SURF: Semi-supervised Reward Learning with Data Augmentation for Feedback-efficient Preference-based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: SURF：半监督奖励学习与数据增强，用于反馈有效的基于偏好的强化学习
abstract: Preference-based reinforcement learning (RL) has shown potential for teaching agents to perform the target tasks without a costly, pre-defined reward function by learning the reward with a supervisor's preference between the two agent behaviors. However, preference-based learning often requires a large amount of human feedback, making it difficult to apply this approach to various applications. This data-efficiency problem, on the other hand, has been typically addressed by using unlabeled samples or data augmentation techniques in the context of supervised learning. Motivated by the recent success of these approaches, we present SURF, a semi-supervised reward learning framework that utilizes a large amount of unlabeled samples with data augmentation. In order to leverage unlabeled samples for reward learning, we infer pseudo-labels of the unlabeled samples based on the confidence of the preference predictor. To further improve the label-efficiency of reward learning, we introduce a new data augmentation that temporally crops consecutive subsequences from the original behaviors. Our experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly improves the feedback-efficiency of the state-of-the-art preference-based method on a variety of locomotion and robotic manipulation tasks.
summary: Preference-based reinforcement learning (RL) has shown potential for teaching agents to perform the target tasks without a costly, pre-defined reward function by learning the reward with a supervisor's preference between the two agent behaviors. However, preference-based learning often requires a large amount of human feedback, making it difficult to apply this approach to various applications. This data-efficiency problem, on the other hand, has been typically addressed by using unlabeled samples or data augmentation techniques in the context of supervised learning. Motivated by the recent success of these approaches, we present SURF, a semi-supervised reward learning framework that utilizes a large amount of unlabeled samples with data augmentation. In order to leverage unlabeled samples for reward learning, we infer pseudo-labels of the unlabeled samples based on the confidence of the preference predictor. To further improve the label-efficiency of reward learning, we introduce a new data augmentation that temporally crops consecutive subsequences from the original behaviors. Our experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly improves the feedback-efficiency of the state-of-the-art preference-based method on a variety of locomotion and robotic manipulation tasks.
abstract_zh: 基于偏好的强化学习 (RL) 已显示出通过学习主管在两种代理行为之间的偏好来学习奖励，从而教导代理执行目标任务的潜力，而无需昂贵的预定义奖励函数。然而，基于偏好的学习通常需要大量的人类反馈，使得这种方法很难应用于各种应用。另一方面，这种数据效率问题通常通过在监督学习背景下使用未标记样本或数据增强技术来解决。受这些方法最近成功的启发，我们提出了 SURF，这是一种半监督奖励学习框架，它利用大量未标记的样本进行数据增强。为了利用未标记样本进行奖励学习，我们根据偏好预测器的置信度推断未标记样本的伪标签。为了进一步提高奖励学习的标签效率，我们引入了一种新的数据增强，可以暂时从原始行为中裁剪连续的子序列。我们的实验表明，我们的方法显着提高了最先进的基于偏好的方法在各种运动和机器人操作任务上的反馈效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SURF框架，通过半监督学习与数据增强技术提升基于偏好强化学习的反馈效率。
AI.motivation: 基于偏好的强化学习需大量人工反馈，而数据增强技术可提升监督学习的样本效率，因此作者结合二者以减少对人工标注的依赖。
AI.method: 利用未标注样本的伪标签生成（基于置信度预测）及时间序列裁剪的数据增强技术，构建半监督奖励学习框架。
AI.result: 实验表明，SURF在多种运动控制与机械臂操作任务中显著优于现有基于偏好的强化学习方法，反馈效率提升明显。
AI.conclusion: SURF通过半监督学习与定制化数据增强有效缓解了偏好强化学习对人工反馈的高需求，为实际应用提供了更高效的解决方案。

search_text: SURF: Semi-supervised Reward Learning with Data Augmentation for Feedback-efficient Preference-based Reinforcement Learning SURF：半监督奖励学习与数据增强，用于反馈有效的基于偏好的强化学习 Preference-based reinforcement learning (RL) has shown potential for teaching agents to perform the target tasks without a costly, pre-defined reward function by learning the reward with a supervisor's preference between the two agent behaviors. However, preference-based learning often requires a large amount of human feedback, making it difficult to apply this approach to various applications. This data-efficiency problem, on the other hand, has been typically addressed by using unlabeled samples or data augmentation techniques in the context of supervised learning. Motivated by the recent success of these approaches, we present SURF, a semi-supervised reward learning framework that utilizes a large amount of unlabeled samples with data augmentation. In order to leverage unlabeled samples for reward learning, we infer pseudo-labels of the unlabeled samples based on the confidence of the preference predictor. To further improve the label-efficiency of reward learning, we introduce a new data augmentation that temporally crops consecutive subsequences from the original behaviors. Our experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly improves the feedback-efficiency of the state-of-the-art preference-based method on a variety of locomotion and robotic manipulation tasks. 基于偏好的强化学习 (RL) 已显示出通过学习主管在两种代理行为之间的偏好来学习奖励，从而教导代理执行目标任务的潜力，而无需昂贵的预定义奖励函数。然而，基于偏好的学习通常需要大量的人类反馈，使得这种方法很难应用于各种应用。另一方面，这种数据效率问题通常通过在监督学习背景下使用未标记样本或数据增强技术来解决。受这些方法最近成功的启发，我们提出了 SURF，这是一种半监督奖励学习框架，它利用大量未标记的样本进行数据增强。为了利用未标记样本进行奖励学习，我们根据偏好预测器的置信度推断未标记样本的伪标签。为了进一步提高奖励学习的标签效率，我们引入了一种新的数据增强，可以暂时从原始行为中裁剪连续的子序列。我们的实验表明，我们的方法显着提高了最先进的基于偏好的方法在各种运动和机器人操作任务上的反馈效率。 本文提出SURF框架，通过半监督学习与数据增强技术提升基于偏好强化学习的反馈效率。 Jongjin Park,Younggyo Seo,Jinwoo Shin,Honglak Lee,Pieter Abbeel,Kimin Lee cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Luca Tomasetti,Mahdieh Khanmohammadi,Kjersti Engan,Liv Jorunn Høllesli,Kathinka Dæhli Kurz
title: Multi-input segmentation of damaged brain in acute ischemic stroke patients using slow fusion with skip connection
title_zh: 使用跳跃连​​接慢融合对急性缺血性中风患者受损大脑进行多输入分割
abstract: Time is a fundamental factor during stroke treatments. A fast, automatic approach that segments the ischemic regions helps treatment decisions. In clinical use today, a set of color-coded parametric maps generated from computed tomography perfusion (CTP) images are investigated manually to decide a treatment plan. We propose an automatic method based on a neural network using a set of parametric maps to segment the two ischemic regions (core and penumbra) in patients affected by acute ischemic stroke. Our model is based on a convolution-deconvolution bottleneck structure with multi-input and slow fusion. A loss function based on the focal Tversky index addresses the data imbalance issue. The proposed architecture demonstrates effective performance and results comparable to the ground truth annotated by neuroradiologists. A Dice coefficient of 0.81 for penumbra and 0.52 for core over the large vessel occlusion test set is achieved. The full implementation is available at: https://git.io/JtFGb.
summary: Time is a fundamental factor during stroke treatments. A fast, automatic approach that segments the ischemic regions helps treatment decisions. In clinical use today, a set of color-coded parametric maps generated from computed tomography perfusion (CTP) images are investigated manually to decide a treatment plan. We propose an automatic method based on a neural network using a set of parametric maps to segment the two ischemic regions (core and penumbra) in patients affected by acute ischemic stroke. Our model is based on a convolution-deconvolution bottleneck structure with multi-input and slow fusion. A loss function based on the focal Tversky index addresses the data imbalance issue. The proposed architecture demonstrates effective performance and results comparable to the ground truth annotated by neuroradiologists. A Dice coefficient of 0.81 for penumbra and 0.52 for core over the large vessel occlusion test set is achieved. The full implementation is available at: https://git.io/JtFGb.
abstract_zh: 时间是中风治疗过程中的一个基本因素。分割缺血区域的快速、自动方法有助于治疗决策。在当今的临床使用中，手动研究从计算机断层扫描灌注 (CTP) 图像生成的一组颜色编码参数图来决定治疗计划。我们提出了一种基于神经网络的自动方法，使用一组参数图来分割急性缺血性中风患者的两个缺血区域（核心和半影）。我们的模型基于具有多输入和慢速融合的卷积-反卷积瓶颈结构。基于焦点 Tversky 索引的损失函数解决了数据不平衡问题。所提出的架构展示了与神经放射学家注释的基本事实相当的有效性能和结果。在大血管闭塞测试集上，半影的 Dice 系数为 0.81，核心的 Dice 系数为 0.52。完整的实现可在：https://git.io/JtFGb 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多输入神经网络的自动分割方法，用于急性缺血性卒中患者的脑损伤区域分割，采用慢融合与跳跃连接结构。
AI.motivation: 卒中治疗中时间至关重要，现有手动分析CT灌注参数图的方法效率低且易出错，亟需快速自动化的缺血区域分割技术辅助决策。
AI.method: 构建卷积-反卷积瓶颈结构，结合多输入与慢融合机制，采用基于焦点Tversky指数的损失函数解决数据不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在大血管闭塞测试集上实现笔画区Dice系数0.81、核心区0.52，性能与神经放射科医生标注结果相当。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效分割缺血区域，为临床提供可靠决策支持工具，验证了深度学习在卒中影像分析中的潜力。

authors_text: Ilja Gubins,Marten L. Chaillet,Gijs van der Schot,M. Cristina Trueba,Remco C. Veltkamp,Friedrich Förster,Xiao Wang,Daisuke Kihara,Emmanuel Moebel,Nguyen P. Nguyen,Tommi White,Filiz Bunyak,Giorgos Papoulias,Stavros Gerolymatos,Evangelia I. Zacharaki,Konstantinos Moustakas,Xiangrui Zeng,Sinuo Liu,Min Xu,Yaoyu Wang,Cheng Chen,Xuefeng Cui,Fa Zhang
title: SHREC 2021: Classification in cryo-electron tomograms
title_zh: SHREC 2021：冷冻电子断层扫描的分类
comment: Workshop version of the paper can be found here: https://diglib.eg.org/handle/10.2312/3dor20211307
comments: Workshop version of the paper can be found here: https://diglib.eg.org/handle/10.2312/3dor20211307
abstract: Cryo-electron tomography (cryo-ET) is an imaging technique that allows three-dimensional visualization of macro-molecular assemblies under near-native conditions. Cryo-ET comes with a number of challenges, mainly low signal-to-noise and inability to obtain images from all angles. Computational methods are key to analyze cryo-electron tomograms. To promote innovation in computational methods, we generate a novel simulated dataset to benchmark different methods of localization and classification of biological macromolecules in tomograms. Our publicly available dataset contains ten tomographic reconstructions of simulated cell-like volumes. Each volume contains twelve different types of complexes, varying in size, function and structure. In this paper, we have evaluated seven different methods of finding and classifying proteins. Seven research groups present results obtained with learning-based methods and trained on the simulated dataset, as well as a baseline template matching (TM), a traditional method widely used in cryo-ET research. We show that learning-based approaches can achieve notably better localization and classification performance than TM. We also experimentally confirm that there is a negative relationship between particle size and performance for all methods.
summary: Cryo-electron tomography (cryo-ET) is an imaging technique that allows three-dimensional visualization of macro-molecular assemblies under near-native conditions. Cryo-ET comes with a number of challenges, mainly low signal-to-noise and inability to obtain images from all angles. Computational methods are key to analyze cryo-electron tomograms. To promote innovation in computational methods, we generate a novel simulated dataset to benchmark different methods of localization and classification of biological macromolecules in tomograms. Our publicly available dataset contains ten tomographic reconstructions of simulated cell-like volumes. Each volume contains twelve different types of complexes, varying in size, function and structure. In this paper, we have evaluated seven different methods of finding and classifying proteins. Seven research groups present results obtained with learning-based methods and trained on the simulated dataset, as well as a baseline template matching (TM), a traditional method widely used in cryo-ET research. We show that learning-based approaches can achieve notably better localization and classification performance than TM. We also experimentally confirm that there is a negative relationship between particle size and performance for all methods.
abstract_zh: 冷冻电子断层扫描 (cryo-ET) 是一种成像技术，可在接近天然条件下对大分子组装体进行三维可视化。 Cryo-ET 面临着许多挑战，主要是信噪比低以及无法从各个角度获取图像。计算方法是分析冷冻电子断层图的关键。为了促进计算方法的创新，我们生成了一个新颖的模拟数据集，以对断层图像中生物大分子的定位和分类的不同方法进行基准测试。我们公开的数据集包含模拟细胞体积的十个断层扫描重建。每卷包含十二种不同类型的复合体，其大小、功能和结构各不相同。在本文中，我们评估了七种不同的蛋白质查找和分类方法。七个研究小组展示了通过基于学习的方法获得的结果，并在模拟数据集上进行训练，以及基线模板匹配 (TM)（一种广泛应用于冷冻电子断层研究的传统方法）。我们表明，基于学习的方法可以实现比 TM 更好的定位和分类性能。我们还通过实验证实，所有方法的粒径和性能之间都存在负相关关系。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了七种基于学习的蛋白质定位与分类方法在冷冻电镜断层扫描图像中的性能，并与传统模板匹配方法进行对比。
AI.motivation: 冷冻电镜断层扫描存在信噪比低、视角不全等挑战，需通过计算方法提升分析效率，但缺乏标准化数据集验证新方法。
AI.method: 构建包含10个模拟细胞体积的公开数据集，每个体积含12种结构功能各异的复合物，对比七种学习方法与传统模板匹配的性能。
AI.result: 基于学习的方法在定位与分类准确率上显著优于模板匹配，且所有方法均呈现粒子尺寸与性能负相关的特点。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法在cryo-ET分析中展现潜力，但需关注粒子尺寸对算法性能的影响，未来应优化模型适应不同尺度目标的能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文评估了七种基于学习的蛋白质定位与分类方法在冷冻电镜断层扫描图像中的性能，并与传统模板匹配方法进行对比。
ai_content.motivation: 冷冻电镜断层扫描存在信噪比低、视角不全等挑战，需通过计算方法提升分析效率，但缺乏标准化数据集验证新方法。

search_text: SHREC 2021: Classification in cryo-electron tomograms SHREC 2021：冷冻电子断层扫描的分类 Cryo-electron tomography (cryo-ET) is an imaging technique that allows three-dimensional visualization of macro-molecular assemblies under near-native conditions. Cryo-ET comes with a number of challenges, mainly low signal-to-noise and inability to obtain images from all angles. Computational methods are key to analyze cryo-electron tomograms. To promote innovation in computational methods, we generate a novel simulated dataset to benchmark different methods of localization and classification of biological macromolecules in tomograms. Our publicly available dataset contains ten tomographic reconstructions of simulated cell-like volumes. Each volume contains twelve different types of complexes, varying in size, function and structure. In this paper, we have evaluated seven different methods of finding and classifying proteins. Seven research groups present results obtained with learning-based methods and trained on the simulated dataset, as well as a baseline template matching (TM), a traditional method widely used in cryo-ET research. We show that learning-based approaches can achieve notably better localization and classification performance than TM. We also experimentally confirm that there is a negative relationship between particle size and performance for all methods. 冷冻电子断层扫描 (cryo-ET) 是一种成像技术，可在接近天然条件下对大分子组装体进行三维可视化。 Cryo-ET 面临着许多挑战，主要是信噪比低以及无法从各个角度获取图像。计算方法是分析冷冻电子断层图的关键。为了促进计算方法的创新，我们生成了一个新颖的模拟数据集，以对断层图像中生物大分子的定位和分类的不同方法进行基准测试。我们公开的数据集包含模拟细胞体积的十个断层扫描重建。每卷包含十二种不同类型的复合体，其大小、功能和结构各不相同。在本文中，我们评估了七种不同的蛋白质查找和分类方法。七个研究小组展示了通过基于学习的方法获得的结果，并在模拟数据集上进行训练，以及基线模板匹配 (TM)（一种广泛应用于冷冻电子断层研究的传统方法）。我们表明，基于学习的方法可以实现比 TM 更好的定位和分类性能。我们还通过实验证实，所有方法的粒径和性能之间都存在负相关关系。 本文评估了七种基于学习的蛋白质定位与分类方法在冷冻电镜断层扫描图像中的性能，并与传统模板匹配方法进行对比。 Ilja Gubins,Marten L. Chaillet,Gijs van der Schot,M. Cristina Trueba,Remco C. Veltkamp,Friedrich Förster,Xiao Wang,Daisuke Kihara,Emmanuel Moebel,Nguyen P. Nguyen,Tommi White,Filiz Bunyak,Giorgos Papoulias,Stavros Gerolymatos,Evangelia I. Zacharaki,Konstantinos Moustakas,Xiangrui Zeng,Sinuo Liu,Min Xu,Yaoyu Wang,Cheng Chen,Xuefeng Cui,Fa Zhang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Matthias Mayr,Faseeh Ahmad,Konstantinos Chatzilygeroudis,Luigi Nardi,Volker Krueger
title: Skill-based Multi-objective Reinforcement Learning of Industrial Robot Tasks with Planning and Knowledge Integration
title_zh: 基于技能的工业机器人任务多目标强化学习与规划和知识整合
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, submitted to 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, submitted to 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: In modern industrial settings with small batch sizes it should be easy to set up a robot system for a new task. Strategies exist, e.g. the use of skills, but when it comes to handling forces and torques, these systems often fall short. We introduce an approach that provides a combination of task-level planning with targeted learning of scenario-specific parameters for skill-based systems. We propose the following pipeline: (1) the user provides a task goal in the planning language PDDL, (2) a plan (i.e., a sequence of skills) is generated and the learnable parameters of the skills are automatically identified. An operator then chooses (3) reward functions and hyperparameters for the learning process. Two aspects of our methodology are critical: (a) learning is tightly integrated with a knowledge framework to support symbolic planning and to provide priors for learning, (b) using multi-objective optimization. This can help to balance key performance indicators (KPIs) such as safety and task performance since they can often affect each other. We adopt a multi-objective Bayesian optimization approach and learn entirely in simulation. We demonstrate the efficacy and versatility of our approach by learning skill parameters for two different contact-rich tasks. We show their successful execution on a real 7-DOF KUKA-iiwa manipulator and outperform the manual parameterization by human robot operators.
summary: In modern industrial settings with small batch sizes it should be easy to set up a robot system for a new task. Strategies exist, e.g. the use of skills, but when it comes to handling forces and torques, these systems often fall short. We introduce an approach that provides a combination of task-level planning with targeted learning of scenario-specific parameters for skill-based systems. We propose the following pipeline: (1) the user provides a task goal in the planning language PDDL, (2) a plan (i.e., a sequence of skills) is generated and the learnable parameters of the skills are automatically identified. An operator then chooses (3) reward functions and hyperparameters for the learning process. Two aspects of our methodology are critical: (a) learning is tightly integrated with a knowledge framework to support symbolic planning and to provide priors for learning, (b) using multi-objective optimization. This can help to balance key performance indicators (KPIs) such as safety and task performance since they can often affect each other. We adopt a multi-objective Bayesian optimization approach and learn entirely in simulation. We demonstrate the efficacy and versatility of our approach by learning skill parameters for two different contact-rich tasks. We show their successful execution on a real 7-DOF KUKA-iiwa manipulator and outperform the manual parameterization by human robot operators.
abstract_zh: 在小批量的现代工业环境中，应该很容易为新任务设置机器人系统。策略是存在的，例如技巧的使用，但当涉及到处理力和扭矩时，这些系统往往不足。我们引入了一种方法，该方法将任务级规划与基于技能的系统的场景特定参数的有针对性的学习相结合。我们提出以下流程：（1）用户以规划语言 PDDL 提供任务目标，（2）生成计划（即一系列技能）并自动识别技能的可学习参数。然后，操作员为学习过程选择 (3) 奖励函数和超参数。我们的方法有两个方面至关重要：(a) 学习与知识框架紧密集成，以支持符号规划并为学习提供先验；(b) 使用多目标优化。这有助于平衡关键绩效指标 (KPI)，例如安全性和任务绩效，因为它们通常会相互影响。我们采用多目标贝叶斯优化方法并完全在模拟中学习。我们通过学习两种不同的接触丰富任务的技能参数来证明我们方法的有效性和多功能性。我们展示了它们在真正的 7 自由度 KUKA-iiwa 机械臂上的成功执行，并且优于人类机器人操作员的手动参数化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合任务级规划与知识框架的多目标强化学习方法，用于工业机器人任务参数学习，以提升小批量生产场景下的适应性。
AI.motivation: 现有工业机器人系统在处理力/扭矩参数时存在不足，难以高效适应新任务，需结合符号规划与学习框架提升参数优化能力。
AI.method: 通过PDDL描述任务目标生成技能序列，自动识别可学习参数，结合多目标贝叶斯优化与仿真训练，集成符号知识与先验信息进行参数学习。
AI.result: 在两个高接触力任务中成功学习到技能参数，并在真实7自由度KUKA-iiwa机械臂上验证，性能优于人工参数设置。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过规划-学习协同与多目标优化有效平衡安全与任务性能，为工业机器人小批量任务参数自动化配置提供了可行方案。

Strategies exist, e.g. the use of skills, but when it comes to handling forces and torques, these systems often fall short. We propose the following pipeline: (1) the user provides a task goal in the planning language PDDL, (2) a plan (i.e., a sequence of skills) is generated and the learnable parameters of the skills are automatically identified. authors_text: Shizhen Chang,Pedram Ghamisi
title: Nonnegative-Constrained Joint Collaborative Representation with Union Dictionary for Hyperspectral Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于高光谱异常检测的联合字典非负约束联合协作表示
abstract: Recently, many collaborative representation-based (CR) algorithms have been proposed for hyperspectral anomaly detection. CR-based detectors approximate the image by a linear combination of background dictionaries and the coefficient matrix, and derive the detection map by utilizing recovery residuals. However, these CR-based detectors are often established on the premise of precise background features and strong image representation, which are very difficult to obtain. In addition, pursuing the coefficient matrix reinforced by the general $l_2$-min is very time consuming. To address these issues, a nonnegative-constrained joint collaborative representation model is proposed in this paper for the hyperspectral anomaly detection task. To extract reliable samples, a union dictionary consisting of background and anomaly sub-dictionaries is designed, where the background sub-dictionary is obtained at the superpixel level and the anomaly sub-dictionary is extracted by the pre-detection process. And the coefficient matrix is jointly optimized by the Frobenius norm regularization with a nonnegative constraint and a sum-to-one constraint. After the optimization process, the abnormal information is finally derived by calculating the residuals that exclude the assumed background information. To conduct comparable experiments, the proposed nonnegative-constrained joint collaborative representation (NJCR) model and its kernel version (KNJCR) are tested in four HSI data sets and achieve superior results compared with other state-of-the-art detectors.
summary: Recently, many collaborative representation-based (CR) algorithms have been proposed for hyperspectral anomaly detection. CR-based detectors approximate the image by a linear combination of background dictionaries and the coefficient matrix, and derive the detection map by utilizing recovery residuals. However, these CR-based detectors are often established on the premise of precise background features and strong image representation, which are very difficult to obtain. In addition, pursuing the coefficient matrix reinforced by the general $l_2$-min is very time consuming. To address these issues, a nonnegative-constrained joint collaborative representation model is proposed in this paper for the hyperspectral anomaly detection task. To extract reliable samples, a union dictionary consisting of background and anomaly sub-dictionaries is designed, where the background sub-dictionary is obtained at the superpixel level and the anomaly sub-dictionary is extracted by the pre-detection process. And the coefficient matrix is jointly optimized by the Frobenius norm regularization with a nonnegative constraint and a sum-to-one constraint. After the optimization process, the abnormal information is finally derived by calculating the residuals that exclude the assumed background information. To conduct comparable experiments, the proposed nonnegative-constrained joint collaborative representation (NJCR) model and its kernel version (KNJCR) are tested in four HSI data sets and achieve superior results compared with other state-of-the-art detectors.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们提出了许多基于协作表示（CR）的算法用于高光谱异常检测。基于 CR 的检测器通过背景字典和系数矩阵的线性组合来近似图像，并利用恢复残差导出检测图。然而，这些基于CR的检测器往往是建立在精确的背景特征和强大的图像表示的前提下的，而这是很难获得的。另外，求一般$l_2$-min强化的系数矩阵是非常耗时的。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种用于高光谱异常检测任务的非负约束联合协作表示模型。为了提取可靠样本，设计了由背景子字典和异常子字典组成的联合字典，其中背景子字典是在超像素级别获得的，异常子字典是通过预检测过程提取的。系数矩阵通过带有非负约束和和对一约束的Frobenius范数正则化联合优化。经过优化过程后，通过计算排除假设背景信息的残差，最终得出异常信息。为了进行可比较的实验，所提出的非负约束联合协作表示（NJCR）模型及其内核版本（KNJCR）在四个 HSI 数据集上进行了测试，并与其他最先进的检测器相比取得了优异的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非负约束联合协作表示与联合字典的高光谱异常检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有协作表示方法依赖精确背景特征和强表示能力，难以获取且计算耗时。
AI.method: 设计包含背景子字典和异常子字典的联合字典，通过Frobenius范数正则化与非负约束联合优化系数矩阵。
AI.result: 在四个高光谱数据集上优于其他先进检测器，实验验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 非负约束联合模型有效提升高光谱异常检测性能，兼顾效率与精度。
