conclusion: 非负约束联合模型有效提升高光谱异常检测性能，兼顾效率与精度。
search_text: Nonnegative-Constrained Joint Collaborative Representation with Union Dictionary for Hyperspectral Anomaly Detection 用于高光谱异常检测的联合字典非负约束联合协作表示 Recently, many collaborative representation-based (CR) algorithms have been proposed for hyperspectral anomaly detection. CR-based detectors approximate the image by a linear combination of background dictionaries and the coefficient matrix, and derive the detection map by utilizing recovery residuals. However, these CR-based detectors are often established on the premise of precise background features and strong image representation, which are very difficult to obtain. In addition, pursuing the coefficient matrix reinforced by the general $l_2$-min is very time consuming. To address these issues, a nonnegative-constrained joint collaborative representation model is proposed in this paper for the hyperspectral anomaly detection task. To extract reliable samples, a union dictionary consisting of background and anomaly sub-dictionaries is designed, where the background sub-dictionary is obtained at the superpixel level and the anomaly sub-dictionary is extracted by the pre-detection process. And the coefficient matrix is jointly optimized by the Frobenius norm regularization with a nonnegative constraint and a sum-to-one constraint. After the optimization process, the abnormal information is finally derived by calculating the residuals that exclude the assumed background information. To conduct comparable experiments, the proposed nonnegative-constrained joint collaborative representation (NJCR) model and its kernel version (KNJCR) are tested in four HSI data sets and achieve superior results compared with other state-of-the-art detectors. 最近，人们提出了许多基于协作表示（CR）的算法用于高光谱异常检测。基于 CR 的检测器通过背景字典和系数矩阵的线性组合来近似图像，并利用恢复残差导出检测图。然而，这些基于CR的检测器往往是建立在精确的背景特征和强大的图像表示的前提下的，而这是很难获得的。另外，求一般$l_2$-min强化的系数矩阵是非常耗时的。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种用于高光谱异常检测任务的非负约束联合协作表示模型。为了提取可靠样本，设计了由背景子字典和异常子字典组成的联合字典，其中背景子字典是在超像素级别获得的，异常子字典是通过预检测过程提取的。系数矩阵通过带有非负约束和和对一约束的Frobenius范数正则化联合优化。经过优化过程后，通过计算排除假设背景信息的残差，最终得出异常信息。为了进行可比较的实验，所提出的非负约束联合协作表示（NJCR）模型及其内核版本（KNJCR）在四个 HSI 数据集上进行了测试，并与其他最先进的检测器相比取得了优异的结果。 本文提出一种基于非负约束联合协作表示与联合字典的高光谱异常检测方法。 Shizhen Chang,Pedram Ghamisi cs.CV

authors_text: Dayan Guan,Jiaxing Huang,Aoran Xiao,Shijian Lu
title: Unbiased Subclass Regularization for Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 半监督语义分割的无偏子类正则化
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/Dayan-Guan/USRN
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/Dayan-Guan/USRN
abstract: Semi-supervised semantic segmentation learns from small amounts of labelled images and large amounts of unlabelled images, which has witnessed impressive progress with the recent advance of deep neural networks. However, it often suffers from severe class-bias problem while exploring the unlabelled images, largely due to the clear pixel-wise class imbalance in the labelled images. This paper presents an unbiased subclass regularization network (USRN) that alleviates the class imbalance issue by learning class-unbiased segmentation from balanced subclass distributions. We build the balanced subclass distributions by clustering pixels of each original class into multiple subclasses of similar sizes, which provide class-balanced pseudo supervision to regularize the class-biased segmentation. In addition, we design an entropy-based gate mechanism to coordinate learning between the original classes and the clustered subclasses which facilitates subclass regularization effectively by suppressing unconfident subclass predictions. Extensive experiments over multiple public benchmarks show that USRN achieves superior performance as compared with the state-of-the-art.
summary: Semi-supervised semantic segmentation learns from small amounts of labelled images and large amounts of unlabelled images, which has witnessed impressive progress with the recent advance of deep neural networks. However, it often suffers from severe class-bias problem while exploring the unlabelled images, largely due to the clear pixel-wise class imbalance in the labelled images. This paper presents an unbiased subclass regularization network (USRN) that alleviates the class imbalance issue by learning class-unbiased segmentation from balanced subclass distributions. We build the balanced subclass distributions by clustering pixels of each original class into multiple subclasses of similar sizes, which provide class-balanced pseudo supervision to regularize the class-biased segmentation. In addition, we design an entropy-based gate mechanism to coordinate learning between the original classes and the clustered subclasses which facilitates subclass regularization effectively by suppressing unconfident subclass predictions. Extensive experiments over multiple public benchmarks show that USRN achieves superior performance as compared with the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 半监督语义分割从少量标记图像和大量未标记图像中学习，随着深度神经网络的最新进展，它取得了令人印象深刻的进展。然而，在探索未标记图像时，它经常遇到严重的类偏差问题，这很大程度上是由于标记图像中明显的像素类不平衡造成的。本文提出了一种无偏子类正则化网络（USRN），它通过从平衡子类分布中学习类无偏分割来缓解类不平衡问题。我们通过将每个原始类的像素聚类为多个大小相似的子类来构建平衡的子类分布，这提供了类平衡的伪监督来规范类偏向分割。此外，我们设计了一种基于熵的门机制来协调原始类和聚类子类之间的学习，通过抑制不可信的子类预测来有效地促进子类正则化。对多个公共基准的广泛实验表明，与最先进的技术相比，USRN 实现了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无偏子类正则化网络（USRN），用于解决半监督语义分割中的类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 半监督语义分割在利用未标记图像时易受类别偏差影响，主要由于标记图像中像素级类别不平衡导致伪监督不准确。
AI.method: 通过将每个原始类别像素聚类为多个平衡子类，构建平衡子类分布提供类平衡伪监督；设计基于熵的门控机制协调原始类别与子类间的学习，抑制不自信预测。
AI.result: 在多个公开基准数据集上实验表明，USRN性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: USRN通过子类正则化有效缓解类别偏差问题，提升了半监督语义分割的准确性。

authors_text: Zhaoning Sun,Nico Messikommer,Daniel Gehrig,Davide Scaramuzza
title: ESS: Learning Event-based Semantic Segmentation from Still Images
title_zh: ESS：从静态图像中学习基于事件的语义分割
abstract: Retrieving accurate semantic information in challenging high dynamic range (HDR) and high-speed conditions remains an open challenge for image-based algorithms due to severe image degradations. Event cameras promise to address these challenges since they feature a much higher dynamic range and are resilient to motion blur. Nonetheless, semantic segmentation with event cameras is still in its infancy which is chiefly due to the lack of high-quality, labeled datasets. In this work, we introduce ESS (Event-based Semantic Segmentation), which tackles this problem by directly transferring the semantic segmentation task from existing labeled image datasets to unlabeled events via unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). Compared to existing UDA methods, our approach aligns recurrent, motion-invariant event embeddings with image embeddings. For this reason, our method neither requires video data nor per-pixel alignment between images and events and, crucially, does not need to hallucinate motion from still images. Additionally, we introduce DSEC-Semantic, the first large-scale event-based dataset with fine-grained labels. We show that using image labels alone, ESS outperforms existing UDA approaches, and when combined with event labels, it even outperforms state-of-the-art supervised approaches on both DDD17 and DSEC-Semantic. Finally, ESS is general-purpose, which unlocks the vast amount of existing labeled image datasets and paves the way for new and exciting research directions in new fields previously inaccessible for event cameras.
summary: Retrieving accurate semantic information in challenging high dynamic range (HDR) and high-speed conditions remains an open challenge for image-based algorithms due to severe image degradations. Event cameras promise to address these challenges since they feature a much higher dynamic range and are resilient to motion blur. Nonetheless, semantic segmentation with event cameras is still in its infancy which is chiefly due to the lack of high-quality, labeled datasets. In this work, we introduce ESS (Event-based Semantic Segmentation), which tackles this problem by directly transferring the semantic segmentation task from existing labeled image datasets to unlabeled events via unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). Compared to existing UDA methods, our approach aligns recurrent, motion-invariant event embeddings with image embeddings. For this reason, our method neither requires video data nor per-pixel alignment between images and events and, crucially, does not need to hallucinate motion from still images. Additionally, we introduce DSEC-Semantic, the first large-scale event-based dataset with fine-grained labels. We show that using image labels alone, ESS outperforms existing UDA approaches, and when combined with event labels, it even outperforms state-of-the-art supervised approaches on both DDD17 and DSEC-Semantic. Finally, ESS is general-purpose, which unlocks the vast amount of existing labeled image datasets and paves the way for new and exciting research directions in new fields previously inaccessible for event cameras.
abstract_zh: 由于严重的图像质量下降，在具有挑战性的高动态范围 (HDR) 和高速条件下检索准确的语义信息对于基于图像的算法来说仍然是一个开放的挑战。事件摄像机有望解决这些挑战，因为它们具有更高的动态范围并且能够抵抗运动模糊。尽管如此，事件相机的语义分割仍处于起步阶段，这主要是由于缺乏高质量的标记数据集。在这项工作中，我们引入了 ESS（基于事件的语义分割），它通过无监督域适应（UDA）直接将语义分割任务从现有标记图像数据集转移到未标记事件来解决这个问题。与现有的 UDA 方法相比，我们的方法将循环的、运动不变的事件嵌入与图像嵌入对齐。因此，我们的方法既不需要视频数据，也不需要图像和事件之间的每像素对齐，而且最重要的是，不需要从静止图像中产生运动幻觉。此外，我们还引入了 DSEC-Semantic，这是第一个具有细粒度标签的大规模基于事件的数据集。我们表明，单独使用图像标签，ESS 优于现有的 UDA 方法，当与事件标签结合使用时，它甚至优于 DDD17 和 DSEC-Semantic 上最先进的监督方法。最后，ESS 是通用的，它解锁了大量现有的标记图像数据集，并为事件相机以前无法进入的新领域的新的、令人兴奋的研究方向铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ESS方法，通过无监督域适应（UDA）从静态图像中学习事件驱动的语义分割，解决事件相机在高动态范围和高速条件下语义分割数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统图像算法在高动态范围和高速场景下因图像退化难以获取准确语义信息，而事件相机虽具备高动态范围和抗运动模糊特性，但缺乏高质量标注数据导致语义分割研究处于初级阶段。
AI.method: ESS通过无监督域适应直接迁移现有图像数据集的语义分割任务至未标注事件数据，利用循环运动不变事件嵌入与图像嵌入对齐，无需视频数据、像素级对齐或从静态图像生成运动信息，并发布首个大规模事件标注数据集DSEC-Semantic。
AI.result: 仅使用图像标签时，ESS优于现有UDA方法；结合事件标签后，在DDD17和DSEC-Semantic数据集上超越最新监督方法，且方法具有通用性。
AI.conclusion: ESS通过迁移学习释放现有图像数据集价值，为事件相机在新领域研究开辟道路，同时推动事件相机语义分割技术发展。

search_text: ESS: Learning Event-based Semantic Segmentation from Still Images ESS：从静态图像中学习基于事件的语义分割 Retrieving accurate semantic information in challenging high dynamic range (HDR) and high-speed conditions remains an open challenge for image-based algorithms due to severe image degradations. Additionally, we introduce DSEC-Semantic, the first large-scale event-based dataset with fine-grained labels. We show that using image labels alone, ESS outperforms existing UDA approaches, and when combined with event labels, it even outperforms state-of-the-art supervised approaches on both DDD17 and DSEC-Semantic. Finally, ESS is general-purpose, which unlocks the vast amount of existing labeled image datasets and paves the way for new and exciting research directions in new fields previously inaccessible for event cameras. 由于严重的图像质量下降，在具有挑战性的高动态范围 (HDR) 和高速条件下检索准确的语义信息对于基于图像的算法来说仍然是一个开放的挑战。事件摄像机有望解决这些挑战，因为它们具有更高的动态范围并且能够抵抗运动模糊。尽管如此，事件相机的语义分割仍处于起步阶段，这主要是由于缺乏高质量的标记数据集。在这项工作中，我们引入了 ESS（基于事件的语义分割），它通过无监督域适应（UDA）直接将语义分割任务从现有标记图像数据集转移到未标记事件来解决这个问题。与现有的 UDA 方法相比，我们的方法将循环的、运动不变的事件嵌入与图像嵌入对齐。因此，我们的方法既不需要视频数据，也不需要图像和事件之间的每像素对齐，而且最重要的是，不需要从静止图像中产生运动幻觉。此外，我们还引入了 DSEC-Semantic，这是第一个具有细粒度标签的大规模基于事件的数据集。我们表明，单独使用图像标签，ESS 优于现有的 UDA 方法，当与事件标签结合使用时，它甚至优于 DDD17 和 DSEC-Semantic 上最先进的监督方法。最后，ESS 是通用的，它解锁了大量现有的标记图像数据集，并为事件相机以前无法进入的新领域的新的、令人兴奋的研究方向铺平了道路。 本文提出ESS方法，通过无监督域适应（UDA）从静态图像中学习事件驱动的语义分割，解决事件相机在高动态范围和高速条件下语义分割数据不足的问题。 Zhaoning Sun,Nico Messikommer,Daniel Gehrig,Davide Scaramuzza cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Kundan Kumar,Sumanshu Agarwal
title: Parametric Scaling of Preprocessing assisted U-net Architecture for Improvised Retinal Vessel Segmentation
title_zh: 用于简易视网膜血管分割的预处理辅助 U-net 架构的参数缩放
abstract: Extracting blood vessels from retinal fundus images plays a decisive role in diagnosing the progression in pertinent diseases. In medical image analysis, vessel extraction is a semantic binary segmentation problem, where blood vasculature needs to be extracted from the background. Here, we present an image enhancement technique based on the morphological preprocessing coupled with a scaled U-net architecture. Despite a relatively less number of trainable network parameters, the scaled version of U-net architecture provides better performance compare to other methods in the domain. We validated the proposed method on retinal fundus images from the DRIVE database. A significant improvement as compared to the other algorithms in the domain, in terms of the area under ROC curve (>0.9762) and classification accuracy (>95.47%) are evident from the results. Furthermore, the proposed method is resistant to the central vessel reflex while sensitive to detect blood vessels in the presence of background items viz. exudates, optic disc, and fovea.
summary: Extracting blood vessels from retinal fundus images plays a decisive role in diagnosing the progression in pertinent diseases. In medical image analysis, vessel extraction is a semantic binary segmentation problem, where blood vasculature needs to be extracted from the background. Here, we present an image enhancement technique based on the morphological preprocessing coupled with a scaled U-net architecture. Despite a relatively less number of trainable network parameters, the scaled version of U-net architecture provides better performance compare to other methods in the domain. We validated the proposed method on retinal fundus images from the DRIVE database. A significant improvement as compared to the other algorithms in the domain, in terms of the area under ROC curve (>0.9762) and classification accuracy (>95.47%) are evident from the results. Furthermore, the proposed method is resistant to the central vessel reflex while sensitive to detect blood vessels in the presence of background items viz. exudates, optic disc, and fovea.
abstract_zh: 从视网膜眼底图像中提取血管在诊断相关疾病的进展中起着决定性作用。在医学图像分析中，血管提取是一个语义二元分割问题，需要从背景中提取血管系统。在这里，我们提出了一种基于形态学预处理和缩放 U 网架构的图像增强技术。尽管可训练的网络参数数量相对较少，但与该领域的其他方法相比，U-net 架构的缩放版本提供了更好的性能。我们在 DRIVE 数据库中的视网膜眼底图像上验证了所提出的方法。结果表明，与该领域的其他算法相比，ROC 曲线下面积 (>0.9762) 和分类精度 (>95.47%) 有了显着改进。此外，所提出的方法对中央血管反射具有抵抗力，同时对检测存在背景项目即血管的情况敏感。渗出液、视盘和中央凹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合形态学预处理与缩放U-net架构的改进型视网膜血管分割方法。
AI.motivation: 视网膜血管分割对眼科疾病诊断至关重要，但现有方法在处理血管反射和背景干扰时存在不足，需更高效准确的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用形态学预处理增强图像质量，结合参数量较少的缩放U-net架构进行分割，提升模型鲁棒性与检测精度。
AI.result: 在DRIVE数据库上达到ROC曲线下面积>0.9762、分类准确率>95.47%，有效抑制中央血管反射并准确检测渗出物、视盘等背景结构中的血管。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持较低参数量的同时显著提升分割性能，为视网膜血管分析提供高效可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Arvind Raghunathan,Devesh K. Jha,Diego Romeres
title: PYROBOCOP: Python-based Robotic Control & Optimization Package for Manipulation
title_zh: PYROBOCOP：基于 Python 的机器人控制和操作优化包
comment: 7 pages, ICRA22. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.03220
comments: 7 pages, ICRA22. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.03220
abstract: PYROBOCOP is a Python-based package for control, optimization and estimation of robotic systems described by nonlinear Differential Algebraic Equations (DAEs). In particular, the package can handle systems with contacts that are described by complementarity constraints and provides a general framework for specifying obstacle avoidance constraints. The package performs direct transcription of the DAEs into a set of nonlinear equations by performing orthogonal collocation on finite elements. PYROBOCOP provides automatic reformulation of the complementarity constraints that are tractable to NLP solvers to perform optimization of robotic systems. The package is interfaced with ADOL-C[1] for obtaining sparse derivatives by automatic differentiation and IPOPT[2] for performing optimization. We evaluate PYROBOCOP on several manipulation problems for control and estimation.
summary: PYROBOCOP is a Python-based package for control, optimization and estimation of robotic systems described by nonlinear Differential Algebraic Equations (DAEs). In particular, the package can handle systems with contacts that are described by complementarity constraints and provides a general framework for specifying obstacle avoidance constraints. The package performs direct transcription of the DAEs into a set of nonlinear equations by performing orthogonal collocation on finite elements. PYROBOCOP provides automatic reformulation of the complementarity constraints that are tractable to NLP solvers to perform optimization of robotic systems. The package is interfaced with ADOL-C[1] for obtaining sparse derivatives by automatic differentiation and IPOPT[2] for performing optimization. We evaluate PYROBOCOP on several manipulation problems for control and estimation.
abstract_zh: PYROBOCOP 是一个基于 Python 的软件包，用于通过非线性微分代数方程 (DAE) 描述的机器人系统的控制、优化和估计。特别是，该包可以处理具有由互补约束描述的接触的系统，并提供用于指定避障约束的通用框架。该软件包通过对有限元执行正交配置，将 DAE 直接转录为一组非线性方程。 PYROBOCOP 提供了互补约束的自动重新表述，这些约束易于 NLP 求解器处理以执行机器人系统的优化。该软件包与 ADOL-C[1] 连接，通过自动微分获得稀疏导数，并与 IPOPT[2] 连接以执行优化。我们评估 PYROBOCOP 的几个控制和估计操纵问题。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个基于Python的机器人控制与优化工具包PYROBOCOP，用于处理非线性微分代数方程（DAEs）描述的机器人系统，特别是涉及接触和互补约束的场景。
AI.motivation: 现有工具难以高效处理具有接触约束和复杂非线性动态的机器人系统优化问题，需开发通用框架以支持障碍物规避和互补约束的自动处理。
AI.method: 通过正交配置法将DAEs转录为非线性方程，自动重构互补约束以适配NLP求解器，并集成ADOL-C进行稀疏导数计算及IPOPT进行优化。
AI.result: 在多个机械臂操作任务中验证了PYROBOCOP的有效性，展示了其在控制与估计中的性能。
AI.conclusion: PYROBOCOP为涉及接触和复杂约束的机器人系统提供了通用求解框架，可支持研究与工程应用中的优化需求。

authors_text: Shikib Mehri,Jinho Choi,Luis Fernando D'Haro,Jan Deriu,Maxine Eskenazi,Milica Gasic,Kallirroi Georgila,Dilek Hakkani-Tur,Zekang Li,Verena Rieser,Samira Shaikh,David Traum,Yi-Ting Yeh,Zhou Yu,Yizhe Zhang,Chen Zhang
title: Report from the NSF Future Directions Workshop on Automatic Evaluation of Dialog: Research Directions and Challenges
title_zh: NSF 未来方向研讨会关于自动评估对话的报告：研究方向和挑战
comment: Report from the NSF AED Workshop (http://dialrc.org/AED/)
comments: Report from the NSF AED Workshop (http://dialrc.org/AED/)
abstract: This is a report on the NSF Future Directions Workshop on Automatic Evaluation of Dialog. The workshop explored the current state of the art along with its limitations and suggested promising directions for future work in this important and very rapidly changing area of research.
summary: This is a report on the NSF Future Directions Workshop on Automatic Evaluation of Dialog. The workshop explored the current state of the art along with its limitations and suggested promising directions for future work in this important and very rapidly changing area of research.
abstract_zh: 这是关于 NSF 对话自动评估未来方向研讨会的报告。研讨会探讨了当前的技术水平及其局限性，并为这一重要且快速变化的研究领域的未来工作提出了有希望的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文是关于NSF未来方向研讨会的报告，探讨了对话系统自动评估的现状、局限性及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 对话系统技术发展迅速，但现有自动评估方法存在局限性，需明确研究方向以推动该领域进步。
AI.method: 通过研讨会形式，汇集领域专家讨论当前技术状态，分析不足并提出未来研究建议。
AI.result: 明确了自动评估对话系统的挑战，提出了改进评估指标、数据集及跨领域适用性的研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 自动评估对话系统需多方协作，结合多维度指标与真实场景验证，以促进技术实际应用与优化。

authors_text: Danilo Avola,Marco Cascio,Luigi Cinque,Alessio Fagioli,Gian Luca Foresti,Marco Raoul Marini,Daniele Pannone
title: Analyzing EEG Data with Machine and Deep Learning: A Benchmark
title_zh: 使用机器和深度学习分析脑电图数据：基准
abstract: Nowadays, machine and deep learning techniques are widely used in different areas, ranging from economics to biology. In general, these techniques can be used in two ways: trying to adapt well-known models and architectures to the available data, or designing custom architectures. In both cases, to speed up the research process, it is useful to know which type of models work best for a specific problem and/or data type. By focusing on EEG signal analysis, and for the first time in literature, in this paper a benchmark of machine and deep learning for EEG signal classification is proposed. For our experiments we used the four most widespread models, i.e., multilayer perceptron, convolutional neural network, long short-term memory, and gated recurrent unit, highlighting which one can be a good starting point for developing EEG classification models.
summary: Nowadays, machine and deep learning techniques are widely used in different areas, ranging from economics to biology. In general, these techniques can be used in two ways: trying to adapt well-known models and architectures to the available data, or designing custom architectures. In both cases, to speed up the research process, it is useful to know which type of models work best for a specific problem and/or data type. By focusing on EEG signal analysis, and for the first time in literature, in this paper a benchmark of machine and deep learning for EEG signal classification is proposed. For our experiments we used the four most widespread models, i.e., multilayer perceptron, convolutional neural network, long short-term memory, and gated recurrent unit, highlighting which one can be a good starting point for developing EEG classification models.
abstract_zh: 如今，机器和深度学习技术广泛应用于从经济学到生物学的不同领域。一般来说，这些技术可以通过两种方式使用：尝试使众所周知的模型和架​​构适应可用数据，或者设计自定义架构。在这两种情况下，为了加快研究过程，了解哪种类型的模型最适合特定问题和/或数据类型非常有用。本文通过关注脑电图信号分析，首次在文献中提出了脑电图信号分类的机器和深度学习基准。在我们的实验中，我们使用了四种最广泛的模型，即多层感知器、卷积神经网络、长短期记忆和门控循环单元，强调哪一个可以成为开发脑电图分类模型的良好起点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个针对脑电图（EEG）信号分类的机器学习和深度学习基准测试，比较四种主流模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 为加速EEG分类研究，需明确不同模型与数据类型的适配性，但此前缺乏系统性基准对比。
AI.method: 采用多层感知机（MLP）、卷积神经网络（CNN）、长短期记忆网络（LSTM）和门控循环单元（GRU）四种模型进行EEG分类实验。
AI.result: 评估了各模型在EEG分类任务中的表现，识别出适合作为后续研究起点的模型类型。
AI.conclusion: 建立的基准为EEG分类模型选择提供参考，有助于研究者快速定位有效方法。

authors_text: Changqing Xu,Yi Liu,Yintang Yang
title: Ultra-low Latency Spiking Neural Networks with Spatio-Temporal Compression and Synaptic Convolutional Block
title_zh: 具有时空压缩和突触卷积块的超低延迟尖峰神经网络
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs), as one of the brain-inspired models, has spatio-temporal information processing capability, low power feature, and high biological plausibility. The effective spatio-temporal feature makes it suitable for event streams classification. However, neuromorphic datasets, such as N-MNIST, CIFAR10-DVS, DVS128-gesture, need to aggregate individual events into frames with a new higher temporal resolution for event stream classification, which causes high training and inference latency. In this work, we proposed a spatio-temporal compression method to aggregate individual events into a few time steps of synaptic current to reduce the training and inference latency. To keep the accuracy of SNNs under high compression ratios, we also proposed a synaptic convolutional block to balance the dramatic change between adjacent time steps. And multi-threshold Leaky Integrate-and-Fire (LIF) with learnable membrane time constant is introduced to increase its information processing capability. We evaluate the proposed method for event streams classification tasks on neuromorphic N-MNIST, CIFAR10-DVS, DVS128 gesture datasets. The experiment results show that our proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art accuracy on nearly all datasets, using fewer time steps.
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs), as one of the brain-inspired models, has spatio-temporal information processing capability, low power feature, and high biological plausibility. The effective spatio-temporal feature makes it suitable for event streams classification. However, neuromorphic datasets, such as N-MNIST, CIFAR10-DVS, DVS128-gesture, need to aggregate individual events into frames with a new higher temporal resolution for event stream classification, which causes high training and inference latency. In this work, we proposed a spatio-temporal compression method to aggregate individual events into a few time steps of synaptic current to reduce the training and inference latency. To keep the accuracy of SNNs under high compression ratios, we also proposed a synaptic convolutional block to balance the dramatic change between adjacent time steps. And multi-threshold Leaky Integrate-and-Fire (LIF) with learnable membrane time constant is introduced to increase its information processing capability. We evaluate the proposed method for event streams classification tasks on neuromorphic N-MNIST, CIFAR10-DVS, DVS128 gesture datasets. The experiment results show that our proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art accuracy on nearly all datasets, using fewer time steps.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）作为类脑模型之一，具有时空信息处理能力、低功耗特性和较高的生物学合理性。有效的时空特征使其适合事件流分类。然而，神经形态数据集（例如 N-MNIST、CIFAR10-DVS、DVS128-gesture）需要将单个事件聚合到具有新的更高时间分辨率的帧中以进行事件流分类，这会导致较高的训练和推理延迟。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种时空压缩方法，将单个事件聚合成突触电流的几个时间步骤，以减少训练和推理延迟。为了在高压缩比下保持 SNN 的准确性，我们还提出了突触卷积块来平衡相邻时间步之间的巨大变化。并引入具有可学习膜时间常数的多阈值Leaky Integrate-and-Fire（LIF）来提高其信息处理能力。我们在神经形态 N-MNIST、CIFAR10-DVS、DVS128 手势数据集上评估了所提出的事件流分类任务方法。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法使用更少的时间步长，在几乎所有数据集上都优于最先进的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种具有时空压缩和突触卷积块的超低延迟脉冲神经网络，用于事件流分类任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管脉冲神经网络（SNN）具有时空信息处理能力和低功耗特性，但在处理事件流分类任务时，由于需要将事件聚合为高时间分辨率的帧，导致训练和推理延迟较高。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种时空压缩方法，将事件聚合为少量时间步的突触电流以减少延迟。同时引入突触卷积块以保持高压缩比下的分类精度，并采用多阈值漏积分放电（LIF）模型提升信息处理能力。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的方法在N-MNIST、CIFAR10-DVS和DVS128-gesture等数据集上均优于现有方法，且使用更少的时间步。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法有效降低了SNN在事件流分类任务中的延迟，同时保持了较高的分类精度。

authors_text: Tithi Parna Das,Sheetal Praharaj,Sarita Swain,Sumanshu Agarwal,Kundan Kumar
title: Application of Top-hat Transformation for Enhanced Blood Vessel Extraction
title_zh: 顶帽变换在增强血管提取中的应用
abstract: In the medical domain, different computer-aided diagnosis systems have been proposed to extract blood vessels from retinal fundus images for the clinical treatment of vascular diseases. Accurate extraction of blood vessels from the fundus images using a computer-generated method can help the clinician to produce timely and accurate reports for the patient suffering from these diseases. In this article, we integrate top-hat based preprocessing approach with fine-tuned B-COSFIRE filter to achieve more accurate segregation of blood vessel pixels from the background. The use of top-hat transformation in the preprocessing stage enhances the efficacy of the algorithm to extract blood vessels in presence of structures like fovea, exudates, haemorrhages, etc. Furthermore, to reduce the false positives, small clusters of blood vessel pixels are removed in the postprocessing stage. Further, we find that the proposed algorithm is more efficient as compared to various modern algorithms reported in the literature.
summary: In the medical domain, different computer-aided diagnosis systems have been proposed to extract blood vessels from retinal fundus images for the clinical treatment of vascular diseases. Accurate extraction of blood vessels from the fundus images using a computer-generated method can help the clinician to produce timely and accurate reports for the patient suffering from these diseases. In this article, we integrate top-hat based preprocessing approach with fine-tuned B-COSFIRE filter to achieve more accurate segregation of blood vessel pixels from the background. The use of top-hat transformation in the preprocessing stage enhances the efficacy of the algorithm to extract blood vessels in presence of structures like fovea, exudates, haemorrhages, etc. Furthermore, to reduce the false positives, small clusters of blood vessel pixels are removed in the postprocessing stage. Further, we find that the proposed algorithm is more efficient as compared to various modern algorithms reported in the literature.
abstract_zh: 在医学领域，已经提出了不同的计算机辅助诊断系统从视网膜眼底图像中提取血管，用于血管疾病的临床治疗。使用计算机生成的方法从眼底图像中准确提取血管可以帮助临床医生为患有这些疾病的患者提供及时、准确的报告。在本文中，我们将基于顶帽的预处理方法与微调的 B-COSFIRE 滤波器相结合，以实现血管像素与背景的更准确分离。在预处理阶段使用顶帽变换增强了算法在存在中央凹、渗出物、出血等结构的情况下提取血管的效率。此外，为了减少误报，在后处理阶段去除了小簇血管像素。此外，我们发现所提出的算法比文献中报道的各种现代算法更有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合顶帽变换与优化B-COSFIRE滤波器的方法，以提升视网膜图像中血管的提取精度。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在复杂眼底病变区域（如渗出、出血）中易产生误检，需更鲁棒的血管分割方法辅助临床诊断。
AI.method: 采用顶帽变换增强血管对比度，结合微调后的B-COSFIRE滤波器进行特征提取，并通过后处理去除小尺寸误检区域。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在血管提取准确率与召回率上优于现有主流算法，且计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 顶帽变换与B-COSFIRE滤波器的联合应用可有效提升血管分割性能，为眼科疾病智能诊断提供可靠技术支撑。

search_text: Application of Top-hat Transformation for Enhanced Blood Vessel Extraction 顶帽变换在增强血管提取中的应用 In the medical domain, different computer-aided diagnosis systems have been proposed to extract blood vessels from retinal fundus images for the clinical treatment of vascular diseases. Accurate extraction of blood vessels from the fundus images using a computer-generated method can help the clinician to produce timely and accurate reports for the patient suffering from these diseases. In this article, we integrate top-hat based preprocessing approach with fine-tuned B-COSFIRE filter to achieve more accurate segregation of blood vessel pixels from the background. The use of top-hat transformation in the preprocessing stage enhances the efficacy of the algorithm to extract blood vessels in presence of structures like fovea, exudates, haemorrhages, etc. Furthermore, to reduce the false positives, small clusters of blood vessel pixels are removed in the postprocessing stage. Further, we find that the proposed algorithm is more efficient as compared to various modern algorithms reported in the literature. 在医学领域，已经提出了不同的计算机辅助诊断系统从视网膜眼底图像中提取血管，用于血管疾病的临床治疗。使用计算机生成的方法从眼底图像中准确提取血管可以帮助临床医生为患有这些疾病的患者提供及时、准确的报告。在本文中，我们将基于顶帽的预处理方法与微调的 B-COSFIRE 滤波器相结合，以实现血管像素与背景的更准确分离。在预处理阶段使用顶帽变换增强了算法在存在中央凹、渗出物、出血等结构的情况下提取血管的效率。此外，为了减少误报，在后处理阶段去除了小簇血管像素。此外，我们发现所提出的算法比文献中报道的各种现代算法更有效。 本文提出结合顶帽变换与优化B-COSFIRE滤波器的方法，以提升视网膜图像中血管的提取精度。 Tithi Parna Das,Sheetal Praharaj,Sarita Swain,Sumanshu Agarwal,Kundan Kumar eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jun Quan,Ze Wei,Qiang Gan,Jingqi Yao,Jingyi Lu,Yuchen Dong,Yiming Liu,Yi Zeng,Chao Zhang,Yongzhi Li,Huang Hu,Yingying He,Yang Yang,Daxin Jiang
title: FORCE: A Framework of Rule-Based Conversational Recommender System
title_zh: FORCE：基于规则的会话推荐系统框架
abstract: The conversational recommender systems (CRSs) have received extensive attention in recent years. However, most of the existing works focus on various deep learning models, which are largely limited by the requirement of large-scale human-annotated datasets. Such methods are not able to deal with the cold-start scenarios in industrial products. To alleviate the problem, we propose FORCE, a Framework Of Rule-based Conversational Recommender system that helps developers to quickly build CRS bots by simple configuration. We conduct experiments on two datasets in different languages and domains to verify its effectiveness and usability.
summary: The conversational recommender systems (CRSs) have received extensive attention in recent years. However, most of the existing works focus on various deep learning models, which are largely limited by the requirement of large-scale human-annotated datasets. Such methods are not able to deal with the cold-start scenarios in industrial products. To alleviate the problem, we propose FORCE, a Framework Of Rule-based Conversational Recommender system that helps developers to quickly build CRS bots by simple configuration. We conduct experiments on two datasets in different languages and domains to verify its effectiveness and usability.
abstract_zh: 近年来，对话式推荐系统（CRS）受到了广泛的关注。然而，现有的大多数工作都集中在各种深度学习模型上，这在很大程度上受到大规模人工注释数据集的要求的限制。这些方法无法处理工业产品中的冷启动场景。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了 FORCE，一个基于规则的会话推荐系统框架，可以帮助开发人员通过简单的配置快速构建 CRS 机器人。我们对不同语言和领域的两个数据集进行了实验，以验证其有效性和可用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FORCE框架，旨在通过基于规则的方法解决对话推荐系统在冷启动场景下的数据依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习驱动的对话推荐系统依赖大规模标注数据，难以应对工业场景中的冷启动问题，亟需一种轻量且灵活的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计FORCE框架，通过规则配置实现对话流程管理与推荐逻辑，减少对训练数据的依赖，支持多语言多领域快速部署。
AI.result: 在两个不同语言和领域的数据集上验证了FORCE的有效性，证明其在冷启动场景下的推荐性能和易用性。
AI.conclusion: FORCE框架为工业级对话推荐系统提供了低门槛、高适应性的解决方案，有效缓解了数据稀缺场景下的应用难题。

However, most of the existing works focus on various deep learning models, which are largely limited by the requirement of large-scale human-annotated datasets. Such methods are not able to deal with the cold-start scenarios in industrial products. To alleviate the problem, we propose FORCE, a Framework Of Rule-based Conversational Recommender system that helps developers to quickly build CRS bots by simple configuration. authors_text: Hao Liu,Xue-Cheng Tai,Ron Kimmel,Roland Glowinski
title: Elastica Models for Color Image Regularization
title_zh: 用于彩色图像正则化的 Elastica 模型
abstract: One classical approach to regularize color is to tream them as two dimensional surfaces embedded in a five dimensional spatial-chromatic space. In this case, a natural regularization term arises as the image surface area. Choosing the chromatic coordinates as dominating over the spatial ones, the image spatial coordinates could be thought of as a paramterization of the image surface manifold in a three dimensional color space. Minimizing the area of the image manifold leads to the Beltrami flow or mean curvature flow of the image surface in the 3D color space, while minimizing the elastica of the image surface yields an additional interesting regularization. Recently, the authors proposed a color elastica model, which minimizes both the surface area and elastica of the image manifold. In this paper, we propose to modify the color elastica and introduce two new models for color image regularization. The revised measures are motivated by the relations between the color elastica model, Euler's elastica model and the total variation model for gray level images. Compared to our previous color elastica model, the new models are direct extensions of Euler's elastica model to color images. The proposed models are nonlinear and challenging to minimize. To overcome this difficulty, two operator-splitting methods are suggested. Specifically, nonlinearities are decoupled by introducing new vector- and matrix-valued variables. Then, the minimization problems are converted to solving initial value problems which are time-discretized by operator splitting. Each subproblem, after splitting either, has a closed-form solution or can be solved efficiently. The effectiveness and advantages of the proposed models are demonstrated by comprehensive experiments. The benefits of incorporating the elastica of the image surface as regularization terms compared to common alternatives are empirically validated.
summary: One classical approach to regularize color is to tream them as two dimensional surfaces embedded in a five dimensional spatial-chromatic space. In this case, a natural regularization term arises as the image surface area. Choosing the chromatic coordinates as dominating over the spatial ones, the image spatial coordinates could be thought of as a paramterization of the image surface manifold in a three dimensional color space. Minimizing the area of the image manifold leads to the Beltrami flow or mean curvature flow of the image surface in the 3D color space, while minimizing the elastica of the image surface yields an additional interesting regularization. Recently, the authors proposed a color elastica model, which minimizes both the surface area and elastica of the image manifold. In this paper, we propose to modify the color elastica and introduce two new models for color image regularization. The revised measures are motivated by the relations between the color elastica model, Euler's elastica model and the total variation model for gray level images. Compared to our previous color elastica model, the new models are direct extensions of Euler's elastica model to color images. The proposed models are nonlinear and challenging to minimize. To overcome this difficulty, two operator-splitting methods are suggested. Specifically, nonlinearities are decoupled by introducing new vector- and matrix-valued variables. Then, the minimization problems are converted to solving initial value problems which are time-discretized by operator splitting. Each subproblem, after splitting either, has a closed-form solution or can be solved efficiently. The effectiveness and advantages of the proposed models are demonstrated by comprehensive experiments. The benefits of incorporating the elastica of the image surface as regularization terms compared to common alternatives are empirically validated.
abstract_zh: 规范颜色的一种经典方法是将它们视为嵌入五维空间色彩空间中的二维表面。在这种情况下，自然正则化项作为图像表面积出现。选择色度坐标优于空间坐标，图像空间坐标可以被认为是三维颜色空间中图像表面流形的参数化。最小化图像流形的面积会导致 3D 颜色空间中图像表面的贝尔特拉米流或平均曲率流，同时最小化图像表面的弹性会产生额外有趣的正则化。最近，作者提出了一种颜色弹性模型，该模型可以最小化图像流形的表面积和弹性。在本文中，我们建议修改颜色弹性并引入两种新的彩色图像正则化模型。修订后的措施是由彩色弹性模型、欧拉弹性模型和灰度图像的全变分模型之间的关系推动的。与我们之前的彩色弹性模型相比，新模型是欧拉弹性模型到彩色图像的直接扩展。所提出的模型是非线性的并且难以最小化。为了克服这个困难，提出了两种运算符拆分方法。具体来说，通过引入新的向量和矩阵值变量来解耦非线性。然后，将最小化问题转化为求解初值问题，并通过算子分裂进行时间离散。每个子问题在分裂之后都有一个封闭形式的解决方案或者可以有效地解决。通过综合实验证明了所提出模型的有效性和优势。与常见的替代方案相比，将图像表面的弹性作为正则化项的好处得到了经验验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新的颜色图像正则化模型，通过结合图像表面的面积和弹性来改进颜色弹性模型。
AI.motivation: 传统颜色正则化方法通过图像表面面积进行，但未考虑弹性项。本文旨在通过引入弹性项，扩展欧拉弹性模型到颜色图像，以提高正则化效果。
AI.method: 本文提出两种新的颜色弹性模型，通过引入向量和矩阵变量来解耦非线性项，并使用算子分裂方法将问题转化为可高效求解的初始值问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，新模型在颜色图像正则化方面优于传统方法，弹性项的引入有效提升了图像处理效果。
AI.conclusion: 新模型是欧拉弹性模型在颜色图像中的直接扩展，通过算子分裂方法可高效求解，实验验证了其有效性。

search_text: Elastica Models for Color Image Regularization 用于彩色图像正则化的 Elastica 模型 One classical approach to regularize color is to tream them as two dimensional surfaces embedded in a five dimensional spatial-chromatic space. In this case, a natural regularization term arises as the image surface area. Choosing the chromatic coordinates as dominating over the spatial ones, the image spatial coordinates could be thought of as a paramterization of the image surface manifold in a three dimensional color space. Minimizing the area of the image manifold leads to the Beltrami flow or mean curvature flow of the image surface in the 3D color space, while minimizing the elastica of the image surface yields an additional interesting regularization. Recently, the authors proposed a color elastica model, which minimizes both the surface area and elastica of the image manifold. In this paper, we propose to modify the color elastica and introduce two new models for color image regularization. The revised measures are motivated by the relations between the color elastica model, Euler's elastica model and the total variation model for gray level images. Compared to our previous color elastica model, the new models are direct extensions of Euler's elastica model to color images. The proposed models are nonlinear and challenging to minimize. To overcome this difficulty, two operator-splitting methods are suggested. Specifically, nonlinearities are decoupled by introducing new vector- and matrix-valued variables. Then, the minimization problems are converted to solving initial value problems which are time-discretized by operator splitting. Each subproblem, after splitting either, has a closed-form solution or can be solved efficiently. The effectiveness and advantages of the proposed models are demonstrated by comprehensive experiments. The benefits of incorporating the elastica of the image surface as regularization terms compared to common alternatives are empirically validated. 规范颜色的一种经典方法是将它们视为嵌入五维空间色彩空间中的二维表面。在这种情况下，自然正则化项作为图像表面积出现。选择色度坐标优于空间坐标，图像空间坐标可以被认为是三维颜色空间中图像表面流形的参数化。最小化图像流形的面积会导致 3D 颜色空间中图像表面的贝尔特拉米流或平均曲率流，同时最小化图像表面的弹性会产生额外有趣的正则化。最近，作者提出了一种颜色弹性模型，该模型可以最小化图像流形的表面积和弹性。在本文中，我们建议修改颜色弹性并引入两种新的彩色图像正则化模型。修订后的措施是由彩色弹性模型、欧拉弹性模型和灰度图像的全变分模型之间的关系推动的。与我们之前的彩色弹性模型相比，新模型是欧拉弹性模型到彩色图像的直接扩展。所提出的模型是非线性的并且难以最小化。为了克服这个困难，提出了两种运算符拆分方法。具体来说，通过引入新的向量和矩阵值变量来解耦非线性。然后，将最小化问题转化为求解初值问题，并通过算子分裂进行时间离散。每个子问题在分裂之后都有一个封闭形式的解决方案或者可以有效地解决。通过综合实验证明了所提出模型的有效性和优势。与常见的替代方案相比，将图像表面的弹性作为正则化项的好处得到了经验验证。 本文提出两种新的颜色图像正则化模型，通过结合图像表面的面积和弹性来改进颜色弹性模型。 Hao Liu,Xue-Cheng Tai,Ron Kimmel,Roland Glowinski cs.CV,math.NA

authors_text: Sam L. Polk,Kangning Cui,Aland H. Y. Chan,David A. Coomes,Robert J. Plemmons,James M. Murphy
title: Unsupervised Diffusion and Volume Maximization-Based Clustering of Hyperspectral Images
title_zh: 基于无监督扩散和体积最大化的高光谱图像聚类
abstract: Hyperspectral images taken from aircraft or satellites contain information from hundreds of spectral bands, within which lie latent lower-dimensional structures that can be exploited for classifying vegetation and other materials. A disadvantage of working with hyperspectral images is that, due to an inherent trade-off between spectral and spatial resolution, they have a relatively coarse spatial scale, meaning that single pixels may correspond to spatial regions containing multiple materials. This article introduces the Diffusion and Volume maximization-based Image Clustering (D-VIC) algorithm for unsupervised material clustering to address this problem. By directly incorporating pixel purity into its labeling procedure, D-VIC gives greater weight to pixels that correspond to a spatial region containing just a single material. D-VIC is shown to outperform comparable state-of-the-art methods in extensive experiments on a range of hyperspectral images, including land-use maps and highly mixed forest health surveys (in the context of ash dieback disease), implying that it is well-equipped for unsupervised material clustering of spectrally-mixed hyperspectral datasets.
summary: Hyperspectral images taken from aircraft or satellites contain information from hundreds of spectral bands, within which lie latent lower-dimensional structures that can be exploited for classifying vegetation and other materials. A disadvantage of working with hyperspectral images is that, due to an inherent trade-off between spectral and spatial resolution, they have a relatively coarse spatial scale, meaning that single pixels may correspond to spatial regions containing multiple materials. This article introduces the Diffusion and Volume maximization-based Image Clustering (D-VIC) algorithm for unsupervised material clustering to address this problem. By directly incorporating pixel purity into its labeling procedure, D-VIC gives greater weight to pixels that correspond to a spatial region containing just a single material. D-VIC is shown to outperform comparable state-of-the-art methods in extensive experiments on a range of hyperspectral images, including land-use maps and highly mixed forest health surveys (in the context of ash dieback disease), implying that it is well-equipped for unsupervised material clustering of spectrally-mixed hyperspectral datasets.
abstract_zh: 从飞机或卫星拍摄的高光谱图像包含来自数百个光谱带的信息，其中存在潜在的低维结构，可用于对植被和其他材料进行分类。使用高光谱图像的缺点是，由于光谱和空间分辨率之间固有的权衡，它们具有相对粗糙的空间尺度，这意味着单个像素可能对应于包含多种材质的空间区域。本文介绍了用于无监督材料聚类的基于扩散和体积最大化的图像聚类 (D-VIC) 算法来解决这个问题。通过直接将像素纯度纳入其标记程序，D-VIC 为与仅包含单一材料的空间区域相对应的像素赋予更大的权重。在一系列高光谱图像的广泛实验中，D-VIC 被证明优于同类最先进的方法，包括土地利用图和高度混合的森林健康调查（在灰枯病的背景下），这意味着它完全适合光谱混合高光谱数据集的无监督材料聚类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散和体积最大化的无监督聚类算法D-VIC，用于解决高光谱图像中因空间分辨率低导致的像素混合问题，实现材料分类。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像存在光谱与空间分辨率的固有矛盾，单个像素可能包含多种材料，现有方法难以有效处理这种光谱混合现象。
AI.method: 通过结合扩散过程与体积最大化策略，D-VIC算法在聚类过程中直接引入像素纯度权重，优先处理单一材料像素以提升分类准确性。
AI.result: 在多个高光谱数据集（如土地利用图、森林健康调查）的实验中，D-VIC显著优于现有先进方法，证明其对光谱混合数据的有效性。
AI.conclusion: D-VIC算法通过优化像素权重机制，成功解决了高光谱图像无监督聚类中的混合材料问题，适用于复杂光谱数据的分析任务。

authors_text: Xavier Pic,Marc Antonini
title: A constrained Shannon-Fano entropy coder for image storage in synthetic DNA
title_zh: 用于合成 DNA 图像存储的约束 Shannon-Fano 熵编码器
abstract: The exponentially increasing demand for data storage has been facing more and more challenges during the past years. The energy costs that it represents are also increasing, and the availability of the storage hardware is not able to follow the storage demand's trend. The short lifespan of conventional storage media -- 10 to 20 years - forces the duplication of the hardware and worsens the situation. The majority of this storage demand concerns "cold" data, data very rarely accessed but that has to be kept for long periods of time. The coding abilities of synthetic DNA, and its long durability (several hundred years), make it a serious candidate as an alternative storage media for "cold" data. In this paper, we propose a variable-length coding algorithm adapted to DNA data storage with improved performance. The proposed algorithm is based on a modified Shannon-Fano code that respects some biochemichal constraints imposed by the synthesis chemistry. We have inserted this code in a JPEG compression algorithm adapted to DNA image storage and we highlighted an improvement of the compression ratio ranging from 0.5 up to 2 bits per nucleotide compared to the state-of-the-art solution, without affecting the reconstruction quality.
summary: The exponentially increasing demand for data storage has been facing more and more challenges during the past years. The energy costs that it represents are also increasing, and the availability of the storage hardware is not able to follow the storage demand's trend. The short lifespan of conventional storage media -- 10 to 20 years - forces the duplication of the hardware and worsens the situation. The majority of this storage demand concerns "cold" data, data very rarely accessed but that has to be kept for long periods of time. The coding abilities of synthetic DNA, and its long durability (several hundred years), make it a serious candidate as an alternative storage media for "cold" data. In this paper, we propose a variable-length coding algorithm adapted to DNA data storage with improved performance. The proposed algorithm is based on a modified Shannon-Fano code that respects some biochemichal constraints imposed by the synthesis chemistry. We have inserted this code in a JPEG compression algorithm adapted to DNA image storage and we highlighted an improvement of the compression ratio ranging from 0.5 up to 2 bits per nucleotide compared to the state-of-the-art solution, without affecting the reconstruction quality.
abstract_zh: 过去几年，数据存储需求呈指数级增长，但也面临着越来越多的挑战。它所代表的能源成本也在增加，并且存储硬件的可用性无法跟上存储需求的趋势。传统存储介质的使用寿命较短（10到20年），迫使硬件重复，并使情况变得更糟。这种存储需求的大部分涉及“冷”数据，这些数据很少被访问，但必须保存很长时间。合成 DNA 的编码能力及其长期耐用性（数百年）使其成为“冷”数据替代存储介质的重要候选者。在本文中，我们提出了一种适用于 DNA 数据存储的可变长度编码算法，并提高了性能。所提出的算法基于修改后的 Shannon-Fano 代码，该代码尊重合成化学施加的一些生物化学约束。我们已将此代码插入到适用于 DNA 图像存储的 JPEG 压缩算法中，并且与最先进的解决方案相比，我们强调了压缩率从每核苷酸 0.5 到 2 位的改进，且不影响重建质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的香农-范诺编码算法，用于DNA存储中的图像压缩，同时满足生物化学约束条件。
AI.motivation: 传统存储介质存在能耗高、寿命短等问题，而合成DNA具有数百年寿命且适合存储冷数据，因此需要开发高效的DNA存储编码方案。
AI.method: 基于改进的香农-范诺编码设计变量长度编码算法，结合JPEG压缩框架并适配DNA存储的生物化学约束条件。
AI.result: 相比现有方案，压缩比提升0.5至2比特/核苷酸，且不降低图像重建质量。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在保证数据完整性的同时提升了DNA存储效率，为冷数据长期存储提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Dennis Madsen,Jonathan Aellen,Andreas Morel-Forster,Thomas Vetter,Marcel Lüthi
title: GiNGR: Generalized Iterative Non-Rigid Point Cloud and Surface Registration Using Gaussian Process Regression
title_zh: GiNGR：使用高斯过程回归的广义迭代非刚性点云和表面配准
abstract: In this paper, we unify popular non-rigid registration methods for point sets and surfaces under our general framework, GiNGR. GiNGR builds upon Gaussian Process Morphable Models (GPMM) and hence separates modeling the deformation prior from model adaptation for registration. In addition, it provides explainable hyperparameters, multi-resolution registration, trivial inclusion of expert annotation, and the ability to use and combine analytical and statistical deformation priors. But more importantly, the reformulation allows for a direct comparison of registration methods. Instead of using a general solver in the optimization step, we show how Gaussian process regression (GPR) iteratively can warp a reference onto a target, leading to smooth deformations following the prior for any dense, sparse, or partial estimated correspondences in a principled way. We show how the popular CPD and ICP algorithms can be directly explained with GiNGR. Furthermore, we show how existing algorithms in the GiNGR framework can perform probabilistic registration to obtain a distribution of different registrations instead of a single best registration. This can be used to analyze the uncertainty e.g. when registering partial observations. GiNGR is publicly available and fully modular to allow for domain-specific prior construction.
summary: In this paper, we unify popular non-rigid registration methods for point sets and surfaces under our general framework, GiNGR. GiNGR builds upon Gaussian Process Morphable Models (GPMM) and hence separates modeling the deformation prior from model adaptation for registration. In addition, it provides explainable hyperparameters, multi-resolution registration, trivial inclusion of expert annotation, and the ability to use and combine analytical and statistical deformation priors. But more importantly, the reformulation allows for a direct comparison of registration methods. Instead of using a general solver in the optimization step, we show how Gaussian process regression (GPR) iteratively can warp a reference onto a target, leading to smooth deformations following the prior for any dense, sparse, or partial estimated correspondences in a principled way. We show how the popular CPD and ICP algorithms can be directly explained with GiNGR. Furthermore, we show how existing algorithms in the GiNGR framework can perform probabilistic registration to obtain a distribution of different registrations instead of a single best registration. This can be used to analyze the uncertainty e.g. when registering partial observations. GiNGR is publicly available and fully modular to allow for domain-specific prior construction.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们在通用框架 GiNGR 下统一了点集和曲面的流行非刚性配准方法。 GiNGR 基于高斯过程可变形模型 (GPMM)，因此将变形建模与配准模型适应分开。此外，它还提供可解释的超参数、多分辨率配准、专家注释的简单包含，以及使用和组合分析和统计变形先验的能力。但更重要的是，重新制定允许对注册方法进行直接比较。我们在优化步骤中没有使用通用求解器，而是展示了高斯过程回归（GPR）如何迭代地将参考扭曲到目标上，从而以原则性的方式实现任何密集、稀疏或部分估计对应关系的先验平滑变形。我们展示了如何用 GiNGR 直接解释流行的 CPD 和 ICP 算法。此外，我们还展示了 GiNGR 框架中的现有算法如何执行概率配准以获得不同配准的分布，而不是单个最佳配准。这可以用来分析不确定性，例如记录部分观察结果时。 GiNGR 是公开可用的且完全模块化，以允许特定领域的预先构建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GiNGR框架，统一非刚性点云和表面配准方法，基于高斯过程回归实现灵活变形建模。
AI.motivation: 现有非刚性配准方法缺乏统一框架，难以比较和扩展，且难以处理稀疏/部分对应关系及不确定性分析。
AI.method: 基于高斯过程形态模型（GPMM），分离形变先验与模型适应，通过高斯过程回归迭代优化参考到目标的变形，支持多分辨率、专家注释及解析与统计先验结合。
AI.result: 成功解释CPD和ICP算法，实现概率配准以分析部分观测的不确定性，并提供模块化框架支持领域特定先验构建。
AI.conclusion: GiNGR通过统一框架提升配准方法的可解释性、灵活性和鲁棒性，适用于多种点云与表面配准场景。

authors_text: Xavier Pic,Marc Antonini
title: Image Storage on Synthetic DNA Using Autoencoders
title_zh: 使用自动编码器对合成 DNA 进行图像存储
abstract: Over the past years, the ever-growing trend on data storage demand, more specifically for "cold" data (rarely accessed data), has motivated research for alternative systems of data storage. Because of its biochemical characteristics, synthetic DNA molecules are now considered as serious candidates for this new kind of storage. This paper presents some results on lossy image compression methods based on convolutional autoencoders adapted to DNA data storage. The model architectures presented here have been designed to efficiently compress images, encode them into a quaternary code, and finally store them into synthetic DNA molecules. This work also aims at making the compression models better fit the problematics that we encounter when storing data into DNA, namely the fact that the DNA writing, storing and reading methods are error prone processes. The main take away of this kind of compressive autoencoder is our quantization and the robustness to substitution errors thanks to the noise model that we use during training.
summary: Over the past years, the ever-growing trend on data storage demand, more specifically for "cold" data (rarely accessed data), has motivated research for alternative systems of data storage. Because of its biochemical characteristics, synthetic DNA molecules are now considered as serious candidates for this new kind of storage. This paper presents some results on lossy image compression methods based on convolutional autoencoders adapted to DNA data storage. The model architectures presented here have been designed to efficiently compress images, encode them into a quaternary code, and finally store them into synthetic DNA molecules. This work also aims at making the compression models better fit the problematics that we encounter when storing data into DNA, namely the fact that the DNA writing, storing and reading methods are error prone processes. The main take away of this kind of compressive autoencoder is our quantization and the robustness to substitution errors thanks to the noise model that we use during training.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年中，数据存储需求（更具体地说是“冷”数据（很少访问的数据））不断增长的趋势推动了对替代数据存储系统的研究。由于其生化特性，合成 DNA 分子现在被认为是这种新型存储的重要候选者。本文介绍了基于适用于 DNA 数据存储的卷积自动编码器的有损图像压缩方法的一些结果。这里介绍的模型架构旨在有效压缩图像，将其编码为四进制代码，最后将其存储到合成 DNA 分子中。这项工作还旨在使压缩模型更好地适应我们在将数据存储到 DNA 中时遇到的问题，即 DNA 写入、存储和读取方法是容易出错的过程。这种压缩自动编码器的主要优点是我们的量化和对替换错误的鲁棒性，这要归功于我们在训练期间使用的噪声模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用自编码器对图像进行压缩并存储到合成DNA中的方法。
AI.motivation: 随着数据存储需求增长，尤其是冷数据存储，传统存储方式存在局限，而DNA存储具有高密度和长期稳定性，但面临错误率高的问题，需开发适应DNA存储的压缩方法。
AI.method: 采用卷积自编码器实现图像有损压缩，将压缩后的数据编码为四进制代码，并通过引入噪声模型训练提高对DNA存储过程中替换错误的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该方法能有效压缩图像并适应DNA存储的错误特性，提高存储可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该压缩方法通过量化与噪声模型增强DNA存储鲁棒性，为DNA数据存储提供了可行的解决方案，并为后续研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Andrew Hoopes,Jocelyn S. Mora,Adrian V. Dalca,Bruce Fischl,Malte Hoffmann
title: SynthStrip: Skull-Stripping for Any Brain Image
title_zh: SynthStrip：任何大脑图像的头骨剥离
comment: 19 pages, 9 figures, 7 tables, skull stripping, brain extraction, image synthesis, MRI-contrast agnosticism, deep learning, final published version
comments: 19 pages, 9 figures, 7 tables, skull stripping, brain extraction, image synthesis, MRI-contrast agnosticism, deep learning, final published version
abstract: The removal of non-brain signal from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) data, known as skull-stripping, is an integral component of many neuroimage analysis streams. Despite their abundance, popular classical skull-stripping methods are usually tailored to images with specific acquisition properties, namely near-isotropic resolution and T1-weighted (T1w) MRI contrast, which are prevalent in research settings. As a result, existing tools tend to adapt poorly to other image types, such as stacks of thick slices acquired with fast spin-echo (FSE) MRI that are common in the clinic. While learning-based approaches for brain extraction have gained traction in recent years, these methods face a similar burden, as they are only effective for image types seen during the training procedure. To achieve robust skull-stripping across a landscape of imaging protocols, we introduce SynthStrip, a rapid, learning-based brain-extraction tool. By leveraging anatomical segmentations to generate an entirely synthetic training dataset with anatomies, intensity distributions, and artifacts that far exceed the realistic range of medical images, SynthStrip learns to successfully generalize to a variety of real acquired brain images, removing the need for training data with target contrasts. We demonstrate the efficacy of SynthStrip for a diverse set of image acquisitions and resolutions across subject populations, ranging from newborn to adult. We show substantial improvements in accuracy over popular skull-stripping baselines -- all with a single trained model. Our method and labeled evaluation data are available at https://w3id.org/synthstrip.
summary: The removal of non-brain signal from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) data, known as skull-stripping, is an integral component of many neuroimage analysis streams. Despite their abundance, popular classical skull-stripping methods are usually tailored to images with specific acquisition properties, namely near-isotropic resolution and T1-weighted (T1w) MRI contrast, which are prevalent in research settings. As a result, existing tools tend to adapt poorly to other image types, such as stacks of thick slices acquired with fast spin-echo (FSE) MRI that are common in the clinic. While learning-based approaches for brain extraction have gained traction in recent years, these methods face a similar burden, as they are only effective for image types seen during the training procedure. To achieve robust skull-stripping across a landscape of imaging protocols, we introduce SynthStrip, a rapid, learning-based brain-extraction tool. By leveraging anatomical segmentations to generate an entirely synthetic training dataset with anatomies, intensity distributions, and artifacts that far exceed the realistic range of medical images, SynthStrip learns to successfully generalize to a variety of real acquired brain images, removing the need for training data with target contrasts. We demonstrate the efficacy of SynthStrip for a diverse set of image acquisitions and resolutions across subject populations, ranging from newborn to adult. We show substantial improvements in accuracy over popular skull-stripping baselines -- all with a single trained model. Our method and labeled evaluation data are available at https://w3id.org/synthstrip.
abstract_zh: 从磁共振成像 (MRI) 数据中去除非大脑信号（称为颅骨剥离）是许多神经图像分析流不可或缺的组成部分。尽管流行的经典颅骨剥离方法很丰富，但通常针对具有特定采集特性的图像进行定制，即近各向同性分辨率和 T1 加权 (T1w) MRI 对比度，这在研究环境中很普遍。因此，现有工具往往不太适应其他图像类型，例如临床上常见的通过快速自旋回波 (FSE) MRI 采集的厚切片堆栈。虽然基于学习的大脑提取方法近年来受到关注，但这些方法面临着类似的负担，因为它们仅对训练过程中看到的图像类型有效。为了在各种成像协议中实现稳健的颅骨剥离，我们引入了 SynthStrip，这是一种基于学习的快速大脑提取工具。通过利用解剖分割生成一个完全合成的训练数据集，其中包含远远超出医学图像真实范围的解剖结构、强度分布和伪影，SynthStrip 学会了成功泛化到各种真实采集的大脑图像，从而消除了对具有目标对比度的训练数据的需要。我们展示了 SynthStrip 对于从新生儿到成人的受试者群体的各种图像采集和分辨率的功效。与流行的头骨剥离基线相比，我们展示了准确性的显着提高——所有这些都是通过单一训练模型实现的。我们的方法和标记的评估数据可在 https://w3id.org/synthstrip 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SynthStrip的基于学习的脑图像去颅骨工具，能够适用于各种类型的脑部MRI图像。
AI.motivation: 现有的去颅骨方法通常针对特定类型的MRI图像，如近各向同性分辨率和T1加权图像，难以适应其他临床常用图像类型，如快速自旋回波MRI图像。
AI.method: SynthStrip利用解剖分割生成合成训练数据集，包含解剖结构、强度分布和各种伪影，从而实现对多种真实脑部MRI图像的泛化能力。
AI.result: SynthStrip在不同分辨率和不同人群（从新生儿到成人）的多种图像采集方式上表现出显著优于现有去颅骨方法的准确性。
AI.conclusion: SynthStrip是一种快速且具有广泛适用性的脑图像去颅骨工具，无需针对特定对比度进行训练，适用于多种MRI图像类型。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SynthStrip的基于学习的脑图像去颅骨工具，能够适用于各种类型的脑部MRI图像。
ai_content.motivation: 现有的去颅骨方法通常针对特定类型的MRI图像，如近各向同性分辨率和T1加权图像，难以适应其他临床常用图像类型，如快速自旋回波MRI图像。

search_text: SynthStrip: Skull-Stripping for Any Brain Image SynthStrip：任何大脑图像的头骨剥离 The removal of non-brain signal from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) data, known as skull-stripping, is an integral component of many neuroimage analysis streams. Despite their abundance, popular classical skull-stripping methods are usually tailored to images with specific acquisition properties, namely near-isotropic resolution and T1-weighted (T1w) MRI contrast, which are prevalent in research settings. As a result, existing tools tend to adapt poorly to other image types, such as stacks of thick slices acquired with fast spin-echo (FSE) MRI that are common in the clinic. While learning-based approaches for brain extraction have gained traction in recent years, these methods face a similar burden, as they are only effective for image types seen during the training procedure. To achieve robust skull-stripping across a landscape of imaging protocols, we introduce SynthStrip, a rapid, learning-based brain-extraction tool. By leveraging anatomical segmentations to generate an entirely synthetic training dataset with anatomies, intensity distributions, and artifacts that far exceed the realistic range of medical images, SynthStrip learns to successfully generalize to a variety of real acquired brain images, removing the need for training data with target contrasts. We demonstrate the efficacy of SynthStrip for a diverse set of image acquisitions and resolutions across subject populations, ranging from newborn to adult. We show substantial improvements in accuracy over popular skull-stripping baselines -- all with a single trained model. Our method and labeled evaluation data are available at https://w3id.org/synthstrip. 从磁共振成像 (MRI) 数据中去除非大脑信号（称为颅骨剥离）是许多神经图像分析流不可或缺的组成部分。尽管流行的经典颅骨剥离方法很丰富，但通常针对具有特定采集特性的图像进行定制，即近各向同性分辨率和 T1 加权 (T1w) MRI 对比度，这在研究环境中很普遍。因此，现有工具往往不太适应其他图像类型，例如临床上常见的通过快速自旋回波 (FSE) MRI 采集的厚切片堆栈。虽然基于学习的大脑提取方法近年来受到关注，但这些方法面临着类似的负担，因为它们仅对训练过程中看到的图像类型有效。为了在各种成像协议中实现稳健的颅骨剥离，我们引入了 SynthStrip，这是一种基于学习的快速大脑提取工具。通过利用解剖分割生成一个完全合成的训练数据集，其中包含远远超出医学图像真实范围的解剖结构、强度分布和伪影，SynthStrip 学会了成功泛化到各种真实采集的大脑图像，从而消除了对具有目标对比度的训练数据的需要。我们展示了 SynthStrip 对于从新生儿到成人的受试者群体的各种图像采集和分辨率的功效。与流行的头骨剥离基线相比，我们展示了准确性的显着提高——所有这些都是通过单一训练模型实现的。我们的方法和标记的评估数据可在 https://w3id.org/synthstrip 上获取。 本文提出了一种名为SynthStrip的基于学习的脑图像去颅骨工具，能够适用于各种类型的脑部MRI图像。 Andrew Hoopes,Jocelyn S. Mora,Adrian V. Dalca,Bruce Fischl,Malte Hoffmann eess.IV,cs.CV,physics.med-ph,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Yang Zhao,Hao Zhang,Xiuyuan Hu
title: Randomized Sharpness-Aware Training for Boosting Computational Efficiency in Deep Learning
title_zh: 用于提高深度学习计算效率的随机锐度感知训练
abstract: By driving models to converge to flat minima, sharpness-aware learning algorithms (such as SAM) have shown the power to achieve state-of-the-art performances. However, these algorithms will generally incur one extra forward-backward propagation at each training iteration, which largely burdens the computation especially for scalable models. To this end, we propose a simple yet efficient training scheme, called Randomized Sharpness-Aware Training (RST). Optimizers in RST would perform a Bernoulli trial at each iteration to choose randomly from base algorithms (SGD) and sharpness-aware algorithms (SAM) with a probability arranged by a predefined scheduling function. Due to the mixture of base algorithms, the overall count of propagation pairs could be largely reduced. Also, we give theoretical analysis on the convergence of RST. Then, we empirically study the computation cost and effect of various types of scheduling functions, and give directions on setting appropriate scheduling functions. Further, we extend the RST to a general framework (G-RST), where we can adjust regularization degree on sharpness freely for any scheduling function. We show that G-RST can outperform SAM in most cases while saving 50\% extra computation cost.
summary: By driving models to converge to flat minima, sharpness-aware learning algorithms (such as SAM) have shown the power to achieve state-of-the-art performances. However, these algorithms will generally incur one extra forward-backward propagation at each training iteration, which largely burdens the computation especially for scalable models. To this end, we propose a simple yet efficient training scheme, called Randomized Sharpness-Aware Training (RST). Optimizers in RST would perform a Bernoulli trial at each iteration to choose randomly from base algorithms (SGD) and sharpness-aware algorithms (SAM) with a probability arranged by a predefined scheduling function. Due to the mixture of base algorithms, the overall count of propagation pairs could be largely reduced. Also, we give theoretical analysis on the convergence of RST. Then, we empirically study the computation cost and effect of various types of scheduling functions, and give directions on setting appropriate scheduling functions. Further, we extend the RST to a general framework (G-RST), where we can adjust regularization degree on sharpness freely for any scheduling function. We show that G-RST can outperform SAM in most cases while saving 50\% extra computation cost.
abstract_zh: 通过驱动模型收敛到平坦最小值，锐度感知学习算法（例如 SAM）已显示出实现最先进性能的能力。然而，这些算法通常会在每次训练迭代时产生一次额外的前向-后向传播，这极大地增加了计算负担，尤其是对于可扩展模型而言。为此，我们提出了一种简单而有效的训练方案，称为随机清晰度感知训练（RST）。 RST 中的优化器将在每次迭代时执行伯努利试验，以按预定义的调度函数安排的概率从基本算法 (SGD) 和锐度感知算法 (SAM) 中随机选择。由于基础算法的混合，传播对的总数可以大大减少。此外，我们还对RST的收敛性进行了理论分析。然后，我们实证研究了各种类型的调度函数的计算成本和效果，并为设置合适的调度函数提供了指导。此外，我们将RST扩展到通用框架（G-RST），我们可以为任何调度函数自由调整锐度的正则化程度。我们证明 G-RST 在大多数情况下可以优于 SAM，同时节省 50% 的额外计算成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RST的随机锐度感知训练方法，通过混合基础优化器与锐度感知算法，在保持模型性能的同时显著降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有锐度感知算法（如SAM）虽能提升模型泛化能力，但需额外计算导致训练效率低下，亟需更高效的训练方案。
AI.method: 在每次迭代中通过伯努利试验以调度函数控制的概率随机选择SGD或SAM，并扩展为可调节锐度正则化的G-RST框架。
AI.result: 实验表明RST在多数任务上优于SAM且节省50%计算成本，不同调度函数对效果和开销有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: RST通过随机化策略有效平衡了计算效率与模型性能，为大规模深度学习训练提供了实用优化方案。

authors_text: Yuta Matsunaga,Takaaki Saeki,Shinnosuke Takamichi,Hiroshi Saruwatari
title: Personalized Filled-pause Generation with Group-wise Prediction Models
title_zh: 使用分组预测模型生成个性化填充暂停
abstract: In this paper, we propose a method to generate personalized filled pauses (FPs) with group-wise prediction models. Compared with fluent text generation, disfluent text generation has not been widely explored. To generate more human-like texts, we addressed disfluent text generation. The usage of disfluency, such as FPs, rephrases, and word fragments, differs from speaker to speaker, and thus, the generation of personalized FPs is required. However, it is difficult to predict them because of the sparsity of position and the frequency difference between more and less frequently used FPs. Moreover, it is sometimes difficult to adapt FP prediction models to each speaker because of the large variation of the tendency within each speaker. To address these issues, we propose a method to build group-dependent prediction models by grouping speakers on the basis of their tendency to use FPs. This method does not require a large amount of data and time to train each speaker model. We further introduce a loss function and a word embedding model suitable for FP prediction. Our experimental results demonstrate that group-dependent models can predict FPs with higher scores than a non-personalized one and the introduced loss function and word embedding model improve the prediction performance.
summary: In this paper, we propose a method to generate personalized filled pauses (FPs) with group-wise prediction models. Compared with fluent text generation, disfluent text generation has not been widely explored. To generate more human-like texts, we addressed disfluent text generation. The usage of disfluency, such as FPs, rephrases, and word fragments, differs from speaker to speaker, and thus, the generation of personalized FPs is required. However, it is difficult to predict them because of the sparsity of position and the frequency difference between more and less frequently used FPs. Moreover, it is sometimes difficult to adapt FP prediction models to each speaker because of the large variation of the tendency within each speaker. To address these issues, we propose a method to build group-dependent prediction models by grouping speakers on the basis of their tendency to use FPs. This method does not require a large amount of data and time to train each speaker model. We further introduce a loss function and a word embedding model suitable for FP prediction. Our experimental results demonstrate that group-dependent models can predict FPs with higher scores than a non-personalized one and the introduced loss function and word embedding model improve the prediction performance.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种通过分组预测模型生成个性化填充停顿（FP）的方法。与流畅的文本生成相比，不流畅的文本生成尚未得到广泛的探索。为了生成更接近人类的文本，我们解决了不流文本的生成问题。不同的说话者对于 FP、改述和单词片段等不流利性的使用是不同的，因此需要生成个性化的 FP。然而，由于位置的稀疏性以及频繁使用和不频繁使用的 FP 之间的频率差异，很难预测它们。此外，有时很难使 FP 预测模型适应每个说话者，因为每个说话者内部的趋势变化很大。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种方法，通过根据说话者使用 FP 的倾向对他们进行分组来构建依赖于群体的预测模型。该方法不需要大量的数据和时间来训练每个说话人模型。我们进一步介绍了适合 FP 预测的损失函数和词嵌入模型。我们的实验结果表明，群体相关模型可以比非个性化模型预测具有更高分数的 FP，并且引入的损失函数和词嵌入模型提高了预测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分组预测模型的个性化填充停顿生成方法，解决不流畅文本生成中个性化填充停顿预测的难题。
AI.motivation: 不流畅文本生成研究不足，而填充停顿（FPs）的使用存在显著个体差异，现有方法因数据稀疏性和个体差异难以实现个性化预测。
AI.method: 通过按FP使用倾向分组构建组依赖预测模型，结合定制损失函数与词嵌入模型，无需为每个说话者单独训练模型。
AI.result: 实验显示组依赖模型预测效果优于非个性化模型，新损失函数和词嵌入模型显著提升预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现个性化FP生成，在保持预测精度的同时降低计算资源需求。

search_text: Personalized Filled-pause Generation with Group-wise Prediction Models 使用分组预测模型生成个性化填充暂停 In this paper, we propose a method to generate personalized filled pauses (FPs) with group-wise prediction models. Compared with fluent text generation, disfluent text generation has not been widely explored. To generate more human-like texts, we addressed disfluent text generation. The usage of disfluency, such as FPs, rephrases, and word fragments, differs from speaker to speaker, and thus, the generation of personalized FPs is required. However, it is difficult to predict them because of the sparsity of position and the frequency difference between more and less frequently used FPs. Moreover, it is sometimes difficult to adapt FP prediction models to each speaker because of the large variation of the tendency within each speaker. To address these issues, we propose a method to build group-dependent prediction models by grouping speakers on the basis of their tendency to use FPs. This method does not require a large amount of data and time to train each speaker model. We further introduce a loss function and a word embedding model suitable for FP prediction. Our experimental results demonstrate that group-dependent models can predict FPs with higher scores than a non-personalized one and the introduced loss function and word embedding model improve the prediction performance. 在本文中，我们提出了一种通过分组预测模型生成个性化填充停顿（FP）的方法。与流畅的文本生成相比，不流畅的文本生成尚未得到广泛的探索。为了生成更接近人类的文本，我们解决了不流文本的生成问题。不同的说话者对于 FP、改述和单词片段等不流利性的使用是不同的，因此需要生成个性化的 FP。然而，由于位置的稀疏性以及频繁使用和不频繁使用的 FP 之间的频率差异，很难预测它们。此外，有时很难使 FP 预测模型适应每个说话者，因为每个说话者内部的趋势变化很大。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种方法，通过根据说话者使用 FP 的倾向对他们进行分组来构建依赖于群体的预测模型。该方法不需要大量的数据和时间来训练每个说话人模型。我们进一步介绍了适合 FP 预测的损失函数和词嵌入模型。我们的实验结果表明，群体相关模型可以比非个性化模型预测具有更高分数的 FP，并且引入的损失函数和词嵌入模型提高了预测性能。 本文提出一种基于分组预测模型的个性化填充停顿生成方法，解决不流畅文本生成中个性化填充停顿预测的难题。 Yuta Matsunaga,Takaaki Saeki,Shinnosuke Takamichi,Hiroshi Saruwatari cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Takayuki Hara,Tatsuya Harada
title: Enhancement of Novel View Synthesis Using Omnidirectional Image Completion
title_zh: 使用全方位图像补全增强新颖的视图合成
abstract: In this study, we present a method for synthesizing novel views from a single 360-degree RGB-D image based on the neural radiance field (NeRF) . Prior studies relied on the neighborhood interpolation capability of multi-layer perceptrons to complete missing regions caused by occlusion and zooming, which leads to artifacts. In the method proposed in this study, the input image is reprojected to 360-degree RGB images at other camera positions, the missing regions of the reprojected images are completed by a 2D image generative model, and the completed images are utilized to train the NeRF. Because multiple completed images contain inconsistencies in 3D, we introduce a method to learn the NeRF model using a subset of completed images that cover the target scene with less overlap of completed regions. The selection of such a subset of images can be attributed to the maximum weight independent set problem, which is solved through simulated annealing. Experiments demonstrated that the proposed method can synthesize plausible novel views while preserving the features of the scene for both artificial and real-world data.
summary: In this study, we present a method for synthesizing novel views from a single 360-degree RGB-D image based on the neural radiance field (NeRF) . Prior studies relied on the neighborhood interpolation capability of multi-layer perceptrons to complete missing regions caused by occlusion and zooming, which leads to artifacts. In the method proposed in this study, the input image is reprojected to 360-degree RGB images at other camera positions, the missing regions of the reprojected images are completed by a 2D image generative model, and the completed images are utilized to train the NeRF. Because multiple completed images contain inconsistencies in 3D, we introduce a method to learn the NeRF model using a subset of completed images that cover the target scene with less overlap of completed regions. The selection of such a subset of images can be attributed to the maximum weight independent set problem, which is solved through simulated annealing. Experiments demonstrated that the proposed method can synthesize plausible novel views while preserving the features of the scene for both artificial and real-world data.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们提出了一种基于神经辐射场 (NeRF) 从单个 360 度 RGB-D 图像合成新颖视图的方法。先前的研究依赖于多层感知器的邻域插值能力来完成由遮挡和缩放引起的缺失区域，这会导致伪影。在本研究提出的方法中，输入图像在其他相机位置被重投影为 360 度 RGB 图像，重投影图像的缺失区域由 2D 图像生成模型补全，补全的图像用于训练 NeRF。由于多个已完成的图像在 3D 中包含不一致，因此我们引入了一种使用已完成图像的子集来学习 NeRF 模型的方法，该子集覆盖了目标场景，且已完成区域的重叠较少。这种图像子集的选择可以归因于最大权重独立集问题，该问题通过模拟退火来解决。实验表明，所提出的方法可以合成合理的新颖视图，同时保留人工和现实世界数据的场景特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于神经辐射场（NeRF）和全景图像补全的新视角合成方法，解决遮挡和缩放导致的缺失区域问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖多层感知机插值补全缺失区域，但易产生伪影，需改进补全策略以提升合成质量。
AI.method: 将输入图像重投影至其他视角生成360度RGB图像，用2D生成模型补全缺失区域，并通过模拟退火求解最大权独立集问题选择低重叠的训练图像子集优化NeRF。
AI.result: 实验表明方法能有效合成合理新视角，保留场景特征，适用于人工与真实数据。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合图像补全与优化训练数据选择，显著提升了NeRF在复杂场景下的新视角合成性能。

authors_text: Kefan Jin,Xingyao Han
title: Conquering Ghosts: Relation Learning for Information Reliability Representation and End-to-End Robust Navigation
title_zh: 征服幽灵：信息可靠性表示和端到端鲁棒导航的关系学习
abstract: Environmental disturbances, such as sensor data noises, various lighting conditions, challenging weathers and external adversarial perturbations, are inevitable in real self-driving applications. Existing researches and testings have shown that they can severely influence the vehicles perception ability and performance, one of the main issue is the false positive detection, i.e., the ghost object which is not real existed or occurs in the wrong position (such as a non-existent vehicle). Traditional navigation methods tend to avoid every detected objects for safety, however, avoiding a ghost object may lead the vehicle into a even more dangerous situation, such as a sudden break on the highway. Considering the various disturbance types, it is difficult to address this issue at the perceptual aspect. A potential solution is to detect the ghost through relation learning among the whole scenario and develop an integrated end-to-end navigation system. Our underlying logic is that the behavior of all vehicles in the scene is influenced by their neighbors, and normal vehicles behave in a logical way, while ghost vehicles do not. By learning the spatio-temporal relation among surrounding vehicles, an information reliability representation is learned for each detected vehicle and then a robot navigation network is developed. In contrast to existing works, we encourage the network to learn how to represent the reliability and how to aggregate all the information with uncertainties by itself, thus increasing the efficiency and generalizability. To the best of the authors knowledge, this paper provides the first work on using graph relation learning to achieve end-to-end robust navigation in the presence of ghost vehicles. Simulation results in the CARLA platform demonstrate the feasibility and effectiveness of the proposed method in various scenarios.
summary: Environmental disturbances, such as sensor data noises, various lighting conditions, challenging weathers and external adversarial perturbations, are inevitable in real self-driving applications. Existing researches and testings have shown that they can severely influence the vehicles perception ability and performance, one of the main issue is the false positive detection, i.e., the ghost object which is not real existed or occurs in the wrong position (such as a non-existent vehicle). Traditional navigation methods tend to avoid every detected objects for safety, however, avoiding a ghost object may lead the vehicle into a even more dangerous situation, such as a sudden break on the highway. Considering the various disturbance types, it is difficult to address this issue at the perceptual aspect. A potential solution is to detect the ghost through relation learning among the whole scenario and develop an integrated end-to-end navigation system. Our underlying logic is that the behavior of all vehicles in the scene is influenced by their neighbors, and normal vehicles behave in a logical way, while ghost vehicles do not. By learning the spatio-temporal relation among surrounding vehicles, an information reliability representation is learned for each detected vehicle and then a robot navigation network is developed. In contrast to existing works, we encourage the network to learn how to represent the reliability and how to aggregate all the information with uncertainties by itself, thus increasing the efficiency and generalizability. To the best of the authors knowledge, this paper provides the first work on using graph relation learning to achieve end-to-end robust navigation in the presence of ghost vehicles. Simulation results in the CARLA platform demonstrate the feasibility and effectiveness of the proposed method in various scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在真正的自动驾驶应用中，环境干扰是不可避免的，例如传感器数据噪声、各种照明条件、恶劣的天气和外部对抗性扰动。现有的研究和测试表明，它们会严重影响车辆的感知能力和性能，其中主要问题之一是误报检测，即不真实存在或出现在错误位置的幽灵物体（例如不存在的车辆）。为了安全起见，传统的导航方法往往会避开所有检测到的物体，然而，避开幽灵物体可能会导致车辆陷入更危险的境地，例如在高速公路上突然刹车。考虑到干扰类型多种多样，很难从感知方面解决这个问题。一个潜在的解决方案是通过整个场景之间的关系学习来检测幽灵，并开发一个集成的端到端导航系统。我们的基本逻辑是，场景中所有车辆的行为都会受到其邻居的影响，正常车辆的行为符合逻辑，而幽灵车辆则不然。通过学习周围车辆之间的时空关系，学习每个检测到的车辆的信息可靠性表示，然后开发机器人导航网络。与现有的工作相比，我们鼓励网络学习如何表示可靠性以及如何自行聚合所有具有不确定性的信息，从而提高效率和泛化性。据作者所知，本文首次提出了使用图关系学习在幽灵车辆存在的情况下实现端到端鲁棒导航的工作。 CARLA平台上的仿真结果证明了该方法在各种场景下的可行性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于关系学习的端到端导航方法，用于应对自动驾驶中因环境干扰导致的幽灵对象（虚假检测）问题。
AI.motivation: 传统导航方法因盲目避障可能导致危险，而环境干扰（如传感器噪声、天气等）会引发虚假检测（幽灵对象），现有方法难以从感知层面有效解决该问题。
AI.method: 通过学习场景中车辆的时空关系，构建信息可靠性表示，利用图神经网络识别幽灵对象，并开发端到端导航系统以整合不确定信息。
AI.result: 在CARLA平台的仿真结果验证了方法在多种场景下的可行性与有效性，能够提升导航鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将图关系学习应用于幽灵对象场景的端到端导航，通过可靠性表示与不确定性聚合机制，提高了自动驾驶系统的安全性和泛化能力。

In contrast to existing works, we encourage the network to learn how to represent the reliability and how to aggregate all the information with uncertainties by itself, thus increasing the efficiency and generalizability. To the best of the authors knowledge, this paper provides the first work on using graph relation learning to achieve end-to-end robust navigation in the presence of ghost vehicles. Simulation results in the CARLA platform demonstrate the feasibility and effectiveness of the proposed method in various scenarios. 在真正的自动驾驶应用中，环境干扰是不可避免的，例如传感器数据噪声、各种照明条件、恶劣的天气和外部对抗性扰动。现有的研究和测试表明，它们会严重影响车辆的感知能力和性能，其中主要问题之一是误报检测，即不真实存在或出现在错误位置的幽灵物体（例如不存在的车辆）。为了安全起见，传统的导航方法往往会避开所有检测到的物体，然而，避开幽灵物体可能会导致车辆陷入更危险的境地，例如在高速公路上突然刹车。考虑到干扰类型多种多样，很难从感知方面解决这个问题。一个潜在的解决方案是通过整个场景之间的关系学习来检测幽灵，并开发一个集成的端到端导航系统。我们的基本逻辑是，场景中所有车辆的行为都会受到其邻居的影响，正常车辆的行为符合逻辑，而幽灵车辆则不然。通过学习周围车辆之间的时空关系，学习每个检测到的车辆的信息可靠性表示，然后开发机器人导航网络。与现有的工作相比，我们鼓励网络学习如何表示可靠性以及如何自行聚合所有具有不确定性的信息，从而提高效率和泛化性。据作者所知，本文首次提出了使用图关系学习在幽灵车辆存在的情况下实现端到端鲁棒导航的工作。 CARLA平台上的仿真结果证明了该方法在各种场景下的可行性和有效性。 本文提出了一种基于关系学习的端到端导航方法，用于应对自动驾驶中因环境干扰导致的幽灵对象（虚假检测）问题。 Kefan Jin,Xingyao Han cs.AI

authors_text: Mingchao Liang,Florian Meyer
title: Neural Enhanced Belief Propagation for Data Association in Multiobject Tracking
title_zh: 多目标跟踪中数据关联的神经增强置信传播
abstract: Situation-aware technologies enabled by multiobject tracking (MOT) methods will create new services and applications in fields such as autonomous navigation and applied ocean sciences. Belief propagation (BP) is a state-of-the-art method for Bayesian MOT but fully relies on a statistical model and preprocessed sensor measurements. In this paper, we establish a hybrid method for model-based and data-driven MOT. The proposed neural enhanced belief propagation (NEBP) approach complements BP by information learned from raw sensor data with the goal to improve data association and to reject false alarm measurements. We evaluate the performance of our NEBP approach for MOT on the nuScenes autonomous driving dataset and demonstrate that it can outperform state-of-the-art reference methods.
summary: Situation-aware technologies enabled by multiobject tracking (MOT) methods will create new services and applications in fields such as autonomous navigation and applied ocean sciences. Belief propagation (BP) is a state-of-the-art method for Bayesian MOT but fully relies on a statistical model and preprocessed sensor measurements. In this paper, we establish a hybrid method for model-based and data-driven MOT. The proposed neural enhanced belief propagation (NEBP) approach complements BP by information learned from raw sensor data with the goal to improve data association and to reject false alarm measurements. We evaluate the performance of our NEBP approach for MOT on the nuScenes autonomous driving dataset and demonstrate that it can outperform state-of-the-art reference methods.
abstract_zh: 由多目标跟踪（MOT）方法支持的态势感知技术将在自主导航和应用海洋科学等领域创造新的服务和应用。置信传播 (BP) 是贝叶斯 MOT 的最先进方法，但完全依赖于统计模型和预处理的传感器测量。在本文中，我们建立了一种基于模型和数据驱动的 MOT 的混合方法。所提出的神经增强置信传播（NEBP）方法通过从原始传感器数据中学习的信息来补充 BP，其目标是改善数据关联并拒绝误报测量。我们在 nuScenes 自动驾驶数据集上评估了 MOT 的 NEBP 方法的性能，并证明它可以超越最先进的参考方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合模型与数据驱动的神经增强信念传播（NEBP）方法，用于改进多目标跟踪中的数据关联。
AI.motivation: 传统信念传播（BP）方法依赖统计模型和预处理传感器数据，难以有效处理复杂场景下的数据关联与虚假警报问题。
AI.method: 设计神经增强信念传播（NEBP）框架，通过神经网络从原始传感器数据中学习信息，补充并优化传统BP算法的数据关联过程。
AI.result: 在nuScenes自动驾驶数据集的实验中，NEBP方法性能优于现有最先进参考方法。
AI.conclusion: NEBP通过融合模型先验与数据驱动特征，有效提升了多目标跟踪中数据关联的准确性与鲁棒性。
