In addition to privacy concerns, these dangers relate to uncertain or poor data quality, leading to discrimination and potentially misleading insights. Visual analytics combines machine learning methods with interactive visual interfaces to enable human sense- and decision-making. This technique can be key for designing and operating meaningful interactive communication analysis systems that consider these ethical challenges. In this interdisciplinary work, a joint endeavor of computer scientists, ethicists, and scholars in Science & Technology Studies, we investigate and evaluate opportunities and risks involved in using Visual analytics approaches for communication analysis in intelligence applications in particular. We introduce, at first, the common technological systems used in communication analysis, further discussing the domain-specific ethical implications, tensions, and risks involved. We then make the case of how tailored Visual Analytics approaches may reduce and mitigate the described problems, both theoretically and through practical examples. We show that finding Visual Analytics design solutions for ethical issues is not a mere optimization task, but balancing out and negotiating these trade-offs has, as we argue, to be an integral aspect of the system design process from the outset. 近年来，用于分析人类通信数据的数字系统已变得普遍。调查新闻、犯罪情报和法律中的通信数据的情报分析提出了特别有趣的案例，因为它们必须考虑到基础操作和数据通常高度敏感的属性。与此同时，在这些领域，日益自动化、复杂的方法系统可能特别重要，特别是在大数据可管理性方面。然而，由于责任的转移，这也带来了危险。除了隐私问题之外，这些危险还与不确定或较差的数据质量有关，从而导致歧视和潜在的误导性见解。视觉分析将机器学习方法与交互式视觉界面相结合，以实现人类的感知和决策。这项技术对于设计和操作考虑这些道德挑战的有意义的交互式通信分析系统至关重要。在这项跨学科工作中，计算机科学家、伦理学家和科学技术研究学者共同努力，我们调查和评估使用可视化分析方法进行通信分析（特别是在情报应用中）所涉及的机会和风险。我们首先介绍通信分析中使用的常见技术系统，进一步讨论特定领域的伦理影响、紧张局势和所涉及的风险。然后，我们从理论上和实际示例中说明定制的可视化分析方法如何减少和缓解所描述的问题。我们表明，寻找针对道德问题的视觉分析设计解决方案不仅仅是一项优化任务，而且正如我们所说，平衡和协商这些权衡从一开始就成为系统设计过程中不可或缺的一个方面。 本文探讨了在情报应用中使用可视化分析方法进行通信分析的潜力和局限性，并评估了其涉及的伦理挑战。 Maximilian T. Fischer,Simon David Hirsbrunner,Wolfgang Jentner,Matthias Miller,Daniel A. Keim,Paula Helm cs.HC

authors_text: Zhiqiang Yan,Xiang Li,Kun Wang,Zhenyu Zhang,Jun Li,Jian Yang
title: Multi-Modal Masked Pre-Training for Monocular Panoramic Depth Completion
title_zh: 用于单目全景深度完成的多模态掩模预训练
abstract: In this paper, we formulate a potentially valuable panoramic depth completion (PDC) task as panoramic 3D cameras often produce 360° depth with missing data in complex scenes. Its goal is to recover dense panoramic depths from raw sparse ones and panoramic RGB images. To deal with the PDC task, we train a deep network that takes both depth and image as inputs for the dense panoramic depth recovery. However, it needs to face a challenging optimization problem of the network parameters due to its non-convex objective function. To address this problem, we propose a simple yet effective approach termed M{^3}PT: multi-modal masked pre-training. Specifically, during pre-training, we simultaneously cover up patches of the panoramic RGB image and sparse depth by shared random mask, then reconstruct the sparse depth in the masked regions. To our best knowledge, it is the first time that we show the effectiveness of masked pre-training in a multi-modal vision task, instead of the single-modal task resolved by masked autoencoders (MAE). Different from MAE where fine-tuning completely discards the decoder part of pre-training, there is no architectural difference between the pre-training and fine-tuning stages in our M$^{3}$PT as they only differ in the prediction density, which potentially makes the transfer learning more convenient and effective. Extensive experiments verify the effectiveness of M{^3}PT on three panoramic datasets. Notably, we improve the state-of-the-art baselines by averagely 26.2% in RMSE, 51.7% in MRE, 49.7% in MAE, and 37.5% in RMSElog on three benchmark datasets.
summary: In this paper, we formulate a potentially valuable panoramic depth completion (PDC) task as panoramic 3D cameras often produce 360° depth with missing data in complex scenes. Its goal is to recover dense panoramic depths from raw sparse ones and panoramic RGB images. To deal with the PDC task, we train a deep network that takes both depth and image as inputs for the dense panoramic depth recovery. However, it needs to face a challenging optimization problem of the network parameters due to its non-convex objective function. To address this problem, we propose a simple yet effective approach termed M{^3}PT: multi-modal masked pre-training. Specifically, during pre-training, we simultaneously cover up patches of the panoramic RGB image and sparse depth by shared random mask, then reconstruct the sparse depth in the masked regions. To our best knowledge, it is the first time that we show the effectiveness of masked pre-training in a multi-modal vision task, instead of the single-modal task resolved by masked autoencoders (MAE). Different from MAE where fine-tuning completely discards the decoder part of pre-training, there is no architectural difference between the pre-training and fine-tuning stages in our M$^{3}$PT as they only differ in the prediction density, which potentially makes the transfer learning more convenient and effective. Extensive experiments verify the effectiveness of M{^3}PT on three panoramic datasets. Notably, we improve the state-of-the-art baselines by averagely 26.2% in RMSE, 51.7% in MRE, 49.7% in MAE, and 37.5% in RMSElog on three benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们制定了一项具有潜在价值的全景深度补全 (PDC) 任务，因为全景 3D 相机通常会在复杂场景中产生缺失数据的 360° 深度。其目标是从原始稀疏图像和全景 RGB 图像中恢复密集的全景深度。为了处理 PDC 任务，我们训练了一个深度网络，该网络将深度和图像作为密集全景深度恢复的输入。然而，由于其目标函数非凸，需要面临具有挑战性的网络参数优化问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，称为 M{^3}PT：多模态掩蔽预训练。具体来说，在预训练期间，我们通过共享随机掩模同时覆盖全景 RGB 图像和稀疏深度的补丁，然后重建掩模区域中的稀疏深度。据我们所知，这是我们第一次在多模态视觉任务中展示屏蔽预训练的有效性，而不是通过屏蔽自动编码器（MAE）解决的单模态任务。与 MAE 中的微调完全丢弃预训练的解码器部分不同，我们的 M$^{3}$PT 中的预训练和微调阶段没有架构差异，因为它们仅在预测密度上有所不同，这可能使迁移学习更加方便和有效。大量实验验证了 M{^3}PT 在三个全景数据集上的有效性。值得注意的是，我们在三个基准数据集上将 RMSE 平均提高了 26.2%，MRE 提高了 51.7%，MAE 提高了 49.7%，RMSElog 提高了 37.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态掩码预训练方法（M³PT），用于单目全景深度补全任务，旨在从稀疏深度和全景RGB图像中恢复密集全景深度。
AI.motivation: 全景深度补全（PDC）任务面临稀疏深度数据与复杂场景的挑战，传统优化方法因非凸目标函数难以有效训练。现有掩码自编码器（MAE）仅适用于单模态任务且需丢弃解码器，限制了迁移学习效果。
AI.method: 设计多模态掩码预训练框架M³PT，通过共享随机掩码同时遮蔽全景RGB图像与稀疏深度区域，利用编码器-解码器结构重建被掩码区域的深度信息，预训练与微调阶段保持架构一致仅调整预测密度。
AI.result: 在三个全景数据集上，M³PT相较基线方法平均提升RMSE 26.2%、MRE 51.7%、MAE 49.7%及RMSElog 37.5%。
AI.conclusion: M³PT首次验证了多模态掩码预训练在视觉任务中的有效性，通过统一架构设计提升了深度补全的迁移学习性能，为全景场景理解提供新方法。

authors_text: Marie Biolková,Bac Nguyen
title: Neural Predictor for Black-Box Adversarial Attacks on Speech Recognition
title_zh: 语音识别黑盒对抗攻击的神经预测器
abstract: Recent works have revealed the vulnerability of automatic speech recognition (ASR) models to adversarial examples (AEs), i.e., small perturbations that cause an error in the transcription of the audio signal. Studying audio adversarial attacks is therefore the first step towards robust ASR. Despite the significant progress made in attacking audio examples, the black-box attack remains challenging because only the hard-label information of transcriptions is provided. Due to this limited information, existing black-box methods often require an excessive number of queries to attack a single audio example. In this paper, we introduce NP-Attack, a neural predictor-based method, which progressively evolves the search towards a small adversarial perturbation. Given a perturbation direction, our neural predictor directly estimates the smallest perturbation that causes a mistranscription. In particular, it enables NP-Attack to accurately learn promising perturbation directions via gradient-based optimization. Experimental results show that NP-Attack achieves competitive results with other state-of-the-art black-box adversarial attacks while requiring a significantly smaller number of queries. The code of NP-Attack is available online.
summary: Recent works have revealed the vulnerability of automatic speech recognition (ASR) models to adversarial examples (AEs), i.e., small perturbations that cause an error in the transcription of the audio signal. Studying audio adversarial attacks is therefore the first step towards robust ASR. Despite the significant progress made in attacking audio examples, the black-box attack remains challenging because only the hard-label information of transcriptions is provided. Due to this limited information, existing black-box methods often require an excessive number of queries to attack a single audio example. In this paper, we introduce NP-Attack, a neural predictor-based method, which progressively evolves the search towards a small adversarial perturbation. Given a perturbation direction, our neural predictor directly estimates the smallest perturbation that causes a mistranscription. In particular, it enables NP-Attack to accurately learn promising perturbation directions via gradient-based optimization. Experimental results show that NP-Attack achieves competitive results with other state-of-the-art black-box adversarial attacks while requiring a significantly smaller number of queries. The code of NP-Attack is available online.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作揭示了自动语音识别（ASR）模型对对抗性示例（AE）的脆弱性，即导致音频信号转录错误的小扰动。因此，研究音频对抗攻击是实现稳健 ASR 的第一步。尽管在攻击音频示例方面取得了重大进展，但黑盒攻击仍然具有挑战性，因为只提供了转录的硬标签信息。由于信息有限，现有的黑盒方法通常需要大量查询才能攻击单个音频示例。在本文中，我们介绍了 NP-Attack，这是一种基于神经预测器的方法，该方法逐渐将搜索朝着小的对抗性扰动发展。给定扰动方向，我们的神经预测器直接估计导致转录错误的最小扰动。特别是，它使 NP-Attack 能够通过基于梯度的优化准确地学习有希望的扰动方向。实验结果表明，NP-Attack 取得了与其他最先进的黑盒对抗攻击竞争的结果，同时需要的查询数量显着减少。 NP-Attack的代码可以在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经预测器的黑盒对抗攻击方法NP-Attack，用于降低语音识别模型的查询次数。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒对抗攻击方法因仅能获取硬标签信息，需大量查询才能攻击单个音频样本，效率低下。
AI.method: 通过神经预测器直接估计导致转录错误的最小扰动，结合梯度优化逐步演化搜索方向。
AI.result: NP-Attack在保持攻击效果的同时，显著减少所需查询次数，优于其他先进黑盒攻击方法。
AI.conclusion: NP-Attack为黑盒语音识别对抗攻击提供了高效解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

Due to this limited information, existing black-box methods often require an excessive number of queries to attack a single audio example. In this paper, we introduce NP-Attack, a neural predictor-based method, which progressively evolves the search towards a small adversarial perturbation. Given a perturbation direction, our neural predictor directly estimates the smallest perturbation that causes a mistranscription. In particular, it enables NP-Attack to accurately learn promising perturbation directions via gradient-based optimization. Experimental results show that NP-Attack achieves competitive results with other state-of-the-art black-box adversarial attacks while requiring a significantly smaller number of queries. The code of NP-Attack is available online. 最近的工作揭示了自动语音识别（ASR）模型对对抗性示例（AE）的脆弱性，即导致音频信号转录错误的小扰动。因此，研究音频对抗攻击是实现稳健 ASR 的第一步。尽管在攻击音频示例方面取得了重大进展，但黑盒攻击仍然具有挑战性，因为只提供了转录的硬标签信息。由于信息有限，现有的黑盒方法通常需要大量查询才能攻击单个音频示例。在本文中，我们介绍了 NP-Attack，这是一种基于神经预测器的方法，该方法逐渐将搜索朝着小的对抗性扰动发展。给定扰动方向，我们的神经预测器直接估计导致转录错误的最小扰动。特别是，它使 NP-Attack 能够通过基于梯度的优化准确地学习有希望的扰动方向。实验结果表明，NP-Attack 取得了与其他最先进的黑盒对抗攻击竞争的结果，同时需要的查询数量显着减少。 NP-Attack的代码可以在线获取。 本文提出一种基于神经预测器的黑盒对抗攻击方法NP-Attack，用于降低语音识别模型的查询次数。 Marie Biolková,Bac Nguyen cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Yangyang Li,Wei Zhai,Yang Cao,Zheng-jun Zha
title: Location-Free Camouflage Generation Network
title_zh: 无位置伪装生成网络
abstract: Camouflage is a common visual phenomenon, which refers to hiding the foreground objects into the background images, making them briefly invisible to the human eye. Previous work has typically been implemented by an iterative optimization process. However, these methods struggle in 1) efficiently generating camouflage images using foreground and background with arbitrary structure; 2) camouflaging foreground objects to regions with multiple appearances (e.g. the junction of the vegetation and the mountains), which limit their practical application. To address these problems, this paper proposes a novel Location-free Camouflage Generation Network (LCG-Net) that fuse high-level features of foreground and background image, and generate result by one inference. Specifically, a Position-aligned Structure Fusion (PSF) module is devised to guide structure feature fusion based on the point-to-point structure similarity of foreground and background, and introduce local appearance features point-by-point. To retain the necessary identifiable features, a new immerse loss is adopted under our pipeline, while a background patch appearance loss is utilized to ensure that the hidden objects look continuous and natural at regions with multiple appearances. Experiments show that our method has results as satisfactory as state-of-the-art in the single-appearance regions and are less likely to be completely invisible, but far exceed the quality of the state-of-the-art in the multi-appearance regions. Moreover, our method is hundreds of times faster than previous methods. Benefitting from the unique advantages of our method, we provide some downstream applications for camouflage generation, which show its potential. The related code and dataset will be released at https://github.com/Tale17/LCG-Net.

Previous work has typically been implemented by an iterative optimization process. However, these methods struggle in 1) efficiently generating camouflage images using foreground and background with arbitrary structure; 2) camouflaging foreground objects to regions with multiple appearances (e.g. the junction of the vegetation and the mountains), which limit their practical application. To address these problems, this paper proposes a novel Location-free Camouflage Generation Network (LCG-Net) that fuse high-level features of foreground and background image, and generate result by one inference. Specifically, a Position-aligned Structure Fusion (PSF) module is devised to guide structure feature fusion based on the point-to-point structure similarity of foreground and background, and introduce local appearance features point-by-point. To retain the necessary identifiable features, a new immerse loss is adopted under our pipeline, while a background patch appearance loss is utilized to ensure that the hidden objects look continuous and natural at regions with multiple appearances. Experiments show that our method has results as satisfactory as state-of-the-art in the single-appearance regions and are less likely to be completely invisible, but far exceed the quality of the state-of-the-art in the multi-appearance regions. Moreover, our method is hundreds of times faster than previous methods. Benefitting from the unique advantages of our method, we provide some downstream applications for camouflage generation, which show its potential. The related code and dataset will be released at https://github.com/Tale17/LCG-Net.
abstract_zh: 伪装是一种常见的视觉现象，是指将前景物体隐藏到背景图像中，使人眼暂时看不到它们。以前的工作通常是通过迭代优化过程来实现的。然而，这些方法存在以下问题：1）使用任意结构的前景和背景有效地生成迷彩图像； 2）将前景物体伪装到具有多种外观的区域（例如植被和山脉的交界处），这限制了它们的实际应用。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种新颖的无位置伪装生成网络（LCG-Net），它融合了前景和背景图像的高级特征，并通过一次推理生成结果。具体来说，设计了位置对齐结构融合（PSF）模块，基于前景和背景的点对点结构相似性来引导结构特征融合，并逐点引入局部外观特征。为了保留必要的可识别特征，我们的流程中采用了新的沉浸损失，同时利用背景块外观损失来确保隐藏对象在具有多种外观的区域看起来连续且自然。实验表明，我们的方法在单外观区域中的结果与最先进的技术一样令人满意，并且不太可能完全不可见，但在多外观区域中远远超过了最先进的质量。此外，我们的方法比以前的方法快数百倍。受益于我们方法的独特优势，我们提供了一些迷彩生成的下游应用，这显示了其潜力。相关代码和数据集将在https://github.com/Tale17/LCG-Net发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需定位的伪装生成网络（LCG-Net），用于高效生成将前景物体融入背景图像的伪装效果。
AI.motivation: 现有伪装生成方法依赖迭代优化，存在生成效率低、难以处理多外观区域（如植被与山脉交界处）的问题，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 设计了基于点对点结构相似性的位置对齐结构融合（PSF）模块，结合局部外观特征点对点融合；引入沉浸损失保留可识别特征，并采用背景块外观损失确保多外观区域的自然连续性。
AI.result: 在单外观区域性能与现有最佳方法相当，多外观区域显著优于现有方法，且速度提升数百倍，并提供了下游应用案例。
AI.conclusion: LCG-Net通过结构特征融合与新型损失函数，有效解决了伪装生成中的效率与多外观区域处理难题，展现出广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Wanli Ma,Xinyi Gao,Jianwei Shi,Hao Hu,Chaoyang Wang,Yanxue Liang,Oktay Karakus
title: Reinforcement Learning based Voice Interaction to Clear Path for Robots in Elevator Environment
title_zh: 基于强化学习的语音交互为电梯环境中的机器人扫清道路
abstract: Efficient use of the space in an elevator is very necessary for a service robot, due to the need for reducing the amount of time caused by waiting for the next elevator. To provide a solution for this, we propose a hybrid approach that combines reinforcement learning (RL) with voice interaction for robot navigation in the scene of entering the elevator. RL provides robots with a high exploration ability to find a new clear path to enter the elevator compared to traditional navigation methods such as Optimal Reciprocal Collision Avoidance (ORCA). The proposed method allows the robot to take an active clear path action towards the elevator whilst a crowd of people stands at the entrance of the elevator wherein there are still lots of space. This is done by embedding a clear path action (voice prompt) into the RL framework, and the proposed navigation policy helps the robot to finish tasks efficiently and safely. Our model approach provides a great improvement in the success rate and reward of entering the elevator compared to state-of-the-art navigation policies without active clear path operation.
summary: Efficient use of the space in an elevator is very necessary for a service robot, due to the need for reducing the amount of time caused by waiting for the next elevator. To provide a solution for this, we propose a hybrid approach that combines reinforcement learning (RL) with voice interaction for robot navigation in the scene of entering the elevator. RL provides robots with a high exploration ability to find a new clear path to enter the elevator compared to traditional navigation methods such as Optimal Reciprocal Collision Avoidance (ORCA). The proposed method allows the robot to take an active clear path action towards the elevator whilst a crowd of people stands at the entrance of the elevator wherein there are still lots of space. This is done by embedding a clear path action (voice prompt) into the RL framework, and the proposed navigation policy helps the robot to finish tasks efficiently and safely. Our model approach provides a great improvement in the success rate and reward of entering the elevator compared to state-of-the-art navigation policies without active clear path operation.
abstract_zh: 对于服务机器人来说，有效利用电梯内的空间是非常必要的，因为需要减少等待下一部电梯所造成的时间。为了为此提供解决方案，我们提出了一种混合方法，将强化学习（RL）与语音交互相结合，用于进入电梯场景中的机器人导航。与最优相互碰撞避免（ORCA）等传统导航方法相比，强化学习为机器人提供了很高的探索能力，可以找到进入电梯的新的畅通路径。所提出的方法允许机器人对电梯采取主动的畅通路径动作，同时一群人站在电梯入口处，其中仍然有很多空间。这是通过在强化学习框架中嵌入清晰的路径动作（语音提示）来完成的，所提出的导航策略可以帮助机器人高效、安全地完成任务。与没有主动畅通路径操作的最先进的导航策略相比，我们的模型方法极大地提高了进入电梯的成功率和奖励。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合强化学习与语音交互的混合方法，用于解决机器人在电梯环境中高效导航的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统导航方法在电梯场景中存在空间利用效率低、等待时间长的问题，需提升机器人主动寻找路径的能力。
AI.method: 将语音提示作为清除路径动作嵌入强化学习框架，使机器人在拥挤电梯入口主动寻找可用空间。
AI.result: 相比现有导航策略，该方法在电梯进入成功率和奖励值上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习与语音交互的结合有效提升了机器人在动态拥挤环境中的导航效率与安全性。

authors_text: Angel Romero,Robert Penicka,Davide Scaramuzza
title: Time-Optimal Online Replanning for Agile Quadrotor Flight
title_zh: 敏捷四旋翼飞行的时间最优在线重新规划
abstract: In this paper, we tackle the problem of flying a quadrotor using time-optimal control policies that can be replanned online when the environment changes or when encountering unknown disturbances. This problem is challenging as the time-optimal trajectories that consider the full quadrotor dynamics are computationally expensive to generate (order of minutes or even hours). We introduce a sampling-based method for efficient generation of time-optimal paths of a point-mass model. These paths are then tracked using a Model Predictive Contouring Control approach that considers the full quadrotor dynamics and the single rotor thrust limits. Our combined approach is able to run in real-time, being the first time-optimal method that is able to adapt to changes on-the-fly. We showcase our approach's adaption capabilities by flying a quadrotor at more than 60 km/h in a racing track where gates are moving. Additionally, we show that our online replanning approach can cope with strong disturbances caused by winds of up to 68 km/h.
summary: In this paper, we tackle the problem of flying a quadrotor using time-optimal control policies that can be replanned online when the environment changes or when encountering unknown disturbances. This problem is challenging as the time-optimal trajectories that consider the full quadrotor dynamics are computationally expensive to generate (order of minutes or even hours). We introduce a sampling-based method for efficient generation of time-optimal paths of a point-mass model. These paths are then tracked using a Model Predictive Contouring Control approach that considers the full quadrotor dynamics and the single rotor thrust limits. Our combined approach is able to run in real-time, being the first time-optimal method that is able to adapt to changes on-the-fly. We showcase our approach's adaption capabilities by flying a quadrotor at more than 60 km/h in a racing track where gates are moving. Additionally, we show that our online replanning approach can cope with strong disturbances caused by winds of up to 68 km/h.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们使用时间最优控制策略来解决四旋翼飞行器的飞行问题，当环境发生变化或遇到未知干扰时，这些策略可以在线重新规划。这个问题具有挑战性，因为考虑完整四旋翼动力学的时间最优轨迹的生成计算成本很高（几分钟甚至几小时）。我们引入了一种基于采样的方法，用于有效生成点质量模型的时间最优路径。然后使用模型预测轮廓控制方法跟踪这些路径，该方法考虑完整的四旋翼动力学和单转子推力限制。我们的组合方法能够实时运行，是第一个能够适应动态变化的时间最优方法。我们通过在大门移动的赛道上以超过 60 公里/小时的速度飞行四旋翼飞行器来展示我们方法的适应能力。此外，我们还表明，我们的在线重新规划方法可以应对高达 68 公里/小时的风引起的强烈干扰。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时在线重新规划时间最优路径的方法，使四旋翼飞行器能够适应环境变化和未知干扰。
AI.motivation: 传统时间最优轨迹生成方法计算耗时（分钟至小时），无法满足动态环境下的实时调整需求。
AI.method: 基于采样法生成点质量模型的时间最优路径，结合考虑全动力学和单旋翼推力限制的模型预测轮廓控制进行轨迹跟踪。
AI.result: 实现60km/h移动赛道飞行和68km/h强风干扰下的稳定控制，首次达成实时在线适应的最优路径规划。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分层控制策略有效平衡计算效率与动态适应性，为复杂环境下的敏捷飞行提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Yinlin Hu,Pascal Fua,Mathieu Salzmann
title: Perspective Flow Aggregation for Data-Limited 6D Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: 用于数据有限的 6D 物体姿态估计的透视流聚合
abstract: Most recent 6D object pose estimation methods, including unsupervised ones, require many real training images. Unfortunately, for some applications, such as those in space or deep under water, acquiring real images, even unannotated, is virtually impossible. In this paper, we propose a method that can be trained solely on synthetic images, or optionally using a few additional real ones. Given a rough pose estimate obtained from a first network, it uses a second network to predict a dense 2D correspondence field between the image rendered using the rough pose and the real image and infers the required pose correction. This approach is much less sensitive to the domain shift between synthetic and real images than state-of-the-art methods. It performs on par with methods that require annotated real images for training when not using any, and outperforms them considerably when using as few as twenty real images.
summary: Most recent 6D object pose estimation methods, including unsupervised ones, require many real training images. Unfortunately, for some applications, such as those in space or deep under water, acquiring real images, even unannotated, is virtually impossible. In this paper, we propose a method that can be trained solely on synthetic images, or optionally using a few additional real ones. Given a rough pose estimate obtained from a first network, it uses a second network to predict a dense 2D correspondence field between the image rendered using the rough pose and the real image and infers the required pose correction. This approach is much less sensitive to the domain shift between synthetic and real images than state-of-the-art methods. It performs on par with methods that require annotated real images for training when not using any, and outperforms them considerably when using as few as twenty real images.
abstract_zh: 最近的 6D 物体姿态估计方法，包括无监督方法，需要许多真实的训练图像。不幸的是，对于某些应用，例如太空或水下深处的应用，获取真实图像（即使没有注释）几乎是不可能的。在本文中，我们提出了一种可以仅在合成图像上进行训练的方法，也可以选择使用一些额外的真实图像。给定从第一个网络获得的粗略姿势估计，它使用第二个网络来预测使用粗略姿势渲染的图像和真实图像之间的密集二维对应场，并推断所需的姿势校正。与最先进的方法相比，这种方法对合成图像和真实图像之间的域转换不太敏感。在不使用任何真实图像的情况下，它的性能与需要带注释的真实图像进行训练的方法相当，并且在使用少至 20 个真实图像时，其性能明显优于它们。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在数据有限的情况下进行6D物体姿态估计的方法，通过合成图像和少量真实图像训练，减少合成与真实图像间的领域差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有6D物体姿态估计方法依赖大量真实图像训练，但在太空或深水等场景中获取真实图像几乎不可能，需开发无需大量真实数据的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用两阶段网络架构：第一网络生成粗略姿态估计，第二网络预测合成图像与真实图像间的密集2D对应关系，推断姿态修正以减少领域差异影响。
AI.result: 在无真实图像训练时性能与依赖真实标注的方法相当，仅使用20张真实图像时显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过视角流聚合有效缓解合成与真实数据间的领域差异，为数据受限场景下的6D姿态估计提供可行方案。

authors_text: Naufal Suryanto,Yongsu Kim,Hyoeun Kang,Harashta Tatimma Larasati,Youngyeo Yun,Thi-Thu-Huong Le,Hunmin Yang,Se-Yoon Oh,Howon Kim
title: DTA: Physical Camouflage Attacks using Differentiable Transformation Network
title_zh: DTA：使用可微变换网络的物理伪装攻击
abstract: To perform adversarial attacks in the physical world, many studies have proposed adversarial camouflage, a method to hide a target object by applying camouflage patterns on 3D object surfaces. For obtaining optimal physical adversarial camouflage, previous studies have utilized the so-called neural renderer, as it supports differentiability. However, existing neural renderers cannot fully represent various real-world transformations due to a lack of control of scene parameters compared to the legacy photo-realistic renderers. In this paper, we propose the Differentiable Transformation Attack (DTA), a framework for generating a robust physical adversarial pattern on a target object to camouflage it against object detection models with a wide range of transformations. It utilizes our novel Differentiable Transformation Network (DTN), which learns the expected transformation of a rendered object when the texture is changed while preserving the original properties of the target object. Using our attack framework, an adversary can gain both the advantages of the legacy photo-realistic renderers including various physical-world transformations and the benefit of white-box access by offering differentiability. Our experiments show that our camouflaged 3D vehicles can successfully evade state-of-the-art object detection models in the photo-realistic environment (i.e., CARLA on Unreal Engine). Furthermore, our demonstration on a scaled Tesla Model 3 proves the applicability and transferability of our method to the real world.
summary: To perform adversarial attacks in the physical world, many studies have proposed adversarial camouflage, a method to hide a target object by applying camouflage patterns on 3D object surfaces. For obtaining optimal physical adversarial camouflage, previous studies have utilized the so-called neural renderer, as it supports differentiability. However, existing neural renderers cannot fully represent various real-world transformations due to a lack of control of scene parameters compared to the legacy photo-realistic renderers. In this paper, we propose the Differentiable Transformation Attack (DTA), a framework for generating a robust physical adversarial pattern on a target object to camouflage it against object detection models with a wide range of transformations. It utilizes our novel Differentiable Transformation Network (DTN), which learns the expected transformation of a rendered object when the texture is changed while preserving the original properties of the target object. Using our attack framework, an adversary can gain both the advantages of the legacy photo-realistic renderers including various physical-world transformations and the benefit of white-box access by offering differentiability. Our experiments show that our camouflaged 3D vehicles can successfully evade state-of-the-art object detection models in the photo-realistic environment (i.e., CARLA on Unreal Engine). Furthermore, our demonstration on a scaled Tesla Model 3 proves the applicability and transferability of our method to the real world.
abstract_zh: 为了在物理世界中进行对抗性攻击，许多研究提出了对抗性伪装，这是一种通过在 3D 物体表面应用伪装图案来隐藏目标物体的方法。为了获得最佳的物理对抗伪装，之前的研究利用了所谓的神经渲染器，因为它支持可微性。然而，与传统的照片级渲染器相比，由于缺乏对场景参数的控制，现有的神经渲染器无法完全表示各种现实世界的变换。在本文中，我们提出了可微变换攻击（DTA），这是一个框架，用于在目标对象上生成鲁棒的物理对抗模式，以将其伪装成具有广泛变换的对象检测模型。它利用我们新颖的可微变换网络（DTN），它可以学习纹理更改时渲染对象的预期变换，同时保留目标对象的原始属性。使用我们的攻击框架，对手可以获得传统照片级真实感渲染器的优势，包括各种物理世界转换，以及通过提供可微性来获得白盒访问的好处。我们的实验表明，我们的伪装 3D 车辆可以在逼真的环境中成功躲避最先进的对象检测模型（即虚幻引擎上的 CARLA）。此外，我们在特斯拉 Model 3 上的演示证明了我们的方法在现实世界中的适用性和可移植性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DTA的物理伪装攻击方法，利用可微分变换网络（DTN）生成对抗性图案，以隐藏目标物体，使其免受目标检测模型的检测。
AI.motivation: 现有的神经渲染器无法充分表示各种现实世界变换，因此需要一种新的方法，既能利用传统逼真渲染器的各种物理世界变换优势，又能提供可微性以实现白盒攻击。
AI.method: 本文提出了可微分变换攻击（DTA）框架，利用可微分变换网络（DTN）学习在改变纹理时渲染对象的预期变换，同时保留目标物体的原始属性。
AI.result: 实验表明，本文的伪装3D车辆可以在逼真环境中成功避开最先进的目标检测模型，并且在缩小版特斯拉Model 3上的演示证明了该方法在现实世界中的适用性和可迁移性。
AI.conclusion: DTA框架结合了传统逼真渲染器和可微分攻击的优势，为物理世界中的对抗性伪装提供了一种有效的方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DTA的物理伪装攻击方法，利用可微分变换网络（DTN）生成对抗性图案，以隐藏目标物体，使其免受目标检测模型的检测。
ai_content.motivation: 现有的神经渲染器无法充分表示各种现实世界变换，因此需要一种新的方法，既能利用传统逼真渲染器的各种物理世界变换优势，又能提供可微性以实现白盒攻击。
ai_content.method: 本文提出了可微分变换攻击（DTA）框架，利用可微分变换网络（DTN）学习在改变纹理时渲染对象的预期变换，同时保留目标物体的原始属性。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，本文的伪装3D车辆可以在逼真环境中成功避开最先进的目标检测模型，并且在缩小版特斯拉Model 3上的演示证明了该方法在现实世界中的适用性和可迁移性。
ai_content.conclusion: DTA框架结合了传统逼真渲染器和可微分攻击的优势，为物理世界中的对抗性伪装提供了一种有效的方法。

search_text: DTA: Physical Camouflage Attacks using Differentiable Transformation Network DTA：使用可微变换网络的物理伪装攻击 To perform adversarial attacks in the physical world, many studies have proposed adversarial camouflage, a method to hide a target object by applying camouflage patterns on 3D object surfaces. For obtaining optimal physical adversarial camouflage, previous studies have utilized the so-called neural renderer, as it supports differentiability. However, existing neural renderers cannot fully represent various real-world transformations due to a lack of control of scene parameters compared to the legacy photo-realistic renderers. In this paper, we propose the Differentiable Transformation Attack (DTA), a framework for generating a robust physical adversarial pattern on a target object to camouflage it against object detection models with a wide range of transformations. It utilizes our novel Differentiable Transformation Network (DTN), which learns the expected transformation of a rendered object when the texture is changed while preserving the original properties of the target object. Using our attack framework, an adversary can gain both the advantages of the legacy photo-realistic renderers including various physical-world transformations and the benefit of white-box access by offering differentiability. Our experiments show that our camouflaged 3D vehicles can successfully evade state-of-the-art object detection models in the photo-realistic environment (i.e., CARLA on Unreal Engine). Furthermore, our demonstration on a scaled Tesla Model 3 proves the applicability and transferability of our method to the real world. 为了在物理世界中进行对抗性攻击，许多研究提出了对抗性伪装，这是一种通过在 3D 物体表面应用伪装图案来隐藏目标物体的方法。为了获得最佳的物理对抗伪装，之前的研究利用了所谓的神经渲染器，因为它支持可微性。然而，与传统的照片级渲染器相比，由于缺乏对场景参数的控制，现有的神经渲染器无法完全表示各种现实世界的变换。在本文中，我们提出了可微变换攻击（DTA），这是一个框架，用于在目标对象上生成鲁棒的物理对抗模式，以将其伪装成具有广泛变换的对象检测模型。它利用我们新颖的可微变换网络（DTN），它可以学习纹理更改时渲染对象的预期变换，同时保留目标对象的原始属性。使用我们的攻击框架，对手可以获得传统照片级真实感渲染器的优势，包括各种物理世界转换，以及通过提供可微性来获得白盒访问的好处。我们的实验表明，我们的伪装 3D 车辆可以在逼真的环境中成功躲避最先进的对象检测模型（即虚幻引擎上的 CARLA）。此外，我们在特斯拉 Model 3 上的演示证明了我们的方法在现实世界中的适用性和可移植性。 本文提出了一种名为DTA的物理伪装攻击方法，利用可微分变换网络（DTN）生成对抗性图案，以隐藏目标物体，使其免受目标检测模型的检测。 Naufal Suryanto,Yongsu Kim,Hyoeun Kang,Harashta Tatimma Larasati,Youngyeo Yun,Thi-Thu-Huong Le,Hunmin Yang,Se-Yoon Oh,Howon Kim cs.CV

authors_text: Jianhua Han,Xiajun Deng,Xinyue Cai,Zhen Yang,Hang Xu,Chunjing Xu,Xiaodan Liang
title: Laneformer: Object-aware Row-Column Transformers for Lane Detection
title_zh: Laneformer：用于车道检测的对象感知行列转换器
abstract: We present Laneformer, a conceptually simple yet powerful transformer-based architecture tailored for lane detection that is a long-standing research topic for visual perception in autonomous driving. The dominant paradigms rely on purely CNN-based architectures which often fail in incorporating relations of long-range lane points and global contexts induced by surrounding objects (e.g., pedestrians, vehicles). Inspired by recent advances of the transformer encoder-decoder architecture in various vision tasks, we move forwards to design a new end-to-end Laneformer architecture that revolutionizes the conventional transformers into better capturing the shape and semantic characteristics of lanes, with minimal overhead in latency. First, coupling with deformable pixel-wise self-attention in the encoder, Laneformer presents two new row and column self-attention operations to efficiently mine point context along with the lane shapes. Second, motivated by the appearing objects would affect the decision of predicting lane segments, Laneformer further includes the detected object instances as extra inputs of multi-head attention blocks in the encoder and decoder to facilitate the lane point detection by sensing semantic contexts. Specifically, the bounding box locations of objects are added into Key module to provide interaction with each pixel and query while the ROI-aligned features are inserted into Value module. Extensive experiments demonstrate our Laneformer achieves state-of-the-art performances on CULane benchmark, in terms of 77.1% F1 score. We hope our simple and effective Laneformer will serve as a strong baseline for future research in self-attention models for lane detection.
summary: We present Laneformer, a conceptually simple yet powerful transformer-based architecture tailored for lane detection that is a long-standing research topic for visual perception in autonomous driving. The dominant paradigms rely on purely CNN-based architectures which often fail in incorporating relations of long-range lane points and global contexts induced by surrounding objects (e.g., pedestrians, vehicles). Inspired by recent advances of the transformer encoder-decoder architecture in various vision tasks, we move forwards to design a new end-to-end Laneformer architecture that revolutionizes the conventional transformers into better capturing the shape and semantic characteristics of lanes, with minimal overhead in latency. First, coupling with deformable pixel-wise self-attention in the encoder, Laneformer presents two new row and column self-attention operations to efficiently mine point context along with the lane shapes. Second, motivated by the appearing objects would affect the decision of predicting lane segments, Laneformer further includes the detected object instances as extra inputs of multi-head attention blocks in the encoder and decoder to facilitate the lane point detection by sensing semantic contexts. Specifically, the bounding box locations of objects are added into Key module to provide interaction with each pixel and query while the ROI-aligned features are inserted into Value module. Extensive experiments demonstrate our Laneformer achieves state-of-the-art performances on CULane benchmark, in terms of 77.1% F1 score. We hope our simple and effective Laneformer will serve as a strong baseline for future research in self-attention models for lane detection.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Laneformer，这是一种概念上简单但功能强大的基于变压器的架构，专为车道检测而设计，这是自动驾驶视觉感知的长期研究课题。主流范式依赖于纯粹基于 CNN 的架构，这些架构通常无法将远程车道点的关系与周围物体（例如行人、车辆）引起的全局上下文结合起来。受到 Transformer 编码器-解码器架构在各种视觉任务中的最新进展的启发，我们继续设计一种新的端到端 Laneformer 架构，该架构彻底改变了传统 Transformer，以更好地捕获车道的形状和语义特征，同时将延迟开销降至最低。首先，与编码器中的可变形像素自注意力相结合，Laneformer 提出了两种新的行和列自注意力操作，以有效地挖掘点上下文以及车道形状。其次，由于出现的物体会影响预测车道段的决策，Laneformer 进一步将检测到的物体实例作为编码器和解码器中多头注意力块的额外输入，以通过感知语义上下文来促进车道点检测。具体来说，对象的边界框位置被添加到关键模块中，以提供与每个像素和查询的交互，同时 ROI 对齐的特征被插入到值模块中。大量实验表明，我们的 Laneformer 在 CULane 基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，F1 得分为 77.1%。我们希望我们简单有效的 Laneformer 能够成为未来车道检测自注意力模型研究的坚实基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Laneformer，一种基于Transformer的车道检测架构，旨在解决传统CNN方法在长距离车道点关系和全局上下文建模中的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在车道检测中难以捕捉长距离车道点关系及周围物体（如行人、车辆）引起的全局上下文信息，而Transformer在视觉任务中表现出色，因此需设计更高效的Transformer架构。
AI.method: Laneformer结合可变形像素自注意力，在编码器中引入行-列自注意力操作以高效挖掘车道形状上下文；同时将检测到的物体实例作为多头注意力块的额外输入，通过物体边界框和ROI对齐特征增强语义感知能力。
AI.result: 在CULane基准测试中，Laneformer以77.1%的F1分数达到当时最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: Laneformer通过简单有效的设计为未来基于自注意力的车道检测研究提供了强基线。

authors_text: Abdul Hameed Azeemi,Ihsan Ayyub Qazi,Agha Ali Raza
title: Representative Subset Selection for Efficient Fine-Tuning in Self-Supervised Speech Recognition
title_zh: 自监督语音识别中高效微调的代表性子集选择
abstract: Self-supervised speech recognition models require considerable labeled training data for learning high-fidelity representations for Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) which is computationally demanding and time-consuming. We consider the task of identifying an optimal subset of data for efficient fine-tuning in self-supervised speech models for ASR. We discover that the dataset pruning strategies used in vision tasks for sampling the most informative examples do not perform better than random subset selection on fine-tuning self-supervised ASR. We then present the COWERAGE algorithm for representative subset selection in self-supervised ASR. COWERAGE is based on our finding that ensuring the coverage of examples based on training Word Error Rate (WER) in the early training epochs leads to better generalization performance. Extensive experiments with the wav2vec 2.0 and HuBERT model on TIMIT, Librispeech, and LJSpeech datasets show the effectiveness of COWERAGE and its transferability across models, with up to 17% relative WER improvement over existing dataset pruning methods and random sampling. We also demonstrate that the coverage of training instances in terms of WER values ensures the inclusion of phonemically diverse examples, leading to better test accuracy in self-supervised speech recognition models.
summary: Self-supervised speech recognition models require considerable labeled training data for learning high-fidelity representations for Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) which is computationally demanding and time-consuming. We consider the task of identifying an optimal subset of data for efficient fine-tuning in self-supervised speech models for ASR. We discover that the dataset pruning strategies used in vision tasks for sampling the most informative examples do not perform better than random subset selection on fine-tuning self-supervised ASR. We then present the COWERAGE algorithm for representative subset selection in self-supervised ASR. COWERAGE is based on our finding that ensuring the coverage of examples based on training Word Error Rate (WER) in the early training epochs leads to better generalization performance. Extensive experiments with the wav2vec 2.0 and HuBERT model on TIMIT, Librispeech, and LJSpeech datasets show the effectiveness of COWERAGE and its transferability across models, with up to 17% relative WER improvement over existing dataset pruning methods and random sampling. We also demonstrate that the coverage of training instances in terms of WER values ensures the inclusion of phonemically diverse examples, leading to better test accuracy in self-supervised speech recognition models.
abstract_zh: 自监督语音识别模型需要大量标记训练数据来学习自动语音识别 (ASR) 的高保真表示，这对计算要求很高且耗时。我们考虑的任务是识别最佳数据子集，以便对 ASR 自监督语音模型进行有效微调。我们发现，视觉任务中用于采样信息最丰富的示例的数据集修剪策略在微调自监督 ASR 方面的表现并不比随机子集选择更好。然后，我们提出了用于自监督 ASR 中代表性子集选择的 COWERAGE 算法。 COWERAGE 基于我们的发现，即在早期训练时期确保基于训练字错误率 (WER) 的示例覆盖率可以带来更好的泛化性能。在 TIMIT、Librispeech 和 LJSpeech 数据集上使用 wav2vec 2.0 和 HuBERT 模型进行的广泛实验表明了 COWERAGE 的有效性及其跨模型的可转移性，与现有数据集修剪方法和随机采样相比，相对 WER 提高了高达 17%。我们还证明，训练实例在 WER 值方面的覆盖范围确保了包含语音上不同的示例，从而提高自监督语音识别模型的测试准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为COWERAGE的算法，用于在自监督语音识别模型中选择具有代表性的数据子集以提高微调效率。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉任务的数据集剪枝策略在自监督语音识别（ASR）微调中效果不佳，需探索更适应语音领域的子集选择方法。
AI.method: 基于早期训练阶段词错误率（WER）的覆盖度分析，设计COWERAGE算法确保子集中包含语音学多样性样本。
AI.result: 在TIMIT、Librispeech等数据集上，COWERAGE相比现有方法和随机采样实现最高17%的相对WER改进。
AI.conclusion: 通过保障训练样本WER覆盖度的子集选择方法，能有效提升自监督语音识别模型的泛化性能和测试准确率。

search_text: Representative Subset Selection for Efficient Fine-Tuning in Self-Supervised Speech Recognition 自监督语音识别中高效微调的代表性子集选择 Self-supervised speech recognition models require considerable labeled training data for learning high-fidelity representations for Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) which is computationally demanding and time-consuming. We consider the task of identifying an optimal subset of data for efficient fine-tuning in self-supervised speech models for ASR. We discover that the dataset pruning strategies used in vision tasks for sampling the most informative examples do not perform better than random subset selection on fine-tuning self-supervised ASR. We then present the COWERAGE algorithm for representative subset selection in self-supervised ASR. COWERAGE is based on our finding that ensuring the coverage of examples based on training Word Error Rate (WER) in the early training epochs leads to better generalization performance. Extensive experiments with the wav2vec 2.0 and HuBERT model on TIMIT, Librispeech, and LJSpeech datasets show the effectiveness of COWERAGE and its transferability across models, with up to 17% relative WER improvement over existing dataset pruning methods and random sampling. We also demonstrate that the coverage of training instances in terms of WER values ensures the inclusion of phonemically diverse examples, leading to better test accuracy in self-supervised speech recognition models. 自监督语音识别模型需要大量标记训练数据来学习自动语音识别 (ASR) 的高保真表示，这对计算要求很高且耗时。我们考虑的任务是识别最佳数据子集，以便对 ASR 自监督语音模型进行有效微调。我们发现，视觉任务中用于采样信息最丰富的示例的数据集修剪策略在微调自监督 ASR 方面的表现并不比随机子集选择更好。然后，我们提出了用于自监督 ASR 中代表性子集选择的 COWERAGE 算法。 COWERAGE 基于我们的发现，即在早期训练时期确保基于训练字错误率 (WER) 的示例覆盖率可以带来更好的泛化性能。在 TIMIT、Librispeech 和 LJSpeech 数据集上使用 wav2vec 2.0 和 HuBERT 模型进行的广泛实验表明了 COWERAGE 的有效性及其跨模型的可转移性，与现有数据集修剪方法和随机采样相比，相对 WER 提高了高达 17%。我们还证明，训练实例在 WER 值方面的覆盖范围确保了包含语音上不同的示例，从而提高自监督语音识别模型的测试准确性。 本文提出一种名为COWERAGE的算法，用于在自监督语音识别模型中选择具有代表性的数据子集以提高微调效率。 Abdul Hameed Azeemi,Ihsan Ayyub Qazi,Agha Ali Raza cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Xin Yuan,Yongbing Feng,Mingming Ye,Cheng Tuo,Minghang Zhang
title: AdaVocoder: Adaptive Vocoder for Custom Voice
title_zh: AdaVocoder：用于自定义语音的自适应声码器
abstract: Custom voice is to construct a personal speech synthesis system by adapting the source speech synthesis model to the target model through the target few recordings. The solution to constructing a custom voice is to combine an adaptive acoustic model with a robust vocoder. However, training a robust vocoder usually requires a multi-speaker dataset, which should include various age groups and various timbres, so that the trained vocoder can be used for unseen speakers. Collecting such a multi-speaker dataset is difficult, and the dataset distribution always has a mismatch with the distribution of the target speaker dataset. This paper proposes an adaptive vocoder for custom voice from another novel perspective to solve the above problems. The adaptive vocoder mainly uses a cross-domain consistency loss to solve the overfitting problem encountered by the GAN-based neural vocoder in the transfer learning of few-shot scenes. We construct two adaptive vocoders, AdaMelGAN and AdaHiFi-GAN. First, We pre-train the source vocoder model on AISHELL3 and CSMSC datasets, respectively. Then, fine-tune it on the internal dataset VXI-children with few adaptation data. The empirical results show that a high-quality custom voice system can be built by combining a adaptive acoustic model with a adaptive vocoder.
summary: Custom voice is to construct a personal speech synthesis system by adapting the source speech synthesis model to the target model through the target few recordings. The solution to constructing a custom voice is to combine an adaptive acoustic model with a robust vocoder. However, training a robust vocoder usually requires a multi-speaker dataset, which should include various age groups and various timbres, so that the trained vocoder can be used for unseen speakers. Collecting such a multi-speaker dataset is difficult, and the dataset distribution always has a mismatch with the distribution of the target speaker dataset. This paper proposes an adaptive vocoder for custom voice from another novel perspective to solve the above problems. The adaptive vocoder mainly uses a cross-domain consistency loss to solve the overfitting problem encountered by the GAN-based neural vocoder in the transfer learning of few-shot scenes. We construct two adaptive vocoders, AdaMelGAN and AdaHiFi-GAN. First, We pre-train the source vocoder model on AISHELL3 and CSMSC datasets, respectively. Then, fine-tune it on the internal dataset VXI-children with few adaptation data. The empirical results show that a high-quality custom voice system can be built by combining a adaptive acoustic model with a adaptive vocoder.
abstract_zh: 定制语音是通过目标少量录音，将源语音合成模型适配到目标模型，构建个人语音合成系统。构建自定义语音的解决方案是将自适应声学模型与强大的声码器相结合。然而，训练一个鲁棒的声码器通常需要一个多说话人的数据集，其中应该包括不同的年龄组和不同的音色，以便训练好的声码器可以用于看不见的说话人。收集这样的多说话人数据集是很困难的，并且数据集分布总是与目标说话人数据集的分布不匹配。本文从另一个新颖的角度提出了一种用于自定义语音的自适应声码器来解决上述问题。自适应声码器主要利用跨域一致性损失来解决基于GAN的神经声码器在少镜头场景的迁移学习中遇到的过拟合问题。我们构建了两个自适应声码器：AdaMelGAN 和 AdaHiFi-GAN。首先，我们分别在 AISHELL3 和 CSMSC 数据集上预训练源声码器模型。然后，在具有少量适应数据的内部数据集 VXI-children 上对其进行微调。实证结果表明，将自适应声学模型与自适应声码器相结合可以构建高质量的定制语音系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应声码器AdaVocoder，用于在少量目标语音数据下构建高质量的定制语音系统。
AI.motivation: 传统定制语音方法依赖大规模多说话人数据集训练鲁棒声码器，但实际中数据收集困难且分布常与目标说话人不匹配。
AI.method: 设计跨域一致性损失解决GAN声码器在少样本迁移学习中的过拟合问题，构建AdaMelGAN和AdaHiFi-GAN两种自适应声码器，基于AISHELL3/CSMSC预训练后在VXI-children数据集微调。
AI.result: 实验表明结合自适应声学模型与自适应声码器可构建高质量定制语音系统，有效缓解数据分布不匹配问题。
AI.conclusion: 自适应声码器通过跨域一致性约束显著提升了少样本场景下的定制语音合成质量，为实际应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Cho-Ying Wu,Chin-Cheng Hsu,Ulrich Neumann
title: Cross-Modal Perceptionist: Can Face Geometry be Gleaned from Voices?
title_zh: 跨模态感知论者：可以从声音中收集面部几何形状吗？
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022. Project page: https://choyingw.github.io/works/Voice2Mesh/index.html. This version supersedes arXiv:2104.10299
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022. Project page: https://choyingw.github.io/works/Voice2Mesh/index.html. This version supersedes arXiv:2104.10299
abstract: This work digs into a root question in human perception: can face geometry be gleaned from one's voices? Previous works that study this question only adopt developments in image synthesis and convert voices into face images to show correlations, but working on the image domain unavoidably involves predicting attributes that voices cannot hint, including facial textures, hairstyles, and backgrounds. We instead investigate the ability to reconstruct 3D faces to concentrate on only geometry, which is much more physiologically grounded. We propose our analysis framework, Cross-Modal Perceptionist, under both supervised and unsupervised learning. First, we construct a dataset, Voxceleb-3D, which extends Voxceleb and includes paired voices and face meshes, making supervised learning possible. Second, we use a knowledge distillation mechanism to study whether face geometry can still be gleaned from voices without paired voices and 3D face data under limited availability of 3D face scans. We break down the core question into four parts and perform visual and numerical analyses as responses to the core question. Our findings echo those in physiology and neuroscience about the correlation between voices and facial structures. The work provides future human-centric cross-modal learning with explainable foundations. See our project page: https://choyingw.github.io/works/Voice2Mesh/index.html
summary: This work digs into a root question in human perception: can face geometry be gleaned from one's voices? Previous works that study this question only adopt developments in image synthesis and convert voices into face images to show correlations, but working on the image domain unavoidably involves predicting attributes that voices cannot hint, including facial textures, hairstyles, and backgrounds. We instead investigate the ability to reconstruct 3D faces to concentrate on only geometry, which is much more physiologically grounded. We propose our analysis framework, Cross-Modal Perceptionist, under both supervised and unsupervised learning. First, we construct a dataset, Voxceleb-3D, which extends Voxceleb and includes paired voices and face meshes, making supervised learning possible. Second, we use a knowledge distillation mechanism to study whether face geometry can still be gleaned from voices without paired voices and 3D face data under limited availability of 3D face scans. We break down the core question into four parts and perform visual and numerical analyses as responses to the core question. Our findings echo those in physiology and neuroscience about the correlation between voices and facial structures. The work provides future human-centric cross-modal learning with explainable foundations. See our project page: https://choyingw.github.io/works/Voice2Mesh/index.html
abstract_zh: 这项工作深入探讨了人类感知中的一个根本问题：可以从一个人的声音中收集面部几何形状吗？以前研究这个问题的工作仅采用图像合成的发展，并将声音转换为面部图像来显示相关性，但在图像领域的工作不可避免地涉及预测声音无法暗示的属性，包括面部纹理、发型和背景。相反，我们研究重建 3D 面部的能力，以仅专注于几何形状，这在生理上更加基础。我们在监督和无监督学习下提出了我们的分析框架，跨模态感知论。首先，我们构建一个数据集 Voxceleb-3D，它扩展了 Voxceleb 并包含配对语音和面部网格，使监督学习成为可能。其次，我们使用知识蒸馏机制来研究在 3D 面部扫描可用性有限的情况下，是否仍然可以在没有配对语音和 3D 面部数据的情况下从语音中收集面部几何形状。我们将核心问题分为四个部分，并进行视觉和数值分析作为对核心问题的回答。我们的研究结果与生理学和神经科学领域关于声音和面部结构之间相关性的研究结果相呼应。这项工作为未来以人为中心的跨模式学习提供了可解释的基础。请参阅我们的项目页面：https://choyingw.github.io/works/Voice2Mesh/index.html

AI.tldr: 本文探讨通过声音推断面部几何结构的可行性，提出跨模态框架Cross-Modal Perceptionist进行3D人脸重建。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通过声音生成面部图像存在纹理、发型等非语音属性干扰，而生理学表明声音与面部骨骼结构存在关联，需聚焦几何特征。
AI.method: 构建包含声音与3D面部网格配对的Voxceleb-3D数据集，在监督与非监督学习下采用知识蒸馏技术，通过四维分析验证语音与面部几何的关联性。
AI.result: 实验验证了声音与面部骨骼结构的生理关联性，证明在无配对数据情况下仍可通过知识蒸馏重建面部几何特征。
AI.conclusion: 为跨模态学习提供可解释的生理基础，推动以人为中心的多模态感知研究，强调几何特征在语音-面部关联中的核心地位。

method: 构建包含声音与3D面部网格配对的Voxceleb-3D数据集，在监督与非监督学习下采用知识蒸馏技术，通过四维分析验证语音与面部几何的关联性。
result: 实验验证了声音与面部骨骼结构的生理关联性，证明在无配对数据情况下仍可通过知识蒸馏重建面部几何特征。
conclusion: 为跨模态学习提供可解释的生理基础，推动以人为中心的多模态感知研究，强调几何特征在语音-面部关联中的核心地位。
search_text: Cross-Modal Perceptionist: Can Face Geometry be Gleaned from Voices? 跨模态感知论者：可以从声音中收集面部几何形状吗？ This work digs into a root question in human perception: can face geometry be gleaned from one's voices? Previous works that study this question only adopt developments in image synthesis and convert voices into face images to show correlations, but working on the image domain unavoidably involves predicting attributes that voices cannot hint, including facial textures, hairstyles, and backgrounds. We instead investigate the ability to reconstruct 3D faces to concentrate on only geometry, which is much more physiologically grounded. We propose our analysis framework, Cross-Modal Perceptionist, under both supervised and unsupervised learning. First, we construct a dataset, Voxceleb-3D, which extends Voxceleb and includes paired voices and face meshes, making supervised learning possible. Second, we use a knowledge distillation mechanism to study whether face geometry can still be gleaned from voices without paired voices and 3D face data under limited availability of 3D face scans. We break down the core question into four parts and perform visual and numerical analyses as responses to the core question. Our findings echo those in physiology and neuroscience about the correlation between voices and facial structures. The work provides future human-centric cross-modal learning with explainable foundations. See our project page: https://choyingw.github.io/works/Voice2Mesh/index.html 这项工作深入探讨了人类感知中的一个根本问题：可以从一个人的声音中收集面部几何形状吗？以前研究这个问题的工作仅采用图像合成的发展，并将声音转换为面部图像来显示相关性，但在图像领域的工作不可避免地涉及预测声音无法暗示的属性，包括面部纹理、发型和背景。相反，我们研究重建 3D 面部的能力，以仅专注于几何形状，这在生理上更加基础。我们在监督和无监督学习下提出了我们的分析框架，跨模态感知论。首先，我们构建一个数据集 Voxceleb-3D，它扩展了 Voxceleb 并包含配对语音和面部网格，使监督学习成为可能。其次，我们使用知识蒸馏机制来研究在 3D 面部扫描可用性有限的情况下，是否仍然可以在没有配对语音和 3D 面部数据的情况下从语音中收集面部几何形状。我们将核心问题分为四个部分，并进行视觉和数值分析作为对核心问题的回答。我们的研究结果与生理学和神经科学领域关于声音和面部结构之间相关性的研究结果相呼应。这项工作为未来以人为中心的跨模式学习提供了可解释的基础。请参阅我们的项目页面：https://choyingw.github.io/works/Voice2Mesh/index.html 本文探讨通过声音推断面部几何结构的可行性，提出跨模态框架Cross-Modal Perceptionist进行3D人脸重建。 Cho-Ying Wu,Chin-Cheng Hsu,Ulrich Neumann cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Keenan Jones,Jason R. C. Nurse,Shujun Li
title: Are You Robert or RoBERTa? Deceiving Online Authorship Attribution Models Using Neural Text Generators
title_zh: 你是罗伯特还是罗伯塔？使用神经文本生成器欺骗在线作者归因模型
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables, Accepted for publication in the proceedings of the sixteenth International AAAI Conference on Web and Social Media (ICWSM-22)
comments: 13 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables, Accepted for publication in the proceedings of the sixteenth International AAAI Conference on Web and Social Media (ICWSM-22)
abstract: Recently, there has been a rise in the development of powerful pre-trained natural language models, including GPT-2, Grover, and XLM. These models have shown state-of-the-art capabilities towards a variety of different NLP tasks, including question answering, content summarisation, and text generation. Alongside this, there have been many studies focused on online authorship attribution (AA). That is, the use of models to identify the authors of online texts. Given the power of natural language models in generating convincing texts, this paper examines the degree to which these language models can generate texts capable of deceiving online AA models. Experimenting with both blog and Twitter data, we utilise GPT-2 language models to generate texts using the existing posts of online users. We then examine whether these AI-based text generators are capable of mimicking authorial style to such a degree that they can deceive typical AA models. From this, we find that current AI-based text generators are able to successfully mimic authorship, showing capabilities towards this on both datasets. Our findings, in turn, highlight the current capacity of powerful natural language models to generate original online posts capable of mimicking authorial style sufficiently to deceive popular AA methods; a key finding given the proposed role of AA in real world applications such as spam-detection and forensic investigation.
summary: Recently, there has been a rise in the development of powerful pre-trained natural language models, including GPT-2, Grover, and XLM. These models have shown state-of-the-art capabilities towards a variety of different NLP tasks, including question answering, content summarisation, and text generation. Alongside this, there have been many studies focused on online authorship attribution (AA). That is, the use of models to identify the authors of online texts. Given the power of natural language models in generating convincing texts, this paper examines the degree to which these language models can generate texts capable of deceiving online AA models. Experimenting with both blog and Twitter data, we utilise GPT-2 language models to generate texts using the existing posts of online users. We then examine whether these AI-based text generators are capable of mimicking authorial style to such a degree that they can deceive typical AA models. From this, we find that current AI-based text generators are able to successfully mimic authorship, showing capabilities towards this on both datasets. Our findings, in turn, highlight the current capacity of powerful natural language models to generate original online posts capable of mimicking authorial style sufficiently to deceive popular AA methods; a key finding given the proposed role of AA in real world applications such as spam-detection and forensic investigation.
abstract_zh: 最近，强大的预训练自然语言模型的开发不断增加，包括 GPT-2、Grover 和 XLM。这些模型展示了针对各种不同 NLP 任务的最先进的能力，包括问答、内容摘要和文本生成。除此之外，还有许多关注在线作者归属（AA）的研究。即使用模型来识别在线文本的作者。鉴于自然语言模型在生成令人信服的文本方面的能力，本文研究了这些语言模型生成能够欺骗在线 AA 模型的文本的程度。通过对博客和 Twitter 数据进行实验，我们利用 GPT-2 语言模型利用在线用户的现有帖子生成文本。然后，我们检查这些基于人工智能的文本生成器是否能够模仿作者风格，达到欺骗典型 AA 模型的程度。由此，我们发现当前基于人工智能的文本生成器能够成功模仿作者身份，在两个数据集上显示出这方面的能力。反过来，我们的发现强调了强大的自然语言模型目前生成原创在线帖子的能力，这些帖子能够充分模仿作者风格，从而欺骗流行的 AA 方法；考虑到 AA 在垃圾邮件检测和取证调查等现实世界应用中的拟议作用，这是一个重要的发现。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究使用神经文本生成器（如GPT-2）生成的文本是否能够欺骗在线作者归属模型（AA模型）。
AI.motivation: 随着预训练语言模型（如GPT-2）在文本生成任务中的卓越表现，研究其是否能生成足以欺骗现有作者归属模型的文本，对网络安全（如垃圾邮件检测）和法证分析具有重要意义。
AI.method: 使用GPT-2模型基于用户现有的博客和Twitter数据生成文本，并测试这些生成文本是否能欺骗典型的作者归属模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，当前AI文本生成器能够成功模仿作者风格，在两个数据集上均有效欺骗了主流作者归属方法。
AI.conclusion: 强大的自然语言模型已具备生成可欺骗现有作者归属技术的文本能力，这对依赖作者归属的现实应用（如垃圾邮件检测）提出了安全挑战。

authors_text: Federico Vasile,Elisa Maiettini,Giulia Pasquale,Astrid Florio,Nicolò Boccardo,Lorenzo Natale
title: Grasp Pre-shape Selection by Synthetic Training: Eye-in-hand Shared Control on the Hannes Prosthesis
title_zh: 通过综合训练掌握预形状选择：Hannes 假肢的手眼共享控制
abstract: We consider the task of object grasping with a prosthetic hand capable of multiple grasp types. In this setting, communicating the intended grasp type often requires a high user cognitive load which can be reduced adopting shared autonomy frameworks. Among these, so-called eye-in-hand systems automatically control the hand pre-shaping before the grasp, based on visual input coming from a camera on the wrist. In this paper, we present an eye-in-hand learning-based approach for hand pre-shape classification from RGB sequences. Differently from previous work, we design the system to support the possibility to grasp each considered object part with a different grasp type. In order to overcome the lack of data of this kind and reduce the need for tedious data collection sessions for training the system, we devise a pipeline for rendering synthetic visual sequences of hand trajectories. We develop a sensorized setup to acquire real human grasping sequences for benchmarking and show that, compared on practical use cases, models trained with our synthetic dataset achieve better generalization performance than models trained on real data. We finally integrate our model on the Hannes prosthetic hand and show its practical effectiveness. We make publicly available the code and dataset to reproduce the presented results.
summary: We consider the task of object grasping with a prosthetic hand capable of multiple grasp types. In this setting, communicating the intended grasp type often requires a high user cognitive load which can be reduced adopting shared autonomy frameworks. Among these, so-called eye-in-hand systems automatically control the hand pre-shaping before the grasp, based on visual input coming from a camera on the wrist. In this paper, we present an eye-in-hand learning-based approach for hand pre-shape classification from RGB sequences. Differently from previous work, we design the system to support the possibility to grasp each considered object part with a different grasp type. In order to overcome the lack of data of this kind and reduce the need for tedious data collection sessions for training the system, we devise a pipeline for rendering synthetic visual sequences of hand trajectories. We develop a sensorized setup to acquire real human grasping sequences for benchmarking and show that, compared on practical use cases, models trained with our synthetic dataset achieve better generalization performance than models trained on real data. We finally integrate our model on the Hannes prosthetic hand and show its practical effectiveness. We make publicly available the code and dataset to reproduce the presented results.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑使用能够多种抓取类型的假手抓取物体的任务。在这种情况下，传达预期的抓取类型通常需要较高的用户认知负荷，而通过共享自主框架可以减少这种负荷。其中，所谓的“手眼”系统根据来自手腕上摄像头的视觉输入，在抓握之前自动控制手的预成形。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于手眼学习的方法，用于根据 RGB 序列进行手部预形状分类。与以前的工作不同，我们设计的系统支持以不同的抓取类型抓取每个所考虑的对象部分的可能性。为了克服此类数据的缺乏并减少训练系统时繁琐的数据收集会话的需要，我们设计了一种用于渲染手部轨迹的合成视觉序列的管道。我们开发了一种传感设置来获取真实的人类抓取序列以进行基准测试，并表明，与实际用例相比，使用我们的合成数据集训练的模型比使用真实数据训练的模型具有更好的泛化性能。我们最终将我们的模型集成到 Hannes 假手上并展示其实际效果。我们公开提供代码和数据集以重现所呈现的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉输入的机械手预抓取形状分类方法，通过合成数据训练提升假肢抓取的自主性。
AI.motivation: 传统假肢抓取需用户高认知负荷指定抓取类型，而眼手协同系统可通过视觉自动控制预抓取形状，降低用户负担。
AI.method: 设计合成视觉序列生成管道，结合真实人体抓取数据集，训练基于RGB序列的预抓取分类模型，并集成至Hannes假肢进行验证。
AI.result: 合成数据训练的模型在实际案例中表现出优于真实数据训练模型的泛化性能，且假肢集成后验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据训练方法可有效提升假肢预抓取控制的泛化能力，为眼手协同共享控制提供了可行方案。

We develop a sensorized setup to acquire real human grasping sequences for benchmarking and show that, compared on practical use cases, models trained with our synthetic dataset achieve better generalization performance than models trained on real data. We finally integrate our model on the Hannes prosthetic hand and show its practical effectiveness. We make publicly available the code and dataset to reproduce the presented results. 我们考虑使用能够多种抓取类型的假手抓取物体的任务。在这种情况下，传达预期的抓取类型通常需要较高的用户认知负荷，而通过共享自主框架可以减少这种负荷。其中，所谓的“手眼”系统根据来自手腕上摄像头的视觉输入，在抓握之前自动控制手的预成形。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于手眼学习的方法，用于根据 RGB 序列进行手部预形状分类。与以前的工作不同，我们设计的系统支持以不同的抓取类型抓取每个所考虑的对象部分的可能性。为了克服此类数据的缺乏并减少训练系统时繁琐的数据收集会话的需要，我们设计了一种用于渲染手部轨迹的合成视觉序列的管道。我们开发了一种传感设置来获取真实的人类抓取序列以进行基准测试，并表明，与实际用例相比，使用我们的合成数据集训练的模型比使用真实数据训练的模型具有更好的泛化性能。我们最终将我们的模型集成到 Hannes 假手上并展示其实际效果。我们公开提供代码和数据集以重现所呈现的结果。 本文提出了一种基于视觉输入的机械手预抓取形状分类方法，通过合成数据训练提升假肢抓取的自主性。 Federico Vasile,Elisa Maiettini,Giulia Pasquale,Astrid Florio,Nicolò Boccardo,Lorenzo Natale cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Xingning Dong,Tian Gan,Xuemeng Song,Jianlong Wu,Yuan Cheng,Liqiang Nie
title: Stacked Hybrid-Attention and Group Collaborative Learning for Unbiased Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: 用于无偏场景图生成的堆叠混合注意力和群体协作学习
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2022, the code is available at https://github.com/dongxingning/SHA-GCL-for-SGG
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2022, the code is available at https://github.com/dongxingning/SHA-GCL-for-SGG
abstract: Scene Graph Generation, which generally follows a regular encoder-decoder pipeline, aims to first encode the visual contents within the given image and then parse them into a compact summary graph. Existing SGG approaches generally not only neglect the insufficient modality fusion between vision and language, but also fail to provide informative predicates due to the biased relationship predictions, leading SGG far from practical. Towards this end, in this paper, we first present a novel Stacked Hybrid-Attention network, which facilitates the intra-modal refinement as well as the inter-modal interaction, to serve as the encoder. We then devise an innovative Group Collaborative Learning strategy to optimize the decoder. Particularly, based upon the observation that the recognition capability of one classifier is limited towards an extremely unbalanced dataset, we first deploy a group of classifiers that are expert in distinguishing different subsets of classes, and then cooperatively optimize them from two aspects to promote the unbiased SGG. Experiments conducted on VG and GQA datasets demonstrate that, we not only establish a new state-of-the-art in the unbiased metric, but also nearly double the performance compared with two baselines.
summary: Scene Graph Generation, which generally follows a regular encoder-decoder pipeline, aims to first encode the visual contents within the given image and then parse them into a compact summary graph. Existing SGG approaches generally not only neglect the insufficient modality fusion between vision and language, but also fail to provide informative predicates due to the biased relationship predictions, leading SGG far from practical. Towards this end, in this paper, we first present a novel Stacked Hybrid-Attention network, which facilitates the intra-modal refinement as well as the inter-modal interaction, to serve as the encoder. We then devise an innovative Group Collaborative Learning strategy to optimize the decoder. Particularly, based upon the observation that the recognition capability of one classifier is limited towards an extremely unbalanced dataset, we first deploy a group of classifiers that are expert in distinguishing different subsets of classes, and then cooperatively optimize them from two aspects to promote the unbiased SGG. Experiments conducted on VG and GQA datasets demonstrate that, we not only establish a new state-of-the-art in the unbiased metric, but also nearly double the performance compared with two baselines.
abstract_zh: 场景图生成通常遵循常规的编码器-解码器管道，旨在首先对给定图像中的视觉内容进行编码，然后将它们解析为紧凑的摘要图。现有的SGG方法通常不仅忽视了视觉和语言之间模态融合的不足，而且由于关系预测的偏差而无法提供信息丰富的谓词，导致SGG远离实用。为此，在本文中，我们首先提出了一种新颖的堆叠混合注意力网络，该网络有助于模态内细化以及模态间交互，作为编码器。然后，我们设计了一种创新的小组协作学习策略来优化解码器。特别是，基于观察到一个分类器的识别能力仅限于极其不平衡的数据集，我们首先部署一组擅长区分不同类子集的分类器，然后从两个方面协同优化它们以促进无偏 SGG。在 VG 和 GQA 数据集上进行的实验表明，我们不仅在无偏指标上建立了新的最先进技术，而且与两个基线相比，性能提高了近一倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于堆叠混合注意力机制和群体协作学习的无偏场景图生成方法，解决现有方法在跨模态融合不足和关系预测偏差的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有场景图生成方法因视觉语言模态融合不足及关系预测偏差，导致生成结果不够准确和实用，需改进跨模态交互与分类器优化策略。
AI.method: 设计堆叠混合注意力网络增强模态内与模态间交互，并提出群体协作学习策略，通过多个专家分类器协作优化提升无偏预测能力。
AI.result: 在VG和GQA数据集上，无偏度量指标达到新SOTA，性能较两个基线模型提升近一倍。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了跨模态融合与预测偏差问题，为无偏场景图生成提供了新思路和技术方案。

authors_text: Kangbo Sun,Jie Zhu
title: Learning Consistency from High-quality Pseudo-labels for Weakly Supervised Object Localization
title_zh: 从弱监督对象定位的高质量伪标签中学习一致性
abstract: Pseudo-supervised learning methods have been shown to be effective for weakly supervised object localization tasks. However, the effectiveness depends on the powerful regularization ability of deep neural networks. Based on the assumption that the localization network should have similar location predictions on different versions of the same image, we propose a two-stage approach to learn more consistent localization. In the first stage, we propose a mask-based pseudo label generator algorithm, and use the pseudo-supervised learning method to initialize an object localization network. In the second stage, we propose a simple and effective method for evaluating the confidence of pseudo-labels based on classification discrimination, and by learning consistency from high-quality pseudo-labels, we further refine the localization network to get better localization performance. Experimental results show that our proposed approach achieves excellent performance in three benchmark datasets including CUB-200-2011, ImageNet-1k and Tiny-ImageNet, which demonstrates its effectiveness.
summary: Pseudo-supervised learning methods have been shown to be effective for weakly supervised object localization tasks. However, the effectiveness depends on the powerful regularization ability of deep neural networks. Based on the assumption that the localization network should have similar location predictions on different versions of the same image, we propose a two-stage approach to learn more consistent localization. In the first stage, we propose a mask-based pseudo label generator algorithm, and use the pseudo-supervised learning method to initialize an object localization network. In the second stage, we propose a simple and effective method for evaluating the confidence of pseudo-labels based on classification discrimination, and by learning consistency from high-quality pseudo-labels, we further refine the localization network to get better localization performance. Experimental results show that our proposed approach achieves excellent performance in three benchmark datasets including CUB-200-2011, ImageNet-1k and Tiny-ImageNet, which demonstrates its effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 伪监督学习方法已被证明对于弱监督对象定位任务是有效的。然而，其有效性取决于深度神经网络强大的正则化能力。基于定位网络应该对同一图像的不同版本具有相似的位置预测的假设，我们提出了一种两阶段方法来学习更一致的定位。在第一阶段，我们提出了一种基于掩码的伪标签生成器算法，并使用伪监督学习方法来初始化对象定位网络。在第二阶段，我们提出了一种基于分类判别的简单有效的伪标签置信度评估方法，并通过学习高质量伪标签的一致性，进一步细化定位网络以获得更好的定位性能。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在 CUB-200-2011、ImageNet-1k 和 Tiny-ImageNet 三个基准数据集上取得了优异的性能，证明了其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段方法，通过高质量伪标签学习一致性以提升弱监督目标定位性能。
AI.motivation: 现有伪监督方法依赖深度网络正则化能力，但定位预测一致性不足，影响性能。
AI.method: 第一阶段生成基于掩码的伪标签初始化网络；第二阶段通过分类判别评估伪标签置信度并优化定位一致性。
AI.result: 在CUB-200-2011、ImageNet-1k和Tiny-ImageNet三个数据集上取得优异定位性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过伪标签一致性学习有效提升弱监督目标定位效果，方法具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Wen-Kai Yu,Ying Yang,Jin-Rui Liu,Ning Wei,Shuo-Fei Wang
title: Secondary complementary balancing compressive imaging with a free-space balanced amplified photodetector
title_zh: 使用自由空间平衡放大光电探测器的二次互补平衡压缩成像
abstract: Single-pixel imaging (SPI) has attracted widespread attention because it generally uses a non-pixelated photodetector and a digital micromirror device (DMD) to acquire the object image. Since the modulated patterns seen from two reflection directions of the DMD are naturally complementary, one can apply complementary balanced measurements to greatly improve the measurement signal-to-noise ratio and reconstruction quality. However, the balance between two reflection arms significantly determines the quality of differential measurements. In this work, we propose and demonstrate a simple secondary complementary balancing mechanism to minimize the impact of the imbalance on the imaging system. In our SPI setup, we used a silicon free-space balanced amplified photodetector with 5 mm active diameter which could directly output the difference between two optical input signals in two reflection arms. Both simulation and experimental results have demonstrated that the use of secondary complementary balancing can result in a better cancellation of direct current components of measurements and a better image restoration quality.
summary: Single-pixel imaging (SPI) has attracted widespread attention because it generally uses a non-pixelated photodetector and a digital micromirror device (DMD) to acquire the object image. Since the modulated patterns seen from two reflection directions of the DMD are naturally complementary, one can apply complementary balanced measurements to greatly improve the measurement signal-to-noise ratio and reconstruction quality. However, the balance between two reflection arms significantly determines the quality of differential measurements. In this work, we propose and demonstrate a simple secondary complementary balancing mechanism to minimize the impact of the imbalance on the imaging system. In our SPI setup, we used a silicon free-space balanced amplified photodetector with 5 mm active diameter which could directly output the difference between two optical input signals in two reflection arms. Both simulation and experimental results have demonstrated that the use of secondary complementary balancing can result in a better cancellation of direct current components of measurements and a better image restoration quality.
abstract_zh: 单像素成像（SPI）因其通常使用非像素化光电探测器和数字微镜器件（DMD）来获取物体图像而引起了广泛关注。由于从DMD的两个反射方向看到的调制图案本质上是互补的，因此可以应用互补平衡测量来大大提高测量信噪比和重建质量。然而，两个反射臂之间的平衡很大程度上决定了差分测量的质量。在这项工作中，我们提出并演示了一种简单的辅助互补平衡机制，以尽量减少不平衡对成像系统的影响。在我们的 SPI 设置中，我们使用了有效直径为 5 mm 的硅自由空间平衡放大光电探测器，它可以直接输出两个反射臂中两个光输入信号之间的差异。仿真和实验结果都表明，使用二次互补平衡可以更好地消除测量的直流分量并获得更好的图像恢复质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了一种二次互补平衡机制，以减少单像素成像系统中反射臂不平衡对成像质量的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有单像素成像系统中，DMD双反射路径的不平衡会显著影响差分测量质量，限制信号噪声比和图像重建效果。
AI.method: 采用5mm硅基自由空间平衡放大光电探测器直接输出双路径光信号差值，并引入二次互补平衡机制消除直流分量。
AI.result: 仿真与实验表明该机制有效提升了测量信号信噪比，实现了更优的图像复原质量。
AI.conclusion: 二次互补平衡机制可有效抑制系统不平衡效应，为高精度单像素成像提供新方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出并验证了一种二次互补平衡机制，以减少单像素成像系统中反射臂不平衡对成像质量的影响。

ai_content.method: 采用5mm硅基自由空间平衡放大光电探测器直接输出双路径光信号差值，并引入二次互补平衡机制消除直流分量。

search_text: Secondary complementary balancing compressive imaging with a free-space balanced amplified photodetector 使用自由空间平衡放大光电探测器的二次互补平衡压缩成像 Single-pixel imaging (SPI) has attracted widespread attention because it generally uses a non-pixelated photodetector and a digital micromirror device (DMD) to acquire the object image. Since the modulated patterns seen from two reflection directions of the DMD are naturally complementary, one can apply complementary balanced measurements to greatly improve the measurement signal-to-noise ratio and reconstruction quality. However, the balance between two reflection arms significantly determines the quality of differential measurements. In this work, we propose and demonstrate a simple secondary complementary balancing mechanism to minimize the impact of the imbalance on the imaging system. In our SPI setup, we used a silicon free-space balanced amplified photodetector with 5 mm active diameter which could directly output the difference between two optical input signals in two reflection arms. Both simulation and experimental results have demonstrated that the use of secondary complementary balancing can result in a better cancellation of direct current components of measurements and a better image restoration quality. 单像素成像（SPI）因其通常使用非像素化光电探测器和数字微镜器件（DMD）来获取物体图像而引起了广泛关注。由于从DMD的两个反射方向看到的调制图案本质上是互补的，因此可以应用互补平衡测量来大大提高测量信噪比和重建质量。然而，两个反射臂之间的平衡很大程度上决定了差分测量的质量。在这项工作中，我们提出并演示了一种简单的辅助互补平衡机制，以尽量减少不平衡对成像系统的影响。在我们的 SPI 设置中，我们使用了有效直径为 5 mm 的硅自由空间平衡放大光电探测器，它可以直接输出两个反射臂中两个光输入信号之间的差异。仿真和实验结果都表明，使用二次互补平衡可以更好地消除测量的直流分量并获得更好的图像恢复质量。 本文提出并验证了一种二次互补平衡机制，以减少单像素成像系统中反射臂不平衡对成像质量的影响。 Wen-Kai Yu,Ying Yang,Jin-Rui Liu,Ning Wei,Shuo-Fei Wang physics.optics,cs.IR,eess.IV,eess.SP

authors_text: Nodari Vakhania,Frank Werner,Alejandro Reynoso
title: Scheduling a single machine with compressible jobs to minimize maximum lateness
title_zh: 调度具有可压缩作业的单台机器以最大程度地减少最大延迟
abstract: The problem of scheduling non-simultaneously released jobs with due dates on a single machine with the objective to minimize the maximum job lateness is known to be strongly NP-hard. Here we consider an extended model in which the compression of the job processing times is allowed. The compression is accomplished at the cost of involving additional emerging resources, whose use, however, yields some cost. With a given upper limit $U$ on the total allowable cost, one wishes to minimize the maximum job lateness. It is clear that, by using the available resources, some jobs may complete earlier and the objective function value may respectively be decreased. As we show here, for minimizing the maximum job lateness, by shortening the processing time of some specially determined jobs, the objective value can be decreased. Although the generalized problem is harder than the generic non-compressible version, given a ``sufficient amount'' of additional resources, we can solve the problem optimally. We determine the compression rate for some specific jobs and develop an algorithm that obtains an optimal solution. Such an approach can be beneficial in practice since the manufacturer can be provided with an information about the required amount of additional resources in order to solve the problem optimally. In case the amount of the available additional resources is less than used in the above solution, i.e., it is not feasible, it is transformed to a tight minimal feasible solution.
summary: The problem of scheduling non-simultaneously released jobs with due dates on a single machine with the objective to minimize the maximum job lateness is known to be strongly NP-hard. Here we consider an extended model in which the compression of the job processing times is allowed. The compression is accomplished at the cost of involving additional emerging resources, whose use, however, yields some cost. With a given upper limit $U$ on the total allowable cost, one wishes to minimize the maximum job lateness. It is clear that, by using the available resources, some jobs may complete earlier and the objective function value may respectively be decreased. As we show here, for minimizing the maximum job lateness, by shortening the processing time of some specially determined jobs, the objective value can be decreased. Although the generalized problem is harder than the generic non-compressible version, given a ``sufficient amount'' of additional resources, we can solve the problem optimally. We determine the compression rate for some specific jobs and develop an algorithm that obtains an optimal solution. Such an approach can be beneficial in practice since the manufacturer can be provided with an information about the required amount of additional resources in order to solve the problem optimally. In case the amount of the available additional resources is less than used in the above solution, i.e., it is not feasible, it is transformed to a tight minimal feasible solution.
abstract_zh: 在一台机器上安排非同时发布的具有截止日期的作业的问题，其目标是最小化最大作业延迟，已知是强 NP 困难的。在这里，我们考虑一个允许压缩作业处理时间的扩展模型。压缩是以涉及额外的新兴资源为代价来完成的，然而，这些资源的使用会产生一些成本。在给定总允许成本上限 $U$ 的情况下，人们希望最大程度地减少工作迟到率。显然，通过使用可用资源，一些作业可能会提前完成，并且目标函数值可能会分别降低。正如我们在这里所示，为了最大限度地减少最大作业延迟，通过缩短某些专门确定的作业的处理时间，可以降低目标值。尽管广义问题比通用不可压缩版本更难，但只要有“足够量”的额外资源，我们就可以最优地解决该问题。我们确定一些特定作业的压缩率，并开发一种获得最佳解决方案的算法。这种方法在实践中可能是有益的，因为可以向制造商提供关于所需的附加资源量的信息，以便最佳地解决问题。如果可用附加资源的量小于上述解决方案中使用的量，即，它不可行，则将其转换为紧最小可行解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在单机调度中通过压缩作业处理时间以最小化最大延误的问题，并考虑资源成本限制。
AI.motivation: 传统单机调度问题已知为强NP难，而允许压缩处理时间可更灵活地优化延误，但需平衡资源成本，因此需研究有效方法。
AI.method: 确定特定作业的压缩率，开发算法在资源限制下求解最优解，若资源不足则调整为可行解。
AI.result: 在足够资源下可获得最优解，否则转化为最小可行解，为制造商提供资源需求信息以优化调度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在实际生产中具有应用价值，帮助制造商合理规划资源以达到最优调度目标。

authors_text: Hugo Touvron,Matthieu Cord,Alaaeldin El-Nouby,Jakob Verbeek,Hervé Jégou
title: Three things everyone should know about Vision Transformers
title_zh: 关于视觉变形金刚每个人都应该了解的三件事
abstract: After their initial success in natural language processing, transformer architectures have rapidly gained traction in computer vision, providing state-of-the-art results for tasks such as image classification, detection, segmentation, and video analysis. We offer three insights based on simple and easy to implement variants of vision transformers. (1) The residual layers of vision transformers, which are usually processed sequentially, can to some extent be processed efficiently in parallel without noticeably affecting the accuracy. (2) Fine-tuning the weights of the attention layers is sufficient to adapt vision transformers to a higher resolution and to other classification tasks. This saves compute, reduces the peak memory consumption at fine-tuning time, and allows sharing the majority of weights across tasks. (3) Adding MLP-based patch pre-processing layers improves Bert-like self-supervised training based on patch masking. We evaluate the impact of these design choices using the ImageNet-1k dataset, and confirm our findings on the ImageNet-v2 test set. Transfer performance is measured across six smaller datasets.
summary: After their initial success in natural language processing, transformer architectures have rapidly gained traction in computer vision, providing state-of-the-art results for tasks such as image classification, detection, segmentation, and video analysis. We offer three insights based on simple and easy to implement variants of vision transformers. (1) The residual layers of vision transformers, which are usually processed sequentially, can to some extent be processed efficiently in parallel without noticeably affecting the accuracy. (2) Fine-tuning the weights of the attention layers is sufficient to adapt vision transformers to a higher resolution and to other classification tasks. This saves compute, reduces the peak memory consumption at fine-tuning time, and allows sharing the majority of weights across tasks. (3) Adding MLP-based patch pre-processing layers improves Bert-like self-supervised training based on patch masking. We evaluate the impact of these design choices using the ImageNet-1k dataset, and confirm our findings on the ImageNet-v2 test set. Transfer performance is measured across six smaller datasets.
abstract_zh: 在自然语言处理领域取得初步成功后，Transformer 架构迅速在计算机视觉领域获得关注，为图像分类、检测、分割和视频分析等任务提供最先进的结果。我们基于简单且易于实现的视觉转换器变体提供了三种见解。 （1）视觉变换器的剩余层通常是顺序处理的，在某种程度上可以有效地并行处理，而不会明显影响精度。 (2) 微调注意力层的权重足以使视觉转换器适应更高分辨率和其他分类任务。这可以节省计算量，减少微调时的峰值内存消耗，并允许跨任务共享大部分权重。 (3)添加基于MLP的patch预处理层改进了基于patch masking的类Bert自监督训练。我们使用 ImageNet-1k 数据集评估这些设计选择的影响，并在 ImageNet-v2 测试集上确认我们的发现。传输性能是通过六个较小的数据集来衡量的。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了关于视觉Transformer的三个关键发现，涉及并行处理残差层、微调注意力层适应不同任务以及添加MLP预处理层改进自监督训练。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在自然语言处理中取得成功，但其在计算机视觉中的应用仍需探索更高效且易于实现的设计方案。
AI.method: 通过实验验证三种设计选择：1) 并行处理视觉Transformer的残差层；2) 仅微调注意力层以适应更高分辨率和其他分类任务；3) 添加基于MLP的补丁预处理层以增强类似BERT的自监督训练。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1k和ImageNet-v2数据集上验证了这些设计的有效性，并在六个较小数据集上评估了模型的迁移性能。
AI.conclusion: 这些优化方法在保持精度的同时提升了计算效率，为视觉Transformer的实际应用提供了实用指导。
