Transfer performance is measured across six smaller datasets. 在自然语言处理领域取得初步成功后，Transformer 架构迅速在计算机视觉领域获得关注，为图像分类、检测、分割和视频分析等任务提供最先进的结果。我们基于简单且易于实现的视觉转换器变体提供了三种见解。 （1）视觉变换器的剩余层通常是顺序处理的，在某种程度上可以有效地并行处理，而不会明显影响精度。 (2) 微调注意力层的权重足以使视觉转换器适应更高分辨率和其他分类任务。这可以节省计算量，减少微调时的峰值内存消耗，并允许跨任务共享大部分权重。 (3)添加基于MLP的patch预处理层改进了基于patch masking的类Bert自监督训练。我们使用 ImageNet-1k 数据集评估这些设计选择的影响，并在 ImageNet-v2 测试集上确认我们的发现。传输性能是通过六个较小的数据集来衡量的。 本文介绍了关于视觉Transformer的三个关键发现，涉及并行处理残差层、微调注意力层适应不同任务以及添加MLP预处理层改进自监督训练。 Hugo Touvron,Matthieu Cord,Alaaeldin El-Nouby,Jakob Verbeek,Hervé Jégou cs.CV

authors_text: Lida Li,Shuai Li,Kun Wang,Xiangchu Feng,Lei Zhang
title: Towards Robust 2D Convolution for Reliable Visual Recognition
title_zh: 迈向稳健的 2D 卷积以实现可靠的视觉识别
abstract: 2D convolution (Conv2d), which is responsible for extracting features from the input image, is one of the key modules of a convolutional neural network (CNN). However, Conv2d is vulnerable to image corruptions and adversarial samples. It is an important yet rarely investigated problem that whether we can design a more robust alternative of Conv2d for more reliable feature extraction. In this paper, inspired by the recently developed learnable sparse transform that learns to convert the CNN features into a compact and sparse latent space, we design a novel building block, denoted by RConv-MK, to strengthen the robustness of extracted convolutional features. Our method leverages a set of learnable kernels of different sizes to extract features at different frequencies and employs a normalized soft thresholding operator to adaptively remove noises and trivial features at different corruption levels. Extensive experiments on clean images, corrupted images as well as adversarial samples validate the effectiveness of the proposed robust module for reliable visual recognition. The source codes are enclosed in the submission.
summary: 2D convolution (Conv2d), which is responsible for extracting features from the input image, is one of the key modules of a convolutional neural network (CNN). However, Conv2d is vulnerable to image corruptions and adversarial samples. It is an important yet rarely investigated problem that whether we can design a more robust alternative of Conv2d for more reliable feature extraction. In this paper, inspired by the recently developed learnable sparse transform that learns to convert the CNN features into a compact and sparse latent space, we design a novel building block, denoted by RConv-MK, to strengthen the robustness of extracted convolutional features. Our method leverages a set of learnable kernels of different sizes to extract features at different frequencies and employs a normalized soft thresholding operator to adaptively remove noises and trivial features at different corruption levels. Extensive experiments on clean images, corrupted images as well as adversarial samples validate the effectiveness of the proposed robust module for reliable visual recognition. The source codes are enclosed in the submission.
abstract_zh: 二维卷积（Conv2d）负责从输入图像中提取特征，是卷积神经网络（CNN）的关键模块之一。然而，Conv2d 很容易受到图像损坏和对抗性样本的影响。我们是否可以设计一个更鲁棒的 Conv2d 替代方案来实现更可靠的特征提取，这是一个重要但很少研究的问题。在本文中，受到最近开发的可学习稀疏变换的启发，该变换学习将 CNN 特征转换为紧凑且稀疏的潜在空间，我们设计了一种新颖的构建块，表示为 RConv-MK，以增强提取的卷积特征的鲁棒性。我们的方法利用一组不同大小的可学习内核来提取不同频率的特征，并采用归一化软阈值运算符来自适应地去除不同损坏级别的噪声和琐碎特征。对干净图像、损坏图像以及对抗样本的大量实验验证了所提出的鲁棒模块对于可靠视觉识别的有效性。源代码包含在提交的内容中。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计一种更鲁棒的2D卷积模块RConv-MK，以提高视觉识别在图像损坏和对抗样本下的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 传统2D卷积在图像损坏和对抗样本下表现脆弱，影响特征提取的可靠性，但该问题尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 提出RConv-MK模块，利用不同尺寸的可学习核提取多频特征，并通过归一化软阈值算子自适应去除噪声和冗余特征。
AI.result: 在干净图像、损坏图像和对抗样本上的实验验证了该模块的有效性，源代码已随论文提交。
AI.conclusion: RConv-MK通过增强卷积特征的鲁棒性，为可靠视觉识别提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaopei Wu,Liang Peng,Honghui Yang,Liang Xie,Chenxi Huang,Chengqi Deng,Haifeng Liu,Deng Cai
title: Sparse Fuse Dense: Towards High Quality 3D Detection with Depth Completion
title_zh: 稀疏融合密集：实现深度完成的高质量 3D 检测
abstract: Current LiDAR-only 3D detection methods inevitably suffer from the sparsity of point clouds. Many multi-modal methods are proposed to alleviate this issue, while different representations of images and point clouds make it difficult to fuse them, resulting in suboptimal performance. In this paper, we present a novel multi-modal framework SFD (Sparse Fuse Dense), which utilizes pseudo point clouds generated from depth completion to tackle the issues mentioned above. Different from prior works, we propose a new RoI fusion strategy 3D-GAF (3D Grid-wise Attentive Fusion) to make fuller use of information from different types of point clouds. Specifically, 3D-GAF fuses 3D RoI features from the couple of point clouds in a grid-wise attentive way, which is more fine-grained and more precise. In addition, we propose a SynAugment (Synchronized Augmentation) to enable our multi-modal framework to utilize all data augmentation approaches tailored to LiDAR-only methods. Lastly, we customize an effective and efficient feature extractor CPConv (Color Point Convolution) for pseudo point clouds. It can explore 2D image features and 3D geometric features of pseudo point clouds simultaneously. Our method holds the highest entry on the KITTI car 3D object detection leaderboard, demonstrating the effectiveness of our SFD. Codes are available at https://github.com/LittlePey/SFD.
summary: Current LiDAR-only 3D detection methods inevitably suffer from the sparsity of point clouds. Many multi-modal methods are proposed to alleviate this issue, while different representations of images and point clouds make it difficult to fuse them, resulting in suboptimal performance. In this paper, we present a novel multi-modal framework SFD (Sparse Fuse Dense), which utilizes pseudo point clouds generated from depth completion to tackle the issues mentioned above. Different from prior works, we propose a new RoI fusion strategy 3D-GAF (3D Grid-wise Attentive Fusion) to make fuller use of information from different types of point clouds. Specifically, 3D-GAF fuses 3D RoI features from the couple of point clouds in a grid-wise attentive way, which is more fine-grained and more precise. In addition, we propose a SynAugment (Synchronized Augmentation) to enable our multi-modal framework to utilize all data augmentation approaches tailored to LiDAR-only methods. Lastly, we customize an effective and efficient feature extractor CPConv (Color Point Convolution) for pseudo point clouds. It can explore 2D image features and 3D geometric features of pseudo point clouds simultaneously. Our method holds the highest entry on the KITTI car 3D object detection leaderboard, demonstrating the effectiveness of our SFD. Codes are available at https://github.com/LittlePey/SFD.
abstract_zh: 当前仅使用 LiDAR 的 3D 检测方法不可避免地会受到点云稀疏性的影响。人们提出了许多多模态方法来缓解这个问题，而图像和点云的不同表示使得它们难以融合，从而导致性能不佳。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多模态框架SFD（稀疏融合密集），它利用深度补全生成的伪点云来解决上述问题。与之前的工作不同，我们提出了一种新的 RoI 融合策略 3D-GAF（3D Grid-wise Attentive Fusion），以更充分地利用来自不同类型点云的信息。具体来说，3D-GAF以网格方式融合来自点云的3D RoI特征，粒度更细，更精确。此外，我们提出了 SynAugment（同步增强），使我们的多模式框架能够利用专为仅 LiDAR 方法量身定制的所有数据增强方法。最后，我们为伪点云定制了一个有效且高效的特征提取器CPConv（Color Point Convolution）。它可以同时探索伪点云的2D图像特征和3D几何特征。我们的方法在 KITTI 汽车 3D 物体检测排行榜上名列前茅，证明了我们 SFD 的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/LittlePey/SFD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多模态框架SFD，通过深度补全生成伪点云并结合新型融合策略，提升3D目标检测质量。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR-only方法受点云稀疏性限制，多模态方法因模态表示差异导致融合效果不佳，亟需更高效的融合方案。
AI.method: 设计SFD框架，包含3D-GAF网格注意力融合策略、SynAugment同步增强模块及CPConv彩色点卷积特征提取器，通过伪点云实现跨模态信息融合。
AI.result: 在KITTI汽车3D检测榜单取得最优性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过伪点云生成与精细化融合模块设计，SFD有效解决了多模态3D检测中的信息利用不足问题。

authors_text: Brandon B. G. Khoo,Chern Hong Lim,Raphael C. -W. Phan
title: Transferable Class-Modelling for Decentralized Source Attribution of GAN-Generated Images
title_zh: 用于 GAN 生成图像的分散源归因的可转移类建模
abstract: GAN-generated deepfakes as a genre of digital images are gaining ground as both catalysts of artistic expression and malicious forms of deception, therefore demanding systems to enforce and accredit their ethical use. Existing techniques for the source attribution of synthetic images identify subtle intrinsic fingerprints using multiclass classification neural nets limited in functionality and scalability. Hence, we redefine the deepfake detection and source attribution problems as a series of related binary classification tasks. We leverage transfer learning to rapidly adapt forgery detection networks for multiple independent attribution problems, by proposing a semi-decentralized modular design to solve them simultaneously and efficiently. Class activation mapping is also demonstrated as an effective means of feature localization for model interpretation. Our models are determined via experimentation to be competitive with current benchmarks, and capable of decent performance on human portraits in ideal conditions. Decentralized fingerprint-based attribution is found to retain validity in the presence of novel sources, but is more susceptible to type II errors that intensify with image perturbations and attributive uncertainty. We describe both our conceptual framework and model prototypes for further enhancement when investigating the technical limits of reactive deepfake attribution.
summary: GAN-generated deepfakes as a genre of digital images are gaining ground as both catalysts of artistic expression and malicious forms of deception, therefore demanding systems to enforce and accredit their ethical use. Existing techniques for the source attribution of synthetic images identify subtle intrinsic fingerprints using multiclass classification neural nets limited in functionality and scalability. Hence, we redefine the deepfake detection and source attribution problems as a series of related binary classification tasks. We leverage transfer learning to rapidly adapt forgery detection networks for multiple independent attribution problems, by proposing a semi-decentralized modular design to solve them simultaneously and efficiently. Class activation mapping is also demonstrated as an effective means of feature localization for model interpretation. Our models are determined via experimentation to be competitive with current benchmarks, and capable of decent performance on human portraits in ideal conditions. Decentralized fingerprint-based attribution is found to retain validity in the presence of novel sources, but is more susceptible to type II errors that intensify with image perturbations and attributive uncertainty. We describe both our conceptual framework and model prototypes for further enhancement when investigating the technical limits of reactive deepfake attribution.
abstract_zh: GAN 生成的深度赝品作为数字图像的一种类型，作为艺术表达和恶意欺骗形式的催化剂而日益普及，因此要求系统强制执行和认可其道德使用。现有的合成图像源归因技术使用功能和可扩展性有限的多类分类神经网络来识别微妙的内在指纹。因此，我们将深度伪造检测和源归因问题重新定义为一系列相关的二元分类任务。我们利用迁移学习来快速适应伪造检测网络来解决多个独立的归因问题，并提出半分散的模块化设计来同时有效地解决这些问题。类激活映射也被证明是模型解释的特征定位的有效手段。我们的模型通过实验确定与当前基准具有竞争力，并且能够在理想条件下在人物肖像上表现良好。研究发现，基于指纹的去中心化归因在存在新来源的情况下仍保持有效性，但更容易受到 II 类错误的影响，而这种错误会随着图像扰动和归因不确定性而加剧。我们描述了我们的概念框架和模型原型，以便在研究反应式深度伪造归因的技术限制时进一步增强。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可转移类建模的去中心化生成对抗网络（GAN）图像来源归属方法，通过二分类任务和迁移学习提升检测效率。
AI.motivation: 现有合成图像来源归属技术受限于多分类神经网络的功能和扩展性，难以应对新型伪造源和图像扰动带来的挑战。
AI.method: 将深伪检测与来源归属问题重构为关联的二分类任务，结合迁移学习与半去中心化模块化设计，并利用类激活映射实现特征定位。
AI.result: 实验表明模型性能与当前基准相当，在理想条件下的人像检测中表现良好，但去中心化指纹归属法易受图像扰动和归属不确定性影响产生II类错误。
AI.conclusion: 提出了概念框架与原型模型，为研究反应式深伪归属的技术极限提供基础，需进一步优化抗扰动能力与不确定性处理机制。

search_text: Transferable Class-Modelling for Decentralized Source Attribution of GAN-Generated Images 用于 GAN 生成图像的分散源归因的可转移类建模 GAN-generated deepfakes as a genre of digital images are gaining ground as both catalysts of artistic expression and malicious forms of deception, therefore demanding systems to enforce and accredit their ethical use. Existing techniques for the source attribution of synthetic images identify subtle intrinsic fingerprints using multiclass classification neural nets limited in functionality and scalability. Hence, we redefine the deepfake detection and source attribution problems as a series of related binary classification tasks. We leverage transfer learning to rapidly adapt forgery detection networks for multiple independent attribution problems, by proposing a semi-decentralized modular design to solve them simultaneously and efficiently. Class activation mapping is also demonstrated as an effective means of feature localization for model interpretation. Our models are determined via experimentation to be competitive with current benchmarks, and capable of decent performance on human portraits in ideal conditions. Decentralized fingerprint-based attribution is found to retain validity in the presence of novel sources, but is more susceptible to type II errors that intensify with image perturbations and attributive uncertainty. We describe both our conceptual framework and model prototypes for further enhancement when investigating the technical limits of reactive deepfake attribution. G. Khoo,Chern Hong Lim,Raphael C. -W. Phan cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xuehui Wang,Kai Zhao,Ruixin Zhang,Shouhong Ding,Yan Wang,Wei Shen
title: ContrastMask: Contrastive Learning to Segment Every Thing
title_zh: ContrastMask：对比学习来分割一切
abstract: Partially-supervised instance segmentation is a task which requests segmenting objects from novel unseen categories via learning on limited seen categories with annotated masks thus eliminating demands of heavy annotation burden. The key to addressing this task is to build an effective class-agnostic mask segmentation model. Unlike previous methods that learn such models only on seen categories, in this paper, we propose a new method, named ContrastMask, which learns a mask segmentation model on both seen and unseen categories under a unified pixel-level contrastive learning framework. In this framework, annotated masks of seen categories and pseudo masks of unseen categories serve as a prior for contrastive learning, where features from the mask regions (foreground) are pulled together, and are contrasted against those from the background, and vice versa. Through this framework, feature discrimination between foreground and background is largely improved, facilitating learning of the class-agnostic mask segmentation model. Exhaustive experiments on the COCO dataset demonstrate the superiority of our method, which outperforms previous state-of-the-arts.
summary: Partially-supervised instance segmentation is a task which requests segmenting objects from novel unseen categories via learning on limited seen categories with annotated masks thus eliminating demands of heavy annotation burden. The key to addressing this task is to build an effective class-agnostic mask segmentation model. Unlike previous methods that learn such models only on seen categories, in this paper, we propose a new method, named ContrastMask, which learns a mask segmentation model on both seen and unseen categories under a unified pixel-level contrastive learning framework. In this framework, annotated masks of seen categories and pseudo masks of unseen categories serve as a prior for contrastive learning, where features from the mask regions (foreground) are pulled together, and are contrasted against those from the background, and vice versa. Through this framework, feature discrimination between foreground and background is largely improved, facilitating learning of the class-agnostic mask segmentation model. Exhaustive experiments on the COCO dataset demonstrate the superiority of our method, which outperforms previous state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 部分监督实例分割是一项任务，要求通过使用带注释的掩码学习有限的已见类别来从新颖的未见类别中分割对象，从而消除繁重的注释负担。解决此任务的关键是构建有效的与类别无关的掩模分割模型。与之前仅在可见类别上学习此类模型的方法不同，在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 ContrastMask 的新方法，该方法在统一的像素级对比学习框架下在可见类别和不可见类别上学习掩模分割模型。在此框架中，已见类别的带注释掩模和未见类别的伪掩模用作对比学习的先验，其中掩模区域（前景）的特征被拉在一起，并与背景中的特征进行对比，反之亦然。通过这个框架，前景和背景之间的特征区分得到了很大的改善，促进了与类无关的掩模分割模型的学习。对 COCO 数据集的详尽实验证明了我们方法的优越性，它优于以前的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ContrastMask方法，在有限标注数据下实现对新类别物体的实例分割。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅依赖已标注类别训练分割模型，难以处理未见过的新类别。本文旨在通过统一框架利用已见和未见类别的信息，降低标注负担并提升分割性能。
AI.method: 构建像素级对比学习框架，利用已见类别的标注掩码和未见类别的伪掩码作为先验。通过拉近前景区域特征、拉远背景区域特征，增强前景-背景区分度，实现类别无关的分割模型学习。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上的实验表明，ContrastMask优于现有最先进的方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习框架有效融合了已见与未见类别的信息，显著提升了少样本场景下的实例分割能力。

authors_text: Chen Liang,Wenguan Wang,Tianfei Zhou,Jiaxu Miao,Yawei Luo,Yi Yang
title: Local-Global Context Aware Transformer for Language-Guided Video Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语言引导视频分割的本地-全局上下文感知转换器
comment: Accepted by TPAMI. Code, data: https://github.com/leonnnop/Locater
comments: Accepted by TPAMI. Code, data: https://github.com/leonnnop/Locater
abstract: We explore the task of language-guided video segmentation (LVS). Previous algorithms mostly adopt 3D CNNs to learn video representation, struggling to capture long-term context and easily suffering from visual-linguistic misalignment. In light of this, we present Locater (local-global context aware Transformer), which augments the Transformer architecture with a finite memory so as to query the entire video with the language expression in an efficient manner. The memory is designed to involve two components -- one for persistently preserving global video content, and one for dynamically gathering local temporal context and segmentation history. Based on the memorized local-global context and the particular content of each frame, Locater holistically and flexibly comprehends the expression as an adaptive query vector for each frame. The vector is used to query the corresponding frame for mask generation. The memory also allows Locater to process videos with linear time complexity and constant size memory, while Transformer-style self-attention computation scales quadratically with sequence length. To thoroughly examine the visual grounding capability of LVS models, we contribute a new LVS dataset, A2D-S+, which is built upon A2D-S dataset but poses increased challenges in disambiguating among similar objects. Experiments on three LVS datasets and our A2D-S+ show that Locater outperforms previous state-of-the-arts. Further, we won the 1st place in the Referring Video Object Segmentation Track of the 3rd Large-scale Video Object Segmentation Challenge, where Locater served as the foundation for the winning solution. Our code and dataset are available at: https://github.com/leonnnop/Locater
summary: We explore the task of language-guided video segmentation (LVS). Previous algorithms mostly adopt 3D CNNs to learn video representation, struggling to capture long-term context and easily suffering from visual-linguistic misalignment. In light of this, we present Locater (local-global context aware Transformer), which augments the Transformer architecture with a finite memory so as to query the entire video with the language expression in an efficient manner. The memory is designed to involve two components -- one for persistently preserving global video content, and one for dynamically gathering local temporal context and segmentation history. Based on the memorized local-global context and the particular content of each frame, Locater holistically and flexibly comprehends the expression as an adaptive query vector for each frame. The vector is used to query the corresponding frame for mask generation. The memory also allows Locater to process videos with linear time complexity and constant size memory, while Transformer-style self-attention computation scales quadratically with sequence length. To thoroughly examine the visual grounding capability of LVS models, we contribute a new LVS dataset, A2D-S+, which is built upon A2D-S dataset but poses increased challenges in disambiguating among similar objects. Experiments on three LVS datasets and our A2D-S+ show that Locater outperforms previous state-of-the-arts. Further, we won the 1st place in the Referring Video Object Segmentation Track of the 3rd Large-scale Video Object Segmentation Challenge, where Locater served as the foundation for the winning solution. Our code and dataset are available at: https://github.com/leonnnop/Locater
abstract_zh: 我们探索语言引导视频分割（LVS）的任务。以前的算法大多采用 3D CNN 来学习视频表示，难以捕获长期上下文，并且很容易出现视觉语言错位。鉴于此，我们提出了 Locater（局部-全局上下文感知 Transformer），它用有限的内存增强了 Transformer 架构，以便以有效的方式用语言表达查询整个视频。该存储器被设计为涉及两个组件——一个用于持久保存全局视频内容，另一个用于动态收集本地时间上下文和分段历史。基于记忆的局部-全局上下文和每帧的特定内容，Locator 全面、灵活地将表达式理解为每帧的自适应查询向量。该向量用于查询相应的帧以生成掩模。该内存还允许 Locater 处理具有线性时间复杂度和恒定大小内存的视频，而 Transformer 式的自注意力计算则随序列长度呈二次方缩放。为了彻底检查 LVS 模型的视觉基础能力，我们贡献了一个新的 LVS 数据集 A2D-S+，它建立在 A2D-S 数据集的基础上，但在消除相似对象之间的歧义方面提出了更多的挑战。对三个 LVS 数据集和我们的 A2D-S+ 的实验表明，Locator 的性能优于之前的最先进技术。此外，我们在第三届大型视频对象分割挑战赛的参考视频对象分割赛道中获得了第一名，其中 Locater 是获胜解决方案的基础。我们的代码和数据集可在以下位置获取：https://github.com/leonnnop/Locater

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部-全局上下文感知的Transformer模型（Locater），用于解决语言引导的视频分割任务，通过改进视频表示学习和视觉-语言对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 传统3D CNN在语言引导视频分割中难以捕捉长期上下文且易出现视觉-语言不匹配，需设计更高效的视频表示方法。
AI.method: 设计Locater架构，在Transformer中引入有限内存机制，包含全局内容存储和动态局部上下文/分割历史模块，生成自适应查询向量实现帧级掩码预测，达到线性时间复杂度。
AI.result: 在三个LVS数据集及新构建的A2D-S+数据集上优于现有SOTA方法，并在LVOS挑战赛Referring视频分割赛道获得第一名。
AI.conclusion: Locater通过局部-全局上下文建模和内存优化，在保持高效计算的同时显著提升语言引导视频分割性能，为该领域提供新方法和基准数据集。

search_text: Local-Global Context Aware Transformer for Language-Guided Video Segmentation 用于语言引导视频分割的本地-全局上下文感知转换器 We explore the task of language-guided video segmentation (LVS). Previous algorithms mostly adopt 3D CNNs to learn video representation, struggling to capture long-term context and easily suffering from visual-linguistic misalignment. In light of this, we present Locater (local-global context aware Transformer), which augments the Transformer architecture with a finite memory so as to query the entire video with the language expression in an efficient manner. The memory is designed to involve two components -- one for persistently preserving global video content, and one for dynamically gathering local temporal context and segmentation history. Based on the memorized local-global context and the particular content of each frame, Locater holistically and flexibly comprehends the expression as an adaptive query vector for each frame. The vector is used to query the corresponding frame for mask generation. The memory also allows Locater to process videos with linear time complexity and constant size memory, while Transformer-style self-attention computation scales quadratically with sequence length. To thoroughly examine the visual grounding capability of LVS models, we contribute a new LVS dataset, A2D-S+, which is built upon A2D-S dataset but poses increased challenges in disambiguating among similar objects. Experiments on three LVS datasets and our A2D-S+ show that Locater outperforms previous state-of-the-arts. Further, we won the 1st place in the Referring Video Object Segmentation Track of the 3rd Large-scale Video Object Segmentation Challenge, where Locater served as the foundation for the winning solution. Our code and dataset are available at: https://github.com/leonnnop/Locater 我们探索语言引导视频分割（LVS）的任务。以前的算法大多采用 3D CNN 来学习视频表示，难以捕获长期上下文，并且很容易出现视觉语言错位。鉴于此，我们提出了 Locater（局部-全局上下文感知 Transformer），它用有限的内存增强了 Transformer 架构，以便以有效的方式用语言表达查询整个视频。该存储器被设计为涉及两个组件——一个用于持久保存全局视频内容，另一个用于动态收集本地时间上下文和分段历史。基于记忆的局部-全局上下文和每帧的特定内容，Locator 全面、灵活地将表达式理解为每帧的自适应查询向量。该向量用于查询相应的帧以生成掩模。该内存还允许 Locater 处理具有线性时间复杂度和恒定大小内存的视频，而 Transformer 式的自注意力计算则随序列长度呈二次方缩放。为了彻底检查 LVS 模型的视觉基础能力，我们贡献了一个新的 LVS 数据集 A2D-S+，它建立在 A2D-S 数据集的基础上，但在消除相似对象之间的歧义方面提出了更多的挑战。对三个 LVS 数据集和我们的 A2D-S+ 的实验表明，Locator 的性能优于之前的最先进技术。此外，我们在第三届大型视频对象分割挑战赛的参考视频对象分割赛道中获得了第一名，其中 Locater 是获胜解决方案的基础。我们的代码和数据集可在以下位置获取：https://github.com/leonnnop/Locater 本文提出一种基于局部-全局上下文感知的Transformer模型（Locater），用于解决语言引导的视频分割任务，通过改进视频表示学习和视觉-语言对齐问题。 Chen Liang,Wenguan Wang,Tianfei Zhou,Jiaxu Miao,Yawei Luo,Yi Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Changfeng Ma,Yang Yang,Jie Guo,Chongjun Wang,Yanwen Guo
title: Completing Partial Point Clouds with Outliers by Collaborative Completion and Segmentation
title_zh: 通过协作补全和分割补全带有异常值的部分点云
abstract: Most existing point cloud completion methods are only applicable to partial point clouds without any noises and outliers, which does not always hold in practice. We propose in this paper an end-to-end network, named CS-Net, to complete the point clouds contaminated by noises or containing outliers. In our CS-Net, the completion and segmentation modules work collaboratively to promote each other, benefited from our specifically designed cascaded structure. With the help of segmentation, more clean point cloud is fed into the completion module. We design a novel completion decoder which harnesses the labels obtained by segmentation together with FPS to purify the point cloud and leverages KNN-grouping for better generation. The completion and segmentation modules work alternately share the useful information from each other to gradually improve the quality of prediction. To train our network, we build a dataset to simulate the real case where incomplete point clouds contain outliers. Our comprehensive experiments and comparisons against state-of-the-art completion methods demonstrate our superiority. We also compare with the scheme of segmentation followed by completion and their end-to-end fusion, which also proves our efficacy.
summary: Most existing point cloud completion methods are only applicable to partial point clouds without any noises and outliers, which does not always hold in practice. We propose in this paper an end-to-end network, named CS-Net, to complete the point clouds contaminated by noises or containing outliers. In our CS-Net, the completion and segmentation modules work collaboratively to promote each other, benefited from our specifically designed cascaded structure. With the help of segmentation, more clean point cloud is fed into the completion module. We design a novel completion decoder which harnesses the labels obtained by segmentation together with FPS to purify the point cloud and leverages KNN-grouping for better generation. The completion and segmentation modules work alternately share the useful information from each other to gradually improve the quality of prediction. To train our network, we build a dataset to simulate the real case where incomplete point clouds contain outliers. Our comprehensive experiments and comparisons against state-of-the-art completion methods demonstrate our superiority. We also compare with the scheme of segmentation followed by completion and their end-to-end fusion, which also proves our efficacy.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的点云补全方法仅适用于没有任何噪声和异常值的部分点云，这在实践中并不总是成立。我们在本文中提出了一种名为 CS-Net 的端到端网络，以完成受噪声污染或包含异常值的点云。在我们的CS-Net中，补全模块和分割模块协同工作，相互促进，这得益于我们专门设计的级联结构。在分割的帮助下，更干净的点云被输入到完成模块中。我们设计了一种新颖的完成解码器，它利用分割获得的标签和 FPS 来净化点云，并利用 KNN 分组来更好地生成。完成和分割模块交替工作，相互共享有用信息，以逐步提高预测质量。为了训练我们的网络，我们构建了一个数据集来模拟不完整的点云包含异常值的真实情况。我们的综合实验以及与最先进的完成方法的比较证明了我们的优势。我们还与分段后补全及其端到端融合的方案进行了比较，这也证明了我们的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CS-Net的端到端网络，通过协作补全与分割模块，解决存在噪声和离群点的不完整点云补全问题。
AI.motivation: 现有点云补全方法无法处理含噪声和离群点的不完整点云，而实际场景中此类数据普遍存在，需设计鲁棒性更强的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计级联结构使补全与分割模块协同工作，分割模块为补全提供清洁点云，补全模块反哺分割优化。提出结合FPS和KNN分组的新型解码器，提升生成质量。
AI.result: 在自建的真实场景数据集上，CS-Net在补全精度和鲁棒性上优于现有方法，且优于分割后补全的串行方案及端到端融合方案。
AI.conclusion: 协作机制有效提升补全质量，所提方法在处理含离群点的不完整点云任务中表现优异，验证了模型设计的合理性。

In our CS-Net, the completion and segmentation modules work collaboratively to promote each other, benefited from our specifically designed cascaded structure. authors_text: Tao Yang,Peiran Ren,Xuansong Xie,Xiansheng Hua,Lei Zhang
title: Beyond a Video Frame Interpolator: A Space Decoupled Learning Approach to Continuous Image Transition
title_zh: 超越视频帧插值器：连续图像过渡的空间解耦学习方法
abstract: Video frame interpolation (VFI) aims to improve the temporal resolution of a video sequence. Most of the existing deep learning based VFI methods adopt off-the-shelf optical flow algorithms to estimate the bidirectional flows and interpolate the missing frames accordingly. Though having achieved a great success, these methods require much human experience to tune the bidirectional flows and often generate unpleasant results when the estimated flows are not accurate. In this work, we rethink the VFI problem and formulate it as a continuous image transition (CIT) task, whose key issue is to transition an image from one space to another space continuously. More specifically, we learn to implicitly decouple the images into a translatable flow space and a non-translatable feature space. The former depicts the translatable states between the given images, while the later aims to reconstruct the intermediate features that cannot be directly translated. In this way, we can easily perform image interpolation in the flow space and intermediate image synthesis in the feature space, obtaining a CIT model. The proposed space decoupled learning (SDL) approach is simple to implement, while it provides an effective framework to a variety of CIT problems beyond VFI, such as style transfer and image morphing. Our extensive experiments on a variety of CIT tasks demonstrate the superiority of SDL to existing methods. The source code and models can be found at \url{https://github.com/yangxy/SDL}.
summary: Video frame interpolation (VFI) aims to improve the temporal resolution of a video sequence. Most of the existing deep learning based VFI methods adopt off-the-shelf optical flow algorithms to estimate the bidirectional flows and interpolate the missing frames accordingly. Though having achieved a great success, these methods require much human experience to tune the bidirectional flows and often generate unpleasant results when the estimated flows are not accurate. In this work, we rethink the VFI problem and formulate it as a continuous image transition (CIT) task, whose key issue is to transition an image from one space to another space continuously. More specifically, we learn to implicitly decouple the images into a translatable flow space and a non-translatable feature space. The former depicts the translatable states between the given images, while the later aims to reconstruct the intermediate features that cannot be directly translated. In this way, we can easily perform image interpolation in the flow space and intermediate image synthesis in the feature space, obtaining a CIT model. The proposed space decoupled learning (SDL) approach is simple to implement, while it provides an effective framework to a variety of CIT problems beyond VFI, such as style transfer and image morphing. Our extensive experiments on a variety of CIT tasks demonstrate the superiority of SDL to existing methods. The source code and models can be found at \url{https://github.com/yangxy/SDL}.
abstract_zh: 视频帧插值（VFI）旨在提高视频序列的时间分辨率。大多数现有的基于深度学习的 VFI 方法采用现成的光流算法来估计双向流并相应地插入丢失的帧。尽管取得了巨大的成功，但这些方法需要大量的人类经验来调整双向流，并且当估计的流不准确时常常会产生令人不快的结果。在这项工作中，我们重新思考了 VFI 问题，并将其表述为连续图像转换（CIT）任务，其关键问题是将图像从一个空间连续转换到另一个空间。更具体地说，我们学习将图像隐式解耦为可翻译流空间和不可翻译特征空间。前者描述给定图像之间的可翻译状态，而后者旨在重建不能直接翻译的中间特征。这样，我们就可以轻松地在流空间中进行图像插值，在特征空间中进行中间图像合成，得到CIT模型。所提出的空间解耦学习（SDL）方法易于实现，同时它为 VFI 之外的各种 CIT 问题（例如风格迁移和图像变形）提供了有效的框架。我们对各种 CIT 任务进行的广泛实验证明了 SDL 相对于现有方法的优越性。源代码和模型可以在\url{https://github.com/yangxy/SDL}找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种空间解耦学习方法（SDL），将视频帧插值问题重新定义为连续图像转换任务，通过解耦图像到可转换流空间和不可转换特征空间，实现更高效的连续图像生成。
AI.motivation: 传统视频帧插值方法依赖预设光流算法，需人工调参且在光流估计不准确时效果不佳，难以处理复杂场景的连续图像转换问题。
AI.method: 提出空间解耦学习框架，将图像隐式分解为可转换流空间（描述图像间状态变化）和不可转换特征空间（重建非直接转换的中间特征），分别进行流插值和特征合成。
AI.result: 在多种连续图像转换任务（包括视频插值、风格迁移、图像变形）中，SDL方法均优于现有技术，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: SDL方法为连续图像转换任务提供了通用且高效的解决方案，突破了传统视频插值的局限性，具有广泛的应用潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种空间解耦学习方法（SDL），将视频帧插值问题重新定义为连续图像转换任务，通过解耦图像到可转换流空间和不可转换特征空间，实现更高效的连续图像生成。
ai_content.motivation: 传统视频帧插值方法依赖预设光流算法，需人工调参且在光流估计不准确时效果不佳，难以处理复杂场景的连续图像转换问题。
ai_content.method: 提出空间解耦学习框架，将图像隐式分解为可转换流空间（描述图像间状态变化）和不可转换特征空间（重建非直接转换的中间特征），分别进行流插值和特征合成。
ai_content.result: 在多种连续图像转换任务（包括视频插值、风格迁移、图像变形）中，SDL方法均优于现有技术，代码和模型已开源。
ai_content.conclusion: SDL方法为连续图像转换任务提供了通用且高效的解决方案，突破了传统视频插值的局限性，具有广泛的应用潜力。

search_text: Beyond a Video Frame Interpolator: A Space Decoupled Learning Approach to Continuous Image Transition 超越视频帧插值器：连续图像过渡的空间解耦学习方法 Video frame interpolation (VFI) aims to improve the temporal resolution of a video sequence. Most of the existing deep learning based VFI methods adopt off-the-shelf optical flow algorithms to estimate the bidirectional flows and interpolate the missing frames accordingly. Though having achieved a great success, these methods require much human experience to tune the bidirectional flows and often generate unpleasant results when the estimated flows are not accurate. In this work, we rethink the VFI problem and formulate it as a continuous image transition (CIT) task, whose key issue is to transition an image from one space to another space continuously. More specifically, we learn to implicitly decouple the images into a translatable flow space and a non-translatable feature space. The former depicts the translatable states between the given images, while the later aims to reconstruct the intermediate features that cannot be directly translated. In this way, we can easily perform image interpolation in the flow space and intermediate image synthesis in the feature space, obtaining a CIT model. The proposed space decoupled learning (SDL) approach is simple to implement, while it provides an effective framework to a variety of CIT problems beyond VFI, such as style transfer and image morphing. Our extensive experiments on a variety of CIT tasks demonstrate the superiority of SDL to existing methods. The source code and models can be found at \url{https://github.com/yangxy/SDL}. 视频帧插值（VFI）旨在提高视频序列的时间分辨率。大多数现有的基于深度学习的 VFI 方法采用现成的光流算法来估计双向流并相应地插入丢失的帧。尽管取得了巨大的成功，但这些方法需要大量的人类经验来调整双向流，并且当估计的流不准确时常常会产生令人不快的结果。在这项工作中，我们重新思考了 VFI 问题，并将其表述为连续图像转换（CIT）任务，其关键问题是将图像从一个空间连续转换到另一个空间。更具体地说，我们学习将图像隐式解耦为可翻译流空间和不可翻译特征空间。前者描述给定图像之间的可翻译状态，而后者旨在重建不能直接翻译的中间特征。这样，我们就可以轻松地在流空间中进行图像插值，在特征空间中进行中间图像合成，得到CIT模型。所提出的空间解耦学习（SDL）方法易于实现，同时它为 VFI 之外的各种 CIT 问题（例如风格迁移和图像变形）提供了有效的框架。我们对各种 CIT 任务进行的广泛实验证明了 SDL 相对于现有方法的优越性。源代码和模型可以在\url{https://github.com/yangxy/SDL}找到。 本文提出一种空间解耦学习方法（SDL），将视频帧插值问题重新定义为连续图像转换任务，通过解耦图像到可转换流空间和不可转换特征空间，实现更高效的连续图像生成。 Tao Yang,Peiran Ren,Xuansong Xie,Xiansheng Hua,Lei Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Zhihao Du,Shiliang Zhang,Siqi Zheng,Zhijie Yan
title: Speaker Embedding-aware Neural Diarization: an Efficient Framework for Overlapping Speech Diarization in Meeting Scenarios
title_zh: 演讲者嵌入感知神经二值化：会议场景中重叠语音二值化的有效框架
abstract: Overlapping speech diarization has been traditionally treated as a multi-label classification problem. In this paper, we reformulate this task as a single-label prediction problem by encoding multiple binary labels into a single label with the power set, which represents the possible combinations of target speakers. This formulation has two benefits. First, the overlaps of target speakers are explicitly modeled. Second, threshold selection is no longer needed. Through this formulation, we propose the speaker embedding-aware neural diarization (SEND) framework, where a speech encoder, a speaker encoder, two similarity scorers, and a post-processing network are jointly optimized to predict the encoded labels according to the similarities between speech features and speaker embeddings. Experimental results show that SEND has a stable learning process and can be trained on highly overlapped data without extra initialization. More importantly, our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance in real meeting scenarios with fewer model parameters and lower computational complexity.
summary: Overlapping speech diarization has been traditionally treated as a multi-label classification problem. In this paper, we reformulate this task as a single-label prediction problem by encoding multiple binary labels into a single label with the power set, which represents the possible combinations of target speakers. This formulation has two benefits. First, the overlaps of target speakers are explicitly modeled. Second, threshold selection is no longer needed. Through this formulation, we propose the speaker embedding-aware neural diarization (SEND) framework, where a speech encoder, a speaker encoder, two similarity scorers, and a post-processing network are jointly optimized to predict the encoded labels according to the similarities between speech features and speaker embeddings. Experimental results show that SEND has a stable learning process and can be trained on highly overlapped data without extra initialization. More importantly, our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance in real meeting scenarios with fewer model parameters and lower computational complexity.
abstract_zh: 重叠语音二值化传统上被视为多标签分类问题。在本文中，我们通过将多个二进制标签编码为具有功率集的单个标签来将该任务重新表述为单标签预测问题，功率集表示目标说话者的可能组合。这种配方有两个好处。首先，对目标说话者的重叠进行明确建模。其次，不再需要阈值选择。通过这个公式，我们提出了说话人嵌入感知神经二值化（SEND）框架，其中语音编码器、说话人编码器、两个相似性评分器和后处理网络被联合优化，以根据语音特征和说话人嵌入之间的相似性来预测编码标签。实验结果表明，SEND具有稳定的学习过程，并且可以在高度重叠的数据上进行训练，而无需额外的初始化。更重要的是，我们的方法以更少的模型参数和更低的计算复杂度在真实会议场景中实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于说话人嵌入感知的神经网络框架SEND，用于高效解决会议场景中的重叠语音分割问题。
AI.motivation: 传统重叠语音分割方法依赖多标签分类且需手动选择阈值，存在建模不明确和效率低下的问题。
AI.method: 通过幂集编码将多标签转换为单标签预测，设计包含语音编码器、说话人编码器、相似度评分器和后处理网络的SEND框架，联合优化相似度匹配以预测编码标签。
AI.result: SEND在高度重叠数据上训练稳定且无需额外初始化，参数量更少、计算复杂度更低，在真实会议场景中达到最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过单标签建模和结构优化实现了高效准确的重叠语音分割，适用于资源受限的实际场景。

authors_text: Jinqiao Li,Xiaotao Liu,Jian Zhao,Furao Shen
title: AutoAdversary: A Pixel Pruning Method for Sparse Adversarial Attack
title_zh: AutoAdversary：稀疏对抗攻击的像素修剪方法
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been proven to be vulnerable to adversarial examples. A special branch of adversarial examples, namely sparse adversarial examples, can fool the target DNNs by perturbing only a few pixels. However, many existing sparse adversarial attacks use heuristic methods to select the pixels to be perturbed, and regard the pixel selection and the adversarial attack as two separate steps. From the perspective of neural network pruning, we propose a novel end-to-end sparse adversarial attack method, namely AutoAdversary, which can find the most important pixels automatically by integrating the pixel selection into the adversarial attack. Specifically, our method utilizes a trainable neural network to generate a binary mask for the pixel selection. After jointly optimizing the adversarial perturbation and the neural network, only the pixels corresponding to the value 1 in the mask are perturbed. Experiments demonstrate the superiority of our proposed method over several state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, since AutoAdversary does not require a heuristic pixel selection process, it does not slow down excessively as other methods when the image size increases.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have been proven to be vulnerable to adversarial examples. A special branch of adversarial examples, namely sparse adversarial examples, can fool the target DNNs by perturbing only a few pixels. However, many existing sparse adversarial attacks use heuristic methods to select the pixels to be perturbed, and regard the pixel selection and the adversarial attack as two separate steps. From the perspective of neural network pruning, we propose a novel end-to-end sparse adversarial attack method, namely AutoAdversary, which can find the most important pixels automatically by integrating the pixel selection into the adversarial attack. Specifically, our method utilizes a trainable neural network to generate a binary mask for the pixel selection. After jointly optimizing the adversarial perturbation and the neural network, only the pixels corresponding to the value 1 in the mask are perturbed. Experiments demonstrate the superiority of our proposed method over several state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, since AutoAdversary does not require a heuristic pixel selection process, it does not slow down excessively as other methods when the image size increases.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）已被证明容易受到对抗性例子的影响。对抗样本的一个特殊分支，即稀疏对抗样本，可以通过仅扰动几个像素来欺骗目标 DNN。然而，许多现有的稀疏对抗攻击使用启发式方法来选择要扰动的像素，并将像素选择和对抗攻击视为两个独立的步骤。从神经网络剪枝的角度来看，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端稀疏对抗攻击方法，即 AutoAdversary，它可以通过将像素选择集成到对抗攻击中来自动找到最重要的像素。具体来说，我们的方法利用可训练的神经网络来生成用于像素选择的二进制掩模。在联合优化对抗性扰动和神经网络之后，仅对掩模中对应于值1的像素进行扰动。实验证明了我们提出的方法相对于几种最先进的方法的优越性。此外，由于 AutoAdversary 不需要启发式像素选择过程，因此当图像尺寸增加时，它不会像其他方法那样过度减慢。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AutoAdversary的端到端稀疏对抗攻击方法，通过自动选择关键像素进行扰动，提升对抗样本生成的效率和效果。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏对抗攻击方法通常将像素选择与攻击过程分离，依赖启发式方法选择像素，导致效率低下且难以适应大尺寸图像。
AI.method: 利用可训练神经网络生成二值化掩码，将像素选择与对抗扰动优化过程统一，仅对掩码值为1的像素进行扰动。
AI.result: 实验表明，AutoAdversary在多个基准数据集上优于现有先进方法，且在图像尺寸增大时保持高效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合像素选择与攻击过程，AutoAdversary实现了更优的稀疏对抗攻击性能，为对抗样本生成提供了新思路。

A special branch of adversarial examples, namely sparse adversarial examples, can fool the target DNNs by perturbing only a few pixels. However, many existing sparse adversarial attacks use heuristic methods to select the pixels to be perturbed, and regard the pixel selection and the adversarial attack as two separate steps. From the perspective of neural network pruning, we propose a novel end-to-end sparse adversarial attack method, namely AutoAdversary, which can find the most important pixels automatically by integrating the pixel selection into the adversarial attack. Specifically, our method utilizes a trainable neural network to generate a binary mask for the pixel selection. After jointly optimizing the adversarial perturbation and the neural network, only the pixels corresponding to the value 1 in the mask are perturbed. Experiments demonstrate the superiority of our proposed method over several state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, since AutoAdversary does not require a heuristic pixel selection process, it does not slow down excessively as other methods when the image size increases. 深度神经网络（DNN）已被证明容易受到对抗性例子的影响。对抗样本的一个特殊分支，即稀疏对抗样本，可以通过仅扰动几个像素来欺骗目标 DNN。然而，许多现有的稀疏对抗攻击使用启发式方法来选择要扰动的像素，并将像素选择和对抗攻击视为两个独立的步骤。从神经网络剪枝的角度来看，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端稀疏对抗攻击方法，即 AutoAdversary，它可以通过将像素选择集成到对抗攻击中来自动找到最重要的像素。具体来说，我们的方法利用可训练的神经网络来生成用于像素选择的二进制掩模。在联合优化对抗性扰动和神经网络之后，仅对掩模中对应于值1的像素进行扰动。实验证明了我们提出的方法相对于几种最先进的方法的优越性。此外，由于 AutoAdversary 不需要启发式像素选择过程，因此当图像尺寸增加时，它不会像其他方法那样过度减慢。 本文提出了一种名为AutoAdversary的端到端稀疏对抗攻击方法，通过自动选择关键像素进行扰动，提升对抗样本生成的效率和效果。 Jinqiao Li,Xiaotao Liu,Jian Zhao,Furao Shen cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Heecheol Kim,Yoshiyuki Ohmura,Yasuo Kuniyoshi
title: Goal-conditioned dual-action imitation learning for dexterous dual-arm robot manipulation
title_zh: 用于灵巧双臂机器人操纵的目标条件双动作模仿学习
comment: 19 pages, published in Transactions on Robotics (T-RO)
comments: 19 pages, published in Transactions on Robotics (T-RO)
abstract: Long-horizon dexterous robot manipulation of deformable objects, such as banana peeling, is a problematic task because of the difficulties in object modeling and a lack of knowledge about stable and dexterous manipulation skills. This paper presents a goal-conditioned dual-action (GC-DA) deep imitation learning (DIL) approach that can learn dexterous manipulation skills using human demonstration data. Previous DIL methods map the current sensory input and reactive action, which often fails because of compounding errors in imitation learning caused by the recurrent computation of actions. The method predicts reactive action only when the precise manipulation of the target object is required (local action) and generates the entire trajectory when precise manipulation is not required (global action). This dual-action formulation effectively prevents compounding error in the imitation learning using the trajectory-based global action while responding to unexpected changes in the target object during the reactive local action. The proposed method was tested in a real dual-arm robot and successfully accomplished the banana-peeling task. Data from this and related works are available at: https://sites.google.com/view/multi-task-fine.
summary: Long-horizon dexterous robot manipulation of deformable objects, such as banana peeling, is a problematic task because of the difficulties in object modeling and a lack of knowledge about stable and dexterous manipulation skills. This paper presents a goal-conditioned dual-action (GC-DA) deep imitation learning (DIL) approach that can learn dexterous manipulation skills using human demonstration data. Previous DIL methods map the current sensory input and reactive action, which often fails because of compounding errors in imitation learning caused by the recurrent computation of actions. The method predicts reactive action only when the precise manipulation of the target object is required (local action) and generates the entire trajectory when precise manipulation is not required (global action). This dual-action formulation effectively prevents compounding error in the imitation learning using the trajectory-based global action while responding to unexpected changes in the target object during the reactive local action. The proposed method was tested in a real dual-arm robot and successfully accomplished the banana-peeling task. Data from this and related works are available at: https://sites.google.com/view/multi-task-fine.
abstract_zh: 由于对象建模的困难以及缺乏稳定和灵巧操作技能的知识，长视灵巧机器人对可变形物体（例如香蕉剥皮）的操作是一项有问题的任务。本文提出了一种目标条件双动作（GC-DA）深度模仿学习（DIL）方法，可以使用人类演示数据学习灵巧的操作技能。以前的 DIL 方法映射当前的感觉输入和反应动作，但由于动作的循环计算导致模仿学习中的复合错误，这种方法经常失败。该方法仅在需要精确操纵目标对象时（局部动作）预测反应动作，而在不需要精确操纵时（全局动作）生成整个轨迹。这种双动作公式有效地防止了使用基于轨迹的全局动作的模仿学习中的复合错误，同时响应了反应性局部动作期间目标对象的意外变化。所提出的方法在真实的双臂机器人上进行了测试，并成功完成了香蕉剥皮任务。本文及相关作品的数据可在以下网址获取：https://sites.google.com/view/multi-task-fine。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于目标条件的双动作深度模仿学习方法，用于实现灵巧双臂机器人对可变形物体的长期操作。
AI.motivation: 由于可变形物体建模困难以及缺乏稳定和灵巧操作技能的知识，长期的灵巧机器人操作任务（如香蕉剥皮）极具挑战性。
AI.method: 该方法通过人类示范数据学习灵巧操作技能，采用目标条件的双动作（GC-DA）深度模仿学习方法，预测局部动作和全局动作以防止误差累积。
AI.result: 该方法在实际双臂机器人上成功完成了香蕉剥皮任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了模仿学习中误差累积的问题，为灵巧双臂机器人操作提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Tatsuya Yokota
title: Soft Smoothness for Audio Inpainting Using a Latent Matrix Model in Delay-embedded Space
title_zh: 在延迟嵌入空间中使用潜在矩阵模型进行音频修复的软平滑度
abstract: Here, we propose a new reconstruction method of smooth time-series signals. A key concept of this study is not considering the model in signal space, but in delay-embedded space. In other words, we indirectly represent a time-series signal as an output of inverse delay-embedding of a matrix, and the matrix is constrained. Based on the model under inverse delay-embedding, we propose to constrain the matrix to be rank-1 with smooth factor vectors. The proposed model is closely related to the convolutional model, and quadratic variation (QV) regularization. Especially, the proposed method can be characterized as a generalization of QV regularization. In addition, we show that the proposed method provides the softer smoothness than QV regularization. Experiments of audio inpainting and declipping are conducted to show its advantages in comparison with several existing interpolation methods and sparse modeling.
summary: Here, we propose a new reconstruction method of smooth time-series signals. A key concept of this study is not considering the model in signal space, but in delay-embedded space. In other words, we indirectly represent a time-series signal as an output of inverse delay-embedding of a matrix, and the matrix is constrained. Based on the model under inverse delay-embedding, we propose to constrain the matrix to be rank-1 with smooth factor vectors. The proposed model is closely related to the convolutional model, and quadratic variation (QV) regularization. Especially, the proposed method can be characterized as a generalization of QV regularization. In addition, we show that the proposed method provides the softer smoothness than QV regularization. Experiments of audio inpainting and declipping are conducted to show its advantages in comparison with several existing interpolation methods and sparse modeling.
abstract_zh: 在这里，我们提出了一种新的平滑时间序列信号重建方法。这项研究的一个关键概念不是考虑信号空间中的模型，而是考虑延迟嵌入空间中的模型。换句话说，我们间接地将时间序列信号表示为矩阵的逆延迟嵌入的输出，并且该矩阵受到约束。基于逆延迟嵌入下的模型，我们建议使用平滑因子向量将矩阵约束为rank-1。所提出的模型与卷积模型和二次变分（QV）正则化密切相关。特别是，所提出的方法可以被描述为 QV 正则化的推广。此外，我们还表明所提出的方法提供了比 QV 正则化更软的平滑度。进行了音频修复和去削波实验，以显示其与现有的几种插值方法和稀疏建模相比的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于延迟嵌入空间中潜在矩阵模型的音频修复方法，通过约束矩阵的秩和光滑因子向量实现软光滑性。
AI.motivation: 传统信号重构方法在信号空间建模存在局限，难以有效处理音频信号的连续性与光滑性需求。
AI.method: 在延迟嵌入空间中构建潜在矩阵模型，通过逆延迟嵌入表示信号，并约束矩阵为秩1且具有光滑因子向量，结合二次变分正则化的推广形式。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在音频修复和去削波任务中优于现有插值方法和稀疏建模技术，且能提供更柔和的光滑性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的软光滑性模型有效提升了音频信号重构质量，为时间序列信号处理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ruihuang Li,Shuai Li,Chenhang He,Yabin Zhang,Xu Jia,Lei Zhang
title: Class-Balanced Pixel-Level Self-Labeling for Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于域自适应语义分割的类平衡像素级自标记
comment: This paper has been accepted by CVPR 2022
comments: This paper has been accepted by CVPR 2022
abstract: Domain adaptive semantic segmentation aims to learn a model with the supervision of source domain data, and produce satisfactory dense predictions on unlabeled target domain. One popular solution to this challenging task is self-training, which selects high-scoring predictions on target samples as pseudo labels for training. However, the produced pseudo labels often contain much noise because the model is biased to source domain as well as majority categories. To address the above issues, we propose to directly explore the intrinsic pixel distributions of target domain data, instead of heavily relying on the source domain. Specifically, we simultaneously cluster pixels and rectify pseudo labels with the obtained cluster assignments. This process is done in an online fashion so that pseudo labels could co-evolve with the segmentation model without extra training rounds. To overcome the class imbalance problem on long-tailed categories, we employ a distribution alignment technique to enforce the marginal class distribution of cluster assignments to be close to that of pseudo labels. The proposed method, namely Class-balanced Pixel-level Self-Labeling (CPSL), improves the segmentation performance on target domain over state-of-the-arts by a large margin, especially on long-tailed categories.
summary: Domain adaptive semantic segmentation aims to learn a model with the supervision of source domain data, and produce satisfactory dense predictions on unlabeled target domain. One popular solution to this challenging task is self-training, which selects high-scoring predictions on target samples as pseudo labels for training. However, the produced pseudo labels often contain much noise because the model is biased to source domain as well as majority categories. To address the above issues, we propose to directly explore the intrinsic pixel distributions of target domain data, instead of heavily relying on the source domain. Specifically, we simultaneously cluster pixels and rectify pseudo labels with the obtained cluster assignments. This process is done in an online fashion so that pseudo labels could co-evolve with the segmentation model without extra training rounds. To overcome the class imbalance problem on long-tailed categories, we employ a distribution alignment technique to enforce the marginal class distribution of cluster assignments to be close to that of pseudo labels. The proposed method, namely Class-balanced Pixel-level Self-Labeling (CPSL), improves the segmentation performance on target domain over state-of-the-arts by a large margin, especially on long-tailed categories.
abstract_zh: 域自适应语义分割旨在在源域数据的监督下学习模型，并在未标记的目标域上产生令人满意的密集预测。对于这一具有挑战性的任务，一种流行的解决方案是自我训练，它选择目标样本的高分预测作为训练的伪标签。然而，生成的伪标签通常包含很多噪声，因为该模型偏向于源域以及大多数类别。为了解决上述问题，我们建议直接探索目标域数据的内在像素分布，而不是严重依赖源域。具体来说，我们同时对像素进行聚类，并使用获得的聚类分配来纠正伪标签。这个过程以在线方式完成，以便伪标签可以与分割模型共同进化，而无需额外的训练轮次。为了克服长尾类别的类不平衡问题，我们采用分布对齐技术来强制聚类分配的边缘类分布接近伪标签的边缘类分布。所提出的方法，即类平衡像素级自标记（CPSL），与最先进的技术相比，大大提高了目标域的分割性能，特别是在长尾类别上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CPSL的类别平衡像素级自标记方法，用于解决领域自适应语义分割中伪标签噪声和类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自训练方法生成的伪标签存在噪声，且模型偏向源域和多数类别，导致长尾类别性能不足。
AI.method: 通过在线像素聚类与伪标签修正同步进行，结合分布对齐技术平衡类别分布，实现伪标签与模型的协同优化。
AI.result: 在目标域上显著提升分割性能，尤其在长尾类别上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CPSL有效缓解了领域自适应中的伪标签噪声和类别不平衡问题，提升了分割模型的泛化能力。

search_text: Class-Balanced Pixel-Level Self-Labeling for Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation 用于域自适应语义分割的类平衡像素级自标记 Domain adaptive semantic segmentation aims to learn a model with the supervision of source domain data, and produce satisfactory dense predictions on unlabeled target domain. One popular solution to this challenging task is self-training, which selects high-scoring predictions on target samples as pseudo labels for training. However, the produced pseudo labels often contain much noise because the model is biased to source domain as well as majority categories. To address the above issues, we propose to directly explore the intrinsic pixel distributions of target domain data, instead of heavily relying on the source domain. Specifically, we simultaneously cluster pixels and rectify pseudo labels with the obtained cluster assignments. This process is done in an online fashion so that pseudo labels could co-evolve with the segmentation model without extra training rounds. To overcome the class imbalance problem on long-tailed categories, we employ a distribution alignment technique to enforce the marginal class distribution of cluster assignments to be close to that of pseudo labels. The proposed method, namely Class-balanced Pixel-level Self-Labeling (CPSL), improves the segmentation performance on target domain over state-of-the-arts by a large margin, especially on long-tailed categories. 域自适应语义分割旨在在源域数据的监督下学习模型，并在未标记的目标域上产生令人满意的密集预测。对于这一具有挑战性的任务，一种流行的解决方案是自我训练，它选择目标样本的高分预测作为训练的伪标签。然而，生成的伪标签通常包含很多噪声，因为该模型偏向于源域以及大多数类别。为了解决上述问题，我们建议直接探索目标域数据的内在像素分布，而不是严重依赖源域。具体来说，我们同时对像素进行聚类，并使用获得的聚类分配来纠正伪标签。这个过程以在线方式完成，以便伪标签可以与分割模型共同进化，而无需额外的训练轮次。为了克服长尾类别的类不平衡问题，我们采用分布对齐技术来强制聚类分配的边缘类分布接近伪标签的边缘类分布。所提出的方法，即类平衡像素级自标记（CPSL），与最先进的技术相比，大大提高了目标域的分割性能，特别是在长尾类别上。 本文提出一种名为CPSL的类别平衡像素级自标记方法，用于解决领域自适应语义分割中伪标签噪声和类别不平衡问题。 Ruihuang Li,Shuai Li,Chenhang He,Yabin Zhang,Xu Jia,Lei Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Allan Zhou,Fahim Tajwar,Alexander Robey,Tom Knowles,George J. Pappas,Hamed Hassani,Chelsea Finn
title: Do Deep Networks Transfer Invariances Across Classes?
title_zh: 深度网络是否跨类传递不变性？
abstract: To generalize well, classifiers must learn to be invariant to nuisance transformations that do not alter an input's class. Many problems have "class-agnostic" nuisance transformations that apply similarly to all classes, such as lighting and background changes for image classification. Neural networks can learn these invariances given sufficient data, but many real-world datasets are heavily class imbalanced and contain only a few examples for most of the classes. We therefore pose the question: how well do neural networks transfer class-agnostic invariances learned from the large classes to the small ones? Through careful experimentation, we observe that invariance to class-agnostic transformations is still heavily dependent on class size, with the networks being much less invariant on smaller classes. This result holds even when using data balancing techniques, and suggests poor invariance transfer across classes. Our results provide one explanation for why classifiers generalize poorly on unbalanced and long-tailed distributions. Based on this analysis, we show how a generative approach for learning the nuisance transformations can help transfer invariances across classes and improve performance on a set of imbalanced image classification benchmarks. Source code for our experiments is available at https://github.com/AllanYangZhou/generative-invariance-transfer.
summary: To generalize well, classifiers must learn to be invariant to nuisance transformations that do not alter an input's class. Many problems have "class-agnostic" nuisance transformations that apply similarly to all classes, such as lighting and background changes for image classification. Neural networks can learn these invariances given sufficient data, but many real-world datasets are heavily class imbalanced and contain only a few examples for most of the classes. We therefore pose the question: how well do neural networks transfer class-agnostic invariances learned from the large classes to the small ones? Through careful experimentation, we observe that invariance to class-agnostic transformations is still heavily dependent on class size, with the networks being much less invariant on smaller classes. This result holds even when using data balancing techniques, and suggests poor invariance transfer across classes. Our results provide one explanation for why classifiers generalize poorly on unbalanced and long-tailed distributions. Based on this analysis, we show how a generative approach for learning the nuisance transformations can help transfer invariances across classes and improve performance on a set of imbalanced image classification benchmarks. Source code for our experiments is available at https://github.com/AllanYangZhou/generative-invariance-transfer.
abstract_zh: 为了很好地概括，分类器必须学会对不改变输入类别的无用变换保持不变。许多问题都具有“与类无关”的干扰转换，这些转换类似地适用于所有类，例如图像分类的照明和背景变化。神经网络可以在给定足够数据的情况下学习这些不变性，但许多现实世界的数据集严重类别不平衡，并且仅包含大多数类别的少数示例。因此，我们提出了一个问题：神经网络如何将从大类中学到的与类无关的不变性转移到小类中？通过仔细的实验​​，我们观察到与类无关的变换的不变性仍然严重依赖于类的大小，而网络在较小的类上的不变性要小得多。即使使用数据平衡技术，这个结果仍然成立，并且表明跨类的不变性传递很差。我们的结果为为什么分类器在不平衡和长尾分布上泛化不佳提供了一种解释。基于此分析，我们展示了学习讨厌变换的生成方法如何帮助跨类传递不变性并提高一组不平衡图像分类基准的性能。我们实验的源代码可在 https://github.com/AllanYangZhou/generative-invariance-transfer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了深度网络在不同类别之间转移类无关不变性的能力，并提出了一种生成方法来提高不平衡数据集上的分类性能。
AI.motivation: 分类器需要学习对不影响输入类别的干扰变换保持不变，但现实数据集通常类别不平衡，导致网络难以将从大类别中学到的不变性转移到小类别上。
AI.method: 通过实验验证了网络对类无关变换的不变性依赖于类别大小，并提出了一种生成方法来学习这些变换，以帮助跨类别转移不变性。
AI.result: 实验表明，网络在小类别上的不变性较差，即使使用数据平衡技术也无法改善。生成方法有效提升了不平衡数据集上的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 类别不平衡导致深度网络难以转移不变性，生成方法可以缓解这一问题，提高分类效果。

authors_text: Jongbeom Baek,Gyeongnyeon Kim,Seungryong Kim
title: Semi-Supervised Learning with Mutual Distillation for Monocular Depth Estimation
title_zh: 用于单目深度估计的相互蒸馏的半监督学习
comment: ef:IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022
comments: ef:IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2022
abstract: We propose a semi-supervised learning framework for monocular depth estimation. Compared to existing semi-supervised learning methods, which inherit limitations of both sparse supervised and unsupervised loss functions, we achieve the complementary advantages of both loss functions, by building two separate network branches for each loss and distilling each other through the mutual distillation loss function. We also present to apply different data augmentation to each branch, which improves the robustness. We conduct experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework over the latest methods and provide extensive ablation studies.
summary: We propose a semi-supervised learning framework for monocular depth estimation. Compared to existing semi-supervised learning methods, which inherit limitations of both sparse supervised and unsupervised loss functions, we achieve the complementary advantages of both loss functions, by building two separate network branches for each loss and distilling each other through the mutual distillation loss function. We also present to apply different data augmentation to each branch, which improves the robustness. We conduct experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework over the latest methods and provide extensive ablation studies.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于单目深度估计的半监督学习框架。与继承了稀疏监督和无监督损失函数局限性的现有半监督学习方法相比，我们通过为每个损失构建两个独立的网络分支并通过相互蒸馏损失函数相互蒸馏，实现了两种损失函数的优势互补。我们还提出对每个分支应用不同的数据增强，从而提高鲁棒性。我们进行实验来证明我们的框架相对于最新方法的有效性，并提供广泛的消融研究。

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于单目深度估计的半监督学习框架，结合有监督和无监督损失的优势。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督方法受限于稀疏监督与无监督损失函数的局限性，难以有效融合两者优势。
AI.method: 构建两个独立网络分支分别处理监督/无监督损失，通过相互蒸馏机制进行知识传递，并采用差异化数据增强策略。
AI.result: 实验验证框架优于最新方法，消融研究证实各模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: 相互蒸馏机制与差异化增强策略有效提升半监督深度估计性能，为该领域提供新思路。

search_text: Semi-Supervised Learning with Mutual Distillation for Monocular Depth Estimation 用于单目深度估计的相互蒸馏的半监督学习 We propose a semi-supervised learning framework for monocular depth estimation. Compared to existing semi-supervised learning methods, which inherit limitations of both sparse supervised and unsupervised loss functions, we achieve the complementary advantages of both loss functions, by building two separate network branches for each loss and distilling each other through the mutual distillation loss function. We also present to apply different data augmentation to each branch, which improves the robustness. We conduct experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework over the latest methods and provide extensive ablation studies. 我们提出了一种用于单目深度估计的半监督学习框架。与继承了稀疏监督和无监督损失函数局限性的现有半监督学习方法相比，我们通过为每个损失构建两个独立的网络分支并通过相互蒸馏损失函数相互蒸馏，实现了两种损失函数的优势互补。我们还提出对每个分支应用不同的数据增强，从而提高鲁棒性。我们进行实验来证明我们的框架相对于最新方法的有效性，并提供广泛的消融研究。 提出一种用于单目深度估计的半监督学习框架，结合有监督和无监督损失的优势。 Jongbeom Baek,Gyeongnyeon Kim,Seungryong Kim cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Jin Huang,Lu Zhang,Yongshun Gong,Jian Zhang,Xiushan Nie,Yilong Yin
title: Series Photo Selection via Multi-view Graph Learning
title_zh: 通过多视图图学习进行系列照片选择
abstract: Series photo selection (SPS) is an important branch of the image aesthetics quality assessment, which focuses on finding the best one from a series of nearly identical photos. While a great progress has been observed, most of the existing SPS approaches concentrate solely on extracting features from the original image, neglecting that multiple views, e.g, saturation level, color histogram and depth of field of the image, will be of benefit to successfully reflecting the subtle aesthetic changes. Taken multi-view into consideration, we leverage a graph neural network to construct the relationships between multi-view features. Besides, multiple views are aggregated with an adaptive-weight self-attention module to verify the significance of each view. Finally, a siamese network is proposed to select the best one from a series of nearly identical photos. Experimental results demonstrate that our model accomplish the highest success rates compared with competitive methods.
summary: Series photo selection (SPS) is an important branch of the image aesthetics quality assessment, which focuses on finding the best one from a series of nearly identical photos. While a great progress has been observed, most of the existing SPS approaches concentrate solely on extracting features from the original image, neglecting that multiple views, e.g, saturation level, color histogram and depth of field of the image, will be of benefit to successfully reflecting the subtle aesthetic changes. Taken multi-view into consideration, we leverage a graph neural network to construct the relationships between multi-view features. Besides, multiple views are aggregated with an adaptive-weight self-attention module to verify the significance of each view. Finally, a siamese network is proposed to select the best one from a series of nearly identical photos. Experimental results demonstrate that our model accomplish the highest success rates compared with competitive methods.
abstract_zh: 系列照片选择（SPS）是图像美学质量评估的一个重要分支，其重点是从一系列几乎相同的照片中找到最好的一张。虽然已经取得了很大的进步，但大多数现有的 SPS 方法仅专注于从原始图像中提取特征，而忽略了多个视图，例如图像的饱和度、颜色直方图和景深，这将有利于成功反映微妙的美学变化。考虑到多视图，我们利用图神经网络来构建多视图特征之间的关系。此外，多个视图通过自适应权重自注意力模块聚合，以验证每个视图的重要性。最后，提出了一个暹罗网络来从一系列几乎相同的照片中选择最好的一张。实验结果表明，与竞争方法相比，我们的模型实现了最高的成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多视角图学习的系列照片选择方法，旨在从近似相同的照片中选出最佳图像。
AI.motivation: 现有系列照片选择方法仅关注原始图像特征，忽视了饱和度、色彩直方图和景深等多视角信息对美学细微差异的反映作用。
AI.method: 构建图神经网络建模多视角特征关系，采用自适应权重自注意力模块聚合多视角信息，结合孪生网络进行最优照片选择。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在系列照片选择任务中相比竞品方法取得最高成功率。
AI.conclusion: 多视角图学习方法有效提升了系列照片选择性能，验证了多视角信息融合的必要性。

authors_text: Zhijie Shen,Chunyu Lin,Lang Nie,Kang Liao,Yao zhao
title: Distortion-Tolerant Monocular Depth Estimation On Omnidirectional Images Using Dual-cubemap
title_zh: 使用双立方体贴图对全向图像进行抗畸变单目深度估计
abstract: Estimating the depth of omnidirectional images is more challenging than that of normal field-of-view (NFoV) images because the varying distortion can significantly twist an object's shape. The existing methods suffer from troublesome distortion while estimating the depth of omnidirectional images, leading to inferior performance. To reduce the negative impact of the distortion influence, we propose a distortion-tolerant omnidirectional depth estimation algorithm using a dual-cubemap. It comprises two modules: Dual-Cubemap Depth Estimation (DCDE) module and Boundary Revision (BR) module. In DCDE module, we present a rotation-based dual-cubemap model to estimate the accurate NFoV depth, reducing the distortion at the cost of boundary discontinuity on omnidirectional depths. Then a boundary revision module is designed to smooth the discontinuous boundaries, which contributes to the precise and visually continuous omnidirectional depths. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our method over other state-of-the-art solutions.
summary: Estimating the depth of omnidirectional images is more challenging than that of normal field-of-view (NFoV) images because the varying distortion can significantly twist an object's shape. The existing methods suffer from troublesome distortion while estimating the depth of omnidirectional images, leading to inferior performance. To reduce the negative impact of the distortion influence, we propose a distortion-tolerant omnidirectional depth estimation algorithm using a dual-cubemap. It comprises two modules: Dual-Cubemap Depth Estimation (DCDE) module and Boundary Revision (BR) module. In DCDE module, we present a rotation-based dual-cubemap model to estimate the accurate NFoV depth, reducing the distortion at the cost of boundary discontinuity on omnidirectional depths. Then a boundary revision module is designed to smooth the discontinuous boundaries, which contributes to the precise and visually continuous omnidirectional depths. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our method over other state-of-the-art solutions.
abstract_zh: 估计全向图像的深度比正常视场 (NFoV) 图像的深度更具挑战性，因为不同的失真会显着扭曲对象的形状。现有方法在估计全向图像深度时会遇到麻烦的失真问题，导致性能较差。为了减少失真影响的负面影响，我们提出了一种使用双立方体贴图的失真容忍全向深度估计算法。它包括两个模块：双立方体贴图深度估计（DCDE）模块和边界修正（BR）模块。在DCDE模块中，我们提出了一种基于旋转的双立方体贴图模型来估计准确的NFoV深度，以全向深度上的边界不连续性为代价减少失真。然后设计了边界修正模块来平滑不连续的边界，这有助于精确且视觉上连续的全向深度。大量的实验证明了我们的方法相对于其他最先进的解决方案的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双立方体贴图的失真容忍单目深度估计方法，用于解决全景图像深度估计中的失真问题。
AI.motivation: 全景图像因视角失真导致深度估计困难，现有方法无法有效处理失真带来的边界不连续问题，需改进算法以提高精度。
AI.method: 设计双立方体贴图深度估计模块（DCDE）和边界修正模块（BR），通过旋转双立方体贴图减少失真并修正边界不连续性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在深度估计精度和视觉连续性上优于现有最先进的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 双立方体贴图结合边界修正有效缓解了全景图像深度估计的失真问题，提升了估计质量。

authors_text: Shuai Li,Chenhang He,Ruihuang Li,Lei Zhang
title: A Dual Weighting Label Assignment Scheme for Object Detection
title_zh: 一种用于目标检测的双加权标签分配方案
abstract: Label assignment (LA), which aims to assign each training sample a positive (pos) and a negative (neg) loss weight, plays an important role in object detection. Existing LA methods mostly focus on the design of pos weighting function, while the neg weight is directly derived from the pos weight. Such a mechanism limits the learning capacity of detectors. In this paper, we explore a new weighting paradigm, termed dual weighting (DW), to specify pos and neg weights separately. We first identify the key influential factors of pos/neg weights by analyzing the evaluation metrics in object detection, and then design the pos and neg weighting functions based on them. Specifically, the pos weight of a sample is determined by the consistency degree between its classification and localization scores, while the neg weight is decomposed into two terms: the probability that it is a neg sample and its importance conditioned on being a neg sample. Such a weighting strategy offers greater flexibility to distinguish between important and less important samples, resulting in a more effective object detector. Equipped with the proposed DW method, a single FCOS-ResNet-50 detector can reach 41.5% mAP on COCO under 1x schedule, outperforming other existing LA methods. It consistently improves the baselines on COCO by a large margin under various backbones without bells and whistles. Code is available at https://github.com/strongwolf/DW.
summary: Label assignment (LA), which aims to assign each training sample a positive (pos) and a negative (neg) loss weight, plays an important role in object detection. Existing LA methods mostly focus on the design of pos weighting function, while the neg weight is directly derived from the pos weight. Such a mechanism limits the learning capacity of detectors. In this paper, we explore a new weighting paradigm, termed dual weighting (DW), to specify pos and neg weights separately. We first identify the key influential factors of pos/neg weights by analyzing the evaluation metrics in object detection, and then design the pos and neg weighting functions based on them. Specifically, the pos weight of a sample is determined by the consistency degree between its classification and localization scores, while the neg weight is decomposed into two terms: the probability that it is a neg sample and its importance conditioned on being a neg sample. Such a weighting strategy offers greater flexibility to distinguish between important and less important samples, resulting in a more effective object detector. Equipped with the proposed DW method, a single FCOS-ResNet-50 detector can reach 41.5% mAP on COCO under 1x schedule, outperforming other existing LA methods. It consistently improves the baselines on COCO by a large margin under various backbones without bells and whistles. Code is available at https://github.com/strongwolf/DW.
abstract_zh: 标签分配（LA）旨在为每个训练样本分配正（pos）和负（neg）损失权重，在目标检测中发挥着重要作用。现有的LA方法大多侧重于pos权重函数的设计，而neg权重则直接由pos权重导出。这种机制限制了探测器的学习能力。在本文中，我们探索了一种新的加权范式，称为双重加权（DW），以分别指定正权重和负权重。我们首先通过分析目标检测中的评估指标来确定pos/neg权重的关键影响因素，然后根据它们设计pos和neg权重函数。具体来说，样本的 pos 权重由其分类得分和定位得分之间的一致性程度决定，而 neg 权重则分解为两项：其为负样本的概率以及其作为负样本的重要性。这种加权策略提供了更大的灵活性来区分重要和不太重要的样本，从而产生更有效的目标检测器。配备所提出的 DW 方法，单个 FCOS-ResNet-50 检测器可以在 1x 调度下在 COCO 上达到 41.5% mAP，优于其他现有的 LA 方法。它在各种骨干网下持续大幅度提高了 COCO 的基线，没有任何附加功能。代码可在 https://github.com/strongwolf/DW 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双权重标签分配方案（DW），通过独立设计正负样本权重函数提升目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有标签分配方法仅关注正样本权重设计，负样本权重直接由正样本权重推导，限制了检测器的学习能力。
AI.method: 通过分析检测指标确定正负权重影响因素，设计分离的正负权重函数：正权重基于分类与定位得分一致性，负权重分解为负样本概率与条件重要性两部分。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上，基于FCOS-ResNet-50的单模型达到41.5% mAP，优于其他标签分配方法且在多种主干网络上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 双权重策略通过灵活区分样本重要性，有效提升了目标检测性能，为标签分配提供了新范式。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种双权重标签分配方案（DW），通过独立设计正负样本权重函数提升目标检测性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有标签分配方法仅关注正样本权重设计，负样本权重直接由正样本权重推导，限制了检测器的学习能力。
ai_content.method: 通过分析检测指标确定正负权重影响因素，设计分离的正负权重函数：正权重基于分类与定位得分一致性，负权重分解为负样本概率与条件重要性两部分。
ai_content.result: 在COCO数据集上，基于FCOS-ResNet-50的单模型达到41.5% mAP，优于其他标签分配方法且在多种主干网络上均有显著提升。
ai_content.conclusion: 双权重策略通过灵活区分样本重要性，有效提升了目标检测性能，为标签分配提供了新范式。

search_text: A Dual Weighting Label Assignment Scheme for Object Detection 一种用于目标检测的双加权标签分配方案 Label assignment (LA), which aims to assign each training sample a positive (pos) and a negative (neg) loss weight, plays an important role in object detection. Existing LA methods mostly focus on the design of pos weighting function, while the neg weight is directly derived from the pos weight. Such a mechanism limits the learning capacity of detectors. In this paper, we explore a new weighting paradigm, termed dual weighting (DW), to specify pos and neg weights separately. We first identify the key influential factors of pos/neg weights by analyzing the evaluation metrics in object detection, and then design the pos and neg weighting functions based on them. Specifically, the pos weight of a sample is determined by the consistency degree between its classification and localization scores, while the neg weight is decomposed into two terms: the probability that it is a neg sample and its importance conditioned on being a neg sample. Such a weighting strategy offers greater flexibility to distinguish between important and less important samples, resulting in a more effective object detector. Equipped with the proposed DW method, a single FCOS-ResNet-50 detector can reach 41.5% mAP on COCO under 1x schedule, outperforming other existing LA methods. It consistently improves the baselines on COCO by a large margin under various backbones without bells and whistles. Code is available at https://github.com/strongwolf/DW. 标签分配（LA）旨在为每个训练样本分配正（pos）和负（neg）损失权重，在目标检测中发挥着重要作用。现有的LA方法大多侧重于pos权重函数的设计，而neg权重则直接由pos权重导出。这种机制限制了探测器的学习能力。在本文中，我们探索了一种新的加权范式，称为双重加权（DW），以分别指定正权重和负权重。我们首先通过分析目标检测中的评估指标来确定pos/neg权重的关键影响因素，然后根据它们设计pos和neg权重函数。具体来说，样本的 pos 权重由其分类得分和定位得分之间的一致性程度决定，而 neg 权重则分解为两项：其为负样本的概率以及其作为负样本的重要性。这种加权策略提供了更大的灵活性来区分重要和不太重要的样本，从而产生更有效的目标检测器。配备所提出的 DW 方法，单个 FCOS-ResNet-50 检测器可以在 1x 调度下在 COCO 上达到 41.5% mAP，优于其他现有的 LA 方法。它在各种骨干网下持续大幅度提高了 COCO 的基线，没有任何附加功能。代码可在 https://github.com/strongwolf/DW 获取。 本文提出一种双权重标签分配方案（DW），通过独立设计正负样本权重函数提升目标检测性能。 Shuai Li,Chenhang He,Ruihuang Li,Lei Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Zenghao Chai,Haoxian Zhang,Jing Ren,Di Kang,Zhengzhuo Xu,Xuefei Zhe,Chun Yuan,Linchao Bao
title: REALY: Rethinking the Evaluation of 3D Face Reconstruction
title_zh: REALY：重新思考 3D 人脸重建的评估
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022, camera-ready version; Project page: https://realy3dface.com; Code: https://github.com/czh-98/REALY
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022, camera-ready version; Project page: https://realy3dface.com; Code: https://github.com/czh-98/REALY
abstract: The evaluation of 3D face reconstruction results typically relies on a rigid shape alignment between the estimated 3D model and the ground-truth scan. We observe that aligning two shapes with different reference points can largely affect the evaluation results. This poses difficulties for precisely diagnosing and improving a 3D face reconstruction method. In this paper, we propose a novel evaluation approach with a new benchmark REALY, consists of 100 globally aligned face scans with accurate facial keypoints, high-quality region masks, and topology-consistent meshes. Our approach performs region-wise shape alignment and leads to more accurate, bidirectional correspondences during computing the shape errors. The fine-grained, region-wise evaluation results provide us detailed understandings about the performance of state-of-the-art 3D face reconstruction methods. For example, our experiments on single-image based reconstruction methods reveal that DECA performs the best on nose regions, while GANFit performs better on cheek regions. Besides, a new and high-quality 3DMM basis, HIFI3D++, is further derived using the same procedure as we construct REALY to align and retopologize several 3D face datasets. We will release REALY, HIFI3D++, and our new evaluation pipeline at https://realy3dface.com.
summary: The evaluation of 3D face reconstruction results typically relies on a rigid shape alignment between the estimated 3D model and the ground-truth scan. We observe that aligning two shapes with different reference points can largely affect the evaluation results. This poses difficulties for precisely diagnosing and improving a 3D face reconstruction method. In this paper, we propose a novel evaluation approach with a new benchmark REALY, consists of 100 globally aligned face scans with accurate facial keypoints, high-quality region masks, and topology-consistent meshes. Our approach performs region-wise shape alignment and leads to more accurate, bidirectional correspondences during computing the shape errors. The fine-grained, region-wise evaluation results provide us detailed understandings about the performance of state-of-the-art 3D face reconstruction methods. For example, our experiments on single-image based reconstruction methods reveal that DECA performs the best on nose regions, while GANFit performs better on cheek regions. Besides, a new and high-quality 3DMM basis, HIFI3D++, is further derived using the same procedure as we construct REALY to align and retopologize several 3D face datasets. We will release REALY, HIFI3D++, and our new evaluation pipeline at https://realy3dface.com.
abstract_zh: 3D 面部重建结果的评估通常依赖于估计的 3D 模型和地面实况扫描之间的严格形状对齐。我们观察到，将两个形状与不同的参考点对齐可以在很大程度上影响评估结果。这给精确诊断和改进3D人脸重建方法带来了困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种采用新基准 RELY 的新颖评估方法，由 100 个全局对齐的面部扫描组成，具有准确的面部关键点、高质量的区域掩模和拓扑一致的网格。我们的方法执行区域形状对齐，并在计算形状误差时产生更准确的双向对应关系。细粒度、按区域的评估结果使我们能够详细了解最先进的 3D 人脸重建方法的性能。例如，我们对基于单图像的重建方法的实验表明，DECA 在鼻子区域表现最好，而 GANFit 在脸颊区域表现更好。此外，我们还使用与构建 RELY 相同的过程进一步导出了新的高质量 3DMM 基础 HIFI3D++，以对齐和重新拓扑多个 3D 人脸数据集。我们将在 https://realy3dface.com 上发布 RELY、HIFI3D++ 和新的评估流程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的3D人脸重建评估方法REALY，并构建了包含100个全局对齐人脸扫描数据的基准数据集，通过区域级对齐提升评估精度。
AI.motivation: 传统3D人脸重建评估依赖刚性形状对齐，但不同参考点对齐会显著影响评估结果，导致难以准确诊断和改进重建方法。
AI.method: 构建REALY基准数据集，包含精确面部关键点、高质量区域掩码和拓扑一致网格，采用区域级形状对齐计算形状误差，同时推导出新的高精度3DMM基底HIFI3D++。
AI.result: 实验发现DECA在鼻部区域表现最佳，GANFit在脸颊区域更优，并验证了REALY在细粒度评估中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: REALY方法通过区域级对齐显著提升了3D人脸重建评估的准确性，为改进现有方法提供了更细致的性能分析依据。
